authors_text: Xuedou Xiao,Juecheng Zhang,Wei Wang,Jianhua He,Qian Zhang
title: DNN-Driven Compressive Offloading for Edge-Assisted Semantic Video Segmentation
title_zh: 用于边缘辅助语义视频分割的 DNN 驱动压缩卸载
abstract: Deep learning has shown impressive performance in semantic segmentation, but it is still unaffordable for resource-constrained mobile devices. While offloading computation tasks is promising, the high traffic demands overwhelm the limited bandwidth. Existing compression algorithms are not fit for semantic segmentation, as the lack of obvious and concentrated regions of interest (RoIs) forces the adoption of uniform compression strategies, leading to low compression ratios or accuracy. This paper introduces STAC, a DNN-driven compression scheme tailored for edge-assisted semantic video segmentation. STAC is the first to exploit DNN's gradients as spatial sensitivity metrics for spatial adaptive compression and achieves superior compression ratio and accuracy. Yet, it is challenging to adapt this content-customized compression to videos. Practical issues include varying spatial sensitivity and huge bandwidth consumption for compression strategy feedback and offloading. We tackle these issues through a spatiotemporal adaptive scheme, which (1) takes partial strategy generation operations offline to reduce communication load, and (2) propagates compression strategies and segmentation results across frames through dense optical flow, and adaptively offloads keyframes to accommodate video content. We implement STAC on a commodity mobile device. Experiments show that STAC can save up to 20.95% of bandwidth without losing accuracy, compared to the state-of-the-art algorithm.
summary: Deep learning has shown impressive performance in semantic segmentation, but it is still unaffordable for resource-constrained mobile devices. While offloading computation tasks is promising, the high traffic demands overwhelm the limited bandwidth. Existing compression algorithms are not fit for semantic segmentation, as the lack of obvious and concentrated regions of interest (RoIs) forces the adoption of uniform compression strategies, leading to low compression ratios or accuracy. This paper introduces STAC, a DNN-driven compression scheme tailored for edge-assisted semantic video segmentation. STAC is the first to exploit DNN's gradients as spatial sensitivity metrics for spatial adaptive compression and achieves superior compression ratio and accuracy. Yet, it is challenging to adapt this content-customized compression to videos. Practical issues include varying spatial sensitivity and huge bandwidth consumption for compression strategy feedback and offloading. We tackle these issues through a spatiotemporal adaptive scheme, which (1) takes partial strategy generation operations offline to reduce communication load, and (2) propagates compression strategies and segmentation results across frames through dense optical flow, and adaptively offloads keyframes to accommodate video content. We implement STAC on a commodity mobile device. Experiments show that STAC can save up to 20.95% of bandwidth without losing accuracy, compared to the state-of-the-art algorithm.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在语义分割方面表现出了令人印象深刻的性能，但对于资源有限的移动设备来说仍然难以承受。虽然卸载计算任务很有希望，但高流量需求超出了有限的带宽。现有的压缩算法不适合语义分割，因为缺乏明显且集中的感兴趣区域（RoI）迫使采用统一的压缩策略，导致压缩率或精度较低。本文介绍了 STAC，一种专为边缘辅助语义视频分割而定制的 DNN 驱动压缩方案。 STAC 是第一个利用 DNN 的梯度作为空间自适应压缩的空间敏感性指标，并实现了卓越的压缩比和精度。然而，将这种内容定制压缩应用于视频具有挑战性。实际问题包括不同的空间敏感性以及压缩策略反馈和卸载的巨大带宽消耗。我们通过时空自适应方案解决这些问题，该方案（1）使部分策略生成操作离线以减少通信负载，（2）通过密集光流跨帧传播压缩策略和分割结果，并自适应卸载关键帧以适应视频内容。我们在商用移动设备上实施 STAC。实验表明，与最先进的算法相比，STAC 可以在不损失准确性的情况下节省高达 20.95% 的带宽。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STAC，一种基于深度神经网络（DNN）的压缩方案，用于边缘辅助的语义视频分割任务，旨在解决移动设备计算资源不足和带宽限制的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有压缩算法无法适应语义分割任务中缺乏明显感兴趣区域（RoIs）的特点，导致压缩比低或精度下降；视频处理还面临空间敏感性变化和压缩策略反馈带宽消耗大的挑战。
AI.method: STAC利用DNN梯度作为空间敏感性指标实现自适应压缩，并通过时空自适应方案（离线生成策略、基于光流传播压缩策略和关键帧自适应卸载）解决视频处理中的带宽和动态性问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，STAC在不损失精度的情况下，相比现有最佳算法可节省高达20.95%的带宽。
AI.conclusion: STAC通过结合DNN梯度分析与时空自适应机制，有效解决了边缘辅助语义视频分割中的压缩与卸载难题，为资源受限设备提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Zerong Zheng,Han Huang,Tao Yu,Hongwen Zhang,Yandong Guo,Yebin Liu
title: Structured Local Radiance Fields for Human Avatar Modeling
title_zh: 用于人体头像建模的结构化局部辐射场
abstract: It is extremely challenging to create an animatable clothed human avatar from RGB videos, especially for loose clothes due to the difficulties in motion modeling. To address this problem, we introduce a novel representation on the basis of recent neural scene rendering techniques. The core of our representation is a set of structured local radiance fields, which are anchored to the pre-defined nodes sampled on a statistical human body template. These local radiance fields not only leverage the flexibility of implicit representation in shape and appearance modeling, but also factorize cloth deformations into skeleton motions, node residual translations and the dynamic detail variations inside each individual radiance field. To learn our representation from RGB data and facilitate pose generalization, we propose to learn the node translations and the detail variations in a conditional generative latent space. Overall, our method enables automatic construction of animatable human avatars for various types of clothes without the need for scanning subject-specific templates, and can generate realistic images with dynamic details for novel poses. Experiment show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: It is extremely challenging to create an animatable clothed human avatar from RGB videos, especially for loose clothes due to the difficulties in motion modeling. To address this problem, we introduce a novel representation on the basis of recent neural scene rendering techniques. The core of our representation is a set of structured local radiance fields, which are anchored to the pre-defined nodes sampled on a statistical human body template. These local radiance fields not only leverage the flexibility of implicit representation in shape and appearance modeling, but also factorize cloth deformations into skeleton motions, node residual translations and the dynamic detail variations inside each individual radiance field. To learn our representation from RGB data and facilitate pose generalization, we propose to learn the node translations and the detail variations in a conditional generative latent space. Overall, our method enables automatic construction of animatable human avatars for various types of clothes without the need for scanning subject-specific templates, and can generate realistic images with dynamic details for novel poses. Experiment show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 由于运动建模的困难，从 RGB 视频创建可动画的穿着衣服的人体头像非常具有挑战性，特别是对于宽松的衣服。为了解决这个问题，我们在最新的神经场景渲染技术的基础上引入了一种新颖的表示形式。我们表示的核心是一组结构化的局部辐射场，它们锚定到在统计人体模板上采样的预定义节点。这些局部辐射场不仅利用了形状和外观建模中隐式表示的灵活性，而且还将布料变形分解为骨架运动、节点残差平移和每个单独辐射场内的动态细节变化。为了从 RGB 数据中学习我们的表示并促进姿势泛化，我们建议学习条件生成潜在空间中的节点平移和细节变化。总体而言，我们的方法可以自动构建各种类型衣服的可动画人体头像，而无需扫描特定于主题的模板，并且可以生成具有新颖姿势的动态细节的逼真图像。实验表明，我们的方法在定性和定量上都优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构化局部辐射场的方法，用于从RGB视频中自动构建可动画的人体化身，尤其针对松散衣物的建模挑战。
AI.motivation: 从RGB视频生成可动画的穿衣人体化身（尤其是松散衣物）存在运动建模困难，传统方法难以处理衣物变形与动态细节。
AI.method: 通过预定义节点采样的统计人体模板锚定结构化局部辐射场，将衣物变形分解为骨骼运动、节点残差平移和局部动态细节，并在条件生成潜在空间中学习节点平移与细节变化以实现姿态泛化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有最先进方法，能生成具有动态细节的新型姿态真实图像。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需扫描特定人体模板即可自动构建可动画化身，通过辐射场分解与潜在空间学习有效解决了松散衣物建模难题。

title: A Novel Remote Sensing Approach to Recognize and Monitor Red Palm Weevil in Date Palm Trees
title_zh: 一种识别和监测枣椰树中红棕象甲的新型遥感方法
abstract: The spread of the Red Pal Weevil (RPW) has become an existential threat for palm trees around the world. In the Middle East, RPW is causing wide-spread damage to date palm Phoenix dactylifera L., having both agricultural impacts on the palm production and environmental impacts. Early detection of RPW is very challenging, especially at large scale. This research proposes a novel remote sensing approach to recognize and monitor red palm weevil in date palm trees, using a combination of vegetation indices, object detection and semantic segmentation techniques. The study area consists of date palm trees with three classes, including healthy palms, smallish palms and severely infected palms. This proposed method achieved a promising 0.947 F1 score on test data set. This work paves the way for deploying artificial intelligence approaches to monitor RPW in large-scale as well as provide guidance for practitioners.
summary: The spread of the Red Pal Weevil (RPW) has become an existential threat for palm trees around the world. In the Middle East, RPW is causing wide-spread damage to date palm Phoenix dactylifera L., having both agricultural impacts on the palm production and environmental impacts. Early detection of RPW is very challenging, especially at large scale. This research proposes a novel remote sensing approach to recognize and monitor red palm weevil in date palm trees, using a combination of vegetation indices, object detection and semantic segmentation techniques. The study area consists of date palm trees with three classes, including healthy palms, smallish palms and severely infected palms. This proposed method achieved a promising 0.947 F1 score on test data set. This work paves the way for deploying artificial intelligence approaches to monitor RPW in large-scale as well as provide guidance for practitioners.
abstract_zh: 红棕象甲 (RPW) 的蔓延已成为世界各地棕榈树的生存威胁。在中东，RPW 对枣椰树 (Phoenix dactylifera L.) 造成广泛损害，对棕榈生产造成农业影响，同时也对环境造成影响。 RPW 的早期检测非常具有挑战性，尤其是大规模检测。本研究提出了一种新颖的遥感方法，结合植被指数、目标检测和语义分割技术来识别和监测枣椰树中的红棕象甲。研究区由三类枣椰树组成，包括健康棕榈树、小棕榈树和严重感染棕榈树。该方法在测试数据集上取得了令人鼓舞的 0.947 F1 分数。这项工作为部署人工智能方法大规模监控 RPW 铺平了道路，并为从业者提供指导。

AI.result: 测试数据集上达到0.947的F1分数，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模红棕象甲监测提供了可行的AI技术路径，并为实践应用提供指导。

title: Enhancing Transformer Efficiency for Multivariate Time Series Classification
title_zh: 提高多元时间序列分类的变压器效率
abstract: Most current multivariate time series (MTS) classification algorithms focus on improving the predictive accuracy. However, for large-scale (either high-dimensional or long-sequential) time series (TS) datasets, there is an additional consideration: to design an efficient network architecture to reduce computational costs such as training time and memory footprint. In this work we propose a methodology based on module-wise pruning and Pareto analysis to investigate the relationship between model efficiency and accuracy, as well as its complexity. Comprehensive experiments on benchmark MTS datasets illustrate the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Most current multivariate time series (MTS) classification algorithms focus on improving the predictive accuracy. However, for large-scale (either high-dimensional or long-sequential) time series (TS) datasets, there is an additional consideration: to design an efficient network architecture to reduce computational costs such as training time and memory footprint. In this work we propose a methodology based on module-wise pruning and Pareto analysis to investigate the relationship between model efficiency and accuracy, as well as its complexity. Comprehensive experiments on benchmark MTS datasets illustrate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 当前大多数多元时间序列 (MTS) 分类算法的重点是提高预测准确性。然而，对于大规模（高维或长序列）时间序列（TS）数据集，还有一个额外的考虑因素：设计高效的网络架构以减少训练时间和内存占用等计算成本。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于模块修剪和帕累托分析的方法来研究模型效率和准确性之间的关系及其复杂性。对基准 MTS 数据集的综合实验说明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过优化Transformer架构提升多变量时间序列分类任务的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有时间序列分类算法过度关注预测精度，忽视了大规模数据集对计算资源和训练效率的需求。
AI.method: 采用模块级剪枝技术结合帕累托前沿分析，平衡模型复杂度与分类准确率的关系。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上验证了该方法能在保持较高分类精度的同时显著降低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 提出的效率优化框架为设计兼顾性能与资源消耗的时间序列模型提供了新思路。

authors_text: Wenda Zhao,Abhishek Goudar,Xinyuan Qiao,Angela P. Schoellig
title: UTIL: An Ultra-wideband Time-difference-of-arrival Indoor Localization Dataset
title_zh: UTIL：超宽带到达时间差室内定位数据集
abstract: Ultra-wideband (UWB) time-difference-of-arrival (TDOA)-based localization has emerged as a promising, low-cost, and scalable indoor localization solution, which is especially suited for multi-robot applications. However, there is a lack of public datasets to study and benchmark UWB TDOA positioning technology in cluttered indoor environments. We fill in this gap by presenting a comprehensive dataset using Decawave's DWM1000 UWB modules. To characterize the UWB TDOA measurement performance under various line-of-sight (LOS) and non-line-of-sight (NLOS) conditions, we collected signal-to-noise ratio (SNR), power difference values, and raw UWB TDOA measurements during the identification experiments. We also conducted a cumulative total of around 150 minutes of real-world flight experiments on a customized quadrotor platform to benchmark the UWB TDOA localization performance for mobile robots. The quadrotor was commanded to fly with an average speed of 0.45 m/s in both obstacle-free and cluttered environments using four different UWB anchor constellations. Raw sensor data including UWB TDOA, inertial measurement unit (IMU), optical flow, time-of-flight (ToF) laser altitude, and millimeter-accurate ground truth robot poses were collected during the flights. The dataset and development kit are available at https://utiasdsl.github.io/util-uwb-dataset/.
summary: Ultra-wideband (UWB) time-difference-of-arrival (TDOA)-based localization has emerged as a promising, low-cost, and scalable indoor localization solution, which is especially suited for multi-robot applications. However, there is a lack of public datasets to study and benchmark UWB TDOA positioning technology in cluttered indoor environments. We fill in this gap by presenting a comprehensive dataset using Decawave's DWM1000 UWB modules. To characterize the UWB TDOA measurement performance under various line-of-sight (LOS) and non-line-of-sight (NLOS) conditions, we collected signal-to-noise ratio (SNR), power difference values, and raw UWB TDOA measurements during the identification experiments. We also conducted a cumulative total of around 150 minutes of real-world flight experiments on a customized quadrotor platform to benchmark the UWB TDOA localization performance for mobile robots. The quadrotor was commanded to fly with an average speed of 0.45 m/s in both obstacle-free and cluttered environments using four different UWB anchor constellations. Raw sensor data including UWB TDOA, inertial measurement unit (IMU), optical flow, time-of-flight (ToF) laser altitude, and millimeter-accurate ground truth robot poses were collected during the flights. The dataset and development kit are available at https://utiasdsl.github.io/util-uwb-dataset/.
abstract_zh: 基于超宽带 (UWB) 到达时间差 (TDOA) 的定位已成为一种有前景、低成本且可扩展的室内定位解决方案，特别适合多机器人应用。然而，缺乏公共数据集来研究和基准杂乱的室内环境中的 UWB TDOA 定位技术。我们通过使用 Decawave 的 DWM1000 UWB 模块提供综合数据集来填补这一空白。为了表征各种视距 (LOS) 和非视距 (NLOS) 条件下的 UWB TDOA 测量性能，我们在识别实验期间收集了信噪比 (SNR)、功率差值和原始 UWB TDOA 测量结果。我们还在定制的四旋翼飞行器平台上进行了累计约 150 分钟的真实飞行实验，以对移动机器人的 UWB TDOA 定位性能进行基准测试。四旋翼飞行器被命令使用四个不同的 UWB 锚星座在无障碍和杂乱环境中以 0.45 m/s 的平均速度飞行。在飞行过程中收集了原始传感器数据，包括 UWB TDOA、惯性测量单元 (IMU)、光流、飞行时间 (ToF) 激光高度和毫米级精度的地面真实机器人姿态。数据集和开发套件可从 https://utiasdsl.github.io/util-uwb-dataset/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为UTIL的超宽带（UWB）时间差到达（TDOA）室内定位数据集，用于研究和基准测试复杂室内环境下的UWB TDOA定位技术。
AI.motivation: 现有公开数据集缺乏对复杂室内环境下UWB TDOA定位性能的研究支持，尤其针对多机器人应用的定位技术验证不足。
AI.method: 基于Decawave DWM1000模块，采集不同视距（LOS/NLOS）条件下的信噪比、功率差及原始TDOA测量数据，并通过四旋翼无人机在障碍-free和复杂环境中进行约150分钟的飞行实验，同步记录UWB TDOA、IMU、光学流、激光测距及高精度地面真实位姿数据。
AI.result: 构建包含多传感器原始数据及高精度地面真实值的公开数据集，验证了不同锚点配置下UWB TDOA定位性能，为移动机器人定位算法研究提供基准数据。
AI.conclusion: UTIL数据集填补了复杂室内环境下UWB TDOA定位研究的数据空白，可推动鲁棒定位算法开发及多机器人系统应用。

The quadrotor was commanded to fly with an average speed of 0.45 m/s in both obstacle-free and cluttered environments using four different UWB anchor constellations. Raw sensor data including UWB TDOA, inertial measurement unit (IMU), optical flow, time-of-flight (ToF) laser altitude, and millimeter-accurate ground truth robot poses were collected during the flights. The dataset and development kit are available at https://utiasdsl.github.io/util-uwb-dataset/. 基于超宽带 (UWB) 到达时间差 (TDOA) 的定位已成为一种有前景、低成本且可扩展的室内定位解决方案，特别适合多机器人应用。然而，缺乏公共数据集来研究和基准杂乱的室内环境中的 UWB TDOA 定位技术。我们通过使用 Decawave 的 DWM1000 UWB 模块提供综合数据集来填补这一空白。为了表征各种视距 (LOS) 和非视距 (NLOS) 条件下的 UWB TDOA 测量性能，我们在识别实验期间收集了信噪比 (SNR)、功率差值和原始 UWB TDOA 测量结果。我们还在定制的四旋翼飞行器平台上进行了累计约 150 分钟的真实飞行实验，以对移动机器人的 UWB TDOA 定位性能进行基准测试。四旋翼飞行器被命令使用四个不同的 UWB 锚星座在无障碍和杂乱环境中以 0.45 m/s 的平均速度飞行。在飞行过程中收集了原始传感器数据，包括 UWB TDOA、惯性测量单元 (IMU)、光流、飞行时间 (ToF) 激光高度和毫米级精度的地面真实机器人姿态。数据集和开发套件可从 https://utiasdsl.github.io/util-uwb-dataset/ 获取。 本文提出一个名为UTIL的超宽带（UWB）时间差到达（TDOA）室内定位数据集，用于研究和基准测试复杂室内环境下的UWB TDOA定位技术。 Wenda Zhao,Abhishek Goudar,Xinyuan Qiao,Angela P. Schoellig cs.RO

authors_text: Toshihiro Nishimura,Kensuke Shimizu,Seita Nojiri,Kenjiro Tadakuma,Yosuke Suzuki,Tokuo Tsuji,Tetsuyou Watanabe
title: Soft robotic hand with finger-bending/friction-reduction switching mechanism through 1-degree-of-freedom flow control
title_zh: 软体机械手，通过 1 自由度流量控制实现手指弯曲/减摩切换机制
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (2022)(Early Access)
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (2022)(Early Access)
abstract: This paper proposes a novel pneumatic soft robotic hand that incorporates a mechanism that can switch the airflow path using a single airflow control. The developed hand can control the finger motion and operate the surface friction variable mechanism. In the friction variable mechanism, a lubricant is injected onto the high-friction finger surface to reduce surface friction. To inject the lubrication using a positive-pressure airflow, the Venturi effect is applied. The design and evaluation of the airflow-path switching and friction variable mechanisms are described. Moreover, the entire design of a soft robotic hand equipped with these mechanisms is presented. The performance was validated through grasping, placing, and manipulation tests.
summary: This paper proposes a novel pneumatic soft robotic hand that incorporates a mechanism that can switch the airflow path using a single airflow control. The developed hand can control the finger motion and operate the surface friction variable mechanism. In the friction variable mechanism, a lubricant is injected onto the high-friction finger surface to reduce surface friction. To inject the lubrication using a positive-pressure airflow, the Venturi effect is applied. The design and evaluation of the airflow-path switching and friction variable mechanisms are described. Moreover, the entire design of a soft robotic hand equipped with these mechanisms is presented. The performance was validated through grasping, placing, and manipulation tests.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新型气动软机器人手，它采用了一种可以使用单一气流控制来切换气流路径的机制。开发的手可以控制手指运动并操作表面摩擦可变机构。在摩擦可变机构中，润滑剂被注入到高摩擦手指表面以减少表面摩擦。为了使用正压气流注入润滑，应用了文丘里效应。描述了气流路径切换和摩擦可变机构的设计和评估。此外，还介绍了配备这些机构的软机器人手的整个设计。通过抓取、放置和操作测试来验证性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型气动软体机械手，通过单自由度气流控制实现手指弯曲与摩擦调节的切换机制。
AI.motivation: 传统软体机械手在抓取和操作过程中难以同时实现精确运动控制与摩擦调节，影响任务适应性。
AI.method: 利用单气流控制切换气路路径，结合文丘里效应注入润滑剂降低摩擦，并设计集成该机制的软体机械手。
AI.result: 通过抓取、放置及操作测试验证了机械手在复杂任务中的性能，证实其运动控制与摩擦调节的协同有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该设计通过气路控制与摩擦调节的集成，提升了软体机械手的灵活性和对多样化任务的适应能力。

title: Integrating Physiological Time Series and Clinical Notes with Transformer for Early Prediction of Sepsis
title_zh: 将生理时间序列和临床记录与 Transformer 相结合以早期预测脓毒症
abstract: Sepsis is a leading cause of death in the Intensive Care Units (ICU). Early detection of sepsis is critical for patient survival. In this paper, we propose a multimodal Transformer model for early sepsis prediction, using the physiological time series data and clinical notes for each patient within $36$ hours of ICU admission. Specifically, we aim to predict sepsis using only the first 12, 18, 24, 30 and 36 hours of laboratory measurements, vital signs, patient demographics, and clinical notes. We evaluate our model on two large critical care datasets: MIMIC-III and eICU-CRD. The proposed method is compared with six baselines. In addition, ablation analysis and case studies are conducted to study the influence of each individual component of the model and the contribution of each data modality for early sepsis prediction. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, which outperforms competitive baselines on all metrics.
summary: Sepsis is a leading cause of death in the Intensive Care Units (ICU). Early detection of sepsis is critical for patient survival. In this paper, we propose a multimodal Transformer model for early sepsis prediction, using the physiological time series data and clinical notes for each patient within $36$ hours of ICU admission. Specifically, we aim to predict sepsis using only the first 12, 18, 24, 30 and 36 hours of laboratory measurements, vital signs, patient demographics, and clinical notes. We evaluate our model on two large critical care datasets: MIMIC-III and eICU-CRD. The proposed method is compared with six baselines. In addition, ablation analysis and case studies are conducted to study the influence of each individual component of the model and the contribution of each data modality for early sepsis prediction. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, which outperforms competitive baselines on all metrics.
abstract_zh: 败血症是重症监护病房 (ICU) 死亡的主要原因。脓毒症的早期发现对于患者的生存至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于早期脓毒症预测的多模式 Transformer 模型，使用每位患者在 ICU 入院 36 美元小时内的生理时间序列数据和临床记录。具体来说，我们的目标是仅使用前 12、18、24、30 和 36 小时的实验室测量、生命体征、患者人口统计数据和临床记录来预测败血症。我们在两个大型重症监护数据集上评估我们的模型：MIMIC-III 和 eICU-CRD。所提出的方法与六个基线进行了比较。此外，还进行了消融分析和案例研究，以研究模型每个单独组成部分的影响以及每种数据模式对早期脓毒症预测的贡献。实验结果证明了我们的方法的有效性，该方法在所有指标上都优于竞争基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态Transformer模型，结合生理时间序列数据和临床笔记，用于ICU患者入院后36小时内的早期败血症预测。
AI.motivation: 败血症是ICU死亡的主要原因，早期检测对患者生存至关重要。现有方法未能有效整合生理数据与临床文本信息，需开发更精准的预测模型。
AI.method: 构建基于Transformer的多模态框架，融合患者入院前12/18/24/30/36小时的实验室指标、生命体征、人口统计学数据及临床笔记，在MIMIC-III和eICU-CRD数据集上验证，并通过消融实验分析各模块贡献。
AI.result: 所提方法在两个大型重症监护数据集上所有评估指标均优于六个基线模型，证明了多模态Transformer在早期败血症预测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 整合生理时序数据与临床文本的Transformer模型显著提升败血症预测性能，实验表明不同数据模态对预测结果均有重要贡献。

authors_text: Jun Yu,Zhongpeng Cai,Peng He,Guocheng Xie,Qiang Ling
title: Multi-model Ensemble Learning Method for Human Expression Recognition
title_zh: 人类表情识别的多模型集成学习方法
abstract: Analysis of human affect plays a vital role in human-computer interaction (HCI) systems. Due to the difficulty in capturing large amounts of real-life data, most of the current methods have mainly focused on controlled environments, which limit their application scenarios. To tackle this problem, we propose our solution based on the ensemble learning method. Specifically, we formulate the problem as a classification task, and then train several expression classification models with different types of backbones--ResNet, EfficientNet and InceptionNet. After that, the outputs of several models are fused via model ensemble method to predict the final results. Moreover, we introduce the multi-fold ensemble method to train and ensemble several models with the same architecture but different data distributions to enhance the performance of our solution. We conduct many experiments on the AffWild2 dataset of the ABAW2022 Challenge, and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our solution.
summary: Analysis of human affect plays a vital role in human-computer interaction (HCI) systems. Due to the difficulty in capturing large amounts of real-life data, most of the current methods have mainly focused on controlled environments, which limit their application scenarios. To tackle this problem, we propose our solution based on the ensemble learning method. Specifically, we formulate the problem as a classification task, and then train several expression classification models with different types of backbones--ResNet, EfficientNet and InceptionNet. After that, the outputs of several models are fused via model ensemble method to predict the final results. Moreover, we introduce the multi-fold ensemble method to train and ensemble several models with the same architecture but different data distributions to enhance the performance of our solution. We conduct many experiments on the AffWild2 dataset of the ABAW2022 Challenge, and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our solution.
abstract_zh: 人类情感分析在人机交互（HCI）系统中起着至关重要的作用。由于难以捕获大量现实生活数据，目前大多数方法主要集中在受控环境上，这限制了它们的应用场景。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了基于集成学习方法的解决方案。具体来说，我们将问题表述为分类任务，然后训练具有不同类型主干的几个表达分类模型——ResNet、EfficientNet 和 InceptionNet。之后，通过模型集成方法融合多个模型的输出来预测最终结果。此外，我们引入了多重集成方法来训练和集成具有相同架构但不同数据分布的多个模型，以提高我们解决方案的性能。我们在 ABAW2022 挑战赛的 AffWild2 数据集上进行了多次实验，结果证明了我们解决方案的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多模型集成学习方法，用于提升真实场景下的人类表情识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法受限于受控环境数据，难以适应真实场景的复杂性与数据多样性。
AI.method: 采用ResNet、EfficientNet和InceptionNet构建多模型分类器，通过模型输出融合与多折集成策略提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在AffWild2数据集上实验验证了方法的有效性，优于单一模型与传统集成方法。
AI.conclusion: 多模型集成框架可有效提升表情识别泛化能力，为复杂场景HCI应用提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种多模型集成学习方法，用于提升真实场景下的人类表情识别准确率。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法受限于受控环境数据，难以适应真实场景的复杂性与数据多样性。

search_text: Multi-model Ensemble Learning Method for Human Expression Recognition 人类表情识别的多模型集成学习方法 Analysis of human affect plays a vital role in human-computer interaction (HCI) systems. Due to the difficulty in capturing large amounts of real-life data, most of the current methods have mainly focused on controlled environments, which limit their application scenarios. To tackle this problem, we propose our solution based on the ensemble learning method. Specifically, we formulate the problem as a classification task, and then train several expression classification models with different types of backbones--ResNet, EfficientNet and InceptionNet. After that, the outputs of several models are fused via model ensemble method to predict the final results. Moreover, we introduce the multi-fold ensemble method to train and ensemble several models with the same architecture but different data distributions to enhance the performance of our solution. We conduct many experiments on the AffWild2 dataset of the ABAW2022 Challenge, and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our solution. 人类情感分析在人机交互（HCI）系统中起着至关重要的作用。由于难以捕获大量现实生活数据，目前大多数方法主要集中在受控环境上，这限制了它们的应用场景。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了基于集成学习方法的解决方案。具体来说，我们将问题表述为分类任务，然后训练具有不同类型主干的几个表达分类模型——ResNet、EfficientNet 和 InceptionNet。之后，通过模型集成方法融合多个模型的输出来预测最终结果。此外，我们引入了多重集成方法来训练和集成具有相同架构但不同数据分布的多个模型，以提高我们解决方案的性能。我们在 ABAW2022 挑战赛的 AffWild2 数据集上进行了多次实验，结果证明了我们解决方案的有效性。 提出一种多模型集成学习方法，用于提升真实场景下的人类表情识别准确率。 Jun Yu,Zhongpeng Cai,Peng He,Guocheng Xie,Qiang Ling cs.CV

authors_text: Eric Zelikman,Yuhuai Wu,Jesse Mu,Noah D. Goodman
title: STaR: Bootstrapping Reasoning With Reasoning
title_zh: STAR：用推理引导推理
abstract: Generating step-by-step "chain-of-thought" rationales improves language model performance on complex reasoning tasks like mathematics or commonsense question-answering. However, inducing language model rationale generation currently requires either constructing massive rationale datasets or sacrificing accuracy by using only few-shot inference. We propose a technique to iteratively leverage a small number of rationale examples and a large dataset without rationales, to bootstrap the ability to perform successively more complex reasoning. This technique, the "Self-Taught Reasoner" (STaR), relies on a simple loop: generate rationales to answer many questions, prompted with a few rationale examples; if the generated answers are wrong, try again to generate a rationale given the correct answer; fine-tune on all the rationales that ultimately yielded correct answers; repeat. We show that STaR significantly improves performance on multiple datasets compared to a model fine-tuned to directly predict final answers, and performs comparably to fine-tuning a 30$\times$ larger state-of-the-art language model on CommensenseQA. Thus, STaR lets a model improve itself by learning from its own generated reasoning.
summary: Generating step-by-step "chain-of-thought" rationales improves language model performance on complex reasoning tasks like mathematics or commonsense question-answering. However, inducing language model rationale generation currently requires either constructing massive rationale datasets or sacrificing accuracy by using only few-shot inference. We propose a technique to iteratively leverage a small number of rationale examples and a large dataset without rationales, to bootstrap the ability to perform successively more complex reasoning. This technique, the "Self-Taught Reasoner" (STaR), relies on a simple loop: generate rationales to answer many questions, prompted with a few rationale examples; if the generated answers are wrong, try again to generate a rationale given the correct answer; fine-tune on all the rationales that ultimately yielded correct answers; repeat. We show that STaR significantly improves performance on multiple datasets compared to a model fine-tuned to directly predict final answers, and performs comparably to fine-tuning a 30$\times$ larger state-of-the-art language model on CommensenseQA. Thus, STaR lets a model improve itself by learning from its own generated reasoning.
abstract_zh: 生成逐步的“思想链”基本原理可以提高语言模型在数学或常识问答等复杂推理任务上的性能。然而，目前诱导语言模型基本原理生成需要构建大量基本原理数据集，或者仅使用少量推理来牺牲准确性。我们提出了一种技术来迭代地利用少量的基本原理示例和没有基本原理的大型数据集，以引导连续执行更复杂的推理的能力。这种技术称为“自学推理机”（STaR），依赖于一个简单的循环：生成回答许多问题的基本原理，并用一些基本原理示例进行提示；如果生成的答案是错误的，请在给出正确答案的情况下再次尝试生成理由；微调最终产生正确答案的所有基本原理；重复。我们表明，与经过微调以直接预测最终答案的模型相比，STaR 显着提高了多个数据集上的性能，并且其性能与在 CommensenseQA 上微调 30 美元\倍$的最先进语言模型相当。因此，STAR 让模型通过学习自己生成的推理来改进自身。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STaR方法，通过迭代生成和微调模型的推理过程，提升语言模型在复杂任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需依赖大量标注数据或牺牲准确性，而STaR旨在通过少量示例和自监督学习实现推理能力提升。
AI.method: 通过循环生成解释、修正错误、微调模型的流程：用少量示例生成解释，根据正确答案迭代优化，最终微调模型。
AI.result: STaR在多个数据集上显著优于直接预测答案的模型，且在CommonsenseQA上接近30倍参数量模型的效果。
AI.conclusion: STaR通过自我生成的推理过程实现模型自我提升，为复杂任务提供高效训练方案。

title: Large-scale Bilingual Language-Image Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 大规模双语语言图像对比学习
abstract: This paper is a technical report to share our experience and findings building a Korean and English bilingual multimodal model. While many of the multimodal datasets focus on English and multilingual multimodal research uses machine-translated texts, employing such machine-translated texts is limited to describing unique expressions, cultural information, and proper noun in languages other than English. In this work, we collect 1.1 billion image-text pairs (708 million Korean and 476 million English) and train a bilingual multimodal model named KELIP. We introduce simple yet effective training schemes, including MAE pre-training and multi-crop augmentation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that a model trained with such training schemes shows competitive performance in both languages. Moreover, we discuss multimodal-related research questions: 1) strong augmentation-based methods can distract the model from learning proper multimodal relations; 2) training multimodal model without cross-lingual relation can learn the relation via visual semantics; 3) our bilingual KELIP can capture cultural differences of visual semantics for the same meaning of words; 4) a large-scale multimodal model can be used for multimodal feature analogy. We hope that this work will provide helpful experience and findings for future research. We provide an open-source pre-trained KELIP.
summary: This paper is a technical report to share our experience and findings building a Korean and English bilingual multimodal model. While many of the multimodal datasets focus on English and multilingual multimodal research uses machine-translated texts, employing such machine-translated texts is limited to describing unique expressions, cultural information, and proper noun in languages other than English. In this work, we collect 1.1 billion image-text pairs (708 million Korean and 476 million English) and train a bilingual multimodal model named KELIP. We introduce simple yet effective training schemes, including MAE pre-training and multi-crop augmentation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that a model trained with such training schemes shows competitive performance in both languages. Moreover, we discuss multimodal-related research questions: 1) strong augmentation-based methods can distract the model from learning proper multimodal relations; 2) training multimodal model without cross-lingual relation can learn the relation via visual semantics; 3) our bilingual KELIP can capture cultural differences of visual semantics for the same meaning of words; 4) a large-scale multimodal model can be used for multimodal feature analogy. We hope that this work will provide helpful experience and findings for future research. We provide an open-source pre-trained KELIP.
abstract_zh: 本文是一份技术报告，旨在分享我们构建韩语和英语双语多模式模型的经验和发现。虽然许多多模态数据集侧重于英语，并且多语言多模态研究使用机器翻译文本，但使用此类机器翻译文本仅限于描述英语以外语言的独特表达、文化信息和专有名词。在这项工作中，我们收集了 11 亿个图像文本对（7.08 亿韩语和 4.76 亿英语）并训练了名为 KELIP 的双语多模态模型。我们引入简单而有效的训练方案，包括 MAE 预训练和多作物增强。大量的实验表明，使用这种训练方案训练的模型在两种语言中都表现出有竞争力的性能。此外，我们讨论了与多模态相关的研究问题：1）基于强增强的方法可能会分散模型学习正确多模态关系的注意力； 2）训练没有跨语言关系的多模态模型可以通过视觉语义学习关系； 3）我们的双语KELIP可以捕获相同单词含义的视觉语义的文化差异； 4）大规模多模态模型可用于多模态特征类比。我们希望这项工作能为未来的研究提供有益的经验和发现。我们提供开源的预训练 KELIP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种大规模双语（韩语和英语）多模态模型KELIP，通过构建11亿图像-文本对数据集并采用MAE预训练和多裁剪增强方法进行训练。
AI.motivation: 现有多语言多模态研究依赖机器翻译文本，难以准确捕捉非英语语言的独特表达、文化信息和专有名词，需构建基于原生双语数据的多模态模型。
AI.method: 收集11亿图像-文本对（7.08亿韩语/4.76亿英语），采用MAE预训练和多裁剪增强方法训练双语多模态模型KELIP，并探讨多模态相关研究问题。
AI.result: KELIP在双语任务中表现优异，验证了增强方法对多模态关系学习的影响，展示了模型捕捉文化差异和视觉语义类比的能力。
AI.conclusion: 本工作为双语多模态研究提供了数据、方法和模型经验，开放源代码以促进未来研究。

We provide an open-source pre-trained KELIP. 本文是一份技术报告，旨在分享我们构建韩语和英语双语多模式模型的经验和发现。虽然许多多模态数据集侧重于英语，并且多语言多模态研究使用机器翻译文本，但使用此类机器翻译文本仅限于描述英语以外语言的独特表达、文化信息和专有名词。在这项工作中，我们收集了 11 亿个图像文本对（7.08 亿韩语和 4.76 亿英语）并训练了名为 KELIP 的双语多模态模型。我们引入简单而有效的训练方案，包括 MAE 预训练和多作物增强。大量的实验表明，使用这种训练方案训练的模型在两种语言中都表现出有竞争力的性能。此外，我们讨论了与多模态相关的研究问题：1）基于强增强的方法可能会分散模型学习正确多模态关系的注意力； 2）训练没有跨语言关系的多模态模型可以通过视觉语义学习关系； 3）我们的双语KELIP可以捕获相同单词含义的视觉语义的文化差异； 4）大规模多模态模型可用于多模态特征类比。我们希望这项工作能为未来的研究提供有益的经验和发现。我们提供开源的预训练 KELIP。 本文提出了一种大规模双语（韩语和英语）多模态模型KELIP，通过构建11亿图像-文本对数据集并采用MAE预训练和多裁剪增强方法进行训练。 Byungsoo Ko,Geonmo Gu cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Jianjun Qian,Shumin Zhu,Chaoyu Zhao,Jian Yang,Wai Keung Wong
title: OTFace: Hard Samples Guided Optimal Transport Loss for Deep Face Representation
title_zh: OTFace：硬样本引导深度面部表示的最佳传输损失
abstract: Face representation in the wild is extremely hard due to the large scale face variations. To this end, some deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been developed to learn discriminative feature by designing properly margin-based losses, which perform well on easy samples but fail on hard samples. Based on this, some methods mainly adjust the weights of hard samples in training stage to improve the feature discrimination. However, these methods overlook the feature distribution property which may lead to better results since the miss-classified hard samples may be corrected by using the distribution metric. This paper proposes the hard samples guided optimal transport (OT) loss for deep face representation, OTFace for short. OTFace aims to enhance the performance of hard samples by introducing the feature distribution discrepancy while maintain the performance on easy samples. Specifically, we embrace triplet scheme to indicate hard sample groups in one mini-batch during training. OT is then used to characterize the distribution differences of features from the high level convolutional layer. Finally, we integrate the margin-based-softmax (e.g. ArcFace or AM-Softmax) and OT to guide deep CNN learning. Extensive experiments are conducted on several benchmark databases. The quantitative results demonstrate the advantages of the proposed OTFace over state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Face representation in the wild is extremely hard due to the large scale face variations. To this end, some deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been developed to learn discriminative feature by designing properly margin-based losses, which perform well on easy samples but fail on hard samples. Based on this, some methods mainly adjust the weights of hard samples in training stage to improve the feature discrimination. However, these methods overlook the feature distribution property which may lead to better results since the miss-classified hard samples may be corrected by using the distribution metric. This paper proposes the hard samples guided optimal transport (OT) loss for deep face representation, OTFace for short. OTFace aims to enhance the performance of hard samples by introducing the feature distribution discrepancy while maintain the performance on easy samples. Specifically, we embrace triplet scheme to indicate hard sample groups in one mini-batch during training. OT is then used to characterize the distribution differences of features from the high level convolutional layer. Finally, we integrate the margin-based-softmax (e.g. ArcFace or AM-Softmax) and OT to guide deep CNN learning. Extensive experiments are conducted on several benchmark databases. The quantitative results demonstrate the advantages of the proposed OTFace over state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 由于大规模的面部变化，野外的面部表征极其困难。为此，一些深度卷积神经网络（CNN）被开发出来，通过设计适当的基于边际的损失来学习判别特征，这些网络在简单样本上表现良好，但在困难样本上表现不佳。基于此，一些方法主要在训练阶段调整硬样本的权重来提高特征区分度。然而，这些方法忽略了特征分布特性，这可能会带来更好的结果，因为错误分类的硬样本可以通过使用分布度量来纠正。本文提出了深度人脸表示的硬样本引导最优传输（OT）损失，简称OTFace。 OTFace旨在通过引入特征分布差异来增强硬样本的性能，同时保持简单样本的性能。具体来说，我们采用三元组方案来在训练期间在一个小批量中指示硬样本组。然后使用 OT 来表征来自高级卷积层的特征的分布差异。最后，我们整合基于边际的softmax（例如ArcFace或AM-Softmax）和OT来指导深度CNN学习。在几个基准数据库上进行了广泛的实验。定量结果证明了所提出的 OTFace 相对于最先进方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OTFace方法，通过引入最优传输损失（OT Loss）来增强深度人脸表征中对困难样本的处理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于边界 margin 的损失函数在简单样本上表现良好，但对困难样本效果不佳，且现有方法未充分考虑特征分布差异对修正误分类样本的潜在价值。
AI.method: 采用三元组策略在训练中识别困难样本组，利用最优传输理论量化高层卷积特征的分布差异，并将OT损失与ArcFace等margin-based softmax损失结合，指导CNN学习。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，OTFace在定量指标上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: OTFace通过结合特征分布差异与margin损失，有效提升了困难样本的表征性能，同时保持了简单样本的识别效果，具有竞争力。

authors_text: Shancong Mou,Meng Cao,Haoping Bai,Ping Huang,Jianjun Shi,Jiulong Shan
title: PAEDID: Patch Autoencoder Based Deep Image Decomposition For Pixel-level Defective Region Segmentation
title_zh: PAEDID：基于补丁自动编码器的深度图像分解，用于像素级缺陷区域分割
abstract: Unsupervised pixel-level defective region segmentation is an important task in image-based anomaly detection for various industrial applications. The state-of-the-art methods have their own advantages and limitations: matrix-decomposition-based methods are robust to noise but lack complex background image modeling capability; representation-based methods are good at defective region localization but lack accuracy in defective region shape contour extraction; reconstruction-based methods detected defective region match well with the ground truth defective region shape contour but are noisy. To combine the best of both worlds, we present an unsupervised patch autoencoder based deep image decomposition (PAEDID) method for defective region segmentation. In the training stage, we learn the common background as a deep image prior by a patch autoencoder (PAE) network. In the inference stage, we formulate anomaly detection as an image decomposition problem with the deep image prior and domain-specific regularizations. By adopting the proposed approach, the defective regions in the image can be accurately extracted in an unsupervised fashion. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the PAEDID method in simulation studies and an industrial dataset in the case study.
summary: Unsupervised pixel-level defective region segmentation is an important task in image-based anomaly detection for various industrial applications. The state-of-the-art methods have their own advantages and limitations: matrix-decomposition-based methods are robust to noise but lack complex background image modeling capability; representation-based methods are good at defective region localization but lack accuracy in defective region shape contour extraction; reconstruction-based methods detected defective region match well with the ground truth defective region shape contour but are noisy. To combine the best of both worlds, we present an unsupervised patch autoencoder based deep image decomposition (PAEDID) method for defective region segmentation. In the training stage, we learn the common background as a deep image prior by a patch autoencoder (PAE) network. In the inference stage, we formulate anomaly detection as an image decomposition problem with the deep image prior and domain-specific regularizations. By adopting the proposed approach, the defective regions in the image can be accurately extracted in an unsupervised fashion. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the PAEDID method in simulation studies and an industrial dataset in the case study.
abstract_zh: 无监督像素级缺陷区域分割是各种工业应用中基于图像的异常检测的一项重要任务。最先进的方法有其自身的优点和局限性：基于矩阵分解的方法对噪声具有鲁棒性，但缺乏复杂的背景图像建模能力；基于表示的方法擅长缺陷区域定位，但在缺陷区域形状轮廓提取方面缺乏准确性；基于重建的方法检测到的缺陷区域与地面真实缺陷区域形状轮廓匹配良好，但有噪声。为了结合两全其美，我们提出了一种基于无监督补丁自动编码器的深度图像分解（PAEDID）方法，用于缺陷区域分割。在训练阶段，我们通过补丁自动编码器（PAE）网络将公共背景学习为深度图像。在推理阶段，我们将异常检测制定为具有深度图像先验和特定领域正则化的图像分解问题。通过采用所提出的方法，可以以无监督的方式准确地提取图像中的缺陷区域。我们在案例研究中展示了 PAEDID 方法在模拟研究和工业数据集中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于补丁自编码器的深度图像分解方法（PAEDID），用于无监督像素级缺陷区域分割。
AI.motivation: 现有缺陷分割方法存在抗噪能力与背景建模能力难以兼顾、缺陷轮廓提取不准确或存在噪声等问题，需整合多方法优势。
AI.method: 训练阶段通过补丁自编码器学习背景先验，推理阶段将异常检测转化为图像分解问题，结合深度先验与领域正则化实现缺陷区域提取。
AI.result: 在模拟实验和工业数据集上验证了PAEDID方法的有效性，能够准确分割缺陷区域。
AI.conclusion: PAEDID方法通过融合多技术优势，在无监督条件下实现了高精度的缺陷区域分割，适用于工业检测场景。

authors_text: Vikram Gupta,Trisha Mittal,Puneet Mathur,Vaibhav Mishra,Mayank Maheshwari,Aniket Bera,Debdoot Mukherjee,Dinesh Manocha
title: 3MASSIV: Multilingual, Multimodal and Multi-Aspect dataset of Social Media Short Videos
title_zh: 3MASSIV：社交媒体短视频的多语言、多模态、多方面数据集
abstract: We present 3MASSIV, a multilingual, multimodal and multi-aspect, expertly-annotated dataset of diverse short videos extracted from short-video social media platform - Moj. 3MASSIV comprises of 50k short videos (20 seconds average duration) and 100K unlabeled videos in 11 different languages and captures popular short video trends like pranks, fails, romance, comedy expressed via unique audio-visual formats like self-shot videos, reaction videos, lip-synching, self-sung songs, etc. 3MASSIV presents an opportunity for multimodal and multilingual semantic understanding on these unique videos by annotating them for concepts, affective states, media types, and audio language. We present a thorough analysis of 3MASSIV and highlight the variety and unique aspects of our dataset compared to other contemporary popular datasets with strong baselines. We also show how the social media content in 3MASSIV is dynamic and temporal in nature, which can be used for semantic understanding tasks and cross-lingual analysis.
summary: We present 3MASSIV, a multilingual, multimodal and multi-aspect, expertly-annotated dataset of diverse short videos extracted from short-video social media platform - Moj. 3MASSIV comprises of 50k short videos (20 seconds average duration) and 100K unlabeled videos in 11 different languages and captures popular short video trends like pranks, fails, romance, comedy expressed via unique audio-visual formats like self-shot videos, reaction videos, lip-synching, self-sung songs, etc. 3MASSIV presents an opportunity for multimodal and multilingual semantic understanding on these unique videos by annotating them for concepts, affective states, media types, and audio language. We present a thorough analysis of 3MASSIV and highlight the variety and unique aspects of our dataset compared to other contemporary popular datasets with strong baselines. We also show how the social media content in 3MASSIV is dynamic and temporal in nature, which can be used for semantic understanding tasks and cross-lingual analysis.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 3MASSIV，这是一个多语言、多模式、多方面、经过专业注释的数据集，包含从短视频社交媒体平台 Moj 中提取的各种短视频。 3MASSIV 包含 11 种不同语言的 50k 短视频（平均时长 20 秒）和 100K 无标签视频，捕捉恶作剧、失败、浪漫、喜剧等流行短视频趋势，通过自拍视频、反应视频、对口型、自唱歌曲等独特的视听格式表达。3MASSIV 通过对这些独特视频进行概念、情感状态、媒体注释，为对这些独特视频进行多模式和多语言语义理解提供了机会类型和音频语言。我们对 3MASSIV 进行了全面分析，并强调了我们的数据集与其他具有强大基线的当代流行数据集相比的多样性和独特性。我们还展示了 3MASSIV 中的社交媒体内容本质上是动态的和临时的，可用于语义理解任务和跨语言分析。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了3MASSIV数据集，一个包含5万条多语言、多模态短视频的专家标注数据集，用于研究社交媒体短视频的多语义和跨语言分析。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集在语言多样性、多模态内容覆盖及动态趋势捕捉方面存在不足，需构建更全面的数据集支持多语言和多模态语义理解研究。
AI.method: 从Moj平台收集11种语言的短视频，标注概念、情感、媒体类型和音频语言，通过对比分析突出数据集独特性，并验证其动态时序特性。
AI.result: 构建了包含5万标注视频和10万未标注视频的数据集，展示其在多语言、多模态分析及跨语言任务中的潜力，验证了内容的动态性和时间敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 3MASSIV为多模态和多语言研究提供了新资源，其动态特性可提升语义理解与跨语言分析的模型性能。

search_text: 3MASSIV: Multilingual, Multimodal and Multi-Aspect dataset of Social Media Short Videos 3MASSIV：社交媒体短视频的多语言、多模态、多方面数据集 We present 3MASSIV, a multilingual, multimodal and multi-aspect, expertly-annotated dataset of diverse short videos extracted from short-video social media platform - Moj. 3MASSIV comprises of 50k short videos (20 seconds average duration) and 100K unlabeled videos in 11 different languages and captures popular short video trends like pranks, fails, romance, comedy expressed via unique audio-visual formats like self-shot videos, reaction videos, lip-synching, self-sung songs, etc. 3MASSIV presents an opportunity for multimodal and multilingual semantic understanding on these unique videos by annotating them for concepts, affective states, media types, and audio language. We present a thorough analysis of 3MASSIV and highlight the variety and unique aspects of our dataset compared to other contemporary popular datasets with strong baselines. We also show how the social media content in 3MASSIV is dynamic and temporal in nature, which can be used for semantic understanding tasks and cross-lingual analysis. 我们提出了 3MASSIV，这是一个多语言、多模式、多方面、经过专业注释的数据集，包含从短视频社交媒体平台 Moj 中提取的各种短视频。 3MASSIV 包含 11 种不同语言的 50k 短视频（平均时长 20 秒）和 100K 无标签视频，捕捉恶作剧、失败、浪漫、喜剧等流行短视频趋势，通过自拍视频、反应视频、对口型、自唱歌曲等独特的视听格式表达。3MASSIV 通过对这些独特视频进行概念、情感状态、媒体注释，为对这些独特视频进行多模式和多语言语义理解提供了机会类型和音频语言。我们对 3MASSIV 进行了全面分析，并强调了我们的数据集与其他具有强大基线的当代流行数据集相比的多样性和独特性。我们还展示了 3MASSIV 中的社交媒体内容本质上是动态的和临时的，可用于语义理解任务和跨语言分析。 本文介绍了3MASSIV数据集，一个包含5万条多语言、多模态短视频的专家标注数据集，用于研究社交媒体短视频的多语义和跨语言分析。 Vikram Gupta,Trisha Mittal,Puneet Mathur,Vaibhav Mishra,Mayank Maheshwari,Aniket Bera,Debdoot Mukherjee,Dinesh Manocha cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.MM

authors_text: Nelson G. Badillo Perez,Margaret M. Coad
title: Self-Propelled Soft Everting Toroidal Robot for Navigation and Climbing in Confined Spaces
title_zh: 用于密闭空间导航和攀爬的自走式软外翻环形机器人
comment: 7 pages and 8 figures. Accepted to IEEE Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022). Video available at https://youtu.be/R0TlKPLbM9Y
comments: 7 pages and 8 figures. Accepted to IEEE Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022). Video available at https://youtu.be/R0TlKPLbM9Y
abstract: There are many spaces inaccessible to humans where robots could help deliver sensors and equipment. Many of these spaces contain three-dimensional passageways and uneven terrain that pose challenges for robot design and control. Everting toroidal robots, which move via simultaneous eversion and inversion of their body material, are promising for navigation in these types of spaces. We present a novel soft everting toroidal robot that propels itself using a motorized device inside an air-filled membrane. Our robot requires only a single control signal to move, can conform to its environment, and can climb vertically with a motor torque that is independent of the force used to brace the robot against its environment. We derive and validate models of the forces involved in its motion, and we demonstrate the robot's ability to navigate a maze and climb a pipe.
summary: There are many spaces inaccessible to humans where robots could help deliver sensors and equipment. Many of these spaces contain three-dimensional passageways and uneven terrain that pose challenges for robot design and control. Everting toroidal robots, which move via simultaneous eversion and inversion of their body material, are promising for navigation in these types of spaces. We present a novel soft everting toroidal robot that propels itself using a motorized device inside an air-filled membrane. Our robot requires only a single control signal to move, can conform to its environment, and can climb vertically with a motor torque that is independent of the force used to brace the robot against its environment. We derive and validate models of the forces involved in its motion, and we demonstrate the robot's ability to navigate a maze and climb a pipe.
abstract_zh: 有许多人类无法进入的空间，机器人可以帮助运送传感器和设备。其中许多空间包含三维通道和不平坦的地形，这给机器人设计和控制带来了挑战。外翻环形机器人通过同时外翻和翻转其身体材料来移动，有望在此类空间中进行导航。我们提出了一种新型软外翻环形机器人，它使用充气膜内的机动装置来推动自身。我们的机器人只需要一个控制信号即可移动，可以适应其环境，并且可以通过电机扭矩垂直攀爬，该电机扭矩与用于支撑机器人对抗环境的力无关。我们推导并验证了其运动所涉及的力的模型，并演示了机器人在迷宫中导航和攀爬管道的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型软体可翻转环形机器人，能够在狭窄空间中自主导航和攀爬。
AI.motivation: 许多人类无法进入的狭窄空间需要机器人进行传感器和设备的输送，但传统机器人难以应对三维通道和复杂地形的挑战。
AI.method: 通过气囊膜内电机驱动装置实现单控制信号驱动，结合材料翻转机制，建立并验证了运动相关力学模型。
AI.result: 机器人成功完成迷宫导航和管道攀爬实验，验证了其环境适应性和独立于支撑力的攀爬扭矩特性。
AI.conclusion: 该机器人展示了在复杂受限空间中执行任务的潜力，为软体机器人设计提供了新思路。

title: SC^2-PCR: A Second Order Spatial Compatibility for Efficient and Robust Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: SC^2-PCR：用于高效、鲁棒点云配准的二阶空间兼容性
abstract: In this paper, we present a second order spatial compatibility (SC^2) measure based method for efficient and robust point cloud registration (PCR), called SC^2-PCR. Firstly, we propose a second order spatial compatibility (SC^2) measure to compute the similarity between correspondences. It considers the global compatibility instead of local consistency, allowing for more distinctive clustering between inliers and outliers at early stage. Based on this measure, our registration pipeline employs a global spectral technique to find some reliable seeds from the initial correspondences. Then we design a two-stage strategy to expand each seed to a consensus set based on the SC^2 measure matrix. Finally, we feed each consensus set to a weighted SVD algorithm to generate a candidate rigid transformation and select the best model as the final result. Our method can guarantee to find a certain number of outlier-free consensus sets using fewer samplings, making the model estimation more efficient and robust. In addition, the proposed SC^2 measure is general and can be easily plugged into deep learning based frameworks. Extensive experiments are carried out to investigate the performance of our method. Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/ZhiChen902/SC2-PCR}.
summary: In this paper, we present a second order spatial compatibility (SC^2) measure based method for efficient and robust point cloud registration (PCR), called SC^2-PCR. Firstly, we propose a second order spatial compatibility (SC^2) measure to compute the similarity between correspondences. It considers the global compatibility instead of local consistency, allowing for more distinctive clustering between inliers and outliers at early stage. Based on this measure, our registration pipeline employs a global spectral technique to find some reliable seeds from the initial correspondences. Then we design a two-stage strategy to expand each seed to a consensus set based on the SC^2 measure matrix. Finally, we feed each consensus set to a weighted SVD algorithm to generate a candidate rigid transformation and select the best model as the final result. Our method can guarantee to find a certain number of outlier-free consensus sets using fewer samplings, making the model estimation more efficient and robust. In addition, the proposed SC^2 measure is general and can be easily plugged into deep learning based frameworks. Extensive experiments are carried out to investigate the performance of our method. Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/ZhiChen902/SC2-PCR}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于二阶空间兼容性（SC^2）测量的方法，用于高效且鲁棒的点云配准（PCR），称为SC^2-PCR。首先，我们提出二阶空间兼容性（SC^2）度量来计算对应关系之间的相似度。它考虑全局兼容性而不是局部一致性，从而允许在早期阶段在内部值和异常值之间进行更独特的聚类。基于这种测量，我们的配准管道采用全局谱技术从初始对应中找到一些可靠的种子。然后我们设计一个两阶段策略，将每个种子扩展到基于 SC^2 度量矩阵的共识集。最后，我们将每个共识集输入加权 SVD 算法以生成候选刚性变换并选择最佳模型作为最终结果。我们的方法可以保证使用更少的样本找到一定数量的无异常值共识集，从而使模型估计更加高效和鲁棒。此外，所提出的 SC^2 度量是通用的，可以轻松插入基于深度学习的框架中。进行了大量的实验来研究我们方法的性能。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/ZhiChen902/SC2-PCR} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于二阶空间兼容性（SC²）度量的高效鲁棒点云配准方法SC²-PCR。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在点云配准中易受异常值影响且效率较低，需通过全局兼容性度量提升鲁棒性与效率。
AI.method: 提出SC²度量计算对应关系相似性，采用全局谱技术筛选可靠种子，通过两阶段策略扩展共识集，并利用加权SVD生成最终变换模型。
AI.result: 实验验证了SC²-PCR在多种场景下的高效性与鲁棒性，且SC²度量可兼容深度学习框架。
AI.conclusion: SC²-PCR通过全局兼容性分析实现了更高效的异常值过滤与配准，为点云配准提供了通用解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于二阶空间兼容性（SC²）度量的高效鲁棒点云配准方法SC²-PCR。
motivation: 现有方法在点云配准中易受异常值影响且效率较低，需通过全局兼容性度量提升鲁棒性与效率。
method: 提出SC²度量计算对应关系相似性，采用全局谱技术筛选可靠种子，通过两阶段策略扩展共识集，并利用加权SVD生成最终变换模型。
result: 实验验证了SC²-PCR在多种场景下的高效性与鲁棒性，且SC²度量可兼容深度学习框架。
conclusion: SC²-PCR通过全局兼容性分析实现了更高效的异常值过滤与配准，为点云配准提供了通用解决方案。
search_text: SC^2-PCR: A Second Order Spatial Compatibility for Efficient and Robust Point Cloud Registration SC^2-PCR：用于高效、鲁棒点云配准的二阶空间兼容性 In this paper, we present a second order spatial compatibility (SC^2) measure based method for efficient and robust point cloud registration (PCR), called SC^2-PCR. Firstly, we propose a second order spatial compatibility (SC^2) measure to compute the similarity between correspondences. It considers the global compatibility instead of local consistency, allowing for more distinctive clustering between inliers and outliers at early stage. Based on this measure, our registration pipeline employs a global spectral technique to find some reliable seeds from the initial correspondences. Then we design a two-stage strategy to expand each seed to a consensus set based on the SC^2 measure matrix. Finally, we feed each consensus set to a weighted SVD algorithm to generate a candidate rigid transformation and select the best model as the final result. Our method can guarantee to find a certain number of outlier-free consensus sets using fewer samplings, making the model estimation more efficient and robust. In addition, the proposed SC^2 measure is general and can be easily plugged into deep learning based frameworks. Extensive experiments are carried out to investigate the performance of our method. Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/ZhiChen902/SC2-PCR}. 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于二阶空间兼容性（SC^2）测量的方法，用于高效且鲁棒的点云配准（PCR），称为SC^2-PCR。首先，我们提出二阶空间兼容性（SC^2）度量来计算对应关系之间的相似度。它考虑全局兼容性而不是局部一致性，从而允许在早期阶段在内部值和异常值之间进行更独特的聚类。基于这种测量，我们的配准管道采用全局谱技术从初始对应中找到一些可靠的种子。然后我们设计一个两阶段策略，将每个种子扩展到基于 SC^2 度量矩阵的共识集。最后，我们将每个共识集输入加权 SVD 算法以生成候选刚性变换并选择最佳模型作为最终结果。我们的方法可以保证使用更少的样本找到一定数量的无异常值共识集，从而使模型估计更加高效和鲁棒。此外，所提出的 SC^2 度量是通用的，可以轻松插入基于深度学习的框架中。进行了大量的实验来研究我们方法的性能。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/ZhiChen902/SC2-PCR} 获取。 本文提出了一种基于二阶空间兼容性（SC²）度量的高效鲁棒点云配准方法SC²-PCR。 Zhi Chen,Kun Sun,Fan Yang,Wenbing Tao cs.CV

authors_text: Qingping Zheng,Jiankang Deng,Zheng Zhu,Ying Li,Stefanos Zafeiriou
title: Decoupled Multi-task Learning with Cyclical Self-Regulation for Face Parsing
title_zh: 用于人脸解析的具有循环自调节的解耦多任务学习
abstract: This paper probes intrinsic factors behind typical failure cases (e.g. spatial inconsistency and boundary confusion) produced by the existing state-of-the-art method in face parsing. To tackle these problems, we propose a novel Decoupled Multi-task Learning with Cyclical Self-Regulation (DML-CSR) for face parsing. Specifically, DML-CSR designs a multi-task model which comprises face parsing, binary edge, and category edge detection. These tasks only share low-level encoder weights without high-level interactions between each other, enabling to decouple auxiliary modules from the whole network at the inference stage. To address spatial inconsistency, we develop a dynamic dual graph convolutional network to capture global contextual information without using any extra pooling operation. To handle boundary confusion in both single and multiple face scenarios, we exploit binary and category edge detection to jointly obtain generic geometric structure and fine-grained semantic clues of human faces. Besides, to prevent noisy labels from degrading model generalization during training, cyclical self-regulation is proposed to self-ensemble several model instances to get a new model and the resulting model then is used to self-distill subsequent models, through alternating iterations. Experiments show that our method achieves the new state-of-the-art performance on the Helen, CelebAMask-HQ, and Lapa datasets. The source code is available at https://github.com/deepinsight/insightface/tree/master/parsing/dml_csr.
summary: This paper probes intrinsic factors behind typical failure cases (e.g. spatial inconsistency and boundary confusion) produced by the existing state-of-the-art method in face parsing. To tackle these problems, we propose a novel Decoupled Multi-task Learning with Cyclical Self-Regulation (DML-CSR) for face parsing. Specifically, DML-CSR designs a multi-task model which comprises face parsing, binary edge, and category edge detection. These tasks only share low-level encoder weights without high-level interactions between each other, enabling to decouple auxiliary modules from the whole network at the inference stage. To address spatial inconsistency, we develop a dynamic dual graph convolutional network to capture global contextual information without using any extra pooling operation. To handle boundary confusion in both single and multiple face scenarios, we exploit binary and category edge detection to jointly obtain generic geometric structure and fine-grained semantic clues of human faces. Besides, to prevent noisy labels from degrading model generalization during training, cyclical self-regulation is proposed to self-ensemble several model instances to get a new model and the resulting model then is used to self-distill subsequent models, through alternating iterations. Experiments show that our method achieves the new state-of-the-art performance on the Helen, CelebAMask-HQ, and Lapa datasets. The source code is available at https://github.com/deepinsight/insightface/tree/master/parsing/dml_csr.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了现有最先进的人脸解析方法产生的典型失败案例（例如空间不一致和边界混乱）背后的内在因素。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的具有循环自我调节的解耦多任务学习（DML-CSR）用于人脸解析。具体来说，DML-CSR 设计了一个多任务模型，其中包括人脸解析、二值边缘和类别边缘检测。这些任务仅共享低级编码器权重，彼此之间没有高级交互，从而能够在推理阶段将辅助模块与整个网络解耦。为了解决空间不一致问题，我们开发了一个动态双图卷积网络来捕获全局上下文信息，而无需使用任何额外的池化操作。为了处理单人脸和多人脸场景中的边界混淆，我们利用二进制和类别边缘检测来联合获得人脸的通用几何结构和细粒度语义线索。此外，为了防止训练期间噪声标签降低模型泛化能力，提出了循环自调节来自集成多个模型实例以获得新模型，然后通过交替迭代将所得模型用于自蒸馏后续模型。实验表明，我们的方法在 Helen、CelebAMask-HQ 和 Lapa 数据集上实现了新的最先进的性能。源代码位于 https://github.com/deepinsight/insightface/tree/master/parsing/dml_csr。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于人脸解析的解耦多任务学习方法，结合循环自调节机制，以解决现有方法中的空间不一致和边界混淆问题。
AI.motivation: 现有先进人脸解析方法在处理空间不一致性和边界混淆问题时表现不足，需设计更有效的模型结构与训练策略。
AI.method: 设计包含人脸解析、二值边检测和类别边检测的多任务模型，通过低级编码器共享权重实现解耦；采用动态双图卷积网络捕捉全局上下文信息，并利用循环自调节机制通过模型自集成和自蒸馏提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在Helen、CelebAMask-HQ和Lapa数据集上达到新的最先进性能，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: DML-CSR通过解耦任务设计和循环自调节机制有效解决了人脸解析中的关键问题，为后续研究提供了新思路。

title: An Interactive Image-based Modeling System
title_zh: 基于图像的交互式建模系统
abstract: This paper propose a interactive 3D modeling method and corresponding system based on single or multiple uncalibrated images. The main feature of this method is that, according to the modeling habits of ordinary people, the 3D model of the target is reconstructed from coarse to fine images. On the basis of determining the approximate shape, the user adds or modify projection constraints and spatial constraints, and apply topology modification, gradually realize camera calibration, refine rough model, and finally complete the reconstruction of objects with arbitrary geometry and topology. During the interactive process, the geometric parameters and camera projection matrix are solved in real time, and the reconstruction results are displayed in a 3D window.
summary: This paper propose a interactive 3D modeling method and corresponding system based on single or multiple uncalibrated images. The main feature of this method is that, according to the modeling habits of ordinary people, the 3D model of the target is reconstructed from coarse to fine images. On the basis of determining the approximate shape, the user adds or modify projection constraints and spatial constraints, and apply topology modification, gradually realize camera calibration, refine rough model, and finally complete the reconstruction of objects with arbitrary geometry and topology. During the interactive process, the geometric parameters and camera projection matrix are solved in real time, and the reconstruction results are displayed in a 3D window.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于单个或多个未校准图像的交互式3D建模方法和相应系统。该方法的主要特点是根据普通人的建模习惯，从粗到细的图像重建目标的3D模型。在确定近似形状的基础上，用户添加或修改投影约束和空间约束，并应用拓扑修改，逐步实现相机标定，细化粗糙模型，最终完成任意几何形状和拓扑的物体的重建。在交互过程中，实时求解几何参数和相机投影矩阵，并将重建结果显示在3D窗口中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于单张或多张未校准图像的交互式3D建模方法及系统，通过用户逐步调整约束条件实现复杂几何与拓扑的物体重建。
AI.motivation: 传统三维重建方法依赖精确相机参数且缺乏交互性，难以满足普通用户对建模过程直观性和灵活性的需求。
AI.method: 采用从粗到细的建模策略，结合用户交互式添加投影/空间约束、拓扑修改及实时相机标定，逐步优化粗糙模型完成重建。
AI.result: 开发出支持实时几何参数求解与3D可视化显示的交互系统，可处理任意几何拓扑结构的物体重建。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合用户交互与实时计算有效提升了建模效率与精度，为复杂场景的三维重建提供了新思路。

authors_text: Mayu Otani,Riku Togashi,Yuta Nakashima,Esa Rahtu,Janne Heikkilä,Shin'ichi Satoh
title: Optimal Correction Cost for Object Detection Evaluation
title_zh: 目标检测评估的最佳校正成本
abstract: Mean Average Precision (mAP) is the primary evaluation measure for object detection. Although object detection has a broad range of applications, mAP evaluates detectors in terms of the performance of ranked instance retrieval. Such the assumption for the evaluation task does not suit some downstream tasks. To alleviate the gap between downstream tasks and the evaluation scenario, we propose Optimal Correction Cost (OC-cost), which assesses detection accuracy at image level. OC-cost computes the cost of correcting detections to ground truths as a measure of accuracy. The cost is obtained by solving an optimal transportation problem between the detections and the ground truths. Unlike mAP, OC-cost is designed to penalize false positive and false negative detections properly, and every image in a dataset is treated equally. Our experimental result validates that OC-cost has better agreement with human preference than a ranking-based measure, i.e., mAP for a single image. We also show that detectors' rankings by OC-cost are more consistent on different data splits than mAP. Our goal is not to replace mAP with OC-cost but provide an additional tool to evaluate detectors from another aspect. To help future researchers and developers choose a target measure, we provide a series of experiments to clarify how mAP and OC-cost differ.
summary: Mean Average Precision (mAP) is the primary evaluation measure for object detection. Although object detection has a broad range of applications, mAP evaluates detectors in terms of the performance of ranked instance retrieval. Such the assumption for the evaluation task does not suit some downstream tasks. To alleviate the gap between downstream tasks and the evaluation scenario, we propose Optimal Correction Cost (OC-cost), which assesses detection accuracy at image level. OC-cost computes the cost of correcting detections to ground truths as a measure of accuracy. The cost is obtained by solving an optimal transportation problem between the detections and the ground truths. Unlike mAP, OC-cost is designed to penalize false positive and false negative detections properly, and every image in a dataset is treated equally. Our experimental result validates that OC-cost has better agreement with human preference than a ranking-based measure, i.e., mAP for a single image. We also show that detectors' rankings by OC-cost are more consistent on different data splits than mAP. Our goal is not to replace mAP with OC-cost but provide an additional tool to evaluate detectors from another aspect. To help future researchers and developers choose a target measure, we provide a series of experiments to clarify how mAP and OC-cost differ.
abstract_zh: 平均精度（mAP）是目标检测的主要评估指标。尽管对象检测具有广泛的应用，但 mAP 根据排序实例检索的性能来评估检测器。这种评估任务的假设并不适合某些下游任务。为了缩小下游任务和评估场景之间的差距，我们提出了最佳校正成本（OC-cost），它评估图像级别的检测精度。 OC-cost 计算将检测纠正为基本事实的成本，作为准确性的衡量标准。成本是通过解决检测和地面事实之间的最佳传输问题来获得的。与 mAP 不同，OC-cost 旨在适当惩罚误报和漏报检测，并且数据集中的每个图像都会受到同等对待。我们的实验结果验证了 OC-cost 比基于排名的度量（即单个图像的 mAP）更符合人类偏好。我们还表明，检测器按 OC 成本进行的排名在不同数据分割上比 mAP 更加一致。我们的目标不是用 OC-cost 取代 mAP，而是提供一个额外的工具来从另一个方面评估检测器。为了帮助未来的研究人员和开发人员选择目标度量，我们提供了一系列实验来阐明 mAP 和 OC-cost 的差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的目标检测评估指标OC-cost，通过计算检测结果与真实标注之间的最优校正成本来评估检测器性能。
AI.motivation: 传统mAP指标基于排名检索假设，无法适应某些下游任务需求，存在对误检和漏检惩罚不均、图像权重不平等的问题。
AI.method: 将检测结果与真实标注间的校正问题建模为最优运输问题，通过求解运输成本作为准确性度量，对每张图像进行等权重评估。
AI.result: 实验表明OC-cost在单图像评估中更符合人类偏好，且在不同数据划分下检测器排名更一致，同时保持与mAP的互补性。
AI.conclusion: OC-cost不旨在替代mAP，而是作为补充工具提供新的评估视角，通过系统性实验阐明两种指标的差异性以指导评估方法选择。

title: Relaxation Labeling Meets GANs: Solving Jigsaw Puzzles with Missing Borders
title_zh: 松弛标签遇上 GAN：解决缺少边界的拼图游戏
comment: Accepted at the 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP) 2021
comments: Accepted at the 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP) 2021
abstract: This paper proposes JiGAN, a GAN-based method for solving Jigsaw puzzles with eroded or missing borders. Missing borders is a common real-world situation, for example, when dealing with the reconstruction of broken artifacts or ruined frescoes. In this particular condition, the puzzle's pieces do not align perfectly due to the borders' gaps; in this situation, the patches' direct match is unfeasible due to the lack of color and line continuations. JiGAN, is a two-steps procedure that tackles this issue: first, we repair the eroded borders with a GAN-based image extension model and measure the alignment affinity between pieces; then, we solve the puzzle with the relaxation labeling algorithm to enforce consistency in pieces positioning, hence, reconstructing the puzzle. We test the method on a large dataset of small puzzles and on three commonly used benchmark datasets to demonstrate the feasibility of the proposed approach.
summary: This paper proposes JiGAN, a GAN-based method for solving Jigsaw puzzles with eroded or missing borders. Missing borders is a common real-world situation, for example, when dealing with the reconstruction of broken artifacts or ruined frescoes. In this particular condition, the puzzle's pieces do not align perfectly due to the borders' gaps; in this situation, the patches' direct match is unfeasible due to the lack of color and line continuations. JiGAN, is a two-steps procedure that tackles this issue: first, we repair the eroded borders with a GAN-based image extension model and measure the alignment affinity between pieces; then, we solve the puzzle with the relaxation labeling algorithm to enforce consistency in pieces positioning, hence, reconstructing the puzzle. We test the method on a large dataset of small puzzles and on three commonly used benchmark datasets to demonstrate the feasibility of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 JiGAN，一种基于 GAN 的方法，用于解决边界被侵蚀或缺失的拼图游戏。边界缺失是现实世界中常见的情况，例如，在重建破碎的文物或毁坏的壁画时。在这种特殊情况下，由于边界间隙，拼图的各个部分不会完美对齐；在这种情况下，由于缺乏颜色和线条延续，补丁的直接匹配是不可行的。 JiGAN 是解决这个问题的一个两步程序：首先，我们使用基于 GAN 的图像扩展模型修复被侵蚀的边界，并测量片段之间的对齐亲和力；然后，我们使用松弛标记算法来解决谜题，以强制棋子定位的一致性，从而重建谜题。我们在小谜题的大型数据集和三个常用的基准数据集上测试该方法，以证明所提出方法的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出JiGAN方法，解决拼图中因缺失边界导致的拼接难题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中拼图常因破损导致边界缺失，传统直接匹配方法失效，需新方法处理此类问题。
AI.method: 两阶段方法：先用GAN修复缺失边界并计算拼图块亲和力，再通过松弛标记算法确保拼图位置一致性。
AI.result: 在多个小规模拼图数据集和基准数据集上验证，证明方法可行性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: JiGAN成功解决缺失边界拼图问题，为文物修复等实际应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Sangjun Park,Kihyun Choo,Joohyung Lee,Anton V. Porov,Konstantin Osipov,June Sig Sung
title: Bunched LPCNet2: Efficient Neural Vocoders Covering Devices from Cloud to Edge
title_zh: 捆绑式 LPCNet2：覆盖从云端到边缘设备的高效神经声码器
abstract: Text-to-Speech (TTS) services that run on edge devices have many advantages compared to cloud TTS, e.g., latency and privacy issues. However, neural vocoders with a low complexity and small model footprint inevitably generate annoying sounds. This study proposes a Bunched LPCNet2, an improved LPCNet architecture that provides highly efficient performance in high-quality for cloud servers and in a low-complexity for low-resource edge devices. Single logistic distribution achieves computational efficiency, and insightful tricks reduce the model footprint while maintaining speech quality. A DualRate architecture, which generates a lower sampling rate from a prosody model, is also proposed to reduce maintenance costs. The experiments demonstrate that Bunched LPCNet2 generates satisfactory speech quality with a model footprint of 1.1MB while operating faster than real-time on a RPi 3B. Our audio samples are available at https://srtts.github.io/bunchedLPCNet2.
summary: Text-to-Speech (TTS) services that run on edge devices have many advantages compared to cloud TTS, e.g., latency and privacy issues. However, neural vocoders with a low complexity and small model footprint inevitably generate annoying sounds. This study proposes a Bunched LPCNet2, an improved LPCNet architecture that provides highly efficient performance in high-quality for cloud servers and in a low-complexity for low-resource edge devices. Single logistic distribution achieves computational efficiency, and insightful tricks reduce the model footprint while maintaining speech quality. A DualRate architecture, which generates a lower sampling rate from a prosody model, is also proposed to reduce maintenance costs. The experiments demonstrate that Bunched LPCNet2 generates satisfactory speech quality with a model footprint of 1.1MB while operating faster than real-time on a RPi 3B. Our audio samples are available at https://srtts.github.io/bunchedLPCNet2.
abstract_zh: 与云 TTS 相比，在边缘设备上运行的文本转语音 (TTS) 服务具有许多优势，例如延迟和隐私问题。然而，复杂度低且模型占用空间小的神经声码器不可避免地会产生烦人的声音。本研究提出了 Bunched LPCNet2，这是一种改进的 LPCNet 架构，可为云服务器提供高质量的高效性能，并为低资源边缘设备提供低复杂度的性能。单一逻辑分布实现了计算效率，而富有洞察力的技巧减少了模型占用空间，同时保持了语音质量。还提出了 DualRate 架构，该架构从韵律模型生成较低的采样率，以降低维护成本。实验表明，Bunched LPCNet2 可以生成令人满意的语音质量，模型占用空间为 1.1MB，同时在 RPi 3B 上运行速度比实时速度更快。我们的音频样本可在 https://srtts.github.io/bunchedLPCNet2 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Bunched LPCNet2的改进型神经声码器，旨在实现从云端到边缘设备的高效语音合成。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备上的文本到语音（TTS）服务具有低延迟和隐私保护的优势，但现有神经声码器存在模型复杂度高、生成质量差或占用资源过多的问题。
AI.method: 通过优化LPCNet架构，采用单物流分布提升计算效率，结合模型压缩技巧减小体积，并引入DualRate架构降低采样率以减少维护成本。
AI.result: 实验表明，Bunched LPCNet2在1.1MB模型体积下可在树莓派3B上实现实时语音生成，且保持较高语音质量。
AI.conclusion: Bunched LPCNet2在保证语音质量的同时显著降低了模型复杂度，为云端到边缘设备的TTS应用提供了高效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Bunched LPCNet2的改进型神经声码器，旨在实现从云端到边缘设备的高效语音合成。
motivation: 边缘设备上的文本到语音（TTS）服务具有低延迟和隐私保护的优势，但现有神经声码器存在模型复杂度高、生成质量差或占用资源过多的问题。
method: 通过优化LPCNet架构，采用单物流分布提升计算效率，结合模型压缩技巧减小体积，并引入DualRate架构降低采样率以减少维护成本。
result: 实验表明，Bunched LPCNet2在1.1MB模型体积下可在树莓派3B上实现实时语音生成，且保持较高语音质量。
conclusion: Bunched LPCNet2在保证语音质量的同时显著降低了模型复杂度，为云端到边缘设备的TTS应用提供了高效解决方案。
search_text: Bunched LPCNet2: Efficient Neural Vocoders Covering Devices from Cloud to Edge 捆绑式 LPCNet2：覆盖从云端到边缘设备的高效神经声码器 Text-to-Speech (TTS) services that run on edge devices have many advantages compared to cloud TTS, e.g., latency and privacy issues. However, neural vocoders with a low complexity and small model footprint inevitably generate annoying sounds. This study proposes a Bunched LPCNet2, an improved LPCNet architecture that provides highly efficient performance in high-quality for cloud servers and in a low-complexity for low-resource edge devices. Single logistic distribution achieves computational efficiency, and insightful tricks reduce the model footprint while maintaining speech quality. A DualRate architecture, which generates a lower sampling rate from a prosody model, is also proposed to reduce maintenance costs. The experiments demonstrate that Bunched LPCNet2 generates satisfactory speech quality with a model footprint of 1.1MB while operating faster than real-time on a RPi 3B. Our audio samples are available at https://srtts.github.io/bunchedLPCNet2. 与云 TTS 相比，在边缘设备上运行的文本转语音 (TTS) 服务具有许多优势，例如延迟和隐私问题。然而，复杂度低且模型占用空间小的神经声码器不可避免地会产生烦人的声音。本研究提出了 Bunched LPCNet2，这是一种改进的 LPCNet 架构，可为云服务器提供高质量的高效性能，并为低资源边缘设备提供低复杂度的性能。单一逻辑分布实现了计算效率，而富有洞察力的技巧减少了模型占用空间，同时保持了语音质量。还提出了 DualRate 架构，该架构从韵律模型生成较低的采样率，以降低维护成本。实验表明，Bunched LPCNet2 可以生成令人满意的语音质量，模型占用空间为 1.1MB，同时在 RPi 3B 上运行速度比实时速度更快。我们的音频样本可在 https://srtts.github.io/bunchedLPCNet2 上获取。 本文提出了一种名为Bunched LPCNet2的改进型神经声码器，旨在实现从云端到边缘设备的高效语音合成。 Sangjun Park,Kihyun Choo,Joohyung Lee,Anton V. Porov,Konstantin Osipov,June Sig Sung eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Pan Zhou,Yichen Zhou,Chenyang Si,Weihao Yu,Teck Khim Ng,Shuicheng Yan
title: Mugs: A Multi-Granular Self-Supervised Learning Framework
title_zh: Mugs：多粒度的自我监督学习框架
comment: code and models are available at https://github.com/sail-sg/mugs
comments: code and models are available at https://github.com/sail-sg/mugs
abstract: In self-supervised learning, multi-granular features are heavily desired though rarely investigated, as different downstream tasks (e.g., general and fine-grained classification) often require different or multi-granular features, e.g.~fine- or coarse-grained one or their mixture. In this work, for the first time, we propose an effective MUlti-Granular Self-supervised learning (Mugs) framework to explicitly learn multi-granular visual features. Mugs has three complementary granular supervisions: 1) an instance discrimination supervision (IDS), 2) a novel local-group discrimination supervision (LGDS), and 3) a group discrimination supervision (GDS). IDS distinguishes different instances to learn instance-level fine-grained features. LGDS aggregates features of an image and its neighbors into a local-group feature, and pulls local-group features from different crops of the same image together and push them away for others. It provides complementary instance supervision to IDS via an extra alignment on local neighbors, and scatters different local-groups separately to increase discriminability. Accordingly, it helps learn high-level fine-grained features at a local-group level. Finally, to prevent similar local-groups from being scattered randomly or far away, GDS brings similar samples close and thus pulls similar local-groups together, capturing coarse-grained features at a (semantic) group level. Consequently, Mugs can capture three granular features that often enjoy higher generality on diverse downstream tasks over single-granular features, e.g.~instance-level fine-grained features in contrastive learning. By only pretraining on ImageNet-1K, Mugs sets new SoTA linear probing accuracy 82.1$\%$ on ImageNet-1K and improves previous SoTA by $1.1\%$. It also surpasses SoTAs on other tasks, e.g. transfer learning, detection and segmentation.

In this work, for the first time, we propose an effective MUlti-Granular Self-supervised learning (Mugs) framework to explicitly learn multi-granular visual features. Mugs has three complementary granular supervisions: 1) an instance discrimination supervision (IDS), 2) a novel local-group discrimination supervision (LGDS), and 3) a group discrimination supervision (GDS). IDS distinguishes different instances to learn instance-level fine-grained features. LGDS aggregates features of an image and its neighbors into a local-group feature, and pulls local-group features from different crops of the same image together and push them away for others. It provides complementary instance supervision to IDS via an extra alignment on local neighbors, and scatters different local-groups separately to increase discriminability. Accordingly, it helps learn high-level fine-grained features at a local-group level. Finally, to prevent similar local-groups from being scattered randomly or far away, GDS brings similar samples close and thus pulls similar local-groups together, capturing coarse-grained features at a (semantic) group level. Consequently, Mugs can capture three granular features that often enjoy higher generality on diverse downstream tasks over single-granular features, e.g.~instance-level fine-grained features in contrastive learning. By only pretraining on ImageNet-1K, Mugs sets new SoTA linear probing accuracy 82.1$\%$ on ImageNet-1K and improves previous SoTA by $1.1\%$. It also surpasses SoTAs on other tasks, e.g. transfer learning, detection and segmentation.
abstract_zh: 在自监督学习中，尽管很少研究，但非常需要多粒度特征，因为不同的下游任务（例如，一般和细粒度分类）通常需要不同或多粒度特征，例如细粒度或粗粒度特征或其混合物。在这项工作中，我们首次提出了一种有效的多粒度自监督学习（Mugs）框架来显式学习多粒度视觉特征。 Mugs 具有三种互补的细粒度监督：1）实例歧视监督（IDS），2）新颖的本地群体歧视监督（LGDS），3）群体歧视监督（GDS）。 IDS区分不同的实例来学习实例级的细粒度特征。 LGDS 将图像及其邻居的特征聚合为本地组特征，并将同一图像的不同裁剪中的本地组特征拉到一起，并将它们推到其他图像上。它通过对本地邻居的额外对齐为 IDS 提供补充实例监督，并分别分散不同的本地组以提高可辨别性。因此，它有助于在本地组级别学习高级细粒度特征。最后，为了防止相似的局部组随机分散或分散得很远，GDS 使相似的样本靠近，从而将相似的局部组拉在一起，在（语义）组级别捕获粗粒度特征。因此，Mug 可以捕获三种粒度特征，这些特征通常在各种下游任务中比单粒度特征具有更高的通用性，例如对比学习中的实例级细粒度特征。通过仅在 ImageNet-1K 上进行预训练，Mugs 在 ImageNet-1K 上设置了新的 SoTA 线性探测精度 82.1$\%$，并将之前的 SoTA 提高了 $1.1\%$。它在其他任务上也超越了 SoTA，例如迁移学习、检测和分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多粒度自监督学习框架Mugs，用于显式学习多粒度视觉特征以提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法难以满足不同下游任务（如通用分类与细粒度分类）对多粒度特征的需求，亟需探索多粒度特征学习的有效方法。
AI.method: 设计三种互补的粒度监督机制：实例判别（IDS）、局部组判别（LGDS）和组判别（GDS），分别学习实例级细粒度特征、局部组级特征及语义组级粗粒度特征。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上预训练后，线性探测准确率达82.1%（超越现有最优1.1%），并在迁移学习、检测和分割任务中表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Mugs通过多粒度特征学习显著提升了模型在多样化下游任务中的泛化能力，验证了多粒度特征的有效性。
