title: iPLAN: Interactive and Procedural Layout Planning
title_zh: iPLAN：交互式和程序性布局规划
abstract: Layout design is ubiquitous in many applications, e.g. architecture/urban planning, etc, which involves a lengthy iterative design process. Recently, deep learning has been leveraged to automatically generate layouts via image generation, showing a huge potential to free designers from laborious routines. While automatic generation can greatly boost productivity, designer input is undoubtedly crucial. An ideal AI-aided design tool should automate repetitive routines, and meanwhile accept human guidance and provide smart/proactive suggestions. However, the capability of involving humans into the loop has been largely ignored in existing methods which are mostly end-to-end approaches. To this end, we propose a new human-in-the-loop generative model, iPLAN, which is capable of automatically generating layouts, but also interacting with designers throughout the whole procedure, enabling humans and AI to co-evolve a sketchy idea gradually into the final design. iPLAN is evaluated on diverse datasets and compared with existing methods. The results show that iPLAN has high fidelity in producing similar layouts to those from human designers, great flexibility in accepting designer inputs and providing design suggestions accordingly, and strong generalizability when facing unseen design tasks and limited training data.
summary: Layout design is ubiquitous in many applications, e.g. architecture/urban planning, etc, which involves a lengthy iterative design process. Recently, deep learning has been leveraged to automatically generate layouts via image generation, showing a huge potential to free designers from laborious routines. While automatic generation can greatly boost productivity, designer input is undoubtedly crucial. An ideal AI-aided design tool should automate repetitive routines, and meanwhile accept human guidance and provide smart/proactive suggestions. However, the capability of involving humans into the loop has been largely ignored in existing methods which are mostly end-to-end approaches. To this end, we propose a new human-in-the-loop generative model, iPLAN, which is capable of automatically generating layouts, but also interacting with designers throughout the whole procedure, enabling humans and AI to co-evolve a sketchy idea gradually into the final design. iPLAN is evaluated on diverse datasets and compared with existing methods. The results show that iPLAN has high fidelity in producing similar layouts to those from human designers, great flexibility in accepting designer inputs and providing design suggestions accordingly, and strong generalizability when facing unseen design tasks and limited training data.
abstract_zh: 布局设计在许多应用中无处不在，例如建筑/城市规划等，其中涉及漫长的迭代设计过程。最近，深度学习已被用来通过图像生成自动生成布局，显示出将设计师从繁琐的日常工作中解放出来的巨大潜力。虽然自动生成可以极大地提高生产力，但设计人员的输入无疑至关重要。理想的人工智能辅助设计工具应该自动执行重复的例程，同时接受人类指导并提供智能/主动的建议。然而，现有的方法大多是端到端的方法，而人类参与循环的能力在很大程度上被忽视了。为此，我们提出了一种新的人机循环生成模型iPLAN，它不仅能够自动生成布局，而且能够在整个过程中与设计师进行交互，使人类和人工智能能够共同将粗略的想法逐渐演变成最终的设计。 iPLAN 在不同的数据集上进行评估，并与现有方法进行比较。结果表明，iPLAN 在生成与人类设计师相似的布局方面具有很高的保真度，在接受设计师输入并相应提供设计建议方面具有很大的灵活性，并且在面对看不见的设计任务和有限的训练数据时具有很强的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出iPLAN，一种结合人类交互与程序化生成的布局规划模型，旨在提升设计效率并保留设计师的指导作用。
AI.motivation: 现有布局生成方法多为端到端自动化，忽视了设计师在迭代过程中的关键作用，难以平衡AI效率与人类创意需求。
AI.method: 设计iPLAN模型，通过人类在循环中的实时交互（如输入修改建议），结合程序化生成技术，实现AI与设计师协同演化设计草图至最终方案。
AI.result: 实验表明iPLAN在布局相似度、设计灵活性及应对新任务的泛化能力上优于现有方法，且能有效整合用户输入生成符合预期的布局。
AI.conclusion: iPLAN通过引入人类交互机制，成功解决了传统AI布局工具缺乏灵活性的问题，为AI辅助设计提供了高效且具创造性的解决方案。

search_text: iPLAN: Interactive and Procedural Layout Planning iPLAN：交互式和程序性布局规划 Layout design is ubiquitous in many applications, e.g. architecture/urban planning, etc, which involves a lengthy iterative design process. Recently, deep learning has been leveraged to automatically generate layouts via image generation, showing a huge potential to free designers from laborious routines. While automatic generation can greatly boost productivity, designer input is undoubtedly crucial. An ideal AI-aided design tool should automate repetitive routines, and meanwhile accept human guidance and provide smart/proactive suggestions. However, the capability of involving humans into the loop has been largely ignored in existing methods which are mostly end-to-end approaches. To this end, we propose a new human-in-the-loop generative model, iPLAN, which is capable of automatically generating layouts, but also interacting with designers throughout the whole procedure, enabling humans and AI to co-evolve a sketchy idea gradually into the final design. iPLAN is evaluated on diverse datasets and compared with existing methods. The results show that iPLAN has high fidelity in producing similar layouts to those from human designers, great flexibility in accepting designer inputs and providing design suggestions accordingly, and strong generalizability when facing unseen design tasks and limited training data. 布局设计在许多应用中无处不在，例如建筑/城市规划等，其中涉及漫长的迭代设计过程。最近，深度学习已被用来通过图像生成自动生成布局，显示出将设计师从繁琐的日常工作中解放出来的巨大潜力。虽然自动生成可以极大地提高生产力，但设计人员的输入无疑至关重要。理想的人工智能辅助设计工具应该自动执行重复的例程，同时接受人类指导并提供智能/主动的建议。然而，现有的方法大多是端到端的方法，而人类参与循环的能力在很大程度上被忽视了。为此，我们提出了一种新的人机循环生成模型iPLAN，它不仅能够自动生成布局，而且能够在整个过程中与设计师进行交互，使人类和人工智能能够共同将粗略的想法逐渐演变成最终的设计。 iPLAN 在不同的数据集上进行评估，并与现有方法进行比较。结果表明，iPLAN 在生成与人类设计师相似的布局方面具有很高的保真度，在接受设计师输入并相应提供设计建议方面具有很大的灵活性，并且在面对看不见的设计任务和有限的训练数据时具有很强的通用性。 本文提出iPLAN，一种结合人类交互与程序化生成的布局规划模型，旨在提升设计效率并保留设计师的指导作用。 Feixiang He,Yanlong Huang,He Wang cs.CV

authors_text: François Grondin,Marc-Antoine Maheux,Jean-Samuel Lauzon,Jonathan Vincent,François Michaud
title: SMP-PHAT: Lightweight DoA Estimation by Merging Microphone Pairs
title_zh: SMP-PHAT：通过合并麦克风对进行轻量级 DoA 估计
abstract: This paper introduces SMP-PHAT, which performs direction of arrival (DoA) of sound estimation with a microphone array by merging pairs of microphones that are parallel in space. This approach reduces the number of pairwise cross-correlation computations, and brings down the number of flops and memory lookups when searching for DoA. Experiments on low-cost hardware with commonly used microphone arrays show that the proposed method provides the same accuracy as the former SRP-PHAT approach, while reducing the computational load by 39% in some cases.
summary: This paper introduces SMP-PHAT, which performs direction of arrival (DoA) of sound estimation with a microphone array by merging pairs of microphones that are parallel in space. This approach reduces the number of pairwise cross-correlation computations, and brings down the number of flops and memory lookups when searching for DoA. Experiments on low-cost hardware with commonly used microphone arrays show that the proposed method provides the same accuracy as the former SRP-PHAT approach, while reducing the computational load by 39% in some cases.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 SMP-PHAT，它通过合并空间上平行的麦克风对，使用麦克风阵列执行声音到达方向 (DoA) 估计。这种方法减少了成对互相关计算的数量，并减少了搜索 DoA 时的触发器和内存查找的数量。在具有常用麦克风阵列的低成本硬件上进行的实验表明，所提出的方法提供了与之前的 SRP-PHAT 方法相同的精度，同时在某些情况下减少了 39% 的计算负载。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SMP-PHAT方法，通过合并空间平行麦克风对实现轻量级声源方向（DoA）估计。
AI.motivation: 传统DoA估计方法计算复杂度高，难以在低成本硬件上实时运行，需降低计算负载并保持精度。
AI.method: 通过合并平行麦克风对减少交叉相关计算量，降低浮点运算次数和内存访问需求。
AI.result: 在低成本硬件上实现与SRP-PHAT相同精度，部分场景下计算量减少39%。
AI.conclusion: SMP-PHAT在保持精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度，适用于资源受限的麦克风阵列设备。

title: Abstract argumentation and answer set programming: two faces of Nelson's logic
title_zh: 抽象论证和答案集编程：纳尔逊逻辑的两个方面
comment: Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)
comments: Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)
abstract: In this work, we show that both logic programming and abstract argumentation frameworks can be interpreted in terms of Nelson's constructive logic N4. We do so by formalizing, in this logic, two principles that we call non-contradictory inference and strengthened closed world assumption: the first states that no belief can be held based on contradictory evidence while the latter forces both unknown and contradictory evidence to be regarded as false. Using these principles, both logic programming and abstract argumentation frameworks are translated into constructive logic in a modular way and using the object language. Logic programming implication and abstract argumentation supports become, in the translation, a new implication connective following the non-contradictory inference principle. Attacks are then represented by combining this new implication with strong negation. Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP).
summary: In this work, we show that both logic programming and abstract argumentation frameworks can be interpreted in terms of Nelson's constructive logic N4. We do so by formalizing, in this logic, two principles that we call non-contradictory inference and strengthened closed world assumption: the first states that no belief can be held based on contradictory evidence while the latter forces both unknown and contradictory evidence to be regarded as false. Using these principles, both logic programming and abstract argumentation frameworks are translated into constructive logic in a modular way and using the object language. Logic programming implication and abstract argumentation supports become, in the translation, a new implication connective following the non-contradictory inference principle. Attacks are then represented by combining this new implication with strong negation. Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP).
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们表明逻辑编程和抽象论证框架都可以用 Nelson 的构造性逻辑 N4 来解释。我们通过在这种逻辑中形式化两个原则来做到这一点，我们称之为非矛盾推理和强化的封闭世界假设：第一个原则指出，任何信念都不能基于矛盾的证据而成立，而后者则迫使未知和矛盾的证据都被视为错误。利用这些原理，逻辑编程和抽象论证框架都可以使用对象语言以模块化方式转换为构造性逻辑。逻辑程序蕴涵和抽象论证支持在翻译中成为遵循非矛盾推理原则的新蕴涵连接词。然后，通过将这种新含义与强否定相结合来表示攻击。正在逻辑编程理论与实践（TPLP）中考虑。

AI.tldr: 本文将逻辑编程与抽象论辩框架统一于Nelson构造性逻辑N4，通过非矛盾推理与强化闭世界假设原则实现模块化翻译。
AI.motivation: 为解决逻辑编程与抽象论辩在处理矛盾证据及未知信息时的理论分歧，寻求统一逻辑基础以促进两领域协同发展。
AI.method: 基于Nelson逻辑N4形式化非矛盾推理原则与强化闭世界假设，通过对象语言将逻辑编程与抽象论辩框架模块化映射为构造性逻辑系统。
AI.result: 成功构建逻辑编程蕴含与抽象论辩支持的新蕴含连接词，通过强否定组合实现攻击关系的逻辑表达，完成两框架向N4逻辑的统一翻译。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为逻辑编程与抽象论辩提供了统一的理论分析工具，通过构造性逻辑的视角深化了两者在矛盾处理与知识表示方面的理论联系。

authors_text: Yue Chen,Xuan Wang,Xingyu Chen,Qi Zhang,Xiaoyu Li,Yu Guo,Jue Wang,Fei Wang
title: UV Volumes for Real-time Rendering of Editable Free-view Human Performance
title_zh: 用于实时渲染可编辑自由视图人体表现的 UV 体积
abstract: Neural volume rendering enables photo-realistic renderings of a human performer in free-view, a critical task in immersive VR/AR applications. But the practice is severely limited by high computational costs in the rendering process. To solve this problem, we propose the UV Volumes, a new approach that can render an editable free-view video of a human performer in real-time. It separates the high-frequency (i.e., non-smooth) human appearance from the 3D volume, and encodes them into 2D neural texture stacks (NTS). The smooth UV volumes allow much smaller and shallower neural networks to obtain densities and texture coordinates in 3D while capturing detailed appearance in 2D NTS. For editability, the mapping between the parameterized human model and the smooth texture coordinates allows us a better generalization on novel poses and shapes. Furthermore, the use of NTS enables interesting applications, e.g., retexturing. Extensive experiments on CMU Panoptic, ZJU Mocap, and H36M datasets show that our model can render 960 x 540 images in 30FPS on average with comparable photo-realism to state-of-the-art methods. The project and supplementary materials are available at https://fanegg.github.io/UV-Volumes.
summary: Neural volume rendering enables photo-realistic renderings of a human performer in free-view, a critical task in immersive VR/AR applications. But the practice is severely limited by high computational costs in the rendering process. To solve this problem, we propose the UV Volumes, a new approach that can render an editable free-view video of a human performer in real-time. It separates the high-frequency (i.e., non-smooth) human appearance from the 3D volume, and encodes them into 2D neural texture stacks (NTS). The smooth UV volumes allow much smaller and shallower neural networks to obtain densities and texture coordinates in 3D while capturing detailed appearance in 2D NTS. For editability, the mapping between the parameterized human model and the smooth texture coordinates allows us a better generalization on novel poses and shapes. Furthermore, the use of NTS enables interesting applications, e.g., retexturing. Extensive experiments on CMU Panoptic, ZJU Mocap, and H36M datasets show that our model can render 960 x 540 images in 30FPS on average with comparable photo-realism to state-of-the-art methods. The project and supplementary materials are available at https://fanegg.github.io/UV-Volumes.
abstract_zh: 神经体渲染可以在自由视角下对人类表演者进行照片级真实感渲染，这是沉浸式 VR/AR 应用中的一项关键任务。但这种做法受到渲染过程中高计算成本的严重限制。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 UV Volumes，这是一种可以实时渲染人类表演者的可编辑自由观看视频的新方法。它将高频（即非平滑）人体外观与 3D 体积分离，并将它们编码到 2D 神经纹理堆栈 (NTS) 中。平滑的 UV 体积允许更小、更浅的神经网络获得 3D 密度和纹理坐标，同时捕获 2D NTS 中的详细外观。为了可编辑性，参数化人体模型和平滑纹理坐标之间的映射使我们能够更好地概括新颖的姿势和形状。此外，NTS 的使用可以实现有趣的应用，例如重新纹理。对 CMU Panoptic、ZJU Mocap 和 H36M 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的模型平均可以以 30FPS 渲染 960 x 540 的图像，其真实感与最先进的方法相当。该项目和补充材料可在 https://fanegg.github.io/UV-Volumes 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为UV Volumes的新方法，用于实时渲染可编辑的自由视角人体表演，解决了神经体积渲染计算成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 神经体积渲染虽能实现高质量人体自由视角渲染，但计算成本高，难以实时应用。需寻找更高效且支持编辑的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过将高频人体外观分离为2D神经纹理堆栈（NTS），结合平滑UV体积与参数化人体模型映射，使用更小的神经网络实现3D密度与纹理坐标计算，支持姿态和形状的泛化及重纹理应用。
AI.result: 在CMU Panoptic、ZJU Mocap和H36M数据集上，模型平均以30FPS渲染960x540图像，视觉效果与现有方法相当。
AI.conclusion: UV Volumes在保证照片级真实感的同时实现了实时渲染与编辑功能，为沉浸式VR/AR应用提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: UV Volumes for Real-time Rendering of Editable Free-view Human Performance 用于实时渲染可编辑自由视图人体表现的 UV 体积 Neural volume rendering enables photo-realistic renderings of a human performer in free-view, a critical task in immersive VR/AR applications. But the practice is severely limited by high computational costs in the rendering process. To solve this problem, we propose the UV Volumes, a new approach that can render an editable free-view video of a human performer in real-time. It separates the high-frequency (i.e., non-smooth) human appearance from the 3D volume, and encodes them into 2D neural texture stacks (NTS). The smooth UV volumes allow much smaller and shallower neural networks to obtain densities and texture coordinates in 3D while capturing detailed appearance in 2D NTS. For editability, the mapping between the parameterized human model and the smooth texture coordinates allows us a better generalization on novel poses and shapes. Furthermore, the use of NTS enables interesting applications, e.g., retexturing. Extensive experiments on CMU Panoptic, ZJU Mocap, and H36M datasets show that our model can render 960 x 540 images in 30FPS on average with comparable photo-realism to state-of-the-art methods. The project and supplementary materials are available at https://fanegg.github.io/UV-Volumes. 神经体渲染可以在自由视角下对人类表演者进行照片级真实感渲染，这是沉浸式 VR/AR 应用中的一项关键任务。但这种做法受到渲染过程中高计算成本的严重限制。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 UV Volumes，这是一种可以实时渲染人类表演者的可编辑自由观看视频的新方法。它将高频（即非平滑）人体外观与 3D 体积分离，并将它们编码到 2D 神经纹理堆栈 (NTS) 中。平滑的 UV 体积允许更小、更浅的神经网络获得 3D 密度和纹理坐标，同时捕获 2D NTS 中的详细外观。为了可编辑性，参数化人体模型和平滑纹理坐标之间的映射使我们能够更好地概括新颖的姿势和形状。此外，NTS 的使用可以实现有趣的应用，例如重新纹理。对 CMU Panoptic、ZJU Mocap 和 H36M 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的模型平均可以以 30FPS 渲染 960 x 540 的图像，其真实感与最先进的方法相当。该项目和补充材料可在 https://fanegg.github.io/UV-Volumes 上获取。 本文提出了一种名为UV Volumes的新方法，用于实时渲染可编辑的自由视角人体表演，解决了神经体积渲染计算成本高的问题。 Yue Chen,Xuan Wang,Xingyu Chen,Qi Zhang,Xiaoyu Li,Yu Guo,Jue Wang,Fei Wang cs.CV

title: FingerPrint: A 3-D Printed Soft Monolithic 4-Degree-of-Freedom Fingertip Haptic Device with Embedded Actuation
title_zh: FingerPrint：具有嵌入式驱动功能的 3D 打印软整体 4 自由度指尖触觉设备
abstract: Wearable fingertip haptic interfaces provide tactile stimuli on the fingerpads by applying skin pressure, linear and rotational shear, and vibration. Designing and fabricating a compact, multi-degree-of-freedom, and forceful fingertip haptic interface is challenging due to trade-offs among miniaturization, multifunctionality, and manufacturability. Downsizing electromagnetic actuators that produce high torques is infeasible, and integrating multiple actuators, links, joints, and transmission elements increases device size and weight. 3-D printing enables rapid manufacturing of complex devices with minimal assembly in large batches. However, it requires a careful arrangement of material properties, geometry, scale, and printer capabilities. Here we present a fully 3-D printed, soft, monolithic fingertip haptic device based on an origami pattern known as the "waterbomb" base that embeds foldable vacuum actuation and produces 4-DoF of motion on the fingerpad with tunable haptic forces (up to 1.3 N shear and 7 N normal) and torque (up to 25 N-mm). Including the thimble mounting, the compact device is 40 mm long and 20 mm wide. This demonstrates the efficacy of origami design and soft material 3D printing for designing and rapidly fabricating miniature yet complex wearable mechanisms with force output appropriate for haptic interaction.
summary: Wearable fingertip haptic interfaces provide tactile stimuli on the fingerpads by applying skin pressure, linear and rotational shear, and vibration. Designing and fabricating a compact, multi-degree-of-freedom, and forceful fingertip haptic interface is challenging due to trade-offs among miniaturization, multifunctionality, and manufacturability. Downsizing electromagnetic actuators that produce high torques is infeasible, and integrating multiple actuators, links, joints, and transmission elements increases device size and weight. 3-D printing enables rapid manufacturing of complex devices with minimal assembly in large batches. However, it requires a careful arrangement of material properties, geometry, scale, and printer capabilities. Here we present a fully 3-D printed, soft, monolithic fingertip haptic device based on an origami pattern known as the "waterbomb" base that embeds foldable vacuum actuation and produces 4-DoF of motion on the fingerpad with tunable haptic forces (up to 1.3 N shear and 7 N normal) and torque (up to 25 N-mm). Including the thimble mounting, the compact device is 40 mm long and 20 mm wide. This demonstrates the efficacy of origami design and soft material 3D printing for designing and rapidly fabricating miniature yet complex wearable mechanisms with force output appropriate for haptic interaction.
abstract_zh: 可穿戴指尖触觉界面通过施加皮肤压力、线性和旋转剪切以及振动在指垫上提供触觉刺激。由于小型化、多功能性和可制造性之间的权衡，设计和制造紧凑、多自由度和强大的指尖触觉界面具有挑战性。缩小产生高扭矩的电磁执行器的尺寸是不可行的，并且集成多个执行器、连杆、接头和传输元件会增加设备的尺寸和重量。 3D 打印能够以最少的组装量快速制造复杂的设备。然而，它需要仔细安排材料属性、几何形状、比例和打印机功能。在这里，我们展示了一种完全 3D 打印的、柔软的整体指尖触觉设备，基于称为“水炸弹”底座的折纸图案，嵌入可折叠真空致动，并在指垫上产生 4-DoF 运动，具有可调触觉力（高达 1.3 N 剪切力和 7 N 法向力）和扭矩（高达 25 N-mm）。包括顶针安装在内，该紧凑型设备长 40 毫米，宽 20 毫米。这证明了折纸设计和软材料 3D 打印在设计和快速制造微型但复杂的可穿戴机构（具有适合触觉交互的力输出）方面的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D打印和折纸结构的柔性触觉设备，实现四自由度指尖触觉反馈。
AI.motivation: 现有指尖触觉设备面临微型化、多功能性与可制造性之间的权衡难题，传统电磁执行器难以小型化且集成复杂结构会增加体积重量。
AI.method: 采用3D打印技术结合折纸'水弹基底'结构，嵌入可折叠真空执行机构，实现紧凑的单体化设计。
AI.result: 设备尺寸40mm×20mm，可输出最大1.3N剪切力、7N法向力及25N-mm扭矩，验证了折纸设计与软材料3D打印的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究展示了通过折纸结构与软体3D打印技术，可高效制造适用于触觉交互的微型复杂机械装置。

authors_text: Zaid Khan,Vijay Kumar BG,Xiang Yu,Samuel Schulter,Manmohan Chandraker,Yun Fu
title: Single-Stream Multi-Level Alignment for Vision-Language Pretraining
title_zh: 用于视觉语言预训练的单流多级对齐
abstract: Self-supervised vision-language pretraining from pure images and text with a contrastive loss is effective, but ignores fine-grained alignment due to a dual-stream architecture that aligns image and text representations only on a global level. Earlier, supervised, non-contrastive methods were capable of finer-grained alignment, but required dense annotations that were not scalable. We propose a single stream architecture that aligns images and language at multiple levels: global, fine-grained patch-token, and conceptual/semantic, using two novel tasks: symmetric cross-modality reconstruction (XMM) and a pseudo-labeled key word prediction (PSL). In XMM, we mask input tokens from one modality and use cross-modal information to reconstruct the masked token, thus improving fine-grained alignment between the two modalities. In PSL, we use attention to select keywords in a caption, use a momentum encoder to recommend other important keywords that are missing from the caption but represented in the image, and then train the visual encoder to predict the presence of those keywords, helping it learn semantic concepts that are essential for grounding a textual token to an image region. We demonstrate competitive performance and improved data efficiency on image-text retrieval, grounding, visual question answering/reasoning against larger models and models trained on more data. Code and models available at zaidkhan.me/SIMLA.
summary: Self-supervised vision-language pretraining from pure images and text with a contrastive loss is effective, but ignores fine-grained alignment due to a dual-stream architecture that aligns image and text representations only on a global level. Earlier, supervised, non-contrastive methods were capable of finer-grained alignment, but required dense annotations that were not scalable. We propose a single stream architecture that aligns images and language at multiple levels: global, fine-grained patch-token, and conceptual/semantic, using two novel tasks: symmetric cross-modality reconstruction (XMM) and a pseudo-labeled key word prediction (PSL). In XMM, we mask input tokens from one modality and use cross-modal information to reconstruct the masked token, thus improving fine-grained alignment between the two modalities. In PSL, we use attention to select keywords in a caption, use a momentum encoder to recommend other important keywords that are missing from the caption but represented in the image, and then train the visual encoder to predict the presence of those keywords, helping it learn semantic concepts that are essential for grounding a textual token to an image region. We demonstrate competitive performance and improved data efficiency on image-text retrieval, grounding, visual question answering/reasoning against larger models and models trained on more data. Code and models available at zaidkhan.me/SIMLA.
abstract_zh: 从具有对比损失的纯图像和文本进行自监督视觉语言预训练是有效的，但由于双流架构仅在全局级别上对齐图像和文本表示，因此忽略了细粒度​​对齐。早期，有监督的非对比方法能够进行更细粒度的对齐，但需要不可扩展的密集注释。我们提出了一种单流架构，它使用两个新颖的任务：对称跨模态重建（XMM）和伪标记关键词预测（PSL），在多个级别上对齐图像和语言：全局、细粒度补丁令牌和概念/语义。在 XMM 中，我们屏蔽来自一种模态的输入标记，并使用跨模态信息来重建屏蔽的标记，从而改善两种模态之间的细粒度对齐。在 PSL 中，我们使用注意力机制来选择标题中的关键字，使用动量编码器来推荐标题中缺少但在图像中表示的其他重要关键字，然后训练视觉编码器来预测这些关键字的存在，帮助其学习对于将文本标记扎根到图像区域至关重要的语义概念。我们在图像文本检索、基础、视觉问答/推理方面展示了针对较大模型和基于更多数据训练的模型的竞争性能和提高的数据效率。代码和型号可在 zaidkhan.me/SIMLA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种单流多级对齐方法，用于视觉-语言预训练，以改进图像和文本之间的细粒度对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有的对比损失方法虽然有效，但因双流架构只在全局层面对齐图像和文本表示，忽略了细粒度对齐。而监督非对比方法虽然能实现更细粒度的对齐，但需要密集标注，难以扩展。
AI.method: 提出了一种单流架构，在全局、细粒度的图像块-文本标记以及概念/语义层面对齐图像和语言，使用两种新任务：对称跨模态重建（XMM）和伪标签关键词预测（PSL）。XMM通过掩码一个模态的输入标记并利用跨模态信息重建掩码标记来改进细粒度对齐。PSL使用注意力选择字幕中的关键词，并利用动量编码器推荐图像中但字幕中缺失的重要关键词，训练视觉编码器预测这些关键词的出现。
AI.result: 在图像-文本检索、定位、视觉问答/推理任务上，该方法在与更大模型和更多数据训练的模型相比时，表现出竞争力且数据效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过单流多级对齐实现了视觉-语言预训练的细粒度对齐，提升了模型性能和数据效率。

search_text: Single-Stream Multi-Level Alignment for Vision-Language Pretraining 用于视觉语言预训练的单流多级对齐 Self-supervised vision-language pretraining from pure images and text with a contrastive loss is effective, but ignores fine-grained alignment due to a dual-stream architecture that aligns image and text representations only on a global level. Earlier, supervised, non-contrastive methods were capable of finer-grained alignment, but required dense annotations that were not scalable. We propose a single stream architecture that aligns images and language at multiple levels: global, fine-grained patch-token, and conceptual/semantic, using two novel tasks: symmetric cross-modality reconstruction (XMM) and a pseudo-labeled key word prediction (PSL). In XMM, we mask input tokens from one modality and use cross-modal information to reconstruct the masked token, thus improving fine-grained alignment between the two modalities. In PSL, we use attention to select keywords in a caption, use a momentum encoder to recommend other important keywords that are missing from the caption but represented in the image, and then train the visual encoder to predict the presence of those keywords, helping it learn semantic concepts that are essential for grounding a textual token to an image region. We demonstrate competitive performance and improved data efficiency on image-text retrieval, grounding, visual question answering/reasoning against larger models and models trained on more data. Code and models available at zaidkhan.me/SIMLA. 从具有对比损失的纯图像和文本进行自监督视觉语言预训练是有效的，但由于双流架构仅在全局级别上对齐图像和文本表示，因此忽略了细粒度​​对齐。早期，有监督的非对比方法能够进行更细粒度的对齐，但需要不可扩展的密集注释。我们提出了一种单流架构，它使用两个新颖的任务：对称跨模态重建（XMM）和伪标记关键词预测（PSL），在多个级别上对齐图像和语言：全局、细粒度补丁令牌和概念/语义。在 XMM 中，我们屏蔽来自一种模态的输入标记，并使用跨模态信息来重建屏蔽的标记，从而改善两种模态之间的细粒度对齐。在 PSL 中，我们使用注意力机制来选择标题中的关键字，使用动量编码器来推荐标题中缺少但在图像中表示的其他重要关键字，然后训练视觉编码器来预测这些关键字的存在，帮助其学习对于将文本标记扎根到图像区域至关重要的语义概念。我们在图像文本检索、基础、视觉问答/推理方面展示了针对较大模型和基于更多数据训练的模型的竞争性能和提高的数据效率。代码和型号可在 zaidkhan.me/SIMLA 获取。 本文提出了一种单流多级对齐方法，用于视觉-语言预训练，以改进图像和文本之间的细粒度对齐。 Zaid Khan,Vijay Kumar BG,Xiang Yu,Samuel Schulter,Manmohan Chandraker,Yun Fu cs.CV

authors_text: Xingxuan Zhang,Zekai Xu,Renzhe Xu,Jiashuo Liu,Peng Cui,Weitao Wan,Chong Sun,Chen Li
title: Towards Domain Generalization in Object Detection
title_zh: 目标检测中的领域泛化
abstract: Despite the striking performance achieved by modern detectors when training and test data are sampled from the same or similar distribution, the generalization ability of detectors under unknown distribution shifts remains hardly studied. Recently several works discussed the detectors' adaptation ability to a specific target domain which are not readily applicable in real-world applications since detectors may encounter various environments or situations while pre-collecting all of them before training is inconceivable. In this paper, we study the critical problem, domain generalization in object detection (DGOD), where detectors are trained with source domains and evaluated on unknown target domains. To thoroughly evaluate detectors under unknown distribution shifts, we formulate the DGOD problem and propose a comprehensive evaluation benchmark to fill the vacancy. Moreover, we propose a novel method named Region Aware Proposal reweighTing (RAPT) to eliminate dependence within RoI features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that current DG methods fail to address the DGOD problem and our method outperforms other state-of-the-art counterparts.
summary: Despite the striking performance achieved by modern detectors when training and test data are sampled from the same or similar distribution, the generalization ability of detectors under unknown distribution shifts remains hardly studied. Recently several works discussed the detectors' adaptation ability to a specific target domain which are not readily applicable in real-world applications since detectors may encounter various environments or situations while pre-collecting all of them before training is inconceivable. In this paper, we study the critical problem, domain generalization in object detection (DGOD), where detectors are trained with source domains and evaluated on unknown target domains. To thoroughly evaluate detectors under unknown distribution shifts, we formulate the DGOD problem and propose a comprehensive evaluation benchmark to fill the vacancy. Moreover, we propose a novel method named Region Aware Proposal reweighTing (RAPT) to eliminate dependence within RoI features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that current DG methods fail to address the DGOD problem and our method outperforms other state-of-the-art counterparts.
abstract_zh: 尽管现代检测器在从相同或相似的分布中采样训练和测试数据时取得了惊人的性能，但检测器在未知分布变化下的泛化能力仍然很少被研究。最近的一些工作讨论了检测器对特定目标域的适应能力，这在现实世界的应用中并不容易应用，因为检测器可能会遇到各种环境或情况，而在训练之前预先收集所有这些环境或情况是不可想象的。在本文中，我们研究了目标检测（DGOD）中的关键问题，即检测器使用源域进行训练并在未知目标域上进行评估。为了彻底评估未知分布变化下的探测器，我们提出了 DGOD 问题并提出了一个综合评估基准来填补这一空白。此外，我们提出了一种名为区域感知提案重新加权（RAPT）的新方法来消除 RoI 特征内的依赖性。大量实验表明，当前的 DG 方法无法解决 DGOD 问题，并且我们的方法优于其他最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究目标检测领域的领域泛化问题（DGOD），提出新的评估基准和Region Aware Proposal reweighTing（RAPT）方法以提升检测器在未知分布下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测方法在训练与测试数据分布不一致时表现不佳，而针对特定目标域的适应方法无法应对真实世界中多样且未知的环境变化，需探索更普适的领域泛化解决方案。
AI.method: 提出RAPT方法，通过重新加权区域提议（RoI）特征，消除特征间的冗余依赖，增强模型对未知分布的适应能力，并构建综合评估基准以系统验证DGOD性能。
AI.result: 实验表明现有领域泛化方法无法有效解决DGOD问题，而RAPT在多个基准测试中优于其他最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 当前领域泛化方法难以应对未知分布挑战，本文提出的RAPT方法通过特征解耦策略显著提升了目标检测的领域泛化能力，为相关研究提供了新方向。

title: Velocity continuation with Fourier neural operators for accelerated uncertainty quantification
title_zh: 使用傅里叶神经算子进行速度延续，以加速不确定性量化
abstract: Seismic imaging is an ill-posed inverse problem that is challenged by noisy data and modeling inaccuracies -- due to errors in the background squared-slowness model. Uncertainty quantification is essential for determining how variability in the background models affects seismic imaging. Due to the costs associated with the forward Born modeling operator as well as the high dimensionality of seismic images, quantification of uncertainty is computationally expensive. As such, the main contribution of this work is a survey-specific Fourier neural operator surrogate to velocity continuation that maps seismic images associated with one background model to another virtually for free. While being trained with only 200 background and seismic image pairs, this surrogate is able to accurately predict seismic images associated with new background models, thus accelerating seismic imaging uncertainty quantification. We support our method with a realistic data example in which we quantify seismic imaging uncertainties using a Fourier neural operator surrogate, illustrating how variations in background models affect the position of reflectors in a seismic image.
summary: Seismic imaging is an ill-posed inverse problem that is challenged by noisy data and modeling inaccuracies -- due to errors in the background squared-slowness model. Uncertainty quantification is essential for determining how variability in the background models affects seismic imaging. Due to the costs associated with the forward Born modeling operator as well as the high dimensionality of seismic images, quantification of uncertainty is computationally expensive. As such, the main contribution of this work is a survey-specific Fourier neural operator surrogate to velocity continuation that maps seismic images associated with one background model to another virtually for free. While being trained with only 200 background and seismic image pairs, this surrogate is able to accurately predict seismic images associated with new background models, thus accelerating seismic imaging uncertainty quantification. We support our method with a realistic data example in which we quantify seismic imaging uncertainties using a Fourier neural operator surrogate, illustrating how variations in background models affect the position of reflectors in a seismic image.
abstract_zh: 地震成像是一个不适定的反问题，受到噪声数据和建模不准确的挑战——由于背景平方慢度模型中的错误。不确定性量化对于确定背景模型的变化如何影响地震成像至关重要。由于与前向 Born 建模算子相关的成本以及地震图像的高维性，不确定性的量化在计算上是昂贵的。因此，这项工作的主要贡献是一种特定于调查的傅里叶神经算子替代速度连续，将与一个背景模型相关的地震图像几乎免费地映射到另一个背景模型。虽然仅使用 200 个背景和地震图像对进行训练，但该代理能够准确预测与新背景模型相关的地震图像，从而加速地震成像不确定性量化。我们用一个真实的数据示例来支持我们的方法，其中我们使用傅里叶神经算子代理来量化地震成像的不确定性，说明背景模型的变化如何影响地震图像中反射体的位置。

AI.tldr: 提出基于傅里叶神经算子的速度延续方法，用于加速地震成像的不确定性量化
AI.motivation: 地震成像不确定性量化计算成本高，需高效方法降低计算负担
AI.method: 构建傅里叶神经算子代理模型，通过少量训练数据实现背景模型间地震图像的快速映射
AI.result: 在真实数据中验证方法有效性，展示背景模型变化对地震图像反射体位置的影响
AI.conclusion: 提出的代理模型有效加速不确定性量化，为地震成像提供可行解决方案

search_text: Velocity continuation with Fourier neural operators for accelerated uncertainty quantification 使用傅里叶神经算子进行速度延续，以加速不确定性量化 Seismic imaging is an ill-posed inverse problem that is challenged by noisy data and modeling inaccuracies -- due to errors in the background squared-slowness model. Uncertainty quantification is essential for determining how variability in the background models affects seismic imaging. Due to the costs associated with the forward Born modeling operator as well as the high dimensionality of seismic images, quantification of uncertainty is computationally expensive. As such, the main contribution of this work is a survey-specific Fourier neural operator surrogate to velocity continuation that maps seismic images associated with one background model to another virtually for free. While being trained with only 200 background and seismic image pairs, this surrogate is able to accurately predict seismic images associated with new background models, thus accelerating seismic imaging uncertainty quantification. We support our method with a realistic data example in which we quantify seismic imaging uncertainties using a Fourier neural operator surrogate, illustrating how variations in background models affect the position of reflectors in a seismic image. 地震成像是一个不适定的反问题，受到噪声数据和建模不准确的挑战——由于背景平方慢度模型中的错误。不确定性量化对于确定背景模型的变化如何影响地震成像至关重要。由于与前向 Born 建模算子相关的成本以及地震图像的高维性，不确定性的量化在计算上是昂贵的。因此，这项工作的主要贡献是一种特定于调查的傅里叶神经算子替代速度连续，将与一个背景模型相关的地震图像几乎免费地映射到另一个背景模型。虽然仅使用 200 个背景和地震图像对进行训练，但该代理能够准确预测与新背景模型相关的地震图像，从而加速地震成像不确定性量化。我们用一个真实的数据示例来支持我们的方法，其中我们使用傅里叶神经算子代理来量化地震成像的不确定性，说明背景模型的变化如何影响地震图像中反射体的位置。 提出基于傅里叶神经算子的速度延续方法，用于加速地震成像的不确定性量化 Ali Siahkoohi,Mathias Louboutin,Felix J. title: Algorithmic support of a personal virtual assistant for automating the processing of client requests
title_zh: 个人虚拟助理的算法支持，用于自动处理客户请求
abstract: This article describes creating algorithmic support for the functioning of a personal virtual assistant, which allows automating the processing of customer requests. The study aims to reduce errors and processing time for a client request in business systems - text chats or voice channels using a text transcription system. The results of the development of algorithmic support and an assessment of the quality of work on synthetic data presented.
summary: This article describes creating algorithmic support for the functioning of a personal virtual assistant, which allows automating the processing of customer requests. The study aims to reduce errors and processing time for a client request in business systems - text chats or voice channels using a text transcription system. The results of the development of algorithmic support and an assessment of the quality of work on synthetic data presented.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了如何为个人虚拟助理的功能创建算法支持，从而允许自动处理客户请求。该研究旨在减少业务系统（使用文本转录系统的文本聊天或语音通道）中客户请求的错误和处理时间。提出了算法支持的开发结果以及对合成数据工作质量的评估。

AI.tldr: 开发算法支持个人虚拟助手以自动化处理客户请求，减少业务系统中的错误和处理时间。
AI.motivation: 通过自动化处理客户请求，提高业务系统效率和准确性，减少人工干预导致的错误。
AI.method: 设计文本转录系统与算法支持，结合合成数据进行质量评估。
AI.result: 成功开发算法支持并验证其在合成数据上的处理效果。
AI.conclusion: 该算法支持有效提升了客户请求处理的效率与准确性，为虚拟助手应用奠定基础。

title: MedMCQA : A Large-scale Multi-Subject Multi-Choice Dataset for Medical domain Question Answering
title_zh: MedMCQA：用于医学领域问答的大规模多主题多选择数据集
comment: Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR), ACM Conference on Health, Inference, and Learning (CHIL) 2022
comments: Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR), ACM Conference on Health, Inference, and Learning (CHIL) 2022
abstract: This paper introduces MedMCQA, a new large-scale, Multiple-Choice Question Answering (MCQA) dataset designed to address real-world medical entrance exam questions. More than 194k high-quality AIIMS \& NEET PG entrance exam MCQs covering 2.4k healthcare topics and 21 medical subjects are collected with an average token length of 12.77 and high topical diversity. Each sample contains a question, correct answer(s), and other options which requires a deeper language understanding as it tests the 10+ reasoning abilities of a model across a wide range of medical subjects \& topics. A detailed explanation of the solution, along with the above information, is provided in this study.
summary: This paper introduces MedMCQA, a new large-scale, Multiple-Choice Question Answering (MCQA) dataset designed to address real-world medical entrance exam questions. More than 194k high-quality AIIMS \& NEET PG entrance exam MCQs covering 2.4k healthcare topics and 21 medical subjects are collected with an average token length of 12.77 and high topical diversity. Each sample contains a question, correct answer(s), and other options which requires a deeper language understanding as it tests the 10+ reasoning abilities of a model across a wide range of medical subjects \& topics. A detailed explanation of the solution, along with the above information, is provided in this study.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 MedMCQA，这是一个新的大规模多项选择题回答 (MCQA) 数据集，旨在解决现实世界的医学入学考试问题。收集了超过 19.4 万条高质量 AIIMS 和 NEET PG 入学考试 MCQ，涵盖 2.4k 医疗保健主题和 21 个医学科目，平均 token 长度为 12.77，主题多样性高。每个样本都包含一个问题、正确答案和其他选项，这些选项需要更深入的语言理解，因为它测试了模型在广泛的医学科目和主题中的 10 多种推理能力。本研究提供了该解决方案的详细说明以及上述信息。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了MedMCQA，一个包含194k道高质量医学多选题的大型数据集，涵盖21个医学科目和2.4k个医疗主题。
AI.motivation: 现有医学问答数据集在覆盖范围和题型多样性上不足，难以满足医疗AI模型训练需求。
AI.method: 通过收集AIIMS与NEET PG入学考试真题，进行清洗过滤后构建包含问题、选项、答案及解析的标准化数据集。
AI.result: 数据集平均每个问题包含12.77个词元，覆盖21个医学领域，可有效评估模型在10+种推理能力上的表现。
AI.conclusion: MedMCQA为医学领域多选题问答研究提供了高价值基准数据，推动医疗AI模型的深入发展。

title: CaCo: Both Positive and Negative Samples are Directly Learnable via Cooperative-adversarial Contrastive Learning
title_zh: CaCo：正样本和负样本都可以通过合作对抗对比学习直接学习
abstract: As a representative self-supervised method, contrastive learning has achieved great successes in unsupervised training of representations. It trains an encoder by distinguishing positive samples from negative ones given query anchors. These positive and negative samples play critical roles in defining the objective to learn the discriminative encoder, avoiding it from learning trivial features. While existing methods heuristically choose these samples, we present a principled method where both positive and negative samples are directly learnable end-to-end with the encoder. We show that the positive and negative samples can be cooperatively and adversarially learned by minimizing and maximizing the contrastive loss, respectively. This yields cooperative positives and adversarial negatives with respect to the encoder, which are updated to continuously track the learned representation of the query anchors over mini-batches. The proposed method achieves 71.3% and 75.3% in top-1 accuracy respectively over 200 and 800 epochs of pre-training ResNet-50 backbone on ImageNet1K without tricks such as multi-crop or stronger augmentations. With Multi-Crop, it can be further boosted into 75.7%. The source code and pre-trained model are released in https://github.com/maple-research-lab/caco.
summary: As a representative self-supervised method, contrastive learning has achieved great successes in unsupervised training of representations. It trains an encoder by distinguishing positive samples from negative ones given query anchors. These positive and negative samples play critical roles in defining the objective to learn the discriminative encoder, avoiding it from learning trivial features. While existing methods heuristically choose these samples, we present a principled method where both positive and negative samples are directly learnable end-to-end with the encoder. We show that the positive and negative samples can be cooperatively and adversarially learned by minimizing and maximizing the contrastive loss, respectively. This yields cooperative positives and adversarial negatives with respect to the encoder, which are updated to continuously track the learned representation of the query anchors over mini-batches. The proposed method achieves 71.3% and 75.3% in top-1 accuracy respectively over 200 and 800 epochs of pre-training ResNet-50 backbone on ImageNet1K without tricks such as multi-crop or stronger augmentations. With Multi-Crop, it can be further boosted into 75.7%. The source code and pre-trained model are released in https://github.com/maple-research-lab/caco.
abstract_zh: 作为一种代表性的自监督方法，对比学习在表示的无监督训练方面取得了巨大的成功。它通过在给定查询锚点的情况下区分正样本和负样本来训练编码器。这些正样本和负样本在定义学习判别编码器的目标方面发挥着关键作用，避免它学习琐碎的特征。虽然现有方法启发式地选择这些样本，但我们提出了一种原则性方法，其中正样本和负样本都可以通过编码器直接进行端到端学习。我们表明，可以通过分别最小化和最大化对比损失来合作和对抗地学习正样本和负样本。这会产生相对于编码器的合作正面和对抗性负面，编码器会更新以持续跟踪小批量查询锚点的学习表示。该方法在 ImageNet1K 上预训练 ResNet-50 主干网的 200 和 800 个 epoch 中分别实现了 71.3% 和 75.3% 的 top-1 准确率，而无需使用多裁剪或更强的增强等技巧。通过 Multi-Crop，可以进一步提升至 75.7%。源代码和预训练模型发布在https://github.com/maple-research-lab/caco。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CaCo方法，通过合作对抗对比学习直接端到端学习正负样本，提升自监督表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法依赖启发式选择正负样本，难以保证学习到的判别性特征最优，需设计端到端可学习的样本生成机制。
AI.method: 通过最小化对比损失学习合作正样本，最大化对比损失生成对抗负样本，使二者持续跟踪查询锚点的表示变化。
AI.result: 在ImageNet1K上预训练ResNet-50时，200/800 epochs分别达到71.3%/75.3% top-1准确率，使用Multi-Crop后提升至75.7%。
AI.conclusion: 直接学习正负样本的端到端方法能有效提升对比学习性能，无需复杂数据增强策略即可取得竞争性结果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出CaCo方法，通过合作对抗对比学习直接端到端学习正负样本，提升自监督表示学习效果。
ai_content.motivation: 现有对比学习方法依赖启发式选择正负样本，难以保证学习到的判别性特征最优，需设计端到端可学习的样本生成机制。
ai_content.method: 通过最小化对比损失学习合作正样本，最大化对比损失生成对抗负样本，使二者持续跟踪查询锚点的表示变化。
ai_content.result: 在ImageNet1K上预训练ResNet-50时，200/800 epochs分别达到71.3%/75.3% top-1准确率，使用Multi-Crop后提升至75.7%。
ai_content.conclusion: 直接学习正负样本的端到端方法能有效提升对比学习性能，无需复杂数据增强策略即可取得竞争性结果。

search_text: CaCo: Both Positive and Negative Samples are Directly Learnable via Cooperative-adversarial Contrastive Learning CaCo：正样本和负样本都可以通过合作对抗对比学习直接学习 As a representative self-supervised method, contrastive learning has achieved great successes in unsupervised training of representations. It trains an encoder by distinguishing positive samples from negative ones given query anchors. These positive and negative samples play critical roles in defining the objective to learn the discriminative encoder, avoiding it from learning trivial features. While existing methods heuristically choose these samples, we present a principled method where both positive and negative samples are directly learnable end-to-end with the encoder. We show that the positive and negative samples can be cooperatively and adversarially learned by minimizing and maximizing the contrastive loss, respectively. This yields cooperative positives and adversarial negatives with respect to the encoder, which are updated to continuously track the learned representation of the query anchors over mini-batches. The proposed method achieves 71.3% and 75.3% in top-1 accuracy respectively over 200 and 800 epochs of pre-training ResNet-50 backbone on ImageNet1K without tricks such as multi-crop or stronger augmentations. With Multi-Crop, it can be further boosted into 75.7%. The source code and pre-trained model are released in https://github.com/maple-research-lab/caco. 作为一种代表性的自监督方法，对比学习在表示的无监督训练方面取得了巨大的成功。它通过在给定查询锚点的情况下区分正样本和负样本来训练编码器。这些正样本和负样本在定义学习判别编码器的目标方面发挥着关键作用，避免它学习琐碎的特征。虽然现有方法启发式地选择这些样本，但我们提出了一种原则性方法，其中正样本和负样本都可以通过编码器直接进行端到端学习。我们表明，可以通过分别最小化和最大化对比损失来合作和对抗地学习正样本和负样本。这会产生相对于编码器的合作正面和对抗性负面，编码器会更新以持续跟踪小批量查询锚点的学习表示。该方法在 ImageNet1K 上预训练 ResNet-50 主干网的 200 和 800 个 epoch 中分别实现了 71.3% 和 75.3% 的 top-1 准确率，而无需使用多裁剪或更强的增强等技巧。通过 Multi-Crop，可以进一步提升至 75.7%。源代码和预训练模型发布在https://github.com/maple-research-lab/caco。 本文提出CaCo方法，通过合作对抗对比学习直接端到端学习正负样本，提升自监督表示学习效果。 Xiao Wang,Yuhang Huang,Dan Zeng,Guo-Jun Qi cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Thin-Plate Spline Motion Model for Image Animation
title_zh: 用于图像动画的薄板样条运动模型
abstract: Image animation brings life to the static object in the source image according to the driving video. Recent works attempt to perform motion transfer on arbitrary objects through unsupervised methods without using a priori knowledge. However, it remains a significant challenge for current unsupervised methods when there is a large pose gap between the objects in the source and driving images. In this paper, a new end-to-end unsupervised motion transfer framework is proposed to overcome such issue. Firstly, we propose thin-plate spline motion estimation to produce a more flexible optical flow, which warps the feature maps of the source image to the feature domain of the driving image. Secondly, in order to restore the missing regions more realistically, we leverage multi-resolution occlusion masks to achieve more effective feature fusion. Finally, additional auxiliary loss functions are designed to ensure that there is a clear division of labor in the network modules, encouraging the network to generate high-quality images. Our method can animate a variety of objects, including talking faces, human bodies, and pixel animations. Experiments demonstrate that our method performs better on most benchmarks than the state of the art with visible improvements in pose-related metrics.
summary: Image animation brings life to the static object in the source image according to the driving video. Recent works attempt to perform motion transfer on arbitrary objects through unsupervised methods without using a priori knowledge. However, it remains a significant challenge for current unsupervised methods when there is a large pose gap between the objects in the source and driving images. In this paper, a new end-to-end unsupervised motion transfer framework is proposed to overcome such issue. Firstly, we propose thin-plate spline motion estimation to produce a more flexible optical flow, which warps the feature maps of the source image to the feature domain of the driving image. Secondly, in order to restore the missing regions more realistically, we leverage multi-resolution occlusion masks to achieve more effective feature fusion. Finally, additional auxiliary loss functions are designed to ensure that there is a clear division of labor in the network modules, encouraging the network to generate high-quality images. Our method can animate a variety of objects, including talking faces, human bodies, and pixel animations. Experiments demonstrate that our method performs better on most benchmarks than the state of the art with visible improvements in pose-related metrics.
abstract_zh: 图像动画根据驾驶视频为源图像中的静态物体赋予生命。最近的工作尝试在不使用先验知识的情况下通过无监督方法对任意对象执行运动传递。然而，当源图像和驾驶图像中的物体之间存在较大的姿态差距时，这对于当前的无监督方法仍然是一个重大挑战。在本文中，提出了一种新的端到端无监督运动传输框架来克服这个问题。首先，我们提出薄板样条运动估计来产生更灵活的光流，将源图像的特征图扭曲到驾驶图像的特征域。其次，为了更真实地恢复缺失区域，我们利用多分辨率遮挡掩模来实现更有效的特征融合。最后，设计了额外的辅助损失函数，以确保网络模块之间有明确的分工，鼓励网络生成高质量的图像。我们的方法可以为各种对象制作动画，包括说话的面孔、人体和像素动画。实验表明，我们的方法在大多数基准测试中都比最先进的方法表现更好，并且在姿势相关指标方面有明显的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于薄板样条运动模型的图像动画方法，以解决源图像和驱动视频之间存在较大姿态差距时的运动迁移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的无监督方法在处理源图像和驱动图像之间存在较大姿态差距时效果不佳，因此需要一种更灵活的运动迁移框架。
AI.method: 该方法首先引入薄板样条运动估计，生成更灵活的光流以对齐特征图；然后利用多分辨率遮挡掩码进行更有效的特征融合；最后设计辅助损失函数以确保网络模块分工明确。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个基准测试中优于现有方法，并在姿态相关指标上表现出明显改进。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架能够有效解决姿态差距问题，适用于多种对象的图像动画任务，如说话人脸、人体和像素动画。

authors_text: Jinkun Cao,Jiangmiao Pang,Xinshuo Weng,Rawal Khirodkar,Kris Kitani
title: Observation-Centric SORT: Rethinking SORT for Robust Multi-Object Tracking
title_zh: 以观察为中心的 SORT：重新思考用于鲁棒多对象跟踪的 SORT
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. 8 pages + 10 pages of appendix. Renamed OOS as Observation-centric Re-Update (ORU)
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. 8 pages + 10 pages of appendix. Renamed OOS as Observation-centric Re-Update (ORU)
abstract: Kalman filter (KF) based methods for multi-object tracking (MOT) make an assumption that objects move linearly. While this assumption is acceptable for very short periods of occlusion, linear estimates of motion for prolonged time can be highly inaccurate. Moreover, when there is no measurement available to update Kalman filter parameters, the standard convention is to trust the priori state estimations for posteriori update. This leads to the accumulation of errors during a period of occlusion. The error causes significant motion direction variance in practice. In this work, we show that a basic Kalman filter can still obtain state-of-the-art tracking performance if proper care is taken to fix the noise accumulated during occlusion. Instead of relying only on the linear state estimate (i.e., estimation-centric approach), we use object observations (i.e., the measurements by object detector) to compute a virtual trajectory over the occlusion period to fix the error accumulation of filter parameters during the occlusion period. This allows more time steps to correct errors accumulated during occlusion. We name our method Observation-Centric SORT (OC-SORT). It remains Simple, Online, and Real-Time but improves robustness during occlusion and non-linear motion. Given off-the-shelf detections as input, OC-SORT runs at 700+ FPS on a single CPU. It achieves state-of-the-art on multiple datasets, including MOT17, MOT20, KITTI, head tracking, and especially DanceTrack where the object motion is highly non-linear. The code and models are available at \url{https://github.com/noahcao/OC_SORT}.
summary: Kalman filter (KF) based methods for multi-object tracking (MOT) make an assumption that objects move linearly. While this assumption is acceptable for very short periods of occlusion, linear estimates of motion for prolonged time can be highly inaccurate. Moreover, when there is no measurement available to update Kalman filter parameters, the standard convention is to trust the priori state estimations for posteriori update. This leads to the accumulation of errors during a period of occlusion. The error causes significant motion direction variance in practice. In this work, we show that a basic Kalman filter can still obtain state-of-the-art tracking performance if proper care is taken to fix the noise accumulated during occlusion. Instead of relying only on the linear state estimate (i.e., estimation-centric approach), we use object observations (i.e., the measurements by object detector) to compute a virtual trajectory over the occlusion period to fix the error accumulation of filter parameters during the occlusion period. This allows more time steps to correct errors accumulated during occlusion. We name our method Observation-Centric SORT (OC-SORT). It remains Simple, Online, and Real-Time but improves robustness during occlusion and non-linear motion. Given off-the-shelf detections as input, OC-SORT runs at 700+ FPS on a single CPU. It achieves state-of-the-art on multiple datasets, including MOT17, MOT20, KITTI, head tracking, and especially DanceTrack where the object motion is highly non-linear. The code and models are available at \url{https://github.com/noahcao/OC_SORT}.
abstract_zh: 基于卡尔曼滤波器 (KF) 的多目标跟踪 (MOT) 方法假设目标线性移动。虽然这种假设对于非常短的遮挡时间是可以接受的，但长时间运动的线性估计可能非常不准确。此外，当没有可用于更新卡尔曼滤波器参数的测量时，标准惯例是相信先验状态估计以进行后验更新。这导致遮挡期间误差的累积。该误差在实践中会导致显着的运动方向变化。在这项工作中，我们表明，如果采取适当的措施来修复遮挡期间积累的噪声，基本卡尔曼滤波器仍然可以获得最先进的跟踪性能。我们不只依赖于线性状态估计（即以估计为中心的方法），而是使用对象观测（即对象检测器的测量）来计算遮挡期间的虚拟轨迹，以修复遮挡期间滤波器参数的误差累积。这允许更多的时间步骤来纠正遮挡期间积累的错误。我们将我们的方法命名为以观察为中心的排序（OC-SORT）。它仍然是简单、在线和实时的，但提高了遮挡和非线性运动期间的鲁棒性。将现成的检测作为输入，OC-SORT 在单个 CPU 上以 700+ FPS 的速度运行。它在多个数据集上实现了最先进的技术，包括 MOT17、MOT20、KITTI、头部跟踪，尤其是对象运动高度非线性的 DanceTrack。代码和模型可在 \url{https://github.com/noahcao/OC_SORT} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于观测的SORT算法（OC-SORT），通过利用目标检测结果修正遮挡期间的卡尔曼滤波器误差，提升多目标跟踪的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于卡尔曼滤波的多目标跟踪方法在长时间遮挡时因线性运动假设导致误差累积，影响跟踪精度，尤其在非线性运动场景下表现不足。
AI.method: 通过目标检测结果构建遮挡期间的虚拟轨迹，替代线性状态估计，利用观测数据修正滤波器参数误差，实现更长时间步的误差校正。
AI.result: OC-SORT在MOT17、MOT20、KITTI等数据集上达到SOTA性能，尤其在非线性运动的DanceTrack数据集上表现优异，单CPU运行速度超700 FPS。
AI.conclusion: OC-SORT通过观测驱动的误差修正机制，在保持实时性的同时显著提升了遮挡和非线性运动场景下的跟踪鲁棒性。

ai_content_json.result: OC-SORT在MOT17、MOT20、KITTI等数据集上达到SOTA性能，尤其在非线性运动的DanceTrack数据集上表现优异，单CPU运行速度超700 FPS。
ai_content_json.conclusion: OC-SORT通过观测驱动的误差修正机制，在保持实时性的同时显著提升了遮挡和非线性运动场景下的跟踪鲁棒性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于观测的SORT算法（OC-SORT），通过利用目标检测结果修正遮挡期间的卡尔曼滤波器误差，提升多目标跟踪的鲁棒性。
motivation: 传统基于卡尔曼滤波的多目标跟踪方法在长时间遮挡时因线性运动假设导致误差累积，影响跟踪精度，尤其在非线性运动场景下表现不足。
method: 通过目标检测结果构建遮挡期间的虚拟轨迹，替代线性状态估计，利用观测数据修正滤波器参数误差，实现更长时间步的误差校正。
result: OC-SORT在MOT17、MOT20、KITTI等数据集上达到SOTA性能，尤其在非线性运动的DanceTrack数据集上表现优异，单CPU运行速度超700 FPS。
conclusion: OC-SORT通过观测驱动的误差修正机制，在保持实时性的同时显著提升了遮挡和非线性运动场景下的跟踪鲁棒性。
search_text: Observation-Centric SORT: Rethinking SORT for Robust Multi-Object Tracking 以观察为中心的 SORT：重新思考用于鲁棒多对象跟踪的 SORT Kalman filter (KF) based methods for multi-object tracking (MOT) make an assumption that objects move linearly. While this assumption is acceptable for very short periods of occlusion, linear estimates of motion for prolonged time can be highly inaccurate. Moreover, when there is no measurement available to update Kalman filter parameters, the standard convention is to trust the priori state estimations for posteriori update. This leads to the accumulation of errors during a period of occlusion. The error causes significant motion direction variance in practice. In this work, we show that a basic Kalman filter can still obtain state-of-the-art tracking performance if proper care is taken to fix the noise accumulated during occlusion. Instead of relying only on the linear state estimate (i.e., estimation-centric approach), we use object observations (i.e., the measurements by object detector) to compute a virtual trajectory over the occlusion period to fix the error accumulation of filter parameters during the occlusion period. This allows more time steps to correct errors accumulated during occlusion. We name our method Observation-Centric SORT (OC-SORT). It remains Simple, Online, and Real-Time but improves robustness during occlusion and non-linear motion. Given off-the-shelf detections as input, OC-SORT runs at 700+ FPS on a single CPU. It achieves state-of-the-art on multiple datasets, including MOT17, MOT20, KITTI, head tracking, and especially DanceTrack where the object motion is highly non-linear. The code and models are available at \url{https://github.com/noahcao/OC_SORT}. 基于卡尔曼滤波器 (KF) 的多目标跟踪 (MOT) 方法假设目标线性移动。虽然这种假设对于非常短的遮挡时间是可以接受的，但长时间运动的线性估计可能非常不准确。此外，当没有可用于更新卡尔曼滤波器参数的测量时，标准惯例是相信先验状态估计以进行后验更新。这导致遮挡期间误差的累积。该误差在实践中会导致显着的运动方向变化。在这项工作中，我们表明，如果采取适当的措施来修复遮挡期间积累的噪声，基本卡尔曼滤波器仍然可以获得最先进的跟踪性能。我们不只依赖于线性状态估计（即以估计为中心的方法），而是使用对象观测（即对象检测器的测量）来计算遮挡期间的虚拟轨迹，以修复遮挡期间滤波器参数的误差累积。这允许更多的时间步骤来纠正遮挡期间积累的错误。我们将我们的方法命名为以观察为中心的排序（OC-SORT）。它仍然是简单、在线和实时的，但提高了遮挡和非线性运动期间的鲁棒性。将现成的检测作为输入，OC-SORT 在单个 CPU 上以 700+ FPS 的速度运行。它在多个数据集上实现了最先进的技术，包括 MOT17、MOT20、KITTI、头部跟踪，尤其是对象运动高度非线性的 DanceTrack。代码和模型可在 \url{https://github.com/noahcao/OC_SORT} 获取。 本文提出了一种基于观测的SORT算法（OC-SORT），通过利用目标检测结果修正遮挡期间的卡尔曼滤波器误差，提升多目标跟踪的鲁棒性。 Jinkun Cao,Jiangmiao Pang,Xinshuo Weng,Rawal Khirodkar,Kris Kitani cs.CV

title: A Memristive Based Design of a Core Digital Circuit for Elliptic Curve Cryptography
title_zh: 基于忆阻的椭圆曲线密码核心数字电路设计
comment: We are in the process of revising our paper while getting required licenses for some of the figures used in our manuscript
comments: We are in the process of revising our paper while getting required licenses for some of the figures used in our manuscript
abstract: The new emerging non-volatile memory (NVM) devices known as memristors could be the promising candidate for future digital architecture, owing to their nanoscale size and its ability to integrate with the exciting CMOS technology. In this paper, a combination of memristor devices and CMOS transistors are working together to form a hybrid CMOS-memristor circuit for XAX- Module, a core element for the finite field multiplier. The proposed design was implemented using Pt /TaOx/Ta memristor device and simulated in Cadence Virtuoso. The simulation results demonstrate the design functionality. The proposed module appears to be efficient in terms of layout area, delay and power consumption since the design utilizes the hybrid CMOS/memristor gates.

abstract_zh: 新兴的非易失性存储器 (NVM) 器件（称为忆阻器）由于其纳米级尺寸以及与令人兴奋的 CMOS 技术集成的能力，可能成为未来数字架构的有希望的候选者。在本文中，忆阻器器件和 CMOS 晶体管的组合一起工作，形成 XAX-Module 的混合 CMOS 忆阻器电路，XAX-Module 是有限域乘法器的核心元件。所提出的设计是使用 Pt/TaOx/Ta 忆阻器器件实现的，并在 Cadence Virtuoso 中进行仿真。仿真结果展示了设计功能。由于该设计采用了混合 CMOS/忆阻器门，因此所提出的模块在布局面积、延迟和功耗方面似乎都很高效。

AI.tldr: 设计基于忆阻器与CMOS混合电路的椭圆曲线密码学核心模块XAX模块
AI.motivation: 利用忆阻器的小尺寸和CMOS兼容性，提升密码学电路的性能和能效
AI.method: 结合忆阻器与CMOS晶体管设计混合电路，使用Cadence Virtuoso进行仿真验证
AI.result: 仿真验证设计功能，实现更小布局面积、更低延迟和功耗
AI.conclusion: 混合电路设计在密码学应用中展现高效性，验证了忆阻器与CMOS结合的可行性

title: Reinforcement Guided Multi-Task Learning Framework for Low-Resource Stereotype Detection
title_zh: 用于低资源刻板印象检测的强化引导多任务学习框架
comment: Long paper at ACL 2022 main conference
comments: Long paper at ACL 2022 main conference
abstract: As large Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) trained on large amounts of data in an unsupervised manner become more ubiquitous, identifying various types of bias in the text has come into sharp focus. Existing "Stereotype Detection" datasets mainly adopt a diagnostic approach toward large PLMs. Blodgett et. al (2021a) show that there are significant reliability issues with the existing benchmark datasets. Annotating a reliable dataset requires a precise understanding of the subtle nuances of how stereotypes manifest in text. In this paper, we annotate a focused evaluation set for "Stereotype Detection" that addresses those pitfalls by de-constructing various ways in which stereotypes manifest in text. Further, we present a multi-task model that leverages the abundance of data-rich neighboring tasks such as hate speech detection, offensive language detection, misogyny detection, etc., to improve the empirical performance on "Stereotype Detection". We then propose a reinforcement-learning agent that guides the multi-task learning model by learning to identify the training examples from the neighboring tasks that help the target task the most. We show that the proposed models achieve significant empirical gains over existing baselines on all the tasks.
summary: As large Pre-trained Language Models (PLMs) trained on large amounts of data in an unsupervised manner become more ubiquitous, identifying various types of bias in the text has come into sharp focus. Existing "Stereotype Detection" datasets mainly adopt a diagnostic approach toward large PLMs. Blodgett et. al (2021a) show that there are significant reliability issues with the existing benchmark datasets. Annotating a reliable dataset requires a precise understanding of the subtle nuances of how stereotypes manifest in text. In this paper, we annotate a focused evaluation set for "Stereotype Detection" that addresses those pitfalls by de-constructing various ways in which stereotypes manifest in text. Further, we present a multi-task model that leverages the abundance of data-rich neighboring tasks such as hate speech detection, offensive language detection, misogyny detection, etc., to improve the empirical performance on "Stereotype Detection". We then propose a reinforcement-learning agent that guides the multi-task learning model by learning to identify the training examples from the neighboring tasks that help the target task the most. We show that the proposed models achieve significant empirical gains over existing baselines on all the tasks.
abstract_zh: 随着以无监督方式对大量数据进行训练的大型预训练语言模型 (PLM) 变得越来越普遍，识别文本中各种类型的偏见已成为人们关注的焦点。现有的“刻板印象检测”数据集主要采用针对大型PLM的诊断方法。布洛杰特等。 al (2021a) 表明现有基准数据集存在重大可靠性问题。注释可靠的数据集需要精确理解刻板印象如何在文本中体现的细微差别。在本文中，我们注释了“刻板印象检测”的重点评估集，该评估集通过解构刻板印象在文本中表现的各种方式来解决这些陷阱。此外，我们提出了一个多任务模型，利用大量数据丰富的相邻任务，如仇恨言论检测、攻击性语言检测、厌女症检测等，来提高“刻板印象检测”的实证性能。然后，我们提出了一种强化学习代理，它通过学习从邻近任务中识别对目标任务最有帮助的训练示例来指导多任务学习模型。我们表明，所提出的模型在所有任务上都比现有基线取得了显着的经验收益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的多任务学习框架，用于解决低资源环境下的刻板印象检测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有刻板印象检测数据集存在可靠性问题，且标注需精准理解文本中刻板印象的细微表现形式，传统方法难以有效提升模型性能。
AI.method: 构建聚焦评估数据集并设计多任务模型，利用仇恨言论检测等邻近任务的丰富数据，结合强化学习代理筛选对目标任务最有益的训练样本。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提模型在所有任务上均显著优于现有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过多任务学习与强化学习结合，有效解决了低资源刻板印象检测的可靠性与性能瓶颈问题。

title: MFSNet: A Multi Focus Segmentation Network for Skin Lesion Segmentation
title_zh: MFSNet：用于皮肤病变分割的多焦点分割网络
abstract: Segmentation is essential for medical image analysis to identify and localize diseases, monitor morphological changes, and extract discriminative features for further diagnosis. Skin cancer is one of the most common types of cancer globally, and its early diagnosis is pivotal for the complete elimination of malignant tumors from the body. This research develops an Artificial Intelligence (AI) framework for supervised skin lesion segmentation employing the deep learning approach. The proposed framework, called MFSNet (Multi-Focus Segmentation Network), uses differently scaled feature maps for computing the final segmentation mask using raw input RGB images of skin lesions. In doing so, initially, the images are preprocessed to remove unwanted artifacts and noises. The MFSNet employs the Res2Net backbone, a recently proposed convolutional neural network (CNN), for obtaining deep features used in a Parallel Partial Decoder (PPD) module to get a global map of the segmentation mask. In different stages of the network, convolution features and multi-scale maps are used in two boundary attention (BA) modules and two reverse attention (RA) modules to generate the final segmentation output. MFSNet, when evaluated on three publicly available datasets: $PH^2$, ISIC 2017, and HAM10000, outperforms state-of-the-art methods, justifying the reliability of the framework. The relevant codes for the proposed approach are accessible at https://github.com/Rohit-Kundu/MFSNet
summary: Segmentation is essential for medical image analysis to identify and localize diseases, monitor morphological changes, and extract discriminative features for further diagnosis. The proposed framework, called MFSNet (Multi-Focus Segmentation Network), uses differently scaled feature maps for computing the final segmentation mask using raw input RGB images of skin lesions. In doing so, initially, the images are preprocessed to remove unwanted artifacts and noises. The MFSNet employs the Res2Net backbone, a recently proposed convolutional neural network (CNN), for obtaining deep features used in a Parallel Partial Decoder (PPD) module to get a global map of the segmentation mask. In different stages of the network, convolution features and multi-scale maps are used in two boundary attention (BA) modules and two reverse attention (RA) modules to generate the final segmentation output. MFSNet, when evaluated on three publicly available datasets: $PH^2$, ISIC 2017, and HAM10000, outperforms state-of-the-art methods, justifying the reliability of the framework. The relevant codes for the proposed approach are accessible at https://github.com/Rohit-Kundu/MFSNet
abstract_zh: 分割对于医学图像分析至关重要，可以识别和定位疾病、监测形态变化并提取判别特征以进行进一步诊断。皮肤癌是全球最常见的癌症类型之一，其早期诊断对于彻底消除体内恶性肿瘤至关重要。这项研究开发了一种人工智能 (AI) 框架，采用深度学习方法来监督皮肤病变分割。所提出的框架称为 MFSNet（多焦点分割网络），使用不同比例的特征图，使用皮肤病变的原始输入 RGB 图像来计算最终分割掩模。在此过程中，首先对图像进行预处理以去除不需要的伪影和噪声。 MFSNet 采用 Res2Net 主干网（一种最近提出的卷积神经网络 (CNN)），用于获取并行部分解码器 (PPD) 模块中使用的深层特征，从而获得分割掩模的全局图。在网络的不同阶段，两个边界注意（BA）模块和两个反向注意（RA）模块中使用卷积特征和多尺度图来生成最终的分割输出。在三个公开可用的数据集：$PH^2$、ISIC 2017 和 HAM10000 上进行评估时，MFSNet 的性能优于最先进的方法，证明了该框架的可靠性。所提出方法的相关代码可在 https://github.com/Rohit-Kundu/MFSNet 访问

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MFSNet的多焦点分割网络，用于皮肤病变分割，通过深度学习方法提升分割精度。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割对疾病诊断至关重要，皮肤癌的早期检测需要精准分割病变区域，现有方法在复杂病变边界处理上存在不足。
AI.method: 采用Res2Net作为骨干网络提取深层特征，结合平行部分解码器模块与多尺度特征融合，通过边界注意力模块和反向注意力模块优化分割结果。
AI.result: 在PH2、ISIC 2017和HAM10000三个公开数据集上，MFSNet性能优于现有先进方法，验证了其可靠性。
AI.conclusion: MFSNet通过多尺度特征融合和注意力机制有效提升了皮肤病变分割精度，代码已开源供研究使用。

search_text: MFSNet: A Multi Focus Segmentation Network for Skin Lesion Segmentation MFSNet：用于皮肤病变分割的多焦点分割网络 Segmentation is essential for medical image analysis to identify and localize diseases, monitor morphological changes, and extract discriminative features for further diagnosis. Skin cancer is one of the most common types of cancer globally, and its early diagnosis is pivotal for the complete elimination of malignant tumors from the body. This research develops an Artificial Intelligence (AI) framework for supervised skin lesion segmentation employing the deep learning approach. The proposed framework, called MFSNet (Multi-Focus Segmentation Network), uses differently scaled feature maps for computing the final segmentation mask using raw input RGB images of skin lesions. In doing so, initially, the images are preprocessed to remove unwanted artifacts and noises. The MFSNet employs the Res2Net backbone, a recently proposed convolutional neural network (CNN), for obtaining deep features used in a Parallel Partial Decoder (PPD) module to get a global map of the segmentation mask. In different stages of the network, convolution features and multi-scale maps are used in two boundary attention (BA) modules and two reverse attention (RA) modules to generate the final segmentation output. MFSNet, when evaluated on three publicly available datasets: $PH^2$, ISIC 2017, and HAM10000, outperforms state-of-the-art methods, justifying the reliability of the framework. authors_text: Liulei Li,Tianfei Zhou,Wenguan Wang,Jianwu Li,Yi Yang
title: Deep Hierarchical Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 深层次语义分割
abstract: Humans are able to recognize structured relations in observation, allowing us to decompose complex scenes into simpler parts and abstract the visual world in multiple levels. However, such hierarchical reasoning ability of human perception remains largely unexplored in current literature of semantic segmentation. Existing work is often aware of flatten labels and predicts target classes exclusively for each pixel. In this paper, we instead address hierarchical semantic segmentation (HSS), which aims at structured, pixel-wise description of visual observation in terms of a class hierarchy. We devise HSSN, a general HSS framework that tackles two critical issues in this task: i) how to efficiently adapt existing hierarchy-agnostic segmentation networks to the HSS setting, and ii) how to leverage the hierarchy information to regularize HSS network learning. To address i), HSSN directly casts HSS as a pixel-wise multi-label classification task, only bringing minimal architecture change to current segmentation models. To solve ii), HSSN first explores inherent properties of the hierarchy as a training objective, which enforces segmentation predictions to obey the hierarchy structure. Further, with hierarchy-induced margin constraints, HSSN reshapes the pixel embedding space, so as to generate well-structured pixel representations and improve segmentation eventually. We conduct experiments on four semantic segmentation datasets (i.e., Mapillary Vistas 2.0, Cityscapes, LIP, and PASCAL-Person-Part), with different class hierarchies, segmentation network architectures and backbones, showing the generalization and superiority of HSSN.
summary: Humans are able to recognize structured relations in observation, allowing us to decompose complex scenes into simpler parts and abstract the visual world in multiple levels. However, such hierarchical reasoning ability of human perception remains largely unexplored in current literature of semantic segmentation. Existing work is often aware of flatten labels and predicts target classes exclusively for each pixel. In this paper, we instead address hierarchical semantic segmentation (HSS), which aims at structured, pixel-wise description of visual observation in terms of a class hierarchy. We devise HSSN, a general HSS framework that tackles two critical issues in this task: i) how to efficiently adapt existing hierarchy-agnostic segmentation networks to the HSS setting, and ii) how to leverage the hierarchy information to regularize HSS network learning. To address i), HSSN directly casts HSS as a pixel-wise multi-label classification task, only bringing minimal architecture change to current segmentation models. To solve ii), HSSN first explores inherent properties of the hierarchy as a training objective, which enforces segmentation predictions to obey the hierarchy structure. Further, with hierarchy-induced margin constraints, HSSN reshapes the pixel embedding space, so as to generate well-structured pixel representations and improve segmentation eventually. We conduct experiments on four semantic segmentation datasets (i.e., Mapillary Vistas 2.0, Cityscapes, LIP, and PASCAL-Person-Part), with different class hierarchies, segmentation network architectures and backbones, showing the generalization and superiority of HSSN.
abstract_zh: 人类能够在观察中识别结构化关系，使我们能够将复杂的场景分解为更简单的部分，并在多个层面上抽象视觉世界。然而，在当前的语义分割文献中，人类感知的这种分层推理能力在很大程度上仍未得到探索。现有的工作通常知道展平标签并专门为每个像素预测目标类别。在本文中，我们提出了层次语义分割（HSS），其目的是根据类层次结构对视觉观察进行结构化、像素级的描述。我们设计了 HSSN，一个通用的 HSS 框架，它解决了该任务中的两个关键问题：i）如何有效地将现有的与层次结构无关的分割网络适应 HSS 设置，以及 ii）如何利用层次结构信息来规范 HSS 网络学习。为了解决 i)，HSSN 直接将 HSS 作为像素级多标签分类任务，只为当前的分割模型带来最小的架构变化。为了解决 ii)，HSSN 首先探索层次结构的固有属性作为训练目标，强制分割预测遵守层次结构。此外，通过层次结构引起的边距约束，HSSN 重塑像素嵌入空间，从而生成结构良好的像素表示并最终改善分割。我们在四个具有不同类层次结构、分割网络架构和主干的语义分​​割数据集（即 Mapillary Vistas 2.0、Cityscapes、LIP 和 PASCAL-Person-Part）上进行了实验，显示了 HSSN 的通用性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HSSN的通用框架，用于解决分层语义分割（HSS）任务，通过利用类别层次结构信息来改进像素级预测。
AI.motivation: 现有语义分割方法通常忽略人类感知中对场景层次结构的分解能力，仅进行像素级的扁平化分类，导致预测结果缺乏结构化表达。
AI.method: HSSN将HSS建模为像素级多标签分类任务，通过最小化架构修改适配现有分割网络；同时引入层次结构属性作为训练目标，并利用层次诱导的边距约束优化像素嵌入空间。
AI.result: 在Mapillary Vistas 2.0、Cityscapes等四个数据集上验证了HSSN的泛化性和优越性，不同网络架构和层次结构下均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: HSSN通过有效整合层次信息，为分层语义分割任务提供了通用且高效的解决方案，验证了层次结构在提升分割性能中的重要性。

authors_text: Liulei Li,Tianfei Zhou,Wenguan Wang,Lu Yang,Jianwu Li,Yi Yang
title: Locality-Aware Inter-and Intra-Video Reconstruction for Self-Supervised Correspondence Learning
title_zh: 用于自监督对应学习的局部感知视频间和视频内重建
abstract: Our target is to learn visual correspondence from unlabeled videos. We develop LIIR, a locality-aware inter-and intra-video reconstruction framework that fills in three missing pieces, i.e., instance discrimination, location awareness, and spatial compactness, of self-supervised correspondence learning puzzle. First, instead of most existing efforts focusing on intra-video self-supervision only, we exploit cross video affinities as extra negative samples within a unified, inter-and intra-video reconstruction scheme. This enables instance discriminative representation learning by contrasting desired intra-video pixel association against negative inter-video correspondence. Second, we merge position information into correspondence matching, and design a position shifting strategy to remove the side-effect of position encoding during inter-video affinity computation, making our LIIR location-sensitive. Third, to make full use of the spatial continuity nature of video data, we impose a compactness-based constraint on correspondence matching, yielding more sparse and reliable solutions. The learned representation surpasses self-supervised state-of-the-arts on label propagation tasks including objects, semantic parts, and keypoints.
summary: Our target is to learn visual correspondence from unlabeled videos. We develop LIIR, a locality-aware inter-and intra-video reconstruction framework that fills in three missing pieces, i.e., instance discrimination, location awareness, and spatial compactness, of self-supervised correspondence learning puzzle. First, instead of most existing efforts focusing on intra-video self-supervision only, we exploit cross video affinities as extra negative samples within a unified, inter-and intra-video reconstruction scheme. This enables instance discriminative representation learning by contrasting desired intra-video pixel association against negative inter-video correspondence. Second, we merge position information into correspondence matching, and design a position shifting strategy to remove the side-effect of position encoding during inter-video affinity computation, making our LIIR location-sensitive. Third, to make full use of the spatial continuity nature of video data, we impose a compactness-based constraint on correspondence matching, yielding more sparse and reliable solutions. The learned representation surpasses self-supervised state-of-the-arts on label propagation tasks including objects, semantic parts, and keypoints.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是从未标记的视频中学习视觉对应。我们开发了 LIIR，一种局部感知的视频间和视频内重建框架，它填补了自监督对应学习难题的三个缺失部分，即实例辨别、位置感知和空间紧凑性。首先，我们不是仅关注视频内自我监督，而是利用跨视频亲和力作为统一的视频间和视频内重建方案中的额外负样本。这可以通过将所需的视频内像素关联与负的视频间对应进行对比来实现实例判别表示学习。其次，我们将位置信息合并到对应匹配中，并设计了一种位置移动策略来消除视频间亲和力计算过程中位置编码的副作用，使我们的 LIIR 位置敏感。第三，为了充分利用视频数据的空间连续性，我们对对应匹配施加基于紧致性的约束，从而产生更稀疏和可靠的解决方案。学习到的表示在标签传播任务（包括对象、语义部分和关键点）上超越了最先进的自我监督技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部感知的跨视频和视频内重建框架LIIR，用于从无标签视频中学习视觉对应关系。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督对应学习方法仅关注视频内自监督，忽视跨视频负样本的对比学习，且缺乏位置感知和空间紧凑性约束，导致表示能力不足。
AI.method: LIIR通过三方面改进：1) 融合跨视频亲和力作为负样本进行对比学习；2) 引入位置信息并设计位置偏移策略消除位置编码干扰；3) 加入空间紧凑性约束提升匹配稀疏性与可靠性。
AI.result: 在对象、语义部分和关键点等标签传播任务中，LIIR的表示性能超越现有自监督方法。
AI.conclusion: LIIR通过实例区分、位置感知和空间紧凑性三重机制，有效提升了自监督对应学习的性能。

search_text: Locality-Aware Inter-and Intra-Video Reconstruction for Self-Supervised Correspondence Learning 用于自监督对应学习的局部感知视频间和视频内重建 Our target is to learn visual correspondence from unlabeled videos. We develop LIIR, a locality-aware inter-and intra-video reconstruction framework that fills in three missing pieces, i.e., instance discrimination, location awareness, and spatial compactness, of self-supervised correspondence learning puzzle. First, instead of most existing efforts focusing on intra-video self-supervision only, we exploit cross video affinities as extra negative samples within a unified, inter-and intra-video reconstruction scheme. This enables instance discriminative representation learning by contrasting desired intra-video pixel association against negative inter-video correspondence. Second, we merge position information into correspondence matching, and design a position shifting strategy to remove the side-effect of position encoding during inter-video affinity computation, making our LIIR location-sensitive. Third, to make full use of the spatial continuity nature of video data, we impose a compactness-based constraint on correspondence matching, yielding more sparse and reliable solutions. The learned representation surpasses self-supervised state-of-the-arts on label propagation tasks including objects, semantic parts, and keypoints. 我们的目标是从未标记的视频中学习视觉对应。我们开发了 LIIR，一种局部感知的视频间和视频内重建框架，它填补了自监督对应学习难题的三个缺失部分，即实例辨别、位置感知和空间紧凑性。首先，我们不是仅关注视频内自我监督，而是利用跨视频亲和力作为统一的视频间和视频内重建方案中的额外负样本。这可以通过将所需的视频内像素关联与负的视频间对应进行对比来实现实例判别表示学习。其次，我们将位置信息合并到对应匹配中，并设计了一种位置移动策略来消除视频间亲和力计算过程中位置编码的副作用，使我们的 LIIR 位置敏感。第三，为了充分利用视频数据的空间连续性，我们对对应匹配施加基于紧致性的约束，从而产生更稀疏和可靠的解决方案。学习到的表示在标签传播任务（包括对象、语义部分和关键点）上超越了最先进的自我监督技术。 本文提出一种基于局部感知的跨视频和视频内重建框架LIIR，用于从无标签视频中学习视觉对应关系。 Liulei Li,Tianfei Zhou,Wenguan Wang,Lu Yang,Jianwu Li,Yi Yang cs.CV

title: SuperMVS: Non-Uniform Cost Volume For High-Resolution Multi-View Stereo
title_zh: SuperMVS：高分辨率多视图立体的非均匀成本量
abstract: Different from most state-of-the-art~(SOTA) algorithms that use static and uniform sampling methods with a lot of hypothesis planes to get fine depth sampling. In this paper, we propose a free-moving hypothesis plane method for dynamic and non-uniform sampling in a wide depth range to build the cost volume, which not only greatly reduces the number of planes but also finers sampling, for both of reducing computational cost and improving accuracy, named Non-Uniform Cost Volume. We present the SuperMVS network to implement Multi-View Stereo with Non-Uniform Cost Volume. SuperMVS is a coarse-to-fine framework with four cascade stages. It can output higher resolution and accurate depth map. Our SuperMVS achieves the SOTA results with low memory, low runtime, and fewer planes on the DTU datasets and Tanks \& Temples dataset.
summary: Different from most state-of-the-art~(SOTA) algorithms that use static and uniform sampling methods with a lot of hypothesis planes to get fine depth sampling. In this paper, we propose a free-moving hypothesis plane method for dynamic and non-uniform sampling in a wide depth range to build the cost volume, which not only greatly reduces the number of planes but also finers sampling, for both of reducing computational cost and improving accuracy, named Non-Uniform Cost Volume. We present the SuperMVS network to implement Multi-View Stereo with Non-Uniform Cost Volume. SuperMVS is a coarse-to-fine framework with four cascade stages. It can output higher resolution and accurate depth map. Our SuperMVS achieves the SOTA results with low memory, low runtime, and fewer planes on the DTU datasets and Tanks \& Temples dataset.
abstract_zh: 与大多数最先进的（SOTA）算法不同，大多数最先进的算法使用具有大量假设平面的静态均匀采样方法来获得精细的深度采样。在本文中，我们提出了一种在大深度范围内动态非均匀采样的自由移动假设平面方法来构建成本体积，该方法不仅大大减少了平面数量，而且采样更精细，既降低了计算成本又提高了精度，称为非均匀成本体积。我们提出了 SuperMVS 网络来实现具有非均匀成本量的多视图立体。 SuperMVS 是一个从粗到细的框架，具有四个级联阶段。它可以输出更高分辨率和精确的深度图。我们的 SuperMVS 在 DTU 数据集和 Tanks \& Temples 数据集上以低内存、低运行时间和更少的飞机实现了 SOTA 结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非均匀代价体积方法SuperMVS，用于高分辨率多视角立体视觉，通过动态采样减少计算成本并提升精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用静态均匀采样需大量假设平面，导致计算成本高且精度有限，需设计动态非均匀采样方案以优化效率与精度平衡。
AI.method: 提出自由移动假设平面构建非均匀代价体积，结合四阶段级联的SuperMVS网络实现粗到细的深度估计框架。
AI.result: 在DTU和Tanks&Temples数据集上达到SOTA性能，同时降低内存占用、运行时间及所需平面数量。
AI.conclusion: 非均匀代价体积有效兼顾计算效率与精度，为高分辨率多视角立体视觉提供新解决方案。
