authors_text: Wenbin Zhu,Chien-Yi Wang,Kuan-Lun Tseng,Shang-Hong Lai,Baoyuan Wang
title: Local-Adaptive Face Recognition via Graph-based Meta-Clustering and Regularized Adaptation
title_zh: 通过基于图的元聚类和正则化适应进行局部自适应人脸识别
abstract: Due to the rising concern of data privacy, it's reasonable to assume the local client data can't be transferred to a centralized server, nor their associated identity label is provided. To support continuous learning and fill the last-mile quality gap, we introduce a new problem setup called Local-Adaptive Face Recognition (LaFR). Leveraging the environment-specific local data after the deployment of the initial global model, LaFR aims at getting optimal performance by training local-adapted models automatically and un-supervisely, as opposed to fixing their initial global model. We achieve this by a newly proposed embedding cluster model based on Graph Convolution Network (GCN), which is trained via meta-optimization procedure. Compared with previous works, our meta-clustering model can generalize well in unseen local environments. With the pseudo identity labels from the clustering results, we further introduce novel regularization techniques to improve the model adaptation performance. Extensive experiments on racial and internal sensor adaptation demonstrate that our proposed solution is more effective for adapting face recognition models in each specific environment. Meanwhile, we show that LaFR can further improve the global model by a simple federated aggregation over the updated local models.
summary: Due to the rising concern of data privacy, it's reasonable to assume the local client data can't be transferred to a centralized server, nor their associated identity label is provided. To support continuous learning and fill the last-mile quality gap, we introduce a new problem setup called Local-Adaptive Face Recognition (LaFR). Leveraging the environment-specific local data after the deployment of the initial global model, LaFR aims at getting optimal performance by training local-adapted models automatically and un-supervisely, as opposed to fixing their initial global model. We achieve this by a newly proposed embedding cluster model based on Graph Convolution Network (GCN), which is trained via meta-optimization procedure. Compared with previous works, our meta-clustering model can generalize well in unseen local environments. With the pseudo identity labels from the clustering results, we further introduce novel regularization techniques to improve the model adaptation performance. Extensive experiments on racial and internal sensor adaptation demonstrate that our proposed solution is more effective for adapting face recognition models in each specific environment. Meanwhile, we show that LaFR can further improve the global model by a simple federated aggregation over the updated local models.
abstract_zh: 由于对数据隐私的日益关注，可以合理地假设本地客户端数据无法传输到集中式服务器，也无法提供其关联的身份标签。为了支持持续学习并填补最后一英里的质量差距，我们引入了一种称为本地自适应人脸识别（LaFR）的新问题设置。 LaFR 在部署初始全局模型后利用特定于环境的本地数据，旨在通过自动且无监督地训练本地适应模型来获得最佳性能，而不是固定其初始全局模型。我们通过新提出的基于图卷积网络（GCN）的嵌入集群模型来实现这一目标，该模型通过元优化过程进行训练。与以前的工作相比，我们的元聚类模型可以在未见过的本地环境中很好地泛化。利用聚类结果中的伪身份标签，我们进一步引入新颖的正则化技术来提高模型适应性能。关于种族和内部传感器适应的大量实验表明，我们提出的解决方案对于在每个特定环境中适应人脸识别模型更加有效。同时，我们表明 LaFR 可以通过对更新的本地模型进行简单的联合聚合来进一步改进全局模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需传输数据和标签的本地自适应人脸识别方法LaFR，通过图卷积网络和正则化技术实现模型的自动适应。
AI.motivation: 数据隐私问题限制了本地数据上传，传统全局模型难以适应不同环境，需在不依赖标签的情况下实现模型持续学习与本地优化。
AI.method: 基于图卷积网络（GCN）设计元聚类模型，通过伪身份标签和正则化技术提升本地模型适应性，并利用联邦聚合优化全局模型。
AI.result: 在种族和内部传感器适应实验中，LaFR显著优于现有方法，且能通过联邦聚合提升全局模型性能。
AI.conclusion: LaFR有效解决了隐私约束下的本地模型适应问题，为分布式人脸识别提供了新思路。

motivation: 数据隐私问题限制了本地数据上传，传统全局模型难以适应不同环境，需在不依赖标签的情况下实现模型持续学习与本地优化。
method: 基于图卷积网络（GCN）设计元聚类模型，通过伪身份标签和正则化技术提升本地模型适应性，并利用联邦聚合优化全局模型。
result: 在种族和内部传感器适应实验中，LaFR显著优于现有方法，且能通过联邦聚合提升全局模型性能。
conclusion: LaFR有效解决了隐私约束下的本地模型适应问题，为分布式人脸识别提供了新思路。
search_text: Local-Adaptive Face Recognition via Graph-based Meta-Clustering and Regularized Adaptation 通过基于图的元聚类和正则化适应进行局部自适应人脸识别 Due to the rising concern of data privacy, it's reasonable to assume the local client data can't be transferred to a centralized server, nor their associated identity label is provided. To support continuous learning and fill the last-mile quality gap, we introduce a new problem setup called Local-Adaptive Face Recognition (LaFR). Leveraging the environment-specific local data after the deployment of the initial global model, LaFR aims at getting optimal performance by training local-adapted models automatically and un-supervisely, as opposed to fixing their initial global model. We achieve this by a newly proposed embedding cluster model based on Graph Convolution Network (GCN), which is trained via meta-optimization procedure. Compared with previous works, our meta-clustering model can generalize well in unseen local environments. With the pseudo identity labels from the clustering results, we further introduce novel regularization techniques to improve the model adaptation performance. Extensive experiments on racial and internal sensor adaptation demonstrate that our proposed solution is more effective for adapting face recognition models in each specific environment. Meanwhile, we show that LaFR can further improve the global model by a simple federated aggregation over the updated local models. 由于对数据隐私的日益关注，可以合理地假设本地客户端数据无法传输到集中式服务器，也无法提供其关联的身份标签。为了支持持续学习并填补最后一英里的质量差距，我们引入了一种称为本地自适应人脸识别（LaFR）的新问题设置。 LaFR 在部署初始全局模型后利用特定于环境的本地数据，旨在通过自动且无监督地训练本地适应模型来获得最佳性能，而不是固定其初始全局模型。我们通过新提出的基于图卷积网络（GCN）的嵌入集群模型来实现这一目标，该模型通过元优化过程进行训练。与以前的工作相比，我们的元聚类模型可以在未见过的本地环境中很好地泛化。利用聚类结果中的伪身份标签，我们进一步引入新颖的正则化技术来提高模型适应性能。关于种族和内部传感器适应的大量实验表明，我们提出的解决方案对于在每个特定环境中适应人脸识别模型更加有效。同时，我们表明 LaFR 可以通过对更新的本地模型进行简单的联合聚合来进一步改进全局模型。 本文提出了一种无需传输数据和标签的本地自适应人脸识别方法LaFR，通过图卷积网络和正则化技术实现模型的自动适应。 Wenbin Zhu,Chien-Yi Wang,Kuan-Lun Tseng,Shang-Hong Lai,Baoyuan Wang cs.CV

title: PatchNet: A Simple Face Anti-Spoofing Framework via Fine-Grained Patch Recognition
title_zh: PatchNet：通过细粒度补丁识别的简单人脸反欺骗框架
abstract: Face anti-spoofing (FAS) plays a critical role in securing face recognition systems from different presentation attacks. Previous works leverage auxiliary pixel-level supervision and domain generalization approaches to address unseen spoof types. However, the local characteristics of image captures, i.e., capturing devices and presenting materials, are ignored in existing works and we argue that such information is required for networks to discriminate between live and spoof images. In this work, we propose PatchNet which reformulates face anti-spoofing as a fine-grained patch-type recognition problem. To be specific, our framework recognizes the combination of capturing devices and presenting materials based on the patches cropped from non-distorted face images. This reformulation can largely improve the data variation and enforce the network to learn discriminative feature from local capture patterns. In addition, to further improve the generalization ability of the spoof feature, we propose the novel Asymmetric Margin-based Classification Loss and Self-supervised Similarity Loss to regularize the patch embedding space. Our experimental results verify our assumption and show that the model is capable of recognizing unseen spoof types robustly by only looking at local regions. Moreover, the fine-grained and patch-level reformulation of FAS outperforms the existing approaches on intra-dataset, cross-dataset, and domain generalization benchmarks. Furthermore, our PatchNet framework can enable practical applications like Few-Shot Reference-based FAS and facilitate future exploration of spoof-related intrinsic cues.
summary: Face anti-spoofing (FAS) plays a critical role in securing face recognition systems from different presentation attacks. Previous works leverage auxiliary pixel-level supervision and domain generalization approaches to address unseen spoof types. However, the local characteristics of image captures, i.e., capturing devices and presenting materials, are ignored in existing works and we argue that such information is required for networks to discriminate between live and spoof images. In this work, we propose PatchNet which reformulates face anti-spoofing as a fine-grained patch-type recognition problem. To be specific, our framework recognizes the combination of capturing devices and presenting materials based on the patches cropped from non-distorted face images. This reformulation can largely improve the data variation and enforce the network to learn discriminative feature from local capture patterns. In addition, to further improve the generalization ability of the spoof feature, we propose the novel Asymmetric Margin-based Classification Loss and Self-supervised Similarity Loss to regularize the patch embedding space. Our experimental results verify our assumption and show that the model is capable of recognizing unseen spoof types robustly by only looking at local regions. Moreover, the fine-grained and patch-level reformulation of FAS outperforms the existing approaches on intra-dataset, cross-dataset, and domain generalization benchmarks. Furthermore, our PatchNet framework can enable practical applications like Few-Shot Reference-based FAS and facilitate future exploration of spoof-related intrinsic cues.
abstract_zh: 人脸反欺骗 (FAS) 在保护人脸识别系统免受不同演示攻击方面发挥着关键作用。以前的工作利用辅助像素级监督和领域泛化方法来解决看不见的欺骗类型。然而，现有作品中忽略了图像捕获的局部特征，即捕获设备和呈现材料，我们认为网络需要这些信息来区分实时图像和恶搞图像。在这项工作中，我们提出了 PatchNet，它将人脸反欺骗重新表述为细粒度的补丁类型识别问题。具体来说，我们的框架根据从非扭曲面部图像中裁剪出的补丁来识别捕获设备和呈现材料的组合。这种重新表述可以很大程度上改善数据变化并强制网络从本地捕获模式中学习判别性特征。此外，为了进一步提高欺骗特征的泛化能力，我们提出了新颖的基于非对称边缘的分类损失和自监督相似性损失来规范补丁嵌入空间。我们的实验结果验证了我们的假设，并表明该模型能够通过仅查看局部区域来稳健地识别看不见的欺骗类型。此外，FAS 的细粒度和补丁级重构在数据集内、跨数据集和领域泛化基准方面优于现有方法。此外，我们的 PatchNet 框架可以实现基于少样本参考的 FAS 等实际应用，并促进未来对欺骗相关内在线索的探索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PatchNet框架，通过细粒度补丁识别解决人脸反欺骗问题，利用局部特征提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽略图像采集设备和材料的局部特征，导致难以区分活体与欺骗攻击，需引入细粒度信息增强判别能力。
AI.method: 将FAS转化为补丁类型识别，基于非失真人脸裁剪补丁，结合不对称边距分类损失与自监督相似性损失优化特征空间。
AI.result: 实验验证模型可鲁棒识别未知欺骗类型，在跨数据集和领域泛化基准中优于现有方法，并支持少样本参考FAS应用。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度补丁级改革显著提升FAS性能，为未来探索欺骗相关内在线索提供新方向。

title: Blind Source Separation for Mixture of Sinusoids with Near-Linear Computational Complexity
title_zh: 具有近线性计算复杂度的正弦曲线混合的盲源分离
abstract: We propose a multi-tone decomposition algorithm that can find the frequencies, amplitudes and phases of the fundamental sinusoids in a noisy observation sequence. Under independent identically distributed Gaussian noise, our method utilizes a maximum likelihood approach to estimate the relevant tone parameters from the contaminated observations. When estimating $M$ number of sinusoidal sources, our algorithm successively estimates their frequencies and jointly optimizes their amplitudes and phases. Our method can also be implemented as a blind source separator in the absence of the information about $M$. The computational complexity of our algorithm is near-linear, i.e., $\tilde{O}(N)$.
summary: We propose a multi-tone decomposition algorithm that can find the frequencies, amplitudes and phases of the fundamental sinusoids in a noisy observation sequence. Under independent identically distributed Gaussian noise, our method utilizes a maximum likelihood approach to estimate the relevant tone parameters from the contaminated observations. When estimating $M$ number of sinusoidal sources, our algorithm successively estimates their frequencies and jointly optimizes their amplitudes and phases. Our method can also be implemented as a blind source separator in the absence of the information about $M$. The computational complexity of our algorithm is near-linear, i.e., $\tilde{O}(N)$.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种多音分解算法，可以在噪声观测序列中找到基本正弦曲线的频率、幅度和相位。在独立同分布高斯噪声下，我们的方法利用最大似然方法从污染的观测中估计相关的音调参数。当估计 $M$ 个正弦信号源时，我们的算法会连续估计它们的频率并共同优化它们的幅度和相位。在没有 $M$ 信息的情况下，我们的方法也可以实现为盲源分离器。我们算法的计算复杂度接近线性，即$\tilde{O}(N)$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种近线性复杂度的盲源分离算法，用于从噪声观测序列中分解混合正弦波，估计其频率、振幅和相位。
AI.motivation: 在噪声环境下分离多频正弦信号是信号处理中的关键问题，传统方法常需已知源数量或计算复杂度较高，因此需要一种无需先验信息且高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于高斯噪声下的最大似然估计，算法依次估计频率并联合优化振幅和相位，无需预先知道正弦源数量 $M$，且计算复杂度为近线性 $\tilde{O}(N)$。
AI.result: 该方法在噪声环境下能准确估计正弦参数，适用于未知源数量的场景，且计算效率显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法为盲源分离提供了高效且无需先验知识的解决方案，适用于计算资源受限的实际应用场景。

authors_text: Yue Duan,Zhen Zhao,Lei Qi,Lei Wang,Luping Zhou,Yinghuan Shi,Yang Gao
title: MutexMatch: Semi-Supervised Learning with Mutex-Based Consistency Regularization
title_zh: MutexMatch：具有基于互斥体的一致性正则化的半监督学习
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems (TNNLS)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems (TNNLS)
abstract: The core issue in semi-supervised learning (SSL) lies in how to effectively leverage unlabeled data, whereas most existing methods tend to put a great emphasis on the utilization of high-confidence samples yet seldom fully explore the usage of low-confidence samples. In this paper, we aim to utilize low-confidence samples in a novel way with our proposed mutex-based consistency regularization, namely MutexMatch. Specifically, the high-confidence samples are required to exactly predict "what it is" by conventional True-Positive Classifier, while the low-confidence samples are employed to achieve a simpler goal -- to predict with ease "what it is not" by True-Negative Classifier. In this sense, we not only mitigate the pseudo-labeling errors but also make full use of the low-confidence unlabeled data by consistency of dissimilarity degree. MutexMatch achieves superior performance on multiple benchmark datasets, i.e., CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, SVHN, STL-10, mini-ImageNet and Tiny-ImageNet. More importantly, our method further shows superiority when the amount of labeled data is scarce, e.g., 92.23% accuracy with only 20 labeled data on CIFAR-10. Our code and model weights have been released at https://github.com/NJUyued/MutexMatch4SSL.
summary: The core issue in semi-supervised learning (SSL) lies in how to effectively leverage unlabeled data, whereas most existing methods tend to put a great emphasis on the utilization of high-confidence samples yet seldom fully explore the usage of low-confidence samples. In this paper, we aim to utilize low-confidence samples in a novel way with our proposed mutex-based consistency regularization, namely MutexMatch. Specifically, the high-confidence samples are required to exactly predict "what it is" by conventional True-Positive Classifier, while the low-confidence samples are employed to achieve a simpler goal -- to predict with ease "what it is not" by True-Negative Classifier. In this sense, we not only mitigate the pseudo-labeling errors but also make full use of the low-confidence unlabeled data by consistency of dissimilarity degree. MutexMatch achieves superior performance on multiple benchmark datasets, i.e., CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, SVHN, STL-10, mini-ImageNet and Tiny-ImageNet. More importantly, our method further shows superiority when the amount of labeled data is scarce, e.g., 92.23% accuracy with only 20 labeled data on CIFAR-10. Our code and model weights have been released at https://github.com/NJUyued/MutexMatch4SSL.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习（SSL）的核心问题在于如何有效地利用未标记数据，而现有的大多数方法往往非常重视高置信度样本的利用，而很少充分探索低置信度样本的利用。在本文中，我们的目标是通过我们提出的基于互斥体的一致性正则化（即 MutexMatch）以一种新颖的方式利用低置信度样本。具体来说，高置信度样本需要通过传统的真正分类器准确预测“它是什么”，而低置信度样本则用于实现一个更简单的目标——通过真负分类器轻松预测“它不是什么”。从这个意义上说，我们不仅减轻了伪标记错误，而且通过相异度的一致性充分利用了低置信度的未标记数据。 MutexMatch 在多个基准数据集（即 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、SVHN、STL-10、mini-ImageNet 和 Tiny-ImageNet）上实现了卓越的性能。更重要的是，当标记数据量稀缺时，我们的方法进一步显示出优越性，例如，CIFAR-10 上只有 20 个标记数据时，准确率达到 92.23%。我们的代码和模型权重已发布在 https://github.com/NJUyued/MutexMatch4SSL。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于互斥一致性的半监督学习方法MutexMatch，旨在通过有效利用低置信度样本提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督学习方法过度依赖高置信度样本，忽视了低置信度样本的潜在价值，导致伪标签错误和数据利用率不足。
AI.method: 通过True-Positive分类器处理高置信度样本（精确预测类别），同时利用True-Negative分类器让低置信度样本预测'非目标类'，以一致性约束提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10等6个基准数据集上表现优异，尤其在标注数据稀缺时（如CIFAR-10仅20个标注样本）达到92.23%准确率。
AI.conclusion: MutexMatch通过互斥一致性正则化有效挖掘低置信度样本价值，在半监督学习中实现了更高效的数据利用和性能提升。

authors_text: Neng Wang,Yang Bai,Kun Yu,Yong Jiang,Shu-tao Xia,Yan Wang
title: Adaptive Frequency Learning in Two-branch Face Forgery Detection
title_zh: 两分支人脸伪造检测中的自适应频率学习
abstract: Face forgery has attracted increasing attention in recent applications of computer vision. Existing detection techniques using the two-branch framework benefit a lot from a frequency perspective, yet are restricted by their fixed frequency decomposition and transform. In this paper, we propose to Adaptively learn Frequency information in the two-branch Detection framework, dubbed AFD. To be specific, we automatically learn decomposition in the frequency domain by introducing heterogeneity constraints, and propose an attention-based module to adaptively incorporate frequency features into spatial clues. Then we liberate our network from the fixed frequency transforms, and achieve better performance with our data- and task-dependent transform layers. Extensive experiments show that AFD generally outperforms.
summary: Face forgery has attracted increasing attention in recent applications of computer vision. Existing detection techniques using the two-branch framework benefit a lot from a frequency perspective, yet are restricted by their fixed frequency decomposition and transform. In this paper, we propose to Adaptively learn Frequency information in the two-branch Detection framework, dubbed AFD. To be specific, we automatically learn decomposition in the frequency domain by introducing heterogeneity constraints, and propose an attention-based module to adaptively incorporate frequency features into spatial clues. Then we liberate our network from the fixed frequency transforms, and achieve better performance with our data- and task-dependent transform layers. Extensive experiments show that AFD generally outperforms.
abstract_zh: 人脸伪造在计算机视觉的最新应用中引起了越来越多的关注。使用两分支框架的现有检测技术从频率角度来看受益匪浅，但受到其固定频率分解和变换的限制。在本文中，我们提出在称为 AFD 的两分支检测框架中自适应学习频率信息。具体来说，我们通过引入异质性约束来自动学习频域分解，并提出一种基于注意力的模块来自适应地将频率特征合并到空间线索中。然后，我们将网络从固定频率变换中解放出来，并通过数据和任务相关的变换层实现更好的性能。大量实验表明，AFD 总体表现优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应频率学习方法AFD，用于改进双分支人脸伪造检测框架中的频率特征提取。
AI.motivation: 现有双分支检测方法因固定频率分解和变换难以适应不同数据与任务需求，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 引入异质性约束自动学习频率域分解，设计注意力模块融合频率特征与空间线索，并采用数据任务相关的自适应变换层。
AI.result: 在多个实验中AFD方法相较现有技术取得更优检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 自适应频率学习有效提升了双分支框架在人脸伪造检测中的表现，验证了方法的优越性。

authors_text: Yunjie Tian,Lingxi Xie,Jiemin Fang,Mengnan Shi,Junran Peng,Xiaopeng Zhang,Jianbin Jiao,Qi Tian,Qixiang Ye
title: Beyond Masking: Demystifying Token-Based Pre-Training for Vision Transformers
title_zh: 超越掩蔽：揭秘视觉 Transformer 基于代币的预训练
abstract: The past year has witnessed a rapid development of masked image modeling (MIM). MIM is mostly built upon the vision transformers, which suggests that self-supervised visual representations can be done by masking input image parts while requiring the target model to recover the missing contents. MIM has demonstrated promising results on downstream tasks, yet we are interested in whether there exist other effective ways to `learn by recovering missing contents'. In this paper, we investigate this topic by designing five other learning objectives that follow the same procedure as MIM but degrade the input image in different ways. With extensive experiments, we manage to summarize a few design principles for token-based pre-training of vision transformers. In particular, the best practice is obtained by keeping the original image style and enriching spatial masking with spatial misalignment -- this design achieves superior performance over MIM in a series of downstream recognition tasks without extra computational cost. The code is available at https://github.com/sunsmarterjie/beyond_masking.
summary: The past year has witnessed a rapid development of masked image modeling (MIM). MIM is mostly built upon the vision transformers, which suggests that self-supervised visual representations can be done by masking input image parts while requiring the target model to recover the missing contents. MIM has demonstrated promising results on downstream tasks, yet we are interested in whether there exist other effective ways to `learn by recovering missing contents'. In this paper, we investigate this topic by designing five other learning objectives that follow the same procedure as MIM but degrade the input image in different ways. With extensive experiments, we manage to summarize a few design principles for token-based pre-training of vision transformers. In particular, the best practice is obtained by keeping the original image style and enriching spatial masking with spatial misalignment -- this design achieves superior performance over MIM in a series of downstream recognition tasks without extra computational cost. The code is available at https://github.com/sunsmarterjie/beyond_masking.
abstract_zh: 过去的一年见证了掩模图像建模（MIM）的快速发展。 MIM 主要建立在视觉变换器的基础上，这表明可以通过屏蔽输入图像部分同时要求目标模型恢复丢失的内容来完成自监督视觉表示。 MIM 在下游任务上展示了有希望的结果，但我们感兴趣的是是否存在其他有效的方法来“通过恢复丢失的内容来学习”。在本文中，我们通过设计其他五个学习目标来研究这个主题，这些目标遵循与 MIM 相同的过程，但以不同的方式降低输入图像的质量。通过大量的实验，我们总结了一些基于令牌的视觉变压器预训练的设计原则。特别是，最佳实践是通过保持原始图像风格并通过空间错位丰富空间掩蔽来获得的——这种设计在一系列下游识别任务中实现了优于 MIM 的性能，而无需额外的计算成本。该代码可在 https://github.com/sunsmarterjie/beyond_masking 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了超越传统掩码图像建模（MIM）的视觉Transformer预训练方法，提出了多种基于令牌的预训练目标以恢复缺失内容。
AI.motivation: 尽管MIM在视觉任务中表现优异，但作者旨在探索是否存在其他有效的'通过恢复缺失内容学习'的方法，以优化预训练策略。
AI.method: 设计了五种与MIM流程相似但输入退化方式不同的学习目标，通过广泛实验总结出基于令牌的视觉Transformer预训练设计原则。
AI.result: 提出保持原始图像风格并结合空间错位的方案，在多个下游任务中超越MIM且无需额外计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 空间错位增强的预训练方法能有效提升视觉Transformer性能，为令牌级预训练提供了新思路。

result: 提出保持原始图像风格并结合空间错位的方案，在多个下游任务中超越MIM且无需额外计算成本。
conclusion: 空间错位增强的预训练方法能有效提升视觉Transformer性能，为令牌级预训练提供了新思路。
search_text: Beyond Masking: Demystifying Token-Based Pre-Training for Vision Transformers 超越掩蔽：揭秘视觉 Transformer 基于代币的预训练 The past year has witnessed a rapid development of masked image modeling (MIM). MIM is mostly built upon the vision transformers, which suggests that self-supervised visual representations can be done by masking input image parts while requiring the target model to recover the missing contents. MIM has demonstrated promising results on downstream tasks, yet we are interested in whether there exist other effective ways to `learn by recovering missing contents'. In this paper, we investigate this topic by designing five other learning objectives that follow the same procedure as MIM but degrade the input image in different ways. With extensive experiments, we manage to summarize a few design principles for token-based pre-training of vision transformers. In particular, the best practice is obtained by keeping the original image style and enriching spatial masking with spatial misalignment -- this design achieves superior performance over MIM in a series of downstream recognition tasks without extra computational cost. The code is available at https://github.com/sunsmarterjie/beyond_masking. 过去的一年见证了掩模图像建模（MIM）的快速发展。 MIM 主要建立在视觉变换器的基础上，这表明可以通过屏蔽输入图像部分同时要求目标模型恢复丢失的内容来完成自监督视觉表示。 MIM 在下游任务上展示了有希望的结果，但我们感兴趣的是是否存在其他有效的方法来“通过恢复丢失的内容来学习”。在本文中，我们通过设计其他五个学习目标来研究这个主题，这些目标遵循与 MIM 相同的过程，但以不同的方式降低输入图像的质量。通过大量的实验，我们总结了一些基于令牌的视觉变压器预训练的设计原则。特别是，最佳实践是通过保持原始图像风格并通过空间错位丰富空间掩蔽来获得的——这种设计在一系列下游识别任务中实现了优于 MIM 的性能，而无需额外的计算成本。该代码可在 https://github.com/sunsmarterjie/beyond_masking 获取。 本文探讨了超越传统掩码图像建模（MIM）的视觉Transformer预训练方法，提出了多种基于令牌的预训练目标以恢复缺失内容。 Yunjie Tian,Lingxi Xie,Jiemin Fang,Mengnan Shi,Junran Peng,Xiaopeng Zhang,Jianbin Jiao,Qi Tian,Qixiang Ye cs.CV

title: Sublinear Dynamic Interval Scheduling (on one or multiple machines)
title_zh: 次线性动态间隔调度（在一台或多台机器上）
abstract: We revisit the complexity of the classical Interval Scheduling in the dynamic setting. In this problem, the goal is to maintain a set of intervals under insertions and deletions and report the size of the maximum size subset of pairwise disjoint intervals after each update. Nontrivial approximation algorithms are known for this problem, for both the unweighted and weighted versions [Henzinger, Neumann, Wiese, SoCG 2020]. Surprisingly, it was not known if the general exact version admits an exact solution working in sublinear time, that is, without recomputing the answer after each update. Our first contribution is a structure for Dynamic Interval Scheduling with amortized $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n^{1/3})$ update time. Then, building on the ideas used for the case of one machine, we design a sublinear solution for any constant number of machines: we describe a structure for Dynamic Interval Scheduling on $m\geq 2$ machines with amortized $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n^{1 - 1/m})$ update time. We complement the above results by considering Dynamic Weighted Interval Scheduling on one machine, that is maintaining (the weight of) the maximum weight subset of pairwise disjoint intervals. We show an almost linear lower bound (conditioned on the hardness of Minimum Weight $k$-Clique) for the update/query time of any structure for this problem. Hence, in the weighted case one should indeed seek approximate solutions.
summary: We revisit the complexity of the classical Interval Scheduling in the dynamic setting. In this problem, the goal is to maintain a set of intervals under insertions and deletions and report the size of the maximum size subset of pairwise disjoint intervals after each update. Nontrivial approximation algorithms are known for this problem, for both the unweighted and weighted versions [Henzinger, Neumann, Wiese, SoCG 2020]. Surprisingly, it was not known if the general exact version admits an exact solution working in sublinear time, that is, without recomputing the answer after each update. Our first contribution is a structure for Dynamic Interval Scheduling with amortized $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n^{1/3})$ update time. Then, building on the ideas used for the case of one machine, we design a sublinear solution for any constant number of machines: we describe a structure for Dynamic Interval Scheduling on $m\geq 2$ machines with amortized $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n^{1 - 1/m})$ update time. We complement the above results by considering Dynamic Weighted Interval Scheduling on one machine, that is maintaining (the weight of) the maximum weight subset of pairwise disjoint intervals. We show an almost linear lower bound (conditioned on the hardness of Minimum Weight $k$-Clique) for the update/query time of any structure for this problem. Hence, in the weighted case one should indeed seek approximate solutions.
abstract_zh: 我们重新审视动态环境中经典间隔调度的复杂性。在这个问题中，目标是在插入和删除下维护一组间隔，并在每次更新后报告成对不相交间隔的最大子集的大小。对于该问题，非平凡近似算法对于未加权和加权版本都是已知的 [Henzinger, Neumann, Wiese, SoCG 2020]。令人惊讶的是，尚不清楚一般精确版本是否承认在亚线性时间内工作的精确解，即每次更新后无需重新计算答案。我们的第一个贡献是动态间隔调度的结构，具有摊销 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n^{1/3})$ 更新时间。然后，基于用于一台机器的情况的想法，我们为任何恒定数量的机器设计了一个次线性解决方案：我们描述了在 $m\geq 2$ 机器上动态间隔调度的结构，具有摊销 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(n^{1 - 1/m})$ 更新时间。我们通过考虑一台机器上的动态加权间隔调度来补充上述结果，即维护成对不相交间隔的最大权重子集（的权重）。我们针对该问题的任何结构的更新/查询时间显示了几乎线性的下界（以最小权重 $k$-Clique 的硬度为条件）。因此，在加权情况下，我们确实应该寻求近似解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究动态区间调度问题，在单机或多机环境下设计高效维护最大不相交区间子集的算法。
AI.motivation: 传统区间调度问题在动态更新场景下缺乏已知的精确子线性时间解法，需探索更高效的动态维护方法。
AI.method: 设计基于分治与近似策略的数据结构，结合机器数量调整更新时间复杂度，并通过条件复杂性理论分析下界。
AI.result: 提出单机$\	ilde{\\mathcal{O}}(n^{1/3})$、多机$\	ilde{\\mathcal{O}}(n^{1-1/m})$的精确动态算法；证明单机加权版本需近似解法。
AI.conclusion: 无权重动态区间调度可实现子线性精确解，但加权场景需依赖近似算法以突破时间下界限制。

authors_text: Mennatullah Siam,Konstantinos G. Derpanis,Richard P. Wildes
title: Temporal Transductive Inference for Few-Shot Video Object Segmentation
title_zh: 用于少镜头视频对象分割的时间传导推理
abstract: Few-shot video object segmentation (FS-VOS) aims at segmenting video frames using a few labelled examples of classes not seen during initial training. In this paper, we present a simple but effective temporal transductive inference (TTI) approach that leverages temporal consistency in the unlabelled video frames during few-shot inference. Key to our approach is the use of both global and local temporal constraints. The objective of the global constraint is to learn consistent linear classifiers for novel classes across the image sequence, whereas the local constraint enforces the proportion of foreground/background regions in each frame to be coherent across a local temporal window. These constraints act as spatiotemporal regularizers during the transductive inference to increase temporal coherence and reduce overfitting on the few-shot support set. Empirically, our model outperforms state-of-the-art meta-learning approaches in terms of mean intersection over union on YouTube-VIS by 2.8%. In addition, we introduce improved benchmarks that are exhaustively labelled (i.e. all object occurrences are labelled, unlike the currently available), and present a more realistic evaluation paradigm that targets data distribution shift between training and testing sets. Our empirical results and in-depth analysis confirm the added benefits of the proposed spatiotemporal regularizers to improve temporal coherence and overcome certain overfitting scenarios.
summary: Few-shot video object segmentation (FS-VOS) aims at segmenting video frames using a few labelled examples of classes not seen during initial training. In this paper, we present a simple but effective temporal transductive inference (TTI) approach that leverages temporal consistency in the unlabelled video frames during few-shot inference. Key to our approach is the use of both global and local temporal constraints. The objective of the global constraint is to learn consistent linear classifiers for novel classes across the image sequence, whereas the local constraint enforces the proportion of foreground/background regions in each frame to be coherent across a local temporal window. These constraints act as spatiotemporal regularizers during the transductive inference to increase temporal coherence and reduce overfitting on the few-shot support set. Empirically, our model outperforms state-of-the-art meta-learning approaches in terms of mean intersection over union on YouTube-VIS by 2.8%. In addition, we introduce improved benchmarks that are exhaustively labelled (i.e. all object occurrences are labelled, unlike the currently available), and present a more realistic evaluation paradigm that targets data distribution shift between training and testing sets. Our empirical results and in-depth analysis confirm the added benefits of the proposed spatiotemporal regularizers to improve temporal coherence and overcome certain overfitting scenarios.
abstract_zh: 少镜头视频对象分割（FS-VOS）旨在使用初始训练期间未见过的一些带标签的类示例来分割视频帧。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但有效的时间传导推理（TTI）方法，该方法在几次镜头推理期间利用未标记视频帧的时间一致性。我们方法的关键是使用全局和局部时间约束。全局约束的目标是为整个图像序列中的新类学习一致的线性分类器，而局部约束强制每帧中前景/背景区域的比例在局部时间窗口上保持一致。这些约束在转导推理过程中充当时空正则化器，以增加时间一致性并减少少数镜头支持集上的过度拟合。根据经验，我们的模型在 YouTube-VIS 上的并集平均交集方面优于最先进的元学习方法 2.8%。此外，我们引入了详尽标记的改进基准（即所有对象出现都被标记，与当前可用的不同），并提出了一个更现实的评估范例，针对训练集和测试集之间的数据分布变化。我们的实证结果和深入分析证实了所提出的时空正则化器在提高时间一致性和克服某些过度拟合情况方面的额外优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于少样本视频实例分割的时序归纳推理方法，通过利用未标记视频帧中的时序一致性来提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本视频分割方法在时序一致性建模和过拟合问题上存在不足，需通过时序约束提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计时序归纳推理框架，结合全局时序约束（学习跨帧的线性分类器）和局部时序约束（确保局部时间窗口内前景/背景比例一致）作为时空正则化项。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VIS数据集上较最先进方法提升2.8% mIoU，提出更完备的标注基准和更真实的分布偏移评估范式。
AI.conclusion: 时空正则化约束有效提升了时序一致性并缓解过拟合，为少样本视频分割提供了新思路。

In addition, we introduce improved benchmarks that are exhaustively labelled (i.e. all object occurrences are labelled, unlike the currently available), and present a more realistic evaluation paradigm that targets data distribution shift between training and testing sets. Our empirical results and in-depth analysis confirm the added benefits of the proposed spatiotemporal regularizers to improve temporal coherence and overcome certain overfitting scenarios. 少镜头视频对象分割（FS-VOS）旨在使用初始训练期间未见过的一些带标签的类示例来分割视频帧。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单但有效的时间传导推理（TTI）方法，该方法在几次镜头推理期间利用未标记视频帧的时间一致性。我们方法的关键是使用全局和局部时间约束。全局约束的目标是为整个图像序列中的新类学习一致的线性分类器，而局部约束强制每帧中前景/背景区域的比例在局部时间窗口上保持一致。这些约束在转导推理过程中充当时空正则化器，以增加时间一致性并减少少数镜头支持集上的过度拟合。根据经验，我们的模型在 YouTube-VIS 上的并集平均交集方面优于最先进的元学习方法 2.8%。此外，我们引入了详尽标记的改进基准（即所有对象出现都被标记，与当前可用的不同），并提出了一个更现实的评估范例，针对训练集和测试集之间的数据分布变化。我们的实证结果和深入分析证实了所提出的时空正则化器在提高时间一致性和克服某些过度拟合情况方面的额外优势。 本文提出了一种用于少样本视频实例分割的时序归纳推理方法，通过利用未标记视频帧中的时序一致性来提升分割性能。 Mennatullah Siam,Konstantinos G. Derpanis,Richard P. Wildes cs.CV

authors_text: Chengyou Jia,Minnan Luo,Caixia Yan,Xiaojun Chang,Qinghua Zheng
title: CGUA: Context-Guided and Unpaired-Assisted Weakly Supervised Person Search
title_zh: CGUA：上下文引导和不成对辅助的弱监督人员搜索
abstract: Recently, weakly supervised person search is proposed to discard human-annotated identities and train the model with only bounding box annotations. A natural way to solve this problem is to separate it into detection and unsupervised re-identification (Re-ID) steps. However, in this way, two important clues in unconstrained scene images are ignored. On the one hand, existing unsupervised Re-ID models only leverage cropped images from scene images but ignore its rich context information. On the other hand, there are numerous unpaired persons in real-world scene images. Directly dealing with them as independent identities leads to the long-tail effect, while completely discarding them can result in serious information loss. In light of these challenges, we introduce a Context-Guided and Unpaired-Assisted (CGUA) weakly supervised person search framework. Specifically, we propose a novel Context-Guided Cluster (CGC) algorithm to leverage context information in the clustering process and an Unpaired-Assisted Memory (UAM) unit to distinguish unpaired and paired persons by pushing them away. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach can surpass the state-of-the-art weakly supervised methods by a large margin (more than 5% mAP on CUHK-SYSU). Moreover, our method achieves comparable or better performance to the state-of-the-art supervised methods by leveraging more diverse unlabeled data. Codes and models will be released soon.
summary: Recently, weakly supervised person search is proposed to discard human-annotated identities and train the model with only bounding box annotations. A natural way to solve this problem is to separate it into detection and unsupervised re-identification (Re-ID) steps. However, in this way, two important clues in unconstrained scene images are ignored. On the one hand, existing unsupervised Re-ID models only leverage cropped images from scene images but ignore its rich context information. On the other hand, there are numerous unpaired persons in real-world scene images. Directly dealing with them as independent identities leads to the long-tail effect, while completely discarding them can result in serious information loss. In light of these challenges, we introduce a Context-Guided and Unpaired-Assisted (CGUA) weakly supervised person search framework. Specifically, we propose a novel Context-Guided Cluster (CGC) algorithm to leverage context information in the clustering process and an Unpaired-Assisted Memory (UAM) unit to distinguish unpaired and paired persons by pushing them away. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach can surpass the state-of-the-art weakly supervised methods by a large margin (more than 5% mAP on CUHK-SYSU). Moreover, our method achieves comparable or better performance to the state-of-the-art supervised methods by leveraging more diverse unlabeled data. Codes and models will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 最近，提出了弱监督人员搜索来丢弃人类注释的身份并仅使用边界框注释来训练模型。解决这个问题的一种自然方法是将其分为检测和无监督重新识别（Re-ID）步骤。然而，这样，无约束场景图像中的两个重要线索就被忽略了。一方面，现有的无监督 Re-ID 模型仅利用场景图像中的裁剪图像，而忽略了其丰富的上下文信息。另一方面，现实世界的场景图像中存在大量未配对的人。直接将它们作为独立身份处理会导致长尾效应，而完全丢弃它们会导致严重的信息丢失。鉴于这些挑战，我们引入了上下文引导和不配对辅助（CGUA）弱监督人员搜索框架。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的上下文引导聚类（CGC）算法，以在聚类过程中利用上下文信息，以及不成对辅助记忆（UAM）单元，通过将未成对和成对的人推开来区分它们。大量实验表明，所提出的方法可以大幅超越最先进的弱监督方法（在 CUHK-SYSU 上超过 5% mAP）。此外，我们的方法通过利用更多样化的未标记数据，实现了与最先进的监督方法相当或更好的性能。代码和模型即将发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督行人搜索框架CGUA，通过结合上下文信息和未配对数据提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督行人搜索方法在分离检测与无监督Re-ID时忽略了场景图像的上下文信息和大量未配对行人数据，导致长尾效应和信息损失。
AI.method: 设计上下文引导聚类算法（CGC）挖掘场景上下文信息，并引入未配对辅助记忆单元（UAM）区分未配对与配对行人。
AI.result: 在CUHK-SYSU数据集上mAP提升超5%，性能优于现有弱监督方法且接近监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用上下文信息和未配对数据，CGUA框架显著提升了弱监督行人搜索的准确性。

title: Benchmarking Algorithms for Automatic License Plate Recognition
title_zh: 自动车牌识别的基准算法
abstract: We evaluated a lightweight Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) called LPRNet [1] for automatic License Plate Recognition (LPR). We evaluated the algorithm on two datasets, one composed of real license plate images and the other of synthetic license plate images. In addition, we compared its performance against Tesseract [2], an Optical Character Recognition engine. We measured performance based on recognition accuracy and Levenshtein Distance. LPRNet is an end-to-end framework and demonstrated robust performance on both datasets, delivering 90 and 89 percent recognition accuracy on test sets of 1000 real and synthetic license plate images, respectively. Tesseract was not trained using real license plate images and performed well only on the synthetic dataset after pre-processing steps delivering 93 percent recognition accuracy. Finally, Pareto analysis for frequency analysis of misclassified characters allowed us to find in detail which characters were the most conflicting ones according to the percentage of accumulated error. Depending on the region, license plate images possess particular characteristics. Once properly trained, LPRNet can be used to recognize characters from a specific region and dataset. Future work can focus on applying transfer learning to utilize the features learned by LPRNet and fine-tune it given a smaller, newer dataset of license plates.
summary: We evaluated a lightweight Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) called LPRNet [1] for automatic License Plate Recognition (LPR). We evaluated the algorithm on two datasets, one composed of real license plate images and the other of synthetic license plate images. In addition, we compared its performance against Tesseract [2], an Optical Character Recognition engine. We measured performance based on recognition accuracy and Levenshtein Distance. LPRNet is an end-to-end framework and demonstrated robust performance on both datasets, delivering 90 and 89 percent recognition accuracy on test sets of 1000 real and synthetic license plate images, respectively. Tesseract was not trained using real license plate images and performed well only on the synthetic dataset after pre-processing steps delivering 93 percent recognition accuracy. Finally, Pareto analysis for frequency analysis of misclassified characters allowed us to find in detail which characters were the most conflicting ones according to the percentage of accumulated error. Depending on the region, license plate images possess particular characteristics. Once properly trained, LPRNet can be used to recognize characters from a specific region and dataset. Future work can focus on applying transfer learning to utilize the features learned by LPRNet and fine-tune it given a smaller, newer dataset of license plates.
abstract_zh: 我们评估了一种名为 LPRNet [1] 的轻量级卷积神经网络 (CNN)，用于自动车牌识别 (LPR)。我们在两个数据集上评估了该算法，一个由真实车牌图像组成，另一个由合成车牌图像组成。此外，我们还将其性能与光学字符识别引擎 Tesseract [2] 进行了比较。我们根据识别准确度和编辑距离来衡量性能。 LPRNet 是一个端到端框架，在两个数据集上都表现出了强大的性能，在 1000 个真实车牌图像和合成车牌图像的测试集上分别提供了 90% 和 89% 的识别准确率。 Tesseract 没有使用真实的车牌图像进行训练，仅在预处理步骤后的合成数据集上表现良好，识别准确率达到 93%。最后，帕累托分析用于错误分类字符的频率分析，使我们能够根据累积错误的百分比详细找到哪些字符是最冲突的字符。根据地区的不同，车牌图像具有特定的特征。经过适当训练后，LPRNet 可用于识别特定区域和数据集中的字符。未来的工作可以集中于应用迁移学习来利用 LPRNet 学习到的特征，并在给定更小、更新的车牌数据集的情况下对其进行微调。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了轻量级卷积神经网络LPRNet在自动车牌识别任务中的性能，并与Tesseract OCR引擎进行了对比。
AI.motivation: 寻找高效且准确的车牌识别算法以适应实际应用场景的需求。
AI.method: 在真实车牌图像和合成车牌图像数据集上测试LPRNet和Tesseract，通过识别准确率和Levenshtein距离衡量性能，并进行误识别字符的帕累托分析。
AI.result: LPRNet在真实和合成数据集上的识别准确率分别为90%和89%，Tesseract在预处理后对合成数据集达到93%准确率，但对真实数据表现较差。
AI.conclusion: LPRNet在特定区域数据集上表现优异，未来可通过迁移学习优化模型以适应新数据集。

authors_text: Riccardo de Lutio,Alexander Becker,Stefano D'Aronco,Stefania Russo,Jan D. Wegner,Konrad Schindler
title: Learning Graph Regularisation for Guided Super-Resolution
title_zh: 学习引导超分辨率的图正则化
abstract: We introduce a novel formulation for guided super-resolution. Its core is a differentiable optimisation layer that operates on a learned affinity graph. The learned graph potentials make it possible to leverage rich contextual information from the guide image, while the explicit graph optimisation within the architecture guarantees rigorous fidelity of the high-resolution target to the low-resolution source. With the decision to employ the source as a constraint rather than only as an input to the prediction, our method differs from state-of-the-art deep architectures for guided super-resolution, which produce targets that, when downsampled, will only approximately reproduce the source. This is not only theoretically appealing, but also produces crisper, more natural-looking images. A key property of our method is that, although the graph connectivity is restricted to the pixel lattice, the associated edge potentials are learned with a deep feature extractor and can encode rich context information over large receptive fields. By taking advantage of the sparse graph connectivity, it becomes possible to propagate gradients through the optimisation layer and learn the edge potentials from data. We extensively evaluate our method on several datasets, and consistently outperform recent baselines in terms of quantitative reconstruction errors, while also delivering visually sharper outputs. Moreover, we demonstrate that our method generalises particularly well to new datasets not seen during training.
summary: We introduce a novel formulation for guided super-resolution. Its core is a differentiable optimisation layer that operates on a learned affinity graph. The learned graph potentials make it possible to leverage rich contextual information from the guide image, while the explicit graph optimisation within the architecture guarantees rigorous fidelity of the high-resolution target to the low-resolution source. With the decision to employ the source as a constraint rather than only as an input to the prediction, our method differs from state-of-the-art deep architectures for guided super-resolution, which produce targets that, when downsampled, will only approximately reproduce the source. This is not only theoretically appealing, but also produces crisper, more natural-looking images. A key property of our method is that, although the graph connectivity is restricted to the pixel lattice, the associated edge potentials are learned with a deep feature extractor and can encode rich context information over large receptive fields. By taking advantage of the sparse graph connectivity, it becomes possible to propagate gradients through the optimisation layer and learn the edge potentials from data. We extensively evaluate our method on several datasets, and consistently outperform recent baselines in terms of quantitative reconstruction errors, while also delivering visually sharper outputs. Moreover, we demonstrate that our method generalises particularly well to new datasets not seen during training.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种用于引导超分辨率的新颖公式。其核心是一个可微的优化层，在学习的亲和图上运行。学习到的图势使得利用引导图像中丰富的上下文信息成为可能，而架构内的显式图优化保证了高分辨率目标对低分辨率源的严格保真度。由于决定使用源作为约束而不仅仅是作为预测的输入，我们的方法不同于用于引导超分辨率的最先进的深度架构，后者产生的目标在下采样时只会近似再现源。这不仅在理论上很有吸引力，而且还能产生更清晰、更自然的图像。我们方法的一个关键特性是，尽管图连接性仅限于像素点阵，但相关的边缘电位是通过深度特征提取器学习的，并且可以在大感受野上编码丰富的上下文信息。通过利用稀疏图连接性，可以通过优化层传播梯度并从数据中学习边缘电位。我们在多个数据集上广泛评估我们的方法，并在定量重建误差方面始终优于最近的基线，同时还提供视觉上更清晰的输出。此外，我们证明我们的方法特别适合训练期间未见过的新数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于学习图正则化的引导超分辨率方法，通过可微优化层和学习的亲和图实现高质量图像重建。
AI.motivation: 现有引导超分辨率方法在降采样后无法精确还原低分辨率源图像，且缺乏对源图像的严格约束，导致重建结果不够清晰自然。
AI.method: 构建包含可微优化层的神经网络，利用学习的亲和图编码引导图像的上下文信息，通过显式图优化保证高分辨率目标与低分辨率源图像的严格保真度，结合深度特征提取器学习边潜力函数。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上定量重建误差优于最新基线，生成图像更锐利自然，且对未见过的数据集具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过图正则化与显式优化约束的结合，在理论严谨性和视觉效果上均优于现有方法，为引导超分辨率任务提供了新思路。

Its core is a differentiable optimisation layer that operates on a learned affinity graph. The learned graph potentials make it possible to leverage rich contextual information from the guide image, while the explicit graph optimisation within the architecture guarantees rigorous fidelity of the high-resolution target to the low-resolution source. With the decision to employ the source as a constraint rather than only as an input to the prediction, our method differs from state-of-the-art deep architectures for guided super-resolution, which produce targets that, when downsampled, will only approximately reproduce the source. This is not only theoretically appealing, but also produces crisper, more natural-looking images. A key property of our method is that, although the graph connectivity is restricted to the pixel lattice, the associated edge potentials are learned with a deep feature extractor and can encode rich context information over large receptive fields. By taking advantage of the sparse graph connectivity, it becomes possible to propagate gradients through the optimisation layer and learn the edge potentials from data. We extensively evaluate our method on several datasets, and consistently outperform recent baselines in terms of quantitative reconstruction errors, while also delivering visually sharper outputs. authors_text: Ge-Peng Ji,Guobao Xiao,Yu-Cheng Chou,Deng-Ping Fan,Kai Zhao,Geng Chen,Luc Van Gool
title: Video Polyp Segmentation: A Deep Learning Perspective
title_zh: 视频息肉分割：深度学习的视角
comment: Accepted by Machine Intelligence Research 2022 (Project Page: https://github.com/GewelsJI/VPS)
comments: Accepted by Machine Intelligence Research 2022 (Project Page: https://github.com/GewelsJI/VPS)
abstract: We present the first comprehensive video polyp segmentation (VPS) study in the deep learning era. Over the years, developments in VPS are not moving forward with ease due to the lack of large-scale fine-grained segmentation annotations. To address this issue, we first introduce a high-quality frame-by-frame annotated VPS dataset, named SUN-SEG, which contains 158,690 colonoscopy frames from the well-known SUN-database. We provide additional annotations with diverse types, i.e., attribute, object mask, boundary, scribble, and polygon. Second, we design a simple but efficient baseline, dubbed PNS+, consisting of a global encoder, a local encoder, and normalized self-attention (NS) blocks. The global and local encoders receive an anchor frame and multiple successive frames to extract long-term and short-term spatial-temporal representations, which are then progressively updated by two NS blocks. Extensive experiments show that PNS+ achieves the best performance and real-time inference speed (170fps), making it a promising solution for the VPS task. Third, we extensively evaluate 13 representative polyp/object segmentation models on our SUN-SEG dataset and provide attribute-based comparisons. Finally, we discuss several open issues and suggest possible research directions for the VPS community.
summary: We present the first comprehensive video polyp segmentation (VPS) study in the deep learning era. Over the years, developments in VPS are not moving forward with ease due to the lack of large-scale fine-grained segmentation annotations. To address this issue, we first introduce a high-quality frame-by-frame annotated VPS dataset, named SUN-SEG, which contains 158,690 colonoscopy frames from the well-known SUN-database. We provide additional annotations with diverse types, i.e., attribute, object mask, boundary, scribble, and polygon. Second, we design a simple but efficient baseline, dubbed PNS+, consisting of a global encoder, a local encoder, and normalized self-attention (NS) blocks. The global and local encoders receive an anchor frame and multiple successive frames to extract long-term and short-term spatial-temporal representations, which are then progressively updated by two NS blocks. Extensive experiments show that PNS+ achieves the best performance and real-time inference speed (170fps), making it a promising solution for the VPS task. Third, we extensively evaluate 13 representative polyp/object segmentation models on our SUN-SEG dataset and provide attribute-based comparisons. Finally, we discuss several open issues and suggest possible research directions for the VPS community.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了深度学习时代第一个全面的视频息肉分割（VPS）研究。多年来，由于缺乏大规模细粒度的分割标注，VPS的发展进展并不顺利。为了解决这个问题，我们首先引入一个高质量的逐帧注释的 VPS 数据集，名为 SUN-SEG，其中包含来自著名的 SUN 数据库的 158,690 个结肠镜检查帧。我们提供不同类型的附加注释，即属性、对象掩码、边界、涂鸦和多边形。其次，我们设计了一个简单但有效的基线，称为 PNS+，由全局编码器、局部编码器和归一化自注意力（NS）块组成。全局和局部编码器接收锚帧和多个连续帧来提取长期和短期时空表示，然后由两个 NS 块逐步更新。大量实验表明，PNS+ 实现了最佳性能和实时推理速度（170fps），使其成为 VPS 任务的有前途的解决方案。第三，我们在 SUN-SEG 数据集上广泛评估了 13 个具有代表性的息肉/对象分割模型，并提供基于属性的比较。最后，我们讨论了几个悬而未决的问题，并为 VPS 社区提出了可能的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文从深度学习角度研究视频息肉分割（VPS），提出高质量标注数据集SUN-SEG和高效模型PNS+，推动VPS任务发展。
AI.motivation: 视频息肉分割因缺乏大规模精细标注数据而进展缓慢，亟需高质量数据集和高效算法突破技术瓶颈。
AI.method: 构建包含158,690帧结肠镜图像的SUN-SEG数据集，设计融合全局/局部编码器与归一化自注意力机制的PNS+模型，实现时空特征联合建模。
AI.result: PNS+在SUN-SEG上达到最佳分割性能（170fps实时推理速度），并对13种主流分割模型进行属性化对比分析。
AI.conclusion: SUN-SEG数据集和PNS+模型为VPS提供新基准，揭示当前技术局限并指明未来研究方向。

authors_text: Marko Đurasević,Lucija Planinić,Francisco Javier Gil Gala,Domagoj Jakobović
title: Novel ensemble collaboration method for dynamic scheduling problems
title_zh: 解决动态调度问题的新型集成协作方法
abstract: Dynamic scheduling problems are important optimisation problems with many real-world applications. Since in dynamic scheduling not all information is available at the start, such problems are usually solved by dispatching rules (DRs), which create the schedule as the system executes. Recently, DRs have been successfully developed using genetic programming. However, a single DR may not efficiently solve different problem instances. Therefore, much research has focused on using DRs collaboratively by forming ensembles. In this paper, a novel ensemble collaboration method for dynamic scheduling is proposed. In this method, DRs are applied independently at each decision point to create a simulation of the schedule for all currently released jobs. Based on these simulations, it is determined which DR makes the best decision and that decision is applied. The results show that the ensembles easily outperform individual DRs for different ensemble sizes. Moreover, the results suggest that it is relatively easy to create good ensembles from a set of independently evolved DRs.
summary: Dynamic scheduling problems are important optimisation problems with many real-world applications. Since in dynamic scheduling not all information is available at the start, such problems are usually solved by dispatching rules (DRs), which create the schedule as the system executes. Recently, DRs have been successfully developed using genetic programming. However, a single DR may not efficiently solve different problem instances. Therefore, much research has focused on using DRs collaboratively by forming ensembles. In this paper, a novel ensemble collaboration method for dynamic scheduling is proposed. In this method, DRs are applied independently at each decision point to create a simulation of the schedule for all currently released jobs. Based on these simulations, it is determined which DR makes the best decision and that decision is applied. The results show that the ensembles easily outperform individual DRs for different ensemble sizes. Moreover, the results suggest that it is relatively easy to create good ensembles from a set of independently evolved DRs.
abstract_zh: 动态调度问题是许多实际应用中的重要优化问题。由于在动态调度中并非所有信息在开始时都是可用的，因此此类问题通常通过调度规则（DR）来解决，调度规则在系统执行时创建调度。最近，利用遗传编程成功开发了 DR。然而，单个灾难恢复可能无法有效解决不同的问题实例。因此，许多研究都集中在通过形成集成来协作使用 DR。本文提出了一种新的动态调度集成协作方法。在此方法中，DR 在每个决策点独立应用，为所有当前发布的作业创建调度模拟。根据这些模拟，确定哪个 DR 做出最佳决策并应用该决策。结果表明，对于不同的集成规模，集成很容易优于单个 DR。此外，结果表明，从一组独立进化的 DR 中创建良好的集成相对容易。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新型集成协作方法，以提升动态调度问题的解决效率
AI.motivation: 传统调度规则（DRs）在处理不同动态调度问题实例时效率不足，需通过集成方法提升性能
AI.method: 在每个决策点独立应用DRs生成调度模拟，基于模拟结果选择最优DR进行决策
AI.result: 集成方法在不同规模下均优于单一DR，且易于构建有效集成
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升动态调度性能，具有实际应用潜力

ai_content.motivation: 传统调度规则（DRs）在处理不同动态调度问题实例时效率不足，需通过集成方法提升性能

search_text: Novel ensemble collaboration method for dynamic scheduling problems 解决动态调度问题的新型集成协作方法 Dynamic scheduling problems are important optimisation problems with many real-world applications. Since in dynamic scheduling not all information is available at the start, such problems are usually solved by dispatching rules (DRs), which create the schedule as the system executes. Recently, DRs have been successfully developed using genetic programming. However, a single DR may not efficiently solve different problem instances. Therefore, much research has focused on using DRs collaboratively by forming ensembles. In this paper, a novel ensemble collaboration method for dynamic scheduling is proposed. In this method, DRs are applied independently at each decision point to create a simulation of the schedule for all currently released jobs. Based on these simulations, it is determined which DR makes the best decision and that decision is applied. The results show that the ensembles easily outperform individual DRs for different ensemble sizes. Moreover, the results suggest that it is relatively easy to create good ensembles from a set of independently evolved DRs. 动态调度问题是许多实际应用中的重要优化问题。由于在动态调度中并非所有信息在开始时都是可用的，因此此类问题通常通过调度规则（DR）来解决，调度规则在系统执行时创建调度。最近，利用遗传编程成功开发了 DR。然而，单个灾难恢复可能无法有效解决不同的问题实例。因此，许多研究都集中在通过形成集成来协作使用 DR。本文提出了一种新的动态调度集成协作方法。在此方法中，DR 在每个决策点独立应用，为所有当前发布的作业创建调度模拟。根据这些模拟，确定哪个 DR 做出最佳决策并应用该决策。结果表明，对于不同的集成规模，集成很容易优于单个 DR。此外，结果表明，从一组独立进化的 DR 中创建良好的集成相对容易。 提出一种新型集成协作方法，以提升动态调度问题的解决效率 Marko Đurasević,Lucija Planinić,Francisco Javier Gil Gala,Domagoj Jakobović cs.NE

title: UAST: Unicode Aware Sanskrit Transliteration
title_zh: UAST：Unicode 识别梵文音译
comment: 9 pages. Source code and implementation are available on GitHub at https://github.com/dhruvildave/uast.rs , https://github.com/aneri0x4f/uast-cli , and https://github.com/dhruvildave/uast
comments: 9 pages. Source code and implementation are available on GitHub at https://github.com/dhruvildave/uast.rs , https://github.com/aneri0x4f/uast-cli , and https://github.com/dhruvildave/uast
abstract: Devanāgarī is the writing system that is adapted by various languages like Sanskrit. International Alphabet of Sanskrit Transliteration (IAST) is a transliteration scheme for romanisation of Sanskrit language. IAST makes use of diacritics to represent various characters. On a computer, these are represented using Unicode standard which differs from how the Sanskrit language behaves at a very fundamental level. This results in an issue that is encountered while designing typesetting software for devanāgarī and IAST. We hereby discuss the problems and provide a solution that solves the issue of incompatibilities between various transliteration and encoding schemes. The base implementation that should be used is available at https://github.com/dhruvildave/uast.rs. Another implementation that extends UAST to around $10$ scripts is available at https://github.com/aneri0x4f/uast-cli and https://github.com/dhruvildave/uast .
summary: Devanāgarī is the writing system that is adapted by various languages like Sanskrit. International Alphabet of Sanskrit Transliteration (IAST) is a transliteration scheme for romanisation of Sanskrit language. IAST makes use of diacritics to represent various characters. On a computer, these are represented using Unicode standard which differs from how the Sanskrit language behaves at a very fundamental level. This results in an issue that is encountered while designing typesetting software for devanāgarī and IAST. We hereby discuss the problems and provide a solution that solves the issue of incompatibilities between various transliteration and encoding schemes. The base implementation that should be used is available at https://github.com/dhruvildave/uast.rs. Another implementation that extends UAST to around $10$ scripts is available at https://github.com/aneri0x4f/uast-cli and https://github.com/dhruvildave/uast .
abstract_zh: 天城文是由梵文等多种语言改编的书写系统。国际梵语音译字母表 (IAST) 是梵语罗马化的音译方案。 IAST 使用变音符号来表示各种字符。在计算机上，它们使用 Unicode 标准来表示，这在非常基本的层面上与梵文语言的行为方式不同。这导致在为 devanāgarī 和 IAST 设计排版软件时遇到问题。我们在此讨论这些问题并提供解决方案来解决各种音译和编码方案之间的不兼容问题。应使用的基本实现可在 https://github.com/dhruvildave/uast.rs 上找到。另一种将 UAST 扩展至大约 10 美元脚本的实现可在 https://github.com/aneri0x4f/uast-cli 和 https://github.com/dhruvildave/uast 上找到。

AI.tldr: 提出UAST方案解决梵语转写中IAST与Unicode编码的不兼容问题
AI.motivation: 现有IAST转写方案与Unicode编码标准存在根本性差异，导致Devanāgarī排版软件开发困难
AI.method: 开发Unicode感知的转写工具UAST，处理不同编码方案间的字符映射与转换
AI.result: 实现支持基础IAST转写及扩展至10种脚本的兼容性处理工具
AI.conclusion: UAST有效解决编码与转写方案的兼容性问题，为相关软件开发提供可行方案

authors_text: Tomer Volk,Eyal Ben-David,Ohad Amosy,Gal Chechik,Roi Reichart
title: Example-based Hypernetworks for Out-of-Distribution Generalization
title_zh: 用于分布外泛化的基于示例的超网络
comment: First two authors contributed equally to this work. Our code and data are available at: https://github.com/TomerVolk/Hyper-PADA
comments: First two authors contributed equally to this work. Our code and data are available at: https://github.com/TomerVolk/Hyper-PADA
abstract: As Natural Language Processing (NLP) algorithms continually achieve new milestones, out-of-distribution generalization remains a significant challenge. This paper addresses the issue of multi-source adaptation for unfamiliar domains: We leverage labeled data from multiple source domains to generalize to unknown target domains at training. Our innovative framework employs example-based Hypernetwork adaptation: a T5 encoder-decoder initially generates a unique signature from an input example, embedding it within the source domains' semantic space. This signature is subsequently utilized by a Hypernetwork to generate the task classifier's weights. We evaluated our method across two tasks - sentiment classification and natural language inference - in 29 adaptation scenarios, where it outpaced established algorithms. In an advanced version, the signature also enriches the input example's representation. We also compare our finetuned architecture to few-shot GPT-3, demonstrating its effectiveness in essential use cases. To our knowledge, this marks the first application of Hypernetworks to the adaptation for unknown domains.
summary: As Natural Language Processing (NLP) algorithms continually achieve new milestones, out-of-distribution generalization remains a significant challenge. This paper addresses the issue of multi-source adaptation for unfamiliar domains: We leverage labeled data from multiple source domains to generalize to unknown target domains at training. Our innovative framework employs example-based Hypernetwork adaptation: a T5 encoder-decoder initially generates a unique signature from an input example, embedding it within the source domains' semantic space. This signature is subsequently utilized by a Hypernetwork to generate the task classifier's weights. We evaluated our method across two tasks - sentiment classification and natural language inference - in 29 adaptation scenarios, where it outpaced established algorithms. In an advanced version, the signature also enriches the input example's representation. We also compare our finetuned architecture to few-shot GPT-3, demonstrating its effectiveness in essential use cases. To our knowledge, this marks the first application of Hypernetworks to the adaptation for unknown domains.
abstract_zh: 随着自然语言处理（NLP）算法不断实现新的里程碑，分布外泛化仍然是一个重大挑战。本文解决了陌生领域的多源适应问题：我们利用来自多个源领域的标记数据在训练时泛化到未知的目标领域。我们的创新框架采用基于示例的超网络自适应：T5 编码器-解码器最初从输入示例生成唯一签名，将其嵌入源域的语义空间中。随后，超网络利用该签名来生成任务分类器的权重。我们在 29 个适应场景中跨两个任务（情感分类和自然语言推理）评估了我们的方法，其速度超过了现有算法。在高级版本中，签名还丰富了输入示例的表示。我们还将我们的微调架构与少样本 GPT-3 进行比较，证明其在基本用例中的有效性。据我们所知，这标志着超网络首次应用于未知领域的适应。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于实例的超网络框架，通过多源域数据实现对未知目标域的泛化，解决自然语言处理中的分布外适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在应对未知目标域时表现不足，需开发能有效利用多源域标签数据进行适应的新框架。
AI.method: 使用T5编码器-解码器生成输入示例的语义签名，通过超网络动态生成任务分类器权重，并增强输入表示以提升适应效果。
AI.result: 在情感分类和自然语言推理任务的29种适应场景中优于现有算法，且在关键用例中超越少样本GPT-3。
AI.conclusion: 首次将超网络应用于未知域适应，验证了其在分布外泛化中的有效性，为相关研究提供新方向。

title: Diagnosis of COVID-19 Cases from Chest X-ray Images Using Deep Neural Network and LightGBM
title_zh: 使用深度神经网络和 LightGBM 从胸部 X 射线图像诊断 COVID-19 病例
comment: ef:in 2022 International Conference on Machine Vision and Image Processing (MVIP), 2022, pp. 1-7
comments: ef:in 2022 International Conference on Machine Vision and Image Processing (MVIP), 2022, pp. 1-7
abstract: The Coronavirus was detected in Wuhan, China in late 2019 and then led to a pandemic with a rapid worldwide outbreak. The number of infected people has been swiftly increasing since then. Therefore, in this study, an attempt was made to propose a new and efficient method for automatic diagnosis of Corona disease from X-ray images using Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). In the proposed method, the DensNet169 was used to extract the features of the patients' Chest X-Ray (CXR) images. The extracted features were given to a feature selection algorithm (i.e., ANOVA) to select a number of them. Finally, the selected features were classified by LightGBM algorithm. The proposed approach was evaluated on the ChestX-ray8 dataset and reached 99.20% and 94.22% accuracies in the two-class (i.e., COVID-19 and No-findings) and multi-class (i.e., COVID-19, Pneumonia, and No-findings) classification problems, respectively.
summary: The Coronavirus was detected in Wuhan, China in late 2019 and then led to a pandemic with a rapid worldwide outbreak. The number of infected people has been swiftly increasing since then. Therefore, in this study, an attempt was made to propose a new and efficient method for automatic diagnosis of Corona disease from X-ray images using Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). In the proposed method, the DensNet169 was used to extract the features of the patients' Chest X-Ray (CXR) images. The extracted features were given to a feature selection algorithm (i.e., ANOVA) to select a number of them. Finally, the selected features were classified by LightGBM algorithm. The proposed approach was evaluated on the ChestX-ray8 dataset and reached 99.20% and 94.22% accuracies in the two-class (i.e., COVID-19 and No-findings) and multi-class (i.e., COVID-19, Pneumonia, and No-findings) classification problems, respectively.
abstract_zh: 2019年底，新型冠状病毒在中国武汉被发现，随后引发大流行，并在全球范围内迅速爆发。自那时以来，感染人数一直在迅速增加。因此，在本研究中，尝试提出一种使用深度神经网络（DNN）从 X 射线图像自动诊断电晕病的新且有效的方法。在所提出的方法中，使用 DensNet169 提取患者胸部 X 射线（CXR）图像的特征。提取的特征被赋予特征选择算法（即方差分析）以选择其中的一些特征。最后，利用LightGBM算法对所选特征进行分类。所提出的方法在 ChestX-ray8 数据集上进行了评估，在两类（即，COVID-19 和无发现）和多类（即，COVID-19、肺炎和无发现）分类问题上分别达到了 99.20% 和 94.22% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度神经网络（DNN）和LightGBM算法的自动诊断方法，用于从胸部X光图像中检测COVID-19病例。
AI.motivation: 由于新冠病毒感染人数迅速增加，传统诊断方法效率不足，亟需一种高效准确的自动诊断技术以辅助临床决策。
AI.method: 使用DenseNet169模型提取胸部X光图像特征，通过ANOVA算法进行特征选择，最后采用LightGBM分类器进行疾病分类。
AI.result: 在ChestX-ray8数据集上，二分类（COVID-19 vs. 无异常）准确率达99.20%，多分类（COVID-19、肺炎、无异常）准确率为94.22%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度学习特征提取与LightGBM分类结合，在COVID-19诊断中表现出高准确性，可作为临床辅助诊断工具。

search_text: Diagnosis of COVID-19 Cases from Chest X-ray Images Using Deep Neural Network and LightGBM 使用深度神经网络和 LightGBM 从胸部 X 射线图像诊断 COVID-19 病例 The Coronavirus was detected in Wuhan, China in late 2019 and then led to a pandemic with a rapid worldwide outbreak. The number of infected people has been swiftly increasing since then. Therefore, in this study, an attempt was made to propose a new and efficient method for automatic diagnosis of Corona disease from X-ray images using Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). In the proposed method, the DensNet169 was used to extract the features of the patients' Chest X-Ray (CXR) images. The extracted features were given to a feature selection algorithm (i.e., ANOVA) to select a number of them. Finally, the selected features were classified by LightGBM algorithm. The proposed approach was evaluated on the ChestX-ray8 dataset and reached 99.20% and 94.22% accuracies in the two-class (i.e., COVID-19 and No-findings) and multi-class (i.e., COVID-19, Pneumonia, and No-findings) classification problems, respectively. 2019年底，新型冠状病毒在中国武汉被发现，随后引发大流行，并在全球范围内迅速爆发。自那时以来，感染人数一直在迅速增加。因此，在本研究中，尝试提出一种使用深度神经网络（DNN）从 X 射线图像自动诊断电晕病的新且有效的方法。在所提出的方法中，使用 DensNet169 提取患者胸部 X 射线（CXR）图像的特征。提取的特征被赋予特征选择算法（即方差分析）以选择其中的一些特征。最后，利用LightGBM算法对所选特征进行分类。所提出的方法在 ChestX-ray8 数据集上进行了评估，在两类（即，COVID-19 和无发现）和多类（即，COVID-19、肺炎和无发现）分类问题上分别达到了 99.20% 和 94.22% 的准确率。 本文提出一种结合深度神经网络（DNN）和LightGBM算法的自动诊断方法，用于从胸部X光图像中检测COVID-19病例。 Mobina Ezzoddin,Hamid Nasiri,Morteza Dorrigiv eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Discovering Human-Object Interaction Concepts via Self-Compositional Learning
title_zh: 通过自我组合学习发现人机交互概念
abstract: A comprehensive understanding of human-object interaction (HOI) requires detecting not only a small portion of predefined HOI concepts (or categories) but also other reasonable HOI concepts, while current approaches usually fail to explore a huge portion of unknown HOI concepts (i.e., unknown but reasonable combinations of verbs and objects). In this paper, 1) we introduce a novel and challenging task for a comprehensive HOI understanding, which is termed as HOI Concept Discovery; and 2) we devise a self-compositional learning framework (or SCL) for HOI concept discovery. Specifically, we maintain an online updated concept confidence matrix during training: 1) we assign pseudo-labels for all composite HOI instances according to the concept confidence matrix for self-training; and 2) we update the concept confidence matrix using the predictions of all composite HOI instances. Therefore, the proposed method enables the learning on both known and unknown HOI concepts. We perform extensive experiments on several popular HOI datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method for HOI concept discovery, object affordance recognition and HOI detection. For example, the proposed self-compositional learning framework significantly improves the performance of 1) HOI concept discovery by over 10% on HICO-DET and over 3% on V-COCO, respectively; 2) object affordance recognition by over 9% mAP on MS-COCO and HICO-DET; and 3) rare-first and non-rare-first unknown HOI detection relatively over 30% and 20%, respectively. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/zhihou7/HOI-CL.
summary: A comprehensive understanding of human-object interaction (HOI) requires detecting not only a small portion of predefined HOI concepts (or categories) but also other reasonable HOI concepts, while current approaches usually fail to explore a huge portion of unknown HOI concepts (i.e., unknown but reasonable combinations of verbs and objects). In this paper, 1) we introduce a novel and challenging task for a comprehensive HOI understanding, which is termed as HOI Concept Discovery; and 2) we devise a self-compositional learning framework (or SCL) for HOI concept discovery. Specifically, we maintain an online updated concept confidence matrix during training: 1) we assign pseudo-labels for all composite HOI instances according to the concept confidence matrix for self-training; and 2) we update the concept confidence matrix using the predictions of all composite HOI instances. Therefore, the proposed method enables the learning on both known and unknown HOI concepts. We perform extensive experiments on several popular HOI datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method for HOI concept discovery, object affordance recognition and HOI detection. For example, the proposed self-compositional learning framework significantly improves the performance of 1) HOI concept discovery by over 10% on HICO-DET and over 3% on V-COCO, respectively; 2) object affordance recognition by over 9% mAP on MS-COCO and HICO-DET; and 3) rare-first and non-rare-first unknown HOI detection relatively over 30% and 20%, respectively. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/zhihou7/HOI-CL.
abstract_zh: 对人机交互（HOI）的全面理解不仅需要检测一小部分预定义的 HOI 概念（或类别），还需要检测其他合理的 HOI 概念，而当前的方法通常无法探索大部分未知的 HOI 概念（即未知但合理的动词和宾语组合）。在本文中，1）我们介绍了一项新颖且具有挑战性的任务来全面理解 HOI，称为 HOI 概念发现； 2）我们设计了一个用于 HOI 概念发现的自组合学习框架（或 SCL）。具体来说，我们在训练过程中维护一个在线更新的概念置信矩阵：1）我们根据概念置信矩阵为所有复合HOI实例分配伪标签进行自我训练； 2）我们使用所有复合 HOI 实例的预测来更新概念置信度矩阵。因此，所提出的方法能够学习已知和未知的 HOI 概念。我们对几个流行的 HOI 数据集进行了广泛的实验，以证明所提出的方法在 HOI 概念发现、对象可供性识别和 HOI 检测方面的有效性。例如，所提出的自组合学习框架显着提高了1）HOI概念发现的性能，分别在HICO-DET上提高了10％以上，在V-COCO上提高了3％以上； 2) 在 MS-COCO 和 HICO-DET 上物体可供性识别超过 9% mAP； 3) 罕见优先和非罕见优先未知 HOI 检测率分别相对超过 30% 和 20%。代码可在 https://github.com/zhihou7/HOI-CL 公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SCL的自组合学习框架，用于全面理解人类-物体交互（HOI），通过发现预定义和未知的合理HOI概念。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅能检测少量预定义的HOI概念，无法探索大量未知但合理的动词-物体组合，限制了对HOI的全面理解。
AI.method: 通过在线更新的概念置信度矩阵，利用伪标签进行自训练，并迭代更新矩阵，使模型同时学习已知和未知HOI概念。
AI.result: 在HICO-DET和V-COCO等数据集上，HOI概念发现性能提升超10%和3%，物体可操作性识别提升9%，未知HOI检测提升30%和20%。
AI.conclusion: SCL框架有效解决了HOI概念发现的挑战，为全面理解人类-物体交互提供了新方法。

title: Safe Hierarchical Model Predictive Control and Planning for Autonomous Systems
title_zh: 自治系统的安全分层模型预测控制和规划
abstract: Planning and control for autonomous vehicles usually are hierarchical separated. However, increasing performance demands and operating in highly dynamic environments requires an frequent re-evaluation of the planning and tight integration of control and planning to guarantee safety. We propose an integrated hierarchical predictive control and planning approach to tackle this challenge. Planner and controller are based on the repeated solution of moving horizon optimal control problems. The planner can choose different low-layer controller modes for increased flexibility and performance instead of using a single controller with a large safety margin for collision avoidance under uncertainty. Planning is based on simplified system dynamics and safety, yet flexible operation is ensured by constraint tightening based on a mixed-integer linear programming formulation. A cyclic horizon tube-based model predictive controller guarantees constraint satisfaction for different control modes and disturbances. Examples of such modes are a slow-speed movement with high precision and fast-speed movements with large uncertainty bounds. Allowing for different control modes reduces the conservatism, while the hierarchical decomposition of the problem reduces the computational cost and enables real-time implementation. We derive conditions for recursive feasibility to ensure constraint satisfaction and obstacle avoidance to guarantee safety and ensure compatibility between the layers and modes. Simulation results illustrate the efficiency and applicability of the proposed hierarchical strategy.
summary: Planning and control for autonomous vehicles usually are hierarchical separated. However, increasing performance demands and operating in highly dynamic environments requires an frequent re-evaluation of the planning and tight integration of control and planning to guarantee safety. We propose an integrated hierarchical predictive control and planning approach to tackle this challenge. Planner and controller are based on the repeated solution of moving horizon optimal control problems. The planner can choose different low-layer controller modes for increased flexibility and performance instead of using a single controller with a large safety margin for collision avoidance under uncertainty. Planning is based on simplified system dynamics and safety, yet flexible operation is ensured by constraint tightening based on a mixed-integer linear programming formulation. A cyclic horizon tube-based model predictive controller guarantees constraint satisfaction for different control modes and disturbances. Examples of such modes are a slow-speed movement with high precision and fast-speed movements with large uncertainty bounds. Allowing for different control modes reduces the conservatism, while the hierarchical decomposition of the problem reduces the computational cost and enables real-time implementation. We derive conditions for recursive feasibility to ensure constraint satisfaction and obstacle avoidance to guarantee safety and ensure compatibility between the layers and modes. Simulation results illustrate the efficiency and applicability of the proposed hierarchical strategy.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶车辆的规划和控制通常是分层分离的。然而，不断增长的性能要求以及在高度动态的环境中运行需要频繁地重新评估规划以及控制和规划的紧密集成以保证安全。我们提出了一种集成的分层预测控制和规划方法来应对这一挑战。规划器和控制器基于移动视界最优控制问题的重复求解。规划者可以选择不同的低层控制器模式来提高灵活性和性能，而不是使用具有较大安全裕度的单个控制器来避免不确定性下的碰撞。规划基于简化的系统动力学和安全性，而基于混合整数线性规划公式的约束紧缩则确保了灵活的操作。基于循环水平管的模型预测控制器保证了不同控制模式和干扰的约束满足。此类模式的示例是具有高精度的慢速运动和具有较大不确定性界限的快速运动。允许不同的控制模式减少了保守性，而问题的分层分解则减少了计算成本并实现了实时实现。我们推导出递归可行性的条件，以确保约束满足和避障，以保证安全并确保层和模式之间的兼容性。仿真结果说明了所提出的分层策略的有效性和适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种集成式分层模型预测控制与规划方法，以提升自动驾驶系统在动态环境中的安全性和性能。
AI.motivation: 传统分层规划与控制分离的方式难以满足高动态环境下的频繁重规划需求，需通过紧密集成控制与规划以确保安全。
AI.method: 基于移动时域最优控制问题重复求解，结合混合整数线性规划约束收紧与循环时域管状模型预测控制，支持多种控制模式切换。
AI.result: 仿真验证了该分层策略在保证约束满足与避障的同时，降低了保守性并实现实时计算。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分层分解与模式切换，在安全性与计算效率间取得平衡，适用于复杂动态环境的自动驾驶系统。

tldr: 本文提出一种集成式分层模型预测控制与规划方法，以提升自动驾驶系统在动态环境中的安全性和性能。
motivation: 传统分层规划与控制分离的方式难以满足高动态环境下的频繁重规划需求，需通过紧密集成控制与规划以确保安全。
method: 基于移动时域最优控制问题重复求解，结合混合整数线性规划约束收紧与循环时域管状模型预测控制，支持多种控制模式切换。
result: 仿真验证了该分层策略在保证约束满足与避障的同时，降低了保守性并实现实时计算。

search_text: Safe Hierarchical Model Predictive Control and Planning for Autonomous Systems 自治系统的安全分层模型预测控制和规划 Planning and control for autonomous vehicles usually are hierarchical separated. However, increasing performance demands and operating in highly dynamic environments requires an frequent re-evaluation of the planning and tight integration of control and planning to guarantee safety. We propose an integrated hierarchical predictive control and planning approach to tackle this challenge. Planner and controller are based on the repeated solution of moving horizon optimal control problems. The planner can choose different low-layer controller modes for increased flexibility and performance instead of using a single controller with a large safety margin for collision avoidance under uncertainty. Planning is based on simplified system dynamics and safety, yet flexible operation is ensured by constraint tightening based on a mixed-integer linear programming formulation. A cyclic horizon tube-based model predictive controller guarantees constraint satisfaction for different control modes and disturbances. Examples of such modes are a slow-speed movement with high precision and fast-speed movements with large uncertainty bounds. Allowing for different control modes reduces the conservatism, while the hierarchical decomposition of the problem reduces the computational cost and enables real-time implementation. We derive conditions for recursive feasibility to ensure constraint satisfaction and obstacle avoidance to guarantee safety and ensure compatibility between the layers and modes. Simulation results illustrate the efficiency and applicability of the proposed hierarchical strategy. 自动驾驶车辆的规划和控制通常是分层分离的。然而，不断增长的性能要求以及在高度动态的环境中运行需要频繁地重新评估规划以及控制和规划的紧密集成以保证安全。我们提出了一种集成的分层预测控制和规划方法来应对这一挑战。规划器和控制器基于移动视界最优控制问题的重复求解。规划者可以选择不同的低层控制器模式来提高灵活性和性能，而不是使用具有较大安全裕度的单个控制器来避免不确定性下的碰撞。规划基于简化的系统动力学和安全性，而基于混合整数线性规划公式的约束紧缩则确保了灵活的操作。基于循环水平管的模型预测控制器保证了不同控制模式和干扰的约束满足。此类模式的示例是具有高精度的慢速运动和具有较大不确定性界限的快速运动。允许不同的控制模式减少了保守性，而问题的分层分解则减少了计算成本并实现了实时实现。我们推导出递归可行性的条件，以确保约束满足和避障，以保证安全并确保层和模式之间的兼容性。仿真结果说明了所提出的分层策略的有效性和适用性。 本文提出一种集成式分层模型预测控制与规划方法，以提升自动驾驶系统在动态环境中的安全性和性能。 Markus Koegel,Mohamed Ibrahim,Christian Kallies,Rolf Findeisen eess.SY,cs.RO,math.DS

title: bitsa_nlp@LT-EDI-ACL2022: Leveraging Pretrained Language Models for Detecting Homophobia and Transphobia in Social Media Comments
title_zh: bitsa_nlp@LT-EDI-ACL2022：利用预训练语言模型检测社交媒体评论中的恐同症和跨性别者恐惧症
comment: 6 pages, Accepted at LT-EDI workshop ACL 2022. Camera ready version. Addressed all reviewer comments. Added Baseline methods and Ablation study
comments: 6 pages, Accepted at LT-EDI workshop ACL 2022. Camera ready version. Addressed all reviewer comments. Added Baseline methods and Ablation study
abstract: Online social networks are ubiquitous and user-friendly. Nevertheless, it is vital to detect and moderate offensive content to maintain decency and empathy. However, mining social media texts is a complex task since users don't adhere to any fixed patterns. Comments can be written in any combination of languages and many of them may be low-resource. In this paper, we present our system for the LT-EDI shared task on detecting homophobia and transphobia in social media comments. We experiment with a number of monolingual and multilingual transformer based models such as mBERT along with a data augmentation technique for tackling class imbalance. Such pretrained large models have recently shown tremendous success on a variety of benchmark tasks in natural language processing. We observe their performance on a carefully annotated, real life dataset of YouTube comments in English as well as Tamil. Our submission achieved ranks 9, 6 and 3 with a macro-averaged F1-score of 0.42, 0.64 and 0.58 in the English, Tamil and Tamil-English subtasks respectively. The code for the system has been open sourced.
summary: Online social networks are ubiquitous and user-friendly. Nevertheless, it is vital to detect and moderate offensive content to maintain decency and empathy. However, mining social media texts is a complex task since users don't adhere to any fixed patterns. Comments can be written in any combination of languages and many of them may be low-resource. In this paper, we present our system for the LT-EDI shared task on detecting homophobia and transphobia in social media comments. We experiment with a number of monolingual and multilingual transformer based models such as mBERT along with a data augmentation technique for tackling class imbalance. Such pretrained large models have recently shown tremendous success on a variety of benchmark tasks in natural language processing. We observe their performance on a carefully annotated, real life dataset of YouTube comments in English as well as Tamil. Our submission achieved ranks 9, 6 and 3 with a macro-averaged F1-score of 0.42, 0.64 and 0.58 in the English, Tamil and Tamil-English subtasks respectively. The code for the system has been open sourced.
abstract_zh: 在线社交网络无处不在且用户友好。尽管如此，检测和调节攻击性内容以保持正派和同理心至关重要。然而，挖掘社交媒体文本是一项复杂的任务，因为用户不遵循任何固定模式。评论可以用任意语言组合编写，其中许多可能资源不足。在本文中，我们提出了我们的 LT-EDI 共享任务系统，用于检测社交媒体评论中的恐同症和跨性别者恐惧症。我们尝试了许多基于单语言和多语言 Transformer 的模型，例如 mBERT 以及用于解决类别不平衡的数据增强技术。这种预训练的大型模型最近在自然语言处理的各种基准任务上取得了巨大的成功。我们在精心标注的现实生活中的 YouTube 英语和泰米尔语评论数据集上观察他们的表现。我们提交的作品在英语、泰米尔语和泰米尔语-英语子任务中分别获得了第 9、6 和 3 名，宏观平均 F1 分数分别为 0.42、0.64 和 0.58。该系统的代码已开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练语言模型的系统，用于检测社交媒体评论中的恐同和恐跨言论。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体内容复杂多变，存在多语言混合和低资源语言挑战，需有效检测仇恨言论以维护网络环境。
AI.method: 采用多语言Transformer模型（如mBERT）结合数据增强技术，处理类别不平衡问题，并在英语和泰米尔语数据集上进行实验。
AI.result: 系统在LT-EDI任务中，英语、泰米尔语及泰米尔-英语子任务的宏F1分数分别为0.42、0.64、0.58，排名分别为第9、6、3名。
AI.conclusion: 预训练模型在多语言仇恨言论检测中表现有效，但需进一步优化低资源语言的性能，开源代码促进后续研究。
