title: Unsupervised Vision-Language Parsing: Seamlessly Bridging Visual Scene Graphs with Language Structures via Dependency Relationships
title_zh: 无监督视觉语言解析：通过依赖关系将视觉场景图与语言结构无缝桥接
abstract: Understanding realistic visual scene images together with language descriptions is a fundamental task towards generic visual understanding. Previous works have shown compelling comprehensive results by building hierarchical structures for visual scenes (e.g., scene graphs) and natural languages (e.g., dependency trees), individually. However, how to construct a joint vision-language (VL) structure has barely been investigated. More challenging but worthwhile, we introduce a new task that targets on inducing such a joint VL structure in an unsupervised manner. Our goal is to bridge the visual scene graphs and linguistic dependency trees seamlessly. Due to the lack of VL structural data, we start by building a new dataset VLParse. Rather than using labor-intensive labeling from scratch, we propose an automatic alignment procedure to produce coarse structures followed by human refinement to produce high-quality ones. Moreover, we benchmark our dataset by proposing a contrastive learning (CL)-based framework VLGAE, short for Vision-Language Graph Autoencoder. Our model obtains superior performance on two derived tasks, i.e., language grammar induction and VL phrase grounding. Ablations show the effectiveness of both visual cues and dependency relationships on fine-grained VL structure construction.
summary: Understanding realistic visual scene images together with language descriptions is a fundamental task towards generic visual understanding. Previous works have shown compelling comprehensive results by building hierarchical structures for visual scenes (e.g., scene graphs) and natural languages (e.g., dependency trees), individually. However, how to construct a joint vision-language (VL) structure has barely been investigated. More challenging but worthwhile, we introduce a new task that targets on inducing such a joint VL structure in an unsupervised manner. Our goal is to bridge the visual scene graphs and linguistic dependency trees seamlessly. Due to the lack of VL structural data, we start by building a new dataset VLParse. Rather than using labor-intensive labeling from scratch, we propose an automatic alignment procedure to produce coarse structures followed by human refinement to produce high-quality ones. Moreover, we benchmark our dataset by proposing a contrastive learning (CL)-based framework VLGAE, short for Vision-Language Graph Autoencoder. Our model obtains superior performance on two derived tasks, i.e., language grammar induction and VL phrase grounding. Ablations show the effectiveness of both visual cues and dependency relationships on fine-grained VL structure construction.
abstract_zh: 理解真实的视觉场景图像和语言描述是通用视觉理解的一项基本任务。以前的工作通过分别为视觉场景（例如场景图）和自然语言（例如依赖树）构建层次结构，显示了令人信服的综合结果。然而，如何构建联合视觉语言（VL）结构却鲜有研究。更具挑战性但更有价值的是，我们引入了一项新任务，旨在以无监督的方式诱导这种联合 VL 结构。我们的目标是无缝地连接视觉场景图和语言依存树。由于缺乏 VL 结构数据，我们首先构建一个新的数据集 VLParse。我们不是从头开始使用劳动密集型标签，而是提出一种自动对齐程序来产生粗结构，然后进行人工细化以产生高质量的结构。此外，我们通过提出基于对比学习（CL）的框架 VLGAE（视觉语言图自动编码器的缩写）来对我们的数据集进行基准测试。我们的模型在两个派生任务（即语言语法归纳和 VL 短语基础）上获得了优异的性能。消融显示了视觉线索和依赖关系对细粒度 VL 结构构建的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督视觉-语言解析任务，旨在通过依赖关系无缝连接视觉场景图与语言结构。
AI.motivation: 现有研究分别构建了视觉场景图和语言依赖树，但缺乏对两者的联合结构研究，需探索无监督方法实现视觉与语言的深度融合。
AI.method: 构建VLParse数据集（自动对齐+人工优化），并提出基于对比学习的VLGAE模型，通过视觉线索与依赖关系联合建模。
AI.result: 模型在语言语法归纳和视觉-语言短语定位任务中表现优异，消融实验证明视觉线索与依赖关系的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出无监督视觉-语言联合结构建模任务，通过VLParse数据集和VLGAE框架验证方法有效性，为跨模态理解提供新方向。

Moreover, we benchmark our dataset by proposing a contrastive learning (CL)-based framework VLGAE, short for Vision-Language Graph Autoencoder. Our model obtains superior performance on two derived tasks, i.e., language grammar induction and VL phrase grounding. Ablations show the effectiveness of both visual cues and dependency relationships on fine-grained VL structure construction. 理解真实的视觉场景图像和语言描述是通用视觉理解的一项基本任务。以前的工作通过分别为视觉场景（例如场景图）和自然语言（例如依赖树）构建层次结构，显示了令人信服的综合结果。然而，如何构建联合视觉语言（VL）结构却鲜有研究。更具挑战性但更有价值的是，我们引入了一项新任务，旨在以无监督的方式诱导这种联合 VL 结构。我们的目标是无缝地连接视觉场景图和语言依存树。由于缺乏 VL 结构数据，我们首先构建一个新的数据集 VLParse。我们不是从头开始使用劳动密集型标签，而是提出一种自动对齐程序来产生粗结构，然后进行人工细化以产生高质量的结构。此外，我们通过提出基于对比学习（CL）的框架 VLGAE（视觉语言图自动编码器的缩写）来对我们的数据集进行基准测试。我们的模型在两个派生任务（即语言语法归纳和 VL 短语基础）上获得了优异的性能。消融显示了视觉线索和依赖关系对细粒度 VL 结构构建的有效性。 本文提出一种无监督视觉-语言解析任务，旨在通过依赖关系无缝连接视觉场景图与语言结构。 Chao Lou,Wenjuan Han,Yuhuan Lin,Zilong Zheng cs.CV,cs.CL

authors_text: Shaheer U. Saeed,Yunguan Fu,Vasilis Stavrinides,Zachary M. C. Baum,Qianye Yang,Mirabela Rusu,Richard E. Fan,Geoffrey A. Sonn,J. Alison Noble,Dean C. Barratt,Yipeng Hu
title: Image quality assessment for machine learning tasks using meta-reinforcement learning
title_zh: 使用元强化学习对机器学习任务进行图像质量评估
comment: Accepted to Medical Image Analysis; Final published version available at: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.media.2022.102427
comments: Accepted to Medical Image Analysis; Final published version available at: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.media.2022.102427
abstract: In this paper, we consider image quality assessment (IQA) as a measure of how images are amenable with respect to a given downstream task, or task amenability. When the task is performed using machine learning algorithms, such as a neural-network-based task predictor for image classification or segmentation, the performance of the task predictor provides an objective estimate of task amenability. In this work, we use an IQA controller to predict the task amenability which, itself being parameterised by neural networks, can be trained simultaneously with the task predictor. We further develop a meta-reinforcement learning framework to improve the adaptability for both IQA controllers and task predictors, such that they can be fine-tuned efficiently on new datasets or meta-tasks. We demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed task-specific, adaptable IQA approach, using two clinical applications for ultrasound-guided prostate intervention and pneumonia detection on X-ray images.
summary: In this paper, we consider image quality assessment (IQA) as a measure of how images are amenable with respect to a given downstream task, or task amenability. When the task is performed using machine learning algorithms, such as a neural-network-based task predictor for image classification or segmentation, the performance of the task predictor provides an objective estimate of task amenability. In this work, we use an IQA controller to predict the task amenability which, itself being parameterised by neural networks, can be trained simultaneously with the task predictor. We further develop a meta-reinforcement learning framework to improve the adaptability for both IQA controllers and task predictors, such that they can be fine-tuned efficiently on new datasets or meta-tasks. We demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed task-specific, adaptable IQA approach, using two clinical applications for ultrasound-guided prostate intervention and pneumonia detection on X-ray images.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们将图像质量评估（IQA）视为图像如何适应给定下游任务或任务适应性的衡量标准。当使用机器学习算法（例如用于图像分类或分割的基于神经网络的任务预测器）执行任务时，任务预测器的性能提供了任务适应性的客观估计。在这项工作中，我们使用 IQA 控制器来预测任务的适应性，该控制器本身由神经网络参数化，可以与任务预测器同时进行训练。我们进一步开发了一个元强化学习框架，以提高 IQA 控制器和任务预测器的适应性，以便它们可以在新数据集或元任务上有效地进行微调。我们使用超声波引导前列腺干预和 X 射线图像肺炎检测的两个临床应用来证明所提出的针对特定任务、适应性强的 IQA 方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于元强化学习的可适应图像质量评估方法，用于提升机器学习任务的图像适应性，并在临床场景中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统图像质量评估方法未能充分考虑下游任务的适应性需求，而机器学习任务（如分类或分割）对图像质量的敏感性差异较大，需开发任务相关的动态评估框架。
AI.method: 设计神经网络参数化的IQA控制器与任务预测器联合训练，结合元强化学习框架实现控制器与预测器的协同优化，支持在新数据集或元任务上的高效微调。
AI.result: 在超声引导前列腺干预和X光肺炎检测两个临床任务中，验证了该方法能有效提升图像质量评估与任务性能的匹配度。
AI.conclusion: 任务特定的元强化学习驱动的IQA框架可增强模型对不同任务和数据分布的适应性，为临床医学影像分析提供可靠的质量评估方案。

title: Understanding Currencies in Video Games: A Review
title_zh: 了解视频游戏中的货币：回顾
comment: "Published" 1st International Digital Games Research Conference: Trends, Technologies, and Applications (DGRC)
comments: "Published" 1st International Digital Games Research Conference: Trends, Technologies, and Applications (DGRC)
abstract: This paper presents a review of the status of currencies in video games. The business of video games is a multibillion-dollar industry, and its internal economy design is an important field to investigate. In this study, we have distinguished virtual currencies in terms of game mechanics and virtual currency schema, and we have examined 11 games that have used virtual currencies in a significant way and have provided insight for game designers on the internal game economy by showing tangible examples of game mechanics presented in our model
summary: This paper presents a review of the status of currencies in video games. The business of video games is a multibillion-dollar industry, and its internal economy design is an important field to investigate. In this study, we have distinguished virtual currencies in terms of game mechanics and virtual currency schema, and we have examined 11 games that have used virtual currencies in a significant way and have provided insight for game designers on the internal game economy by showing tangible examples of game mechanics presented in our model
abstract_zh: 本文对视频游戏中的货币现状进行了回顾。视频游戏业务是一个价值数十亿美元的产业，其内部经济设计是一个重要的研究领域。在这项研究中，我们从游戏机制和虚拟货币模式方面区分了虚拟货币，并研究了 11 款大量使用虚拟货币的游戏，并通过展示模型中呈现的游戏机制的具体示例，为游戏设计师提供了关于内部游戏经济的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了视频游戏中虚拟货币的现状，通过区分游戏机制与虚拟货币体系，分析了11款典型游戏的案例，为游戏设计师提供内部经济系统设计的参考。
AI.motivation: 随着游戏产业规模扩大，其内部经济设计对用户体验与商业价值至关重要，亟需系统性研究虚拟货币的设计模式与影响。
AI.method: 通过分类虚拟货币类型，选取11款具有代表性的游戏进行案例分析，结合游戏机制模型提炼设计规律。
AI.result: 总结了虚拟货币在游戏中的核心机制分类，揭示了不同设计模式对玩家行为与经济平衡的影响，并提供了具体设计建议。
AI.conclusion: 虚拟货币设计需兼顾游戏性与经济平衡，未来研究可进一步探索跨平台经济系统与玩家心理驱动因素。

authors_text: Juan Leon Alcazar,Moritz Cordes,Chen Zhao,Bernard Ghanem
title: End-to-End Active Speaker Detection
title_zh: 端到端主动发言者检测
abstract: Recent advances in the Active Speaker Detection (ASD) problem build upon a two-stage process: feature extraction and spatio-temporal context aggregation. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end ASD workflow where feature learning and contextual predictions are jointly learned. Our end-to-end trainable network simultaneously learns multi-modal embeddings and aggregates spatio-temporal context. This results in more suitable feature representations and improved performance in the ASD task. We also introduce interleaved graph neural network (iGNN) blocks, which split the message passing according to the main sources of context in the ASD problem. Experiments show that the aggregated features from the iGNN blocks are more suitable for ASD, resulting in state-of-the art performance. Finally, we design a weakly-supervised strategy, which demonstrates that the ASD problem can also be approached by utilizing audiovisual data but relying exclusively on audio annotations. We achieve this by modelling the direct relationship between the audio signal and the possible sound sources (speakers), as well as introducing a contrastive loss. All the resources of this project will be made available at: https://github.com/fuankarion/end-to-end-asd.
summary: Recent advances in the Active Speaker Detection (ASD) problem build upon a two-stage process: feature extraction and spatio-temporal context aggregation. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end ASD workflow where feature learning and contextual predictions are jointly learned. Our end-to-end trainable network simultaneously learns multi-modal embeddings and aggregates spatio-temporal context. This results in more suitable feature representations and improved performance in the ASD task. We also introduce interleaved graph neural network (iGNN) blocks, which split the message passing according to the main sources of context in the ASD problem. Experiments show that the aggregated features from the iGNN blocks are more suitable for ASD, resulting in state-of-the art performance. Finally, we design a weakly-supervised strategy, which demonstrates that the ASD problem can also be approached by utilizing audiovisual data but relying exclusively on audio annotations. We achieve this by modelling the direct relationship between the audio signal and the possible sound sources (speakers), as well as introducing a contrastive loss. All the resources of this project will be made available at: https://github.com/fuankarion/end-to-end-asd.
abstract_zh: 主动说话人检测（ASD）问题的最新进展建立在两个阶段的过程之上：特征提取和时空上下文聚合。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端的 ASD 工作流程，其中特征学习和上下文预测是共同学习的。我们的端到端可训练网络同时学习多模式嵌入并聚合时空上下文。这会产生更合适的特征表示并提高 ASD 任务的性能。我们还引入了交错图神经网络（iGNN）块，它根据 ASD 问题中上下文的主要来源来分割消息传递。实验表明，iGNN 块的聚合特征更适合 ASD，从而实现最先进的性能。最后，我们设计了一种弱监督策略，这表明 ASD 问题也可以通过利用视听数据但完全依赖于音频注释来解决。我们通过对音频信号和可能的声源（扬声器）之间的直接关系进行建模并引入对比损失来实现这一点。该项目的所有资源将在以下网址提供：https://github.com/fuankarion/end-to-end-asd。

AI.tldr: 提出一种端到端的主动说话人检测方法，结合多模态信息和时空上下文聚合，并引入弱监督策略以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统ASD方法分为特征提取和上下文聚合两阶段，难以有效结合，限制性能。需通过端到端学习提升特征表示，并探索弱监督策略以减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 设计端到端网络，联合学习多模态嵌入与时空上下文，引入iGNN模块分割消息传递；提出弱监督策略，利用音频注释建模音频-声源关系并采用对比损失。
AI.result: iGNN模块聚合的特征显著提升ASD性能，达到最先进水平；弱监督策略验证了仅用音频注释即可有效解决ASD问题。
AI.conclusion: 端到端联合学习与iGNN模块有效提升ASD性能，弱监督策略降低标注依赖，未来可探索更优模型结构与损失函数。

search_text: End-to-End Active Speaker Detection 端到端主动发言者检测 Recent advances in the Active Speaker Detection (ASD) problem build upon a two-stage process: feature extraction and spatio-temporal context aggregation. In this paper, we propose an end-to-end ASD workflow where feature learning and contextual predictions are jointly learned. Our end-to-end trainable network simultaneously learns multi-modal embeddings and aggregates spatio-temporal context. This results in more suitable feature representations and improved performance in the ASD task. We also introduce interleaved graph neural network (iGNN) blocks, which split the message passing according to the main sources of context in the ASD problem. Experiments show that the aggregated features from the iGNN blocks are more suitable for ASD, resulting in state-of-the art performance. Finally, we design a weakly-supervised strategy, which demonstrates that the ASD problem can also be approached by utilizing audiovisual data but relying exclusively on audio annotations. We achieve this by modelling the direct relationship between the audio signal and the possible sound sources (speakers), as well as introducing a contrastive loss. All the resources of this project will be made available at: https://github.com/fuankarion/end-to-end-asd. 主动说话人检测（ASD）问题的最新进展建立在两个阶段的过程之上：特征提取和时空上下文聚合。在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端的 ASD 工作流程，其中特征学习和上下文预测是共同学习的。我们的端到端可训练网络同时学习多模式嵌入并聚合时空上下文。这会产生更合适的特征表示并提高 ASD 任务的性能。我们还引入了交错图神经网络（iGNN）块，它根据 ASD 问题中上下文的主要来源来分割消息传递。实验表明，iGNN 块的聚合特征更适合 ASD，从而实现最先进的性能。最后，我们设计了一种弱监督策略，这表明 ASD 问题也可以通过利用视听数据但完全依赖于音频注释来解决。我们通过对音频信号和可能的声源（扬声器）之间的直接关系进行建模并引入对比损失来实现这一点。该项目的所有资源将在以下网址提供：https://github.com/fuankarion/end-to-end-asd。 提出一种端到端的主动说话人检测方法，结合多模态信息和时空上下文聚合，并引入弱监督策略以提升性能。 Juan Leon Alcazar,Moritz Cordes,Chen Zhao,Bernard Ghanem cs.CV,cs.MM,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yunhua Zhang,Hazel Doughty,Ling Shao,Cees G. M. Snoek
title: Audio-Adaptive Activity Recognition Across Video Domains
title_zh: 跨视频域的音频自适应活动识别
abstract: This paper strives for activity recognition under domain shift, for example caused by change of scenery or camera viewpoint. The leading approaches reduce the shift in activity appearance by adversarial training and self-supervised learning. Different from these vision-focused works we leverage activity sounds for domain adaptation as they have less variance across domains and can reliably indicate which activities are not happening. We propose an audio-adaptive encoder and associated learning methods that discriminatively adjust the visual feature representation as well as addressing shifts in the semantic distribution. To further eliminate domain-specific features and include domain-invariant activity sounds for recognition, an audio-infused recognizer is proposed, which effectively models the cross-modal interaction across domains. We also introduce the new task of actor shift, with a corresponding audio-visual dataset, to challenge our method with situations where the activity appearance changes dramatically. Experiments on this dataset, EPIC-Kitchens and CharadesEgo show the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: This paper strives for activity recognition under domain shift, for example caused by change of scenery or camera viewpoint. The leading approaches reduce the shift in activity appearance by adversarial training and self-supervised learning. Different from these vision-focused works we leverage activity sounds for domain adaptation as they have less variance across domains and can reliably indicate which activities are not happening. We propose an audio-adaptive encoder and associated learning methods that discriminatively adjust the visual feature representation as well as addressing shifts in the semantic distribution. To further eliminate domain-specific features and include domain-invariant activity sounds for recognition, an audio-infused recognizer is proposed, which effectively models the cross-modal interaction across domains. We also introduce the new task of actor shift, with a corresponding audio-visual dataset, to challenge our method with situations where the activity appearance changes dramatically. Experiments on this dataset, EPIC-Kitchens and CharadesEgo show the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 本文致力于域转移下的活动识别，例如由风景或相机视角变化引起的活动识别。主要方法通过对抗性训练和自我监督学习来减少活动外观的变化。与这些以视觉为中心的作品不同，我们利用活动声音进行领域适应，因为它们跨领域的差异较小，并且可以可靠地指示哪些活动没有发生。我们提出了一种音频自适应编码器和相关的学习方法，可以有区别地调整视觉特征表示并解决语义分布的变化。为了进一步消除特定于领域的特征并包含用于识别的领域不变的活动声音，提出了一种音频注入识别器，它可以有效地模拟跨领域的跨模式交互。我们还引入了演员转移的新任务，以及相应的视听数据集，以在活动外观发生巨大变化的情况下挑战我们的方法。对该数据集、EPIC-Kitchens 和 CharadesEgo 的实验表明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决跨视频领域活动识别中的领域偏移问题，通过利用活动声音的稳定性进行领域适应。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉主导的方法难以应对场景或摄像头视角变化导致的领域偏移，而活动声音跨领域方差更小且能可靠指示活动状态，因此提出基于声音的领域适应方法。
AI.method: 提出音频自适应编码器调整视觉特征表示，设计音频融合识别器建模跨模态交互，并引入新的演员变化任务及对应数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 在新数据集、EPIC-Kitchens和CharadesEgo上的实验表明，该方法有效应对领域偏移和演员变化带来的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 通过音频适应和跨模态交互建模，本文方法在跨领域活动识别中表现出色，尤其在处理剧烈外观变化时具有优势。

authors_text: Fangrui Lv,Jian Liang,Shuang Li,Bin Zang,Chi Harold Liu,Ziteng Wang,Di Liu
title: Causality Inspired Representation Learning for Domain Generalization
title_zh: 因果关系启发的领域泛化表示学习
abstract: Domain generalization (DG) is essentially an out-of-distribution problem, aiming to generalize the knowledge learned from multiple source domains to an unseen target domain. The mainstream is to leverage statistical models to model the dependence between data and labels, intending to learn representations independent of domain. Nevertheless, the statistical models are superficial descriptions of reality since they are only required to model dependence instead of the intrinsic causal mechanism. When the dependence changes with the target distribution, the statistic models may fail to generalize. In this regard, we introduce a general structural causal model to formalize the DG problem. Specifically, we assume that each input is constructed from a mix of causal factors (whose relationship with the label is invariant across domains) and non-causal factors (category-independent), and only the former cause the classification judgments. Our goal is to extract the causal factors from inputs and then reconstruct the invariant causal mechanisms. However, the theoretical idea is far from practical of DG since the required causal/non-causal factors are unobserved. We highlight that ideal causal factors should meet three basic properties: separated from the non-causal ones, jointly independent, and causally sufficient for the classification. Based on that, we propose a Causality Inspired Representation Learning (CIRL) algorithm that enforces the representations to satisfy the above properties and then uses them to simulate the causal factors, which yields improved generalization ability. Extensive experimental results on several widely used datasets verify the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Domain generalization (DG) is essentially an out-of-distribution problem, aiming to generalize the knowledge learned from multiple source domains to an unseen target domain. The mainstream is to leverage statistical models to model the dependence between data and labels, intending to learn representations independent of domain. Nevertheless, the statistical models are superficial descriptions of reality since they are only required to model dependence instead of the intrinsic causal mechanism. When the dependence changes with the target distribution, the statistic models may fail to generalize. In this regard, we introduce a general structural causal model to formalize the DG problem. Specifically, we assume that each input is constructed from a mix of causal factors (whose relationship with the label is invariant across domains) and non-causal factors (category-independent), and only the former cause the classification judgments. Our goal is to extract the causal factors from inputs and then reconstruct the invariant causal mechanisms. However, the theoretical idea is far from practical of DG since the required causal/non-causal factors are unobserved. We highlight that ideal causal factors should meet three basic properties: separated from the non-causal ones, jointly independent, and causally sufficient for the classification. Based on that, we propose a Causality Inspired Representation Learning (CIRL) algorithm that enforces the representations to satisfy the above properties and then uses them to simulate the causal factors, which yields improved generalization ability. Extensive experimental results on several widely used datasets verify the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 领域泛化（DG）本质上是一个分布外问题，旨在将从多个源领域学到的知识泛化到未见过的目标领域。主流是利用统计模型来建模数据和标签之间的依赖关系，旨在学习独立于领域的表示。然而，统计模型是对现实的肤浅描述，因为它们只需要模拟依赖性而不是内在的因果机制。当相关性随目标分布变化时，统计模型可能无法泛化。在这方面，我们引入了一个通用的结构因果模型来形式化 DG 问题。具体来说，我们假设每个输入都是由因果因素（其与标签的关系在跨域中不变）和非因果因素（与类别无关）的混合构成的，并且只有前者才会导致分类判断。我们的目标是从输入中提取因果因素，然后重建不变的因果机制。然而，由于未观察到所需的因果/非因果因素，DG 的理论思想与实际相距甚远。我们强调，理想的因果因素应该满足三个基本属性：与非因果因素分离、共同独立以及因果充分用于分类。基于此，我们提出了一种因果关系启发表示学习（CIRL）算法，该算法强制表示满足上述属性，然后使用它们来模拟因果因素，从而提高泛化能力。在几个广泛使用的数据集上进行的广泛实验结果验证了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于因果启发的表示学习方法（CIRL），旨在通过提取输入数据中的因果因素来提升领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统统计模型仅建模数据与标签的依赖关系，无法捕捉领域不变的因果机制，导致在目标分布变化时泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 构建结构因果模型，假设输入由领域不变的因果因素和领域无关的非因果因素组成，提出CIRL算法强制表示满足因果因素的分离性、独立性及因果充分性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验验证了CIRL方法在领域泛化任务中的有效性，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模因果机制而非统计依赖关系，CIRL能够学习到更鲁棒的领域不变表示，为领域泛化问题提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于因果启发的表示学习方法（CIRL），旨在通过提取输入数据中的因果因素来提升领域泛化能力。
motivation: 传统统计模型仅建模数据与标签的依赖关系，无法捕捉领域不变的因果机制，导致在目标分布变化时泛化能力不足。
method: 构建结构因果模型，假设输入由领域不变的因果因素和领域无关的非因果因素组成，提出CIRL算法强制表示满足因果因素的分离性、独立性及因果充分性。
result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验验证了CIRL方法在领域泛化任务中的有效性，优于现有方法。
conclusion: 通过建模因果机制而非统计依赖关系，CIRL能够学习到更鲁棒的领域不变表示，为领域泛化问题提供了新思路。
search_text: Causality Inspired Representation Learning for Domain Generalization 因果关系启发的领域泛化表示学习 Domain generalization (DG) is essentially an out-of-distribution problem, aiming to generalize the knowledge learned from multiple source domains to an unseen target domain. The mainstream is to leverage statistical models to model the dependence between data and labels, intending to learn representations independent of domain. Nevertheless, the statistical models are superficial descriptions of reality since they are only required to model dependence instead of the intrinsic causal mechanism. When the dependence changes with the target distribution, the statistic models may fail to generalize. In this regard, we introduce a general structural causal model to formalize the DG problem. Specifically, we assume that each input is constructed from a mix of causal factors (whose relationship with the label is invariant across domains) and non-causal factors (category-independent), and only the former cause the classification judgments. Our goal is to extract the causal factors from inputs and then reconstruct the invariant causal mechanisms. However, the theoretical idea is far from practical of DG since the required causal/non-causal factors are unobserved. We highlight that ideal causal factors should meet three basic properties: separated from the non-causal ones, jointly independent, and causally sufficient for the classification. Based on that, we propose a Causality Inspired Representation Learning (CIRL) algorithm that enforces the representations to satisfy the above properties and then uses them to simulate the causal factors, which yields improved generalization ability. Extensive experimental results on several widely used datasets verify the effectiveness of our approach. 领域泛化（DG）本质上是一个分布外问题，旨在将从多个源领域学到的知识泛化到未见过的目标领域。主流是利用统计模型来建模数据和标签之间的依赖关系，旨在学习独立于领域的表示。然而，统计模型是对现实的肤浅描述，因为它们只需要模拟依赖性而不是内在的因果机制。当相关性随目标分布变化时，统计模型可能无法泛化。在这方面，我们引入了一个通用的结构因果模型来形式化 DG 问题。具体来说，我们假设每个输入都是由因果因素（其与标签的关系在跨域中不变）和非因果因素（与类别无关）的混合构成的，并且只有前者才会导致分类判断。我们的目标是从输入中提取因果因素，然后重建不变的因果机制。然而，由于未观察到所需的因果/非因果因素，DG 的理论思想与实际相距甚远。我们强调，理想的因果因素应该满足三个基本属性：与非因果因素分离、共同独立以及因果充分用于分类。基于此，我们提出了一种因果关系启发表示学习（CIRL）算法，该算法强制表示满足上述属性，然后使用它们来模拟因果因素，从而提高泛化能力。在几个广泛使用的数据集上进行的广泛实验结果验证了我们方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于因果启发的表示学习方法（CIRL），旨在通过提取输入数据中的因果因素来提升领域泛化能力。 Fangrui Lv,Jian Liang,Shuang Li,Bin Zang,Chi Harold Liu,Ziteng Wang,Di Liu cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Yu Zhang,Yun Wang,Haidong Zhang,Bin Zhu,Siming Chen,Dongmei Zhang
title: OneLabeler: A Flexible System for Building Data Labeling Tools
title_zh: OneLabeler：用于构建数据标签工具的灵活系统
abstract: Labeled datasets are essential for supervised machine learning. Various data labeling tools have been built to collect labels in different usage scenarios. However, developing labeling tools is time-consuming, costly, and expertise-demanding on software development. In this paper, we propose a conceptual framework for data labeling and OneLabeler based on the conceptual framework to support easy building of labeling tools for diverse usage scenarios. The framework consists of common modules and states in labeling tools summarized through coding of existing tools. OneLabeler supports configuration and composition of common software modules through visual programming to build data labeling tools. A module can be a human, machine, or mixed computation procedure in data labeling. We demonstrate the expressiveness and utility of the system through ten example labeling tools built with OneLabeler. A user study with developers provides evidence that OneLabeler supports efficient building of diverse data labeling tools.
summary: Labeled datasets are essential for supervised machine learning. Various data labeling tools have been built to collect labels in different usage scenarios. However, developing labeling tools is time-consuming, costly, and expertise-demanding on software development. In this paper, we propose a conceptual framework for data labeling and OneLabeler based on the conceptual framework to support easy building of labeling tools for diverse usage scenarios. The framework consists of common modules and states in labeling tools summarized through coding of existing tools. OneLabeler supports configuration and composition of common software modules through visual programming to build data labeling tools. A module can be a human, machine, or mixed computation procedure in data labeling. We demonstrate the expressiveness and utility of the system through ten example labeling tools built with OneLabeler. A user study with developers provides evidence that OneLabeler supports efficient building of diverse data labeling tools.
abstract_zh: 标记数据集对于监督机器学习至关重要。人们已经构建了各种数据标签工具来收集不同使用场景的标签。然而，开发标签工具非常耗时、成本高昂，并且需要软件开发方面的专业知识。在本文中，我们提出了数据标记的概念框架以及基于该概念框架的OneLabeler，以支持轻松构建针对不同使用场景的标记工具。该框架由通过现有工具的编码总结的标记工具中的通用模块和状态组成。 OneLabeler支持通过可视化编程的方式配置和组合常用软件模块，构建数据标注工具。模块可以是数据标记中的人、机器或混合计算过程。我们通过使用 OneLabeler 构建的十个示例标签工具展示了系统的表现力和实用性。与开发人员进行的用户研究提供的证据表明 OneLabeler 支持高效构建多样化的数据标记工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OneLabeler系统，通过可视化编程和模块化设计，简化数据标注工具的构建过程。
AI.motivation: 现有数据标注工具开发周期长、成本高且需要专业软件开发技能，缺乏灵活高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于现有工具总结通用模块和状态，设计概念框架并通过可视化编程实现模块配置与组合，支持人工、机器或混合计算流程。
AI.result: 构建了10个示例标注工具，用户研究证实该系统能有效提升开发者构建多样化标注工具的效率。
AI.conclusion: OneLabeler通过模块化和可视化编程，为不同场景下的数据标注工具开发提供了灵活高效的通用框架。

title: Approximately Counting Subgraphs in Data Streams
title_zh: 近似计算数据流中的子图
abstract: Estimating the number of subgraphs in data streams is a fundamental problem that has received great attention in the past decade. In this paper, we give improved streaming algorithms for approximately counting the number of occurrences of an arbitrary subgraph $H$, denoted $\# H$, when the input graph $G$ is represented as a stream of $m$ edges. To obtain our algorithms, we provide a generic transformation that converts constant-round sublinear-time graph algorithms in the query access model to constant-pass sublinear-space graph streaming algorithms. Using this transformation, we obtain the following results. 1. We give a $3$-pass turnstile streaming algorithm for $(1\pm ε)$-approximating $\# H$ in $\tilde{O}(\frac{m^{ρ(H)}}{ε^2\cdot \# H})$ space, where $ρ(H)$ is the fractional edge-cover of $H$. This improves upon and generalizes a result of McGregor et al. [PODS 2016], who gave a $3$-pass insertion-only streaming algorithm for $(1\pm ε)$-approximating the number $\# T$ of triangles in $\tilde{O}(\frac{m^{3/2}}{ε^2\cdot \# T})$ space if the algorithm is given additional oracle access to the degrees. 2. We provide a constant-pass streaming algorithm for $(1\pm ε)$-approximating $\# K_r$ in $\tilde{O}(\frac{mλ^{r-2}}{ε^2\cdot \# K_r})$ space for any $r\geq 3$, in a graph $G$ with degeneracy $λ$, where $K_r$ is a clique on $r$ vertices. This resolves a conjecture by Bera and Seshadhri [PODS 2020]. More generally, our reduction relates the adaptivity of a query algorithm to the pass complexity of a corresponding streaming algorithm, and it is applicable to all algorithms in standard sublinear-time graph query models, e.g., the (augmented) general model.

To obtain our algorithms, we provide a generic transformation that converts constant-round sublinear-time graph algorithms in the query access model to constant-pass sublinear-space graph streaming algorithms. Using this transformation, we obtain the following results. 1. We give a $3$-pass turnstile streaming algorithm for $(1\pm ε)$-approximating $\# H$ in $\tilde{O}(\frac{m^{ρ(H)}}{ε^2\cdot \# H})$ space, where $ρ(H)$ is the fractional edge-cover of $H$. This improves upon and generalizes a result of McGregor et al. [PODS 2016], who gave a $3$-pass insertion-only streaming algorithm for $(1\pm ε)$-approximating the number $\# T$ of triangles in $\tilde{O}(\frac{m^{3/2}}{ε^2\cdot \# T})$ space if the algorithm is given additional oracle access to the degrees. 2. We provide a constant-pass streaming algorithm for $(1\pm ε)$-approximating $\# K_r$ in $\tilde{O}(\frac{mλ^{r-2}}{ε^2\cdot \# K_r})$ space for any $r\geq 3$, in a graph $G$ with degeneracy $λ$, where $K_r$ is a clique on $r$ vertices. This resolves a conjecture by Bera and Seshadhri [PODS 2020]. More generally, our reduction relates the adaptivity of a query algorithm to the pass complexity of a corresponding streaming algorithm, and it is applicable to all algorithms in standard sublinear-time graph query models, e.g., the (augmented) general model.
abstract_zh: 估计数据流中子图的数量是过去十年中受到广泛关注的一个基本问题。在本文中，我们给出了改进的流算法，当输入图 $G$ 表示为 $m$ 边的流时，用于近似计算任意子图 $H$（表示为 $\# H$）出现的次数。为了获得我们的算法，我们提供了一个通用转换，将查询​​访问模型中的常量轮次线性时间图算法转换为常量传递亚线性空间图流算法。使用此转换，我们获得以下结果。 1. 我们给出了$(1\pm ε)$在$\tilde{O}(\frac{m^{ρ(H)}}{ε^2\cdot \# H})$空间中近似$\# H$的$3$通道旋转门流算法，其中$ρ(H)$是$H$的部分边缘覆盖。这改进并概括了 McGregor 等人的结果。 [PODS 2016]，他给出了 $(1\pm ε)$ 的 $3$-pass 仅插入流算法 - 如果该算法被给予额外的度数预言访问，则近似 $\tilde{O}(\frac{m^{3/2}}{ε^2\cdot \# T})$ 空间中三角形的数量 $\# T$。 2. 我们为任何 $r\geq 3$ 的 $(1\pm ε)$ 近似于 $\tilde{O}(\frac{mλ^{r-2}}{ε^2\cdot \# K_r})$ 空间中的 $(1\pm ε)$ 提供了一种恒定传递流算法，在简并 $λ$ 的图中 $G$ 中，其中 $K_r$ 是 $r$ 顶点上的团。这解决了 Bera 和 Seshadhri 的猜想 [PODS 2020]。更一般地说，我们的简化将查询算法的适应性与相应流算法的传递复杂度联系起来，并且它适用于标准亚线性时间图查询模型中的所有算法，例如（增强的）通用模型。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在数据流模型中对任意子图进行近似计数的改进算法。
AI.motivation: 子图计数是图数据分析中的核心问题，在流数据处理场景下需高效算法以应对大规模数据挑战。
AI.method: 提出通用转换方法，将查询模型中的常数轮次亚线性时间算法转化为流模型中的常数轮次亚线性空间算法。
AI.result: 1) 设计3轮流算法以$\	ilde{O}(\ rac{m^{ρ(H)}}{ε^2\\cdot \\# H})$空间近似计数任意子图；2) 对于任意$r≥3$，设计常数轮算法以$\	ilde{O}(\ rac{mλ^{r-2}}{ε^2\\cdot \\# K_r})$空间近似计数$r$-团，解决Bera-Seshadhri猜想。
AI.conclusion: 该方法建立了查询模型与流模型的复杂度关联，为子线性时间图算法提供了流处理范式下的通用转化框架。

More generally, our reduction relates the adaptivity of a query algorithm to the pass complexity of a corresponding streaming algorithm, and it is applicable to all algorithms in standard sublinear-time graph query models, e.g., the (augmented) general model. 估计数据流中子图的数量是过去十年中受到广泛关注的一个基本问题。在本文中，我们给出了改进的流算法，当输入图 $G$ 表示为 $m$ 边的流时，用于近似计算任意子图 $H$（表示为 $\# H$）出现的次数。为了获得我们的算法，我们提供了一个通用转换，将查询​​访问模型中的常量轮次线性时间图算法转换为常量传递亚线性空间图流算法。使用此转换，我们获得以下结果。 1. 我们给出了$(1\pm ε)$在$\tilde{O}(\frac{m^{ρ(H)}}{ε^2\cdot \# H})$空间中近似$\# H$的$3$通道旋转门流算法，其中$ρ(H)$是$H$的部分边缘覆盖。这改进并概括了 McGregor 等人的结果。 [PODS 2016]，他给出了 $(1\pm ε)$ 的 $3$-pass 仅插入流算法 - 如果该算法被给予额外的度数预言访问，则近似 $\tilde{O}(\frac{m^{3/2}}{ε^2\cdot \# T})$ 空间中三角形的数量 $\# T$。 2. 我们为任何 $r\geq 3$ 的 $(1\pm ε)$ 近似于 $\tilde{O}(\frac{mλ^{r-2}}{ε^2\cdot \# K_r})$ 空间中的 $(1\pm ε)$ 提供了一种恒定传递流算法，在简并 $λ$ 的图中 $G$ 中，其中 $K_r$ 是 $r$ 顶点上的团。这解决了 Bera 和 Seshadhri 的猜想 [PODS 2020]。更一般地说，我们的简化将查询算法的适应性与相应流算法的传递复杂度联系起来，并且它适用于标准亚线性时间图查询模型中的所有算法，例如（增强的）通用模型。 本文研究了在数据流模型中对任意子图进行近似计数的改进算法。 Hendrik Fichtenberger,Pan Peng cs.DS

title: Listen, Adapt, Better WER: Source-free Single-utterance Test-time Adaptation for Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: Listen, Adapt, Better WER：用于自动语音识别的无源单话语测试时间自适应
abstract: Although deep learning-based end-to-end Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) has shown remarkable performance in recent years, it suffers severe performance regression on test samples drawn from different data distributions. Test-time Adaptation (TTA), previously explored in the computer vision area, aims to adapt the model trained on source domains to yield better predictions for test samples, often out-of-domain, without accessing the source data. Here, we propose the Single-Utterance Test-time Adaptation (SUTA) framework for ASR, which is the first TTA study on ASR to our best knowledge. The single-utterance TTA is a more realistic setting that does not assume test data are sampled from identical distribution and does not delay on-demand inference due to pre-collection for the batch of adaptation data. SUTA consists of unsupervised objectives with an efficient adaptation strategy. Empirical results demonstrate that SUTA effectively improves the performance of the source ASR model evaluated on multiple out-of-domain target corpora and in-domain test samples.
summary: Although deep learning-based end-to-end Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) has shown remarkable performance in recent years, it suffers severe performance regression on test samples drawn from different data distributions. Test-time Adaptation (TTA), previously explored in the computer vision area, aims to adapt the model trained on source domains to yield better predictions for test samples, often out-of-domain, without accessing the source data. Here, we propose the Single-Utterance Test-time Adaptation (SUTA) framework for ASR, which is the first TTA study on ASR to our best knowledge. The single-utterance TTA is a more realistic setting that does not assume test data are sampled from identical distribution and does not delay on-demand inference due to pre-collection for the batch of adaptation data. SUTA consists of unsupervised objectives with an efficient adaptation strategy. Empirical results demonstrate that SUTA effectively improves the performance of the source ASR model evaluated on multiple out-of-domain target corpora and in-domain test samples.
abstract_zh: 尽管基于深度学习的端到端自动语音识别（ASR）近年来表现出了出色的性能，但在不同数据分布的测试样本上却出现了严重的性能下降。之前在计算机视觉领域探索过的测试时间适应 (TTA) 旨在调整在源域上训练的模型，以便在不访问源数据的情况下对测试样本（通常是域外的）进行更好的预测。在这里，我们提出了 ASR 的单话语测试时间适应 (SUTA) 框架，这是据我们所知第一个关于 ASR 的 TTA 研究。单话语 TTA 是一种更现实的设置，它不假设测试数据是从相同的分布中采样的，并且不会因预收集批量适应数据而延迟按需推理。 SUTA 由具有有效适应策略的无监督目标组成。实证结果表明，SUTA 有效提高了在多个域外目标语料库和域内测试样本上评估的源 ASR 模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需源数据的单话语音测试时自适应框架SUTA，以提升自动语音识别（ASR）在不同分布测试数据上的性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习ASR模型在面对分布外测试数据时性能显著下降，传统测试时自适应方法需依赖源数据或假设数据同分布，无法满足实际需求。
AI.method: 设计无监督目标函数与高效自适应策略，利用单句测试数据实时调整模型参数，无需预收集批量适配数据。
AI.result: 实验表明SUTA在多个领域外测试语料库及领域内样本上均有效提升源ASR模型性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SUTA为ASR提供了更贴近现实场景的测试时自适应解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Fida Mohammad Thoker,Hazel Doughty,Piyush Bagad,Cees Snoek
title: How Severe is Benchmark-Sensitivity in Video Self-Supervised Learning?
title_zh: 视频自监督学习中的基准敏感性有多严重？
abstract: Despite the recent success of video self-supervised learning models, there is much still to be understood about their generalization capability. In this paper, we investigate how sensitive video self-supervised learning is to the current conventional benchmark and whether methods generalize beyond the canonical evaluation setting. We do this across four different factors of sensitivity: domain, samples, actions and task. Our study which encompasses over 500 experiments on 7 video datasets, 9 self-supervised methods and 6 video understanding tasks, reveals that current benchmarks in video self-supervised learning are not good indicators of generalization along these sensitivity factors. Further, we find that self-supervised methods considerably lag behind vanilla supervised pre-training, especially when domain shift is large and the amount of available downstream samples are low. From our analysis, we distill the SEVERE-benchmark, a subset of our experiments, and discuss its implication for evaluating the generalizability of representations obtained by existing and future self-supervised video learning methods.
summary: Despite the recent success of video self-supervised learning models, there is much still to be understood about their generalization capability. In this paper, we investigate how sensitive video self-supervised learning is to the current conventional benchmark and whether methods generalize beyond the canonical evaluation setting. We do this across four different factors of sensitivity: domain, samples, actions and task. Our study which encompasses over 500 experiments on 7 video datasets, 9 self-supervised methods and 6 video understanding tasks, reveals that current benchmarks in video self-supervised learning are not good indicators of generalization along these sensitivity factors. Further, we find that self-supervised methods considerably lag behind vanilla supervised pre-training, especially when domain shift is large and the amount of available downstream samples are low. From our analysis, we distill the SEVERE-benchmark, a subset of our experiments, and discuss its implication for evaluating the generalizability of representations obtained by existing and future self-supervised video learning methods.
abstract_zh: 尽管视频自监督学习模型最近取得了成功，但其泛化能力仍有很多需要了解的地方。在本文中，我们研究了视频自监督学习对当前传统基准的敏感程度，以及方法是否可以推广到规范评估设置之外。我们通过四个不同的敏感因素来做到这一点：领域、样本、行动和任务。我们的研究涵盖了 7 个视频数据集、9 种自监督方法和 6 个视频理解任务的 500 多个实验，表明视频自监督学习的当前基准并不能很好地说明这些敏感因素的泛化。此外，我们发现自监督方法大大落后于普通监督预训练，特别是当域转移很大并且可用下游样本量很低时。根据我们的分析，我们提炼了 SEVERE 基准（我们实验的一个子集），并讨论了它对评估现有和未来的自监督视频学习方法所获得的表示的普遍性的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视频自监督学习模型在不同基准下的敏感性，评估其泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管视频自监督学习模型取得了成功，但其泛化能力仍需深入理解，尤其是在不同基准下的表现。
AI.method: 通过在四个敏感因素（领域、样本、动作和任务）上进行超过500次实验，涵盖7个视频数据集、9种自监督方法和6个视频理解任务。
AI.result: 发现当前基准不能很好地反映模型在敏感因素上的泛化能力，且自监督方法在领域偏移大和下游样本少时明显落后于传统监督预训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出了SEVERE-benchmark，作为评估现有和未来自监督视频学习方法泛化能力的新基准。

title: Efficient and Degradation-Adaptive Network for Real-World Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于现实世界图像超分辨率的高效且退化自适应网络
abstract: Efficient and effective real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR) is a challenging task due to the unknown complex degradation of real-world images and the limited computation resources in practical applications. Recent research on Real-ISR has achieved significant progress by modeling the image degradation space; however, these methods largely rely on heavy backbone networks and they are inflexible to handle images of different degradation levels. In this paper, we propose an efficient and effective degradation-adaptive super-resolution (DASR) network, whose parameters are adaptively specified by estimating the degradation of each input image. Specifically, a tiny regression network is employed to predict the degradation parameters of the input image, while several convolutional experts with the same topology are jointly optimized to specify the network parameters via a non-linear mixture of experts. The joint optimization of multiple experts and the degradation-adaptive pipeline significantly extend the model capacity to handle degradations of various levels, while the inference remains efficient since only one adaptively specified network is used for super-resolving the input image. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed DASR is not only much more effective than existing methods on handling real-world images with different degradation levels but also efficient for easy deployment. Codes, models and datasets are available at https://github.com/csjliang/DASR.
summary: Efficient and effective real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR) is a challenging task due to the unknown complex degradation of real-world images and the limited computation resources in practical applications. Recent research on Real-ISR has achieved significant progress by modeling the image degradation space; however, these methods largely rely on heavy backbone networks and they are inflexible to handle images of different degradation levels. In this paper, we propose an efficient and effective degradation-adaptive super-resolution (DASR) network, whose parameters are adaptively specified by estimating the degradation of each input image. Specifically, a tiny regression network is employed to predict the degradation parameters of the input image, while several convolutional experts with the same topology are jointly optimized to specify the network parameters via a non-linear mixture of experts. The joint optimization of multiple experts and the degradation-adaptive pipeline significantly extend the model capacity to handle degradations of various levels, while the inference remains efficient since only one adaptively specified network is used for super-resolving the input image. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed DASR is not only much more effective than existing methods on handling real-world images with different degradation levels but also efficient for easy deployment. Codes, models and datasets are available at https://github.com/csjliang/DASR.
abstract_zh: 由于真实世界图像未知的复杂退化以及实际应用中有限的计算资源，高效且有效的真实世界图像超分辨率（Real-ISR）是一项具有挑战性的任务。 Real-ISR 最近的研究通过对图像退化空间进行建模，取得了重大进展；然而，这些方法很大程度上依赖于重型骨干网络，并且它们不灵活地处理不同退化级别的图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效且有效的退化自适应超分辨率（DASR）网络，其参数通过估计每个输入图像的退化来自适应指定。具体来说，采用微型回归网络来预测输入图像的退化参数，同时对具有相同拓扑的多个卷积专家进行联合优化，以通过专家的非线性混合来指定网络参数。多位专家的联合优化和退化自适应管道显着扩展了模型处理各种级别退化的能力，同时由于仅使用一个自适应指定网络来对输入图像进行超解析，因此推理保持高效。我们的大量实验表明，所提出的 DASR 不仅比现有方法在处理具有不同退化级别的真实世界图像方面更有效，而且还易于部署。代码、模型和数据集可在 https://github.com/csjliang/DASR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效且适应退化的图像超分辨率网络（DASR），以解决真实世界图像因未知复杂退化和计算资源限制导致的超分辨率难题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖重型网络且难以灵活处理不同退化水平的图像，导致效率与适应性不足。
AI.method: 通过微型回归网络预测输入图像退化参数，并利用共享拓扑的卷积专家网络进行非线性混合优化，实现退化自适应的参数指定。
AI.result: 实验表明，DASR在处理多退化级别真实图像时优于现有方法，且保持高效推理速度，适合实际部署。
AI.conclusion: DASR通过退化自适应机制与专家网络联合优化，在效果与效率间取得平衡，为真实场景超分辨率提供有效解决方案。

search_text: Efficient and Degradation-Adaptive Network for Real-World Image Super-Resolution 用于现实世界图像超分辨率的高效且退化自适应网络 Efficient and effective real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR) is a challenging task due to the unknown complex degradation of real-world images and the limited computation resources in practical applications. Recent research on Real-ISR has achieved significant progress by modeling the image degradation space; however, these methods largely rely on heavy backbone networks and they are inflexible to handle images of different degradation levels. In this paper, we propose an efficient and effective degradation-adaptive super-resolution (DASR) network, whose parameters are adaptively specified by estimating the degradation of each input image. Specifically, a tiny regression network is employed to predict the degradation parameters of the input image, while several convolutional experts with the same topology are jointly optimized to specify the network parameters via a non-linear mixture of experts. The joint optimization of multiple experts and the degradation-adaptive pipeline significantly extend the model capacity to handle degradations of various levels, while the inference remains efficient since only one adaptively specified network is used for super-resolving the input image. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed DASR is not only much more effective than existing methods on handling real-world images with different degradation levels but also efficient for easy deployment. Codes, models and datasets are available at https://github.com/csjliang/DASR. 由于真实世界图像未知的复杂退化以及实际应用中有限的计算资源，高效且有效的真实世界图像超分辨率（Real-ISR）是一项具有挑战性的任务。 Real-ISR 最近的研究通过对图像退化空间进行建模，取得了重大进展；然而，这些方法很大程度上依赖于重型骨干网络，并且它们不灵活地处理不同退化级别的图像。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效且有效的退化自适应超分辨率（DASR）网络，其参数通过估计每个输入图像的退化来自适应指定。具体来说，采用微型回归网络来预测输入图像的退化参数，同时对具有相同拓扑的多个卷积专家进行联合优化，以通过专家的非线性混合来指定网络参数。多位专家的联合优化和退化自适应管道显着扩展了模型处理各种级别退化的能力，同时由于仅使用一个自适应指定网络来对输入图像进行超解析，因此推理保持高效。我们的大量实验表明，所提出的 DASR 不仅比现有方法在处理具有不同退化级别的真实世界图像方面更有效，而且还易于部署。代码、模型和数据集可在 https://github.com/csjliang/DASR 获取。 本文提出一种高效且适应退化的图像超分辨率网络（DASR），以解决真实世界图像因未知复杂退化和计算资源限制导致的超分辨率难题。 Jie Liang,Hui Zeng,Lei Zhang cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Hao Wang,Junchao Liao,Tianheng Cheng,Zewen Gao,Hao Liu,Bo Ren,Xiang Bai,Wenyu Liu
title: Knowledge Mining with Scene Text for Fine-Grained Recognition
title_zh: 场景文本知识挖掘实现细粒度识别
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022. The source code and new dataset of this work are available at https://github.com/lanfeng4659/KnowledgeMiningWithSceneText
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022. The source code and new dataset of this work are available at https://github.com/lanfeng4659/KnowledgeMiningWithSceneText
abstract: Recently, the semantics of scene text has been proven to be essential in fine-grained image classification. However, the existing methods mainly exploit the literal meaning of scene text for fine-grained recognition, which might be irrelevant when it is not significantly related to objects/scenes. We propose an end-to-end trainable network that mines implicit contextual knowledge behind scene text image and enhance the semantics and correlation to fine-tune the image representation. Unlike the existing methods, our model integrates three modalities: visual feature extraction, text semantics extraction, and correlating background knowledge to fine-grained image classification. Specifically, we employ KnowBert to retrieve relevant knowledge for semantic representation and combine it with image features for fine-grained classification. Experiments on two benchmark datasets, Con-Text, and Drink Bottle, show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art by 3.72\% mAP and 5.39\% mAP, respectively. To further validate the effectiveness of the proposed method, we create a new dataset on crowd activity recognition for the evaluation. The source code and new dataset of this work are available at https://github.com/lanfeng4659/KnowledgeMiningWithSceneText.
summary: Recently, the semantics of scene text has been proven to be essential in fine-grained image classification. However, the existing methods mainly exploit the literal meaning of scene text for fine-grained recognition, which might be irrelevant when it is not significantly related to objects/scenes. We propose an end-to-end trainable network that mines implicit contextual knowledge behind scene text image and enhance the semantics and correlation to fine-tune the image representation. Unlike the existing methods, our model integrates three modalities: visual feature extraction, text semantics extraction, and correlating background knowledge to fine-grained image classification. Specifically, we employ KnowBert to retrieve relevant knowledge for semantic representation and combine it with image features for fine-grained classification. Experiments on two benchmark datasets, Con-Text, and Drink Bottle, show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art by 3.72\% mAP and 5.39\% mAP, respectively. To further validate the effectiveness of the proposed method, we create a new dataset on crowd activity recognition for the evaluation. The source code and new dataset of this work are available at https://github.com/lanfeng4659/KnowledgeMiningWithSceneText.
abstract_zh: 最近，场景文本的语义已被证明在细粒度图像分类中至关重要。然而，现有的方法主要利用场景文本的字面意义进行细粒度的识别，当它与对象/场景没有显着相关时，这可能是无关紧要的。我们提出了一种端到端的可训练网络，可以挖掘场景文本图像背后的隐式上下文知识，并增强语义和相关性以微调图像表示。与现有方法不同，我们的模型集成了三种模式：视觉特征提取、文本语义提取以及将背景知识与细粒度图像分类相关联。具体来说，我们使用 KnowBert 检索语义表示的相关知识，并将其与图像特征结合起来进行细粒度分类。对两个基准数据集 Con-Text 和 Drink Bottle 的实验表明，我们的方法分别比最先进的方法高出 3.72\% mAP 和 5.39\% mAP。为了进一步验证所提出方法的有效性，我们创建了一个新的人群活动识别数据集进行评估。这项工作的源代码和新数据集可在 https://github.com/lanfeng4659/KnowledgeMiningWithSceneText 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合场景文本隐含语义知识的细粒度图像分类方法，通过多模态信息提升识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅利用场景文本的字面语义进行细粒度分类，未能充分挖掘文本背后的隐含上下文知识，导致与目标/场景关联性不足。
AI.method: 构建端到端网络融合视觉特征、文本语义和关联背景知识，采用KnowBert提取知识表示并与图像特征结合进行分类。
AI.result: 在Con-Text和Drink Bottle数据集上分别提升3.72%和5.39% mAP，同时构建了新的群体活动识别数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态融合与知识挖掘显著提升细粒度分类性能，证明了场景文本隐含语义的有效性。

title: DepthFormer: Exploiting Long-Range Correlation and Local Information for Accurate Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: DepthFormer：利用远程相关性和局部信息进行准确的单目深度估计
abstract: This paper aims to address the problem of supervised monocular depth estimation. We start with a meticulous pilot study to demonstrate that the long-range correlation is essential for accurate depth estimation. Therefore, we propose to leverage the Transformer to model this global context with an effective attention mechanism. We also adopt an additional convolution branch to preserve the local information as the Transformer lacks the spatial inductive bias in modeling such contents. However, independent branches lead to a shortage of connections between features. To bridge this gap, we design a hierarchical aggregation and heterogeneous interaction module to enhance the Transformer features via element-wise interaction and model the affinity between the Transformer and the CNN features in a set-to-set translation manner. Due to the unbearable memory cost caused by global attention on high-resolution feature maps, we introduce the deformable scheme to reduce the complexity. Extensive experiments on the KITTI, NYU, and SUN RGB-D datasets demonstrate that our proposed model, termed DepthFormer, surpasses state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation methods with prominent margins. Notably, it achieves the most competitive result on the highly competitive KITTI depth estimation benchmark. Our codes and models are available at https://github.com/zhyever/Monocular-Depth-Estimation-Toolbox.
summary: This paper aims to address the problem of supervised monocular depth estimation. We start with a meticulous pilot study to demonstrate that the long-range correlation is essential for accurate depth estimation. Therefore, we propose to leverage the Transformer to model this global context with an effective attention mechanism. We also adopt an additional convolution branch to preserve the local information as the Transformer lacks the spatial inductive bias in modeling such contents. However, independent branches lead to a shortage of connections between features. To bridge this gap, we design a hierarchical aggregation and heterogeneous interaction module to enhance the Transformer features via element-wise interaction and model the affinity between the Transformer and the CNN features in a set-to-set translation manner. Due to the unbearable memory cost caused by global attention on high-resolution feature maps, we introduce the deformable scheme to reduce the complexity. Extensive experiments on the KITTI, NYU, and SUN RGB-D datasets demonstrate that our proposed model, termed DepthFormer, surpasses state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation methods with prominent margins. Notably, it achieves the most competitive result on the highly competitive KITTI depth estimation benchmark. Our codes and models are available at https://github.com/zhyever/Monocular-Depth-Estimation-Toolbox.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在解决有监督的单目深度估计问题。我们从细致的试点研究开始，以证明远程相关性对于准确的深度估计至关重要。因此，我们建议利用 Transformer 通过有效的注意力机制来模拟这种全球背景。我们还采用额外的卷积分支来保留局部信息，因为 Transformer 在对此类内容进行建模时缺乏空间归纳偏差。然而，独立的分支导致特征之间缺乏联系。为了弥补这一差距，我们设计了一个分层聚合和异构交互模块，通过元素交互增强 Transformer 特征，并以集合到集合转换的方式对 Transformer 和 CNN 特征之间的亲和力进行建模。由于高分辨率特征图上的全局注意力导致难以承受的内存成本，我们引入了可变形方案来降低复杂度。在 KITTI、NYU 和 SUN RGB-D 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们提出的模型（称为 DepthFormer）超越了最先进的单目深度估计方法，具有显着的优势。值得注意的是，它在竞争激烈的 KITTI 深度估计基准上取得了最具竞争力的结果。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/zhyever/Monlooking-Depth-Estimation-Toolbox 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DepthFormer模型，通过结合Transformer的全局注意力机制与卷积神经网络的局部信息处理能力，提升单目深度估计的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有单目深度估计方法在建模长距离关联性和局部细节时存在不足，导致精度受限。研究发现长距离相关性对深度估计至关重要，需同时保留局部信息以增强模型表现。
AI.method: 设计包含Transformer分支（建模全局上下文）与卷积分支（保留局部细节）的双路径网络，通过分层聚合与异构交互模块融合特征，并引入可变形机制降低高分辨率特征图的计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在KITTI、NYU和SUN RGB-D数据集上，DepthFormer显著优于现有方法，尤其在KITTI基准测试中取得最具竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效结合全局长距离关联与局部信息，DepthFormer实现了更精确的单目深度估计，且可变形方案保障了计算效率。

search_text: DepthFormer: Exploiting Long-Range Correlation and Local Information for Accurate Monocular Depth Estimation DepthFormer：利用远程相关性和局部信息进行准确的单目深度估计 This paper aims to address the problem of supervised monocular depth estimation. We start with a meticulous pilot study to demonstrate that the long-range correlation is essential for accurate depth estimation. Therefore, we propose to leverage the Transformer to model this global context with an effective attention mechanism. We also adopt an additional convolution branch to preserve the local information as the Transformer lacks the spatial inductive bias in modeling such contents. However, independent branches lead to a shortage of connections between features. To bridge this gap, we design a hierarchical aggregation and heterogeneous interaction module to enhance the Transformer features via element-wise interaction and model the affinity between the Transformer and the CNN features in a set-to-set translation manner. Due to the unbearable memory cost caused by global attention on high-resolution feature maps, we introduce the deformable scheme to reduce the complexity. Extensive experiments on the KITTI, NYU, and SUN RGB-D datasets demonstrate that our proposed model, termed DepthFormer, surpasses state-of-the-art monocular depth estimation methods with prominent margins. Notably, it achieves the most competitive result on the highly competitive KITTI depth estimation benchmark. Our codes and models are available at https://github.com/zhyever/Monocular-Depth-Estimation-Toolbox. 本文旨在解决有监督的单目深度估计问题。我们从细致的试点研究开始，以证明远程相关性对于准确的深度估计至关重要。因此，我们建议利用 Transformer 通过有效的注意力机制来模拟这种全球背景。我们还采用额外的卷积分支来保留局部信息，因为 Transformer 在对此类内容进行建模时缺乏空间归纳偏差。然而，独立的分支导致特征之间缺乏联系。为了弥补这一差距，我们设计了一个分层聚合和异构交互模块，通过元素交互增强 Transformer 特征，并以集合到集合转换的方式对 Transformer 和 CNN 特征之间的亲和力进行建模。由于高分辨率特征图上的全局注意力导致难以承受的内存成本，我们引入了可变形方案来降低复杂度。在 KITTI、NYU 和 SUN RGB-D 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们提出的模型（称为 DepthFormer）超越了最先进的单目深度估计方法，具有显着的优势。值得注意的是，它在竞争激烈的 KITTI 深度估计基准上取得了最具竞争力的结果。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/zhyever/Monlooking-Depth-Estimation-Toolbox 获取。 本文提出DepthFormer模型，通过结合Transformer的全局注意力机制与卷积神经网络的局部信息处理能力，提升单目深度估计的准确性。 Zhenyu Li,Zehui Chen,Xianming Liu,Junjun Jiang cs.CV

title: Towards Discriminative Representation: Multi-view Trajectory Contrastive Learning for Online Multi-object Tracking
title_zh: 走向判别性表示：在线多目标跟踪的多视图轨迹对比学习
abstract: Discriminative representation is crucial for the association step in multi-object tracking. Recent work mainly utilizes features in single or neighboring frames for constructing metric loss and empowering networks to extract representation of targets. Although this strategy is effective, it fails to fully exploit the information contained in a whole trajectory. To this end, we propose a strategy, namely multi-view trajectory contrastive learning, in which each trajectory is represented as a center vector. By maintaining all the vectors in a dynamically updated memory bank, a trajectory-level contrastive loss is devised to explore the inter-frame information in the whole trajectories. Besides, in this strategy, each target is represented as multiple adaptively selected keypoints rather than a pre-defined anchor or center. This design allows the network to generate richer representation from multiple views of the same target, which can better characterize occluded objects. Additionally, in the inference stage, a similarity-guided feature fusion strategy is developed for further boosting the quality of the trajectory representation. Extensive experiments have been conducted on MOTChallenge to verify the effectiveness of the proposed techniques. The experimental results indicate that our method has surpassed preceding trackers and established new state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Discriminative representation is crucial for the association step in multi-object tracking. Recent work mainly utilizes features in single or neighboring frames for constructing metric loss and empowering networks to extract representation of targets. Although this strategy is effective, it fails to fully exploit the information contained in a whole trajectory. To this end, we propose a strategy, namely multi-view trajectory contrastive learning, in which each trajectory is represented as a center vector. By maintaining all the vectors in a dynamically updated memory bank, a trajectory-level contrastive loss is devised to explore the inter-frame information in the whole trajectories. Besides, in this strategy, each target is represented as multiple adaptively selected keypoints rather than a pre-defined anchor or center. This design allows the network to generate richer representation from multiple views of the same target, which can better characterize occluded objects. Additionally, in the inference stage, a similarity-guided feature fusion strategy is developed for further boosting the quality of the trajectory representation. Extensive experiments have been conducted on MOTChallenge to verify the effectiveness of the proposed techniques. The experimental results indicate that our method has surpassed preceding trackers and established new state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 判别性表示对于多目标跟踪中的关联步骤至关重要。最近的工作主要利用单个或相邻帧中的特征来构建度量损失并使网络能够提取目标的表示。尽管这种策略是有效的，但它未能充分利用整个轨迹中包含的信息。为此，我们提出了一种策略，即多视图轨迹对比学习，其中每个轨迹都表示为中心向量。通过将所有向量保存在动态更新的存储库中，设计了轨迹级对比损失来探索整个轨迹中的帧间信息。此外，在该策略中，每个目标都表示为多个自适应选择的关键点，而不是预定义的锚点或中心。这种设计允许网络从同一目标的多个视图生成更丰富的表示，从而可以更好地表征被遮挡的对象。此外，在推理阶段，开发了一种相似性引导的特征融合策略，以进一步提高轨迹表示的质量。在 MOTchallenge 上进行了大量实验，以验证所提出技术的有效性。实验结果表明，我们的方法已经超越了之前的跟踪器，并建立了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多视角轨迹对比学习方法，用于提升在线多目标跟踪中的判别性表示能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在单帧或相邻帧特征上构建度量损失，未能充分利用整个轨迹的信息，导致对遮挡目标的表征能力不足。
AI.method: 通过动态维护记忆库中的轨迹中心向量，设计轨迹级对比损失；采用自适应选择的多关键点表示目标，结合推理阶段的相似性引导特征融合策略。
AI.result: 在MOTChallenge数据集上实验表明，该方法超越了先前跟踪器，建立了新的最先进性能基准。
AI.conclusion: 多视角轨迹对比学习能有效提升轨迹表征的判别性，尤其在处理遮挡场景时表现出色。

authors_text: Tianying Liu,Lu Zhang,Yang Wang,Jihong Guan,Yanwei Fu,Jiajia Zhao,Shuigeng Zhou
title: Recent Few-Shot Object Detection Algorithms: A Survey with Performance Comparison
title_zh: 最近的少样本目标检测算法：性能比较调查
abstract: The generic object detection (GOD) task has been successfully tackled by recent deep neural networks, trained by an avalanche of annotated training samples from some common classes. However, it is still non-trivial to generalize these object detectors to the novel long-tailed object classes, which have only few labeled training samples. To this end, the Few-Shot Object Detection (FSOD) has been topical recently, as it mimics the humans' ability of learning to learn, and intelligently transfers the learned generic object knowledge from the common heavy-tailed, to the novel long-tailed object classes. Especially, the research in this emerging field has been flourishing in recent years with various benchmarks, backbones, and methodologies proposed. To review these FSOD works, there are several insightful FSOD survey articles [58, 59, 74, 78] that systematically study and compare them as the groups of fine-tuning/transfer learning, and meta-learning methods. In contrast, we review the existing FSOD algorithms from a new perspective under a new taxonomy based on their contributions, i.e., data-oriented, model-oriented, and algorithm-oriented. Thus, a comprehensive survey with performance comparison is conducted on recent achievements of FSOD. Furthermore, we also analyze the technical challenges, the merits and demerits of these methods, and envision the future directions of FSOD. Specifically, we give an overview of FSOD, including the problem definition, common datasets, and evaluation protocols. The taxonomy is then proposed that groups FSOD methods into three types. Following this taxonomy, we provide a systematic review of the advances in FSOD. Finally, further discussions on performance, challenges, and future directions are presented.
summary: The generic object detection (GOD) task has been successfully tackled by recent deep neural networks, trained by an avalanche of annotated training samples from some common classes. However, it is still non-trivial to generalize these object detectors to the novel long-tailed object classes, which have only few labeled training samples. To this end, the Few-Shot Object Detection (FSOD) has been topical recently, as it mimics the humans' ability of learning to learn, and intelligently transfers the learned generic object knowledge from the common heavy-tailed, to the novel long-tailed object classes. Especially, the research in this emerging field has been flourishing in recent years with various benchmarks, backbones, and methodologies proposed. To review these FSOD works, there are several insightful FSOD survey articles [58, 59, 74, 78] that systematically study and compare them as the groups of fine-tuning/transfer learning, and meta-learning methods. In contrast, we review the existing FSOD algorithms from a new perspective under a new taxonomy based on their contributions, i.e., data-oriented, model-oriented, and algorithm-oriented. Thus, a comprehensive survey with performance comparison is conducted on recent achievements of FSOD. Furthermore, we also analyze the technical challenges, the merits and demerits of these methods, and envision the future directions of FSOD. Specifically, we give an overview of FSOD, including the problem definition, common datasets, and evaluation protocols. The taxonomy is then proposed that groups FSOD methods into three types. Following this taxonomy, we provide a systematic review of the advances in FSOD. Finally, further discussions on performance, challenges, and future directions are presented.
abstract_zh: 最近的深度神经网络已成功解决了通用对象检测（GOD）任务，该网络通过来自一些常见类别的大量带注释的训练样本进行训练。然而，将这些对象检测器推广到新颖的长尾对象类仍然很重要，这些对象类只有很少的标记训练样本。为此，少镜头目标检测（FSOD）最近成为热门话题，因为它模仿人类学习的能力，并智能地将学习到的通用目标知识从常见的重尾目标类转移到新颖的长尾目标类。特别是，近年来这一新兴领域的研究蓬勃发展，提出了各种基准、支柱和方法。为了回顾这些 FSOD 工作，有几篇富有洞察力的 FSOD 调查文章 [58,59,74,78] 将它们作为微调/迁移学习和元学习方法进行了系统的研究和比较。相比之下，我们根据现有的 FSOD 算法的贡献，即面向数据、面向模型和面向算法，以新的分类法从新的角度来审视它们。因此，对FSOD的近期成就进行了全面的调查和性能比较。此外，我们还分析了这些方法的技术挑战、优缺点，并展望了 FSOD 的未来方向。具体来说，我们概述了 FSOD，包括问题定义、通用数据集和评估协议。然后提出分类法，将 FSOD 方法分为三种类型。按照这种分类法，我们对 FSOD 的进展进行了系统回顾。最后，进一步讨论了性能、挑战和未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文对近期少样本目标检测算法进行全面综述与性能比较，提出新的分类方法并分析技术挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 传统目标检测依赖大量标注数据，难以应对新类别的少样本场景，现有FSOD综述缺乏统一分类框架，需系统梳理技术进展与挑战。
AI.method: 提出基于贡献的新分类法（数据、模型、算法导向），系统回顾FSOD进展，并进行性能比较。
AI.result: 总结现有FSOD方法的优缺点，分析技术挑战，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 新的分类框架有助于深入理解FSOD，为未来研究提供指导。

tldr: 本文对近期少样本目标检测算法进行全面综述与性能比较，提出新的分类方法并分析技术挑战与未来方向。
motivation: 传统目标检测依赖大量标注数据，难以应对新类别的少样本场景，现有FSOD综述缺乏统一分类框架，需系统梳理技术进展与挑战。
method: 提出基于贡献的新分类法（数据、模型、算法导向），系统回顾FSOD进展，并进行性能比较。
result: 总结现有FSOD方法的优缺点，分析技术挑战，并提出未来研究方向。
conclusion: 新的分类框架有助于深入理解FSOD，为未来研究提供指导。
search_text: Recent Few-Shot Object Detection Algorithms: A Survey with Performance Comparison 最近的少样本目标检测算法：性能比较调查 The generic object detection (GOD) task has been successfully tackled by recent deep neural networks, trained by an avalanche of annotated training samples from some common classes. However, it is still non-trivial to generalize these object detectors to the novel long-tailed object classes, which have only few labeled training samples. To this end, the Few-Shot Object Detection (FSOD) has been topical recently, as it mimics the humans' ability of learning to learn, and intelligently transfers the learned generic object knowledge from the common heavy-tailed, to the novel long-tailed object classes. Especially, the research in this emerging field has been flourishing in recent years with various benchmarks, backbones, and methodologies proposed. To review these FSOD works, there are several insightful FSOD survey articles [58, 59, 74, 78] that systematically study and compare them as the groups of fine-tuning/transfer learning, and meta-learning methods. In contrast, we review the existing FSOD algorithms from a new perspective under a new taxonomy based on their contributions, i.e., data-oriented, model-oriented, and algorithm-oriented. Thus, a comprehensive survey with performance comparison is conducted on recent achievements of FSOD. Furthermore, we also analyze the technical challenges, the merits and demerits of these methods, and envision the future directions of FSOD. Specifically, we give an overview of FSOD, including the problem definition, common datasets, and evaluation protocols. The taxonomy is then proposed that groups FSOD methods into three types. Following this taxonomy, we provide a systematic review of the advances in FSOD. Finally, further discussions on performance, challenges, and future directions are presented. 最近的深度神经网络已成功解决了通用对象检测（GOD）任务，该网络通过来自一些常见类别的大量带注释的训练样本进行训练。然而，将这些对象检测器推广到新颖的长尾对象类仍然很重要，这些对象类只有很少的标记训练样本。为此，少镜头目标检测（FSOD）最近成为热门话题，因为它模仿人类学习的能力，并智能地将学习到的通用目标知识从常见的重尾目标类转移到新颖的长尾目标类。特别是，近年来这一新兴领域的研究蓬勃发展，提出了各种基准、支柱和方法。为了回顾这些 FSOD 工作，有几篇富有洞察力的 FSOD 调查文章 [58,59,74,78] 将它们作为微调/迁移学习和元学习方法进行了系统的研究和比较。相比之下，我们根据现有的 FSOD 算法的贡献，即面向数据、面向模型和面向算法，以新的分类法从新的角度来审视它们。因此，对FSOD的近期成就进行了全面的调查和性能比较。此外，我们还分析了这些方法的技术挑战、优缺点，并展望了 FSOD 的未来方向。具体来说，我们概述了 FSOD，包括问题定义、通用数据集和评估协议。然后提出分类法，将 FSOD 方法分为三种类型。按照这种分类法，我们对 FSOD 的进展进行了系统回顾。最后，进一步讨论了性能、挑战和未来方向。 本文对近期少样本目标检测算法进行全面综述与性能比较，提出新的分类方法并分析技术挑战与未来方向。 Tianying Liu,Lu Zhang,Yang Wang,Jihong Guan,Yanwei Fu,Jiajia Zhao,Shuigeng Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: F. Alonso-Fernandez,R. A. Farrugia,J. Bigun,J. Fierrez,E. Gonzalez-Sosa
title: A Survey of Super-Resolution in Iris Biometrics with Evaluation of Dictionary-Learning
title_zh: 虹膜生物识别中超分辨率的调查与字典学习的评估
abstract: The lack of resolution has a negative impact on the performance of image-based biometrics. While many generic super-resolution methods have been proposed to restore low-resolution images, they usually aim to enhance their visual appearance. However, a visual enhancement of biometric images does not necessarily correlate with a better recognition performance. Reconstruction approaches need thus to incorporate specific information from the target biometric modality to effectively improve recognition. This paper presents a comprehensive survey of iris super-resolution approaches proposed in the literature. We have also adapted an Eigen-patches reconstruction method based on PCA Eigen-transformation of local image patches. The structure of the iris is exploited by building a patch-position dependent dictionary. In addition, image patches are restored separately, having their own reconstruction weights. This allows the solution to be locally optimized, helping to preserve local information. To evaluate the algorithm, we degraded high-resolution images from the CASIA Interval V3 database. Different restorations were considered, with 15x15 pixels being the smallest resolution. To the best of our knowledge, this is among the smallest resolutions employed in the literature. The framework is complemented with six public iris comparators, which were used to carry out biometric verification and identification experiments. Experimental results show that the proposed method significantly outperforms both bilinear and bicubic interpolation at very low-resolution. The performance of a number of comparators attains an impressive Equal Error Rate as low as 5%, and a Top-1 accuracy of 77-84% when considering iris images of only 15x15 pixels. These results clearly demonstrate the benefit of using trained super-resolution techniques to improve the quality of iris images prior to matching.

While many generic super-resolution methods have been proposed to restore low-resolution images, they usually aim to enhance their visual appearance. We have also adapted an Eigen-patches reconstruction method based on PCA Eigen-transformation of local image patches. The structure of the iris is exploited by building a patch-position dependent dictionary. In addition, image patches are restored separately, having their own reconstruction weights. This allows the solution to be locally optimized, helping to preserve local information. To evaluate the algorithm, we degraded high-resolution images from the CASIA Interval V3 database. Different restorations were considered, with 15x15 pixels being the smallest resolution. To the best of our knowledge, this is among the smallest resolutions employed in the literature. The framework is complemented with six public iris comparators, which were used to carry out biometric verification and identification experiments. Experimental results show that the proposed method significantly outperforms both bilinear and bicubic interpolation at very low-resolution. abstract_zh: 分辨率的缺乏会对基于图像的生物识别技术的性能产生负面影响。虽然已经提出了许多通用的超分辨率方法来恢复低分辨率图像，但它们通常旨在增强其视觉外观。然而，生物识别图像的视觉增强并不一定与更好的识别性能相关。因此，重建方法需要结合来自目标生物识别模态的特定信息，以有效地提高识别能力。本文对文献中提出的虹膜超分辨率方法进行了全面的调查。我们还采用了基于局部图像补丁的 PCA 特征变换的特征补丁重建方法。通过构建补丁位置相关字典来利用虹膜的结构。此外，图像块是单独恢复的，具有自己的重建权重。这使得解决方案能够进行本地优化，有助于保留本地信息。为了评估该算法，我们对 CASIA Interval V3 数据库中的高分辨率图像进行了降级。考虑了不同的修复体，最小分辨率为 15x15 像素。据我们所知，这是文献中采用的最小分辨率之一。该框架辅以六个公共虹膜比较器，用于进行生物特征验证和识别实验。实验结果表明，所提出的方法在极低分辨率下显着优于双线性和双三次插值。当考虑只有 15x15 像素的虹膜图像时，许多比较器的性能达到了令人印象深刻的低至 5% 的等错误率，以及 77-84% 的 Top-1 精度。这些结果清楚地证明了在匹配之前使用训练有素的超分辨率技术来提高虹膜图像质量的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了虹膜生物特征超分辨率方法，并提出基于字典学习的改进算法以提升低分辨率虹膜图像的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统超分辨率方法侧重视觉增强而非识别性能优化，而虹膜识别对图像质量要求极高，需针对性改进重建方法。
AI.method: 采用PCA构建局部图像块的特征字典，建立与块位置相关的自适应字典，并通过独立优化各块的重建权重实现局部信息保留。
AI.result: 在15x15像素极低分辨率下，该方法较双线性/双三次插值提升显著，验证系统达到5%等错误率，Top-1准确率达77-84%。
AI.conclusion: 训练的超分辨率技术能有效提升虹膜图像质量，字典学习方法在极低分辨率下仍保持优异识别性能，验证了算法有效性。

title: Long-Tailed Recognition via Weight Balancing
title_zh: 通过权重平衡进行长尾识别
abstract: In the real open world, data tends to follow long-tailed class distributions, motivating the well-studied long-tailed recognition (LTR) problem. Naive training produces models that are biased toward common classes in terms of higher accuracy. The key to addressing LTR is to balance various aspects including data distribution, training losses, and gradients in learning. We explore an orthogonal direction, weight balancing, motivated by the empirical observation that the naively trained classifier has "artificially" larger weights in norm for common classes (because there exists abundant data to train them, unlike the rare classes). We investigate three techniques to balance weights, L2-normalization, weight decay, and MaxNorm. We first point out that L2-normalization "perfectly" balances per-class weights to be unit norm, but such a hard constraint might prevent classes from learning better classifiers. In contrast, weight decay penalizes larger weights more heavily and so learns small balanced weights; the MaxNorm constraint encourages growing small weights within a norm ball but caps all the weights by the radius. Our extensive study shows that both help learn balanced weights and greatly improve the LTR accuracy. Surprisingly, weight decay, although underexplored in LTR, significantly improves over prior work. Therefore, we adopt a two-stage training paradigm and propose a simple approach to LTR: (1) learning features using the cross-entropy loss by tuning weight decay, and (2) learning classifiers using class-balanced loss by tuning weight decay and MaxNorm. Our approach achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy on five standard benchmarks, serving as a future baseline for long-tailed recognition.
summary: In the real open world, data tends to follow long-tailed class distributions, motivating the well-studied long-tailed recognition (LTR) problem. Naive training produces models that are biased toward common classes in terms of higher accuracy. The key to addressing LTR is to balance various aspects including data distribution, training losses, and gradients in learning. We explore an orthogonal direction, weight balancing, motivated by the empirical observation that the naively trained classifier has "artificially" larger weights in norm for common classes (because there exists abundant data to train them, unlike the rare classes). We investigate three techniques to balance weights, L2-normalization, weight decay, and MaxNorm. We first point out that L2-normalization "perfectly" balances per-class weights to be unit norm, but such a hard constraint might prevent classes from learning better classifiers. In contrast, weight decay penalizes larger weights more heavily and so learns small balanced weights; the MaxNorm constraint encourages growing small weights within a norm ball but caps all the weights by the radius. Our extensive study shows that both help learn balanced weights and greatly improve the LTR accuracy. Surprisingly, weight decay, although underexplored in LTR, significantly improves over prior work. Therefore, we adopt a two-stage training paradigm and propose a simple approach to LTR: (1) learning features using the cross-entropy loss by tuning weight decay, and (2) learning classifiers using class-balanced loss by tuning weight decay and MaxNorm. Our approach achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy on five standard benchmarks, serving as a future baseline for long-tailed recognition.
abstract_zh: 在现实的开放世界中，数据往往遵循长尾类别分布，从而引发了对长尾识别（LTR）问题的深入研究。朴素训练产生的模型在更高的准确度方面偏向于普通类。解决LTR的关键是平衡数据分布、训练损失、学习梯度等各个方面。我们探索了一个正交方向，即权重平衡，其动机是经验观察，即经过简单训练的分类器在常见类别的范数中“人为地”具有更大的权重（因为与稀有类别不同，存在丰富的数据来训练它们）。我们研究了三种平衡权重的技术：L2 归一化、权重衰减和 MaxNorm。我们首先指出，L2 归一化“完美”地将每个类别的权重平衡为单位范数，但这样的严格约束可能会阻止类别学习更好的分类器。相反，权重衰减对较大权重的惩罚更重，因此可以学习较小的平衡权重； MaxNorm 约束鼓励在标准球内增加较小的权重，但按半径限制所有权重。我们的广泛研究表明，两者都有助于学习平衡权重并大大提高 LTR 准确性。令人惊讶的是，权重衰减虽然在 LTR 中尚未得到充分探索，但比之前的工作有了显着改善。因此，我们采用两阶段训练范式，并提出了一种简单的LTR方法：（1）通过调整权重衰减来使用交叉熵损失来学习特征，（2）通过调整权重衰减和MaxNorm来使用类平衡损失来学习分类器。我们的方法在五个标准基准上实现了最先进的准确性，作为长尾识别的未来基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过权重平衡解决长尾识别问题，改进模型对罕见类别的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 现实世界数据呈现长尾分布，传统训练方法导致模型偏向常见类别。观察到常见类别因数据充足而拥有更大权重，需通过平衡权重缓解这一偏差。
AI.method: 探索L2归一化、权重衰减和MaxNorm三种权重平衡技术，提出两阶段训练范式：第一阶段用交叉熵损失调整权重衰减学习特征，第二阶段用类别平衡损失结合权重衰减和MaxNorm训练分类器。
AI.result: 在五个标准基准测试中达到最先进的长尾识别准确率，为后续研究提供新基准。
AI.conclusion: 权重平衡策略有效提升长尾识别性能，尤其是权重衰减的未被充分探索的潜力得到验证。
