search_text: Long-Tailed Recognition via Weight Balancing 通过权重平衡进行长尾识别 In the real open world, data tends to follow long-tailed class distributions, motivating the well-studied long-tailed recognition (LTR) problem. Naive training produces models that are biased toward common classes in terms of higher accuracy. The key to addressing LTR is to balance various aspects including data distribution, training losses, and gradients in learning. We explore an orthogonal direction, weight balancing, motivated by the empirical observation that the naively trained classifier has "artificially" larger weights in norm for common classes (because there exists abundant data to train them, unlike the rare classes). We investigate three techniques to balance weights, L2-normalization, weight decay, and MaxNorm. We first point out that L2-normalization "perfectly" balances per-class weights to be unit norm, but such a hard constraint might prevent classes from learning better classifiers. In contrast, weight decay penalizes larger weights more heavily and so learns small balanced weights; the MaxNorm constraint encourages growing small weights within a norm ball but caps all the weights by the radius. Our extensive study shows that both help learn balanced weights and greatly improve the LTR accuracy. Surprisingly, weight decay, although underexplored in LTR, significantly improves over prior work. Therefore, we adopt a two-stage training paradigm and propose a simple approach to LTR: (1) learning features using the cross-entropy loss by tuning weight decay, and (2) learning classifiers using class-balanced loss by tuning weight decay and MaxNorm. Our approach achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy on five standard benchmarks, serving as a future baseline for long-tailed recognition. 在现实的开放世界中，数据往往遵循长尾类别分布，从而引发了对长尾识别（LTR）问题的深入研究。朴素训练产生的模型在更高的准确度方面偏向于普通类。解决LTR的关键是平衡数据分布、训练损失、学习梯度等各个方面。我们探索了一个正交方向，即权重平衡，其动机是经验观察，即经过简单训练的分类器在常见类别的范数中“人为地”具有更大的权重（因为与稀有类别不同，存在丰富的数据来训练它们）。我们研究了三种平衡权重的技术：L2 归一化、权重衰减和 MaxNorm。我们首先指出，L2 归一化“完美”地将每个类别的权重平衡为单位范数，但这样的严格约束可能会阻止类别学习更好的分类器。相反，权重衰减对较大权重的惩罚更重，因此可以学习较小的平衡权重； MaxNorm 约束鼓励在标准球内增加较小的权重，但按半径限制所有权重。我们的广泛研究表明，两者都有助于学习平衡权重并大大提高 LTR 准确性。令人惊讶的是，权重衰减虽然在 LTR 中尚未得到充分探索，但比之前的工作有了显着改善。因此，我们采用两阶段训练范式，并提出了一种简单的LTR方法：（1）通过调整权重衰减来使用交叉熵损失来学习特征，（2）通过调整权重衰减和MaxNorm来使用类平衡损失来学习分类器。我们的方法在五个标准基准上实现了最先进的准确性，作为长尾识别的未来基准。 本文提出通过权重平衡解决长尾识别问题，改进模型对罕见类别的识别能力。 Shaden Alshammari,Yu-Xiong Wang,Deva Ramanan,Shu Kong cs.CV

title: HINT: Hierarchical Neuron Concept Explainer
title_zh: 提示：分层神经元概念解释器
abstract: To interpret deep networks, one main approach is to associate neurons with human-understandable concepts. However, existing methods often ignore the inherent relationships of different concepts (e.g., dog and cat both belong to animals), and thus lose the chance to explain neurons responsible for higher-level concepts (e.g., animal). In this paper, we study hierarchical concepts inspired by the hierarchical cognition process of human beings. To this end, we propose HIerarchical Neuron concepT explainer (HINT) to effectively build bidirectional associations between neurons and hierarchical concepts in a low-cost and scalable manner. HINT enables us to systematically and quantitatively study whether and how the implicit hierarchical relationships of concepts are embedded into neurons, such as identifying collaborative neurons responsible to one concept and multimodal neurons for different concepts, at different semantic levels from concrete concepts (e.g., dog) to more abstract ones (e.g., animal). Finally, we verify the faithfulness of the associations using Weakly Supervised Object Localization, and demonstrate its applicability in various tasks such as discovering saliency regions and explaining adversarial attacks. Code is available on https://github.com/AntonotnaWang/HINT.
summary: To interpret deep networks, one main approach is to associate neurons with human-understandable concepts. However, existing methods often ignore the inherent relationships of different concepts (e.g., dog and cat both belong to animals), and thus lose the chance to explain neurons responsible for higher-level concepts (e.g., animal). In this paper, we study hierarchical concepts inspired by the hierarchical cognition process of human beings. To this end, we propose HIerarchical Neuron concepT explainer (HINT) to effectively build bidirectional associations between neurons and hierarchical concepts in a low-cost and scalable manner. HINT enables us to systematically and quantitatively study whether and how the implicit hierarchical relationships of concepts are embedded into neurons, such as identifying collaborative neurons responsible to one concept and multimodal neurons for different concepts, at different semantic levels from concrete concepts (e.g., dog) to more abstract ones (e.g., animal). Finally, we verify the faithfulness of the associations using Weakly Supervised Object Localization, and demonstrate its applicability in various tasks such as discovering saliency regions and explaining adversarial attacks. Code is available on https://github.com/AntonotnaWang/HINT.
abstract_zh: 为了解释深层网络，一种主要方法是将神经元与人类可理解的概念联系起来。然而，现有的方法往往忽略了不同概念的内在关系（例如，狗和猫都属于动物），从而失去了解释负责更高层次概念（例如，动物）的神经元的机会。在本文中，我们研究了受人类分层认知过程启发的分层概念。为此，我们提出层次神经元概念解释器（HINT），以低成本和可扩展的方式有效地建立神经元和层次概念之间的双向关联。 HINT 使我们能够系统地、定量地研究概念的隐式层次关系是否以及如何嵌入到神经元中，例如在从具体概念（例如狗）到更抽象概念（例如动物）的不同语义级别上识别负责一个概念的协作神经元和负责不同概念的多模态神经元。最后，我们使用弱监督对象定位验证关联的可信度，并证明其在发现显着区域和解释对抗性攻击等各种任务中的适用性。代码可在 https://github.com/AntonotnaWang/HINT 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HINT方法，通过建立神经元与层次化概念的双向关联，解释深度网络中神经元如何隐含地编码从具体到抽象的概念层次关系。
AI.motivation: 现有神经元解释方法忽视了概念间的层次关系（如狗和猫同属动物），导致无法解释更高层次概念（如动物）对应的神经元机制。
AI.method: 基于人类层次化认知过程，设计HINT方法以低成本可扩展方式构建神经元与层次化概念的双向关联，识别不同语义层级的协作神经元和多模态神经元。
AI.result: 通过弱监督目标定位验证关联可靠性，并在显著性区域发现和对抗攻击解释等任务中验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: HINT能够系统量化分析神经元中隐含的层次化概念关系，为深度网络解释提供新视角。

authors_text: Yimeng Zhang,Yuguang Yao,Jinghan Jia,Jinfeng Yi,Mingyi Hong,Shiyu Chang,Sijia Liu
title: How to Robustify Black-Box ML Models? A Zeroth-Order Optimization Perspective
title_zh: 如何鲁棒黑盒机器学习模型？零阶优化视角
abstract: The lack of adversarial robustness has been recognized as an important issue for state-of-the-art machine learning (ML) models, e.g., deep neural networks (DNNs). Thereby, robustifying ML models against adversarial attacks is now a major focus of research. However, nearly all existing defense methods, particularly for robust training, made the white-box assumption that the defender has the access to the details of an ML model (or its surrogate alternatives if available), e.g., its architectures and parameters. Beyond existing works, in this paper we aim to address the problem of black-box defense: How to robustify a black-box model using just input queries and output feedback? Such a problem arises in practical scenarios, where the owner of the predictive model is reluctant to share model information in order to preserve privacy. To this end, we propose a general notion of defensive operation that can be applied to black-box models, and design it through the lens of denoised smoothing (DS), a first-order (FO) certified defense technique. To allow the design of merely using model queries, we further integrate DS with the zeroth-order (gradient-free) optimization. However, a direct implementation of zeroth-order (ZO) optimization suffers a high variance of gradient estimates, and thus leads to ineffective defense. To tackle this problem, we next propose to prepend an autoencoder (AE) to a given (black-box) model so that DS can be trained using variance-reduced ZO optimization. We term the eventual defense as ZO-AE-DS. In practice, we empirically show that ZO-AE- DS can achieve improved accuracy, certified robustness, and query complexity over existing baselines. And the effectiveness of our approach is justified under both image classification and image reconstruction tasks. Codes are available at https://github.com/damon-demon/Black-Box-Defense.
summary: The lack of adversarial robustness has been recognized as an important issue for state-of-the-art machine learning (ML) models, e.g., deep neural networks (DNNs). Thereby, robustifying ML models against adversarial attacks is now a major focus of research. However, nearly all existing defense methods, particularly for robust training, made the white-box assumption that the defender has the access to the details of an ML model (or its surrogate alternatives if available), e.g., its architectures and parameters. Beyond existing works, in this paper we aim to address the problem of black-box defense: How to robustify a black-box model using just input queries and output feedback? Such a problem arises in practical scenarios, where the owner of the predictive model is reluctant to share model information in order to preserve privacy. To this end, we propose a general notion of defensive operation that can be applied to black-box models, and design it through the lens of denoised smoothing (DS), a first-order (FO) certified defense technique. To allow the design of merely using model queries, we further integrate DS with the zeroth-order (gradient-free) optimization. However, a direct implementation of zeroth-order (ZO) optimization suffers a high variance of gradient estimates, and thus leads to ineffective defense. To tackle this problem, we next propose to prepend an autoencoder (AE) to a given (black-box) model so that DS can be trained using variance-reduced ZO optimization. We term the eventual defense as ZO-AE-DS. In practice, we empirically show that ZO-AE- DS can achieve improved accuracy, certified robustness, and query complexity over existing baselines. And the effectiveness of our approach is justified under both image classification and image reconstruction tasks. Codes are available at https://github.com/damon-demon/Black-Box-Defense.
abstract_zh: 缺乏对抗鲁棒性已被认为是最先进的机器学习（ML）模型（例如深度神经网络（DNN））的一个重要问题。因此，增强机器学习模型抵御对抗性攻击现在是研究的主要焦点。然而，几乎所有现有的防御方法，尤其是稳健训练方法，都做出了白盒假设，即防御者可以访问 ML 模型（或其替代方案，如果可用）的详细信息，例如其架构和参数。除了现有的工作之外，在本文中，我们的目标是解决黑盒防御的问题：如何仅使用输入查询和输出反馈来增强黑盒模型？在实际场景中会出现这样的问题，预测模型的所有者为了保护隐私而不愿意共享模型信息。为此，我们提出了可应用于黑盒模型的防御操作的一般概念，并通过去噪平滑（DS）（一种一阶（FO）认证的防御技术）的镜头进行设计。为了允许仅使用模型查询的设计，我们进一步将 DS 与零阶（无梯度）优化集成。然而，直接实现零阶（ZO）优化会遭受梯度估计的高方差，从而导致防御无效。为了解决这个问题，我们接下来建议在给定（黑盒）模型前添加一个自动编码器（AE），以便可以使用方差减少的 ZO 优化来训练 DS。我们将最终防御称为 ZO-AE-DS。在实践中，我们凭经验证明 ZO-AE-DS 可以在现有基线上实现更高的准确性、经过认证的鲁棒性和查询复杂性。我们的方法的有效性在图像分类和图像重建任务下都是合理的。代码可在 https://github.com/damon-demon/Black-Box-Defense 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对黑盒机器学习模型的鲁棒性增强方法，通过零阶优化和自编码器实现无需模型参数的防御。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法依赖白盒假设（需访问模型参数），但实际场景中模型所有者可能因隐私问题拒绝共享参数，因此需要黑盒防御方案。
AI.method: 结合去噪平滑（DS）与零阶优化（ZO），并引入自编码器（AE）降低梯度估计方差，提出ZO-AE-DS方法实现黑盒模型鲁棒性增强。
AI.result: 实验表明，ZO-AE-DS在图像分类和重建任务中优于现有基线，在准确率、认证鲁棒性和查询复杂度上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过零阶优化与自编码器的结合，本文为黑盒模型提供了一种有效的鲁棒性增强框架，兼顾隐私保护与防御效果。

ai_content.conclusion: 通过零阶优化与自编码器的结合，本文为黑盒模型提供了一种有效的鲁棒性增强框架，兼顾隐私保护与防御效果。

search_text: How to Robustify Black-Box ML Models? A Zeroth-Order Optimization Perspective 如何鲁棒黑盒机器学习模型？零阶优化视角 The lack of adversarial robustness has been recognized as an important issue for state-of-the-art machine learning (ML) models, e.g., deep neural networks (DNNs). Thereby, robustifying ML models against adversarial attacks is now a major focus of research. However, nearly all existing defense methods, particularly for robust training, made the white-box assumption that the defender has the access to the details of an ML model (or its surrogate alternatives if available), e.g., its architectures and parameters. Beyond existing works, in this paper we aim to address the problem of black-box defense: How to robustify a black-box model using just input queries and output feedback? Such a problem arises in practical scenarios, where the owner of the predictive model is reluctant to share model information in order to preserve privacy. To this end, we propose a general notion of defensive operation that can be applied to black-box models, and design it through the lens of denoised smoothing (DS), a first-order (FO) certified defense technique. To allow the design of merely using model queries, we further integrate DS with the zeroth-order (gradient-free) optimization. However, a direct implementation of zeroth-order (ZO) optimization suffers a high variance of gradient estimates, and thus leads to ineffective defense. To tackle this problem, we next propose to prepend an autoencoder (AE) to a given (black-box) model so that DS can be trained using variance-reduced ZO optimization. We term the eventual defense as ZO-AE-DS. In practice, we empirically show that ZO-AE- DS can achieve improved accuracy, certified robustness, and query complexity over existing baselines. And the effectiveness of our approach is justified under both image classification and image reconstruction tasks. Codes are available at https://github.com/damon-demon/Black-Box-Defense. 缺乏对抗鲁棒性已被认为是最先进的机器学习（ML）模型（例如深度神经网络（DNN））的一个重要问题。因此，增强机器学习模型抵御对抗性攻击现在是研究的主要焦点。然而，几乎所有现有的防御方法，尤其是稳健训练方法，都做出了白盒假设，即防御者可以访问 ML 模型（或其替代方案，如果可用）的详细信息，例如其架构和参数。除了现有的工作之外，在本文中，我们的目标是解决黑盒防御的问题：如何仅使用输入查询和输出反馈来增强黑盒模型？在实际场景中会出现这样的问题，预测模型的所有者为了保护隐私而不愿意共享模型信息。为此，我们提出了可应用于黑盒模型的防御操作的一般概念，并通过去噪平滑（DS）（一种一阶（FO）认证的防御技术）的镜头进行设计。为了允许仅使用模型查询的设计，我们进一步将 DS 与零阶（无梯度）优化集成。然而，直接实现零阶（ZO）优化会遭受梯度估计的高方差，从而导致防御无效。为了解决这个问题，我们接下来建议在给定（黑盒）模型前添加一个自动编码器（AE），以便可以使用方差减少的 ZO 优化来训练 DS。我们将最终防御称为 ZO-AE-DS。在实践中，我们凭经验证明 ZO-AE-DS 可以在现有基线上实现更高的准确性、经过认证的鲁棒性和查询复杂性。我们的方法的有效性在图像分类和图像重建任务下都是合理的。代码可在 https://github.com/damon-demon/Black-Box-Defense 获取。 本文提出了一种针对黑盒机器学习模型的鲁棒性增强方法，通过零阶优化和自编码器实现无需模型参数的防御。 Yimeng Zhang,Yuguang Yao,Jinghan Jia,Jinfeng Yi,Mingyi Hong,Shiyu Chang,Sijia Liu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

title: Deep Polarimetric HDR Reconstruction
title_zh: 深度偏振 HDR 重建
abstract: This paper proposes a novel learning based high-dynamic-range (HDR) reconstruction method using a polarization camera. We utilize a previous observation that polarization filters with different orientations can attenuate natural light differently, and we treat the multiple images acquired by the polarization camera as a set acquired under different exposure times, to introduce the development of solutions for the HDR reconstruction problem. We propose a deep HDR reconstruction framework with a feature masking mechanism that uses polarimetric cues available from the polarization camera, called Deep Polarimetric HDR Reconstruction (DPHR). The proposed DPHR obtains polarimetric information to propagate valid features through the network more effectively to regress the missing pixels. We demonstrate through both qualitative and quantitative evaluations that the proposed DPHR performs favorably than state-of-the-art HDR reconstruction algorithms.
summary: This paper proposes a novel learning based high-dynamic-range (HDR) reconstruction method using a polarization camera. We utilize a previous observation that polarization filters with different orientations can attenuate natural light differently, and we treat the multiple images acquired by the polarization camera as a set acquired under different exposure times, to introduce the development of solutions for the HDR reconstruction problem. We propose a deep HDR reconstruction framework with a feature masking mechanism that uses polarimetric cues available from the polarization camera, called Deep Polarimetric HDR Reconstruction (DPHR). The proposed DPHR obtains polarimetric information to propagate valid features through the network more effectively to regress the missing pixels. We demonstrate through both qualitative and quantitative evaluations that the proposed DPHR performs favorably than state-of-the-art HDR reconstruction algorithms.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种使用偏振相机的基于学习的新型高动态范围（HDR）重建方法。我们利用先前的观察结果，即不同方向的偏振滤光片可以不同程度地衰减自然光，并将偏振相机获取的多幅图像视为在不同曝光时间下获取的一组图像，介绍HDR重建问题的解决方案的发展。我们提出了一种具有特征掩蔽机制的深度 HDR 重建框架，该机制使用偏振相机提供的偏振线索，称为深度偏振 HDR 重建（DPHR）。所提出的 DPHR 获得偏振信息，以更有效地通过网络传播有效特征，以回归丢失的像素。我们通过定性和定量评估证明，所提出的 DPHR 的性能优于最先进的 HDR 重建算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的高动态范围（HDR）重建方法，利用偏振相机获取的多角度偏振图像进行HDR重建。
AI.motivation: 传统HDR重建依赖不同曝光时间的图像，而偏振相机可通过不同角度的偏振滤光片获取自然光衰减信息，为HDR重建提供新的数据源。
AI.method: 提出名为DPHR的深度学习框架，通过特征掩码机制利用偏振信息，有效传播有效特征以回归缺失像素。
AI.result: 通过定性和定量评估表明，DPHR在HDR重建效果上优于现有最先进的算法。
AI.conclusion: DPHR通过引入偏振信息，为HDR重建提供了新颖且有效的解决方案，相比传统方法具有优势。

authors_text: Zhenjie Zhao,Yufang Hou,Dakuo Wang,Mo Yu,Chengzhong Liu,Xiaojuan Ma
title: Educational Question Generation of Children Storybooks via Question Type Distribution Learning and Event-Centric Summarization
title_zh: 通过问题类型分布学习和以事件为中心的总结来生成儿童故事书的教育问题
abstract: Generating educational questions of fairytales or storybooks is vital for improving children's literacy ability. However, it is challenging to generate questions that capture the interesting aspects of a fairytale story with educational meaningfulness. In this paper, we propose a novel question generation method that first learns the question type distribution of an input story paragraph, and then summarizes salient events which can be used to generate high-cognitive-demand questions. To train the event-centric summarizer, we finetune a pre-trained transformer-based sequence-to-sequence model using silver samples composed by educational question-answer pairs. On a newly proposed educational question answering dataset FairytaleQA, we show good performance of our method on both automatic and human evaluation metrics. Our work indicates the necessity of decomposing question type distribution learning and event-centric summary generation for educational question generation.
summary: Generating educational questions of fairytales or storybooks is vital for improving children's literacy ability. However, it is challenging to generate questions that capture the interesting aspects of a fairytale story with educational meaningfulness. In this paper, we propose a novel question generation method that first learns the question type distribution of an input story paragraph, and then summarizes salient events which can be used to generate high-cognitive-demand questions. To train the event-centric summarizer, we finetune a pre-trained transformer-based sequence-to-sequence model using silver samples composed by educational question-answer pairs. On a newly proposed educational question answering dataset FairytaleQA, we show good performance of our method on both automatic and human evaluation metrics. Our work indicates the necessity of decomposing question type distribution learning and event-centric summary generation for educational question generation.
abstract_zh: 产生童话或故事书的教育问题对于提高儿童的识字能力至关重要。然而，提出具有教育意义的童话故事的有趣方面的问题是具有挑战性的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的问题生成方法，该方法首先学习输入故事段落的问题类型分布，然后总结可用于生成高认知需求问题的显着事件。为了训练以事件为中心的摘要生成器，我们使用由教育问答对组成的银样本对预先训练的基于变压器的序列到序列模型进行微调。在新提出的教育问答数据集 FairytaleQA 上，我们的方法在自动和人工评估指标上都表现出了良好的性能。我们的工作表明了分解问题类型分布学习和以事件为中心的摘要生成对于教育问题生成的必要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过学习问题类型分布和事件中心摘要生成儿童故事书教育性问题的新方法。
AI.motivation: 生成具有教育意义且能捕捉童话故事趣味点的问题对提升儿童读写能力至关重要，但现有方法难以兼顾这两方面。
AI.method: 首先学习输入段落的问题类型分布，再通过事件中心摘要生成高认知需求问题，使用教育问答对微调预训练序列模型进行训练。
AI.result: 在新构建的FairytaleQA数据集上，该方法在自动评估和人工评估指标中均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 分解问题类型分布学习与事件中心摘要生成是实现教育性问题生成的关键。

title: RSTT: Real-time Spatial Temporal Transformer for Space-Time Video Super-Resolution
title_zh: RSTT：用于时空视频超分辨率的实时时空变换器
abstract: Space-time video super-resolution (STVSR) is the task of interpolating videos with both Low Frame Rate (LFR) and Low Resolution (LR) to produce High-Frame-Rate (HFR) and also High-Resolution (HR) counterparts. The existing methods based on Convolutional Neural Network~(CNN) succeed in achieving visually satisfied results while suffer from slow inference speed due to their heavy architectures. We propose to resolve this issue by using a spatial-temporal transformer that naturally incorporates the spatial and temporal super resolution modules into a single model. Unlike CNN-based methods, we do not explicitly use separated building blocks for temporal interpolations and spatial super-resolutions; instead, we only use a single end-to-end transformer architecture. Specifically, a reusable dictionary is built by encoders based on the input LFR and LR frames, which is then utilized in the decoder part to synthesize the HFR and HR frames. Compared with the state-of-the-art TMNet \cite{xu2021temporal}, our network is $60\%$ smaller (4.5M vs 12.3M parameters) and $80\%$ faster (26.2fps vs 14.3fps on $720\times576$ frames) without sacrificing much performance. The source code is available at https://github.com/llmpass/RSTT.
summary: Space-time video super-resolution (STVSR) is the task of interpolating videos with both Low Frame Rate (LFR) and Low Resolution (LR) to produce High-Frame-Rate (HFR) and also High-Resolution (HR) counterparts. The existing methods based on Convolutional Neural Network~(CNN) succeed in achieving visually satisfied results while suffer from slow inference speed due to their heavy architectures. We propose to resolve this issue by using a spatial-temporal transformer that naturally incorporates the spatial and temporal super resolution modules into a single model. Unlike CNN-based methods, we do not explicitly use separated building blocks for temporal interpolations and spatial super-resolutions; instead, we only use a single end-to-end transformer architecture. Specifically, a reusable dictionary is built by encoders based on the input LFR and LR frames, which is then utilized in the decoder part to synthesize the HFR and HR frames. Compared with the state-of-the-art TMNet \cite{xu2021temporal}, our network is $60\%$ smaller (4.5M vs 12.3M parameters) and $80\%$ faster (26.2fps vs 14.3fps on $720\times576$ frames) without sacrificing much performance. The source code is available at https://github.com/llmpass/RSTT.
abstract_zh: 时空视频超分辨率 (STVSR) 是对低帧率 (LFR) 和低分辨率 (LR) 视频进行插值以产生高帧率 (HFR) 和高分辨率 (HR) 视频的任务。现有的基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法成功地获得了视觉上令人满意的结果，但由于其笨重的架构而导致推理速度缓慢。我们建议通过使用时空转换器来解决这个问题，该转换器自然地将空间和时间超分辨率模块合并到单个模型中。与基于 CNN 的方法不同，我们没有明确使用单独的构建块进行时间插值和空间超分辨率；相反，我们只使用单个端到端变压器架构。具体来说，编码器根据输入的 LFR 和 LR 帧构建可重用字典，然后在解码器部分中使用该字典来合成 HFR 和 HR 帧。与最先进的 TMNet \cite{xu2021temporal} 相比，我们的网络小了 60\%$（4.5M vs 12.3M 参数），快了 $80\%$（26.2fps vs 14.3fps on $720\times576$ 帧），而没有牺牲太多性能。源代码可在 https://github.com/llmpass/RSTT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RSTT模型，通过空间-时序Transformer实现视频的时空超分辨率，同时提升帧率和分辨率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的方法虽能获得视觉满意结果，但因结构复杂导致推理速度慢，难以满足实时需求。
AI.method: 设计单一体的时空Transformer架构，通过编码器生成可复用字典，解码器据此合成高帧率与高分辨率视频，无需分离时空模块。
AI.result: 相比TMNet，模型参数减少60%（4.5M vs 12.3M），速度提升80%（26.2fps vs 14.3fps），性能损失极小。
AI.conclusion: RSTT通过统一架构实现高效时空超分辨率，在保持性能的同时显著提升推理速度，适合实时应用。

title: Benchmarking Deep AUROC Optimization: Loss Functions and Algorithmic Choices
title_zh: 深度 AUROC 优化基准测试：损失函数和算法选择
abstract: The area under the ROC curve (AUROC) has been vigorously applied for imbalanced classification and moreover combined with deep learning techniques. However, there is no existing work that provides sound information for peers to choose appropriate deep AUROC maximization techniques. In this work, we fill this gap from three aspects. (i) We benchmark a variety of loss functions with different algorithmic choices for deep AUROC optimization problem. We study the loss functions in two categories: pairwise loss and composite loss, which includes a total of 10 loss functions. Interestingly, we find composite loss, as an innovative loss function class, shows more competitive performance than pairwise loss from both training convergence and testing generalization perspectives. Nevertheless, data with more corrupted labels favors a pairwise symmetric loss. (ii) Moreover, we benchmark and highlight the essential algorithmic choices such as positive sampling rate, regularization, normalization/activation, and optimizers. Key findings include: higher positive sampling rate is likely to be beneficial for deep AUROC maximization; different datasets favors different weights of regularizations; appropriate normalization techniques, such as sigmoid and $\ell_2$ score normalization, could improve model performance. (iii) For optimization aspect, we benchmark SGD-type, Momentum-type, and Adam-type optimizers for both pairwise and composite loss. Our findings show that although Adam-type method is more competitive from training perspective, but it does not outperform others from testing perspective.
summary: The area under the ROC curve (AUROC) has been vigorously applied for imbalanced classification and moreover combined with deep learning techniques. However, there is no existing work that provides sound information for peers to choose appropriate deep AUROC maximization techniques. In this work, we fill this gap from three aspects. (i) We benchmark a variety of loss functions with different algorithmic choices for deep AUROC optimization problem. We study the loss functions in two categories: pairwise loss and composite loss, which includes a total of 10 loss functions. Interestingly, we find composite loss, as an innovative loss function class, shows more competitive performance than pairwise loss from both training convergence and testing generalization perspectives. Nevertheless, data with more corrupted labels favors a pairwise symmetric loss. (ii) Moreover, we benchmark and highlight the essential algorithmic choices such as positive sampling rate, regularization, normalization/activation, and optimizers. Key findings include: higher positive sampling rate is likely to be beneficial for deep AUROC maximization; different datasets favors different weights of regularizations; appropriate normalization techniques, such as sigmoid and $\ell_2$ score normalization, could improve model performance. (iii) For optimization aspect, we benchmark SGD-type, Momentum-type, and Adam-type optimizers for both pairwise and composite loss. Our findings show that although Adam-type method is more competitive from training perspective, but it does not outperform others from testing perspective.
abstract_zh: ROC曲线下面积（AUROC）已被大力应用于不平衡分类，并且与深度学习技术相结合。然而，现有的工作还没有为同行提供可靠的信息来选择合适的深度 AUROC 最大化技术。在这项工作中，我们从三个方面填补了这一空白。 (i) 我们对深度 AUROC 优化问题的不同算法选择的各种损失函数进行基准测试。我们研究两类损失函数：pairwise loss和composite loss，总共包括10个损失函数。有趣的是，我们发现复合损失作为一种创新的损失函数类别，从训练收敛和测试泛化的角度来看，都比成对损失表现出更具竞争力的性能。然而，具有更多损坏标签的数据有利于成对对称损失。 (ii) 此外，我们对基本的算法选择进行了基准测试并重点介绍，例如正采样率、正则化、标准化/激活和优化器。主要发现包括：较高的正采样率可能有利于深度 AUROC 最大化；不同的数据集有利于不同的正则化权重；适当的标准化技术，例如 sigmoid 和 $\ell_2$ 分数标准化，可以提高模型性能。 (iii) 对于优化方面，我们对 SGD 型、动量型和 Adam 型优化器的成对损失和复合损失进行基准测试。我们的研究结果表明，虽然 Adam 型方法从训练角度更具竞争力，但从测试角度来看它并没有优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文针对深度学习中AUROC优化问题，系统评估了多种损失函数及算法选择的有效性，旨在为不平衡分类任务提供指导。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对深度AUROC最大化技术的系统性比较，导致同行难以选择合适方法。本文通过基准测试填补这一空白。
AI.method: 将损失函数分为成对损失和复合损失两类（共10种），并评估正样本采样率、正则化、归一化等算法选择，对比SGD、Momentum和Adam等优化器在不同损失函数下的表现。
AI.result: 复合损失在训练收敛性和测试泛化性上优于成对损失，但噪声数据更适合对称成对损失；高正样本采样率和特定归一化技术（如sigmoid）提升性能；Adam在训练阶段表现优异但测试阶段不占优。
AI.conclusion: 复合损失和算法优化策略能有效提升深度AUROC性能，需根据数据特性（如标签噪声）和任务需求选择合适方法。

title: A Speech Representation Anonymization Framework via Selective Noise Perturbation
title_zh: 通过选择性噪声扰动的语音表示匿名化框架
abstract: Privacy and security are major concerns when communicating speech signals to cloud services such as automatic speech recognition (ASR) and speech emotion recognition (SER). Existing solutions for speech anonymization mainly focus on voice conversion or voice modification to convert a raw utterance into another one with similar content but different, or no, identity-related information. However, an alternative approach to share speech data under the form of privacy-preserving representation has been largely under-explored. In this paper, we propose a speech anonymization framework that achieves privacy via noise perturbation to a selected subset of the high-utility representations extracted using a pre-trained speech encoder. The subset is chosen with a Transformer-based privacy-risk saliency estimator. We validate our framework on four tasks, namely, Automatic Speaker Verification (ASV), ASR, SER and Intent Classification (IC) for privacy and utility assessment. Experimental results show that our approach is able to achieve a competitive, or even better, utility compared to the speech anonymization baselines from the VoicePrivacy2022 Challenges, providing the same level of privacy. Moreover, the easily-controlled amount of perturbation allows our framework to have a flexible range of privacy-utility trade-offs without re-training any component.

Existing solutions for speech anonymization mainly focus on voice conversion or voice modification to convert a raw utterance into another one with similar content but different, or no, identity-related information. However, an alternative approach to share speech data under the form of privacy-preserving representation has been largely under-explored. In this paper, we propose a speech anonymization framework that achieves privacy via noise perturbation to a selected subset of the high-utility representations extracted using a pre-trained speech encoder. The subset is chosen with a Transformer-based privacy-risk saliency estimator. We validate our framework on four tasks, namely, Automatic Speaker Verification (ASV), ASR, SER and Intent Classification (IC) for privacy and utility assessment. Experimental results show that our approach is able to achieve a competitive, or even better, utility compared to the speech anonymization baselines from the VoicePrivacy2022 Challenges, providing the same level of privacy. Moreover, the easily-controlled amount of perturbation allows our framework to have a flexible range of privacy-utility trade-offs without re-training any component.
abstract_zh: 将语音信号传输到自动语音识别 (ASR) 和语音情感识别 (SER) 等云服务时，隐私和安全是主要问题。现有的语音匿名化解决方案主要集中于语音转换或语音修改，将原始话语转换为内容相似但不同或没有身份相关信息的另一种话语。然而，在隐私保护表示形式下共享语音数据的替代方法在很大程度上尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种语音匿名化框架，该框架通过对使用预训练语音编码器提取的高实用性表示的选定子集进行噪声扰动来实现隐私。该子集是使用基于 Transformer 的隐私风险显着性估计器选择的。我们在四项任务上验证了我们的框架，即自动说话人验证（ASV）、ASR、SER 和用于隐私和效用评估的意图分类（IC）。实验结果表明，与 VoicePrivacy2022 挑战赛中的语音匿名化基线相比，我们的方法能够实现具有竞争力甚至更好的实用性，并提供相同级别的隐私。此外，易于控制的扰动量使我们的框架能够在隐私与实用性之间进行灵活的权衡，而无需重新训练任何组件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过选择性噪声扰动实现语音表示匿名化的框架，以在保护隐私的同时保持语音数据的效用。
AI.motivation: 现有语音匿名化方法主要依赖语音转换或修改，但通过隐私保护表示共享数据的研究较少，且需平衡隐私与效用。
AI.method: 使用预训练语音编码器提取高效表示，结合基于Transformer的隐私风险显著性估计器选择扰动子集，并添加可控噪声扰动。
AI.result: 在ASV、ASR、SER和IC任务中，该框架在保持同等隐私保护水平下，效用优于或等于VoicePrivacy2022挑战赛基线方法，且无需重新训练即可灵活调整隐私-效用权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过选择性噪声扰动有效实现语音匿名化，在隐私保护与数据效用间提供了灵活可控的平衡方案。

search_text: A Speech Representation Anonymization Framework via Selective Noise Perturbation 通过选择性噪声扰动的语音表示匿名化框架 Privacy and security are major concerns when communicating speech signals to cloud services such as automatic speech recognition (ASR) and speech emotion recognition (SER). Existing solutions for speech anonymization mainly focus on voice conversion or voice modification to convert a raw utterance into another one with similar content but different, or no, identity-related information. However, an alternative approach to share speech data under the form of privacy-preserving representation has been largely under-explored. In this paper, we propose a speech anonymization framework that achieves privacy via noise perturbation to a selected subset of the high-utility representations extracted using a pre-trained speech encoder. The subset is chosen with a Transformer-based privacy-risk saliency estimator. We validate our framework on four tasks, namely, Automatic Speaker Verification (ASV), ASR, SER and Intent Classification (IC) for privacy and utility assessment. Experimental results show that our approach is able to achieve a competitive, or even better, utility compared to the speech anonymization baselines from the VoicePrivacy2022 Challenges, providing the same level of privacy. Moreover, the easily-controlled amount of perturbation allows our framework to have a flexible range of privacy-utility trade-offs without re-training any component. 将语音信号传输到自动语音识别 (ASR) 和语音情感识别 (SER) 等云服务时，隐私和安全是主要问题。现有的语音匿名化解决方案主要集中于语音转换或语音修改，将原始话语转换为内容相似但不同或没有身份相关信息的另一种话语。然而，在隐私保护表示形式下共享语音数据的替代方法在很大程度上尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种语音匿名化框架，该框架通过对使用预训练语音编码器提取的高实用性表示的选定子集进行噪声扰动来实现隐私。该子集是使用基于 Transformer 的隐私风险显着性估计器选择的。我们在四项任务上验证了我们的框架，即自动说话人验证（ASV）、ASR、SER 和用于隐私和效用评估的意图分类（IC）。实验结果表明，与 VoicePrivacy2022 挑战赛中的语音匿名化基线相比，我们的方法能够实现具有竞争力甚至更好的实用性，并提供相同级别的隐私。此外，易于控制的扰动量使我们的框架能够在隐私与实用性之间进行灵活的权衡，而无需重新训练任何组件。 本文提出一种通过选择性噪声扰动实现语音表示匿名化的框架，以在保护隐私的同时保持语音数据的效用。 Minh Tran,Mohammad Soleymani eess.AS,cs.CR,cs.SD

authors_text: Enes Dedeoglu,Himmet Toprak Kesgin,Mehmet Fatih Amasyali
title: A Robust Optimization Method for Label Noisy Datasets Based on Adaptive Threshold: Adaptive-k
title_zh: 基于自适应阈值的标签噪声数据集鲁棒优化方法：Adaptive-k
abstract: SGD does not produce robust results on datasets with label noise. Because the gradients calculated according to the losses of the noisy samples cause the optimization process to go in the wrong direction. In this paper, as an alternative to SGD, we recommend using samples with loss less than a threshold value determined during the optimization process, instead of using all samples in the mini-batch. Our proposed method, Adaptive-k, aims to exclude label noise samples from the optimization process and make the process robust. On noisy datasets, we found that using a threshold-based approach, such as Adaptive-k, produces better results than using all samples or a fixed number of low-loss samples in the mini-batch. Based on our theoretical analysis and experimental results, we show that the Adaptive-k method is closest to the performance of the oracle, in which noisy samples are entirely removed from the dataset. Adaptive-k is a simple but effective method. It does not require prior knowledge of the noise ratio of the dataset, does not require additional model training, and does not increase training time significantly. The code for Adaptive-k is available at https://github.com/enesdedeoglu-TR/Adaptive-k
summary: SGD does not produce robust results on datasets with label noise. Because the gradients calculated according to the losses of the noisy samples cause the optimization process to go in the wrong direction. In this paper, as an alternative to SGD, we recommend using samples with loss less than a threshold value determined during the optimization process, instead of using all samples in the mini-batch. Our proposed method, Adaptive-k, aims to exclude label noise samples from the optimization process and make the process robust. On noisy datasets, we found that using a threshold-based approach, such as Adaptive-k, produces better results than using all samples or a fixed number of low-loss samples in the mini-batch. Based on our theoretical analysis and experimental results, we show that the Adaptive-k method is closest to the performance of the oracle, in which noisy samples are entirely removed from the dataset. Adaptive-k is a simple but effective method. It does not require prior knowledge of the noise ratio of the dataset, does not require additional model training, and does not increase training time significantly. The code for Adaptive-k is available at https://github.com/enesdedeoglu-TR/Adaptive-k
abstract_zh: SGD 不会在带有标签噪声的数据集上产生稳健的结果。因为根据噪声样本的损失计算的梯度会导致优化过程走向错误的方向。在本文中，作为 SGD 的替代方案，我们建议使用损失小于优化过程中确定的阈值的样本，而不是使用小批量中的所有样本。我们提出的方法 Adaptive-k 旨在从优化过程中排除标签噪声样本并使过程变得鲁棒。在噪声数据集上，我们发现使用基于阈值的方法（例如 Adaptive-k）比在小批量中使用所有样本或固定数量的低损失样本能产生更好的结果。基于我们的理论分析和实验结果，我们表明 Adaptive-k 方法最接近预言机的性能，其中噪声样本完全从数据集中去除。 Adaptive-k是一种简单但有效的方法。它不需要先验了解数据集的噪声比，不需要额外的模型训练，并且不会显着增加训练时间。 Adaptive-k 的代码位于 https://github.com/enesdedeoglu-TR/Adaptive-k

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自适应阈值的优化方法Adaptive-k，用于处理标签噪声数据集，通过动态筛选低损失样本提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统SGD在标签噪声数据上表现不佳，因噪声样本的梯度会误导优化方向，需设计无需先验噪声比例且无需额外训练的鲁棒方法。
AI.method: 在优化过程中动态确定阈值，仅使用损失低于阈值的样本进行训练，替代固定数量低损失样本或全部样本的mini-batch策略。
AI.result: 在噪声数据集上，Adaptive-k的性能优于传统方法且接近理想情况（完全移除噪声样本），训练时间增加有限。
AI.conclusion: Adaptive-k是一种简单有效的标签噪声鲁棒优化方法，无需噪声比例先验知识，适用于实际场景的噪声数据训练。

authors_text: Chak Ho Chan,Kaizhi Qian,Yang Zhang,Mark Hasegawa-Johnson
title: SpeechSplit 2.0: Unsupervised speech disentanglement for voice conversion Without tuning autoencoder Bottlenecks
title_zh: SpeechSplit 2.0：用于语音转换的无监督语音解缠，无需调整自动编码器瓶颈
abstract: SpeechSplit can perform aspect-specific voice conversion by disentangling speech into content, rhythm, pitch, and timbre using multiple autoencoders in an unsupervised manner. However, SpeechSplit requires careful tuning of the autoencoder bottlenecks, which can be time-consuming and less robust. This paper proposes SpeechSplit 2.0, which constrains the information flow of the speech component to be disentangled on the autoencoder input using efficient signal processing methods instead of bottleneck tuning. Evaluation results show that SpeechSplit 2.0 achieves comparable performance to SpeechSplit in speech disentanglement and superior robustness to the bottleneck size variations. Our code is available at https://github.com/biggytruck/SpeechSplit2.
summary: SpeechSplit can perform aspect-specific voice conversion by disentangling speech into content, rhythm, pitch, and timbre using multiple autoencoders in an unsupervised manner. However, SpeechSplit requires careful tuning of the autoencoder bottlenecks, which can be time-consuming and less robust. This paper proposes SpeechSplit 2.0, which constrains the information flow of the speech component to be disentangled on the autoencoder input using efficient signal processing methods instead of bottleneck tuning. Evaluation results show that SpeechSplit 2.0 achieves comparable performance to SpeechSplit in speech disentanglement and superior robustness to the bottleneck size variations. Our code is available at https://github.com/biggytruck/SpeechSplit2.
abstract_zh: SpeechSplit 可以通过使用多个自动编码器以无监督的方式将语音分解为内容、节奏、音调和音色，从而执行特定方面的语音转换。然而，SpeechSplit 需要仔细调整自动编码器瓶颈，这可能非常耗时且鲁棒性较差。本文提出了 SpeechSplit 2.0，它使用高效的信号处理方法而不是瓶颈调整来约束语音分量的信息流在自动编码器输入上解开。评估结果表明，SpeechSplit 2.0 在语音解缠结方面实现了与 SpeechSplit 相当的性能，并且对瓶颈大小变化具有出色的鲁棒性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/biggytruck/SpeechSplit2 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpeechSplit 2.0，通过无需调整自编码器瓶颈的高效信号处理方法实现无监督语音解耦，用于语音转换任务。
AI.motivation: 原版SpeechSplit需耗时且不稳健地手动调整自编码器瓶颈参数，影响实际应用效果。
AI.method: 采用信号处理技术约束语音组件信息流，在自编码器输入端实现内容、节奏、音高和音色的解耦，替代传统瓶颈调优方式。
AI.result: 实验表明SpeechSplit 2.0在语音解耦性能与原版相当，且对瓶颈尺寸变化具有更强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效解决了瓶颈调优难题，代码开源便于复现与应用。

search_text: SpeechSplit 2.0: Unsupervised speech disentanglement for voice conversion Without tuning autoencoder Bottlenecks SpeechSplit 2.0：用于语音转换的无监督语音解缠，无需调整自动编码器瓶颈 SpeechSplit can perform aspect-specific voice conversion by disentangling speech into content, rhythm, pitch, and timbre using multiple autoencoders in an unsupervised manner. However, SpeechSplit requires careful tuning of the autoencoder bottlenecks, which can be time-consuming and less robust. This paper proposes SpeechSplit 2.0, which constrains the information flow of the speech component to be disentangled on the autoencoder input using efficient signal processing methods instead of bottleneck tuning. Evaluation results show that SpeechSplit 2.0 achieves comparable performance to SpeechSplit in speech disentanglement and superior robustness to the bottleneck size variations. Our code is available at https://github.com/biggytruck/SpeechSplit2. SpeechSplit 可以通过使用多个自动编码器以无监督的方式将语音分解为内容、节奏、音调和音色，从而执行特定方面的语音转换。然而，SpeechSplit 需要仔细调整自动编码器瓶颈，这可能非常耗时且鲁棒性较差。本文提出了 SpeechSplit 2.0，它使用高效的信号处理方法而不是瓶颈调整来约束语音分量的信息流在自动编码器输入上解开。评估结果表明，SpeechSplit 2.0 在语音解缠结方面实现了与 SpeechSplit 相当的性能，并且对瓶颈大小变化具有出色的鲁棒性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/biggytruck/SpeechSplit2 获取。 本文提出SpeechSplit 2.0，通过无需调整自编码器瓶颈的高效信号处理方法实现无监督语音解耦，用于语音转换任务。 Chak Ho Chan,Kaizhi Qian,Yang Zhang,Mark Hasegawa-Johnson eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.SD

authors_text: Harrison Delecki,Masha Itkina,Bernard Lange,Ransalu Senanayake,Mykel J. Kochenderfer
title: How Do We Fail? Stress Testing Perception in Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 我们怎么会失败？自动驾驶汽车的压力测试感知
abstract: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) rely on environment perception and behavior prediction to reason about agents in their surroundings. These perception systems must be robust to adverse weather such as rain, fog, and snow. However, validation of these systems is challenging due to their complexity and dependence on observation histories. This paper presents a method for characterizing failures of LiDAR-based perception systems for AVs in adverse weather conditions. We develop a methodology based in reinforcement learning to find likely failures in object tracking and trajectory prediction due to sequences of disturbances. We apply disturbances using a physics-based data augmentation technique for simulating LiDAR point clouds in adverse weather conditions. Experiments performed across a wide range of driving scenarios from a real-world driving dataset show that our proposed approach finds high likelihood failures with smaller input disturbances compared to baselines while remaining computationally tractable. Identified failures can inform future development of robust perception systems for AVs.
summary: Autonomous vehicles (AVs) rely on environment perception and behavior prediction to reason about agents in their surroundings. These perception systems must be robust to adverse weather such as rain, fog, and snow. However, validation of these systems is challenging due to their complexity and dependence on observation histories. This paper presents a method for characterizing failures of LiDAR-based perception systems for AVs in adverse weather conditions. We develop a methodology based in reinforcement learning to find likely failures in object tracking and trajectory prediction due to sequences of disturbances. We apply disturbances using a physics-based data augmentation technique for simulating LiDAR point clouds in adverse weather conditions. Experiments performed across a wide range of driving scenarios from a real-world driving dataset show that our proposed approach finds high likelihood failures with smaller input disturbances compared to baselines while remaining computationally tractable. Identified failures can inform future development of robust perception systems for AVs.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 依靠环境感知和行为预测来推理周围环境中的智能体。这些感知系统必须能够应对雨、雾和雪等恶劣天气。然而，由于这些系统的复杂性和对观测历史的依赖，这些系统的验证具有挑战性。本文提出了一种描述恶劣天气条件下自动驾驶汽车基于激光雷达的感知系统故障的方法。我们开发了一种基于强化学习的方法，以发现由于干扰序列而导致的对象跟踪和轨迹预测中可能出现的故障。我们使用基于物理的数据增强技术应用干扰来模拟恶劣天气条件下的激光雷达点云。在现实世界驾驶数据集中的各种驾驶场景中进行的实验表明，我们提出的方法发现与基线相比输入干扰更小的高可能性故障，同时保持计算上的可处理性。识别出的故障可以为未来开发强大的自动驾驶感知系统提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的方法，用于在恶劣天气条件下测试自动驾驶车辆的LiDAR感知系统的失效情况。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆的感知系统需应对雨、雾、雪等恶劣天气，但现有验证方法因系统复杂性和对观测历史的依赖而面临挑战。
AI.method: 结合强化学习与基于物理的数据增强技术，模拟恶劣天气下的LiDAR点云，识别目标跟踪和轨迹预测中的潜在失效序列。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在较小输入扰动下能高效发现高概率失效场景，且计算复杂度可控。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可为自动驾驶车辆的鲁棒感知系统开发提供失效场景指导。

authors_text: Jie Zhang,Jun Li,Yijin Zhang,Qingqing Wu,Xiongwei Wu,Feng Shu,Shi Jin,Wen Chen
title: Collaborative Intelligent Reflecting Surface Networks with Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 具有多智能体强化学习的协作智能反射表面网络
abstract: Intelligent reflecting surface (IRS) is envisioned to be widely applied in future wireless networks. In this paper, we investigate a multi-user communication system assisted by cooperative IRS devices with the capability of energy harvesting. Aiming to maximize the long-term average achievable system rate, an optimization problem is formulated by jointly designing the transmit beamforming at the base station (BS) and discrete phase shift beamforming at the IRSs, with the constraints on transmit power, user data rate requirement and IRS energy buffer size. Considering time-varying channels and stochastic arrivals of energy harvested by the IRSs, we first formulate the problem as a Markov decision process (MDP) and then develop a novel multi-agent Q-mix (MAQ) framework with two layers to decouple the optimization parameters. The higher layer is for optimizing phase shift resolutions, and the lower one is for phase shift beamforming and power allocation. Since the phase shift optimization is an integer programming problem with a large-scale action space, we improve MAQ by incorporating the Wolpertinger method, namely, MAQ-WP algorithm to achieve a sub-optimality with reduced dimensions of action space. In addition, as MAQ-WP is still of high complexity to achieve good performance, we propose a policy gradient-based MAQ algorithm, namely, MAQ-PG, by mapping the discrete phase shift actions into a continuous space at the cost of a slight performance loss. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed MAQ-WP and MAQ-PG algorithms can converge faster and achieve data rate improvements of 10.7% and 8.8% over the conventional multi-agent DDPG, respectively.
summary: Intelligent reflecting surface (IRS) is envisioned to be widely applied in future wireless networks. In this paper, we investigate a multi-user communication system assisted by cooperative IRS devices with the capability of energy harvesting. Aiming to maximize the long-term average achievable system rate, an optimization problem is formulated by jointly designing the transmit beamforming at the base station (BS) and discrete phase shift beamforming at the IRSs, with the constraints on transmit power, user data rate requirement and IRS energy buffer size. Considering time-varying channels and stochastic arrivals of energy harvested by the IRSs, we first formulate the problem as a Markov decision process (MDP) and then develop a novel multi-agent Q-mix (MAQ) framework with two layers to decouple the optimization parameters. The higher layer is for optimizing phase shift resolutions, and the lower one is for phase shift beamforming and power allocation. Since the phase shift optimization is an integer programming problem with a large-scale action space, we improve MAQ by incorporating the Wolpertinger method, namely, MAQ-WP algorithm to achieve a sub-optimality with reduced dimensions of action space. In addition, as MAQ-WP is still of high complexity to achieve good performance, we propose a policy gradient-based MAQ algorithm, namely, MAQ-PG, by mapping the discrete phase shift actions into a continuous space at the cost of a slight performance loss. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed MAQ-WP and MAQ-PG algorithms can converge faster and achieve data rate improvements of 10.7% and 8.8% over the conventional multi-agent DDPG, respectively.
abstract_zh: 智能反射面（IRS）有望在未来的无线网络中得到广泛应用。在本文中，我们研究了由具有能量收集能力的协作IRS设备辅助的多用户通信系统。为了最大化长期平均可实现的系统速率，通过联合设计基站（BS）处的发射波束成形和IRS处的离散相移波束成形来制定优化问题，并限制发射功率、用户数据速率要求和IRS能量缓冲区大小。考虑到 IRS 收集的能量的时变通道和随机到达，我们首先将问题表述为马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP)，然后开发一种新颖的两层多智能体 Q-mix (MAQ) 框架来解耦优化参数。较高层用于优化相移分辨率，较低层用于相移波束形成和功率分配。由于相移优化是一个具有大规模动作空间的整数规划问题，因此我们通过结合Wolpertinger方法来改进MAQ，即MAQ-WP算法，以实现动作空间维度降低的次优性。此外，由于MAQ-WP实现良好性能的复杂度仍然很高，因此我们提出了一种基于策略梯度的MAQ算法，即MAQ-PG，通过将离散相移动作映射到连续空间，但代价是轻微的性能损失。仿真结果表明，所提出的 MAQ-WP 和 MAQ-PG 算法能够更快地收敛，并且比传统的多智能体 DDPG 分别提高了 10.7% 和 8.8% 的数据速率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了利用协作智能反射面（IRS）设备和多智能体强化学习优化多用户通信系统的方法，旨在最大化长期平均系统速率。
AI.motivation: 智能反射面（IRS）有望提升未来无线网络性能，但现有方法难以应对动态信道和IRS能量收集的随机性，需更高效的优化框架。
AI.method: 将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），设计分层多智能体Q-mix（MAQ）框架，结合Wolpertinger方法（MAQ-WP）和策略梯度算法（MAQ-PG）降低复杂度。
AI.result: 仿真表明，MAQ-WP和MAQ-PG算法分别比传统多智能体DDPG提升数据速率10.7%和8.8%，且收敛速度更快。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法有效平衡了IRS相移优化的复杂性与性能，为动态无线网络中的协作IRS部署提供了可行方案。

Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed MAQ-WP and MAQ-PG algorithms can converge faster and achieve data rate improvements of 10.7% and 8.8% over the conventional multi-agent DDPG, respectively. 智能反射面（IRS）有望在未来的无线网络中得到广泛应用。在本文中，我们研究了由具有能量收集能力的协作IRS设备辅助的多用户通信系统。为了最大化长期平均可实现的系统速率，通过联合设计基站（BS）处的发射波束成形和IRS处的离散相移波束成形来制定优化问题，并限制发射功率、用户数据速率要求和IRS能量缓冲区大小。考虑到 IRS 收集的能量的时变通道和随机到达，我们首先将问题表述为马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP)，然后开发一种新颖的两层多智能体 Q-mix (MAQ) 框架来解耦优化参数。较高层用于优化相移分辨率，较低层用于相移波束形成和功率分配。由于相移优化是一个具有大规模动作空间的整数规划问题，因此我们通过结合Wolpertinger方法来改进MAQ，即MAQ-WP算法，以实现动作空间维度降低的次优性。此外，由于MAQ-WP实现良好性能的复杂度仍然很高，因此我们提出了一种基于策略梯度的MAQ算法，即MAQ-PG，通过将离散相移动作映射到连续空间，但代价是轻微的性能损失。仿真结果表明，所提出的 MAQ-WP 和 MAQ-PG 算法能够更快地收敛，并且比传统的多智能体 DDPG 分别提高了 10.7% 和 8.8% 的数据速率。 本文研究了利用协作智能反射面（IRS）设备和多智能体强化学习优化多用户通信系统的方法，旨在最大化长期平均系统速率。 Jie Zhang,Jun Li,Yijin Zhang,Qingqing Wu,Xiongwei Wu,Feng Shu,Shi Jin,Wen Chen cs.MA,cs.AI,eess.SP

authors_text: Yujiao Shi,Xin Yu,Liu Liu,Dylan Campbell,Piotr Koniusz,Hongdong Li
title: Accurate 3-DoF Camera Geo-Localization via Ground-to-Satellite Image Matching
title_zh: 通过地对卫星图像匹配进行精确的 3-DoF 相机地理定位
abstract: We address the problem of ground-to-satellite image geo-localization, that is, estimating the camera latitude, longitude and orientation (azimuth angle) by matching a query image captured at the ground level against a large-scale database with geotagged satellite images. Our prior arts treat the above task as pure image retrieval by selecting the most similar satellite reference image matching the ground-level query image. However, such an approach often produces coarse location estimates because the geotag of the retrieved satellite image only corresponds to the image center while the ground camera can be located at any point within the image. To further consolidate our prior research findings, we present a novel geometry-aware geo-localization method. Our new method is able to achieve the fine-grained location of a query image, up to pixel size precision of the satellite image, once its coarse location and orientation have been determined. Moreover, we propose a new geometry-aware image retrieval pipeline to improve the coarse localization accuracy. Apart from a polar transform in our conference work, this new pipeline also maps satellite image pixels to the ground-level plane in the ground-view via a geometry-constrained projective transform to emphasize informative regions, such as road structures, for cross-view geo-localization. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our newly proposed framework. We also significantly improve the performance of coarse localization results compared to the state-of-the-art in terms of location recalls.
summary: We address the problem of ground-to-satellite image geo-localization, that is, estimating the camera latitude, longitude and orientation (azimuth angle) by matching a query image captured at the ground level against a large-scale database with geotagged satellite images. Our prior arts treat the above task as pure image retrieval by selecting the most similar satellite reference image matching the ground-level query image. However, such an approach often produces coarse location estimates because the geotag of the retrieved satellite image only corresponds to the image center while the ground camera can be located at any point within the image. To further consolidate our prior research findings, we present a novel geometry-aware geo-localization method. Our new method is able to achieve the fine-grained location of a query image, up to pixel size precision of the satellite image, once its coarse location and orientation have been determined. Moreover, we propose a new geometry-aware image retrieval pipeline to improve the coarse localization accuracy. Apart from a polar transform in our conference work, this new pipeline also maps satellite image pixels to the ground-level plane in the ground-view via a geometry-constrained projective transform to emphasize informative regions, such as road structures, for cross-view geo-localization. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our newly proposed framework. We also significantly improve the performance of coarse localization results compared to the state-of-the-art in terms of location recalls.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了地面到卫星图像地理定位的问题，即通过将地面捕获的查询图像与带有地理标记的卫星图像的大型数据库进行匹配来估计相机的纬度、经度和方向（方位角）。我们的现有技术通过选择与地面查询图像匹配的最相似的卫星参考图像来将上述任务视为纯粹的图像检索。然而，这种方法通常会产生粗略的位置估计，因为检索到的卫星图像的地理标签仅对应于图像中心，而地面相机可以位于图像内的任何点。为了进一步巩固我们之前的研究成果，我们提出了一种新颖的几何感知地理定位方法。一旦确定了查询图像的粗略位置和方向，我们的新方法就能够实现查询图像的细粒度定位，达到卫星图像的像素大小精度。此外，我们提出了一种新的几何感知图像检索管道来提高粗略定位精度。除了我们会议工作中的极坐标变换之外，这个新管道还通过几何约束投影变换将卫星图像像素映射到地面视图中的地平面，以强调信息区域，例如道路结构，以进行跨视图地理定位。广泛的定量和定性实验证明了我们新提出的框架的有效性。与位置召回方面的最新技术相比，我们还显着提高了粗略定位结果的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于地面与卫星图像匹配的3自由度相机地理定位方法，旨在精确估计相机的经纬度和方位角。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过图像检索获取卫星图像中心点的粗略位置，无法准确反映地面相机在图像中的实际位置，导致定位精度不足。
AI.method: 提出几何感知的定位框架，结合几何约束投影变换将卫星图像像素映射到地面平面，并设计新的图像检索流程以提升粗定位精度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在位置召回率上显著优于现有技术，可实现卫星图像像素级的精细定位。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何感知的图像匹配与检索优化，本文有效提升了地面相机地理定位的精度与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Yifan Gong,Yuguang Yao,Yize Li,Yimeng Zhang,Xiaoming Liu,Xue Lin,Sijia Liu
title: Reverse Engineering of Imperceptible Adversarial Image Perturbations
title_zh: 难以察觉的对抗性图像扰动的逆向工程
abstract: It has been well recognized that neural network based image classifiers are easily fooled by images with tiny perturbations crafted by an adversary. There has been a vast volume of research to generate and defend such adversarial attacks. However, the following problem is left unexplored: How to reverse-engineer adversarial perturbations from an adversarial image? This leads to a new adversarial learning paradigm--Reverse Engineering of Deceptions (RED). If successful, RED allows us to estimate adversarial perturbations and recover the original images. However, carefully crafted, tiny adversarial perturbations are difficult to recover by optimizing a unilateral RED objective. For example, the pure image denoising method may overfit to minimizing the reconstruction error but hardly preserve the classification properties of the true adversarial perturbations. To tackle this challenge, we formalize the RED problem and identify a set of principles crucial to the RED approach design. Particularly, we find that prediction alignment and proper data augmentation (in terms of spatial transformations) are two criteria to achieve a generalizable RED approach. By integrating these RED principles with image denoising, we propose a new Class-Discriminative Denoising based RED framework, termed CDD-RED. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of CDD-RED under different evaluation metrics (ranging from the pixel-level, prediction-level to the attribution-level alignment) and a variety of attack generation methods (e.g., FGSM, PGD, CW, AutoAttack, and adaptive attacks).
summary: It has been well recognized that neural network based image classifiers are easily fooled by images with tiny perturbations crafted by an adversary. There has been a vast volume of research to generate and defend such adversarial attacks. However, the following problem is left unexplored: How to reverse-engineer adversarial perturbations from an adversarial image? This leads to a new adversarial learning paradigm--Reverse Engineering of Deceptions (RED). If successful, RED allows us to estimate adversarial perturbations and recover the original images. However, carefully crafted, tiny adversarial perturbations are difficult to recover by optimizing a unilateral RED objective. For example, the pure image denoising method may overfit to minimizing the reconstruction error but hardly preserve the classification properties of the true adversarial perturbations. To tackle this challenge, we formalize the RED problem and identify a set of principles crucial to the RED approach design. Particularly, we find that prediction alignment and proper data augmentation (in terms of spatial transformations) are two criteria to achieve a generalizable RED approach. By integrating these RED principles with image denoising, we propose a new Class-Discriminative Denoising based RED framework, termed CDD-RED. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of CDD-RED under different evaluation metrics (ranging from the pixel-level, prediction-level to the attribution-level alignment) and a variety of attack generation methods (e.g., FGSM, PGD, CW, AutoAttack, and adaptive attacks).
abstract_zh: 众所周知，基于神经网络的图像分类器很容易被对手制作的具有微小扰动的图像所欺骗。人们已经进行了大量的研究来生成和防御此类对抗性攻击。然而，以下问题尚未得到解决：如何从对抗性图像中逆向工程对抗性扰动？这导致了一种新的对抗性学习范式——欺骗逆向工程（RED）。如果成功，RED 可以让我们估计对抗性扰动并恢复原始图像。然而，精心设计的微小对抗扰动很难通过优化单边 RED 目标来恢复。例如，纯图像去噪方法可能会过度拟合以最小化重建误差，但很难保留真实对抗性扰动的分类属性。为了应对这一挑战，我们将 RED 问题形式化，并确定了一组对 RED 方法设计至关重要的原则。特别是，我们发现预测对齐和适当的数据增强（在空间变换方面）是实现可推广的 RED 方法的两个标准。通过将这些 RED 原理与图像去噪相结合，我们提出了一种新的基于类别判别去噪的 RED 框架，称为 CDD-RED。大量实验证明了 CDD-RED 在不同评估指标（从像素级、预测级到归因级对齐）和各种攻击生成方法（例如 FGSM、PGD、CW、AutoAttack 和自适应攻击）下的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CDD-RED的框架，用于从对抗样本中逆向工程出不可感知的对抗性图像扰动，并恢复原始图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以通过单边优化目标恢复精心设计的微小对抗扰动，纯图像去噪方法可能过度拟合重建误差而无法保留对抗扰动的分类特性。
AI.method: 通过形式化RED问题，提出预测对齐和空间变换数据增强原则，结合图像去噪与分类判别性去噪，构建CDD-RED框架。
AI.result: CDD-RED在像素级、预测级和归因级对齐指标上均表现出色，适用于FGSM、PGD、CW等多种攻击方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入分类判别性和数据增强原则，CDD-RED有效提升了对抗扰动的逆向工程能力，为防御对抗攻击提供了新思路。

Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of CDD-RED under different evaluation metrics (ranging from the pixel-level, prediction-level to the attribution-level alignment) and a variety of attack generation methods (e.g., FGSM, PGD, CW, AutoAttack, and adaptive attacks). 众所周知，基于神经网络的图像分类器很容易被对手制作的具有微小扰动的图像所欺骗。人们已经进行了大量的研究来生成和防御此类对抗性攻击。然而，以下问题尚未得到解决：如何从对抗性图像中逆向工程对抗性扰动？这导致了一种新的对抗性学习范式——欺骗逆向工程（RED）。如果成功，RED 可以让我们估计对抗性扰动并恢复原始图像。然而，精心设计的微小对抗扰动很难通过优化单边 RED 目标来恢复。例如，纯图像去噪方法可能会过度拟合以最小化重建误差，但很难保留真实对抗性扰动的分类属性。为了应对这一挑战，我们将 RED 问题形式化，并确定了一组对 RED 方法设计至关重要的原则。特别是，我们发现预测对齐和适当的数据增强（在空间变换方面）是实现可推广的 RED 方法的两个标准。通过将这些 RED 原理与图像去噪相结合，我们提出了一种新的基于类别判别去噪的 RED 框架，称为 CDD-RED。大量实验证明了 CDD-RED 在不同评估指标（从像素级、预测级到归因级对齐）和各种攻击生成方法（例如 FGSM、PGD、CW、AutoAttack 和自适应攻击）下的有效性。 本文提出了一种名为CDD-RED的框架，用于从对抗样本中逆向工程出不可感知的对抗性图像扰动，并恢复原始图像。 Yifan Gong,Yuguang Yao,Yize Li,Yimeng Zhang,Xiaoming Liu,Xue Lin,Sijia Liu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Efficient Global Robustness Certification of Neural Networks via Interleaving Twin-Network Encoding
title_zh: 通过交错双网络编码进行神经网络的高效全局鲁棒性认证
abstract: The robustness of deep neural networks has received significant interest recently, especially when being deployed in safety-critical systems, as it is important to analyze how sensitive the model output is under input perturbations. While most previous works focused on the local robustness property around an input sample, the studies of the global robustness property, which bounds the maximum output change under perturbations over the entire input space, are still lacking. In this work, we formulate the global robustness certification for neural networks with ReLU activation functions as a mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) problem, and present an efficient approach to address it. Our approach includes a novel interleaving twin-network encoding scheme, where two copies of the neural network are encoded side-by-side with extra interleaving dependencies added between them, and an over-approximation algorithm leveraging relaxation and refinement techniques to reduce complexity. Experiments demonstrate the timing efficiency of our work when compared with previous global robustness certification methods and the tightness of our over-approximation. A case study of closed-loop control safety verification is conducted, and demonstrates the importance and practicality of our approach for certifying the global robustness of neural networks in safety-critical systems.
summary: The robustness of deep neural networks has received significant interest recently, especially when being deployed in safety-critical systems, as it is important to analyze how sensitive the model output is under input perturbations. While most previous works focused on the local robustness property around an input sample, the studies of the global robustness property, which bounds the maximum output change under perturbations over the entire input space, are still lacking. In this work, we formulate the global robustness certification for neural networks with ReLU activation functions as a mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) problem, and present an efficient approach to address it. Our approach includes a novel interleaving twin-network encoding scheme, where two copies of the neural network are encoded side-by-side with extra interleaving dependencies added between them, and an over-approximation algorithm leveraging relaxation and refinement techniques to reduce complexity. Experiments demonstrate the timing efficiency of our work when compared with previous global robustness certification methods and the tightness of our over-approximation. A case study of closed-loop control safety verification is conducted, and demonstrates the importance and practicality of our approach for certifying the global robustness of neural networks in safety-critical systems.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络的鲁棒性最近引起了人们的极大兴趣，特别是在部署在安全关键系统中时，因为分析模型输出在输入扰动下的敏感程度非常重要。虽然之前的大多数工作都集中在输入样本周围的局部鲁棒性，但仍然缺乏对全局鲁棒性的研究，该鲁棒性限制了整个输入空间扰动下的最大输出变化。在这项工作中，我们将具有 ReLU 激活函数的神经网络的全局鲁棒性证明制定为混合整数线性规划 (MILP) 问题，并提出了一种有效的方法来解决它。我们的方法包括一种新颖的交错双网络编码方案，其中神经网络的两个副本并排编码，并在它们之间添加额外的交错依赖性，以及利用松弛和细化技术来降低复杂性的过近似算法。实验证明了与之前的全局鲁棒性认证方法相比，我们工作的计时效率以及我们的过度近似的严格性。进行了闭环控制安全验证的案例研究，并证明了我们的方法在验证安全关键系统中神经网络的全局鲁棒性方面的重要性和实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过交错双网络编码高效认证神经网络全局鲁棒性的方法。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在安全关键系统中的部署需要分析其全局鲁棒性，但现有研究多关注局部鲁棒性，缺乏高效的全局认证方法。
AI.method: 将ReLU神经网络的全局鲁棒性认证建模为混合整数线性规划问题，设计交错双网络编码方案并结合松弛与精炼技术进行过估计以降低复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在时间效率上优于现有全局认证方法，过估计紧致性良好，闭环控制案例验证了其在安全关键系统中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为神经网络全局鲁棒性认证提供了高效解决方案，凸显了其在安全关键系统中的重要性。

authors_text: Pavel V. Kuptsov,Nataliya V. Stankevich,Elmira R. Bagautdinova
title: Discovering dynamical features of Hodgkin-Huxley-type model of physiological neuron using artificial neural network
title_zh: 利用人工神经网络发现生理神经元 Hodgkin-Huxley 型模型的动力学特征
abstract: We consider Hodgkin-Huxley-type model that is a stiff ODE system with two fast and one slow variables. For the parameter ranges under consideration the original version of the model has unstable fixed point and the oscillating attractor that demonstrates bifurcation from bursting to spiking dynamics. Also a modified version is considered where the bistability occurs such that an area in the parameter space appears where the fixed point becomes stable and coexists with the bursting attractor. For these two systems we create artificial neural networks that are able to reproduce their dynamics. The created networks operate as recurrent maps and are trained on trajectory cuts sampled at random parameter values within a certain range. Although the networks are trained only on oscillatory trajectory cuts, it also discover the fixed point of the considered systems. The position and even the eigenvalues coincide very well with the fixed point of the initial ODEs. For the bistable model it means that the network being trained only on one brunch of the solutions recovers another brunch without seeing it during the training. These results, as we see it, are able to trigger the development of new approaches to complex dynamics reconstruction and discovering. From the practical point of view reproducing dynamics with the neural network can be considered as a sort of alternative method of numerical modeling intended for use with contemporary parallel hard- and software.
summary: We consider Hodgkin-Huxley-type model that is a stiff ODE system with two fast and one slow variables. For the parameter ranges under consideration the original version of the model has unstable fixed point and the oscillating attractor that demonstrates bifurcation from bursting to spiking dynamics. Also a modified version is considered where the bistability occurs such that an area in the parameter space appears where the fixed point becomes stable and coexists with the bursting attractor. For these two systems we create artificial neural networks that are able to reproduce their dynamics. The created networks operate as recurrent maps and are trained on trajectory cuts sampled at random parameter values within a certain range. Although the networks are trained only on oscillatory trajectory cuts, it also discover the fixed point of the considered systems. The position and even the eigenvalues coincide very well with the fixed point of the initial ODEs. For the bistable model it means that the network being trained only on one brunch of the solutions recovers another brunch without seeing it during the training. These results, as we see it, are able to trigger the development of new approaches to complex dynamics reconstruction and discovering. From the practical point of view reproducing dynamics with the neural network can be considered as a sort of alternative method of numerical modeling intended for use with contemporary parallel hard- and software.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑 Hodgkin-Huxley 型模型，它是一个具有两个快变量和一个慢变量的刚性 ODE 系统。对于所考虑的参数范围，模型的原始版本具有不稳定的固定点和振荡吸引子，该振荡吸引子展示了从爆发到尖峰动力学的分叉。还考虑了修改版本，其中双稳态发生，使得参数空间中出现固定点变得稳定并与爆发吸引子共存的区域。对于这两个系统，我们创建了能够重现其动态的人工神经网络。创建的网络作为循环地图运行，并根据在一定范围内的随机参数值采样的轨迹切割进行训练。尽管网络仅接受振荡轨迹切割的训练，但它也发现了所考虑系统的不动点。位置甚至特征值与初始 ODE 的固定点非常吻合。对于双稳态模型，这意味着仅在解决方案的一个分支上训练的网络会恢复另一个分支，而在训练期间不会看到它。正如我们所看到的，这些结果能够引发复杂动力学重建和发现的新方法的发展。从实践的角度来看，使用神经网络再现动力学可以被视为一种数值建模的替代方法，旨在与当代并行硬件和软件一起使用。

AI.tldr: 本文利用人工神经网络研究Hodgkin-Huxley型神经元模型的动力学特性，通过训练网络识别系统固定点和振荡吸引子。
AI.motivation: 传统数值方法难以高效处理复杂神经元模型的参数空间探索，需开发新型工具实现动力学特征自动发现。
AI.method: 构建递归神经网络，使用随机参数采样得到的振荡轨迹片段进行训练，通过网络输出反推系统固定点及稳定性特征。
AI.result: 网络成功复现原ODE的固定点位置及特征值，且在双稳态模型中能从单一分支数据推断出另一稳定分支的存在。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为复杂动力学系统建模提供新思路，可作为传统数值模拟的并行计算替代方案，推动神经动力学研究范式革新。

authors_text: Jinyu Yang,Zhe Li,Song Yan,Feng Zheng,Aleš Leonardis,Joni-Kristian Kämäräinen,Ling Shao
title: RGBD Object Tracking: An In-depth Review
title_zh: RGBD 对象跟踪：深入回顾
abstract: RGBD object tracking is gaining momentum in computer vision research thanks to the development of depth sensors. Although numerous RGBD trackers have been proposed with promising performance, an in-depth review for comprehensive understanding of this area is lacking. In this paper, we firstly review RGBD object trackers from different perspectives, including RGBD fusion, depth usage, and tracking framework. Then, we summarize the existing datasets and the evaluation metrics. We benchmark a representative set of RGBD trackers, and give detailed analyses based on their performances. Particularly, we are the first to provide depth quality evaluation and analysis of tracking results in depth-friendly scenarios in RGBD tracking. For long-term settings in most RGBD tracking videos, we give an analysis of trackers' performance on handling target disappearance. To enable better understanding of RGBD trackers, we propose robustness evaluation against input perturbations. Finally, we summarize the challenges and provide open directions for this community. All resources are publicly available at https://github.com/memoryunreal/RGBD-tracking-review.
summary: RGBD object tracking is gaining momentum in computer vision research thanks to the development of depth sensors. Although numerous RGBD trackers have been proposed with promising performance, an in-depth review for comprehensive understanding of this area is lacking. In this paper, we firstly review RGBD object trackers from different perspectives, including RGBD fusion, depth usage, and tracking framework. Then, we summarize the existing datasets and the evaluation metrics. We benchmark a representative set of RGBD trackers, and give detailed analyses based on their performances. Particularly, we are the first to provide depth quality evaluation and analysis of tracking results in depth-friendly scenarios in RGBD tracking. For long-term settings in most RGBD tracking videos, we give an analysis of trackers' performance on handling target disappearance. To enable better understanding of RGBD trackers, we propose robustness evaluation against input perturbations. Finally, we summarize the challenges and provide open directions for this community. All resources are publicly available at https://github.com/memoryunreal/RGBD-tracking-review.
abstract_zh: 由于深度传感器的发展，RGBD 对象跟踪在计算机视觉研究中获得了强劲的发展势头。尽管已经提出了许多具有良好性能的 RGBD 跟踪器，但缺乏对该领域的全面理解的深入审查。在本文中，我们首先从不同角度回顾了 RGBD 目标跟踪器，包括 RGBD 融合、深度使用和跟踪框架。然后，我们总结现有的数据集和评估指标。我们对一组具有代表性的 RGBD 跟踪器进行基准测试，并根据其性能进行详细分析。特别是，我们率先在RGBD跟踪的深度友好场景中提供深度质量评估和跟踪结果分析。对于大多数 RGBD 跟踪视频中的长期设置，我们分析了跟踪器在处理目标消失方面的性能。为了更好地理解 RGBD 跟踪器，我们提出了针对输入扰动的鲁棒性评估。最后，我们总结了挑战并为这个社区提供了开放的方向。所有资源均可在 https://github.com/memoryunreal/RGBD-tracking-review 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文对RGBD对象跟踪技术进行了全面的综述，涵盖了融合方法、深度使用、跟踪框架、数据集和评估指标，并对代表性跟踪器进行了基准测试。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有许多RGBD跟踪器被提出并表现出良好的性能，但目前缺乏对这一领域的深入综述，因此本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 本文从RGBD融合、深度使用和跟踪框架等不同角度对现有RGBD跟踪器进行了回顾，总结了现有数据集和评估指标，并对代表性跟踪器进行了基准测试，同时提出了深度质量评估、跟踪结果分析以及对输入扰动的鲁棒性评估。
AI.result: 本文提供了第一份针对RGBD跟踪的深度质量评估和分析，探讨了跟踪器在目标消失情况下的性能，并提出了对输入扰动的鲁棒性评估。
AI.conclusion: 本文总结了RGBD对象跟踪领域面临的挑战，并为未来研究提供了开放方向，所有资源均可在GitHub上获取。

authors_text: Pratik Katte,Siva Teja Kakileti,Himanshu J. Madhu,Geetha Manjunath
title: Automated Thermal Screening for COVID-19 using Machine Learning
title_zh: 使用机器学习对 COVID-19 进行自动热筛查
abstract: In the last two years, millions of lives have been lost due to COVID-19. Despite the vaccination programmes for a year, hospitalization rates and deaths are still high due to the new variants of COVID-19. Stringent guidelines and COVID-19 screening measures such as temperature check and mask check at all public places are helping reduce the spread of COVID-19. Visual inspections to ensure these screening measures can be taxing and erroneous. Automated inspection ensures an effective and accurate screening. Traditional approaches involve identification of faces and masks from visual camera images followed by extraction of temperature values from thermal imaging cameras. Use of visual imaging as a primary modality limits these applications only for good-lighting conditions. The use of thermal imaging alone for these screening measures makes the system invariant to illumination. However, lack of open source datasets is an issue to develop such systems. In this paper, we discuss our work on using machine learning over thermal video streams for face and mask detection and subsequent temperature screening in a passive non-invasive way that enables an effective automated COVID-19 screening method in public places. We open source our NTIC dataset that was used for training our models and was collected at 8 different locations. Our results show that the use of thermal imaging is as effective as visual imaging in the presence of high illumination. This performance stays the same for thermal images even under low-lighting conditions, whereas the performance with visual trained classifiers show more than 50% degradation.

Despite the vaccination programmes for a year, hospitalization rates and deaths are still high due to the new variants of COVID-19. Stringent guidelines and COVID-19 screening measures such as temperature check and mask check at all public places are helping reduce the spread of COVID-19. Visual inspections to ensure these screening measures can be taxing and erroneous. Automated inspection ensures an effective and accurate screening. Traditional approaches involve identification of faces and masks from visual camera images followed by extraction of temperature values from thermal imaging cameras. Use of visual imaging as a primary modality limits these applications only for good-lighting conditions. The use of thermal imaging alone for these screening measures makes the system invariant to illumination. However, lack of open source datasets is an issue to develop such systems. In this paper, we discuss our work on using machine learning over thermal video streams for face and mask detection and subsequent temperature screening in a passive non-invasive way that enables an effective automated COVID-19 screening method in public places. We open source our NTIC dataset that was used for training our models and was collected at 8 different locations. Our results show that the use of thermal imaging is as effective as visual imaging in the presence of high illumination. This performance stays the same for thermal images even under low-lighting conditions, whereas the performance with visual trained classifiers show more than 50% degradation.
abstract_zh: 在过去两年中，数百万人因 COVID-19 丧生。尽管疫苗接种计划已经实施了一年，但由于 COVID-19 新变种，住院率和死亡率仍然很高。严格的指导方针和所有公共场所的体温检查和口罩检查等 COVID-19 筛查措施有助于减少 COVID-19 的传播。确保这些筛查措施的目视检查可能是费力且错误的。自动化检查确保有效且准确的筛查。传统方法包括从视觉相机图像中识别人脸和口罩，然后从热成像相机中提取温度值。使用视觉成像作为主要方式限制了这些应用仅适用于良好的照明条件。单独使用热成像进行这些筛选措施使得系统不受照明的影响。然而，缺乏开源数据集是开发此类系统的一个问题。在本文中，我们讨论了通过热视频流使用机器学习进行面部和口罩检测以及随后以被动非侵入方式进行温度筛查的工作，从而在公共场所实现有效的自动化 COVID-19 筛查方法。我们开源了用于训练模型的 NTIC 数据集，该数据集是在 8 个不同地点收集的。我们的结果表明，在高照度下，使用热成像与视觉成像一样有效。即使在低光照条件下，热图像的这种性能也保持不变，而经过视觉训练的分类器的性能却下降了 50% 以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于热成像和机器学习的自动化COVID-19筛查方法，用于公共场所的非接触式人脸、口罩检测及体温筛查。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉摄像头受光照限制，且缺乏开源数据集阻碍系统开发，需开发一种光照不变、高效的自动化筛查方案。
AI.method: 利用热成像视频流训练机器学习模型进行人脸和口罩检测，并结合体温筛查；公开了在8个地点采集的NTIC数据集。
AI.result: 热成像在强光下表现与视觉成像相当，在弱光下性能保持稳定，而视觉模型性能下降超50%。
AI.conclusion: 热成像结合机器学习可实现高效、鲁棒的自动化筛查，尤其适用于复杂光照环境，公开数据集为后续研究提供支持。

search_text: Automated Thermal Screening for COVID-19 using Machine Learning 使用机器学习对 COVID-19 进行自动热筛查 In the last two years, millions of lives have been lost due to COVID-19. Traditional approaches involve identification of faces and masks from visual camera images followed by extraction of temperature values from thermal imaging cameras. Use of visual imaging as a primary modality limits these applications only for good-lighting conditions. The use of thermal imaging alone for these screening measures makes the system invariant to illumination. However, lack of open source datasets is an issue to develop such systems. In this paper, we discuss our work on using machine learning over thermal video streams for face and mask detection and subsequent temperature screening in a passive non-invasive way that enables an effective automated COVID-19 screening method in public places. We open source our NTIC dataset that was used for training our models and was collected at 8 different locations. Our results show that the use of thermal imaging is as effective as visual imaging in the presence of high illumination. This performance stays the same for thermal images even under low-lighting conditions, whereas the performance with visual trained classifiers show more than 50% degradation. 在过去两年中，数百万人因 COVID-19 丧生。尽管疫苗接种计划已经实施了一年，但由于 COVID-19 新变种，住院率和死亡率仍然很高。严格的指导方针和所有公共场所的体温检查和口罩检查等 COVID-19 筛查措施有助于减少 COVID-19 的传播。确保这些筛查措施的目视检查可能是费力且错误的。自动化检查确保有效且准确的筛查。传统方法包括从视觉相机图像中识别人脸和口罩，然后从热成像相机中提取温度值。使用视觉成像作为主要方式限制了这些应用仅适用于良好的照明条件。单独使用热成像进行这些筛选措施使得系统不受照明的影响。然而，缺乏开源数据集是开发此类系统的一个问题。在本文中，我们讨论了通过热视频流使用机器学习进行面部和口罩检测以及随后以被动非侵入方式进行温度筛查的工作，从而在公共场所实现有效的自动化 COVID-19 筛查方法。我们开源了用于训练模型的 NTIC 数据集，该数据集是在 8 个不同地点收集的。我们的结果表明，在高照度下，使用热成像与视觉成像一样有效。即使在低光照条件下，热图像的这种性能也保持不变，而经过视觉训练的分类器的性能却下降了 50% 以上。 本文提出了一种基于热成像和机器学习的自动化COVID-19筛查方法，用于公共场所的非接触式人脸、口罩检测及体温筛查。 Pratik Katte,Siva Teja Kakileti,Himanshu J. authors_text: Fangjian Lin,Tianyi Wu,Sitong Wu,Shengwei Tian,Guodong Guo
title: Feature Selective Transformer for Semantic Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义图像分割的特征选择转换器
abstract: Recently, it has attracted more and more attentions to fuse multi-scale features for semantic image segmentation. Various works were proposed to employ progressive local or global fusion, but the feature fusions are not rich enough for modeling multi-scale context features. In this work, we focus on fusing multi-scale features from Transformer-based backbones for semantic segmentation, and propose a Feature Selective Transformer (FeSeFormer), which aggregates features from all scales (or levels) for each query feature. Specifically, we first propose a Scale-level Feature Selection (SFS) module, which can choose an informative subset from the whole multi-scale feature set for each scale, where those features that are important for the current scale (or level) are selected and the redundant are discarded. Furthermore, we propose a Full-scale Feature Fusion (FFF) module, which can adaptively fuse features of all scales for queries. Based on the proposed SFS and FFF modules, we develop a Feature Selective Transformer (FeSeFormer), and evaluate our FeSeFormer on four challenging semantic segmentation benchmarks, including PASCAL Context, ADE20K, COCO-Stuff 10K, and Cityscapes, outperforming the state-of-the-art.
summary: Recently, it has attracted more and more attentions to fuse multi-scale features for semantic image segmentation. Various works were proposed to employ progressive local or global fusion, but the feature fusions are not rich enough for modeling multi-scale context features. In this work, we focus on fusing multi-scale features from Transformer-based backbones for semantic segmentation, and propose a Feature Selective Transformer (FeSeFormer), which aggregates features from all scales (or levels) for each query feature. Specifically, we first propose a Scale-level Feature Selection (SFS) module, which can choose an informative subset from the whole multi-scale feature set for each scale, where those features that are important for the current scale (or level) are selected and the redundant are discarded. Furthermore, we propose a Full-scale Feature Fusion (FFF) module, which can adaptively fuse features of all scales for queries. Based on the proposed SFS and FFF modules, we develop a Feature Selective Transformer (FeSeFormer), and evaluate our FeSeFormer on four challenging semantic segmentation benchmarks, including PASCAL Context, ADE20K, COCO-Stuff 10K, and Cityscapes, outperforming the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 近年来，融合多尺度特征进行语义图像分割引起了越来越多的关注。人们提出了各种工作来采用渐进式局部或全局融合，但特征融合对于多尺度上下文特征建模还不够丰富。在这项工作中，我们专注于融合来自基于 Transformer 的主干的多尺度特征以进行语义分割，并提出了一种特征选择性变换器（FeSeFormer），它为每个查询特征聚合来自所有尺度（或级别）的特征。具体来说，我们首先提出了一个尺度级特征选择（SFS）模块，它可以为每个尺度从整个多尺度特征集中选择一个信息子集，其中选择那些对当前尺度（或级别）重要的特征，并丢弃冗余的特征。此外，我们提出了一个全尺度特征融合（FFF）模块，它可以自适应地融合所有尺度的特征以进行查询。基于所提出的 SFS 和 FFF 模块，我们开发了一个特征选择转换器（FeSeFormer），并在四个具有挑战性的语义分割基准上评估我们的 FeSeFormer，包括 PASCAL Context、ADE20K、COCO-Stuff 10K 和 Cityscapes，其性能优于最先进的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FeSeFormer的特征选择Transformer模型，用于语义图像分割中的多尺度特征融合。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多尺度特征融合方面存在不足，无法充分建模多尺度上下文特征，导致语义分割效果受限。
AI.method: 设计了两个核心模块：1) 尺度级特征选择模块(SFS)，从多尺度特征集中筛选信息量大的子集；2) 全尺度特征融合模块(FFF)，自适应融合所有尺度特征。基于这两个模块构建FeSeFormer模型。
AI.result: 在PASCAL Context、ADE20K等四个基准数据集上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效的多尺度特征选择与融合机制，FeSeFormer显著提升了语义分割性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。
