search_text: Neural MoCon: Neural Motion Control for Physically Plausible Human Motion Capture Neural MoCon：用于物理上合理的人体运动捕捉的神经运动控制 Due to the visual ambiguity, purely kinematic formulations on monocular human motion capture are often physically incorrect, biomechanically implausible, and can not reconstruct accurate interactions. In this work, we focus on exploiting the high-precision and non-differentiable physics simulator to incorporate dynamical constraints in motion capture. Our key-idea is to use real physical supervisions to train a target pose distribution prior for sampling-based motion control to capture physically plausible human motion. To obtain accurate reference motion with terrain interactions for the sampling, we first introduce an interaction constraint based on SDF (Signed Distance Field) to enforce appropriate ground contact modeling. We then design a novel two-branch decoder to avoid stochastic error from pseudo ground-truth and train a distribution prior with the non-differentiable physics simulator. Finally, we regress the sampling distribution from the current state of the physical character with the trained prior and sample satisfied target poses to track the estimated reference motion. Qualitative and quantitative results show that we can obtain physically plausible human motion with complex terrain interactions, human shape variations, and diverse behaviors. More information can be found at~\url{https://www.yangangwang.com/papers/HBZ-NM-2022-03.html} 由于视觉模糊性，单眼人体动作捕捉的纯运动学公式通常在物理上不正确，在生物力学上不可信，并且无法重建准确的相互作用。在这项工作中，我们专注于利用高精度和不可微的物理模拟器将动态约束纳入运动捕捉中。我们的关键想法是使用真实的物理监督来训练目标姿势分布，然后进行基于采样的运动控制，以捕获物理上合理的人体运动。为了获得与地形相互作用的准确参考运动以进行采样，我们首先引入基于 SDF（有符号距离场）的相互作用约束来强制执行适当的地面接触建模。然后，我们设计了一种新颖的两分支解码器，以避免伪地面实况的随机误差，并使用不可微的物理模拟器训练先验分布。最后，我们使用训练好的先验和样本满意的目标姿势从物理角色的当前状态回归采样分布，以跟踪估计的参考运动。定性和定量结果表明，我们可以获得具有复杂地形相互作用、人体形状变化和多样化行为的物理上合理的人体运动。更多信息可以在~\url{https://www.yangangwang.com/papers/HBZ-NM-2022-03.html}找到 本文提出Neural MoCon方法，通过引入物理仿真约束提升单目人体运动捕捉的物理合理性与生物力学可行性。 Buzhen Huang,Liang Pan,Yuan Yang,Jingyi Ju,Yangang Wang cs.CV

title: Constant factor approximations for Lower and Upper bounded Clusterings
title_zh: 下限和上限聚类的常数因子近似
abstract: Clustering is one of the most fundamental problem in Machine Learning. Researchers in the field often require a lower bound on the size of the clusters to maintain anonymity and upper bound for the ease of analysis. Specifying an optimal cluster size is a problem often faced by scientists. In this paper, we present a framework to obtain constant factor approximations for some prominent clustering objectives, with lower and upper bounds on cluster size. This enables scientists to give an approximate cluster size by specifying the lower and the upper bounds for it. Our results preserve the lower bounds but may violate the upper bound a little. %{GroverGD21_LBUBFL_Cocoon} to $2$. %namely, $k$ Center (LUkC) and $k$ Median (LUkM) problem. We study the problems when either of the bounds is uniform. We apply our framework to give the first constant factor approximations for LUkM and its generalization, $k$-facility location problem (LUkFL), with $β+1$ factor violation in upper bounds where $β$ is the violation of upper bounds in solutions of upper bounded $k$-median and $k$-facility location problems respectively. We also present a result on LUkC with uniform upper bounds and, its generalization, lower and (uniform) upper bounded $k$ supplier problem (LUkS). The approach also gives a result on lower and upper bounded facility location problem (LUFL), improving upon the upper bound violation of $5/2$ due to Gupta et al. We also reduce the violation in upper bounds for a special case when the gap between the lower and upper bounds is not too small.
summary: Clustering is one of the most fundamental problem in Machine Learning. Researchers in the field often require a lower bound on the size of the clusters to maintain anonymity and upper bound for the ease of analysis. Specifying an optimal cluster size is a problem often faced by scientists. In this paper, we present a framework to obtain constant factor approximations for some prominent clustering objectives, with lower and upper bounds on cluster size. This enables scientists to give an approximate cluster size by specifying the lower and the upper bounds for it. Our results preserve the lower bounds but may violate the upper bound a little. %{GroverGD21_LBUBFL_Cocoon} to $2$. %namely, $k$ Center (LUkC) and $k$ Median (LUkM) problem. We study the problems when either of the bounds is uniform. We apply our framework to give the first constant factor approximations for LUkM and its generalization, $k$-facility location problem (LUkFL), with $β+1$ factor violation in upper bounds where $β$ is the violation of upper bounds in solutions of upper bounded $k$-median and $k$-facility location problems respectively. We also present a result on LUkC with uniform upper bounds and, its generalization, lower and (uniform) upper bounded $k$ supplier problem (LUkS). The approach also gives a result on lower and upper bounded facility location problem (LUFL), improving upon the upper bound violation of $5/2$ due to Gupta et al. We also reduce the violation in upper bounds for a special case when the gap between the lower and upper bounds is not too small.
abstract_zh: 聚类是机器学习中最基本的问题之一。该领域的研究人员通常需要集群大小的下限以保持匿名性和上限以便于分析。指定最佳簇大小是科学家经常面临的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一个框架，可以为一些突出的聚类目标获得常数因子近似值，并具有聚类大小的下限和上限。这使得科学家能够通过指定簇的下限和上限来给出近似的簇大小。我们的结果保留了下限，但可能会稍微违反上限。 %{GroverGD21_LBUBFL_Cocoon} 至 $2$。 %即 $k$ 中心 (LUkC) 和 $k$ 中值 (LUkM) 问题。我们研究两个边界一致时的问题。我们应用我们的框架给出 LUkM 及其泛化 $k$-设施位置问题 (LUkFL) 的第一个常数因子近似，其中 $β+1$ 因子违反上限，其中 $β$ 分别是上界 $k$-中值和 $k$-设施位置问题的解决方案中违反上限的。我们还提出了具有统一上限的 LUkC 的结果，及其泛化、下限和（统一）上限 $k$ 供应商问题 (LUkS)。该方法还给出了下限和上限设施位置问题 (LUFL) 的结果，改进了 Gupta 等人提出的 5/2$ 上限违规问题。当上下界之间的差距不太小时，我们还减少了特殊情况的上限违规。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种框架，用于在聚类问题中同时满足簇大小的下界和上界约束，提供常数因子近似解。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中需要对聚类大小设置下界（匿名性）和上界（分析便利性），但现有方法难以同时满足两者。
AI.method: 设计通用框架处理带上下界约束的聚类问题，通过调整上界违规因子实现近似优化。
AI.result: 首次为LUkM和LUkFL问题提供常数因子近似，上界违规因子为β+1；改进LUFL问题的上界违规因子至5/2，并降低特定场景的违规幅度。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡了聚类大小约束与近似解质量，在多个经典问题中取得理论突破。

authors_text: Lizhen Wang,Zhiyuan Chen,Tao Yu,Chenguang Ma,Liang Li,Yebin Liu
title: FaceVerse: a Fine-grained and Detail-controllable 3D Face Morphable Model from a Hybrid Dataset
title_zh: FaceVerse：来自混合数据集的细粒度且细节可控的 3D 脸部变形模型
abstract: We present FaceVerse, a fine-grained 3D Neural Face Model, which is built from hybrid East Asian face datasets containing 60K fused RGB-D images and 2K high-fidelity 3D head scan models. A novel coarse-to-fine structure is proposed to take better advantage of our hybrid dataset. In the coarse module, we generate a base parametric model from large-scale RGB-D images, which is able to predict accurate rough 3D face models in different genders, ages, etc. Then in the fine module, a conditional StyleGAN architecture trained with high-fidelity scan models is introduced to enrich elaborate facial geometric and texture details. Note that different from previous methods, our base and detailed modules are both changeable, which enables an innovative application of adjusting both the basic attributes and the facial details of 3D face models. Furthermore, we propose a single-image fitting framework based on differentiable rendering. Rich experiments show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: We present FaceVerse, a fine-grained 3D Neural Face Model, which is built from hybrid East Asian face datasets containing 60K fused RGB-D images and 2K high-fidelity 3D head scan models. A novel coarse-to-fine structure is proposed to take better advantage of our hybrid dataset. In the coarse module, we generate a base parametric model from large-scale RGB-D images, which is able to predict accurate rough 3D face models in different genders, ages, etc. Then in the fine module, a conditional StyleGAN architecture trained with high-fidelity scan models is introduced to enrich elaborate facial geometric and texture details. Note that different from previous methods, our base and detailed modules are both changeable, which enables an innovative application of adjusting both the basic attributes and the facial details of 3D face models. Furthermore, we propose a single-image fitting framework based on differentiable rendering. Rich experiments show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 FaceVerse，一种细粒度 3D 神经人脸模型，它是根据包含 60K 融合 RGB-D 图像和 2K 高保真 3D 头部扫描模型的混合东亚人脸数据集构建的。提出了一种新颖的从粗到细的结构，以更好地利用我们的混合数据集。在粗略模块中，我们从大规模 RGB-D 图像生成基本参数模型，该模型能够预测不同性别、年龄等的准确粗糙 3D 人脸模型。然后在精细模块中，引入使用高保真扫描模型训练的条件 StyleGAN 架构，以丰富精细的面部几何和纹理细节。请注意，与以前的方法不同，我们的基础模块和详细模块都是可变的，这使得能够调整3D人脸模型的基本属性和面部细节的创新应用。此外，我们提出了一种基于可微渲染的单图像拟合框架。丰富的实验表明我们的方法优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FaceVerse，一种基于混合数据集的细粒度且细节可控的3D人脸可变形模型，通过融合6万张RGB-D图像和2000个高保真3D扫描模型实现面部属性与细节的可调节生成。
AI.motivation: 现有3D人脸模型在细粒度属性控制和几何纹理细节表现上存在不足，且难以同时利用多源数据集的优势。
AI.method: 设计粗到细双模块架构：粗模块基于大规模RGB-D图像生成基础参数模型，细模块采用条件StyleGAN结合高保真扫描数据增强细节；提出基于可微渲染的单图像拟合框架实现模型优化。
AI.result: 实验表明FaceVerse在3D人脸重建精度、细粒度属性控制及几何纹理细节表现上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过混合数据集与双模块架构创新，FaceVerse实现了3D人脸模型在基础属性与细节层面的协同控制，为虚拟角色生成等应用提供新思路。

tldr: 本文提出FaceVerse，一种基于混合数据集的细粒度且细节可控的3D人脸可变形模型，通过融合6万张RGB-D图像和2000个高保真3D扫描模型实现面部属性与细节的可调节生成。
motivation: 现有3D人脸模型在细粒度属性控制和几何纹理细节表现上存在不足，且难以同时利用多源数据集的优势。
method: 设计粗到细双模块架构：粗模块基于大规模RGB-D图像生成基础参数模型，细模块采用条件StyleGAN结合高保真扫描数据增强细节；提出基于可微渲染的单图像拟合框架实现模型优化。
result: 实验表明FaceVerse在3D人脸重建精度、细粒度属性控制及几何纹理细节表现上均优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: 通过混合数据集与双模块架构创新，FaceVerse实现了3D人脸模型在基础属性与细节层面的协同控制，为虚拟角色生成等应用提供新思路。
search_text: FaceVerse: a Fine-grained and Detail-controllable 3D Face Morphable Model from a Hybrid Dataset FaceVerse：来自混合数据集的细粒度且细节可控的 3D 脸部变形模型 We present FaceVerse, a fine-grained 3D Neural Face Model, which is built from hybrid East Asian face datasets containing 60K fused RGB-D images and 2K high-fidelity 3D head scan models. A novel coarse-to-fine structure is proposed to take better advantage of our hybrid dataset. In the coarse module, we generate a base parametric model from large-scale RGB-D images, which is able to predict accurate rough 3D face models in different genders, ages, etc. Then in the fine module, a conditional StyleGAN architecture trained with high-fidelity scan models is introduced to enrich elaborate facial geometric and texture details. Note that different from previous methods, our base and detailed modules are both changeable, which enables an innovative application of adjusting both the basic attributes and the facial details of 3D face models. Furthermore, we propose a single-image fitting framework based on differentiable rendering. Rich experiments show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. 我们推出了 FaceVerse，一种细粒度 3D 神经人脸模型，它是根据包含 60K 融合 RGB-D 图像和 2K 高保真 3D 头部扫描模型的混合东亚人脸数据集构建的。提出了一种新颖的从粗到细的结构，以更好地利用我们的混合数据集。在粗略模块中，我们从大规模 RGB-D 图像生成基本参数模型，该模型能够预测不同性别、年龄等的准确粗糙 3D 人脸模型。然后在精细模块中，引入使用高保真扫描模型训练的条件 StyleGAN 架构，以丰富精细的面部几何和纹理细节。请注意，与以前的方法不同，我们的基础模块和详细模块都是可变的，这使得能够调整3D人脸模型的基本属性和面部细节的创新应用。此外，我们提出了一种基于可微渲染的单图像拟合框架。丰富的实验表明我们的方法优于最先进的方法。 本文提出FaceVerse，一种基于混合数据集的细粒度且细节可控的3D人脸可变形模型，通过融合6万张RGB-D图像和2000个高保真3D扫描模型实现面部属性与细节的可调节生成。 Lizhen Wang,Zhiyuan Chen,Tao Yu,Chenguang Ma,Liang Li,Yebin Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Emil Biju,Anirudh Sriram,Mitesh M. Khapra,Pratyush Kumar
title: Joint Transformer/RNN Architecture for Gesture Typing in Indic Languages
title_zh: 用于印度语言手势输入的联合 Transformer/RNN 架构
comment: Published at COLING 2020, 12 pages, 4 Tables and 5 Figures
comments: Published at COLING 2020, 12 pages, 4 Tables and 5 Figures
abstract: Gesture typing is a method of typing words on a touch-based keyboard by creating a continuous trace passing through the relevant keys. This work is aimed at developing a keyboard that supports gesture typing in Indic languages. We begin by noting that when dealing with Indic languages, one needs to cater to two different sets of users: (i) users who prefer to type in the native Indic script (Devanagari, Bengali, etc.) and (ii) users who prefer to type in the English script but want the output transliterated into the native script. In both cases, we need a model that takes a trace as input and maps it to the intended word. To enable the development of these models, we create and release two datasets. First, we create a dataset containing keyboard traces for 193,658 words from 7 Indic languages. Second, we curate 104,412 English-Indic transliteration pairs from Wikidata across these languages. Using these datasets we build a model that performs path decoding, transliteration, and transliteration correction. Unlike prior approaches, our proposed model does not make co-character independence assumptions during decoding. The overall accuracy of our model across the 7 languages varies from 70-95%.

This work is aimed at developing a keyboard that supports gesture typing in Indic languages. We begin by noting that when dealing with Indic languages, one needs to cater to two different sets of users: (i) users who prefer to type in the native Indic script (Devanagari, Bengali, etc.) and (ii) users who prefer to type in the English script but want the output transliterated into the native script. In both cases, we need a model that takes a trace as input and maps it to the intended word. To enable the development of these models, we create and release two datasets. First, we create a dataset containing keyboard traces for 193,658 words from 7 Indic languages. Second, we curate 104,412 English-Indic transliteration pairs from Wikidata across these languages. Using these datasets we build a model that performs path decoding, transliteration, and transliteration correction. Unlike prior approaches, our proposed model does not make co-character independence assumptions during decoding. The overall accuracy of our model across the 7 languages varies from 70-95%.
abstract_zh: 手势输入是一种在触摸键盘上输入文字的方法，方法是创建经过相关按键的连续轨迹。这项工作旨在开发一种支持印度语手势输入的键盘。我们首先注意到，在处理印度语言时，需要迎合两组不同的用户：(i) 喜欢输入本地印度文字（梵文、孟加拉语等）的用户和 (ii) 喜欢输入英文文字但希望将输出音译为本地文字的用户。在这两种情况下，我们都需要一个模型，该模型将跟踪作为输入并将其映射到预期的单词。为了开发这些模型，我们创建并发布了两个数据集。首先，我们创建一个数据集，其中包含 7 种印度语言的 193,658 个单词的键盘痕迹。其次，我们从维基数据中整理了这些语言的 104,412 个英语-印度语音译对。使用这些数据集，我们构建了一个执行路径解码、音译和音译校正的模型。与之前的方法不同，我们提出的模型在解码过程中不会做出共同字符独立性假设。我们的模型在 7 种语言中的总体准确率从 70% 到 95% 不等。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Transformer/RNN架构的模型，用于支持印度语言手势输入的键盘系统，处理本地脚本和英文字母转写两种场景。
AI.motivation: 印度语言用户存在两种输入需求：使用本地文字脚本（如天城文、孟加拉文）或通过英文字母转写输入。现有模型难以同时满足这两种需求且存在字符独立性假设限制。
AI.method: 构建包含193,658词键盘轨迹数据集和104,412英-印转写对数据集，设计融合Transformer与RNN的联合模型，实现轨迹解码、转写及修正功能，摒弃字符独立性假设。
AI.result: 模型在7种印度语言上的整体准确率介于70%-95%，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合模型和专用数据集，本文有效提升了印度语言手势输入系统的准确性，为多脚本输入场景提供了新解决方案。

authors_text: Tianyang Li,Xin Wen,Yu-Shen Liu,Hua Su,Zhizhong Han
title: Learning Deep Implicit Functions for 3D Shapes with Dynamic Code Clouds
title_zh: 使用动态代码云学习 3D 形状的深度隐式函数
abstract: Deep Implicit Function (DIF) has gained popularity as an efficient 3D shape representation. To capture geometry details, current methods usually learn DIF using local latent codes, which discretize the space into a regular 3D grid (or octree) and store local codes in grid points (or octree nodes). Given a query point, the local feature is computed by interpolating its neighboring local codes with their positions. However, the local codes are constrained at discrete and regular positions like grid points, which makes the code positions difficult to be optimized and limits their representation ability. To solve this problem, we propose to learn DIF with Dynamic Code Cloud, named DCC-DIF. Our method explicitly associates local codes with learnable position vectors, and the position vectors are continuous and can be dynamically optimized, which improves the representation ability. In addition, we propose a novel code position loss to optimize the code positions, which heuristically guides more local codes to be distributed around complex geometric details. In contrast to previous methods, our DCC-DIF represents 3D shapes more efficiently with a small amount of local codes, and improves the reconstruction quality. Experiments demonstrate that DCC-DIF achieves better performance over previous methods. Code and data are available at https://github.com/lity20/DCCDIF.
summary: Deep Implicit Function (DIF) has gained popularity as an efficient 3D shape representation. To capture geometry details, current methods usually learn DIF using local latent codes, which discretize the space into a regular 3D grid (or octree) and store local codes in grid points (or octree nodes). Given a query point, the local feature is computed by interpolating its neighboring local codes with their positions. However, the local codes are constrained at discrete and regular positions like grid points, which makes the code positions difficult to be optimized and limits their representation ability. To solve this problem, we propose to learn DIF with Dynamic Code Cloud, named DCC-DIF. Our method explicitly associates local codes with learnable position vectors, and the position vectors are continuous and can be dynamically optimized, which improves the representation ability. In addition, we propose a novel code position loss to optimize the code positions, which heuristically guides more local codes to be distributed around complex geometric details. In contrast to previous methods, our DCC-DIF represents 3D shapes more efficiently with a small amount of local codes, and improves the reconstruction quality. Experiments demonstrate that DCC-DIF achieves better performance over previous methods. Code and data are available at https://github.com/lity20/DCCDIF.
abstract_zh: 深度隐式函数 (DIF) 作为一种高效的 3D 形状表示而广受欢迎。为了捕获几何细节，当前的方法通常使用局部潜在代码来学习 DIF，它将空间离散化为规则的 3D 网格（或八叉树）并将局部代码存储在网格点（或八叉树节点）中。给定一个查询点，通过将其相邻的局部代码与其位置进行插值来计算局部特征。然而，局部代码被限制在网格点等离散且规则的位置，这使得代码位置难以优化并限制了其表示能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出用动态码云来学习DIF，命名为DCC-DIF。我们的方法显式地将局部代码与可学习的位置向量相关联，并且位置向量是连续的并且可以动态优化，从而提高了表示能力。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的代码位置损失来优化代码位置，它启发式地引导更多的局部代码分布在复杂的几何细节周围。与以前的方法相比，我们的 DCC-DIF 使用少量本地代码更有效地表示 3D 形状，并提高了重建质量。实验表明，DCC-DIF 比以前的方法取得了更好的性能。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/lity20/DCCDIF 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态代码云（DCC-DIF）的深度隐式函数方法，用于更高效、精确地表示3D形状。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过固定网格或八叉树节点存储局部代码，限制了代码位置的优化能力，难以捕捉复杂几何细节。
AI.method: 将局部代码与可学习的位置向量显式关联，通过动态优化连续位置向量提升表示能力，并引入代码位置损失函数引导代码围绕复杂区域分布。
AI.result: 实验表明，DCC-DIF在少量局部代码下实现了更优的重建质量，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 动态代码云方法通过优化代码位置分布，显著提升了3D形状隐式函数表示的效率与精度。

In contrast to previous methods, our DCC-DIF represents 3D shapes more efficiently with a small amount of local codes, and improves the reconstruction quality. Experiments demonstrate that DCC-DIF achieves better performance over previous methods. Code and data are available at https://github.com/lity20/DCCDIF. 深度隐式函数 (DIF) 作为一种高效的 3D 形状表示而广受欢迎。为了捕获几何细节，当前的方法通常使用局部潜在代码来学习 DIF，它将空间离散化为规则的 3D 网格（或八叉树）并将局部代码存储在网格点（或八叉树节点）中。给定一个查询点，通过将其相邻的局部代码与其位置进行插值来计算局部特征。然而，局部代码被限制在网格点等离散且规则的位置，这使得代码位置难以优化并限制了其表示能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出用动态码云来学习DIF，命名为DCC-DIF。我们的方法显式地将局部代码与可学习的位置向量相关联，并且位置向量是连续的并且可以动态优化，从而提高了表示能力。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的代码位置损失来优化代码位置，它启发式地引导更多的局部代码分布在复杂的几何细节周围。与以前的方法相比，我们的 DCC-DIF 使用少量本地代码更有效地表示 3D 形状，并提高了重建质量。实验表明，DCC-DIF 比以前的方法取得了更好的性能。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/lity20/DCCDIF 获取。 本文提出了一种基于动态代码云（DCC-DIF）的深度隐式函数方法，用于更高效、精确地表示3D形状。 Tianyang Li,Xin Wen,Yu-Shen Liu,Hua Su,Zhizhong Han cs.CV

title: A Survey of Robust Adversarial Training in Pattern Recognition: Fundamental, Theory, and Methodologies
title_zh: 模式识别中鲁棒对抗训练的调查：基础、理论和方法
abstract: In the last a few decades, deep neural networks have achieved remarkable success in machine learning, computer vision, and pattern recognition. Recent studies however show that neural networks (both shallow and deep) may be easily fooled by certain imperceptibly perturbed input samples called adversarial examples. Such security vulnerability has resulted in a large body of research in recent years because real-world threats could be introduced due to vast applications of neural networks. To address the robustness issue to adversarial examples particularly in pattern recognition, robust adversarial training has become one mainstream. Various ideas, methods, and applications have boomed in the field. Yet, a deep understanding of adversarial training including characteristics, interpretations, theories, and connections among different models has still remained elusive. In this paper, we present a comprehensive survey trying to offer a systematic and structured investigation on robust adversarial training in pattern recognition. We start with fundamentals including definition, notations, and properties of adversarial examples. We then introduce a unified theoretical framework for defending against adversarial samples - robust adversarial training with visualizations and interpretations on why adversarial training can lead to model robustness. Connections will be also established between adversarial training and other traditional learning theories. After that, we summarize, review, and discuss various methodologies with adversarial attack and defense/training algorithms in a structured way. Finally, we present analysis, outlook, and remarks of adversarial training.
summary: In the last a few decades, deep neural networks have achieved remarkable success in machine learning, computer vision, and pattern recognition. abstract_zh: 在过去的几十年里，深度神经网络在机器学习、计算机视觉和模式识别方面取得了巨大的成功。然而，最近的研究表明，神经网络（浅层和深层）可能很容易被某些难以察觉的扰动输入样本（称为对抗样本）所愚弄。近年来，此类安全漏洞引发了大量研究，因为神经网络的广泛应用可能会引入现实世界的威胁。为了解决对抗性示例的鲁棒性问题，特别是在模式识别中，鲁棒对抗性训练已成为一种主流。各种想法、方法和应用在该领域蓬勃发展。然而，对对抗性训练的深入理解，包括特征、解释、理论和不同模型之间的联系仍然难以实现。在本文中，我们提出了一项全面的调查，试图对模式识别中的稳健对抗训练进行系统和结构化的调查。我们从基础知识开始，包括对抗性例子的定义、符号和属性。然后，我们引入一个统一的理论框架来防御对抗性样本——稳健的对抗性训练，并通过可视化和解释解释为什么对抗性训练可以提高模型的鲁棒性。对抗性训练和其他传统学习理论之间也将建立联系。之后，我们以结构化的方式总结、回顾和讨论对抗性攻击和防御/训练算法的各种方法。最后，我们对对抗性训练进行了分析、展望和评论。

AI.tldr: 综述鲁棒对抗训练在模式识别中的基础理论与方法
AI.motivation: 对抗样本威胁广泛，现有方法缺乏系统性理论支持
AI.method: 系统综述、理论框架构建及方法分类分析
AI.result: 提出统一理论框架，总结多种方法，分析其优缺点及未来方向
AI.conclusion: 需结合理论与应用，未来需深入探索

authors_text: Guanghui Shi,Shasha Mao,Shuiping Gou,Dandan Yan,Licheng Jiao,Lin Xiong
title: Adaptively Enhancing Facial Expression Crucial Regions via Local Non-Local Joint Network
title_zh: 通过局部非局部联合网络自适应增强面部表情关键区域
abstract: Facial expression recognition (FER) is still one challenging research due to the small inter-class discrepancy in the facial expression data. In view of the significance of facial crucial regions for FER, many existing researches utilize the prior information from some annotated crucial points to improve the performance of FER. However, it is complicated and time-consuming to manually annotate facial crucial points, especially for vast wild expression images. Based on this, a local non-local joint network is proposed to adaptively light up the facial crucial regions in feature learning of FER in this paper. In the proposed method, two parts are constructed based on facial local and non-local information respectively, where an ensemble of multiple local networks are proposed to extract local features corresponding to multiple facial local regions and a non-local attention network is addressed to explore the significance of each local region. Especially, the attention weights obtained by the non-local network is fed into the local part to achieve the interactive feedback between the facial global and local information. Interestingly, the non-local weights corresponding to local regions are gradually updated and higher weights are given to more crucial regions. Moreover, U-Net is employed to extract the integrated features of deep semantic information and low hierarchical detail information of expression images. Finally, experimental results illustrate that the proposed method achieves more competitive performance compared with several state-of-the art methods on five benchmark datasets. Noticeably, the analyses of the non-local weights corresponding to local regions demonstrate that the proposed method can automatically enhance some crucial regions in the process of feature learning without any facial landmark information.
summary: Facial expression recognition (FER) is still one challenging research due to the small inter-class discrepancy in the facial expression data. In view of the significance of facial crucial regions for FER, many existing researches utilize the prior information from some annotated crucial points to improve the performance of FER. However, it is complicated and time-consuming to manually annotate facial crucial points, especially for vast wild expression images. Based on this, a local non-local joint network is proposed to adaptively light up the facial crucial regions in feature learning of FER in this paper. In the proposed method, two parts are constructed based on facial local and non-local information respectively, where an ensemble of multiple local networks are proposed to extract local features corresponding to multiple facial local regions and a non-local attention network is addressed to explore the significance of each local region. Especially, the attention weights obtained by the non-local network is fed into the local part to achieve the interactive feedback between the facial global and local information. Interestingly, the non-local weights corresponding to local regions are gradually updated and higher weights are given to more crucial regions. Moreover, U-Net is employed to extract the integrated features of deep semantic information and low hierarchical detail information of expression images. Finally, experimental results illustrate that the proposed method achieves more competitive performance compared with several state-of-the art methods on five benchmark datasets. Noticeably, the analyses of the non-local weights corresponding to local regions demonstrate that the proposed method can automatically enhance some crucial regions in the process of feature learning without any facial landmark information.
abstract_zh: 由于面部表情数据的类间差异较小，面部表情识别（FER）仍然是一项具有挑战性的研究。鉴于面部关键区域对于 FER 的重要性，许多现有研究利用一些注释的关键点的先验信息来提高 FER 的性能。然而，手动标注面部关键点非常复杂且耗时，尤其是对于大量野生表情图像。基于此，本文提出了一种局部非局部联合网络，用于在 FER 的特征学习中自适应地照亮面部关键区域。在所提出的方法中，分别基于面部局部和非局部信息构建两个部分，其中提出多个局部网络的集成来提取与多个面部局部区域相对应的局部特征，并解决非局部注意网络来探索每个局部区域的重要性。特别是，将非局部网络获得的注意力权重馈送到局部部分，以实现面部全局信息和局部信息之间的交互反馈。有趣的是，与局部区域相对应的非局部权重逐渐更新，并且为更关键的区域赋予更高的权重。此外，采用U-Net来提取表情图像的深层语义信息和低层次细节信息的综合特征。最后，实验结果表明，与五个基准数据集上的几种最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法取得了更具竞争力的性能。值得注意的是，对与局部区域相对应的非局部权重的分析表明，该方法可以在特征学习过程中自动增强一些关键区域，而无需任何面部标志信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种局部非局部联合网络，用于在面部表情识别中自适应增强关键区域。
AI.motivation: 由于面部表情数据类间差异小，传统方法依赖手动标注的关键点信息，但这一过程复杂且耗时，因此需要一种无需手动标注即可自动增强关键区域的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种局部非局部联合网络，包含多个局部网络用于提取局部特征和一个非局部注意力网络用于探索局部区域的重要性，并通过反馈机制实现全局与局部信息的交互，同时使用U-Net提取深层语义和低层次细节信息。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在五个基准数据集上相较于其他先进方法表现更优，并能自动增强关键区域而无需面部关键点信息。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了面部表情识别性能，且无需手动标注关键点，具有较好的自适应性和实用性。

title: Contrastive Graph Learning for Population-based fMRI Classification
title_zh: 基于群体的 fMRI 分类的对比图学习
abstract: Contrastive self-supervised learning has recently benefited fMRI classification with inductive biases. Its weak label reliance prevents overfitting on small medical datasets and tackles the high intraclass variances. Nonetheless, existing contrastive methods generate resemblant pairs only on pixel-level features of 3D medical images, while the functional connectivity that reveals critical cognitive information is under-explored. Additionally, existing methods predict labels on individual contrastive representation without recognizing neighbouring information in the patient group, whereas interpatient contrast can act as a similarity measure suitable for population-based classification. We hereby proposed contrastive functional connectivity graph learning for population-based fMRI classification. Representations on the functional connectivity graphs are "repelled" for heterogeneous patient pairs meanwhile homogeneous pairs "attract" each other. Then a dynamic population graph that strengthens the connections between similar patients is updated for classification. Experiments on a multi-site dataset ADHD200 validate the superiority of the proposed method on various metrics. We initially visualize the population relationships and exploit potential subtypes.
summary: Contrastive self-supervised learning has recently benefited fMRI classification with inductive biases. Its weak label reliance prevents overfitting on small medical datasets and tackles the high intraclass variances. Nonetheless, existing contrastive methods generate resemblant pairs only on pixel-level features of 3D medical images, while the functional connectivity that reveals critical cognitive information is under-explored. Additionally, existing methods predict labels on individual contrastive representation without recognizing neighbouring information in the patient group, whereas interpatient contrast can act as a similarity measure suitable for population-based classification. We hereby proposed contrastive functional connectivity graph learning for population-based fMRI classification. Representations on the functional connectivity graphs are "repelled" for heterogeneous patient pairs meanwhile homogeneous pairs "attract" each other. Then a dynamic population graph that strengthens the connections between similar patients is updated for classification. Experiments on a multi-site dataset ADHD200 validate the superiority of the proposed method on various metrics. We initially visualize the population relationships and exploit potential subtypes.
abstract_zh: 对比自我监督学习最近使具有归纳偏差的功能磁共振成像分类受益。它的弱标签依赖可以防止对小型医疗数据集的过度拟合，并解决高的类内差异。尽管如此，现有的对比方法仅在 3D 医学图像的像素级特征上生成相似对，而揭示关键认知信息的功能连接性尚未得到充分探索。此外，现有方法在不识别患者组中邻近信息的情况下预测个体对比表示上的标签，而患者间对比可以充当适合基于人群的分类的相似性度量。我们特此提出基于人群的功能磁共振成像分类的对比功能连接图学习。功能连接图上的表示对于异质患者对是“排斥”的，同时同质患者对彼此“吸引”。然后更新加强相似患者之间联系的动态群体图以进行分类。在多站点数据集 ADHD200 上的实验验证了所提出的方法在各种指标上的优越性。我们最初将群体关系可视化并利用潜在的亚型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于对比图学习的群体功能性磁共振成像（fMRI）分类方法，通过功能连接图建模患者间关系以提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法仅关注像素级特征，忽视功能连接性这一关键认知信息，且未利用患者群体间的相互关系进行分类。
AI.method: 构建对比功能连接图，对异质患者对进行排斥、同质患者对进行吸引，并更新动态群体图以加强相似患者连接。
AI.result: 在ADHD200多中心数据集上验证方法优越性，首次实现群体关系可视化并发现潜在亚型。
AI.conclusion: 融合功能连接性与患者间对比信息可有效提升群体fMRI分类效果，为神经影像分析提供新思路。

title: Semantic Segmentation by Early Region Proxy
title_zh: 通过早期区域代理进行语义分割
abstract: Typical vision backbones manipulate structured features. As a compromise, semantic segmentation has long been modeled as per-point prediction on dense regular grids. In this work, we present a novel and efficient modeling that starts from interpreting the image as a tessellation of learnable regions, each of which has flexible geometrics and carries homogeneous semantics. To model region-wise context, we exploit Transformer to encode regions in a sequence-to-sequence manner by applying multi-layer self-attention on the region embeddings, which serve as proxies of specific regions. Semantic segmentation is now carried out as per-region prediction on top of the encoded region embeddings using a single linear classifier, where a decoder is no longer needed. The proposed RegProxy model discards the common Cartesian feature layout and operates purely at region level. Hence, it exhibits the most competitive performance-efficiency trade-off compared with the conventional dense prediction methods. For example, on ADE20K, the small-sized RegProxy-S/16 outperforms the best CNN model using 25% parameters and 4% computation, while the largest RegProxy-L/16 achieves 52.9mIoU which outperforms the state-of-the-art by 2.1% with fewer resources. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/YiF-Zhang/RegionProxy.
summary: Typical vision backbones manipulate structured features. As a compromise, semantic segmentation has long been modeled as per-point prediction on dense regular grids. In this work, we present a novel and efficient modeling that starts from interpreting the image as a tessellation of learnable regions, each of which has flexible geometrics and carries homogeneous semantics. To model region-wise context, we exploit Transformer to encode regions in a sequence-to-sequence manner by applying multi-layer self-attention on the region embeddings, which serve as proxies of specific regions. Semantic segmentation is now carried out as per-region prediction on top of the encoded region embeddings using a single linear classifier, where a decoder is no longer needed. The proposed RegProxy model discards the common Cartesian feature layout and operates purely at region level. Hence, it exhibits the most competitive performance-efficiency trade-off compared with the conventional dense prediction methods. For example, on ADE20K, the small-sized RegProxy-S/16 outperforms the best CNN model using 25% parameters and 4% computation, while the largest RegProxy-L/16 achieves 52.9mIoU which outperforms the state-of-the-art by 2.1% with fewer resources. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/YiF-Zhang/RegionProxy.
abstract_zh: 典型的视觉主干操纵结构化特征。作为一种折衷方案，语义分割长期以来一直被建模为密集规则网格上的每点预测。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖且有效的建模，该建模首先将图像解释为可学习区域的镶嵌，每个区域都具有灵活的几何形状并带有同质语义。为了对区域上下文进行建模，我们利用 Transformer 通过在区域嵌入上应用多层自注意力（作为特定区域的代理），以序列到序列的方式对区域进行编码。现在，语义分割是使用单个线性分类器在编码区域嵌入之上作为每个区域预测来执行的，其中不再需要解码器。所提出的 RegProxy 模型放弃了常见的笛卡尔特征布局，并纯粹在区域级别运行。因此，与传统的密集预测方法相比，它表现出最具竞争力的性能效率权衡。例如，在 ADE20K 上，小型 RegProxy-S/16 使用 25% 的参数和 4% 的计算量，优于最好的 CNN 模型，而最大的 RegProxy-L/16 则达到 52.9mIoU，在资源较少的情况下，比最先进的模型高 2.1%。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/YiF-Zhang/RegionProxy 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区域代理的语义分割方法，通过将图像划分为可学习的语义区域并利用Transformer进行编码，实现高效分割。
AI.motivation: 传统语义分割依赖密集网格的逐点预测，计算量大且效率低，而区域级建模可提升效率并保持性能。
AI.method: 将图像分割为可学习的灵活区域，使用Transformer通过自注意力机制编码区域嵌入，直接以区域为单位进行预测，无需解码器。
AI.result: 在ADE20K数据集上，RegProxy-S/16模型参数减少25%、计算量减少4%仍优于最佳CNN模型，RegProxy-L/16达到52.9mIoU，超越现有方法2.1%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过区域级建模与Transformer编码，在保持高精度的同时显著提升分割效率，为密集预测任务提供新思路。

title: Visual Abductive Reasoning
title_zh: 视觉归纳推理
abstract: Abductive reasoning seeks the likeliest possible explanation for partial observations. Although abduction is frequently employed in human daily reasoning, it is rarely explored in computer vision literature. In this paper, we propose a new task and dataset, Visual Abductive Reasoning (VAR), for examining abductive reasoning ability of machine intelligence in everyday visual situations. Given an incomplete set of visual events, AI systems are required to not only describe what is observed, but also infer the hypothesis that can best explain the visual premise. Based on our large-scale VAR dataset, we devise a strong baseline model, Reasoner (causal-and-cascaded reasoning Transformer). First, to capture the causal structure of the observations, a contextualized directional position embedding strategy is adopted in the encoder, that yields discriminative representations for the premise and hypothesis. Then, multiple decoders are cascaded to generate and progressively refine the premise and hypothesis sentences. The prediction scores of the sentences are used to guide cross-sentence information flow in the cascaded reasoning procedure. Our VAR benchmarking results show that Reasoner surpasses many famous video-language models, while still being far behind human performance. This work is expected to foster future efforts in the reasoning-beyond-observation paradigm.
summary: Abductive reasoning seeks the likeliest possible explanation for partial observations. Although abduction is frequently employed in human daily reasoning, it is rarely explored in computer vision literature. In this paper, we propose a new task and dataset, Visual Abductive Reasoning (VAR), for examining abductive reasoning ability of machine intelligence in everyday visual situations. Given an incomplete set of visual events, AI systems are required to not only describe what is observed, but also infer the hypothesis that can best explain the visual premise. Based on our large-scale VAR dataset, we devise a strong baseline model, Reasoner (causal-and-cascaded reasoning Transformer). First, to capture the causal structure of the observations, a contextualized directional position embedding strategy is adopted in the encoder, that yields discriminative representations for the premise and hypothesis. Then, multiple decoders are cascaded to generate and progressively refine the premise and hypothesis sentences. The prediction scores of the sentences are used to guide cross-sentence information flow in the cascaded reasoning procedure. Our VAR benchmarking results show that Reasoner surpasses many famous video-language models, while still being far behind human performance. This work is expected to foster future efforts in the reasoning-beyond-observation paradigm.
abstract_zh: 溯因推理寻求对部分观察结果最可能的解释。尽管溯因法在人类日常推理中经常使用，但在计算机视觉文献中却很少对其进行探讨。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的任务和数据集：视觉溯因推理（VAR），用于检查机器智能在日常视觉情况下的溯因推理能力。给定一组不完整的视觉事件，人工智能系统不仅需要描述观察到的内容，还要推断出最能解释视觉前提的假设。基于我们的大规模 VAR 数据集，我们设计了一个强大的基线模型 Reasoner（因果级联推理 Transformer）。首先，为了捕获观察结果的因果结构，编码器中采用了上下文化的方向位置嵌入策略，该策略产生前提和假设的判别性表示。然后，级联多个解码器来生成并逐步细化前提和假设句子。句子的预测分数用于指导级联推理过程中的跨句子信息流。我们的 VAR 基准测试结果表明，Reasoner 超越了许多著名的视频语言模型，但仍远远落后于人类表现。这项工作预计将促进未来在超越观察的推理范式方面的努力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出视觉归纳推理（VAR）任务及数据集，要求AI系统基于不完整视觉事件生成解释性假设，并设计Reasoner模型进行因果与级联推理。
AI.motivation: 尽管归纳推理是人类日常推理的重要方式，但计算机视觉领域对此研究较少，需探索机器在视觉场景中的假设生成能力。
AI.method: 构建VAR数据集并设计Reasoner模型，包含捕捉因果结构的上下文方向位置编码，以及级联解码器逐步优化前提与假设句子的生成过程。
AI.result: Reasoner在VAR基准测试中超越多个知名视频语言模型，但性能仍显著低于人类水平。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为超越观察的推理范式奠定基础，未来需进一步提升机器的假设生成与因果推理能力。

ai_content.motivation: 尽管归纳推理是人类日常推理的重要方式，但计算机视觉领域对此研究较少，需探索机器在视觉场景中的假设生成能力。

ai_content.result: Reasoner在VAR基准测试中超越多个知名视频语言模型，但性能仍显著低于人类水平。

search_text: Visual Abductive Reasoning 视觉归纳推理 Abductive reasoning seeks the likeliest possible explanation for partial observations. Although abduction is frequently employed in human daily reasoning, it is rarely explored in computer vision literature. In this paper, we propose a new task and dataset, Visual Abductive Reasoning (VAR), for examining abductive reasoning ability of machine intelligence in everyday visual situations. Given an incomplete set of visual events, AI systems are required to not only describe what is observed, but also infer the hypothesis that can best explain the visual premise. Based on our large-scale VAR dataset, we devise a strong baseline model, Reasoner (causal-and-cascaded reasoning Transformer). First, to capture the causal structure of the observations, a contextualized directional position embedding strategy is adopted in the encoder, that yields discriminative representations for the premise and hypothesis. Then, multiple decoders are cascaded to generate and progressively refine the premise and hypothesis sentences. The prediction scores of the sentences are used to guide cross-sentence information flow in the cascaded reasoning procedure. Our VAR benchmarking results show that Reasoner surpasses many famous video-language models, while still being far behind human performance. This work is expected to foster future efforts in the reasoning-beyond-observation paradigm. 溯因推理寻求对部分观察结果最可能的解释。尽管溯因法在人类日常推理中经常使用，但在计算机视觉文献中却很少对其进行探讨。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的任务和数据集：视觉溯因推理（VAR），用于检查机器智能在日常视觉情况下的溯因推理能力。给定一组不完整的视觉事件，人工智能系统不仅需要描述观察到的内容，还要推断出最能解释视觉前提的假设。基于我们的大规模 VAR 数据集，我们设计了一个强大的基线模型 Reasoner（因果级联推理 Transformer）。首先，为了捕获观察结果的因果结构，编码器中采用了上下文化的方向位置嵌入策略，该策略产生前提和假设的判别性表示。然后，级联多个解码器来生成并逐步细化前提和假设句子。句子的预测分数用于指导级联推理过程中的跨句子信息流。我们的 VAR 基准测试结果表明，Reasoner 超越了许多著名的视频语言模型，但仍远远落后于人类表现。这项工作预计将促进未来在超越观察的推理范式方面的努力。 本文提出视觉归纳推理（VAR）任务及数据集，要求AI系统基于不完整视觉事件生成解释性假设，并设计Reasoner模型进行因果与级联推理。 Chen Liang,Wenguan Wang,Tianfei Zhou,Yi Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Qiyu Sun,Jinbao Fang,Wei Xing Zheng,Yang Tang
title: Aggressive Quadrotor Flight Using Curiosity-Driven Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用好奇心驱动的强化学习进行积极的四旋翼飞行
abstract: The ability to perform aggressive movements, which are called aggressive flights, is important for quadrotors during navigation. However, aggressive quadrotor flights are still a great challenge to practical applications. The existing solutions to aggressive flights heavily rely on a predefined trajectory, which is a time-consuming preprocessing step. To avoid such path planning, we propose a curiosity-driven reinforcement learning method for aggressive flight missions and a similarity-based curiosity module is introduced to speed up the training procedure. A branch structure exploration (BSE) strategy is also applied to guarantee the robustness of the policy and to ensure the policy trained in simulations can be performed in real-world experiments directly. The experimental results in simulations demonstrate that our reinforcement learning algorithm performs well in aggressive flight tasks, speeds up the convergence process and improves the robustness of the policy. Besides, our algorithm shows a satisfactory simulated to real transferability and performs well in real-world experiments.
summary: The ability to perform aggressive movements, which are called aggressive flights, is important for quadrotors during navigation. However, aggressive quadrotor flights are still a great challenge to practical applications. The existing solutions to aggressive flights heavily rely on a predefined trajectory, which is a time-consuming preprocessing step. To avoid such path planning, we propose a curiosity-driven reinforcement learning method for aggressive flight missions and a similarity-based curiosity module is introduced to speed up the training procedure. A branch structure exploration (BSE) strategy is also applied to guarantee the robustness of the policy and to ensure the policy trained in simulations can be performed in real-world experiments directly. The experimental results in simulations demonstrate that our reinforcement learning algorithm performs well in aggressive flight tasks, speeds up the convergence process and improves the robustness of the policy. Besides, our algorithm shows a satisfactory simulated to real transferability and performs well in real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 执行攻击性运动（称为攻击性飞行）的能力对于四旋翼飞行器在导航过程中非常重要。然而，激进的四旋翼飞行对实际应用仍然是一个巨大的挑战。现有的攻击性飞行解决方案严重依赖于预定义的轨迹，这是一个耗时的预处理步骤。为了避免这种路径规划，我们提出了一种用于攻击性飞行任务的好奇心驱动的强化学习方法，并引入了基于相似性的好奇心模块来加速训练过程。还应用分支结构探索（BSE）策略来保证策略的鲁棒性，并确保在模拟中训练的策略可以直接在现实世界的实验中执行。模拟实验结果表明，我们的强化学习算法在攻击性飞行任务中表现良好，加快了收敛过程并提高了策略的鲁棒性。此外，我们的算法对真实的可迁移性表现出令人满意的模拟，并且在现实世界的实验中表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于好奇心驱动的强化学习方法，用于实现无需预定义轨迹的四旋翼无人机激进飞行。
AI.motivation: 现有激进飞行方案依赖耗时的预定义轨迹规划，难以满足实际应用需求，需探索更高效的自主学习方法。
AI.method: 引入相似度为基础的好奇心模块加速训练，并采用分支结构探索策略确保策略鲁棒性与仿真到现实的迁移能力。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明算法在激进飞行任务中收敛速度更快、策略更鲁棒，且成功实现仿真到真实环境的迁移验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过好奇心驱动机制有效解决了激进飞行的自主学习难题，为实际应用提供了高效可靠的解决方案。

authors_text: Danilo Avola,Luigi Cinque,Alessio Fagioli,Gian Luca Foresti,Marco Raoul Marini,Alessio Mecca,Daniele Pannone
title: Medicinal Boxes Recognition on a Deep Transfer Learning Augmented Reality Mobile Application
title_zh: 深度迁移学习增强现实移动应用程序上的药盒识别
abstract: Taking medicines is a fundamental aspect to cure illnesses. However, studies have shown that it can be hard for patients to remember the correct posology. More aggravating, a wrong dosage generally causes the disease to worsen. Although, all relevant instructions for a medicine are summarized in the corresponding patient information leaflet, the latter is generally difficult to navigate and understand. To address this problem and help patients with their medication, in this paper we introduce an augmented reality mobile application that can present to the user important details on the framed medicine. In particular, the app implements an inference engine based on a deep neural network, i.e., a densenet, fine-tuned to recognize a medicinal from its package. Subsequently, relevant information, such as posology or a simplified leaflet, is overlaid on the camera feed to help a patient when taking a medicine. Extensive experiments to select the best hyperparameters were performed on a dataset specifically collected to address this task; ultimately obtaining up to 91.30\% accuracy as well as real-time capabilities.
summary: Taking medicines is a fundamental aspect to cure illnesses. However, studies have shown that it can be hard for patients to remember the correct posology. More aggravating, a wrong dosage generally causes the disease to worsen. Although, all relevant instructions for a medicine are summarized in the corresponding patient information leaflet, the latter is generally difficult to navigate and understand. To address this problem and help patients with their medication, in this paper we introduce an augmented reality mobile application that can present to the user important details on the framed medicine. In particular, the app implements an inference engine based on a deep neural network, i.e., a densenet, fine-tuned to recognize a medicinal from its package. Subsequently, relevant information, such as posology or a simplified leaflet, is overlaid on the camera feed to help a patient when taking a medicine. Extensive experiments to select the best hyperparameters were performed on a dataset specifically collected to address this task; ultimately obtaining up to 91.30\% accuracy as well as real-time capabilities.
abstract_zh: 服药是治病的根本。然而，研究表明，患者可能很难记住正确的剂量。更严重的是，错误的剂量通常会导致疾病恶化。尽管药物的所有相关说明都总结在相应的患者信息传单中，但后者通常难以导航和理解。为了解决这个问题并帮助患者用药，在本文中，我们介绍了一种增强现实移动应用程序，它可以向用户展示有关框架药物的重要细节。特别是，该应用程序实现了一个基于深度神经网络（即密集网络）的推理引擎，经过微调以从其包装中识别药物。随后，相关信息（例如剂量学或简化的传单）会叠加在摄像机画面上，以帮助患者服药。在专门收集来解决此任务的数据集上进行了大量实验来选择最佳超参数；最终获得高达 91.30% 的准确度以及实时能力。

AI.tldr: 开发基于深度迁移学习的增强现实移动应用，用于识别药品包装并提供用药信息
AI.motivation: 患者常因忘记正确剂量导致病情加重，而药品说明书难以理解和导航，需通过智能手段辅助用药
AI.method: 采用微调的DenseNet深度神经网络进行药品包装识别，并通过增强现实技术叠加用药信息
AI.result: 在专用数据集上达到91.30%识别准确率，具备实时处理能力
AI.conclusion: 该应用有效提升用药准确性，验证了迁移学习在医疗AR场景中的可行性

title: Semantic-guided Disentangled Representation for Unsupervised Cross-modality Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 无监督跨模态医学图像分割的语义引导解缠表示
abstract: Disentangled representation is a powerful technique to tackle domain shift problem in medical image analysis in unsupervised domain adaptation setting.However, previous methods only focus on exacting domain-invariant feature and ignore whether exacted feature is meaningful for downstream tasks.We propose a novel framework, called semantic-guided disentangled representation (SGDR), an effective method to exact semantically meaningful feature for segmentation task to improve performance of cross modality medical image segmentation in unsupervised domain adaptation setting. To exact the meaningful domain-invariant features of different modality, we introduce a content discriminator to force the content representation to be embedded to the same space and a feature discriminator to exact the meaningful representation.We also use pixel-level annotations to guide the encoder to learn features that are meaningful for segmentation task.We validated our method on two public datasets and experiment results show that our approach outperforms the state of the art methods on two evaluation metrics by a significant margin.
summary: Disentangled representation is a powerful technique to tackle domain shift problem in medical image analysis in unsupervised domain adaptation setting.However, previous methods only focus on exacting domain-invariant feature and ignore whether exacted feature is meaningful for downstream tasks.We propose a novel framework, called semantic-guided disentangled representation (SGDR), an effective method to exact semantically meaningful feature for segmentation task to improve performance of cross modality medical image segmentation in unsupervised domain adaptation setting. To exact the meaningful domain-invariant features of different modality, we introduce a content discriminator to force the content representation to be embedded to the same space and a feature discriminator to exact the meaningful representation.We also use pixel-level annotations to guide the encoder to learn features that are meaningful for segmentation task.We validated our method on two public datasets and experiment results show that our approach outperforms the state of the art methods on two evaluation metrics by a significant margin.
abstract_zh: 解缠结表示是解决无监督域适应设置中医学图像分析中的域转移问题的一种强大技术。然而，以前的方法只关注精确的域不变特征，而忽略了精确的特征对下游任务是否有意义。我们提出了一种新的框架，称为语义引导解缠结表示（SGDR），这是一种为分割任务精确精确语义有意义的特征的有效方法，以提高无监督域适应设置中跨模态医学图像分割的性能。为了精确确定不同模态的有意义的域不变特征，我们引入了一个内容鉴别器来强制将内容表示嵌入到同一空间，并引入一个特征鉴别器来精确表示有意义的表示。我们还使用像素级注释来引导编码器学习对分割任务有意义的特征。我们在两个公共数据集上验证了我们的方法，实验结果表明，我们的方法在两个评估指标上明显优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种语义引导的解耦表示框架SGDR，用于无监督跨模态医学图像分割任务，通过提取语义有意义的特征提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督域适应方法仅关注提取域不变特征，但忽略这些特征对分割任务的语义相关性，导致性能不足。
AI.method: 设计内容判别器强制内容表征嵌入同一空间，引入特征判别器提取有意义表征，并利用像素级标注引导编码器学习分割相关特征。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上，SGDR在两个评估指标上显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SGDR通过语义引导的解耦表征有效解决了跨模态医学图像分割中的域偏移问题，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: David Paz,Hao Xiang,Andrew Liang,Henrik I. Christensen
title: TridentNetV2: Lightweight Graphical Global Plan Representations for Dynamic Trajectory Generation
title_zh: TridentNetV2：用于动态轨迹生成的轻量级图形全局计划表示
abstract: We present a framework for dynamic trajectory generation for autonomous navigation, which does not rely on HD maps as the underlying representation. High Definition (HD) maps have become a key component in most autonomous driving frameworks, which include complete road network information annotated at a centimeter-level that include traversable waypoints, lane information, and traffic signals. Instead, the presented approach models the distributions of feasible ego-centric trajectories in real-time given a nominal graph-based global plan and a lightweight scene representation. By embedding contextual information, such as crosswalks, stop signs, and traffic signals, our approach achieves low errors across multiple urban navigation datasets that include diverse intersection maneuvers, while maintaining real-time performance and reducing network complexity. Underlying datasets introduced are available online.
summary: We present a framework for dynamic trajectory generation for autonomous navigation, which does not rely on HD maps as the underlying representation. High Definition (HD) maps have become a key component in most autonomous driving frameworks, which include complete road network information annotated at a centimeter-level that include traversable waypoints, lane information, and traffic signals. Instead, the presented approach models the distributions of feasible ego-centric trajectories in real-time given a nominal graph-based global plan and a lightweight scene representation. By embedding contextual information, such as crosswalks, stop signs, and traffic signals, our approach achieves low errors across multiple urban navigation datasets that include diverse intersection maneuvers, while maintaining real-time performance and reducing network complexity. Underlying datasets introduced are available online.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个用于自主导航的动态轨迹生成框架，该框架不依赖于高清地图作为底层表示。高清（HD）地图已成为大多数自动驾驶框架的关键组成部分，其中包括厘米级注释的完整道路网络信息，其中包括可穿越的路径点、车道信息和交通信号。相反，所提出的方法在给定基于名义图的全局计划和轻量级场景表示的情况下实时模拟可行的以自我为中心的轨迹的分布。通过嵌入人行横道、停车标志和交通信号等上下文信息，我们的方法可以在包括不同交叉口操作的多个城市导航数据集中实现低错误，同时保持实时性能并降低网络复杂性。引入的基础数据集可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需高精度地图的动态轨迹生成框架，用于自动驾驶导航。
AI.motivation: 高精度地图依赖性强且成本高，本文旨在提供一种轻量级替代方案以实现实时轨迹规划。
AI.method: 基于图结构的全局路径规划和轻量级场景表示，结合交叉口、交通信号等上下文信息进行实时轨迹分布建模。
AI.result: 在多个城市导航数据集上实现了低误差率，同时保持实时性能并降低网络复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动驾驶提供了无需高精度地图的高效轨迹生成方案，适用于复杂城市环境。

title: Model Transformations for Ranking Functions and Total Preorders
title_zh: 排名函数和总预订量的模型转换
abstract: In the field of knowledge representation, the considered epistemic states are often based on propositional interpretations, also called worlds. E.g., epistemic states of agents can be modelled by ranking functions or total preorders on worlds. However, there are usually different ways of how to describe a real world situation in a propositional language; this can be seen as different points of view on the same situation. In this paper we introduce the concept of model transformations to convert an epistemic state from one point of view to another point of view, yielding a novel notion of equivalence of epistemic states. We show how the well-known advantages of syntax splitting, originally developed for belief sets and later extended to representation of epistemic states and to nonmonotonic reasoning, can be exploited for belief revision via model transformation by uncovering splittings not being present before. Furthermore, we characterize situations where belief change operators commute with model transformations.
summary: In the field of knowledge representation, the considered epistemic states are often based on propositional interpretations, also called worlds. E.g., epistemic states of agents can be modelled by ranking functions or total preorders on worlds. However, there are usually different ways of how to describe a real world situation in a propositional language; this can be seen as different points of view on the same situation. In this paper we introduce the concept of model transformations to convert an epistemic state from one point of view to another point of view, yielding a novel notion of equivalence of epistemic states. We show how the well-known advantages of syntax splitting, originally developed for belief sets and later extended to representation of epistemic states and to nonmonotonic reasoning, can be exploited for belief revision via model transformation by uncovering splittings not being present before. Furthermore, we characterize situations where belief change operators commute with model transformations.
abstract_zh: 在知识表示领域，所考虑的认知状态通常基于命题解释，也称为世界。例如，智能体的认知状态可以通过对世界的函数排序或总预序来建模。然而，如何用命题语言描述现实世界的情况通常有不同的方式；这可以看作是对同一情况的不同观点。在本文中，我们引入了模型转换的概念，将认知状态从一个观点转换为另一种观点，从而产生了认知状态等价的新概念。我们展示了语法分裂的众所周知的优点，最初是为信念集开发的，后来扩展到认知状态的表示和非单调推理，可以通过模型转换通过发现以前不存在的分裂来利用语法分裂来进行信念修正。此外，我们还描述了信念改变操作者与模型转换进行交换的情况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过模型转换将认知状态从一种视角转换到另一种视角，并定义新的等价性概念。
AI.motivation: 现实情况可能有多种命题语言描述方式（不同视角），需解决认知状态在不同视角间的转换问题，并拓展语法分割在信念修订中的应用。
AI.method: 引入模型转换概念，结合语法分割技术，分析信念变化运算符与模型转换的交换性条件。
AI.result: 揭示了语法分割在信念修订中的新应用，明确了信念变化运算符与模型转换交换的特定场景。
AI.conclusion: 模型转换为认知状态提供了新的等价性视角，扩展了知识表示与信念修订的理论框架。

In this paper we introduce the concept of model transformations to convert an epistemic state from one point of view to another point of view, yielding a novel notion of equivalence of epistemic states. We show how the well-known advantages of syntax splitting, originally developed for belief sets and later extended to representation of epistemic states and to nonmonotonic reasoning, can be exploited for belief revision via model transformation by uncovering splittings not being present before. Furthermore, we characterize situations where belief change operators commute with model transformations. 在知识表示领域，所考虑的认知状态通常基于命题解释，也称为世界。例如，智能体的认知状态可以通过对世界的函数排序或总预序来建模。然而，如何用命题语言描述现实世界的情况通常有不同的方式；这可以看作是对同一情况的不同观点。在本文中，我们引入了模型转换的概念，将认知状态从一个观点转换为另一种观点，从而产生了认知状态等价的新概念。我们展示了语法分裂的众所周知的优点，最初是为信念集开发的，后来扩展到认知状态的表示和非单调推理，可以通过模型转换通过发现以前不存在的分裂来利用语法分裂来进行信念修正。此外，我们还描述了信念改变操作者与模型转换进行交换的情况。 本文提出通过模型转换将认知状态从一种视角转换到另一种视角，并定义新的等价性概念。 Jonas Haldimann,Christoph Beierle cs.AI

title: A Neural Vocoder Based Packet Loss Concealment Algorithm
title_zh: 一种基于神经声码器的丢包隐藏算法
comment: 5 pages, 8 figures, already submitted to INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: 5 pages, 8 figures, already submitted to INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: The packet loss problem seriously affects the quality of service in Voice over IP (VoIP) sceneries. In this paper, we investigated online receiver-based packet loss concealment which is much more portable and applicable. For ensuring the speech naturalness, rather than directly processing time-domain waveforms or separately reconstructing amplitudes and phases in frequency domain, a flow-based neural vocoder is adopted to generate the substitution waveform of lost packet from Mel-spectrogram which is generated from history contents by a well-designed neural predictor. Furthermore, a waveform similarity-based smoothing post-process is created to mitigate the discontinuity of speech and avoid the artifacts. The experimental results show the outstanding performance of the proposed method.
summary: The packet loss problem seriously affects the quality of service in Voice over IP (VoIP) sceneries. In this paper, we investigated online receiver-based packet loss concealment which is much more portable and applicable. For ensuring the speech naturalness, rather than directly processing time-domain waveforms or separately reconstructing amplitudes and phases in frequency domain, a flow-based neural vocoder is adopted to generate the substitution waveform of lost packet from Mel-spectrogram which is generated from history contents by a well-designed neural predictor. Furthermore, a waveform similarity-based smoothing post-process is created to mitigate the discontinuity of speech and avoid the artifacts. The experimental results show the outstanding performance of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 丢包问题严重影响VoIP场景的服务质量。在本文中，我们研究了基于在线接收器的丢包隐藏，它更加便携和适用。为了确保语音自然度，不是直接处理时域波形或在频域中单独重建幅度和相位，而是采用基于流的神经声码器从梅尔谱图生成丢失数据包的替换波形，梅尔谱图是由精心设计的神经预测器根据历史内容生成的。此外，还创建了基于波形相似性的平滑后处理，以减轻语音的不连续性并避免伪影。实验结果表明该方法具有出色的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于神经声码器的包丢失隐藏算法，用于改善VoIP场景下的语音质量。
AI.motivation: 包丢失严重影响VoIP通信质量，传统方法存在可移植性差或处理效果不佳的问题，需更高效的接收端解决方案。
AI.method: 采用流式神经声码器，从历史内容生成的梅尔频谱图中合成丢失包的替代波形，并通过波形相似性平滑后处理减少失真。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在语音自然度和连续性方面优于现有技术，有效缓解了包丢失带来的 artifacts。
AI.conclusion: 基于神经声码器的包丢失隐藏方法在保持语音质量的同时提升了算法的可移植性与实用性。

title: EYNet: Extended YOLO for Airport Detection in Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: EYNet：用于遥感图像中机场检测的扩展 YOLO
abstract: Nowadays, airport detection in remote sensing images has attracted considerable attention due to its strategic role in civilian and military scopes. In particular, uncrewed and operated aerial vehicles must immediately detect safe areas to land in emergencies. The previous schemes suffered from various aspects, including complicated backgrounds, scales, and shapes of the airport. Meanwhile, the rapid action and accuracy of the method are confronted with significant concerns. Hence, this study proposes an effective scheme by extending YOLOV3 and ShearLet transform. In this way, MobileNet and ResNet18, with fewer layers and parameters retrained on a similar dataset, are parallelly trained as base networks. According to airport geometrical characteristics, the ShearLet filters with different scales and directions are considered in the first convolution layers of ResNet18 as a visual attention mechanism. Besides, the major extended in YOLOV3 concerns the detection Sub-Networks with novel structures which boost object expression ability and training efficiency. In addition, novel augmentation and negative mining strategies are presented to significantly increase the localization phase's performance. The experimental results on the DIOR dataset reveal that the framework reliably detects different types of airports in a varied area and acquires robust results in complex scenes compared to traditional YOLOV3 and state-of-the-art schemes.
summary: Nowadays, airport detection in remote sensing images has attracted considerable attention due to its strategic role in civilian and military scopes. In particular, uncrewed and operated aerial vehicles must immediately detect safe areas to land in emergencies. The previous schemes suffered from various aspects, including complicated backgrounds, scales, and shapes of the airport. Meanwhile, the rapid action and accuracy of the method are confronted with significant concerns. Hence, this study proposes an effective scheme by extending YOLOV3 and ShearLet transform. In this way, MobileNet and ResNet18, with fewer layers and parameters retrained on a similar dataset, are parallelly trained as base networks. According to airport geometrical characteristics, the ShearLet filters with different scales and directions are considered in the first convolution layers of ResNet18 as a visual attention mechanism. Besides, the major extended in YOLOV3 concerns the detection Sub-Networks with novel structures which boost object expression ability and training efficiency. In addition, novel augmentation and negative mining strategies are presented to significantly increase the localization phase's performance. The experimental results on the DIOR dataset reveal that the framework reliably detects different types of airports in a varied area and acquires robust results in complex scenes compared to traditional YOLOV3 and state-of-the-art schemes.
abstract_zh: 如今，遥感图像中的机场检测由于其在民用和军事领域的战略作用而引起了广泛的关注。特别是，无人操作的飞行器必须立即检测安全区域，以便在紧急情况下着陆。之前的方案受到了多方面的影响，包括复杂的机场背景、规模和形状。与此同时，该方法的快速作用和准确性面临着重大问题。因此，本研究通过扩展YOLOV3和ShearLet变换提出了一种有效的方案。通过这种方式，MobileNet 和 ResNet18 在相似数据集上重新训练的层数和参数较少，可以作为基础网络并行训练。根据机场几何特征，在ResNet18的第一个卷积层中考虑不同尺度和方向的ShearLet滤波器作为视觉注意机制。此外，YOLOV3的主要扩展涉及具有新颖结构的检测子网络，可提高对象表达能力和训练效率。此外，还提出了新颖的增强和负挖掘策略，以显着提高定位阶段的性能。 DIOR 数据集上的实验结果表明，与传统的 YOLOV3 和最先进的方案相比，该框架能够可靠地检测不同区域的不同类型的机场，并在复杂场景中获得稳健的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EYNet，通过扩展YOLOV3和引入ShearLet变换，改进遥感图像中的机场检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂背景、机场尺度和形状多样性下表现不足，需提升检测速度与准确性以满足应急降落需求。
AI.method: 结合YOLOV3扩展结构与ShearLet变换，采用MobileNet和ResNet18并行训练作为基础网络，并在ResNet18第一层引入多尺度方向ShearLet滤波器作为视觉注意力机制，同时优化检测子网络结构及数据增强策略。
AI.result: 在DIOR数据集上实验表明，该框架能可靠检测多种机场类型，在复杂场景下优于传统YOLOV3及其他先进方法。
AI.conclusion: EYNet通过多网络融合与视觉注意力机制有效提升了遥感图像机场检测的鲁棒性与准确性。

authors_text: Qiyu Sun,Gary G. Yen,Yang Tang,Chaoqiang Zhao
title: Learn to Adapt for Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: 学习适应单眼深度估计
abstract: Monocular depth estimation is one of the fundamental tasks in environmental perception and has achieved tremendous progress in virtue of deep learning. However, the performance of trained models tends to degrade or deteriorate when employed on other new datasets due to the gap between different datasets. Though some methods utilize domain adaptation technologies to jointly train different domains and narrow the gap between them, the trained models cannot generalize to new domains that are not involved in training. To boost the transferability of depth estimation models, we propose an adversarial depth estimation task and train the model in the pipeline of meta-learning. Our proposed adversarial task mitigates the issue of meta-overfitting, since the network is trained in an adversarial manner and aims to extract domain invariant representations. In addition, we propose a constraint to impose upon cross-task depth consistency to compel the depth estimation to be identical in different adversarial tasks, which improves the performance of our method and smoothens the training process. Experiments demonstrate that our method adapts well to new datasets after few training steps during the test procedure.
summary: Monocular depth estimation is one of the fundamental tasks in environmental perception and has achieved tremendous progress in virtue of deep learning. However, the performance of trained models tends to degrade or deteriorate when employed on other new datasets due to the gap between different datasets. Though some methods utilize domain adaptation technologies to jointly train different domains and narrow the gap between them, the trained models cannot generalize to new domains that are not involved in training. To boost the transferability of depth estimation models, we propose an adversarial depth estimation task and train the model in the pipeline of meta-learning. Our proposed adversarial task mitigates the issue of meta-overfitting, since the network is trained in an adversarial manner and aims to extract domain invariant representations. In addition, we propose a constraint to impose upon cross-task depth consistency to compel the depth estimation to be identical in different adversarial tasks, which improves the performance of our method and smoothens the training process. Experiments demonstrate that our method adapts well to new datasets after few training steps during the test procedure.
abstract_zh: 单目深度估计是环境感知的基本任务之一，并凭借深度学习取得了巨大进展。然而，由于不同数据集之间的差距，当在其他新数据集上使用经过训练的模型时，其性能往往会降低或恶化。尽管一些方法利用领域适应技术来联合训练不同领域并缩小它们之间的差距，但训练后的模型无法泛化到不参与训练的新领域。为了提高深度估计模型的可迁移性，我们提出了对抗性深度估计任务，并在元学习的过程中训练模型。我们提出的对抗性任务减轻了元过度拟合的问题，因为网络以对抗性方式进行训练，旨在提取域不变表示。此外，我们提出了对跨任务深度一致性施加的约束，以迫使深度估计在不同的对抗性任务中相同，这提高了我们方法的性能并平滑了训练过程。实验表明，在测试过程中经过几个训练步骤后，我们的方法可以很好地适应新的数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过对抗训练和元学习提升单目深度估计模型在新数据集上的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在跨数据集应用时性能下降，传统领域自适应方法无法泛化到未参与训练的新领域。
AI.method: 提出对抗性深度估计任务结合元学习框架，并引入跨任务深度一致性约束以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在测试阶段仅需少量训练步骤即可有效适应新数据集。
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练与元学习结合，辅以跨任务一致性约束，可显著增强深度估计模型的跨领域适应能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在通过对抗训练和元学习提升单目深度估计模型在新数据集上的适应能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有模型在跨数据集应用时性能下降，传统领域自适应方法无法泛化到未参与训练的新领域。
ai_content.method: 提出对抗性深度估计任务结合元学习框架，并引入跨任务深度一致性约束以提升模型鲁棒性。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该方法在测试阶段仅需少量训练步骤即可有效适应新数据集。
ai_content.conclusion: 对抗训练与元学习结合，辅以跨任务一致性约束，可显著增强深度估计模型的跨领域适应能力。

search_text: Learn to Adapt for Monocular Depth Estimation 学习适应单眼深度估计 Monocular depth estimation is one of the fundamental tasks in environmental perception and has achieved tremendous progress in virtue of deep learning. However, the performance of trained models tends to degrade or deteriorate when employed on other new datasets due to the gap between different datasets. Though some methods utilize domain adaptation technologies to jointly train different domains and narrow the gap between them, the trained models cannot generalize to new domains that are not involved in training. To boost the transferability of depth estimation models, we propose an adversarial depth estimation task and train the model in the pipeline of meta-learning. Our proposed adversarial task mitigates the issue of meta-overfitting, since the network is trained in an adversarial manner and aims to extract domain invariant representations. In addition, we propose a constraint to impose upon cross-task depth consistency to compel the depth estimation to be identical in different adversarial tasks, which improves the performance of our method and smoothens the training process. Experiments demonstrate that our method adapts well to new datasets after few training steps during the test procedure. 单目深度估计是环境感知的基本任务之一，并凭借深度学习取得了巨大进展。然而，由于不同数据集之间的差距，当在其他新数据集上使用经过训练的模型时，其性能往往会降低或恶化。尽管一些方法利用领域适应技术来联合训练不同领域并缩小它们之间的差距，但训练后的模型无法泛化到不参与训练的新领域。为了提高深度估计模型的可迁移性，我们提出了对抗性深度估计任务，并在元学习的过程中训练模型。我们提出的对抗性任务减轻了元过度拟合的问题，因为网络以对抗性方式进行训练，旨在提取域不变表示。此外，我们提出了对跨任务深度一致性施加的约束，以迫使深度估计在不同的对抗性任务中相同，这提高了我们方法的性能并平滑了训练过程。实验表明，在测试过程中经过几个训练步骤后，我们的方法可以很好地适应新的数据集。 本文旨在通过对抗训练和元学习提升单目深度估计模型在新数据集上的适应能力。 Qiyu Sun,Gary G. Yen,Yang Tang,Chaoqiang Zhao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Defang Chen,Jian-Ping Mei,Hailin Zhang,Can Wang,Yan Feng,Chun Chen
title: Knowledge Distillation with the Reused Teacher Classifier
title_zh: 使用重用教师分类器进行知识蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge distillation aims to compress a powerful yet cumbersome teacher model into a lightweight student model without much sacrifice of performance. For this purpose, various approaches have been proposed over the past few years, generally with elaborately designed knowledge representations, which in turn increase the difficulty of model development and interpretation. In contrast, we empirically show that a simple knowledge distillation technique is enough to significantly narrow down the teacher-student performance gap. We directly reuse the discriminative classifier from the pre-trained teacher model for student inference and train a student encoder through feature alignment with a single $\ell_2$ loss. In this way, the student model is able to achieve exactly the same performance as the teacher model provided that their extracted features are perfectly aligned. An additional projector is developed to help the student encoder match with the teacher classifier, which renders our technique applicable to various teacher and student architectures. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our technique achieves state-of-the-art results at the modest cost of compression ratio due to the added projector.
summary: Knowledge distillation aims to compress a powerful yet cumbersome teacher model into a lightweight student model without much sacrifice of performance. For this purpose, various approaches have been proposed over the past few years, generally with elaborately designed knowledge representations, which in turn increase the difficulty of model development and interpretation. In contrast, we empirically show that a simple knowledge distillation technique is enough to significantly narrow down the teacher-student performance gap. We directly reuse the discriminative classifier from the pre-trained teacher model for student inference and train a student encoder through feature alignment with a single $\ell_2$ loss. In this way, the student model is able to achieve exactly the same performance as the teacher model provided that their extracted features are perfectly aligned. An additional projector is developed to help the student encoder match with the teacher classifier, which renders our technique applicable to various teacher and student architectures. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our technique achieves state-of-the-art results at the modest cost of compression ratio due to the added projector.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏的目的是在不牺牲太多性能的情况下，将强大而繁琐的教师模型压缩为轻量级的学生模型。为此，过去几年提出了各种方法，通常都精心设计了知识表示，这反过来又增加了模型开发和解释的难度。相比之下，我们凭经验表明，简单的知识蒸馏技术足以显着缩小师生表现差距。我们直接重用预训练教师模型中的判别分类器进行学生推理，并通过具有单个 $\ell_2$ 损失的特征对齐来训练学生编码器。这样，只要提取的特征完全一致，学生模型就能够实现与教师模型完全相同的性能。开发了一个额外的投影仪来帮助学生编码器与教师分类器匹配，这使得我们的技术适用于各种教师和学生架构。大量的实验表明，由于增加了投影仪，我们的技术以适度的压缩比成本实现了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简单有效的知识蒸馏方法，通过复用教师模型的分类器并利用特征对齐技术，实现学生模型与教师模型性能的接近。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏方法依赖复杂的知识表示设计，增加了模型开发难度。作者认为简单方法即可显著缩小师生模型性能差距，从而提升效率。
AI.method: 直接复用预训练教师模型的分类器进行学生推理，通过特征对齐和单ℓ2损失训练学生编码器，并引入投影器适配不同架构的师生模型。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持教师模型性能的同时达到最先进的压缩效果，且因投影器增加的压缩比成本较低。
AI.conclusion: 本文验证了简单知识蒸馏技术的有效性，通过分类器复用与特征对齐机制，实现了跨架构的高性能模型压缩。

authors_text: Amir Safarpoor,Jason D. Hipp,H. R. Tizhoosh
title: Learning to Predict RNA Sequence Expressions from Whole Slide Images with Applications for Search and Classification
title_zh: 学习使用搜索和分类应用程序从整个幻灯片图像预测 RNA 序列表达
abstract: Deep learning methods are widely applied in digital pathology to address clinical challenges such as prognosis and diagnosis. As one of the most recent applications, deep models have also been used to extract molecular features from whole slide images. Although molecular tests carry rich information, they are often expensive, time-consuming, and require additional tissue to sample. In this paper, we propose tRNAsfomer, an attention-based topology that can learn both to predict the bulk RNA-seq from an image and represent the whole slide image of a glass slide simultaneously. The tRNAsfomer uses multiple instance learning to solve a weakly supervised problem while the pixel-level annotation is not available for an image. We conducted several experiments and achieved better performance and faster convergence in comparison to the state-of-the-art algorithms. The proposed tRNAsfomer can assist as a computational pathology tool to facilitate a new generation of search and classification methods by combining the tissue morphology and the molecular fingerprint of the biopsy samples.
summary: Deep learning methods are widely applied in digital pathology to address clinical challenges such as prognosis and diagnosis. As one of the most recent applications, deep models have also been used to extract molecular features from whole slide images. Although molecular tests carry rich information, they are often expensive, time-consuming, and require additional tissue to sample. In this paper, we propose tRNAsfomer, an attention-based topology that can learn both to predict the bulk RNA-seq from an image and represent the whole slide image of a glass slide simultaneously. The tRNAsfomer uses multiple instance learning to solve a weakly supervised problem while the pixel-level annotation is not available for an image. We conducted several experiments and achieved better performance and faster convergence in comparison to the state-of-the-art algorithms. The proposed tRNAsfomer can assist as a computational pathology tool to facilitate a new generation of search and classification methods by combining the tissue morphology and the molecular fingerprint of the biopsy samples.
abstract_zh: 深度学习方法广泛应用于数字病理学中，以解决预后和诊断等临床挑战。作为最新的应用之一，深度模型也被用来从整个幻灯片图像中提取分子特征。尽管分子测试携带丰富的信息，但它们通常昂贵、耗时，并且需要额外的组织来取样。在本文中，我们提出了 tRNAsfomer，这是一种基于注意力的拓扑结构，可以学习从图像中预测大量 RNA-seq，并同时表示载玻片的整个载玻片图像。 tRNAsfomer 使用多实例学习来解决弱监督问题，而像素级注释不适用于图像。与最先进的算法相比，我们进行了多次实验，取得了更好的性能和更快的收敛速度。所提出的 tRNAsfomer 可以作为计算病理学工具，通过结合组织形态和活检样本的分子指纹来促进新一代搜索和分类方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的拓扑结构tRNAsfomer，用于从全切片图像中同时预测批量RNA测序结果并表征组织形态学特征。
AI.motivation: 分子检测方法成本高且耗时，需额外组织样本，而病理图像包含丰富的形态学信息，亟需通过计算病理学方法实现分子特征的无创预测。
AI.method: 设计tRNAsfomer模型，结合多实例学习框架，在弱监督条件下通过注意力机制联合学习图像表征与RNA表达预测，无需像素级标注。
AI.result: 实验表明tRNAsfomer在预测性能和收敛速度上优于现有算法，可有效融合组织形态与分子指纹信息。
AI.conclusion: tRNAsfomer为计算病理学提供了新工具，通过整合形态学与分子数据，推动病理图像检索与分类方法的发展。

authors_text: Xiaoxiao Liang,Yiqun Lin,Huazhu Fu,Lei Zhu,Xiaomeng Li
title: RSCFed: Random Sampling Consensus Federated Semi-supervised Learning
title_zh: RSCFed：随机抽样共识联邦半监督学习
abstract: Federated semi-supervised learning (FSSL) aims to derive a global model by training fully-labeled and fully-unlabeled clients or training partially labeled clients. The existing approaches work well when local clients have independent and identically distributed (IID) data but fail to generalize to a more practical FSSL setting, i.e., Non-IID setting. In this paper, we present a Random Sampling Consensus Federated learning, namely RSCFed, by considering the uneven reliability among models from fully-labeled clients, fully-unlabeled clients or partially labeled clients. Our key motivation is that given models with large deviations from either labeled clients or unlabeled clients, the consensus could be reached by performing random sub-sampling over clients. To achieve it, instead of directly aggregating local models, we first distill several sub-consensus models by random sub-sampling over clients and then aggregating the sub-consensus models to the global model. To enhance the robustness of sub-consensus models, we also develop a novel distance-reweighted model aggregation method. Experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on three benchmarked datasets, including both natural and medical images. The code is available at https://github.com/XMed-Lab/RSCFed.
summary: Federated semi-supervised learning (FSSL) aims to derive a global model by training fully-labeled and fully-unlabeled clients or training partially labeled clients. The existing approaches work well when local clients have independent and identically distributed (IID) data but fail to generalize to a more practical FSSL setting, i.e., Non-IID setting. In this paper, we present a Random Sampling Consensus Federated learning, namely RSCFed, by considering the uneven reliability among models from fully-labeled clients, fully-unlabeled clients or partially labeled clients. Our key motivation is that given models with large deviations from either labeled clients or unlabeled clients, the consensus could be reached by performing random sub-sampling over clients. To achieve it, instead of directly aggregating local models, we first distill several sub-consensus models by random sub-sampling over clients and then aggregating the sub-consensus models to the global model. To enhance the robustness of sub-consensus models, we also develop a novel distance-reweighted model aggregation method. Experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods on three benchmarked datasets, including both natural and medical images. The code is available at https://github.com/XMed-Lab/RSCFed.
abstract_zh: 联邦半监督学习（FSSL）旨在通过训练完全标记和完全未标记的客户端或训练部分标记的客户端来导出全局模型。当本地客户端具有独立同分布（IID）数据但无法推广到更实用的 FSSL 设置（即非 IID 设置）时，现有方法效果很好。在本文中，我们通过考虑完全标记客户、完全未标记客户或部分标记客户的模型之间的可靠性不均匀，提出了一种随机抽样共识联邦学习，即 RSCFed。我们的主要动机是，给定与标记客户或未标记客户有较大偏差的模型，可以通过对客户进行随机子采样来达成共识。为了实现这一目标，我们不是直接聚合局部模型，而是首先通过对客户端进行随机子采样来提取几个次共识模型，然后将次共识模型聚合到全局模型。为了增强次共识模型的鲁棒性，我们还开发了一种新颖的距离重新加权模型聚合方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法在三个基准数据集（包括自然图像和医学图像）上优于最先进的方法。该代码可在 https://github.com/XMed-Lab/RSCFed 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RSCFed的联邦半监督学习方法，用于在非独立同分布（Non-IID）的数据设置下提升全局模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的联邦半监督学习方法在独立同分布（IID）数据上表现良好，但在更实际的非独立同分布（Non-IID）设置中表现不佳。因此，本文旨在通过考虑来自完全标注、完全未标注或部分标注客户端模型的可靠性差异，提升模型的泛化能力。
AI.method: RSCFed通过从客户端中进行随机子采样，生成多个子共识模型，然后对这些子共识模型进行聚合以得到全局模型。此外，还开发了一种新的距离加权模型聚合方法，以增强子共识模型的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，RSCFed在三个基准数据集（包括自然图像和医学图像）上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: RSCFed通过随机子采样和距离加权聚合方法，有效提升了联邦半监督学习在非独立同分布数据设置下的性能。
