search_text: Spatial Processing Front-End For Distant ASR Exploiting Self-Attention Channel Combinator 利用自注意力通道组合器的远程 ASR 空间处理前端 We present a novel multi-channel front-end based on channel shortening with theWeighted Prediction Error (WPE) method followed by a fixed MVDR beamformer used in combination with a recently proposed self-attention-based channel combination (SACC) scheme, for tackling the distant ASR problem. We show that the proposed system used as part of a ContextNet based end-to-end (E2E) ASR system outperforms leading ASR systems as demonstrated by a 21.6% reduction in relative WER on a multi-channel LibriSpeech playback dataset. We also show how dereverberation prior to beamforming is beneficial and compare the WPE method with a modified neural channel shortening approach. An analysis of the non-intrusive estimate of the signal C50 confirms that the 8 channel WPE method provides significant dereverberation of the signals (13.6 dB improvement). We also show how the weights of the SACC system allow the extraction of accurate spatial information which can be beneficial for other speech processing applications like diarization. 我们提出了一种基于信道缩短的新型多信道前端，采用加权预测误差（WPE）方法，然后将固定的 MVDR 波束形成器与最近提出的基于自注意力的信道组合（SACC）方案结合使用，以解决远程 ASR 问题。我们表明，所提出的系统用作基于 ContextNet 的端到端 (E2E) ASR 系统的一部分，其性能优于领先的 ASR 系统，多通道 LibriSpeech 播放数据集上的相对 WER 降低了 21.6%。我们还展示了波束成形之前的去混响的好处，并将 WPE 方法与改进的神经通道缩短方法进行了比较。对信号 C50 的非侵入式估计的分析证实，8 通道 WPE 方法提供了显着的信号去混响（改善了 13.6 dB）。我们还展示了 SACC 系统的权重如何提取准确的空间信息，这对于二值化等其他语音处理应用是有益的。 本文提出一种结合加权预测误差（WPE）、MVDR波束成形器和自注意力通道组合（SACC）的多通道前端处理方法，用于提升远场语音识别（ASR）性能。 Dushyant Sharma,Rong Gong,James Fosburgh,Stanislav Yu. Kruchinin,Patrick A. Naylor,Ljubomir Milanovic eess.AS,cs.AI

title: SpeqNets: Sparsity-aware Permutation-equivariant Graph Networks
title_zh: SpeqNets：稀疏感知排列等变图网络
abstract: While (message-passing) graph neural networks have clear limitations in approximating permutation-equivariant functions over graphs or general relational data, more expressive, higher-order graph neural networks do not scale to large graphs. They either operate on $k$-order tensors or consider all $k$-node subgraphs, implying an exponential dependence on $k$ in memory requirements, and do not adapt to the sparsity of the graph. By introducing new heuristics for the graph isomorphism problem, we devise a class of universal, permutation-equivariant graph networks, which, unlike previous architectures, offer a fine-grained control between expressivity and scalability and adapt to the sparsity of the graph. These architectures lead to vastly reduced computation times compared to standard higher-order graph networks in the supervised node- and graph-level classification and regression regime while significantly improving over standard graph neural network and graph kernel architectures in terms of predictive performance.
summary: While (message-passing) graph neural networks have clear limitations in approximating permutation-equivariant functions over graphs or general relational data, more expressive, higher-order graph neural networks do not scale to large graphs. They either operate on $k$-order tensors or consider all $k$-node subgraphs, implying an exponential dependence on $k$ in memory requirements, and do not adapt to the sparsity of the graph. By introducing new heuristics for the graph isomorphism problem, we devise a class of universal, permutation-equivariant graph networks, which, unlike previous architectures, offer a fine-grained control between expressivity and scalability and adapt to the sparsity of the graph. These architectures lead to vastly reduced computation times compared to standard higher-order graph networks in the supervised node- and graph-level classification and regression regime while significantly improving over standard graph neural network and graph kernel architectures in terms of predictive performance.
abstract_zh: 虽然（消息传递）图神经网络在图或一般关系数据上近似排列等变函数方面具有明显的局限性，但更具表现力的高阶图神经网络无法扩展到大型图。它们要么对 $k$ 阶张量进行操作，要么考虑所有 $k$ 节点子图，这意味着内存需求对 $k$ 呈指数依赖性，并且不适应图的稀疏性。通过为图同构问题引入新的启发式方法，我们设计了一类通用的、排列等变的图网络，与以前的架构不同，它提供了表达性和可扩展性之间的细粒度控制，并适应图的稀疏性。与监督节点和图级分类和回归机制中的标准高阶图网络相比，这些架构大大减少了计算时间，同时在预测性能方面比标准图神经网络和图内核架构显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SpeqNets的新型图网络架构，旨在解决传统图神经网络在处理置换等变函数时的局限性及高阶网络的可扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络难以有效逼近置换等变函数，而更高阶模型因计算复杂度高且无法适应图的稀疏性，导致在大规模图数据上表现不佳。
AI.method: 通过引入新的图同构问题启发式方法，设计出具有细粒度表达能力与可扩展性控制的通用置换等变图网络，适应图的稀疏特性。
AI.result: 在监督节点和图级分类/回归任务中，SpeqNets显著减少计算时间，同时预测性能优于标准图神经网络和图核方法。
AI.conclusion: SpeqNets通过平衡表达能力与可扩展性，并适配图稀疏性，在大规模图任务中展现出优越的效率和性能。

authors_text: Xuan Hu,Benjamin W. Walker,Felipe García-Sánchez,Alexander J. Edwards,Peng Zhou,Jean Anne C. Incorvia,Alexandru Paler,Michael P. Frank,Joseph S. Friedman
title: Logical and Physical Reversibility of Conservative Skyrmion Logic
title_zh: 保守斯格明子逻辑的逻辑和物理可逆性
abstract: Magnetic skyrmions are nanoscale whirls of magnetism that can be propagated with electrical currents. The repulsion between skyrmions inspires their use for reversible computing based on the elastic billiard ball collisions proposed for conservative logic in 1982. Here we evaluate the logical and physical reversibility of this skyrmion logic paradigm, as well as the limitations that must be addressed before dissipation-free computation can be realized.
summary: Magnetic skyrmions are nanoscale whirls of magnetism that can be propagated with electrical currents. The repulsion between skyrmions inspires their use for reversible computing based on the elastic billiard ball collisions proposed for conservative logic in 1982. Here we evaluate the logical and physical reversibility of this skyrmion logic paradigm, as well as the limitations that must be addressed before dissipation-free computation can be realized.
abstract_zh: 磁性斯格明子是纳米级的磁性漩涡，可以通过电流传播。斯格明子之间的排斥激发了它们在 1982 年为保守逻辑提出的基于弹性台球碰撞的可逆计算的使用。在这里，我们评估了这种斯格明子逻辑范式的逻辑和物理可逆性，以及在实现无耗散计算之前必须解决的限制。

AI.tldr: 评估保守型斯格明子逻辑的逻辑与物理可逆性，并探讨实现无耗散计算的限制。
AI.motivation: 磁斯格明子的排斥特性启发其用于可逆计算，可能实现低能耗计算，但需验证其可行性及解决关键限制。
AI.method: 基于弹性碰撞模型理论分析斯格明子逻辑的可逆性，结合磁斯格明子物理特性进行评估。
AI.result: 确认斯格明子逻辑在理论上的可逆性，但指出需解决斯格明子操控精度、能量耗散及规模化集成等技术挑战。
AI.conclusion: 斯格明子逻辑具备无耗散计算潜力，但需进一步研究其物理实现机制与工程化限制。

title: Concept Embedding Analysis: A Review
title_zh: 概念嵌入分析：回顾
comment: 47 pages, 6 tables, 4 figures; submitted to Artificial Intelligence Review
comments: 47 pages, 6 tables, 4 figures; submitted to Artificial Intelligence Review
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have found their way into many applications with potential impact on the safety, security, and fairness of human-machine-systems. Such require basic understanding and sufficient trust by the users. This motivated the research field of explainable artificial intelligence (XAI), i.e. finding methods for opening the "black-boxes" DNNs represent. For the computer vision domain in specific, practical assessment of DNNs requires a globally valid association of human interpretable concepts with internals of the model. The research field of concept (embedding) analysis (CA) tackles this problem: CA aims to find global, assessable associations of humanly interpretable semantic concepts (e.g., eye, bearded) with internal representations of a DNN. This work establishes a general definition of CA and a taxonomy for CA methods, uniting several ideas from literature. That allows to easily position and compare CA approaches. Guided by the defined notions, the current state-of-the-art research regarding CA methods and interesting applications are reviewed. More than thirty relevant methods are discussed, compared, and categorized. Finally, for practitioners, a survey of fifteen datasets is provided that have been used for supervised concept analysis. Open challenges and research directions are pointed out at the end.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have found their way into many applications with potential impact on the safety, security, and fairness of human-machine-systems. Such require basic understanding and sufficient trust by the users. This motivated the research field of explainable artificial intelligence (XAI), i.e. finding methods for opening the "black-boxes" DNNs represent. For the computer vision domain in specific, practical assessment of DNNs requires a globally valid association of human interpretable concepts with internals of the model. The research field of concept (embedding) analysis (CA) tackles this problem: CA aims to find global, assessable associations of humanly interpretable semantic concepts (e.g., eye, bearded) with internal representations of a DNN. This work establishes a general definition of CA and a taxonomy for CA methods, uniting several ideas from literature. That allows to easily position and compare CA approaches. Guided by the defined notions, the current state-of-the-art research regarding CA methods and interesting applications are reviewed. More than thirty relevant methods are discussed, compared, and categorized. Finally, for practitioners, a survey of fifteen datasets is provided that have been used for supervised concept analysis. Open challenges and research directions are pointed out at the end.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已进入许多应用领域，对人机系统的安全性和公平性产生潜在影响。这需要用户有基本的了解和足够的信任。这激发了可解释人工智能 (XAI) 的研究领域，即寻找打开 DNN 所代表的“黑匣子”的方法。对于特定的计算机视觉领域，DNN 的实际评估需要人类可解释概念与模型内部的全局有效关联。概念（嵌入）分析 (CA) 研究领域解决了这个问题：CA 旨在找到人类可解释的语义概念（例如眼睛、胡须）与 DNN 内部表示的全局、可评估的关联。这项工作结合了文献中的一些想法，建立了 CA 的一般定义和 CA 方法的分类法。这样可以轻松定位和比较 CA 方法。在定义概念的指导下，回顾了当前关于 CA 方法和有趣应用的最先进的研究。对三十多种相关方法进行了讨论、比较和分类。最后，为实践者提供了对十五个数据集的调查，这些数据集已用于监督概念分析。最后指出了开放的挑战和研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文对概念嵌入分析（CA）方法进行综述，建立统一定义与分类体系，并总结当前研究进展与数据集。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络的黑箱特性影响其在安全、公平等关键领域的可信度，需通过可解释性方法建立人类可理解概念与模型内部表示的关联。
AI.method: 提出概念分析的通用定义与分类框架，系统梳理比较30余种方法，总结15个常用数据集并指出研究挑战。
AI.result: 构建了CA方法的分类体系，全面回顾了现有技术路线，为实践者提供数据集参考并明确未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 概念分析是推动可解释AI的重要方向，但需解决跨模型泛化、动态概念适应等核心挑战。

search_text: Concept Embedding Analysis: A Review 概念嵌入分析：回顾 Deep neural networks (DNNs) have found their way into many applications with potential impact on the safety, security, and fairness of human-machine-systems. Such require basic understanding and sufficient trust by the users. This motivated the research field of explainable artificial intelligence (XAI), i.e. finding methods for opening the "black-boxes" DNNs represent. For the computer vision domain in specific, practical assessment of DNNs requires a globally valid association of human interpretable concepts with internals of the model. The research field of concept (embedding) analysis (CA) tackles this problem: CA aims to find global, assessable associations of humanly interpretable semantic concepts (e.g., eye, bearded) with internal representations of a DNN. This work establishes a general definition of CA and a taxonomy for CA methods, uniting several ideas from literature. That allows to easily position and compare CA approaches. Guided by the defined notions, the current state-of-the-art research regarding CA methods and interesting applications are reviewed. More than thirty relevant methods are discussed, compared, and categorized. Finally, for practitioners, a survey of fifteen datasets is provided that have been used for supervised concept analysis. Open challenges and research directions are pointed out at the end. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已进入许多应用领域，对人机系统的安全性和公平性产生潜在影响。这需要用户有基本的了解和足够的信任。这激发了可解释人工智能 (XAI) 的研究领域，即寻找打开 DNN 所代表的“黑匣子”的方法。对于特定的计算机视觉领域，DNN 的实际评估需要人类可解释概念与模型内部的全局有效关联。概念（嵌入）分析 (CA) 研究领域解决了这个问题：CA 旨在找到人类可解释的语义概念（例如眼睛、胡须）与 DNN 内部表示的全局、可评估的关联。这项工作结合了文献中的一些想法，建立了 CA 的一般定义和 CA 方法的分类法。这样可以轻松定位和比较 CA 方法。在定义概念的指导下，回顾了当前关于 CA 方法和有趣应用的最先进的研究。对三十多种相关方法进行了讨论、比较和分类。最后，为实践者提供了对十五个数据集的调查，这些数据集已用于监督概念分析。最后指出了开放的挑战和研究方向。 本文对概念嵌入分析（CA）方法进行综述，建立统一定义与分类体系，并总结当前研究进展与数据集。 Gesina Schwalbe cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Li Yin,Juan M Perez-Rua,Kevin J Liang
title: Sylph: A Hypernetwork Framework for Incremental Few-shot Object Detection
title_zh: Sylph：用于增量少量目标检测的超网络框架
abstract: We study the challenging incremental few-shot object detection (iFSD) setting. Recently, hypernetwork-based approaches have been studied in the context of continuous and finetune-free iFSD with limited success. We take a closer look at important design choices of such methods, leading to several key improvements and resulting in a more accurate and flexible framework, which we call Sylph. In particular, we demonstrate the effectiveness of decoupling object classification from localization by leveraging a base detector that is pretrained for class-agnostic localization on a large-scale dataset. Contrary to what previous results have suggested, we show that with a carefully designed class-conditional hypernetwork, finetune-free iFSD can be highly effective, especially when a large number of base categories with abundant data are available for meta-training, almost approaching alternatives that undergo test-time-training. This result is even more significant considering its many practical advantages: (1) incrementally learning new classes in sequence without additional training, (2) detecting both novel and seen classes in a single pass, and (3) no forgetting of previously seen classes. We benchmark our model on both COCO and LVIS, reporting as high as 17% AP on the long-tail rare classes on LVIS, indicating the promise of hypernetwork-based iFSD.
summary: We study the challenging incremental few-shot object detection (iFSD) setting. Recently, hypernetwork-based approaches have been studied in the context of continuous and finetune-free iFSD with limited success. We take a closer look at important design choices of such methods, leading to several key improvements and resulting in a more accurate and flexible framework, which we call Sylph. In particular, we demonstrate the effectiveness of decoupling object classification from localization by leveraging a base detector that is pretrained for class-agnostic localization on a large-scale dataset. Contrary to what previous results have suggested, we show that with a carefully designed class-conditional hypernetwork, finetune-free iFSD can be highly effective, especially when a large number of base categories with abundant data are available for meta-training, almost approaching alternatives that undergo test-time-training. This result is even more significant considering its many practical advantages: (1) incrementally learning new classes in sequence without additional training, (2) detecting both novel and seen classes in a single pass, and (3) no forgetting of previously seen classes. We benchmark our model on both COCO and LVIS, reporting as high as 17% AP on the long-tail rare classes on LVIS, indicating the promise of hypernetwork-based iFSD.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了具有挑战性的增量几次目标检测（iFSD）设置。最近，在连续和免微调 iFSD 的背景下研究了基于超网络的方法，但取得的成功有限。我们仔细研究了此类方法的重要设计选择，进行了多项关键改进，并产生了更准确、更灵活的框架，我们将其称为 Sylph。特别是，我们通过利用针对大规模数据集上的类无关定位进行预训练的基础检测器，展示了将对象分类与定位解耦的有效性。与之前的结果相反，我们表明，通过精心设计的类条件超网络，无需微调的 iFSD 可以非常有效，特别是当大量具有丰富数据的基本类别可用于元训练时，几乎接近经过测试时间训练的替代方案。考虑到它的许多实际优点，这个结果更加重要：（1）无需额外训练即可按顺序增量学习新类，（2）一次检测新类和已见类，以及（3）不会忘记以前见过的类。我们在 COCO 和 LVIS 上对我们的模型进行基准测试，报告 LVIS 上的长尾稀有类别的 AP 高达 17%，这表明基于超网络的 iFSD 的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Sylph的超网络框架，用于增量少样本目标检测（iFSD），通过解耦分类与定位任务，实现无需微调的连续学习。
AI.motivation: 现有超网络方法在连续且无需微调的iFSD任务中效果有限，本文旨在通过优化设计选择，提升方法的准确性与灵活性，并解决新旧类别检测冲突与遗忘问题。
AI.method: 利用预训练的类别无关定位基础检测器，解耦分类与定位任务；设计类别条件超网络，结合大量基础类别数据进行元训练，实现无需微调的增量学习。
AI.result: 在COCO和LVIS数据集上验证，LVIS长尾稀有类别达到17%的AP，同时实现新旧类别单次检测、无遗忘及无需额外训练的增量学习。
AI.conclusion: 超网络方法在iFSD中表现优异，尤其当基础类别数据充足时接近测试时训练效果，Sylph的实用性优势使其具有广泛前景。

title: Balanced Allocations in Batches: Simplified and Generalized
title_zh: 批量均衡分配：简化与概括
abstract: We consider the allocation of $m$ balls (jobs) into $n$ bins (servers). In the Two-Choice process, for each of $m$ sequentially arriving balls, two randomly chosen bins are sampled and the ball is placed in the least loaded bin. It is well-known that the maximum load is $m/n+\log_2 \log n + O(1)$ w.h.p. Berenbrink, Czumaj, Englert, Friedetzky and Nagel (2012) introduced a parallel version of this process, where $m$ balls arrive in consecutive batches of size $b=n$ each. Balls within the same batch are allocated in parallel, using the load information of the bins at the beginning of the batch. They proved that the gap of this process is $O(\log n)$ with high probability. In this work, we present a new analysis of this setting, which is based on exponential potential functions. This allows us to both simplify and generalize the analysis of [BCE12] in different ways: $\quad 1.$ Our analysis covers a broad class of processes. This includes not only Two-Choice, but also processes with fewer bin samples like $(1+β)$, processes which can only receive one bit of information from each bin sample and graphical allocation, where bins correspond to vertices in a graph. $\quad 2.$ Balls may be of different weights, as long as their weights are independent samples from a distribution satisfying a technical condition on its moment generating function. $\quad 3.$ For arbitrary batch sizes $b \geq n$, we prove a gap of $O(b/n \cdot \log n)$. For any $b \in [n , n^3]$, we improve this to $O(b/n + \log n)$ and show that it is tight for a family of processes. This implies the unexpected result that for e.g. $(1+β)$ with constant $β\in (0, 1]$, the gap is $Θ(\log n)$ for all $b \in [n,n \log n]$. We also conduct experiments which support our theoretical results, and even hint at a superiority of less powerful processes like $(1+β)$ for large batch sizes.

This implies the unexpected result that for e.g. $(1+β)$ with constant $β\in (0, 1]$, the gap is $Θ(\log n)$ for all $b \in [n,n \log n]$. We also conduct experiments which support our theoretical results, and even hint at a superiority of less powerful processes like $(1+β)$ for large batch sizes.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑将 $m$ 个球（作业）分配到 $n$ 个容器（服务器）中。在二选过程中，对于每个顺序到达的 $m$ 个球，对两个随机选择的箱进行采样，并将球放置在负载最少的箱中。众所周知，最大负载为 $m/n+\log_2 \log n + O(1)$ w.h.p。 Berenbrink、Czumaj、Englert、Friedetzky 和 ​​Nagel (2012) 引入了此过程的并行版本，其中 $m$ 个球以连续批次到达，每个批次的大小为 $b=n$。同一批次内的球使用批次开始时的垃圾箱的负载信息并行分配。他们证明这个过程的间隙是$O(\log n)$，概率很高。在这项工作中，我们基于指数势函数对此设置进行了新的分析。这使我们能够以不同的方式简化和概括 [BCE12] 的分析： $\quad 1.$ 我们的分析涵盖了广泛的流程类别。这不仅包括二选一，还包括像 $(1+β)$ 这样的 bin 样本较少的处理，这些处理只能从每个 bin 样本和图形分配接收一位信息，其中 bin 对应于图中的顶点。 $\quad 2.$ 球可以具有不同的权重，只要它们的权重是来自满足其矩生成函数的技术条件的分布的独立样本。 $\quad 3.$ 对于任意批量大小 $b \geq n$，我们证明了 $O(b/n \cdot \log n)$ 的差距。对于任何 $b \in [n , n^3]$，我们将其改进为 $O(b/n + \log n)$ 并表明它对于一系列进程来说是紧的。这意味着意想不到的结果，例如$(1+β)$ 与常数 $β\in (0, 1]$，对于所有 $b \in [n,n \log n]$ 来说，差距是 $θ(\log n)$。我们还进行了支持我们理论结果的实验​​，甚至暗示了像 $(1+β)$ 这样的较弱过程对于大批量大小的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了批量分配球到服务器的负载均衡问题，通过改进分析方法简化并推广了现有结果。
AI.motivation: 传统两选择过程分析复杂且受限，需更通用方法处理不同批次大小及分配策略。
AI.method: 采用指数势函数分析，覆盖多种分配过程（如(1+β)、图分配）并支持不同批次大小。
AI.result: 证明批次大小b≥n时负载差距为O(b/n·log n)，对b∈[n,n³]改进为O(b/n+log n)，并验证(1+β)过程的Θ(log n)界。
AI.conclusion: 新方法更简洁通用，揭示了小批次下(1+β)等策略的优越性，理论与实验结果一致。

search_text: Balanced Allocations in Batches: Simplified and Generalized 批量均衡分配：简化与概括 We consider the allocation of $m$ balls (jobs) into $n$ bins (servers). In the Two-Choice process, for each of $m$ sequentially arriving balls, two randomly chosen bins are sampled and the ball is placed in the least loaded bin. It is well-known that the maximum load is $m/n+\log_2 \log n + O(1)$ w.h.p. Berenbrink, Czumaj, Englert, Friedetzky and Nagel (2012) introduced a parallel version of this process, where $m$ balls arrive in consecutive batches of size $b=n$ each. Balls within the same batch are allocated in parallel, using the load information of the bins at the beginning of the batch. They proved that the gap of this process is $O(\log n)$ with high probability. In this work, we present a new analysis of this setting, which is based on exponential potential functions. This allows us to both simplify and generalize the analysis of [BCE12] in different ways: $\quad 1.$ Our analysis covers a broad class of processes. This includes not only Two-Choice, but also processes with fewer bin samples like $(1+β)$, processes which can only receive one bit of information from each bin sample and graphical allocation, where bins correspond to vertices in a graph. $\quad 2.$ Balls may be of different weights, as long as their weights are independent samples from a distribution satisfying a technical condition on its moment generating function. $\quad 3.$ For arbitrary batch sizes $b \geq n$, we prove a gap of $O(b/n \cdot \log n)$. For any $b \in [n , n^3]$, we improve this to $O(b/n + \log n)$ and show that it is tight for a family of processes. This implies the unexpected result that for e.g. $(1+β)$ with constant $β\in (0, 1]$, the gap is $Θ(\log n)$ for all $b \in [n,n \log n]$. We also conduct experiments which support our theoretical results, and even hint at a superiority of less powerful processes like $(1+β)$ for large batch sizes. 我们考虑将 $m$ 个球（作业）分配到 $n$ 个容器（服务器）中。在二选过程中，对于每个顺序到达的 $m$ 个球，对两个随机选择的箱进行采样，并将球放置在负载最少的箱中。众所周知，最大负载为 $m/n+\log_2 \log n + O(1)$ w.h.p。 Berenbrink、Czumaj、Englert、Friedetzky 和 ​​Nagel (2012) 引入了此过程的并行版本，其中 $m$ 个球以连续批次到达，每个批次的大小为 $b=n$。同一批次内的球使用批次开始时的垃圾箱的负载信息并行分配。他们证明这个过程的间隙是$O(\log n)$，概率很高。在这项工作中，我们基于指数势函数对此设置进行了新的分析。这使我们能够以不同的方式简化和概括 [BCE12] 的分析： $\quad 1.$ 我们的分析涵盖了广泛的流程类别。这不仅包括二选一，还包括像 $(1+β)$ 这样的 bin 样本较少的处理，这些处理只能从每个 bin 样本和图形分配接收一位信息，其中 bin 对应于图中的顶点。 $\quad 2.$ 球可以具有不同的权重，只要它们的权重是来自满足其矩生成函数的技术条件的分布的独立样本。 $\quad 3.$ 对于任意批量大小 $b \geq n$，我们证明了 $O(b/n \cdot \log n)$ 的差距。对于任何 $b \in [n , n^3]$，我们将其改进为 $O(b/n + \log n)$ 并表明它对于一系列进程来说是紧的。这意味着意想不到的结果，例如$(1+β)$ 与常数 $β\in (0, 1]$，对于所有 $b \in [n,n \log n]$ 来说，差距是 $θ(\log n)$。我们还进行了支持我们理论结果的实验​​，甚至暗示了像 $(1+β)$ 这样的较弱过程对于大批量大小的优越性。 本文研究了批量分配球到服务器的负载均衡问题，通过改进分析方法简化并推广了现有结果。 Dimitrios Los,Thomas Sauerwald cs.DM,cs.DS,math.CO,math.PR

title: Exact Matching: Algorithms and Related Problems
title_zh: 精确匹配：算法及相关问题
abstract: In 1982, Papadimitriou and Yannakakis introduced the Exact Matching (EM) problem where given an edge colored graph, with colors red and blue, and an integer $k$, the goal is to decide whether or not the graph contains a perfect matching with exactly $k$ red edges. Although they conjectured it to be $\textbf{NP}$-complete, soon after it was shown to be solvable in randomized polynomial time in the seminal work of Mulmuley et al., placing it in the complexity class $\textbf{RP}$. Since then, all attempts at finding a deterministic algorithm for EM have failed, thus leaving it as one of the few natural combinatorial problems in $\textbf{RP}$ but not known to be contained in $\textbf{P}$, and making it an interesting instance for testing the hypothesis $\textbf{RP}=\textbf{P}$. Progress has been lacking even on very restrictive classes of graphs despite the problem being quite well known as evidenced by the number of works citing it. In this paper we aim to gain more insight into EM by studying a new optimization problem we call Top-k Perfect Matching (TkPM) which we show to be polynomially equivalent to EM. By virtue of being an optimization problem, it is more natural to approximate TkPM so we provide approximation algorithms for it. Some of the approximation algorithms rely on a relaxation of EM on bipartite graphs where the output is required to be a perfect matching with a number of red edges differing from $k$ by at most $k/2$, which is of independent interest and generalizes to the Exact Weight Perfect Matching (EWPM) problem. We also consider parameterized algorithms and show that TkPM can be solved in FPT time parameterized by $k$ and the independence number of the graph. This result again relies on new tools developed for EM which are also of independent interest.
summary: In 1982, Papadimitriou and Yannakakis introduced the Exact Matching (EM) problem where given an edge colored graph, with colors red and blue, and an integer $k$, the goal is to decide whether or not the graph contains a perfect matching with exactly $k$ red edges. Although they conjectured it to be $\textbf{NP}$-complete, soon after it was shown to be solvable in randomized polynomial time in the seminal work of Mulmuley et al., placing it in the complexity class $\textbf{RP}$. Since then, all attempts at finding a deterministic algorithm for EM have failed, thus leaving it as one of the few natural combinatorial problems in $\textbf{RP}$ but not known to be contained in $\textbf{P}$, and making it an interesting instance for testing the hypothesis $\textbf{RP}=\textbf{P}$. Progress has been lacking even on very restrictive classes of graphs despite the problem being quite well known as evidenced by the number of works citing it. In this paper we aim to gain more insight into EM by studying a new optimization problem we call Top-k Perfect Matching (TkPM) which we show to be polynomially equivalent to EM. By virtue of being an optimization problem, it is more natural to approximate TkPM so we provide approximation algorithms for it. Some of the approximation algorithms rely on a relaxation of EM on bipartite graphs where the output is required to be a perfect matching with a number of red edges differing from $k$ by at most $k/2$, which is of independent interest and generalizes to the Exact Weight Perfect Matching (EWPM) problem. We also consider parameterized algorithms and show that TkPM can be solved in FPT time parameterized by $k$ and the independence number of the graph. This result again relies on new tools developed for EM which are also of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 1982 年，Papadimitriou 和 Yannakakis 引入了精确匹配 (EM) 问题，其中给定一个边缘彩色图（颜色为红色和蓝色）和整数 $k$，目标是确定该图是否包含与恰好 $k$ 红色边缘的完美匹配。尽管他们推测它是 $\textbf{NP}$ 完全的，但不久之后 Mulmuley 等人的开创性工作证明它可以在随机多项式时间内求解，并将其置于复杂度类 $\textbf{RP}$ 中。从那时起，所有寻找 EM 确定性算法的尝试都失败了，因此它成为 $\textbf{RP}$ 中为数不多的自然组合问题之一，但未知是否包含在 $\textbf{P}$ 中，并使其成为检验假设 $\textbf{RP}=\textbf{P}$ 的有趣实例。尽管这个问题众所周知，引用它的作品数量就证明了这一点，但即使在非常有限的图表类别上也缺乏进展。在本文中，我们旨在通过研究一个称为 Top-k 完美匹配 (TkPM) 的新优化问题来更深入地了解 EM，我们证明该问题在多项式上与 EM 等价。由于是一个优化问题，近似 TkPM 更为自然，因此我们为其提供近似算法。一些近似算法依赖于二分图上的 EM 松弛，其中输出需要与许多与 $k$ 相差最多 $k/2$ 的红色边缘进行完美匹配，这是独立的兴趣并推广到精确权重完美匹配 (EWPM) 问题。我们还考虑了参数化算法，并证明 TkPM 可以在由 $k$ 和图的独立数参数化的 FPT 时间内求解。这一结果再次依赖于为 EM 开发的新工具，这些工具也具有独立意义。

AI.tldr: 本文通过研究新提出的Top-k完美匹配问题（TkPM），深入探讨精确匹配（EM）问题及其相关算法。
AI.motivation: 精确匹配问题（EM）自1982年提出以来，虽被证明属于RP类但尚未找到确定性多项式算法，成为验证RP=P假设的关键问题。然而，针对该问题的研究进展有限，亟需新的方法和视角。
AI.method: 提出与EM多项式等价的TkPM优化问题，设计近似算法和参数化算法，并基于二分图上的EM松弛问题及独立集参数开发新工具。
AI.result: 证明TkPM与EM的等价性，提供近似算法及FPT算法（参数为k和图的独立数），并推广至精确权重完美匹配问题。
AI.conclusion: TkPM为EM及相关问题提供了新的研究视角和工具，推动了参数化算法与近似算法的发展，同时深化了对RP与P关系的理解。

authors_text: Kevin J. Doherty,David M. Rosen,John J. Leonard
title: Spectral Measurement Sparsification for Pose-Graph SLAM
title_zh: 位姿图 SLAM 的光谱测量稀疏化
comment: Submitted to the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
comments: Submitted to the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2022
abstract: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a critical capability in autonomous navigation, but in order to scale SLAM to the setting of "lifelong" SLAM, particularly under memory or computation constraints, a robot must be able to determine what information should be retained and what can safely be forgotten. In graph-based SLAM, the number of edges (measurements) in a pose graph determines both the memory requirements of storing a robot's observations and the computational expense of algorithms deployed for performing state estimation using those observations; both of which can grow unbounded during long-term navigation. To address this, we propose a spectral approach for pose graph sparsification which maximizes the algebraic connectivity of the sparsified measurement graphs, a key quantity which has been shown to control the estimation error of pose graph SLAM solutions. Our algorithm, MAC (for "maximizing algebraic connectivity"), which is based on convex relaxation, is simple and computationally inexpensive, and admits formal post hoc performance guarantees on the quality of the solutions it provides. In experiments on benchmark pose-graph SLAM datasets, we show that our approach quickly produces high-quality sparsification results which retain the connectivity of the graph and, in turn, the quality of corresponding SLAM solutions, as compared to a baseline approach which does not consider graph connectivity.
summary: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is a critical capability in autonomous navigation, but in order to scale SLAM to the setting of "lifelong" SLAM, particularly under memory or computation constraints, a robot must be able to determine what information should be retained and what can safely be forgotten. In graph-based SLAM, the number of edges (measurements) in a pose graph determines both the memory requirements of storing a robot's observations and the computational expense of algorithms deployed for performing state estimation using those observations; both of which can grow unbounded during long-term navigation. To address this, we propose a spectral approach for pose graph sparsification which maximizes the algebraic connectivity of the sparsified measurement graphs, a key quantity which has been shown to control the estimation error of pose graph SLAM solutions. Our algorithm, MAC (for "maximizing algebraic connectivity"), which is based on convex relaxation, is simple and computationally inexpensive, and admits formal post hoc performance guarantees on the quality of the solutions it provides. In experiments on benchmark pose-graph SLAM datasets, we show that our approach quickly produces high-quality sparsification results which retain the connectivity of the graph and, in turn, the quality of corresponding SLAM solutions, as compared to a baseline approach which does not consider graph connectivity.
abstract_zh: 同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 是自主导航中的一项关键功能，但为了将 SLAM 扩展到“终身”SLAM，特别是在内存或计算限制下，机器人必须能够确定哪些信息应该保留，哪些信息可以安全地忘记。在基于图的 SLAM 中，位姿图中的边（测量值）数量决定了存储机器人观察结果的内存需求以及使用这些观察结果执行状态估计所部署的算法的计算费用；两者都可以在长期航行过程中无限增长。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于位姿图稀疏化的谱方法，该方法最大化了稀疏测量图的代数连通性，这是一个已被证明可以控制位姿图 SLAM 解决方案估计误差的关键量。我们的算法 MAC（“最大化代数连通性”）基于凸松弛，简单且计算成本低，并且承认对其提供的解决方案的质量提供正式的事后性能保证。在基准姿态图 SLAM 数据集的实验中，我们表明，与不考虑图连接性的基线方法相比，我们的方法可以快速产生高质量的稀疏化结果，从而保留图的连接性，进而保留相应 SLA​​M 解决方案的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于谱方法的位姿图SLAM测量稀疏化技术，旨在减少长期SLAM中的计算和存储负担。
AI.motivation: 长期SLAM面临内存和计算资源限制，传统方法保留所有测量数据会导致存储和计算开销无限增长，需寻找有效信息保留策略。
AI.method: 提出MAC算法，通过凸松弛最大化稀疏化后图的代数连通性，确保图连通性并控制估计误差，具有计算效率高和理论性能保证的特点。
AI.result: 在基准数据集实验中，MAC方法在保持图连通性和SLAM精度的同时，显著优于不考虑连通性的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: MAC算法为长期SLAM提供了兼顾稀疏性与精度的解决方案，通过优化图连通性有效平衡了资源消耗与定位性能。

title: Accelerating Simulation of Quantum Circuits under Noise via Computational Reuse
title_zh: 通过计算重用加速噪声下量子电路的仿真
comment: Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 52nd Annual International Symposium on Computer Architecture (ISCA '25). Manuscript length: 15 pages
comments: Accepted for publication in the Proceedings of the 52nd Annual International Symposium on Computer Architecture (ISCA '25). Manuscript length: 15 pages
abstract: To realize the full potential of quantum computers, we must mitigate qubit errors by developing noise-aware algorithms, compilers, and architectures. Thus, simulating quantum programs on high-performance computing (HPC) systems with different noise models is a de facto tool researchers use. Unfortunately, noisy simulators iteratively execute a similar circuit for thousands of trials, thereby incurring significant performance overheads. To address this, we propose a noisy simulation technique called Tree-Based Quantum Circuit Simulation (TQSim). TQSim exploits the reusability of intermediate results during the noisy simulation, reducing computation. TQSim dynamically partitions a circuit into several subcircuits. It then reuses the intermediate results from these subcircuits during computation. Compared to a noisy Qulacs-based baseline simulator, TQSim achieves a speedup of up to 3.89x for noisy simulations. TQSim is designed to be efficient with multi-node setups while also maintaining tight fidelity bounds.
summary: To realize the full potential of quantum computers, we must mitigate qubit errors by developing noise-aware algorithms, compilers, and architectures. Thus, simulating quantum programs on high-performance computing (HPC) systems with different noise models is a de facto tool researchers use. Unfortunately, noisy simulators iteratively execute a similar circuit for thousands of trials, thereby incurring significant performance overheads. To address this, we propose a noisy simulation technique called Tree-Based Quantum Circuit Simulation (TQSim). TQSim exploits the reusability of intermediate results during the noisy simulation, reducing computation. TQSim dynamically partitions a circuit into several subcircuits. It then reuses the intermediate results from these subcircuits during computation. Compared to a noisy Qulacs-based baseline simulator, TQSim achieves a speedup of up to 3.89x for noisy simulations. TQSim is designed to be efficient with multi-node setups while also maintaining tight fidelity bounds.
abstract_zh: 为了充分发挥量子计算机的潜力，我们必须通过开发噪声感知算法、编译器和架构来减少量子位错误。因此，在具有不同噪声模型的高性能计算（HPC）系统上模拟量子程序是研究人员使用的事实上的工具。不幸的是，嘈杂的模拟器会迭代执行类似的电路进行数千次试验，从而导致显着的性能开销。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为基于树的量子电路模拟（TQSim）的噪声模拟技术。 TQSim 在噪声模拟过程中利用了中间结果的可重用性，从而减少了计算量。 TQSim 动态地将电路划分为多个子电路。然后，它在计算期间重用这些子电路的中间结果。与基于 Qulacs 的噪声基线仿真器相比，TQSim 在噪声仿真方面实现了高达 3.89 倍的加速。 TQSim 旨在高效地进行多节点设置，同时保持严格的保真度范围。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于计算复用的噪声量子电路模拟方法TQSim，通过动态划分电路并复用中间结果提升模拟效率。
AI.motivation: 现有噪声量子模拟器因重复执行相似电路导致性能开销过大，需优化计算资源利用率。
AI.method: 设计Tree-Based Quantum Circuit Simulation（TQSim）方法，动态划分电路为子电路并复用中间计算结果。
AI.result: 相比Qulacs基线模拟器，在噪声模拟中实现最高3.89倍加速，且支持多节点高效运行。
AI.conclusion: TQSim通过计算复用有效降低噪声模拟开销，在保持精度的同时显著提升量子电路模拟效率。

title: Multi-modal Misinformation Detection: Approaches, Challenges and Opportunities
title_zh: 多模式错误信息检测：方法、挑战和机遇
abstract: As social media platforms are evolving from text-based forums into multi-modal environments, the nature of misinformation in social media is also transforming accordingly. Taking advantage of the fact that visual modalities such as images and videos are more favorable and attractive to the users and textual contents are sometimes skimmed carelessly, misinformation spreaders have recently targeted contextual connections between the modalities e.g., text and image. Hence many researchers have developed automatic techniques for detecting possible cross-modal discordance in web-based content. We analyze, categorize and identify existing approaches in addition to challenges and shortcomings they face in order to unearth new research opportunities in the field of multi-modal misinformation detection.
summary: As social media platforms are evolving from text-based forums into multi-modal environments, the nature of misinformation in social media is also transforming accordingly. Taking advantage of the fact that visual modalities such as images and videos are more favorable and attractive to the users and textual contents are sometimes skimmed carelessly, misinformation spreaders have recently targeted contextual connections between the modalities e.g., text and image. Hence many researchers have developed automatic techniques for detecting possible cross-modal discordance in web-based content. We analyze, categorize and identify existing approaches in addition to challenges and shortcomings they face in order to unearth new research opportunities in the field of multi-modal misinformation detection.
abstract_zh: 随着社交媒体平台从基于文本的论坛演变为多模式环境，社交媒体中错误信息的性质也在相应地发生变化。利用图像和视频等视觉形式对用户更有利和更有吸引力以及文本内容有时会被粗略浏览的事实，错误信息传播者最近瞄准了文本和图像等形式之间的上下文联系。因此，许多研究人员开发了自动技术来检测基于网络的内容中可能存在的跨模式不一致。我们对现有方法及其面临的挑战和缺点进行分析、分类和识别，以便挖掘多模式错误信息检测领域的新研究机会。

AI.tldr: 分析多模态虚假信息检测的方法、挑战及未来研究方向
AI.motivation: 社交媒体多模态化导致虚假信息传播方式变化，现有检测方法存在不足，需探索新方向
AI.method: 通过分类现有方法，分析其挑战与不足，挖掘研究机会
AI.result: 总结了多模态虚假信息检测方法，指出现有技术的不足，并提出未来研究方向
AI.conclusion: 跨模态分析对检测虚假信息至关重要，需进一步研究以解决现有问题

Taking advantage of the fact that visual modalities such as images and videos are more favorable and attractive to the users and textual contents are sometimes skimmed carelessly, misinformation spreaders have recently targeted contextual connections between the modalities e.g., text and image. We analyze, categorize and identify existing approaches in addition to challenges and shortcomings they face in order to unearth new research opportunities in the field of multi-modal misinformation detection. 随着社交媒体平台从基于文本的论坛演变为多模式环境，社交媒体中错误信息的性质也在相应地发生变化。利用图像和视频等视觉形式对用户更有利和更有吸引力以及文本内容有时会被粗略浏览的事实，错误信息传播者最近瞄准了文本和图像等形式之间的上下文联系。因此，许多研究人员开发了自动技术来检测基于网络的内容中可能存在的跨模式不一致。我们对现有方法及其面临的挑战和缺点进行分析、分类和识别，以便挖掘多模式错误信息检测领域的新研究机会。 分析多模态虚假信息检测的方法、挑战及未来研究方向 Sara Abdali,Sina shaham,Bhaskar Krishnamachari cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.CY,cs.MM,cs.SI

title: Reinforcement Learning with Action-Free Pre-Training from Videos
title_zh: 通过视频进行无动作预训练的强化学习
comment: International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022). Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/rl-apv
comments: International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022). Project page: https://sites.google.com/view/rl-apv
abstract: Recent unsupervised pre-training methods have shown to be effective on language and vision domains by learning useful representations for multiple downstream tasks. In this paper, we investigate if such unsupervised pre-training methods can also be effective for vision-based reinforcement learning (RL). To this end, we introduce a framework that learns representations useful for understanding the dynamics via generative pre-training on videos. Our framework consists of two phases: we pre-train an action-free latent video prediction model, and then utilize the pre-trained representations for efficiently learning action-conditional world models on unseen environments. To incorporate additional action inputs during fine-tuning, we introduce a new architecture that stacks an action-conditional latent prediction model on top of the pre-trained action-free prediction model. Moreover, for better exploration, we propose a video-based intrinsic bonus that leverages pre-trained representations. We demonstrate that our framework significantly improves both final performances and sample-efficiency of vision-based RL in a variety of manipulation and locomotion tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/younggyoseo/apv.
summary: Recent unsupervised pre-training methods have shown to be effective on language and vision domains by learning useful representations for multiple downstream tasks. In this paper, we investigate if such unsupervised pre-training methods can also be effective for vision-based reinforcement learning (RL). To this end, we introduce a framework that learns representations useful for understanding the dynamics via generative pre-training on videos. Our framework consists of two phases: we pre-train an action-free latent video prediction model, and then utilize the pre-trained representations for efficiently learning action-conditional world models on unseen environments. To incorporate additional action inputs during fine-tuning, we introduce a new architecture that stacks an action-conditional latent prediction model on top of the pre-trained action-free prediction model. Moreover, for better exploration, we propose a video-based intrinsic bonus that leverages pre-trained representations. We demonstrate that our framework significantly improves both final performances and sample-efficiency of vision-based RL in a variety of manipulation and locomotion tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/younggyoseo/apv.
abstract_zh: 最近的无监督预训练方法通过学习多个下游任务的有用表示，在语言和视觉领域被证明是有效的。在本文中，我们研究了这种无监督预训练方法是否也适用于基于视觉的强化学习（RL）。为此，我们引入了一个框架，该框架可以通过视频的生成预训练来学习有助于理解动态的表示。我们的框架由两个阶段组成：我们预训练一个无动作的潜在视频预测模型，然后利用预训练的表示在不可见的环境中有效地学习动作条件世界模型。为了在微调期间纳入额外的动作输入，我们引入了一种新的架构，该架构将动作条件潜在预测模型堆叠在预先训练的无动作预测模型之上。此外，为了更好的探索，我们提出了一种基于视频的内在奖励，利用预先训练的表示。我们证明，我们的框架显着提高了基于视觉的强化学习在各种操纵和运动任务中的最终性能和样本效率。代码可在 https://github.com/younggyoseo/apv 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视频的无动作预训练框架，通过生成模型学习环境动态表示，以提升视觉强化学习的效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在视觉任务中依赖大量样本，而现有预训练方法未充分探索视频数据中动作无关的动态表示，限制了跨环境迁移能力。
AI.method: 分两阶段训练：1）预训练无动作的潜在视频预测模型；2）叠加动作条件预测模块并引入视频内在奖励机制，实现高效微调。
AI.result: 在操作与移动任务中，该框架显著提升最终性能与样本效率，验证了预训练表示对视觉RL的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦环境动态与动作信息，本文框架为视觉强化学习提供了更高效的预训练范式，推动了跨环境迁移能力的发展。

title: Focused Jump-and-Repair Constraint Handling for Fixed-Parameter Tractable Graph Problems Closed Under Induced Subgraphs
title_zh: 诱导子图下封闭的固定参数可处理图问题的集中跳转和修复约束处理
comment: A preliminary version of this paper appeared in the proceedings of FOGA 2021
comments: A preliminary version of this paper appeared in the proceedings of FOGA 2021
abstract: Repair operators are often used for constraint handling in constrained combinatorial optimization. We investigate the (1+1)~EA equipped with a tailored jump-and-repair operation that can be used to probabilistically repair infeasible offspring in graph problems. Instead of evolving candidate solutions to the entire graph, we expand the genotype to allow the (1+1)~EA to develop in parallel a feasible solution together with a growing subset of the instance (an induced subgraph). With this approach, we prove that the EA is able to probabilistically simulate an iterative compression process used in classical fixed-parameter algorithmics to obtain a randomized FPT performance guarantee on three NP-hard graph problems. For $k$-VertexCover, we prove that the (1+1) EA using focused jump-and-repair can find a $k$-vertex cover (if one exists) in $O(2^k n^2\log n)$ iterations in expectation. This leads to an exponential (in $k$) improvement over the best-known parameterized bound for evolutionary algorithms on VertexCover. For the $k$-FeedbackVertexSet problem in tournaments, we prove that the EA finds a feasible feedback set in $O(2^kk!n^2\log n)$ iterations in expectation, and for OddCycleTransversal, we prove the optimization time for the EA is $O(3^k k m n^2\log n)$. For the latter two problems, this constitutes the first parameterized result for any evolutionary algorithm. We discuss how to generalize the framework to other parameterized graph problems closed under induced subgraphs and report experimental results that illustrate the behavior of the algorithm on a concrete instance class.
summary: Repair operators are often used for constraint handling in constrained combinatorial optimization. We investigate the (1+1)~EA equipped with a tailored jump-and-repair operation that can be used to probabilistically repair infeasible offspring in graph problems. Instead of evolving candidate solutions to the entire graph, we expand the genotype to allow the (1+1)~EA to develop in parallel a feasible solution together with a growing subset of the instance (an induced subgraph). With this approach, we prove that the EA is able to probabilistically simulate an iterative compression process used in classical fixed-parameter algorithmics to obtain a randomized FPT performance guarantee on three NP-hard graph problems. For $k$-VertexCover, we prove that the (1+1) EA using focused jump-and-repair can find a $k$-vertex cover (if one exists) in $O(2^k n^2\log n)$ iterations in expectation. This leads to an exponential (in $k$) improvement over the best-known parameterized bound for evolutionary algorithms on VertexCover. For the $k$-FeedbackVertexSet problem in tournaments, we prove that the EA finds a feasible feedback set in $O(2^kk!n^2\log n)$ iterations in expectation, and for OddCycleTransversal, we prove the optimization time for the EA is $O(3^k k m n^2\log n)$. For the latter two problems, this constitutes the first parameterized result for any evolutionary algorithm. We discuss how to generalize the framework to other parameterized graph problems closed under induced subgraphs and report experimental results that illustrate the behavior of the algorithm on a concrete instance class.
abstract_zh: 修复算子通常用于约束组合优化中的约束处理。我们研究了配备定制跳跃和修复操作的 (1+1)~EA，可用于概率修复图问题中不可行的后代。我们不是将候选解决方案发展到整个图，而是扩展基因型以允许 (1+1)~EA 与不断增长的实例子集（诱导子图）一起并行开发可行的解决方案。通过这种方法，我们证明 EA 能够概率模拟经典固定参数算法中使用的迭代压缩过程，以获得三个 NP 难图问题的随机 FPT 性能保证。对于 $k$-VertexCover，我们证明使用聚焦跳转和修复的 (1+1) EA 可以在期望的 $O(2^k n^2\log n)$ 迭代中找到 $k$-顶点覆盖（如果存在）。这导致 VertexCover 上最著名的进化算法参数化界限呈指数级（以 $k$ 为单位）改进。对于锦标赛中的 $k$-FeedbackVertexSet 问题，我们证明 EA 在期望的 $O(2^kk!n^2\log n)$ 迭代中找到可行的反馈集，而对于 OddCycleTransversal，我们证明 EA 的优化时间为 $O(3^k k m n^2\log n)$。对于后两个问题，这构成了任何进化算法的第一个参数化结果。我们讨论如何将该框架推广到归纳子图下封闭的其他参数化图问题，并报告说明该算法在具体实例类上的行为的实验结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种聚焦跳变与修复约束处理方法，用于解决固定参数可解（FPT）且在诱导子图下封闭的图问题，通过改进进化算法（EA）的约束处理机制提升求解效率。
AI.motivation: 传统进化算法在处理NP难图问题时难以有效应对约束条件，且参数化复杂度较高。本文旨在通过设计针对性的修复操作，实现对经典固定参数算法的随机化模拟，从而获得更优的参数化性能保证。
AI.method: 扩展基因型表示，使(1+1) EA同步生成可行解及实例的诱导子图，并引入聚焦跳变与修复操作，模拟固定参数算法中的迭代压缩过程，实现对k-顶点覆盖、k-反馈顶点集等问题的参数化求解。
AI.result: 对k-顶点覆盖问题，算法期望运行时间为O(2^k n² log n)，较现有结果指数级改进；对锦标赛图的k-反馈顶点集和奇环横截问题，分别取得O(2^k k!n² log n)和O(3^k k m n² log n)的参数化时间复杂度，均为首次针对进化算法的参数化分析。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为参数化图问题提供了新的进化算法求解范式，通过结合诱导子图扩展与修复机制，可在多项NP难问题上实现优于传统方法的参数化性能，并具有推广至其他诱导子图封闭问题的潜力。

For $k$-VertexCover, we prove that the (1+1) EA using focused jump-and-repair can find a $k$-vertex cover (if one exists) in $O(2^k n^2\log n)$ iterations in expectation. This leads to an exponential (in $k$) improvement over the best-known parameterized bound for evolutionary algorithms on VertexCover. For the $k$-FeedbackVertexSet problem in tournaments, we prove that the EA finds a feasible feedback set in $O(2^kk!n^2\log n)$ iterations in expectation, and for OddCycleTransversal, we prove the optimization time for the EA is $O(3^k k m n^2\log n)$. For the latter two problems, this constitutes the first parameterized result for any evolutionary algorithm. We discuss how to generalize the framework to other parameterized graph problems closed under induced subgraphs and report experimental results that illustrate the behavior of the algorithm on a concrete instance class. 修复算子通常用于约束组合优化中的约束处理。我们研究了配备定制跳跃和修复操作的 (1+1)~EA，可用于概率修复图问题中不可行的后代。我们不是将候选解决方案发展到整个图，而是扩展基因型以允许 (1+1)~EA 与不断增长的实例子集（诱导子图）一起并行开发可行的解决方案。通过这种方法，我们证明 EA 能够概率模拟经典固定参数算法中使用的迭代压缩过程，以获得三个 NP 难图问题的随机 FPT 性能保证。对于 $k$-VertexCover，我们证明使用聚焦跳转和修复的 (1+1) EA 可以在期望的 $O(2^k n^2\log n)$ 迭代中找到 $k$-顶点覆盖（如果存在）。这导致 VertexCover 上最著名的进化算法参数化界限呈指数级（以 $k$ 为单位）改进。对于锦标赛中的 $k$-FeedbackVertexSet 问题，我们证明 EA 在期望的 $O(2^kk!n^2\log n)$ 迭代中找到可行的反馈集，而对于 OddCycleTransversal，我们证明 EA 的优化时间为 $O(3^k k m n^2\log n)$。对于后两个问题，这构成了任何进化算法的第一个参数化结果。我们讨论如何将该框架推广到归纳子图下封闭的其他参数化图问题，并报告说明该算法在具体实例类上的行为的实验结果。 本文提出一种聚焦跳变与修复约束处理方法，用于解决固定参数可解（FPT）且在诱导子图下封闭的图问题，通过改进进化算法（EA）的约束处理机制提升求解效率。 Luke Branson,Andrew M. Sutton cs.NE

title: Semi-supervised machine learning model for analysis of nanowire morphologies from transmission electron microscopy images
title_zh: 用于从透射电子显微镜图像中分析纳米线形态的半监督机器学习模型
abstract: In the field of materials science, microscopy is the first and often only accessible method for structural characterization. There is a growing interest in the development of machine learning methods that can automate the analysis and interpretation of microscopy images. Typically training of machine learning models requires large numbers of images with associated structural labels, however, manual labeling of images requires domain knowledge and is prone to human error and subjectivity. To overcome these limitations, we present a semi-supervised transfer learning approach that uses a small number of labeled microscopy images for training and performs as effectively as methods trained on significantly larger image datasets. Specifically, we train an image encoder with unlabeled images using self-supervised learning methods and use that encoder for transfer learning of different downstream image tasks (classification and segmentation) with a minimal number of labeled images for training. We test the transfer learning ability of two self-supervised learning methods: SimCLR and Barlow-Twins on transmission electron microscopy (TEM) images. We demonstrate in detail how this machine learning workflow applied to TEM images of protein nanowires enables automated classification of nanowire morphologies (e.g., single nanowires, nanowire bundles, phase separated) as well as segmentation tasks that can serve as groundwork for quantification of nanowire domain sizes and shape analysis. We also extend the application of the machine learning workflow to classification of nanoparticle morphologies and identification of different type of viruses from TEM images.
summary: In the field of materials science, microscopy is the first and often only accessible method for structural characterization. There is a growing interest in the development of machine learning methods that can automate the analysis and interpretation of microscopy images. Typically training of machine learning models requires large numbers of images with associated structural labels, however, manual labeling of images requires domain knowledge and is prone to human error and subjectivity. To overcome these limitations, we present a semi-supervised transfer learning approach that uses a small number of labeled microscopy images for training and performs as effectively as methods trained on significantly larger image datasets. Specifically, we train an image encoder with unlabeled images using self-supervised learning methods and use that encoder for transfer learning of different downstream image tasks (classification and segmentation) with a minimal number of labeled images for training. We test the transfer learning ability of two self-supervised learning methods: SimCLR and Barlow-Twins on transmission electron microscopy (TEM) images. We demonstrate in detail how this machine learning workflow applied to TEM images of protein nanowires enables automated classification of nanowire morphologies (e.g., single nanowires, nanowire bundles, phase separated) as well as segmentation tasks that can serve as groundwork for quantification of nanowire domain sizes and shape analysis. We also extend the application of the machine learning workflow to classification of nanoparticle morphologies and identification of different type of viruses from TEM images.
abstract_zh: 在材料科学领域，显微镜是第一个也是通常唯一可用的结构表征方法。人们对开发可以自动分析和解释显微图像的机器学习方法越来越感兴趣。通常，机器学习模型的训练需要大量具有相关结构标签的图像，然而，图像的手动标记需要领域知识，并且容易出现人为错误和主观性。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一种半监督迁移学习方法，该方法使用少量标记的显微镜图像进行训练，并且与在更大的图像数据集上训练的方法一样有效。具体来说，我们使用自监督学习方法训练具有未标记图像的图像编码器，并使用该编码器通过最少数量的标记图像进行训练来进行不同下游图像任务（分类和分割）的迁移学习。我们在透射电子显微镜 (TEM) 图像上测试了两种自监督学习方法：SimCLR 和 Barlow-Twins 的迁移学习能力。我们详细演示了如何将机器学习工作流程应用于蛋白质纳米线的 TEM 图像，从而实现纳米线形态（例如单纳米线、纳米线束、相分离）的自动分类以及分割任务，这些任务可以作为纳米线域尺寸和形状分析的量化基础。我们还将机器学习工作流程的应用扩展到纳米颗粒形态的分类以及从 TEM 图像中识别不同类型的病毒。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督机器学习模型，用于从透射电子显微镜（TEM）图像中自动分析纳米线形貌。
AI.motivation: 传统显微图像分析依赖人工标注，耗时且易出错。本文旨在通过半监督学习减少对大规模标注数据的依赖，提升分析效率。
AI.method: 采用自监督学习（SimCLR和Barlow-Twins）预训练图像编码器，结合少量标注数据进行迁移学习，实现纳米线分类与分割任务。
AI.result: 模型在TEM图像中成功实现纳米线形态分类（如单根纳米线、束状结构等）及分割，可扩展至纳米颗粒和病毒识别。
AI.conclusion: 半监督方法显著降低标注数据需求，为材料科学和病毒学中的显微图像自动化分析提供有效工具。

authors_text: Wenbin He,William Surmeier,Arvind Kumar Shekar,Liang Gou,Liu Ren
title: Self-supervised Semantic Segmentation Grounded in Visual Concepts
title_zh: 基于视觉概念的自监督语义分割
abstract: Unsupervised semantic segmentation requires assigning a label to every pixel without any human annotations. Despite recent advances in self-supervised representation learning for individual images, unsupervised semantic segmentation with pixel-level representations is still a challenging task and remains underexplored. In this work, we propose a self-supervised pixel representation learning method for semantic segmentation by using visual concepts (i.e., groups of pixels with semantic meanings, such as parts, objects, and scenes) extracted from images. To guide self-supervised learning, we leverage three types of relationships between pixels and concepts, including the relationships between pixels and local concepts, local and global concepts, as well as the co-occurrence of concepts. We evaluate the learned pixel embeddings and visual concepts on three datasets, including PASCAL VOC 2012, COCO 2017, and DAVIS 2017. Our results show that the proposed method gains consistent and substantial improvements over recent unsupervised semantic segmentation approaches, and also demonstrate that visual concepts can reveal insights into image datasets.
summary: Unsupervised semantic segmentation requires assigning a label to every pixel without any human annotations. Despite recent advances in self-supervised representation learning for individual images, unsupervised semantic segmentation with pixel-level representations is still a challenging task and remains underexplored. In this work, we propose a self-supervised pixel representation learning method for semantic segmentation by using visual concepts (i.e., groups of pixels with semantic meanings, such as parts, objects, and scenes) extracted from images. To guide self-supervised learning, we leverage three types of relationships between pixels and concepts, including the relationships between pixels and local concepts, local and global concepts, as well as the co-occurrence of concepts. We evaluate the learned pixel embeddings and visual concepts on three datasets, including PASCAL VOC 2012, COCO 2017, and DAVIS 2017. Our results show that the proposed method gains consistent and substantial improvements over recent unsupervised semantic segmentation approaches, and also demonstrate that visual concepts can reveal insights into image datasets.
abstract_zh: 无监督语义分割需要为每个像素分配标签，而无需任何人工注释。尽管最近在单个图像的自监督表示学习方面取得了进展，但具有像素级表示的无监督语义分割仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，并且仍未得到充分探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用从图像中提取的视觉概念（即具有语义意义的像素组，例如零件、对象和场景）进行语义分割的自监督像素表示学习方法。为了指导自监督学习，我们利用像素和概念之间的三种关系，包括像素和局部概念、局部和全局概念以及概念的共现之间的关系。我们在三个数据集（包括 PASCAL VOC 2012、COCO 2017 和 DAVIS 2017）上评估了学习到的像素嵌入和视觉概念。我们的结果表明，所提出的方法比最近的无监督语义分割方法获得了一致和实质性的改进，并且还证明了视觉概念可以揭示对图像数据集的洞察。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉概念的自监督语义分割方法，通过像素级表示学习实现无标注数据的语义分割。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督语义分割方法在像素级表示学习上效果有限，缺乏对图像中语义概念的有效利用。
AI.method: 通过像素与局部/全局概念的关系及概念共现关系，构建自监督学习框架，提取视觉概念指导像素嵌入学习。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012、COCO 2017和DAVIS 2017数据集上显著优于现有无监督方法，验证了视觉概念的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 视觉概念能有效提升像素表示学习，揭示数据集语义结构，为无监督语义分割提供新思路。

title: Intelligent Masking: Deep Q-Learning for Context Encoding in Medical Image Analysis
title_zh: 智能掩蔽：医学图像分析中上下文编码的深度 Q 学习
abstract: The need for a large amount of labeled data in the supervised setting has led recent studies to utilize self-supervised learning to pre-train deep neural networks using unlabeled data. Many self-supervised training strategies have been investigated especially for medical datasets to leverage the information available in the much fewer unlabeled data. One of the fundamental strategies in image-based self-supervision is context prediction. In this approach, a model is trained to reconstruct the contents of an arbitrary missing region of an image based on its surroundings. However, the existing methods adopt a random and blind masking approach by focusing uniformly on all regions of the images. This approach results in a lot of unnecessary network updates that cause the model to forget the rich extracted features. In this work, we develop a novel self-supervised approach that occludes targeted regions to improve the pre-training procedure. To this end, we propose a reinforcement learning-based agent which learns to intelligently mask input images through deep Q-learning. We show that training the agent against the prediction model can significantly improve the semantic features extracted for downstream classification tasks. We perform our experiments on two public datasets for diagnosing breast cancer in the ultrasound images and detecting lower-grade glioma with MR images. In our experiments, we show that our novel masking strategy advances the learned features according to the performance on the classification task in terms of accuracy, macro F1, and AUROC.
summary: The need for a large amount of labeled data in the supervised setting has led recent studies to utilize self-supervised learning to pre-train deep neural networks using unlabeled data. Many self-supervised training strategies have been investigated especially for medical datasets to leverage the information available in the much fewer unlabeled data. One of the fundamental strategies in image-based self-supervision is context prediction. In this approach, a model is trained to reconstruct the contents of an arbitrary missing region of an image based on its surroundings. However, the existing methods adopt a random and blind masking approach by focusing uniformly on all regions of the images. This approach results in a lot of unnecessary network updates that cause the model to forget the rich extracted features. In this work, we develop a novel self-supervised approach that occludes targeted regions to improve the pre-training procedure. To this end, we propose a reinforcement learning-based agent which learns to intelligently mask input images through deep Q-learning. We show that training the agent against the prediction model can significantly improve the semantic features extracted for downstream classification tasks. We perform our experiments on two public datasets for diagnosing breast cancer in the ultrasound images and detecting lower-grade glioma with MR images. In our experiments, we show that our novel masking strategy advances the learned features according to the performance on the classification task in terms of accuracy, macro F1, and AUROC.
abstract_zh: 在监督环境中需要大量标记数据，导致最近的研究利用自监督学习来使用未标记数据预训练深度神经网络。人们已经研究了许多自监督训练策略，特别是针对医学数据集，以利用更少的未标记数据中的可用信息。基于图像的自我监督的基本策略之一是上下文预测。在这种方法中，训练模型根据周围环境重建图像中任意缺失区域的内容。然而，现有方法采用随机盲掩蔽方法，均匀关注图像的所有区域。这种方法会导致大量不必要的网络更新，导致模型忘记丰富的提取特征。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种新颖的自我监督方法，该方法可以遮挡目标区域以改进预训练程序。为此，我们提出了一种基于强化学习的代理，它通过深度 Q 学习智能地屏蔽输入图像。我们表明，针对预测模型训练代理可以显着改善为下游分类任务提取的语义特征。我们在两个公共数据集上进行实验，用于通过超声图像诊断乳腺癌并通过 MR 图像检测低级别神经胶质瘤。在我们的实验中，我们表明，我们新颖的掩蔽策略根据分类任务在准确性、宏 F1 和 AUROC 方面的表现来提升学习特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度Q学习的智能遮罩方法，用于改进医疗图像分析中的上下文编码预训练过程。
AI.motivation: 传统随机遮罩方法导致不必要的网络更新和特征遗忘，而医疗数据标注成本高且样本少，需更有效的自监督学习策略。
AI.method: 设计强化学习代理通过深度Q学习智能选择遮罩区域，训练预测模型以提升下游分类任务的语义特征提取能力。
AI.result: 在乳腺癌超声图像和胶质瘤MRI数据集上，新策略在准确率、宏F1和AUROC指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 智能遮罩策略能有效增强医疗图像预训练特征，为后续分类任务提供更优表征学习框架。

search_text: Intelligent Masking: Deep Q-Learning for Context Encoding in Medical Image Analysis 智能掩蔽：医学图像分析中上下文编码的深度 Q 学习 The need for a large amount of labeled data in the supervised setting has led recent studies to utilize self-supervised learning to pre-train deep neural networks using unlabeled data. Many self-supervised training strategies have been investigated especially for medical datasets to leverage the information available in the much fewer unlabeled data. One of the fundamental strategies in image-based self-supervision is context prediction. In this approach, a model is trained to reconstruct the contents of an arbitrary missing region of an image based on its surroundings. However, the existing methods adopt a random and blind masking approach by focusing uniformly on all regions of the images. This approach results in a lot of unnecessary network updates that cause the model to forget the rich extracted features. In this work, we develop a novel self-supervised approach that occludes targeted regions to improve the pre-training procedure. To this end, we propose a reinforcement learning-based agent which learns to intelligently mask input images through deep Q-learning. We show that training the agent against the prediction model can significantly improve the semantic features extracted for downstream classification tasks. We perform our experiments on two public datasets for diagnosing breast cancer in the ultrasound images and detecting lower-grade glioma with MR images. In our experiments, we show that our novel masking strategy advances the learned features according to the performance on the classification task in terms of accuracy, macro F1, and AUROC. 在监督环境中需要大量标记数据，导致最近的研究利用自监督学习来使用未标记数据预训练深度神经网络。人们已经研究了许多自监督训练策略，特别是针对医学数据集，以利用更少的未标记数据中的可用信息。基于图像的自我监督的基本策略之一是上下文预测。在这种方法中，训练模型根据周围环境重建图像中任意缺失区域的内容。然而，现有方法采用随机盲掩蔽方法，均匀关注图像的所有区域。这种方法会导致大量不必要的网络更新，导致模型忘记丰富的提取特征。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种新颖的自我监督方法，该方法可以遮挡目标区域以改进预训练程序。为此，我们提出了一种基于强化学习的代理，它通过深度 Q 学习智能地屏蔽输入图像。我们表明，针对预测模型训练代理可以显着改善为下游分类任务提取的语义特征。我们在两个公共数据集上进行实验，用于通过超声图像诊断乳腺癌并通过 MR 图像检测低级别神经胶质瘤。在我们的实验中，我们表明，我们新颖的掩蔽策略根据分类任务在准确性、宏 F1 和 AUROC 方面的表现来提升学习特征。 本文提出一种基于深度Q学习的智能遮罩方法，用于改进医疗图像分析中的上下文编码预训练过程。 Mojtaba Bahrami,Mahsa Ghorbani,Nassir Navab cs.CV,cs.LG

title: FD-SLAM: 3-D Reconstruction Using Features and Dense Matching
title_zh: FD-SLAM：使用特征和密集匹配进行 3D 重建
abstract: It is well known that visual SLAM systems based on dense matching are locally accurate but are also susceptible to long-term drift and map corruption. In contrast, feature matching methods can achieve greater long-term consistency but can suffer from inaccurate local pose estimation when feature information is sparse. Based on these observations, we propose an RGB-D SLAM system that leverages the advantages of both approaches: using dense frame-to-model odometry to build accurate sub-maps and on-the-fly feature-based matching across sub-maps for global map optimisation. In addition, we incorporate a learning-based loop closure component based on 3-D features which further stabilises map building. We have evaluated the approach on indoor sequences from public datasets, and the results show that it performs on par or better than state-of-the-art systems in terms of map reconstruction quality and pose estimation. The approach can also scale to large scenes where other systems often fail.
summary: It is well known that visual SLAM systems based on dense matching are locally accurate but are also susceptible to long-term drift and map corruption. In contrast, feature matching methods can achieve greater long-term consistency but can suffer from inaccurate local pose estimation when feature information is sparse. Based on these observations, we propose an RGB-D SLAM system that leverages the advantages of both approaches: using dense frame-to-model odometry to build accurate sub-maps and on-the-fly feature-based matching across sub-maps for global map optimisation. In addition, we incorporate a learning-based loop closure component based on 3-D features which further stabilises map building. We have evaluated the approach on indoor sequences from public datasets, and the results show that it performs on par or better than state-of-the-art systems in terms of map reconstruction quality and pose estimation. The approach can also scale to large scenes where other systems often fail.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，基于密集匹配的视觉 SLAM 系统局部准确，但也容易受到长期漂移和地图损坏的影响。相比之下，特征匹配方法可以实现更大的长期一致性，但当特征信息稀疏时，可能会出现局部姿态估计不准确的问题。基于这些观察，我们提出了一种 RGB-D SLAM 系统，它利用了两种方法的优点：使用密集的帧到模型里程计来构建精确的子地图，并在子地图之间进行基于动态特征的匹配，以实现全局地图优化。此外，我们还结合了基于 3D 特征的基于学习的闭环组件，进一步稳定了地图构建。我们已经评估了来自公共数据集的室内序列的方法，结果表明，它在地图重建质量和姿态估计方面的性能与最先进的系统相当或更好。该方法还可以扩展到其他系统经常失败的大型场景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合特征匹配与密集匹配的RGB-D SLAM系统FD-SLAM，用于实现更鲁棒的三维重建。
AI.motivation: 传统密集匹配SLAM存在长期漂移问题，特征匹配方法则在局部位姿估计上表现不足，需融合两者优势以提升整体性能。
AI.method: 采用密集帧到模型里程计构建高精度子地图，通过实时跨子地图特征匹配实现全局优化，并引入基于3D特征的学习闭环检测模块。
AI.result: 在公开室内数据集测试中，FD-SLAM在地图重建质量与位姿估计精度上达到或超越现有最优方法，且能有效处理大尺度场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合密集匹配与特征匹配的优势，FD-SLAM在保持局部精度的同时提升了长期稳定性，为大场景三维重建提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Weihua He,Kaichao You,Zhendong Qiao,Xu Jia,Ziyang Zhang,Wenhui Wang,Huchuan Lu,Yaoyuan Wang,Jianxing Liao
title: TimeReplayer: Unlocking the Potential of Event Cameras for Video Interpolation
title_zh: TimeReplayer：释放事件摄像机的视频插值潜力
abstract: Recording fast motion in a high FPS (frame-per-second) requires expensive high-speed cameras. As an alternative, interpolating low-FPS videos from commodity cameras has attracted significant attention. If only low-FPS videos are available, motion assumptions (linear or quadratic) are necessary to infer intermediate frames, which fail to model complex motions. Event camera, a new camera with pixels producing events of brightness change at the temporal resolution of $μs$ $(10^{-6}$ second $)$, is a game-changing device to enable video interpolation at the presence of arbitrarily complex motion. Since event camera is a novel sensor, its potential has not been fulfilled due to the lack of processing algorithms. The pioneering work Time Lens introduced event cameras to video interpolation by designing optical devices to collect a large amount of paired training data of high-speed frames and events, which is too costly to scale. To fully unlock the potential of event cameras, this paper proposes a novel TimeReplayer algorithm to interpolate videos captured by commodity cameras with events. It is trained in an unsupervised cycle-consistent style, canceling the necessity of high-speed training data and bringing the additional ability of video extrapolation. Its state-of-the-art results and demo videos in supplementary reveal the promising future of event-based vision.
summary: Recording fast motion in a high FPS (frame-per-second) requires expensive high-speed cameras. As an alternative, interpolating low-FPS videos from commodity cameras has attracted significant attention. If only low-FPS videos are available, motion assumptions (linear or quadratic) are necessary to infer intermediate frames, which fail to model complex motions. Event camera, a new camera with pixels producing events of brightness change at the temporal resolution of $μs$ $(10^{-6}$ second $)$, is a game-changing device to enable video interpolation at the presence of arbitrarily complex motion. Since event camera is a novel sensor, its potential has not been fulfilled due to the lack of processing algorithms. The pioneering work Time Lens introduced event cameras to video interpolation by designing optical devices to collect a large amount of paired training data of high-speed frames and events, which is too costly to scale. To fully unlock the potential of event cameras, this paper proposes a novel TimeReplayer algorithm to interpolate videos captured by commodity cameras with events. It is trained in an unsupervised cycle-consistent style, canceling the necessity of high-speed training data and bringing the additional ability of video extrapolation. Its state-of-the-art results and demo videos in supplementary reveal the promising future of event-based vision.
abstract_zh: 以高 FPS（每秒帧数）记录快速运动需要昂贵的高速摄像机。作为替代方案，对商用相机的低 FPS 视频进行插值已引起了广泛关注。如果只有低 FPS 视频可用，则需要运动假设（线性或二次）来推断中间帧，这无法对复杂运动进行建模。事件相机是一种新相机，其像素以 $μs$ $(10^{-6}$ 秒 $)$ 的时间分辨率产生亮度变化事件，是一种改变游戏规则的设备，可在存在任意复杂运动的情况下实现视频插值。由于事件相机是一种新颖的传感器，由于缺乏处理算法，其潜力尚未发挥出来。开创性工作Time Lens通过设计光学设备来收集大量高速帧和事件的配对训练数据，将事件相机引入视频插值，但成本太高而无法扩展。为了充分释放事件摄像机的潜力，本文提出了一种新颖的 TimeReplayer 算法，将商用摄像机捕获的视频与事件进行插值。它以无监督的循环一致方式进行训练，取消了高速训练数据的必要性，并带来了视频外推的额外能力。其最先进的结果和补充演示视频揭示了基于事件的视觉的光明前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TimeReplayer算法，利用事件相机实现商品相机低帧率视频的高质量视频插值。
AI.motivation: 传统高速摄像机成本高昂，现有低帧率视频插值方法难以处理复杂运动，而事件相机虽具微秒级时间分辨率但缺乏有效处理算法。
AI.method: 设计无监督循环一致训练框架，无需高速训练数据，通过事件相机数据直接实现视频插值与外推。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中取得最先进效果，补充视频展示了事件相机在复杂运动场景下的插值潜力。
AI.conclusion: TimeReplayer突破了事件相机处理算法的瓶颈，为基于事件的视觉应用提供了新方向。

search_text: TimeReplayer: Unlocking the Potential of Event Cameras for Video Interpolation TimeReplayer：释放事件摄像机的视频插值潜力 Recording fast motion in a high FPS (frame-per-second) requires expensive high-speed cameras. As an alternative, interpolating low-FPS videos from commodity cameras has attracted significant attention. If only low-FPS videos are available, motion assumptions (linear or quadratic) are necessary to infer intermediate frames, which fail to model complex motions. Event camera, a new camera with pixels producing events of brightness change at the temporal resolution of $μs$ $(10^{-6}$ second $)$, is a game-changing device to enable video interpolation at the presence of arbitrarily complex motion. Since event camera is a novel sensor, its potential has not been fulfilled due to the lack of processing algorithms. The pioneering work Time Lens introduced event cameras to video interpolation by designing optical devices to collect a large amount of paired training data of high-speed frames and events, which is too costly to scale. To fully unlock the potential of event cameras, this paper proposes a novel TimeReplayer algorithm to interpolate videos captured by commodity cameras with events. It is trained in an unsupervised cycle-consistent style, canceling the necessity of high-speed training data and bringing the additional ability of video extrapolation. Its state-of-the-art results and demo videos in supplementary reveal the promising future of event-based vision. 以高 FPS（每秒帧数）记录快速运动需要昂贵的高速摄像机。作为替代方案，对商用相机的低 FPS 视频进行插值已引起了广泛关注。如果只有低 FPS 视频可用，则需要运动假设（线性或二次）来推断中间帧，这无法对复杂运动进行建模。事件相机是一种新相机，其像素以 $μs$ $(10^{-6}$ 秒 $)$ 的时间分辨率产生亮度变化事件，是一种改变游戏规则的设备，可在存在任意复杂运动的情况下实现视频插值。由于事件相机是一种新颖的传感器，由于缺乏处理算法，其潜力尚未发挥出来。开创性工作Time Lens通过设计光学设备来收集大量高速帧和事件的配对训练数据，将事件相机引入视频插值，但成本太高而无法扩展。为了充分释放事件摄像机的潜力，本文提出了一种新颖的 TimeReplayer 算法，将商用摄像机捕获的视频与事件进行插值。它以无监督的循环一致方式进行训练，取消了高速训练数据的必要性，并带来了视频外推的额外能力。其最先进的结果和补充演示视频揭示了基于事件的视觉的光明前景。 本文提出TimeReplayer算法，利用事件相机实现商品相机低帧率视频的高质量视频插值。 Weihua He,Kaichao You,Zhendong Qiao,Xu Jia,Ziyang Zhang,Wenhui Wang,Huchuan Lu,Yaoyuan Wang,Jianxing Liao cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Guilherme C. Oliveira,Gustavo H. Rosa,Daniel C. G. Pedronette,João P. Papa,Himeesh Kumar,Leandro A. Passos,Dinesh Kumar
title: Robust deep learning for eye fundus images: Bridging real and synthetic data for enhancing generalization
title_zh: 眼底图像的稳健深度学习：桥接真实数据和合成数据以增强泛化能力
comment: Accepted by the Biomedical Signal Processing and Control
comments: Accepted by the Biomedical Signal Processing and Control
abstract: Deep learning applications for assessing medical images are limited because the datasets are often small and imbalanced. The use of synthetic data has been proposed in the literature, but neither a robust comparison of the different methods nor generalizability has been reported. Our approach integrates a retinal image quality assessment model and StyleGAN2 architecture to enhance Age-related Macular Degeneration (AMD) detection capabilities and improve generalizability. This work compares ten different Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) architectures to generate synthetic eye-fundus images with and without AMD. We combined subsets of three public databases (iChallenge-AMD, ODIR-2019, and RIADD) to form a single training and test set. We employed the STARE dataset for external validation, ensuring a comprehensive assessment of the proposed approach. The results show that StyleGAN2 reached the lowest Frechet Inception Distance (166.17), and clinicians could not accurately differentiate between real and synthetic images. ResNet-18 architecture obtained the best performance with 85% accuracy and outperformed the two human experts (80% and 75%) in detecting AMD fundus images. The accuracy rates were 82.8% for the test set and 81.3% for the STARE dataset, demonstrating the model's generalizability. The proposed methodology for synthetic medical image generation has been validated for robustness and accuracy, with free access to its code for further research and development in this field.
summary: Deep learning applications for assessing medical images are limited because the datasets are often small and imbalanced. The use of synthetic data has been proposed in the literature, but neither a robust comparison of the different methods nor generalizability has been reported. Our approach integrates a retinal image quality assessment model and StyleGAN2 architecture to enhance Age-related Macular Degeneration (AMD) detection capabilities and improve generalizability. This work compares ten different Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) architectures to generate synthetic eye-fundus images with and without AMD. We combined subsets of three public databases (iChallenge-AMD, ODIR-2019, and RIADD) to form a single training and test set. We employed the STARE dataset for external validation, ensuring a comprehensive assessment of the proposed approach. The results show that StyleGAN2 reached the lowest Frechet Inception Distance (166.17), and clinicians could not accurately differentiate between real and synthetic images. ResNet-18 architecture obtained the best performance with 85% accuracy and outperformed the two human experts (80% and 75%) in detecting AMD fundus images. The accuracy rates were 82.8% for the test set and 81.3% for the STARE dataset, demonstrating the model's generalizability. The proposed methodology for synthetic medical image generation has been validated for robustness and accuracy, with free access to its code for further research and development in this field.
abstract_zh: 用于评估医学图像的深度学习应用受到限制，因为数据集通常很小且不平衡。文献中已提出使用合成数据，但尚未报道不同方法的稳健比较和普遍性。我们的方法集成了视网膜图像质量评估模型和 StyleGAN2 架构，以增强年龄相关性黄斑变性 (AMD) 检测能力并提高普遍性。这项工作比较了十种不同的生成对抗网络 (GAN) 架构，以生成使用和不使用 AMD 的合成眼底图像。我们组合了三个公共数据库（iChallenge-AMD、ODIR-2019 和 RIADD）的子集，形成一个训练和测试集。我们使用 STARE 数据集进行外部验证，确保对所提出的方法进行全面评估。结果表明，StyleGAN2 达到了最低的 Frechet Inception Distance（166.17），临床医生无法准确地区分真实图像和合成图像。 ResNet-18 架构在检测 AMD 眼底图像方面获得了最佳性能，准确率达到 85%，优于两位人类专家（80% 和 75%）。测试集的准确率为 82.8%，STARE 数据集的准确率为 81.3%，证明了模型的普适性。所提出的合成医学图像生成方法已经过稳健性和准确性的验证，可以免费访问其代码以进行该领域的进一步研究和开发。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合真实与合成数据的方法，通过StyleGAN2生成眼底图像以提升年龄相关性黄斑变性（AMD）检测的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 医学图像数据集通常规模小且不平衡，现有合成数据方法缺乏对模型泛化能力的系统评估，需探索更稳健的生成与融合策略。
AI.method: 整合视网膜图像质量评估模型与StyleGAN2架构，生成含/不含AMD的合成眼底图像，结合三个公开数据集训练模型，并用STARE数据集进行外部验证。
AI.result: StyleGAN2生成图像的FID最低（166.17），临床医生无法区分真实与合成图像；ResNet-18模型在测试集和STARE数据集上分别达到82.8%和81.3%的准确率，优于人类专家。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在合成医学图像生成与AMD检测中表现出鲁棒性与高精度，代码开源有助于推动该领域研究。

authors: H. F. Machiel Van der Loos
authors_json: H. F. Machiel Van der Loos
authors_text: Maram Sakr,Zexi Jesse Li,H. F. Machiel Van der Loos,Dana Kulic,Elizabeth A. Croft
title: Quantifying Demonstration Quality for Robot Learning and Generalization
title_zh: 量化机器人学习和泛化的演示质量
comment: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters ( Volume: 7, Issue: 4, October 2022)
comments: ef:IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters ( Volume: 7, Issue: 4, October 2022)
abstract: Learning from Demonstration (LfD) seeks to democratize robotics by enabling diverse end-users to teach robots to perform a task by providing demonstrations. However, most LfD techniques assume users provide optimal demonstrations. This is not always the case in real applications where users are likely to provide demonstrations of varying quality, that may change with expertise and other factors. Demonstration quality plays a crucial role in robot learning and generalization. Hence, it is important to quantify the quality of the provided demonstrations before using them for robot learning. In this paper, we propose quantifying the quality of the demonstrations based on how well they perform in the learned task. We hypothesize that task performance can give an indication of the generalization performance on similar tasks. The proposed approach is validated in a user study (N = 27). Users with different robotics expertise levels were recruited to teach a PR2 robot a generic task (pressing a button) under different task constraints. They taught the robot in two sessions on two different days to capture their teaching behaviour across sessions. The task performance was utilized to classify the provided demonstrations into high-quality and low-quality sets. The results show a significant Pearson correlation coefficient (R = 0.85, p < 0.0001) between the task performance and generalization performance across all participants. We also found that users clustered into two groups: Users who provided high-quality demonstrations from the first session, assigned to the fast-adapters group, and users who provided low-quality demonstrations in the first session and then improved with practice, assigned to the slow-adapters group. These results highlight the importance of quantifying demonstration quality, which can be indicative of the adaptation level of the user to the task.
summary: Learning from Demonstration (LfD) seeks to democratize robotics by enabling diverse end-users to teach robots to perform a task by providing demonstrations. However, most LfD techniques assume users provide optimal demonstrations. This is not always the case in real applications where users are likely to provide demonstrations of varying quality, that may change with expertise and other factors. Demonstration quality plays a crucial role in robot learning and generalization. Hence, it is important to quantify the quality of the provided demonstrations before using them for robot learning. In this paper, we propose quantifying the quality of the demonstrations based on how well they perform in the learned task. We hypothesize that task performance can give an indication of the generalization performance on similar tasks. The proposed approach is validated in a user study (N = 27). Users with different robotics expertise levels were recruited to teach a PR2 robot a generic task (pressing a button) under different task constraints. They taught the robot in two sessions on two different days to capture their teaching behaviour across sessions. The task performance was utilized to classify the provided demonstrations into high-quality and low-quality sets. The results show a significant Pearson correlation coefficient (R = 0.85, p < 0.0001) between the task performance and generalization performance across all participants. We also found that users clustered into two groups: Users who provided high-quality demonstrations from the first session, assigned to the fast-adapters group, and users who provided low-quality demonstrations in the first session and then improved with practice, assigned to the slow-adapters group. These results highlight the importance of quantifying demonstration quality, which can be indicative of the adaptation level of the user to the task.
abstract_zh: 从演示中学习 (LfD) 旨在通过使不同的最终用户能够通过提供演示来教机器人执行任务，从而实现机器人技术的民主化。然而，大多数 LfD 技术都假设用户提供最佳演示。在实际应用中情况并非总是如此，用户可能会提供不同质量的演示，并且可能会随着专业知识和其他因素的变化而变化。演示质量在机器人学习和泛化中起着至关重要的作用。因此，在将所提供的演示用于机器人学习之前量化其质量非常重要。在本文中，我们建议根据演示在学习任务中的表现来量化演示的质量。我们假设任务性能可以指示类似任务的泛化性能。所提出的方法在用户研究中得到了验证（N = 27）。招募具有不同机器人专业水平的用户来教 PR2 机器人在不同任务限制下执行通用任务（按下按钮）。他们在不同的两天分两次训练机器人，以捕捉他们在训练期间的教学行为。利用任务表现将提供的演示分为高质量和低质量集。结果显示所有参与者的任务表现和泛化表现之间存在显着的 Pearson 相关系数（R = 0.85，p < 0.0001）。我们还发现，用户分为两组：在第一次会话中提供高质量演示的用户，分配到快速适配器组；以及在第一次会话中提供低质量演示，然后通过练习改进的用户，分配到慢速适配器组。这些结果凸显了量化演示质量的重要性，这可以表明用户对任务的适应水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出量化机器人学习中示范质量的方法，以提升机器人任务执行与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有学习示范（LfD）方法假设用户提供的示范均为高质量，但实际中用户经验差异导致示范质量不一，影响机器人学习效果。
AI.method: 基于任务表现量化示范质量，通过用户实验（N=27）招募不同经验用户教学，分两次会话采集数据，利用任务表现分类示范质量并计算相关性。
AI.result: 任务表现与泛化表现呈显著正相关（R=0.85，p<0.0001），用户分为两类：首次即提供高质量示范的快速适应者，及需练习改进的慢速适应者。
AI.conclusion: 量化示范质量可反映用户适应水平，为机器人学习提供关键依据，有助于优化教学策略与模型训练。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出量化机器人学习中示范质量的方法，以提升机器人任务执行与泛化能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有学习示范（LfD）方法假设用户提供的示范均为高质量，但实际中用户经验差异导致示范质量不一，影响机器人学习效果。
ai_content.method: 基于任务表现量化示范质量，通过用户实验（N=27）招募不同经验用户教学，分两次会话采集数据，利用任务表现分类示范质量并计算相关性。
ai_content.result: 任务表现与泛化表现呈显著正相关（R=0.85，p<0.0001），用户分为两类：首次即提供高质量示范的快速适应者，及需练习改进的慢速适应者。
ai_content.conclusion: 量化示范质量可反映用户适应水平，为机器人学习提供关键依据，有助于优化教学策略与模型训练。
