search_text: Quantifying Demonstration Quality for Robot Learning and Generalization 量化机器人学习和泛化的演示质量 Learning from Demonstration (LfD) seeks to democratize robotics by enabling diverse end-users to teach robots to perform a task by providing demonstrations. However, most LfD techniques assume users provide optimal demonstrations. This is not always the case in real applications where users are likely to provide demonstrations of varying quality, that may change with expertise and other factors. Demonstration quality plays a crucial role in robot learning and generalization. Hence, it is important to quantify the quality of the provided demonstrations before using them for robot learning. In this paper, we propose quantifying the quality of the demonstrations based on how well they perform in the learned task. We hypothesize that task performance can give an indication of the generalization performance on similar tasks. The proposed approach is validated in a user study (N = 27). Users with different robotics expertise levels were recruited to teach a PR2 robot a generic task (pressing a button) under different task constraints. They taught the robot in two sessions on two different days to capture their teaching behaviour across sessions. The task performance was utilized to classify the provided demonstrations into high-quality and low-quality sets. The results show a significant Pearson correlation coefficient (R = 0.85, p < 0.0001) between the task performance and generalization performance across all participants. We also found that users clustered into two groups: Users who provided high-quality demonstrations from the first session, assigned to the fast-adapters group, and users who provided low-quality demonstrations in the first session and then improved with practice, assigned to the slow-adapters group. These results highlight the importance of quantifying demonstration quality, which can be indicative of the adaptation level of the user to the task. 从演示中学习 (LfD) 旨在通过使不同的最终用户能够通过提供演示来教机器人执行任务，从而实现机器人技术的民主化。然而，大多数 LfD 技术都假设用户提供最佳演示。在实际应用中情况并非总是如此，用户可能会提供不同质量的演示，并且可能会随着专业知识和其他因素的变化而变化。演示质量在机器人学习和泛化中起着至关重要的作用。因此，在将所提供的演示用于机器人学习之前量化其质量非常重要。在本文中，我们建议根据演示在学习任务中的表现来量化演示的质量。我们假设任务性能可以指示类似任务的泛化性能。所提出的方法在用户研究中得到了验证（N = 27）。招募具有不同机器人专业水平的用户来教 PR2 机器人在不同任务限制下执行通用任务（按下按钮）。他们在不同的两天分两次训练机器人，以捕捉他们在训练期间的教学行为。利用任务表现将提供的演示分为高质量和低质量集。结果显示所有参与者的任务表现和泛化表现之间存在显着的 Pearson 相关系数（R = 0.85，p < 0.0001）。我们还发现，用户分为两组：在第一次会话中提供高质量演示的用户，分配到快速适配器组；以及在第一次会话中提供低质量演示，然后通过练习改进的用户，分配到慢速适配器组。这些结果凸显了量化演示质量的重要性，这可以表明用户对任务的适应水平。 本文提出量化机器人学习中示范质量的方法，以提升机器人任务执行与泛化能力。 Maram Sakr,Zexi Jesse Li,H. F. Machiel Van der Loos,Dana Kulic,Elizabeth A. Croft cs.RO,cs.HC

title: Analyzing Generalization of Vision and Language Navigation to Unseen Outdoor Areas
title_zh: 分析视觉和语言导航对看不见的户外区域的泛化
abstract: Vision and language navigation (VLN) is a challenging visually-grounded language understanding task. Given a natural language navigation instruction, a visual agent interacts with a graph-based environment equipped with panorama images and tries to follow the described route. Most prior work has been conducted in indoor scenarios where best results were obtained for navigation on routes that are similar to the training routes, with sharp drops in performance when testing on unseen environments. We focus on VLN in outdoor scenarios and find that in contrast to indoor VLN, most of the gain in outdoor VLN on unseen data is due to features like junction type embedding or heading delta that are specific to the respective environment graph, while image information plays a very minor role in generalizing VLN to unseen outdoor areas. These findings show a bias to specifics of graph representations of urban environments, demanding that VLN tasks grow in scale and diversity of geographical environments.
summary: Vision and language navigation (VLN) is a challenging visually-grounded language understanding task. Given a natural language navigation instruction, a visual agent interacts with a graph-based environment equipped with panorama images and tries to follow the described route. Most prior work has been conducted in indoor scenarios where best results were obtained for navigation on routes that are similar to the training routes, with sharp drops in performance when testing on unseen environments. We focus on VLN in outdoor scenarios and find that in contrast to indoor VLN, most of the gain in outdoor VLN on unseen data is due to features like junction type embedding or heading delta that are specific to the respective environment graph, while image information plays a very minor role in generalizing VLN to unseen outdoor areas. These findings show a bias to specifics of graph representations of urban environments, demanding that VLN tasks grow in scale and diversity of geographical environments.
abstract_zh: 视觉和语言导航（VLN）是一项具有挑战性的基于视觉的语言理解任务。给定自然语言导航指令，视觉代理与配备全景图像的基于图形的环境进行交互，并尝试遵循所描述的路线。之前的大多数工作都是在室内场景中进行的，在与训练路线相似的路线上进行导航时获得了最佳结果，但在看不见的环境中进行测试时性能急剧下降。我们关注室外场景中的 VLN，发现与室内 VLN 相比，室外 VLN 对不可见数据的大部分增益是由于特定于各自环境图的结点类型嵌入或航向增量等特征，而图像信息在将 VLN 推广到不可见的室外区域方面起着非常小的作用。这些发现显示出对城市环境图形表示细节的偏见，要求 VLN 任务在地理环境的规模和多样性上不断增长。

AI.tldr: 分析视觉与语言导航在未见过的户外环境中的泛化能力
AI.motivation: 现有研究多集中在室内场景，但面对未见过的环境时表现不佳，需探索户外场景中影响泛化能力的关键因素
AI.method: 通过实验对比不同环境特征对模型泛化能力的影响，分析图像信息与环境图特征的作用
AI.result: 发现户外VLN的泛化主要依赖环境图的特定特征，如交叉口类型嵌入和方向变化，图像信息作用有限
AI.conclusion: 当前模型对城市环境图表示存在偏差，需增加地理环境的多样性和规模以提升泛化能力

title: A Stitch in Time Saves Nine: A Train-Time Regularizing Loss for Improved Neural Network Calibration
title_zh: 时间一针可节省九：训练时间正则化损失以改进神经网络校准
comment: Accepted in IEEE Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2022
comments: Accepted in IEEE Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2022
abstract: Deep Neural Networks ( DNN s) are known to make overconfident mistakes, which makes their use problematic in safety-critical applications. State-of-the-art ( SOTA ) calibration techniques improve on the confidence of predicted labels alone and leave the confidence of non-max classes (e.g. top-2, top-5) uncalibrated. Such calibration is not suitable for label refinement using post-processing. Further, most SOTA techniques learn a few hyper-parameters post-hoc, leaving out the scope for image, or pixel specific calibration. This makes them unsuitable for calibration under domain shift, or for dense prediction tasks like semantic segmentation. In this paper, we argue for intervening at the train time itself, so as to directly produce calibrated DNN models. We propose a novel auxiliary loss function: Multi-class Difference in Confidence and Accuracy ( MDCA ), to achieve the same MDCA can be used in conjunction with other application/task-specific loss functions. We show that training with MDCA leads to better-calibrated models in terms of Expected Calibration Error ( ECE ), and Static Calibration Error ( SCE ) on image classification, and segmentation tasks. We report ECE ( SCE ) score of 0.72 (1.60) on the CIFAR 100 dataset, in comparison to 1.90 (1.71) by the SOTA. Under domain shift, a ResNet-18 model trained on PACS dataset using MDCA gives an average ECE ( SCE ) score of 19.7 (9.7) across all domains, compared to 24.2 (11.8) by the SOTA. For the segmentation task, we report a 2X reduction in calibration error on PASCAL - VOC dataset in comparison to Focal Loss. Finally, MDCA training improves calibration even on imbalanced data, and for natural language classification tasks. We have released the code here: code is available at https://github.com/mdca-loss
summary: Deep Neural Networks ( DNN s) are known to make overconfident mistakes, which makes their use problematic in safety-critical applications. State-of-the-art ( SOTA ) calibration techniques improve on the confidence of predicted labels alone and leave the confidence of non-max classes (e.g. top-2, top-5) uncalibrated. Such calibration is not suitable for label refinement using post-processing. Further, most SOTA techniques learn a few hyper-parameters post-hoc, leaving out the scope for image, or pixel specific calibration. This makes them unsuitable for calibration under domain shift, or for dense prediction tasks like semantic segmentation. In this paper, we argue for intervening at the train time itself, so as to directly produce calibrated DNN models. We propose a novel auxiliary loss function: Multi-class Difference in Confidence and Accuracy ( MDCA ), to achieve the same MDCA can be used in conjunction with other application/task-specific loss functions. We show that training with MDCA leads to better-calibrated models in terms of Expected Calibration Error ( ECE ), and Static Calibration Error ( SCE ) on image classification, and segmentation tasks. We report ECE ( SCE ) score of 0.72 (1.60) on the CIFAR 100 dataset, in comparison to 1.90 (1.71) by the SOTA. Under domain shift, a ResNet-18 model trained on PACS dataset using MDCA gives an average ECE ( SCE ) score of 19.7 (9.7) across all domains, compared to 24.2 (11.8) by the SOTA. For the segmentation task, we report a 2X reduction in calibration error on PASCAL - VOC dataset in comparison to Focal Loss. Finally, MDCA training improves calibration even on imbalanced data, and for natural language classification tasks. We have released the code here: code is available at https://github.com/mdca-loss
abstract_zh: 众所周知，深度神经网络 (DNN) 会犯过于自信的错误，这使得它们在安全关键型应用中的使用存在问题。最先进的 (SOTA) 校准技术单独提高了预测标签的置信度，并保留非最大类别（例如 top-2、top-5）的置信度未校准。这种校准不适合使用后处理进行标签细化。此外，大多数 SOTA 技术都会事后学习一些超参数，从而忽略了图像或像素特定校准的范围。这使得它们不适合域转移下的校准，或语义分割等密集的预测任务。在本文中，我们主张在训练时间本身进行干预，以便直接生成校准的 DNN 模型。我们提出了一种新颖的辅助损失函数：置信度和准确度的多类差异（MDCA），以实现相同的 MDCA 可以与其他应用程序/特定于任务的损失函数结合使用。我们表明，使用 MDCA 进行训练可以在图像分类和分割任务的预期校准误差 ( ECE ) 和静态校准误差 ( SCE ) 方面产生更好的校准模型。我们报告 CIFAR 100 数据集上的 ECE (SCE) 得分为 0.72 (1.60)，而 SOTA 的得分为 1.90 (1.71)。在域转换下，使用 MDCA 在 PACS 数据集上训练的 ResNet-18 模型在所有域中给出的平均 ECE (SCE) 分数为 19.7 (9.7)，而 SOTA 的平均 ECE (SCE) 分数为 24.2 (11.8)。对于分割任务，我们报告 PASCAL - VOC 数据集上的校准误差与焦点损失相比减少了 2 倍。最后，MDCA 训练甚至可以改善不平衡数据和自然语言分类任务的校准。我们在这里发布了代码：代码可在 https://github.com/mdca-loss 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MDCA的辅助损失函数，用于在训练过程中直接提升神经网络的校准性能，解决现有方法在非最大类校准和领域迁移中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有校准技术仅关注预测标签的置信度，忽略非最大类（如top-2、top-5）的校准，导致后处理标签优化效果差，且难以适应领域迁移或密集预测任务。
AI.method: 设计多类置信度与准确率差异损失（MDCA），结合任务特定损失函数，在训练阶段直接优化模型校准，支持图像、像素级及领域迁移场景的自适应校准。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100数据集上，MDCA的ECE/SCE得分分别为0.72/1.60，优于SOTA的1.90/1.71；PACS数据集领域迁移下平均ECE/SCE为19.7/9.7，优于SOTA的24.2/11.8；在PASCAL-VOC分割任务中校准误差降低2倍。
AI.conclusion: MDCA通过训练阶段干预显著提升模型校准性能，适用于分类、分割及不平衡数据场景，为安全关键应用提供更可靠的置信度估计。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为MDCA的辅助损失函数，用于在训练过程中直接提升神经网络的校准性能，解决现有方法在非最大类校准和领域迁移中的不足。
motivation: 现有校准技术仅关注预测标签的置信度，忽略非最大类（如top-2、top-5）的校准，导致后处理标签优化效果差，且难以适应领域迁移或密集预测任务。
method: 设计多类置信度与准确率差异损失（MDCA），结合任务特定损失函数，在训练阶段直接优化模型校准，支持图像、像素级及领域迁移场景的自适应校准。
result: 在CIFAR-100数据集上，MDCA的ECE/SCE得分分别为0.72/1.60，优于SOTA的1.90/1.71；PACS数据集领域迁移下平均ECE/SCE为19.7/9.7，优于SOTA的24.2/11.8；在PASCAL-VOC分割任务中校准误差降低2倍。
conclusion: MDCA通过训练阶段干预显著提升模型校准性能，适用于分类、分割及不平衡数据场景，为安全关键应用提供更可靠的置信度估计。
search_text: A Stitch in Time Saves Nine: A Train-Time Regularizing Loss for Improved Neural Network Calibration 时间一针可节省九：训练时间正则化损失以改进神经网络校准 Deep Neural Networks ( DNN s) are known to make overconfident mistakes, which makes their use problematic in safety-critical applications. State-of-the-art ( SOTA ) calibration techniques improve on the confidence of predicted labels alone and leave the confidence of non-max classes (e.g. top-2, top-5) uncalibrated. Such calibration is not suitable for label refinement using post-processing. Further, most SOTA techniques learn a few hyper-parameters post-hoc, leaving out the scope for image, or pixel specific calibration. This makes them unsuitable for calibration under domain shift, or for dense prediction tasks like semantic segmentation. In this paper, we argue for intervening at the train time itself, so as to directly produce calibrated DNN models. We propose a novel auxiliary loss function: Multi-class Difference in Confidence and Accuracy ( MDCA ), to achieve the same MDCA can be used in conjunction with other application/task-specific loss functions. We show that training with MDCA leads to better-calibrated models in terms of Expected Calibration Error ( ECE ), and Static Calibration Error ( SCE ) on image classification, and segmentation tasks. We report ECE ( SCE ) score of 0.72 (1.60) on the CIFAR 100 dataset, in comparison to 1.90 (1.71) by the SOTA. Under domain shift, a ResNet-18 model trained on PACS dataset using MDCA gives an average ECE ( SCE ) score of 19.7 (9.7) across all domains, compared to 24.2 (11.8) by the SOTA. For the segmentation task, we report a 2X reduction in calibration error on PASCAL - VOC dataset in comparison to Focal Loss. Finally, MDCA training improves calibration even on imbalanced data, and for natural language classification tasks. We have released the code here: code is available at https://github.com/mdca-loss 众所周知，深度神经网络 (DNN) 会犯过于自信的错误，这使得它们在安全关键型应用中的使用存在问题。最先进的 (SOTA) 校准技术单独提高了预测标签的置信度，并保留非最大类别（例如 top-2、top-5）的置信度未校准。这种校准不适合使用后处理进行标签细化。此外，大多数 SOTA 技术都会事后学习一些超参数，从而忽略了图像或像素特定校准的范围。这使得它们不适合域转移下的校准，或语义分割等密集的预测任务。在本文中，我们主张在训练时间本身进行干预，以便直接生成校准的 DNN 模型。我们提出了一种新颖的辅助损失函数：置信度和准确度的多类差异（MDCA），以实现相同的 MDCA 可以与其他应用程序/特定于任务的损失函数结合使用。我们表明，使用 MDCA 进行训练可以在图像分类和分割任务的预期校准误差 ( ECE ) 和静态校准误差 ( SCE ) 方面产生更好的校准模型。我们报告 CIFAR 100 数据集上的 ECE (SCE) 得分为 0.72 (1.60)，而 SOTA 的得分为 1.90 (1.71)。在域转换下，使用 MDCA 在 PACS 数据集上训练的 ResNet-18 模型在所有域中给出的平均 ECE (SCE) 分数为 19.7 (9.7)，而 SOTA 的平均 ECE (SCE) 分数为 24.2 (11.8)。对于分割任务，我们报告 PASCAL - VOC 数据集上的校准误差与焦点损失相比减少了 2 倍。最后，MDCA 训练甚至可以改善不平衡数据和自然语言分类任务的校准。我们在这里发布了代码：代码可在 https://github.com/mdca-loss 获取 本文提出一种名为MDCA的辅助损失函数，用于在训练过程中直接提升神经网络的校准性能，解决现有方法在非最大类校准和领域迁移中的不足。 Ramya Hebbalaguppe,Jatin Prakash,Neelabh Madan,Chetan Arora cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: SERA: Safe and Efficient Reactive Obstacle Avoidance for Collaborative Robotic Planning in Unstructured Environments
title_zh: SERA：安全高效的反应式避障，用于非结构化环境中的协作机器人规划
abstract: Safe and efficient collaboration among multiple robots in unstructured environments is increasingly critical in the era of Industry 4.0. However, achieving robust and autonomous collaboration among humans and other robots requires modern robotic systems to have effective proximity perception and reactive obstacle avoidance. In this paper, we propose a novel methodology for reactive whole-body obstacle avoidance that ensures conflict-free robot-robot interactions even in dynamic environment. Unlike existing approaches based on Jacobian-type, sampling based or geometric techniques, our methodology leverages the latest deep learning advances and topological manifold learning, enabling it to be readily generalized to other problem settings with high computing efficiency and fast graph traversal techniques. Our approach allows a robotic arm to proactively avoid obstacles of arbitrary 3D shapes without direct contact, a significant improvement over traditional industrial cobot settings. To validate our approach, we implement it on a robotic platform consisting of dual 6-DoF robotic arms with optimized proximity sensor placement, capable of working collaboratively with varying levels of interference. Specifically, one arm performs reactive whole-body obstacle avoidance while achieving its pre-determined objective, while the other arm emulates the presence of a human collaborator with independent and potentially adversarial movements. Our methodology provides a robust and effective solution for safe human-robot collaboration in non-stationary environments.
summary: Safe and efficient collaboration among multiple robots in unstructured environments is increasingly critical in the era of Industry 4.0. However, achieving robust and autonomous collaboration among humans and other robots requires modern robotic systems to have effective proximity perception and reactive obstacle avoidance. In this paper, we propose a novel methodology for reactive whole-body obstacle avoidance that ensures conflict-free robot-robot interactions even in dynamic environment. Unlike existing approaches based on Jacobian-type, sampling based or geometric techniques, our methodology leverages the latest deep learning advances and topological manifold learning, enabling it to be readily generalized to other problem settings with high computing efficiency and fast graph traversal techniques. Our approach allows a robotic arm to proactively avoid obstacles of arbitrary 3D shapes without direct contact, a significant improvement over traditional industrial cobot settings. To validate our approach, we implement it on a robotic platform consisting of dual 6-DoF robotic arms with optimized proximity sensor placement, capable of working collaboratively with varying levels of interference. Specifically, one arm performs reactive whole-body obstacle avoidance while achieving its pre-determined objective, while the other arm emulates the presence of a human collaborator with independent and potentially adversarial movements. Our methodology provides a robust and effective solution for safe human-robot collaboration in non-stationary environments.
abstract_zh: 在工业 4.0 时代，非结构化环境中多个机器人之间的安全高效协作变得越来越重要。然而，要在人类和其他机器人之间实现稳健和自主的协作，需要现代机器人系统具有有效的接近感知和反应性避障功能。在本文中，我们提出了一种反应式全身避障的新方法，即使在动态环境中也能确保无冲突的机器人与机器人交互。与基于雅可比式、基于采样或几何技术的现有方法不同，我们的方法利用最新的深度学习进展和拓扑流形学习，使其能够以高计算效率和快速图遍历技术轻松推广到其他问题设置。我们的方法允许机械臂在不直接接触的情况下主动避开任意 3D 形状的障碍物，这比传统工业协作机器人设置有了显着改进。为了验证我们的方法，我们在一个机器人平台上实现了它，该平台由双 6-DoF 机械臂组成，具有优化的接近传感器位置，能够在不同程度的干扰下协作工作。具体来说，一只手臂在实现预定目标的同时执行反应性全身避障，而另一只手臂则通过独立且潜在的对抗性动作来模拟人类协作者的存在。我们的方法为非固定环境中的安全人机协作提供了强大而有效的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SERA方法，实现多机器人在非结构化动态环境中的安全高效避障协作。
AI.motivation: 工业4.0时代需要机器人与人类安全协作，但现有方法在动态环境中的避障能力不足，需更高效自主的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合深度学习与拓扑流形学习，通过高效图遍历技术实现任意3D形状障碍物的主动避障，双机械臂平台验证协作有效性。
AI.result: 双6自由度机械臂在干扰环境下实现无接触避障，一臂完成任务另一臂模拟人类对抗性运动，验证方法鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SERA为非静态环境的人机协作提供可靠方案，相比传统工业协作机器人有显著改进。

authors_text: Ziqian Bai,Timur Bagautdinov,Javier Romero,Michael Zollhöfer,Ping Tan,Shunsuke Saito
title: AutoAvatar: Autoregressive Neural Fields for Dynamic Avatar Modeling
title_zh: AutoAvatar：用于动态头像建模的自回归神经场
abstract: Neural fields such as implicit surfaces have recently enabled avatar modeling from raw scans without explicit temporal correspondences. In this work, we exploit autoregressive modeling to further extend this notion to capture dynamic effects, such as soft-tissue deformations. Although autoregressive models are naturally capable of handling dynamics, it is non-trivial to apply them to implicit representations, as explicit state decoding is infeasible due to prohibitive memory requirements. In this work, for the first time, we enable autoregressive modeling of implicit avatars. To reduce the memory bottleneck and efficiently model dynamic implicit surfaces, we introduce the notion of articulated observer points, which relate implicit states to the explicit surface of a parametric human body model. We demonstrate that encoding implicit surfaces as a set of height fields defined on articulated observer points leads to significantly better generalization compared to a latent representation. The experiments show that our approach outperforms the state of the art, achieving plausible dynamic deformations even for unseen motions. https://zqbai-jeremy.github.io/autoavatar
summary: Neural fields such as implicit surfaces have recently enabled avatar modeling from raw scans without explicit temporal correspondences. In this work, we exploit autoregressive modeling to further extend this notion to capture dynamic effects, such as soft-tissue deformations. Although autoregressive models are naturally capable of handling dynamics, it is non-trivial to apply them to implicit representations, as explicit state decoding is infeasible due to prohibitive memory requirements. In this work, for the first time, we enable autoregressive modeling of implicit avatars. To reduce the memory bottleneck and efficiently model dynamic implicit surfaces, we introduce the notion of articulated observer points, which relate implicit states to the explicit surface of a parametric human body model. We demonstrate that encoding implicit surfaces as a set of height fields defined on articulated observer points leads to significantly better generalization compared to a latent representation. The experiments show that our approach outperforms the state of the art, achieving plausible dynamic deformations even for unseen motions. https://zqbai-jeremy.github.io/autoavatar
abstract_zh: 诸如隐式表面之类的神经场最近已经能够根据原始扫描进行头像建模，而无需明确的时间对应关系。在这项工作中，我们利用自回归建模来进一步扩展这一概念以捕获动态效应，例如软组织变形。尽管自回归模型自然能够处理动态，但将它们应用于隐式表示并非易事，因为由于内存要求过高，显式状态解码是不可行的。在这项工作中，我们第一次启用隐式化身的自回归建模。为了减少内存瓶颈并有效地建模动态隐式表面，我们引入了铰接观察点的概念，它将隐式状态与参数化人体模型的显式表面相关联。我们证明，与潜在表示相比，将隐式表面编码为在铰接观察点上定义的一组高度场可以带来更好的泛化能力。实验表明，我们的方法优于现有技术，即使对于看不见的运动也能实现合理的动态变形。 https://zqbai-jeremy.github.io/autoavatar

AI.tldr: 本文提出AutoAvatar方法，利用自回归神经场对动态人像进行建模，解决传统隐式表面方法难以捕捉软组织变形等动态效果的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有隐式表面方法虽能建模静态人像，但难以处理动态变形（如软组织形变），而自回归模型虽擅长动态建模，却因内存限制无法直接应用于隐式表示。
AI.method: 引入“关节化观测点”将隐式状态与参数化人体模型表面关联，并通过高度场编码隐式表面，替代传统潜在表示以提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在动态变形（包括未见过的动作）上优于现有方法，生成效果更逼真。
AI.conclusion: 通过关节化观测点与高度场编码，自回归模型成功应用于隐式动态人像建模，解决了内存瓶颈与动态效果捕捉难题。

search_text: AutoAvatar: Autoregressive Neural Fields for Dynamic Avatar Modeling AutoAvatar：用于动态头像建模的自回归神经场 Neural fields such as implicit surfaces have recently enabled avatar modeling from raw scans without explicit temporal correspondences. In this work, we exploit autoregressive modeling to further extend this notion to capture dynamic effects, such as soft-tissue deformations. Although autoregressive models are naturally capable of handling dynamics, it is non-trivial to apply them to implicit representations, as explicit state decoding is infeasible due to prohibitive memory requirements. In this work, for the first time, we enable autoregressive modeling of implicit avatars. To reduce the memory bottleneck and efficiently model dynamic implicit surfaces, we introduce the notion of articulated observer points, which relate implicit states to the explicit surface of a parametric human body model. We demonstrate that encoding implicit surfaces as a set of height fields defined on articulated observer points leads to significantly better generalization compared to a latent representation. The experiments show that our approach outperforms the state of the art, achieving plausible dynamic deformations even for unseen motions. https://zqbai-jeremy.github.io/autoavatar 诸如隐式表面之类的神经场最近已经能够根据原始扫描进行头像建模，而无需明确的时间对应关系。在这项工作中，我们利用自回归建模来进一步扩展这一概念以捕获动态效应，例如软组织变形。尽管自回归模型自然能够处理动态，但将它们应用于隐式表示并非易事，因为由于内存要求过高，显式状态解码是不可行的。在这项工作中，我们第一次启用隐式化身的自回归建模。为了减少内存瓶颈并有效地建模动态隐式表面，我们引入了铰接观察点的概念，它将隐式状态与参数化人体模型的显式表面相关联。我们证明，与潜在表示相比，将隐式表面编码为在铰接观察点上定义的一组高度场可以带来更好的泛化能力。实验表明，我们的方法优于现有技术，即使对于看不见的运动也能实现合理的动态变形。 https://zqbai-jeremy.github.io/autoavatar 本文提出AutoAvatar方法，利用自回归神经场对动态人像进行建模，解决传统隐式表面方法难以捕捉软组织变形等动态效果的问题。 Ziqian Bai,Timur Bagautdinov,Javier Romero,Michael Zollhöfer,Ping Tan,Shunsuke Saito cs.CV,cs.GR

title: Versatile Multi-Modal Pre-Training for Human-Centric Perception
title_zh: 以人为本的感知的多功能多模式预训练
comment: CVPR 2022; Project Page https://hongfz16.github.io/projects/HCMoCo.html; Codes available at https://github.com/hongfz16/HCMoCo
comments: CVPR 2022; Project Page https://hongfz16.github.io/projects/HCMoCo.html; Codes available at https://github.com/hongfz16/HCMoCo
abstract: Human-centric perception plays a vital role in vision and graphics. But their data annotations are prohibitively expensive. Therefore, it is desirable to have a versatile pre-train model that serves as a foundation for data-efficient downstream tasks transfer. To this end, we propose the Human-Centric Multi-Modal Contrastive Learning framework HCMoCo that leverages the multi-modal nature of human data (e.g. RGB, depth, 2D keypoints) for effective representation learning. The objective comes with two main challenges: dense pre-train for multi-modality data, efficient usage of sparse human priors. To tackle the challenges, we design the novel Dense Intra-sample Contrastive Learning and Sparse Structure-aware Contrastive Learning targets by hierarchically learning a modal-invariant latent space featured with continuous and ordinal feature distribution and structure-aware semantic consistency. HCMoCo provides pre-train for different modalities by combining heterogeneous datasets, which allows efficient usage of existing task-specific human data. Extensive experiments on four downstream tasks of different modalities demonstrate the effectiveness of HCMoCo, especially under data-efficient settings (7.16% and 12% improvement on DensePose Estimation and Human Parsing). Moreover, we demonstrate the versatility of HCMoCo by exploring cross-modality supervision and missing-modality inference, validating its strong ability in cross-modal association and reasoning.

Therefore, it is desirable to have a versatile pre-train model that serves as a foundation for data-efficient downstream tasks transfer. To this end, we propose the Human-Centric Multi-Modal Contrastive Learning framework HCMoCo that leverages the multi-modal nature of human data (e.g. RGB, depth, 2D keypoints) for effective representation learning. The objective comes with two main challenges: dense pre-train for multi-modality data, efficient usage of sparse human priors. To tackle the challenges, we design the novel Dense Intra-sample Contrastive Learning and Sparse Structure-aware Contrastive Learning targets by hierarchically learning a modal-invariant latent space featured with continuous and ordinal feature distribution and structure-aware semantic consistency. HCMoCo provides pre-train for different modalities by combining heterogeneous datasets, which allows efficient usage of existing task-specific human data. Extensive experiments on four downstream tasks of different modalities demonstrate the effectiveness of HCMoCo, especially under data-efficient settings (7.16% and 12% improvement on DensePose Estimation and Human Parsing). Moreover, we demonstrate the versatility of HCMoCo by exploring cross-modality supervision and missing-modality inference, validating its strong ability in cross-modal association and reasoning.
abstract_zh: 以人为中心的感知在视觉和图形中起着至关重要的作用。但他们的数据注释非常昂贵。因此，需要有一个通用的预训练模型，作为数据高效的下游任务传输的基础。为此，我们提出了以人为中心的多模态对比学习框架 HCMoCo，该框架利用人类数据的多模态性质（例如 RGB、深度、2D 关键点）进行有效的表示学习。该目标面临两个主要挑战：多模态数据的密集预训练、稀疏人类先验的有效利用。为了应对这些挑战，我们通过分层学习具有连续和有序特征分布以及结构感知语义一致性的模态不变潜在空间，设计了新颖的密集样本内对比学习和稀疏结构感知对比学习目标。 HCMoCo 通过组合异构数据集为不同模式提供预训练，从而可以有效利用现有的特定于任务的人类数据。对不同模式的四个下游任务的广泛实验证明了 HCMoCo 的有效性，特别是在数据高效设置下（DensePose 估计和人体解析分别提高了 7.16% 和 12%）。此外，我们通过探索跨模态监督和缺失模态推理来展示 HCMoCo 的多功能性，验证了其强大的跨模态关联和推理能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态预训练框架HCMoCo，用于解决人类中心感知任务中数据标注成本高、跨模态对齐困难的问题，通过融合RGB、深度、关键点等多模态数据提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 人类中心感知任务（如人体姿态估计、分割）依赖昂贵的标注数据，且现有模型难以有效利用多模态数据中的稀疏先验信息，亟需一种高效的数据增强预训练方法。
AI.method: 设计HCMoCo框架，包含密集样本内对比学习（处理多模态数据）和稀疏结构感知对比学习（利用人体结构先验），通过分层学习模态不变的潜在空间，结合异构数据集进行预训练。
AI.result: 在四个下游任务中，HCMoCo在数据高效设置下实现DensePose估计提升7.16%、人体分割提升12%，并通过跨模态监督和缺失模态推理验证了其跨模态关联能力。
AI.conclusion: HCMoCo通过多模态对比学习有效解决了人类中心感知任务的数据效率问题，证明了其在跨模态对齐与推理中的通用性与优越性。

authors_text: Ritika Chakraborty,Nikola Popovic,Danda Pani Paudel,Thomas Probst,Luc Van Gool
title: Spatially Multi-conditional Image Generation
title_zh: 空间多条件图像生成
abstract: In most scenarios, conditional image generation can be thought of as an inversion of the image understanding process. Since generic image understanding involves solving multiple tasks, it is natural to aim at generating images via multi-conditioning. However, multi-conditional image generation is a very challenging problem due to the heterogeneity and the sparsity of the (in practice) available conditioning labels. In this work, we propose a novel neural architecture to address the problem of heterogeneity and sparsity of the spatially multi-conditional labels. Our choice of spatial conditioning, such as by semantics and depth, is driven by the promise it holds for better control of the image generation process. The proposed method uses a transformer-like architecture operating pixel-wise, which receives the available labels as input tokens to merge them in a learned homogeneous space of labels. The merged labels are then used for image generation via conditional generative adversarial training. In this process, the sparsity of the labels is handled by simply dropping the input tokens corresponding to the missing labels at the desired locations, thanks to the proposed pixel-wise operating architecture. Our experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the clear superiority of our method over the state-of-the-art and compared baselines. The source code will be made publicly available.
summary: In most scenarios, conditional image generation can be thought of as an inversion of the image understanding process. Since generic image understanding involves solving multiple tasks, it is natural to aim at generating images via multi-conditioning. However, multi-conditional image generation is a very challenging problem due to the heterogeneity and the sparsity of the (in practice) available conditioning labels. In this work, we propose a novel neural architecture to address the problem of heterogeneity and sparsity of the spatially multi-conditional labels. Our choice of spatial conditioning, such as by semantics and depth, is driven by the promise it holds for better control of the image generation process. The proposed method uses a transformer-like architecture operating pixel-wise, which receives the available labels as input tokens to merge them in a learned homogeneous space of labels. The merged labels are then used for image generation via conditional generative adversarial training. In this process, the sparsity of the labels is handled by simply dropping the input tokens corresponding to the missing labels at the desired locations, thanks to the proposed pixel-wise operating architecture. Our experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the clear superiority of our method over the state-of-the-art and compared baselines. The source code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 在大多数情况下，条件图像生成可以被认为是图像理解过程的反转。由于通用图像理解涉及解决多个任务，因此很自然地旨在通过多重条件生成图像。然而，由于（实际上）可用条件标签的异质性和稀疏性，多条件图像生成是一个非常具有挑战性的问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的神经架构来解决空间多条件标签的异质性和稀疏性问题。我们对空间条件的选择（例如通过语义和深度）是由其更好地控制图像生成过程的承诺所驱动的。所提出的方法使用类似变压器的架构，按像素操作，接收可用标签作为输入标记，将它们合并到学习的同质标签空间中。然后，合并的标签通过条件生成对抗训练用于图像生成。在此过程中，由于所提出的逐像素操作架构，只需将与缺失标签相对应的输入标记丢弃在所需位置即可处理标签的稀疏性。我们对三个基准数据集的实验表明，我们的方法相对于最先进的方法和比较基线具有明显的优越性。源代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型神经网络架构，解决多条件图像生成中条件标签异质性和稀疏性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有条件图像生成方法难以有效处理标签异质性与稀疏性，导致生成质量受限，需更灵活的控制机制。
AI.method: 设计像素级操作的Transformer架构，将多源条件标签转化为统一表示空间，并通过对抗训练生成图像，利用标记丢弃机制处理标签稀疏性。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的架构有效解决了空间多条件生成的挑战，代码将公开促进后续研究。

The source code will be made publicly available. 在大多数情况下，条件图像生成可以被认为是图像理解过程的反转。由于通用图像理解涉及解决多个任务，因此很自然地旨在通过多重条件生成图像。然而，由于（实际上）可用条件标签的异质性和稀疏性，多条件图像生成是一个非常具有挑战性的问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的神经架构来解决空间多条件标签的异质性和稀疏性问题。我们对空间条件的选择（例如通过语义和深度）是由其更好地控制图像生成过程的承诺所驱动的。所提出的方法使用类似变压器的架构，按像素操作，接收可用标签作为输入标记，将它们合并到学习的同质标签空间中。然后，合并的标签通过条件生成对抗训练用于图像生成。在此过程中，由于所提出的逐像素操作架构，只需将与缺失标签相对应的输入标记丢弃在所需位置即可处理标签的稀疏性。我们对三个基准数据集的实验表明，我们的方法相对于最先进的方法和比较基线具有明显的优越性。源代码将公开。 本文提出一种新型神经网络架构，解决多条件图像生成中条件标签异质性和稀疏性问题。 Ritika Chakraborty,Nikola Popovic,Danda Pani Paudel,Thomas Probst,Luc Van Gool cs.CV

title: DOTS: An Open Testbed for Industrial Swarm Robotic Solutions
title_zh: DOTS：工业群机器人解决方案的开放测试台
comment: 16 pages, 17 figures, for associated video, see https://drive.google.com/file/d/1EuA8PS1qpqK6LIfPwCNXtQ3hHNWPDvtN/view?usp=sharing
comments: 16 pages, 17 figures, for associated video, see https://drive.google.com/file/d/1EuA8PS1qpqK6LIfPwCNXtQ3hHNWPDvtN/view?usp=sharing
abstract: We present DOTS, a new open access testbed for industrial swarm robotics experimentation. It consists of 20 fast agile robots with high sensing and computational performance, and real-world payload capability. They are housed in an arena equipped with private 5G, motion capture, multiple cameras, and openly accessible via an online portal. We reduce barriers to entry by providing a complete platform-agnostic pipeline to develop, simulate, and deploy experimental applications to the swarm. We showcase the testbed capabilities with a swarm logistics application, autonomously and reliably searching for and retrieving multiple cargo carriers.
summary: We present DOTS, a new open access testbed for industrial swarm robotics experimentation. It consists of 20 fast agile robots with high sensing and computational performance, and real-world payload capability. They are housed in an arena equipped with private 5G, motion capture, multiple cameras, and openly accessible via an online portal. We reduce barriers to entry by providing a complete platform-agnostic pipeline to develop, simulate, and deploy experimental applications to the swarm. We showcase the testbed capabilities with a swarm logistics application, autonomously and reliably searching for and retrieving multiple cargo carriers.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 DOTS，这是一种用于工业群体机器人实验的新型开放式测试平台。它由 20 个快速敏捷的机器人组成，具有高传感和计算性能以及现实世界的有效负载能力。他们被安置在一个配备了私人 5G、动作捕捉、多个摄像头的竞技场中，并可通过在线门户公开访问。我们通过提供与平台无关的完整管道来开发、模拟实验应用程序并将其部署到群体中，从而减少进入壁垒。我们展示了集群物流应用程序的测试平台功能，可自主可靠地搜索和检索多个货运载体。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为DOTS的开放测试平台，用于工业群体机器人的实验，具备高性能硬件和在线访问功能。
AI.motivation: 现有工业群体机器人测试平台存在封闭性、硬件限制或缺乏统一开发流程的问题，需提供开放、易用的实验环境以促进研究。
AI.method: 构建包含20个高性能机器人及5G/运动捕捉等设施的实体测试场，并开发跨平台的开发-仿真-部署流程，通过在线门户开放访问。
AI.result: 成功实现群体物流应用案例，展示机器人自主搜索并可靠检索多载货平台的能力，验证了测试平台的实用性。
AI.conclusion: DOTS为工业群体机器人研究提供了标准化、开放化的实验基础设施，可加速相关技术的创新与落地。

authors_text: Meihao Kong,Jing Huo,Wenbin Li,Jing Wu,Yu-Kun Lai,Yang Gao
title: Playing Lottery Tickets in Style Transfer Models
title_zh: 在风格转移模型中玩彩票
abstract: Style transfer has achieved great success and attracted a wide range of attention from both academic and industrial communities due to its flexible application scenarios. However, the dependence on a pretty large VGG-based autoencoder leads to existing style transfer models having high parameter complexities, which limits their applications on resource-constrained devices. Compared with many other tasks, the compression of style transfer models has been less explored. Recently, the lottery ticket hypothesis (LTH) has shown great potential in finding extremely sparse matching subnetworks which can achieve on par or even better performance than the original full networks when trained in isolation. In this work, we for the first time perform an empirical study to verify whether such trainable matching subnetworks also exist in style transfer models. Specifically, we take two most popular style transfer models, i.e., AdaIN and SANet, as the main testbeds, which represent global and local transformation based style transfer methods respectively. We carry out extensive experiments and comprehensive analysis, and draw the following conclusions. (1) Compared with fixing the VGG encoder, style transfer models can benefit more from training the whole network together. (2) Using iterative magnitude pruning, we find the matching subnetworks at 89.2% sparsity in AdaIN and 73.7% sparsity in SANet, which demonstrates that style transfer models can play lottery tickets too. (3) The feature transformation module should also be pruned to obtain a much sparser model without affecting the existence and quality of the matching subnetworks. (4) Besides AdaIN and SANet, other models such as LST, MANet, AdaAttN and MCCNet can also play lottery tickets, which shows that LTH can be generalized to various style transfer models.
summary: Style transfer has achieved great success and attracted a wide range of attention from both academic and industrial communities due to its flexible application scenarios. However, the dependence on a pretty large VGG-based autoencoder leads to existing style transfer models having high parameter complexities, which limits their applications on resource-constrained devices. Compared with many other tasks, the compression of style transfer models has been less explored. Recently, the lottery ticket hypothesis (LTH) has shown great potential in finding extremely sparse matching subnetworks which can achieve on par or even better performance than the original full networks when trained in isolation. In this work, we for the first time perform an empirical study to verify whether such trainable matching subnetworks also exist in style transfer models. Specifically, we take two most popular style transfer models, i.e., AdaIN and SANet, as the main testbeds, which represent global and local transformation based style transfer methods respectively. We carry out extensive experiments and comprehensive analysis, and draw the following conclusions. (1) Compared with fixing the VGG encoder, style transfer models can benefit more from training the whole network together. (2) Using iterative magnitude pruning, we find the matching subnetworks at 89.2% sparsity in AdaIN and 73.7% sparsity in SANet, which demonstrates that style transfer models can play lottery tickets too. (3) The feature transformation module should also be pruned to obtain a much sparser model without affecting the existence and quality of the matching subnetworks. (4) Besides AdaIN and SANet, other models such as LST, MANet, AdaAttN and MCCNet can also play lottery tickets, which shows that LTH can be generalized to various style transfer models.
abstract_zh: 风格迁移因其灵活的应用场景而取得了巨大的成功，并引起了学术界和工业界的广泛关注。然而，对相当大的基于 VGG 的自动编码器的依赖导致现有的风格迁移模型具有较高的参数复杂性，这限制了它们在资源受限设备上的应用。与许多其他任务相比，风格迁移模型的压缩研究较少。最近，彩票假设（LTH）在寻找极其稀疏的匹配子网络方面表现出了巨大的潜力，在隔离训练时，该子网络可以达到与原始完整网络相当甚至更好的性能。在这项工作中，我们首次进行实证研究来验证这种可训练的匹配子网络是否也存在于风格迁移模型中。具体来说，我们采用两种最流行的风格迁移模型，即 AdaIN 和 SANet 作为主要测试平台，它们分别代表基于全局和局部变换的风格迁移方法。我们进行了大量的实验和综合分析，得出以下结论。 (1) 与固定 VGG 编码器相比，风格迁移模型可以从一起训练整个网络中受益更多。 (2) 使用迭代幅度剪枝，我们发现 AdaIN 中的匹配子网络稀疏度为 89.2%，SANet 中的稀疏度为 73.7%，这表明风格迁移模型也可以玩彩票。 (3)特征转换模块也应该被修剪以获得更稀疏的模型而不影响匹配子网络的存在和质量。 (4) 除了 AdaIN 和 SANet 之外，其他模型如 LST、MANet、AdaAttN 和 MCCNet 也可以玩彩票，这表明 LTH 可以推广到各种风格迁移模型。

AI.tldr: 本文验证了风格迁移模型中是否存在彩票假设（LTH）所描述的稀疏子网络，通过实验探索其压缩潜力。
AI.motivation: 现有风格迁移模型依赖大参数量的VGG编码器，难以部署于资源受限设备，而彩票假设为模型压缩提供了新思路。
AI.method: 以AdaIN和SANet为主要测试模型，采用迭代幅度剪枝（Iterative Magnitude Pruning）寻找稀疏子网络，并分析特征变换模块的剪枝影响。
AI.result: 在AdaIN中发现89.2%稀疏度的子网络，在SANet中为73.7%，且特征变换模块剪枝不影响效果；LTH可推广至LST、MANet等其他模型。
AI.conclusion: 彩票假设适用于多种风格迁移模型，通过合理剪枝可显著降低参数复杂度，为轻量化部署提供可行方案。

title: Continuous Dynamic-NeRF: Spline-NeRF
title_zh: 连续动态-NeRF：样条-NeRF
abstract: The problem of reconstructing continuous functions over time is important for problems such as reconstructing moving scenes, and interpolating between time steps. Previous approaches that use deep-learning rely on regularization to ensure that reconstructions are approximately continuous, which works well on short sequences. As sequence length grows, though, it becomes more difficult to regularize, and it becomes less feasible to learn only through regularization. We propose a new architecture for function reconstruction based on classical Bezier splines, which ensures $C^0$ and $C^1$-continuity, where $C^0$ continuity is that $\forall c:\lim\limits_{x\to c} f(x) = f(c)$, or more intuitively that there are no breaks at any point in the function. In order to demonstrate our architecture, we reconstruct dynamic scenes using Neural Radiance Fields, but hope it is clear that our approach is general and can be applied to a variety of problems. We recover a Bezier spline $B(β, t\in[0,1])$, parametrized by the control points $β$. Using Bezier splines ensures reconstructions have $C^0$ and $C^1$ continuity, allowing for guaranteed interpolation over time. We reconstruct $β$ with a multi-layer perceptron (MLP), blending machine learning with classical animation techniques. All code is available at https://github.com/JulianKnodt/nerf_atlas, and datasets are from prior work.
summary: The problem of reconstructing continuous functions over time is important for problems such as reconstructing moving scenes, and interpolating between time steps. Previous approaches that use deep-learning rely on regularization to ensure that reconstructions are approximately continuous, which works well on short sequences. As sequence length grows, though, it becomes more difficult to regularize, and it becomes less feasible to learn only through regularization. We propose a new architecture for function reconstruction based on classical Bezier splines, which ensures $C^0$ and $C^1$-continuity, where $C^0$ continuity is that $\forall c:\lim\limits_{x\to c} f(x) = f(c)$, or more intuitively that there are no breaks at any point in the function. In order to demonstrate our architecture, we reconstruct dynamic scenes using Neural Radiance Fields, but hope it is clear that our approach is general and can be applied to a variety of problems. We recover a Bezier spline $B(β, t\in[0,1])$, parametrized by the control points $β$. Using Bezier splines ensures reconstructions have $C^0$ and $C^1$ continuity, allowing for guaranteed interpolation over time. We reconstruct $β$ with a multi-layer perceptron (MLP), blending machine learning with classical animation techniques. All code is available at https://github.com/JulianKnodt/nerf_atlas, and datasets are from prior work.
abstract_zh: 随着时间的推移重建连续函数的问题对于重建移动场景和时间步之间的插值等问题很重要。以前使用深度学习的方法依赖正则化来确保重建近似连续，这在短序列上效果很好。然而，随着序列长度的增长，正则化变得更加困难，并且仅通过正则化来学习变得不太可行。我们提出了一种基于经典贝塞尔样条函数重构的新架构，它确保了 $C^0$ 和 $C^1$ 连续性，其中 $C^0$ 连续性是 $\forall c:\lim\limits_{x\to c} f(x) = f(c)$，或者更直观地认为函数中的任何点都没有中断。为了演示我们的架构，我们使用神经辐射场重建动态场景，但希望我们的方法是通用的并且可以应用于各种问题。我们恢复贝塞尔样条 $B(β, t\in[0,1])$，由控制点 $β$ 参数化。使用贝塞尔样条线可确保重建具有 $C^0$ 和 $C^1$ 连续性，从而可以保证随时间的插值。我们使用多层感知器（MLP）重建$β$，将机器学习与经典动画技术相结合。所有代码均可在 https://github.com/JulianKnodt/nerf_atlas 上获取，数据集来自之前的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于贝塞尔样条的动态NeRF方法，用于连续重建随时间变化的场景，确保C0和C1连续性。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法在处理长序列时难以通过正则化保证连续性，而贝塞尔样条能提供数学保证的连续性，适合动态场景重建。
AI.method: 通过多层感知机（MLP）学习贝塞尔样条的控制点参数β，结合神经辐射场（NeRF）实现动态场景的连续重建，确保时间维度上的C0和C1连续性。
AI.result: 成功实现了动态场景的连续重建，验证了方法在保证连续性方面的有效性，并提供了开源代码和数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法将经典动画技术与机器学习结合，为连续函数重建提供了通用框架，可扩展至其他领域。

title: Gravity-constrained point cloud registration
title_zh: 重力约束点云配准
comment: Preprint. Submitted to IROS 2022. 7 pages, 9 figures
comments: Preprint. Submitted to IROS 2022. 7 pages, 9 figures
abstract: Visual and lidar Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) algorithms benefit from the Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) modality. The high-rate inertial data complement the other lower-rate modalities. Moreover, in the absence of constant acceleration, the gravity vector makes two attitude angles out of three observable in the global coordinate frame. In visual odometry, this is already being used to reduce the 6-Degrees Of Freedom (DOF) pose estimation problem to 4-DOF. In lidar SLAM, the gravity measurements are often used as a penalty in the back-end global map optimization to prevent map deformations. In this work, we propose an Iterative Closest Point (ICP)-based front-end which exploits the observable DOF and provides pose estimates aligned with the gravity vector. We believe that this front-end has the potential to support the loop closure identification, thus speeding up convergences of global map optimizations. The presented approach has been extensively tested in large-scale outdoor environments as well as in the Subterranean Challenge organized by Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA). We show that it can reduce the localization drift by 30% when compared to the standard 6-DOF ICP. Moreover, the code is readily available to the community as a part of the libpointmatcher library.
summary: Visual and lidar Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) algorithms benefit from the Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) modality. The high-rate inertial data complement the other lower-rate modalities. Moreover, in the absence of constant acceleration, the gravity vector makes two attitude angles out of three observable in the global coordinate frame. In visual odometry, this is already being used to reduce the 6-Degrees Of Freedom (DOF) pose estimation problem to 4-DOF. In lidar SLAM, the gravity measurements are often used as a penalty in the back-end global map optimization to prevent map deformations. In this work, we propose an Iterative Closest Point (ICP)-based front-end which exploits the observable DOF and provides pose estimates aligned with the gravity vector. We believe that this front-end has the potential to support the loop closure identification, thus speeding up convergences of global map optimizations. The presented approach has been extensively tested in large-scale outdoor environments as well as in the Subterranean Challenge organized by Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency (DARPA). We show that it can reduce the localization drift by 30% when compared to the standard 6-DOF ICP. Moreover, the code is readily available to the community as a part of the libpointmatcher library.
abstract_zh: 视觉和激光雷达同步定位与建图 (SLAM) 算法受益于惯性测量单元 (IMU) 模式。高速率惯性数据补充了其他低速率模式。此外，在没有恒定加速度的情况下，重力矢量使得在全局坐标系中可观察到三个姿态角中的两个。在视觉里程计中，这已被用于将 6 自由度 (DOF) 姿势估计问题减少到 4-DOF。在激光雷达 SLAM 中，重力测量通常用作后端全局地图优化的惩罚，以防止地图变形。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个基于迭代最近点（ICP）的前端，它利用可观察的 DOF 并提供与重力矢量对齐的姿态估计。我们相信这个前端有潜力支持闭环识别，从而加速全局地图优化的收敛。所提出的方法已在大规模室外环境以及国防高级研究计划局 (DARPA) 组织的地下挑战赛中进行了广泛的测试。我们证明，与标准 6-DOF ICP 相比，它可以将定位漂移减少 30%。此外，该代码作为 libpointmatcher 库的一部分可供社区轻松使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于重力约束的点云配准方法，通过利用重力向量减少位姿估计自由度，提升SLAM系统的精度和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM方法在无恒定加速度场景下，重力向量可提供可观测的自由度，但传统方法未充分结合重力信息进行前端优化，导致定位漂移问题。
AI.method: 设计ICP-based前端，结合重力约束将6-DOF位姿估计降至4-DOF，并通过开源库libpointmatcher实现，支持回环闭合检测。
AI.result: 在大规模户外及DARPA地下挑战场景中，定位漂移减少30%，代码已开源至libpointmatcher库。
AI.conclusion: 重力约束的点云配准方法有效提升SLAM鲁棒性，减少漂移，开源实现促进技术普及与应用。

title: Visual-based Safe Landing for UAVs in Populated Areas: Real-time Validation in Virtual Environments
title_zh: 基于视觉的无人机在人口稠密地区的安全着陆：虚拟环境中的实时验证
abstract: Safe autonomous landing for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in populated areas is a crucial aspect for successful urban deployment, particularly in emergency landing situations. Nonetheless, validating autonomous landing in real scenarios is a challenging task involving a high risk of injuring people. In this work, we propose a framework for real-time safe and thorough evaluation of vision-based autonomous landing in populated scenarios, using photo-realistic virtual environments. We propose to use the Unreal graphics engine coupled with the AirSim plugin for drone's simulation, and evaluate autonomous landing strategies based on visual detection of Safe Landing Zones (SLZ) in populated scenarios. Then, we study two different criteria for selecting the "best" SLZ, and evaluate them during autonomous landing of a virtual drone in different scenarios and conditions, under different distributions of people in urban scenes, including moving people. We evaluate different metrics to quantify the performance of the landing strategies, establishing a baseline for comparison with future works in this challenging task, and analyze them through an important number of randomized iterations. The study suggests that the use of the autonomous landing algorithms considerably helps to prevent accidents involving humans, which may allow to unleash the full potential of drones in urban environments near to people.
summary: Safe autonomous landing for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in populated areas is a crucial aspect for successful urban deployment, particularly in emergency landing situations. Nonetheless, validating autonomous landing in real scenarios is a challenging task involving a high risk of injuring people. In this work, we propose a framework for real-time safe and thorough evaluation of vision-based autonomous landing in populated scenarios, using photo-realistic virtual environments. We propose to use the Unreal graphics engine coupled with the AirSim plugin for drone's simulation, and evaluate autonomous landing strategies based on visual detection of Safe Landing Zones (SLZ) in populated scenarios. Then, we study two different criteria for selecting the "best" SLZ, and evaluate them during autonomous landing of a virtual drone in different scenarios and conditions, under different distributions of people in urban scenes, including moving people. We evaluate different metrics to quantify the performance of the landing strategies, establishing a baseline for comparison with future works in this challenging task, and analyze them through an important number of randomized iterations. The study suggests that the use of the autonomous landing algorithms considerably helps to prevent accidents involving humans, which may allow to unleash the full potential of drones in urban environments near to people.
abstract_zh: 无人机（UAV）在人口稠密地区的安全自主着陆是成功城市部署的一个重要方面，特别是在紧急着陆情况下。尽管如此，在真实场景中验证自主着陆是一项具有挑战性的任务，涉及人员受伤的高风险。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架，使用逼真的虚拟环境，对人口稠密场景中基于视觉的自主着陆进行实时、安全和全面的评估。我们建议使用 Unreal 图形引擎与 AirSim 插件相结合进行无人机模拟，并基于人口稠密场景中安全着陆区 (SLZ) 的视觉检测来评估自主着陆策略。然后，我们研究了选择“最佳”SLZ 的两种不同标准，并在虚拟无人机在不同场景和条件下、城市场景中不同人员分布（包括移动人员）自主着陆时对其进行评估。我们评估不同的指标来量化着陆策略的性能，建立与这项具有挑战性的任务中的未来工作进行比较的基线，并通过大量的随机迭代对其进行分析。该研究表明，使用自主着陆算法在很大程度上有助于防止涉及人类的事故，这可能会在靠近人类的城市环境中充分发挥无人机的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉的无人机在人口密集区域安全着陆的实时验证框架，利用虚拟环境进行评估。
AI.motivation: 无人机在人口密集区自主着陆存在安全风险，实际测试可能伤及人员，需通过虚拟环境降低风险并验证算法有效性。
AI.method: 采用Unreal引擎与AirSim插件构建高保真虚拟场景，通过视觉检测安全着陆区（SLZ），并对比两种SLZ选择策略的性能。
AI.result: 建立性能评估指标基线，通过大量随机迭代验证算法有效性，证明自主着陆策略能显著降低人机碰撞风险。
AI.conclusion: 自主着陆算法可有效提升无人机在人口密集区的安全性，为未来城市无人机应用提供关键技术支撑。

search_text: Visual-based Safe Landing for UAVs in Populated Areas: Real-time Validation in Virtual Environments 基于视觉的无人机在人口稠密地区的安全着陆：虚拟环境中的实时验证 Safe autonomous landing for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in populated areas is a crucial aspect for successful urban deployment, particularly in emergency landing situations. Nonetheless, validating autonomous landing in real scenarios is a challenging task involving a high risk of injuring people. In this work, we propose a framework for real-time safe and thorough evaluation of vision-based autonomous landing in populated scenarios, using photo-realistic virtual environments. We propose to use the Unreal graphics engine coupled with the AirSim plugin for drone's simulation, and evaluate autonomous landing strategies based on visual detection of Safe Landing Zones (SLZ) in populated scenarios. Then, we study two different criteria for selecting the "best" SLZ, and evaluate them during autonomous landing of a virtual drone in different scenarios and conditions, under different distributions of people in urban scenes, including moving people. We evaluate different metrics to quantify the performance of the landing strategies, establishing a baseline for comparison with future works in this challenging task, and analyze them through an important number of randomized iterations. The study suggests that the use of the autonomous landing algorithms considerably helps to prevent accidents involving humans, which may allow to unleash the full potential of drones in urban environments near to people. 无人机（UAV）在人口稠密地区的安全自主着陆是成功城市部署的一个重要方面，特别是在紧急着陆情况下。尽管如此，在真实场景中验证自主着陆是一项具有挑战性的任务，涉及人员受伤的高风险。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个框架，使用逼真的虚拟环境，对人口稠密场景中基于视觉的自主着陆进行实时、安全和全面的评估。我们建议使用 Unreal 图形引擎与 AirSim 插件相结合进行无人机模拟，并基于人口稠密场景中安全着陆区 (SLZ) 的视觉检测来评估自主着陆策略。然后，我们研究了选择“最佳”SLZ 的两种不同标准，并在虚拟无人机在不同场景和条件下、城市场景中不同人员分布（包括移动人员）自主着陆时对其进行评估。我们评估不同的指标来量化着陆策略的性能，建立与这项具有挑战性的任务中的未来工作进行比较的基线，并通过大量的随机迭代对其进行分析。该研究表明，使用自主着陆算法在很大程度上有助于防止涉及人类的事故，这可能会在靠近人类的城市环境中充分发挥无人机的潜力。 本文提出一种基于视觉的无人机在人口密集区域安全着陆的实时验证框架，利用虚拟环境进行评估。 Hector Tovanche-Picon,Javier Gonzalez-Trejo,Angel Flores-Abad,Diego Mercado-Ravell cs.RO,cs.CV

title: Ensemble Spectral Prediction (ESP) Model for Metabolite Annotation
title_zh: 用于代谢物注释的集成谱预测 (ESP) 模型
abstract: A key challenge in metabolomics is annotating measured spectra from a biological sample with chemical identities. Currently, only a small fraction of measurements can be assigned identities. Two complementary computational approaches have emerged to address the annotation problem: mapping candidate molecules to spectra, and mapping query spectra to molecular candidates. In essence, the candidate molecule with the spectrum that best explains the query spectrum is recommended as the target molecule. Despite candidate ranking being fundamental in both approaches, no prior works utilized rank learning tasks in determining the target molecule. We propose a novel machine learning model, Ensemble Spectral Prediction (ESP), for metabolite annotation. ESP takes advantage of prior neural network-based annotation models that utilize multilayer perceptron (MLP) networks and Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). Based on the ranking results of the MLP and GNN-based models, ESP learns a weighting for the outputs of MLP and GNN spectral predictors to generate a spectral prediction for a query molecule. Importantly, training data is stratified by molecular formula to provide candidate sets during model training. Further, baseline MLP and GNN models are enhanced by considering peak dependencies through multi-head attention mechanism and multi-tasking on spectral topic distributions. ESP improves average rank by 41% and 30% over the MLP and GNN baselines, respectively, demonstrating remarkable performance gain over state-of-the-art neural network approaches. We show that annotation performance, for ESP and other models, is a strong function of the number of molecules in the candidate set and their similarity to the target molecule.
summary: A key challenge in metabolomics is annotating measured spectra from a biological sample with chemical identities. Currently, only a small fraction of measurements can be assigned identities. Two complementary computational approaches have emerged to address the annotation problem: mapping candidate molecules to spectra, and mapping query spectra to molecular candidates. In essence, the candidate molecule with the spectrum that best explains the query spectrum is recommended as the target molecule. Despite candidate ranking being fundamental in both approaches, no prior works utilized rank learning tasks in determining the target molecule. We propose a novel machine learning model, Ensemble Spectral Prediction (ESP), for metabolite annotation. ESP takes advantage of prior neural network-based annotation models that utilize multilayer perceptron (MLP) networks and Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). Based on the ranking results of the MLP and GNN-based models, ESP learns a weighting for the outputs of MLP and GNN spectral predictors to generate a spectral prediction for a query molecule. Importantly, training data is stratified by molecular formula to provide candidate sets during model training. Further, baseline MLP and GNN models are enhanced by considering peak dependencies through multi-head attention mechanism and multi-tasking on spectral topic distributions. ESP improves average rank by 41% and 30% over the MLP and GNN baselines, respectively, demonstrating remarkable performance gain over state-of-the-art neural network approaches. We show that annotation performance, for ESP and other models, is a strong function of the number of molecules in the candidate set and their similarity to the target molecule.
abstract_zh: 代谢组学的一个关键挑战是用化学特性注释生物样品的测量光谱。目前，只有一小部分测量可以分配身份。已经出现了两种互补的计算方法来解决注释问题：将候选分子映射到光谱，以及将查询光谱映射到候选分子。本质上，推荐具有最能解释查询光谱的光谱的候选分子作为目标分子。尽管候选排序在这两种方法中都是基础，但之前的工作没有利用排序学习任务来确定目标分子。我们提出了一种新颖的机器学习模型，即集成谱预测（ESP），用于代谢物注释。 ESP 利用先前基于神经网络的注释模型，这些模型利用多层感知器 (MLP) 网络和图神经网络 (GNN)。根据基于 MLP 和 GNN 的模型的排序结果，ESP 学习 MLP 和 GNN 谱预测器的输出的权重，以生成查询分子的谱预测。重要的是，训练数据按分子式分层，以在模型训练期间提供候选集。此外，通过多头注意机制和频谱主题分布的多任务处理来考虑峰值依赖性，增强了基线 MLP 和 GNN 模型。与 MLP 和 GNN 基线相比，ESP 的平均排名分别提高了 41% 和 30%，与最先进的神经网络方法相比，表现出显着的性能提升。我们表明，ESP 和其他模型的注释性能是候选集中分子数量及其与目标分子相似性的强函数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Ensemble Spectral Prediction (ESP)的机器学习模型，用于通过光谱数据注释代谢物化学身份。
AI.motivation: 当前代谢组学中仅少数测量光谱能被准确注释，现有方法未有效利用排名学习任务确定目标分子，亟需改进模型性能。
AI.method: ESP整合多层感知机（MLP）和图神经网络（GNN）模型，通过学习两者输出权重生成预测结果，并采用分子式分层训练数据及多头注意力机制优化基线模型。
AI.result: ESP在平均排名上较MLP和GNN基线分别提升41%和30%，显著优于现有神经网络方法。
AI.conclusion: 注释性能高度依赖候选分子集规模及其与目标分子的相似性，ESP通过集成学习有效提升了代谢物注释准确性。

authors_text: Tianpei Gu,Guangyi Chen,Junlong Li,Chunze Lin,Yongming Rao,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu
title: Stochastic Trajectory Prediction via Motion Indeterminacy Diffusion
title_zh: 通过运动不确定性扩散进行随机轨迹预测
abstract: Human behavior has the nature of indeterminacy, which requires the pedestrian trajectory prediction system to model the multi-modality of future motion states. Unlike existing stochastic trajectory prediction methods which usually use a latent variable to represent multi-modality, we explicitly simulate the process of human motion variation from indeterminate to determinate. In this paper, we present a new framework to formulate the trajectory prediction task as a reverse process of motion indeterminacy diffusion (MID), in which we progressively discard indeterminacy from all the walkable areas until reaching the desired trajectory. This process is learned with a parameterized Markov chain conditioned by the observed trajectories. We can adjust the length of the chain to control the degree of indeterminacy and balance the diversity and determinacy of the predictions. Specifically, we encode the history behavior information and the social interactions as a state embedding and devise a Transformer-based diffusion model to capture the temporal dependencies of trajectories. Extensive experiments on the human trajectory prediction benchmarks including the Stanford Drone and ETH/UCY datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/gutianpei/MID.
summary: Human behavior has the nature of indeterminacy, which requires the pedestrian trajectory prediction system to model the multi-modality of future motion states. Unlike existing stochastic trajectory prediction methods which usually use a latent variable to represent multi-modality, we explicitly simulate the process of human motion variation from indeterminate to determinate. In this paper, we present a new framework to formulate the trajectory prediction task as a reverse process of motion indeterminacy diffusion (MID), in which we progressively discard indeterminacy from all the walkable areas until reaching the desired trajectory. This process is learned with a parameterized Markov chain conditioned by the observed trajectories. We can adjust the length of the chain to control the degree of indeterminacy and balance the diversity and determinacy of the predictions. Specifically, we encode the history behavior information and the social interactions as a state embedding and devise a Transformer-based diffusion model to capture the temporal dependencies of trajectories. Extensive experiments on the human trajectory prediction benchmarks including the Stanford Drone and ETH/UCY datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/gutianpei/MID.
abstract_zh: 人类行为具有不确定性，这就需要行人轨迹预测系统能够对未来运动状态的多模态进行建模。与通常使用潜在变量来表示多模态的现有随机轨迹预测方法不同，我们明确地模拟了人体运动从不确定到确定的变化过程。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的框架，将轨迹预测任务制定为运动不确定性扩散（MID）的逆过程，其中我们逐步丢弃所有可步行区域的不确定性，直到达到所需的轨迹。这个过程是通过以观察到的轨迹为条件的参数化马尔可夫链来学习的。我们可以调整链的长度来控制不确定性程度，平衡预测的多样性和确定性。具体来说，我们将历史行为信息和社交互动编码为状态嵌入，并设计一个基于 Transformer 的扩散模型来捕获轨迹的时间依赖性。对人类轨迹预测基准（包括斯坦福无人机和 ETH/UCY 数据集）的广泛实验证明了我们方法的优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/gutianpei/MID 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于运动不确定性的扩散模型框架，用于解决行人轨迹预测中的多模态问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过潜在变量建模多模态性，但未能显式模拟人类运动从不确定到确定的演变过程，导致预测结果多样性与确定性难以平衡。
AI.method: 将轨迹预测建模为运动不确定性扩散的逆过程，通过参数化马尔可夫链逐步消除可行走区域的不确定性，并采用Transformer结构捕捉时序依赖关系。
AI.result: 在Stanford Drone和ETH/UCY数据集上的实验表明，该方法在预测多样性与准确性方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模运动不确定性演变过程，所提方法有效平衡了预测的多样性与确定性，为轨迹预测提供了新思路。

search_text: Stochastic Trajectory Prediction via Motion Indeterminacy Diffusion 通过运动不确定性扩散进行随机轨迹预测 Human behavior has the nature of indeterminacy, which requires the pedestrian trajectory prediction system to model the multi-modality of future motion states. Unlike existing stochastic trajectory prediction methods which usually use a latent variable to represent multi-modality, we explicitly simulate the process of human motion variation from indeterminate to determinate. In this paper, we present a new framework to formulate the trajectory prediction task as a reverse process of motion indeterminacy diffusion (MID), in which we progressively discard indeterminacy from all the walkable areas until reaching the desired trajectory. This process is learned with a parameterized Markov chain conditioned by the observed trajectories. We can adjust the length of the chain to control the degree of indeterminacy and balance the diversity and determinacy of the predictions. Specifically, we encode the history behavior information and the social interactions as a state embedding and devise a Transformer-based diffusion model to capture the temporal dependencies of trajectories. Extensive experiments on the human trajectory prediction benchmarks including the Stanford Drone and ETH/UCY datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method. Code is available at https://github.com/gutianpei/MID. 人类行为具有不确定性，这就需要行人轨迹预测系统能够对未来运动状态的多模态进行建模。与通常使用潜在变量来表示多模态的现有随机轨迹预测方法不同，我们明确地模拟了人体运动从不确定到确定的变化过程。在本文中，我们提出了一个新的框架，将轨迹预测任务制定为运动不确定性扩散（MID）的逆过程，其中我们逐步丢弃所有可步行区域的不确定性，直到达到所需的轨迹。这个过程是通过以观察到的轨迹为条件的参数化马尔可夫链来学习的。我们可以调整链的长度来控制不确定性程度，平衡预测的多样性和确定性。具体来说，我们将历史行为信息和社交互动编码为状态嵌入，并设计一个基于 Transformer 的扩散模型来捕获轨迹的时间依赖性。对人类轨迹预测基准（包括斯坦福无人机和 ETH/UCY 数据集）的广泛实验证明了我们方法的优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/gutianpei/MID 获取。 本文提出了一种基于运动不确定性的扩散模型框架，用于解决行人轨迹预测中的多模态问题。 Tianpei Gu,Guangyi Chen,Junlong Li,Chunze Lin,Yongming Rao,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Analysis of the use of color and its emotional relationship in visual creations based on experiences during the context of the COVID-19 pandemic
title_zh: 基于COVID-19大流行背景下的经验分析视觉创作中的色彩使用及其情感关系
abstract: Color is a complex communicative element that helps us understand and evaluate our environment. At the level of artistic creation, this component influences both the formal aspects of the composition and the symbolic weight, directly affecting the construction and transmission of the message that you want to communicate, creating a specific emotional reaction. During the COVID-19 pandemic, people generated countless images transmitting this event's subjective experiences. Using the repository of images created in the Instagram account CAM (The COVID Art Museum), we propose a methodology to understand the use of color and its emotional relationship in this context. The process considers two stages in parallel that are then combined. First, emotions are extracted and classified from the CAM dataset images through a convolutional neural network. Second, we extract the colors and their harmonies through a clustering process. Once both processes are completed, we combine the results generating an expanded discussion on the usage of color, harmonies, and emotion. The results indicate that warm colors are prevalent in the sample, with a preference for analog compositions over complementary ones. The relationship between emotions and these compositions shows a trend in positive emotions, reinforced by the results of the algorithm a priori and the emotional relationship analysis of the attributes of color (hue, chroma, and lighting).
summary: Color is a complex communicative element that helps us understand and evaluate our environment. At the level of artistic creation, this component influences both the formal aspects of the composition and the symbolic weight, directly affecting the construction and transmission of the message that you want to communicate, creating a specific emotional reaction. During the COVID-19 pandemic, people generated countless images transmitting this event's subjective experiences. Using the repository of images created in the Instagram account CAM (The COVID Art Museum), we propose a methodology to understand the use of color and its emotional relationship in this context. The process considers two stages in parallel that are then combined. First, emotions are extracted and classified from the CAM dataset images through a convolutional neural network. Second, we extract the colors and their harmonies through a clustering process. Once both processes are completed, we combine the results generating an expanded discussion on the usage of color, harmonies, and emotion. The results indicate that warm colors are prevalent in the sample, with a preference for analog compositions over complementary ones. The relationship between emotions and these compositions shows a trend in positive emotions, reinforced by the results of the algorithm a priori and the emotional relationship analysis of the attributes of color (hue, chroma, and lighting).
abstract_zh: 颜色是一种复杂的交流元素，可以帮助我们理解和评估我们的环境。在艺术创作层面，这个成分既影响构图的形式，也影响象征的分量，直接影响想要传达的信息的构建和传递，产生特定的情感反应。在 COVID-19 大流行期间，人们生成了无数图像来传递该事件的主观体验。利用 Instagram 帐户 CAM（新冠艺术博物馆）中创建的图像存储库，我们提出了一种方法来理解颜色的使用及其在此背景下的情感关系。该过程考虑两个并行阶段，然后将其组合起来。首先，通过卷积神经网络从 CAM 数据集图像中提取情感并进行分类。其次，我们通过聚类过程提取颜色及其和谐。一旦这两个过程完成，我们就会结合结果，生成关于颜色、和谐和情感的使用的扩展讨论。结果表明，样本中普遍存在暖色，与互补色相比，模拟成分更受青睐。情绪与这些构图之间的关系显示出积极情绪的趋势，并通过先验算法的结果和颜色属性（色调、彩度和照明）的情绪关系分析得到强化。

AI.tldr: 分析疫情期间视觉创作中色彩使用及其与情感的关系，基于Instagram账户CAM数据集进行研究。
AI.motivation: 探讨颜色在艺术创作中传递情感的作用，尤其在疫情期间人们通过视觉作品表达主观体验的背景下。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络提取CAM数据集图像中的情感分类，并通过聚类分析提取颜色及和谐关系，最终结合两者结果进行讨论。
AI.result: 暖色在样本中占主导，类比色和谐偏好显著；情感分析显示积极情绪趋势，与颜色属性（色相、饱和度、明度）相关性显著。
AI.conclusion: 颜色使用与情感存在显著关联，疫情期间视觉创作中暖色及类比色和谐强化了积极情绪表达，为艺术创作与情感分析提供参考。

authors_text: Matus Tomlein,Branislav Pecher,Jakub Simko,Ivan Srba,Robert Moro,Elena Stefancova,Michal Kompan,Andrea Hrckova,Juraj Podrouzek,Maria Bielikova
title: An Audit of Misinformation Filter Bubbles on YouTube: Bubble Bursting and Recent Behavior Changes
title_zh: 对 YouTube 上错误信息过滤泡沫的审计：泡沫破裂和最近的行为变化
comment: RecSys '21: Fifteenth ACM Conference on Recommender System
comments: RecSys '21: Fifteenth ACM Conference on Recommender System
abstract: The negative effects of misinformation filter bubbles in adaptive systems have been known to researchers for some time. Several studies investigated, most prominently on YouTube, how fast a user can get into a misinformation filter bubble simply by selecting wrong choices from the items offered. Yet, no studies so far have investigated what it takes to burst the bubble, i.e., revert the bubble enclosure. We present a study in which pre-programmed agents (acting as YouTube users) delve into misinformation filter bubbles by watching misinformation promoting content (for various topics). Then, by watching misinformation debunking content, the agents try to burst the bubbles and reach more balanced recommendation mixes. We recorded the search results and recommendations, which the agents encountered, and analyzed them for the presence of misinformation. Our key finding is that bursting of a filter bubble is possible, albeit it manifests differently from topic to topic. Moreover, we observe that filter bubbles do not truly appear in some situations. We also draw a direct comparison with a previous study. Sadly, we did not find much improvements in misinformation occurrences, despite recent pledges by YouTube.
summary: The negative effects of misinformation filter bubbles in adaptive systems have been known to researchers for some time. Several studies investigated, most prominently on YouTube, how fast a user can get into a misinformation filter bubble simply by selecting wrong choices from the items offered. Yet, no studies so far have investigated what it takes to burst the bubble, i.e., revert the bubble enclosure. We present a study in which pre-programmed agents (acting as YouTube users) delve into misinformation filter bubbles by watching misinformation promoting content (for various topics). Then, by watching misinformation debunking content, the agents try to burst the bubbles and reach more balanced recommendation mixes. We recorded the search results and recommendations, which the agents encountered, and analyzed them for the presence of misinformation. Our key finding is that bursting of a filter bubble is possible, albeit it manifests differently from topic to topic. Moreover, we observe that filter bubbles do not truly appear in some situations. We also draw a direct comparison with a previous study. Sadly, we did not find much improvements in misinformation occurrences, despite recent pledges by YouTube.
abstract_zh: 研究人员早就知道自适应系统中错误信息过滤气泡的负面影响。多项研究（其中最突出的是 YouTube）调查了用户仅通过从所提供的项目中选择错误的选项就可以多快地进入错误信息过滤气泡。然而，到目前为止，还没有研究调查如何打破泡沫，即恢复泡沫外壳。我们提出了一项研究，其中预先编程的代理（充当 YouTube 用户）通过观看错误信息宣传内容（针对各种主题）来深入研究错误信息过滤气泡。然后，通过观看错误信息揭穿内容，代理试图戳破泡沫并达到更平衡的推荐组合。我们记录了代理商遇到的搜索结果和建议，并分析它们是否存在错误信息。我们的主要发现是，过滤泡沫的破裂是可能的，尽管它的表现因主题而异。此外，我们观察到过滤气泡在某些情况下并没有真正出现。我们还与之前的研究进行了直接比较。遗憾的是，尽管 YouTube 最近做出了承诺，但我们并没有发现错误信息发生率有多大改善。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了YouTube上虚假信息过滤气泡的打破方法及其效果，分析不同主题下的气泡破裂情况及YouTube近期的改进效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注用户如何陷入虚假信息气泡，但缺乏对如何打破气泡的有效方法研究，且需评估YouTube近期改进措施的实际效果。
AI.method: 通过预编程代理模拟用户行为，先接触虚假信息内容，再观看反驳内容以尝试打破气泡，记录并分析推荐内容中的虚假信息出现情况。
AI.result: 发现打破气泡在不同主题下效果各异，部分情况下气泡不存在，但YouTube的改进措施未能显著减少虚假信息出现。
AI.conclusion: 结论认为打破虚假信息气泡可行但效果依赖主题，需进一步研究，并呼吁YouTube采取更有效的措施减少虚假信息传播。

Sadly, we did not find much improvements in misinformation occurrences, despite recent pledges by YouTube. 研究人员早就知道自适应系统中错误信息过滤气泡的负面影响。多项研究（其中最突出的是 YouTube）调查了用户仅通过从所提供的项目中选择错误的选项就可以多快地进入错误信息过滤气泡。然而，到目前为止，还没有研究调查如何打破泡沫，即恢复泡沫外壳。我们提出了一项研究，其中预先编程的代理（充当 YouTube 用户）通过观看错误信息宣传内容（针对各种主题）来深入研究错误信息过滤气泡。然后，通过观看错误信息揭穿内容，代理试图戳破泡沫并达到更平衡的推荐组合。我们记录了代理商遇到的搜索结果和建议，并分析它们是否存在错误信息。我们的主要发现是，过滤泡沫的破裂是可能的，尽管它的表现因主题而异。此外，我们观察到过滤气泡在某些情况下并没有真正出现。我们还与之前的研究进行了直接比较。遗憾的是，尽管 YouTube 最近做出了承诺，但我们并没有发现错误信息发生率有多大改善。 本论文研究了YouTube上虚假信息过滤气泡的打破方法及其效果，分析不同主题下的气泡破裂情况及YouTube近期的改进效果。 Matus Tomlein,Branislav Pecher,Jakub Simko,Ivan Srba,Robert Moro,Elena Stefancova,Michal Kompan,Andrea Hrckova,Juraj Podrouzek,Maria Bielikova cs.IR,cs.AI

title: A World-Self Model Towards Understanding Intelligence
title_zh: 理解智力的世界自我模型
abstract: The symbolism, connectionism and behaviorism approaches of artificial intelligence have achieved a lot of successes in various tasks, while we still do not have a clear definition of "intelligence" with enough consensus in the community (although there are over 70 different "versions" of definitions). The nature of intelligence is still in darkness. In this work we do not take any of these three traditional approaches, instead we try to identify certain fundamental aspects of the nature of intelligence, and construct a mathematical model to represent and potentially reproduce these fundamental aspects. We first stress the importance of defining the scope of discussion and granularity of investigation. We carefully compare human and artificial intelligence, and qualitatively demonstrate an information abstraction process, which we propose to be the key to connect perception and cognition. We then present the broader idea of "concept", separate the idea of self model out of the world model, and construct a new model called world-self model (WSM). We show the mechanisms of creating and connecting concepts, and the flow of how the WSM receives, processes and outputs information with respect to an arbitrary type of problem to solve. We also consider and discuss the potential computer implementation issues of the proposed theoretical framework, and finally we propose a unified general framework of intelligence based on WSM.
summary: The symbolism, connectionism and behaviorism approaches of artificial intelligence have achieved a lot of successes in various tasks, while we still do not have a clear definition of "intelligence" with enough consensus in the community (although there are over 70 different "versions" of definitions). The nature of intelligence is still in darkness. In this work we do not take any of these three traditional approaches, instead we try to identify certain fundamental aspects of the nature of intelligence, and construct a mathematical model to represent and potentially reproduce these fundamental aspects. We first stress the importance of defining the scope of discussion and granularity of investigation. We carefully compare human and artificial intelligence, and qualitatively demonstrate an information abstraction process, which we propose to be the key to connect perception and cognition. We then present the broader idea of "concept", separate the idea of self model out of the world model, and construct a new model called world-self model (WSM). We show the mechanisms of creating and connecting concepts, and the flow of how the WSM receives, processes and outputs information with respect to an arbitrary type of problem to solve. We also consider and discuss the potential computer implementation issues of the proposed theoretical framework, and finally we propose a unified general framework of intelligence based on WSM.
abstract_zh: 人工智能的象征主义、联结主义和行为主义方法在各种任务中取得了很多成功，但我们仍然没有一个在社区中得到足够共识的明确的“智能”定义（尽管有超过70种不同的定义“版本”）。智力的本质仍然处于黑暗之中。在这项工作中，我们不采用这三种传统方法中的任何一种，而是尝试确定智能本质的某些基本方面，并构建一个数学模型来表示并可能重现这些基本方面。我们首先强调定义讨论范围和调查粒度的重要性。我们仔细比较人类和人工智能，并定性地展示信息抽象过程，我们认为这是连接感知和认知的关键。然后，我们提出了更广泛的“概念”概念，将自我模型的概念从世界模型中分离出来，并构建了一个称为世界自我模型（WSM）的新模型。我们展示了创建和连接概念的机制，以及 WSM 如何接收、处理和输出与要解决的任意类型问题相关的信息的流程。我们还考虑和讨论了所提出的理论框架潜在的计算机实现问题，最终提出了一个基于WSM的统一的智能通用框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为世界-自我模型（WSM）的数学框架，旨在通过抽象信息处理过程连接感知与认知，探索智能本质的统一理论。
AI.motivation: 传统AI方法（符号主义、连接主义、行为主义）在任务执行上取得成功，但缺乏对智能本质的共识定义，导致研究方向分散且难以统一。
AI.method: 通过界定讨论范围与研究粒度，比较人类与人工智能的差异，提出信息抽象是感知与认知的桥梁；分离‘自我模型’与‘世界模型’，构建WSM框架，阐述概念生成、连接机制及信息处理流程，并探讨其计算机实现可能性。
AI.result: 建立了WSM理论框架，展示了其处理任意类型问题的信息流机制，明确了概念创建与连接的规则，并提出了基于WSM的智能统一模型。
AI.conclusion: WSM为理解智能本质提供了新视角，可能成为未来AI理论与应用的通用基础框架，需进一步验证其计算实现与实际效果。

title: Efficient-VDVAE: Less is more
title_zh: 高效-VDVAE：少即是多
comment: Added more information about C1 model configuration, potential negative impact, and fixed some typos
comments: Added more information about C1 model configuration, potential negative impact, and fixed some typos
abstract: Hierarchical VAEs have emerged in recent years as a reliable option for maximum likelihood estimation. However, instability issues and demanding computational requirements have hindered research progress in the area. We present simple modifications to the Very Deep VAE to make it converge up to $2.6\times$ faster, save up to $20\times$ in memory load and improve stability during training. Despite these changes, our models achieve comparable or better negative log-likelihood performance than current state-of-the-art models on all $7$ commonly used image datasets we evaluated on. We also make an argument against using 5-bit benchmarks as a way to measure hierarchical VAE's performance due to undesirable biases caused by the 5-bit quantization. Additionally, we empirically demonstrate that roughly $3\%$ of the hierarchical VAE's latent space dimensions is sufficient to encode most of the image information, without loss of performance, opening up the doors to efficiently leverage the hierarchical VAEs' latent space in downstream tasks. We release our source code and models at https://github.com/Rayhane-mamah/Efficient-VDVAE .
summary: Hierarchical VAEs have emerged in recent years as a reliable option for maximum likelihood estimation. However, instability issues and demanding computational requirements have hindered research progress in the area. We present simple modifications to the Very Deep VAE to make it converge up to $2.6\times$ faster, save up to $20\times$ in memory load and improve stability during training. Despite these changes, our models achieve comparable or better negative log-likelihood performance than current state-of-the-art models on all $7$ commonly used image datasets we evaluated on. We also make an argument against using 5-bit benchmarks as a way to measure hierarchical VAE's performance due to undesirable biases caused by the 5-bit quantization. Additionally, we empirically demonstrate that roughly $3\%$ of the hierarchical VAE's latent space dimensions is sufficient to encode most of the image information, without loss of performance, opening up the doors to efficiently leverage the hierarchical VAEs' latent space in downstream tasks. We release our source code and models at https://github.com/Rayhane-mamah/Efficient-VDVAE .
abstract_zh: 近年来，分层 VAE 已成为最大似然估计的可靠选择。然而，不稳定问题和苛刻的计算要求阻碍了该领域的研究进展。我们对 Very Deep VAE 进行了简单修改，使其收敛速度提高了 2.6 美元，节省了 20 美元的内存负载，并提高了训练期间的稳定性。尽管有这些变化，我们的模型在我们评估的所有 7 美元常用图像数据集上都实现了与当前最先进模型相当或更好的负对数似然性能。我们还反对使用 5 位基准作为衡量分层 VAE 性能的方法，因为 5 位量化会导致不良偏差。此外，我们凭经验证明，大约 $3%$ 的分层 VAE 潜在空间维度足以编码大部分图像信息，而不会损失性能，从而为在下游任务中有效利用分层 VAE 的潜在空间打开了大门。我们在 https://github.com/Rayhane-mamah/Efficient-VDVAE 发布了源代码和模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的分层变分自编码器（Efficient-VDVAE），通过简化架构提升训练效率和稳定性，同时保持性能。
AI.motivation: 传统分层VAE存在训练不稳定、计算需求高且评估基准存在偏差的问题，需更高效的实现方案。
AI.method: 对Very Deep VAE进行简化修改，优化收敛速度与内存占用，并论证5-bit基准的偏差问题，验证少量潜在维度即可保留图像信息。
AI.result: 模型收敛速度提升2.6倍，内存占用减少20倍，在7个图像数据集上达到或超越SOTA性能，且仅需3%潜在维度即可保持性能。
AI.conclusion: Efficient-VDVAE通过架构简化实现高效训练，为分层VAE在下游任务中的应用提供了可行性。

title: Code Smells for Machine Learning Applications
title_zh: 机器学习应用程序的代码味道
abstract: The popularity of machine learning has wildly expanded in recent years. Machine learning techniques have been heatedly studied in academia and applied in the industry to create business value. However, there is a lack of guidelines for code quality in machine learning applications. In particular, code smells have rarely been studied in this domain. Although machine learning code is usually integrated as a small part of an overarching system, it usually plays an important role in its core functionality. Hence ensuring code quality is quintessential to avoid issues in the long run. This paper proposes and identifies a list of 22 machine learning-specific code smells collected from various sources, including papers, grey literature, GitHub commits, and Stack Overflow posts. We pinpoint each smell with a description of its context, potential issues in the long run, and proposed solutions. In addition, we link them to their respective pipeline stage and the evidence from both academic and grey literature. The code smell catalog helps data scientists and developers produce and maintain high-quality machine learning application code.
summary: The popularity of machine learning has wildly expanded in recent years. In addition, we link them to their respective pipeline stage and the evidence from both academic and grey literature. The code smell catalog helps data scientists and developers produce and maintain high-quality machine learning application code.
abstract_zh: 近年来，机器学习的普及度急剧扩大。机器学习技术在学术界得到了热烈的研究，并在工业界得到应用，创造商业价值。然而，机器学习应用程序中缺乏代码质量指南。特别是，代码异味在这个领域很少被研究。尽管机器学习代码通常作为总体系统的一小部分集成，但它通常在其核心功能中发挥重要作用。因此，从长远来看，确保代码质量对于避免出现问题至关重要。本文提出并确定了从各种来源收集的 22 个机器学习特定代码气味的列表，包括论文、灰色文献、GitHub 提交和 Stack Overflow 帖子。我们通过描述其背景、长期潜在问题以及提出的解决方案来精确定位每种气味。此外，我们将它们与各自的管道阶段以及来自学术和灰色文献的证据联系起来。代码气味目录可帮助数据科学家和开发人员生成和维护高质量的机器学习应用程序代码。

AI.motivation: 机器学习应用的代码质量缺乏指导方针，而代码异味在该领域研究不足，可能导致长期问题。

AI.result: 建立了包含22种机器学习代码异味的目录，涵盖上下文描述、潜在问题及解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该目录为数据科学家和开发者提供了维护高质量机器学习代码的实用参考。
