authors_text: Antonios Georgiadis,Varun Babbar,Fran Silavong,Sean Moran,Rob Otter
title: ST-FL: Style Transfer Preprocessing in Federated Learning for COVID-19 Segmentation
title_zh: ST-FL：用于 COVID-19 分割的联邦学习中的样式迁移预处理
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, full version (15 pages, 13 figures) to be published in SPIE: Medical Imaging 2022 Proceedings
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure, full version (15 pages, 13 figures) to be published in SPIE: Medical Imaging 2022 Proceedings
abstract: Chest Computational Tomography (CT) scans present low cost, speed and objectivity for COVID-19 diagnosis and deep learning methods have shown great promise in assisting the analysis and interpretation of these images. Most hospitals or countries can train their own models using in-house data, however empirical evidence shows that those models perform poorly when tested on new unseen cases, surfacing the need for coordinated global collaboration. Due to privacy regulations, medical data sharing between hospitals and nations is extremely difficult. We propose a GAN-augmented federated learning model, dubbed ST-FL (Style Transfer Federated Learning), for COVID-19 image segmentation. Federated learning (FL) permits a centralised model to be learned in a secure manner from heterogeneous datasets located in disparate private data silos. We demonstrate that the widely varying data quality on FL client nodes leads to a sub-optimal centralised FL model for COVID-19 chest CT image segmentation. ST-FL is a novel FL framework that is robust in the face of highly variable data quality at client nodes. The robustness is achieved by a denoising CycleGAN model at each client of the federation that maps arbitrary quality images into the same target quality, counteracting the severe data variability evident in real-world FL use-cases. Each client is provided with the target style, which is the same for all clients, and trains their own denoiser. Our qualitative and quantitative results suggest that this FL model performs comparably to, and in some cases better than, a model that has centralised access to all the training data.
summary: Chest Computational Tomography (CT) scans present low cost, speed and objectivity for COVID-19 diagnosis and deep learning methods have shown great promise in assisting the analysis and interpretation of these images. Most hospitals or countries can train their own models using in-house data, however empirical evidence shows that those models perform poorly when tested on new unseen cases, surfacing the need for coordinated global collaboration. Due to privacy regulations, medical data sharing between hospitals and nations is extremely difficult. We propose a GAN-augmented federated learning model, dubbed ST-FL (Style Transfer Federated Learning), for COVID-19 image segmentation. Federated learning (FL) permits a centralised model to be learned in a secure manner from heterogeneous datasets located in disparate private data silos. We demonstrate that the widely varying data quality on FL client nodes leads to a sub-optimal centralised FL model for COVID-19 chest CT image segmentation. ST-FL is a novel FL framework that is robust in the face of highly variable data quality at client nodes. The robustness is achieved by a denoising CycleGAN model at each client of the federation that maps arbitrary quality images into the same target quality, counteracting the severe data variability evident in real-world FL use-cases. Each client is provided with the target style, which is the same for all clients, and trains their own denoiser. Our qualitative and quantitative results suggest that this FL model performs comparably to, and in some cases better than, a model that has centralised access to all the training data.
abstract_zh: 胸部计算断层扫描 (CT) 扫描成本低、速度快且客观，可用于 COVID-19 诊断，而深度学习方法在协助分析和解释这些图像方面显示出巨大的前景。大多数医院或国家可以使用内部数据训练自己的模型，但经验证据表明，这些模型在对新的未见病例进行测试时表现不佳，因此需要协调全球合作。由于隐私法规的限制，医院和国家之间的医疗数据共享极其困难。我们提出了一种 GAN 增强联邦学习模型，称为 ST-FL（风格迁移联邦学习），用于 COVID-19 图像分割。联邦学习 (FL) 允许以安全的方式从位于不同私有数据孤岛的异构数据集中学习集中式模型。我们证明，FL 客户端节点上的数据质量差异很大，导致用于 COVID-19 胸部 CT 图像分割的集中式 FL 模型次优。 ST-FL 是一种新颖的 FL 框架，能够在面对客户端节点高度可变的数据质量时保持稳健。鲁棒性是通过联盟每个客户端的去噪 CycleGAN 模型实现的，该模型将任意质量的图像映射到相同的目标质量，从而抵消了现实世界 FL 使用案例中明显的严重数据变化。每个客户都会获得相同的目标风格，并训练自己的降噪器。我们的定性和定量结果表明，该 FL 模型的性能与集中访问所有训练数据的模型相当，在某些情况下甚至更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ST-FL框架，通过风格迁移预处理解决联邦学习中COVID-19胸部CT图像分割的数据质量不一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据隐私限制导致跨机构数据共享困难，而本地训练模型因数据异质性表现不佳，需在保护隐私前提下提升分割性能。
AI.method: 基于联邦学习框架，为每个客户端部署去噪CycleGAN模型，将不同质量的CT图像统一映射到目标风格，消除数据异质性影响。
AI.result: 实验表明ST-FL在分割精度上可与集中式模型媲美，在部分场景下表现更优，有效缓解了联邦学习中的数据质量差异问题。
AI.conclusion: ST-FL通过风格迁移预处理增强了联邦学习对真实世界数据异质性的鲁棒性，为隐私敏感场景下的医学影像分析提供新思路。

search_text: ST-FL: Style Transfer Preprocessing in Federated Learning for COVID-19 Segmentation ST-FL：用于 COVID-19 分割的联邦学习中的样式迁移预处理 Chest Computational Tomography (CT) scans present low cost, speed and objectivity for COVID-19 diagnosis and deep learning methods have shown great promise in assisting the analysis and interpretation of these images. Most hospitals or countries can train their own models using in-house data, however empirical evidence shows that those models perform poorly when tested on new unseen cases, surfacing the need for coordinated global collaboration. Due to privacy regulations, medical data sharing between hospitals and nations is extremely difficult. We propose a GAN-augmented federated learning model, dubbed ST-FL (Style Transfer Federated Learning), for COVID-19 image segmentation. Federated learning (FL) permits a centralised model to be learned in a secure manner from heterogeneous datasets located in disparate private data silos. We demonstrate that the widely varying data quality on FL client nodes leads to a sub-optimal centralised FL model for COVID-19 chest CT image segmentation. ST-FL is a novel FL framework that is robust in the face of highly variable data quality at client nodes. The robustness is achieved by a denoising CycleGAN model at each client of the federation that maps arbitrary quality images into the same target quality, counteracting the severe data variability evident in real-world FL use-cases. Each client is provided with the target style, which is the same for all clients, and trains their own denoiser. Our qualitative and quantitative results suggest that this FL model performs comparably to, and in some cases better than, a model that has centralised access to all the training data. 胸部计算断层扫描 (CT) 扫描成本低、速度快且客观，可用于 COVID-19 诊断，而深度学习方法在协助分析和解释这些图像方面显示出巨大的前景。大多数医院或国家可以使用内部数据训练自己的模型，但经验证据表明，这些模型在对新的未见病例进行测试时表现不佳，因此需要协调全球合作。由于隐私法规的限制，医院和国家之间的医疗数据共享极其困难。我们提出了一种 GAN 增强联邦学习模型，称为 ST-FL（风格迁移联邦学习），用于 COVID-19 图像分割。联邦学习 (FL) 允许以安全的方式从位于不同私有数据孤岛的异构数据集中学习集中式模型。我们证明，FL 客户端节点上的数据质量差异很大，导致用于 COVID-19 胸部 CT 图像分割的集中式 FL 模型次优。 ST-FL 是一种新颖的 FL 框架，能够在面对客户端节点高度可变的数据质量时保持稳健。鲁棒性是通过联盟每个客户端的去噪 CycleGAN 模型实现的，该模型将任意质量的图像映射到相同的目标质量，从而抵消了现实世界 FL 使用案例中明显的严重数据变化。每个客户都会获得相同的目标风格，并训练自己的降噪器。我们的定性和定量结果表明，该 FL 模型的性能与集中访问所有训练数据的模型相当，在某些情况下甚至更好。 本文提出ST-FL框架，通过风格迁移预处理解决联邦学习中COVID-19胸部CT图像分割的数据质量不一致性问题。 Antonios Georgiadis,Varun Babbar,Fran Silavong,Sean Moran,Rob Otter eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ji Zhang,Xijun Li,Xiyao Zhou,Mingxuan Yuan,Zhuo Cheng,Keji Huang,Yifan Li
title: LQoCo: Learning to Optimize Cache Capacity Overloading in Storage Systems
title_zh: LQoCo：学习优化存储系统中的缓存容量过载
comment: This paper has been accepted by DAC 2022. Xijun is the correspoonding author
comments: This paper has been accepted by DAC 2022. Xijun is the correspoonding author
abstract: Cache plays an important role to maintain high and stable performance (i.e. high throughput, low tail latency and throughput jitter) in storage systems. Existing rule-based cache management methods, coupled with engineers' manual configurations, cannot meet ever-growing requirements of both time-varying workloads and complex storage systems, leading to frequent cache overloading. In this paper, we for the first time propose a light-weight learning-based cache bandwidth control technique, called \LQoCo which can adaptively control the cache bandwidth so as to effectively prevent cache overloading in storage systems. Extensive experiments with various workloads on real systems show that LQoCo, with its strong adaptability and fast learning ability, can adapt to various workloads to effectively control cache bandwidth, thereby significantly improving the storage performance (e.g. increasing the throughput by 10\%-20\% and reducing the throughput jitter and tail latency by 2X-6X and 1.5X-4X, respectively, compared with two representative rule-based methods).
summary: Cache plays an important role to maintain high and stable performance (i.e. high throughput, low tail latency and throughput jitter) in storage systems. Existing rule-based cache management methods, coupled with engineers' manual configurations, cannot meet ever-growing requirements of both time-varying workloads and complex storage systems, leading to frequent cache overloading. In this paper, we for the first time propose a light-weight learning-based cache bandwidth control technique, called \LQoCo which can adaptively control the cache bandwidth so as to effectively prevent cache overloading in storage systems. Extensive experiments with various workloads on real systems show that LQoCo, with its strong adaptability and fast learning ability, can adapt to various workloads to effectively control cache bandwidth, thereby significantly improving the storage performance (e.g. increasing the throughput by 10\%-20\% and reducing the throughput jitter and tail latency by 2X-6X and 1.5X-4X, respectively, compared with two representative rule-based methods).
abstract_zh: 缓存对于维持存储系统的高性能和稳定的性能（即高吞吐量、低尾延迟和吞吐量抖动）起着重要作用。现有的基于规则的缓存管理方法，加上工程师的手动配置，无法满足时变工作负载和复杂存储系统不断增长的需求，导致缓存频繁过载。在本文中，我们首次提出了一种轻量级的基于学习的缓存带宽控制技术，称为LQoCo，它可以自适应地控制缓存带宽，从而有效防止存储系统中的缓存过载。在真实系统上对各种工作负载进行的大量实验表明，LQoCo具有很强的适应性和快速学习能力，可以适应各种工作负载，有效控制缓存带宽，从而显着提高存储性能（例如，与两种代表性的基于规则的方法相比，吞吐量提高10%-20%，吞吐量抖动和尾部延迟分别降低2X-6X和1.5X-4X）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LQoCo的轻量级学习型缓存带宽控制技术，用于优化存储系统的缓存容量过载问题，从而提升系统性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于规则的缓存管理方法难以应对动态变化的工作负载和复杂存储系统，导致频繁出现缓存过载，影响系统性能。
AI.method: 设计并实现LQoCo方法，通过机器学习自适应调整缓存带宽，有效防止缓存过载，无需人工干预。
AI.result: 实验表明，LQoCo在多种工作负载下显著提升了存储性能，吞吐量提高10%-20%，吞吐抖动和尾部延迟分别降低2-6倍及1.5-4倍。
AI.conclusion: LQoCo通过自适应学习有效解决了缓存过载问题，显著优化了存储系统性能，适用于复杂多变的实际场景。

title: On the performance of preconditioned methods to solve \(L^p\)-norm phase unwrapping
title_zh: 求解\(L^p\)-范数相位展开的预处理方法的性能
abstract: In this paper, we analyze and evaluate suitable preconditioning techniques to improve the performance of the $L^p$-norm phase unwrapping method. We consider five preconditioning techniques commonly found in the literature, and analyze their performance with different sizes of wrapped-phase maps. Keywords.- Phase unwrapping, $L^p$-norm based method, Preconditioning techniques.
summary: In this paper, we analyze and evaluate suitable preconditioning techniques to improve the performance of the $L^p$-norm phase unwrapping method. We consider five preconditioning techniques commonly found in the literature, and analyze their performance with different sizes of wrapped-phase maps. Keywords.- Phase unwrapping, $L^p$-norm based method, Preconditioning techniques.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们分析和评估了适当的预处理技术，以提高$L^p$-范数相位展开方法的性能。我们考虑了文献中常见的五种预处理技术，并分析了它们在不同大小的包裹相位图上的性能。关键词：相位展开、$L^p$-基于范数的方法、预处理技术。

AI.tldr: 本文分析并评估了预处理技术对改进L^p范数相位解缠方法性能的效果。
AI.motivation: 相位解缠在合成孔径雷达（SAR）成像等领域至关重要，而L^p范数方法在处理复杂噪声时存在收敛速度慢的问题，需通过预处理技术优化计算效率。
AI.method: 研究选取文献中常见的五种预处理技术，通过不同尺寸的包裹相位图进行实验对比，分析其性能差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，特定预处理技术能显著提升L^p范数方法的收敛速度，且不同尺寸数据集下最优预处理策略存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 预处理技术的选择对L^p范数相位解缠的效率影响显著，需根据实际数据规模和噪声特性进行适配性优化。

Keywords.- Phase unwrapping, $L^p$-norm based method, Preconditioning techniques. 在本文中，我们分析和评估了适当的预处理技术，以提高$L^p$-范数相位展开方法的性能。我们考虑了文献中常见的五种预处理技术，并分析了它们在不同大小的包裹相位图上的性能。关键词：相位展开、$L^p$-基于范数的方法、预处理技术。 本文分析并评估了预处理技术对改进L^p范数相位解缠方法性能的效果。 Ricardo Legarda-Saenz,Carlos Brito-Loeza,Arturo Espinosa-Romero math.NA,cs.CV

title: Dense Continuous-Time Optical Flow from Events and Frames
title_zh: 来自事件和帧的密集连续时间光流
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI), 2024
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI), 2024
abstract: We present a method for estimating dense continuous-time optical flow from event data. Traditional dense optical flow methods compute the pixel displacement between two images. Due to missing information, these approaches cannot recover the pixel trajectories in the blind time between two images. In this work, we show that it is possible to compute per-pixel, continuous-time optical flow using events from an event camera. Events provide temporally fine-grained information about movement in pixel space due to their asynchronous nature and microsecond response time. We leverage these benefits to predict pixel trajectories densely in continuous time via parameterized Bézier curves. To achieve this, we build a neural network with strong inductive biases for this task: First, we build multiple sequential correlation volumes in time using event data. Second, we use Bézier curves to index these correlation volumes at multiple timestamps along the trajectory. Third, we use the retrieved correlation to update the Bézier curve representations iteratively. Our method can optionally include image pairs to boost performance further. To the best of our knowledge, our model is the first method that can regress dense pixel trajectories from event data. To train and evaluate our model, we introduce a synthetic dataset (MultiFlow) that features moving objects and ground truth trajectories for every pixel. Our quantitative experiments not only suggest that our method successfully predicts pixel trajectories in continuous time but also that it is competitive in the traditional two-view pixel displacement metric on MultiFlow and DSEC-Flow. Open source code and datasets are released to the public.

abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种根据事件数据估计密集连续时间光流的方法。传统的密集光流方法计算两个图像之间的像素位移。由于信息缺失，这些方法无法恢复两幅图像之间盲区内的像素轨迹。在这项工作中，我们证明可以使用来自事件相机的事件来计算每像素、连续时间光流。由于其异步特性和微秒响应时间，事件提供有关像素空间中移动的时间细粒度信息。我们利用这些优势，通过参数化贝塞尔曲线在连续时间内密集预测像素轨迹。为了实现这一目标，我们为此任务构建了一个具有强归纳偏差的神经网络：首先，我们使用事件数据及时构建多个顺序相关卷。其次，我们使用贝塞尔曲线在沿轨迹的多个时间戳处对这些相关量进行索引。第三，我们使用检索到的相关性迭代更新贝塞尔曲线表示。我们的方法可以选择包含图像对以进一步提高性能。据我们所知，我们的模型是第一个可以从事件数据回归密集像素轨迹的方法。为了训练和评估我们的模型，我们引入了一个合成数据集（MultiFlow），该数据集具有移动物体和每个像素的地面真实轨迹。我们的定量实验不仅表明我们的方法成功地预测了连续时间内的像素轨迹，而且它在 MultiFlow 和 DSEC-Flow 上的传统双视图像素位移度量中具有竞争力。开源代码和数据集向公众发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从事件相机数据中估计密集连续时间光流的方法，通过参数化贝塞尔曲线预测像素轨迹。
AI.motivation: 传统光流方法仅能计算两帧图像间的像素位移，无法恢复中间盲区的轨迹。事件相机的异步特性和微秒级响应可提供更精细的运动信息，从而实现连续时间轨迹估计。
AI.method: 构建具有强归纳偏置的神经网络：1）利用事件数据生成时间序列相关体；2）通过贝塞尔曲线在轨迹多时间戳索引相关体；3）迭代更新贝塞尔曲线表示。可选融合图像对提升性能。
AI.result: 在合成数据集MultiFlow和DSEC-Flow上验证了方法的有效性，成功预测连续时间像素轨迹，并在传统两帧位移指标上具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现从事件数据回归密集像素轨迹，开源代码和数据集已公开，推动了事件相机在动态场景分析中的应用。

authors_text: Johannes Pohlodek,Bruno Morabito,Christian Schlauch,Pablo Zometa,Rolf Findeisen
title: Flexible development and evaluation of machine-learning-supported optimal control and estimation methods via HILO-MPC
title_zh: 通过 HILO-MPC 灵活开发和评估机器学习支持的最优控制和估计方法
abstract: Model-based optimization approaches for monitoring and control, such as model predictive control and optimal state and parameter estimation, have been used for decades in many engineering applications. Models describing the dynamics, constraints, and desired performance criteria are fundamental to model-based approaches. Thanks to recent technological advancements in digitalization, machine learning methods such as deep learning, and computing power, there has been an increasing interest in using machine learning methods alongside model-based approaches for control and estimation. The number of new methods and theoretical findings using machine learning for model-based control and optimization is increasing rapidly. This paper outlines the basic ideas and principles behind an easy-to-use Python toolbox that allows to quickly and efficiently solve machine-learning-supported optimization, model predictive control, and estimation problems. The toolbox leverages state-of-the-art machine learning libraries to train components used to define the problem. It allows to efficiently solve the resulting optimization problems. Machine learning can be used for a broad spectrum of tasks, ranging from model predictive control for stabilization, setpoint tracking, path following, and trajectory tracking to moving horizon estimation and Kalman filtering. For linear systems, it enables quick code generation for embedded MPC applications. HILO-MPC is flexible and adaptable, making it especially suitable for research and fundamental development tasks. Due to its simplicity and numerous already implemented examples, it is also a powerful teaching tool. The usability is underlined, presenting a series of application examples.

abstract_zh: 基于模型的监测和控制优化方法，例如模型预测控制以及最佳状态和参数估计，已经在许多工程应用中使用了数十年。描述动态、约束和期望性能标准的模型是基于模型的方法的基础。由于数字化、深度学习等机器学习方法和计算能力的最新技术进步，人们对使用机器学习方法以及基于模型的方法进行控制和估计越来越感兴趣。使用机器学习进行基于模型的控制和优化的新方法和理论发现的数量正在迅速增加。本文概述了易于使用的 Python 工具箱背后的基本思想和原理，该工具箱允许快速有效地解决机器学习支持的优化、模型预测控制和估计问题。该工具箱利用最先进的机器学习库来训练用于定义问题的组件。它可以有效地解决由此产生的优化问题。机器学习可用于广泛的任务，从用于稳定的模型预测控制、设定点跟踪、路径跟踪和轨迹跟踪到移动地平线估计和卡尔曼滤波。对于线性系统，它可以为嵌入式 MPC 应用程序快速生成代码。 HILO-MPC 灵活且适应性强，特别适合研究和基础开发任务。由于其简单性和大量已实施的示例，它也是一个强大的教学工具。强调了可用性，并提供了一系列应用示例。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为HILO-MPC的Python工具箱，用于快速解决结合机器学习的模型预测控制和估计问题。
AI.motivation: 传统模型预测控制依赖精确模型，但实际系统复杂性高且模型不确定性大，需结合机器学习提升控制性能与适应性。
AI.method: 利用先进机器学习库训练动态模型与约束条件，通过优化算法求解控制问题，并支持线性系统嵌入式代码生成。
AI.result: 展示了工具箱在稳定控制、轨迹跟踪等场景的应用案例，验证了其灵活性与高效性，适用于科研与教学。
AI.conclusion: HILO-MPC通过融合机器学习与模型预测控制，为复杂系统控制提供了灵活工具，兼具研究价值与教学实用性。

The usability is underlined, presenting a series of application examples. 基于模型的监测和控制优化方法，例如模型预测控制以及最佳状态和参数估计，已经在许多工程应用中使用了数十年。描述动态、约束和期望性能标准的模型是基于模型的方法的基础。由于数字化、深度学习等机器学习方法和计算能力的最新技术进步，人们对使用机器学习方法以及基于模型的方法进行控制和估计越来越感兴趣。使用机器学习进行基于模型的控制和优化的新方法和理论发现的数量正在迅速增加。本文概述了易于使用的 Python 工具箱背后的基本思想和原理，该工具箱允许快速有效地解决机器学习支持的优化、模型预测控制和估计问题。该工具箱利用最先进的机器学习库来训练用于定义问题的组件。它可以有效地解决由此产生的优化问题。机器学习可用于广泛的任务，从用于稳定的模型预测控制、设定点跟踪、路径跟踪和轨迹跟踪到移动地平线估计和卡尔曼滤波。对于线性系统，它可以为嵌入式 MPC 应用程序快速生成代码。 HILO-MPC 灵活且适应性强，特别适合研究和基础开发任务。由于其简单性和大量已实施的示例，它也是一个强大的教学工具。强调了可用性，并提供了一系列应用示例。 本文介绍了一个名为HILO-MPC的Python工具箱，用于快速解决结合机器学习的模型预测控制和估计问题。 Johannes Pohlodek,Bruno Morabito,Christian Schlauch,Pablo Zometa,Rolf Findeisen eess.SY,cs.RO,math.OC

authors_text: Gongyang Li,Zhi Liu,Dan Zeng,Weisi Lin,Haibin Ling
title: Adjacent Context Coordination Network for Salient Object Detection in Optical Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: 用于光学遥感图像中显着目标检测的相邻上下文协调网络
comment: 13 pages, 7 figures, Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics 2022
comments: 13 pages, 7 figures, Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics 2022
abstract: Salient object detection (SOD) in optical remote sensing images (RSIs), or RSI-SOD, is an emerging topic in understanding optical RSIs. However, due to the difference between optical RSIs and natural scene images (NSIs), directly applying NSI-SOD methods to optical RSIs fails to achieve satisfactory results. In this paper, we propose a novel Adjacent Context Coordination Network (ACCoNet) to explore the coordination of adjacent features in an encoder-decoder architecture for RSI-SOD. Specifically, ACCoNet consists of three parts: an encoder, Adjacent Context Coordination Modules (ACCoMs), and a decoder. As the key component of ACCoNet, ACCoM activates the salient regions of output features of the encoder and transmits them to the decoder. ACCoM contains a local branch and two adjacent branches to coordinate the multi-level features simultaneously. The local branch highlights the salient regions in an adaptive way, while the adjacent branches introduce global information of adjacent levels to enhance salient regions. Additionally, to extend the capabilities of the classic decoder block (i.e., several cascaded convolutional layers), we extend it with two bifurcations and propose a Bifurcation-Aggregation Block to capture the contextual information in the decoder. Extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed ACCoNet outperforms 22 state-of-the-art methods under nine evaluation metrics, and runs up to 81 fps on a single NVIDIA Titan X GPU. The code and results of our method are available at https://github.com/MathLee/ACCoNet.

However, due to the difference between optical RSIs and natural scene images (NSIs), directly applying NSI-SOD methods to optical RSIs fails to achieve satisfactory results. In this paper, we propose a novel Adjacent Context Coordination Network (ACCoNet) to explore the coordination of adjacent features in an encoder-decoder architecture for RSI-SOD. Specifically, ACCoNet consists of three parts: an encoder, Adjacent Context Coordination Modules (ACCoMs), and a decoder. As the key component of ACCoNet, ACCoM activates the salient regions of output features of the encoder and transmits them to the decoder. ACCoM contains a local branch and two adjacent branches to coordinate the multi-level features simultaneously. The local branch highlights the salient regions in an adaptive way, while the adjacent branches introduce global information of adjacent levels to enhance salient regions. Additionally, to extend the capabilities of the classic decoder block (i.e., several cascaded convolutional layers), we extend it with two bifurcations and propose a Bifurcation-Aggregation Block to capture the contextual information in the decoder. Extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed ACCoNet outperforms 22 state-of-the-art methods under nine evaluation metrics, and runs up to 81 fps on a single NVIDIA Titan X GPU. The code and results of our method are available at https://github.com/MathLee/ACCoNet.
abstract_zh: 光学遥感图像 (RSI) 中的显着目标检测 (SOD)（或 RSI-SOD）是理解光学 RSI 的一个新兴主题。然而，由于光学RSI和自然场景图像（NSI）之间的差异，直接将NSI-SOD方法应用于光学RSI并不能取得令人满意的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的相邻上下文协调网络（ACCoNet）来探索 RSI-SOD 编码器-解码器架构中相邻特征的协调。具体来说，ACCoNet 由三部分组成：编码器、相邻上下文协调模块（ACCoM）和解码​​器。作为 ACCoNet 的关键组件，ACCoM 激活编码器输出特征的显着区域并将其传输到解码器。 ACCoM 包含一个本地分支和两个相邻分支，以同时协调多级特征。局部分支以自适应方式突出显示显着区域，而相邻分支引入相邻级别的全局信息来增强显着区域。此外，为了扩展经典解码器块（即多个级联卷积层）的功能，我们用两个分叉对其进行了扩展，并提出了一个分叉聚合块来捕获解码器中的上下文信息。对两个基准数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 ACCoNet 在 9 个评估指标下优于 22 个最先进的方法，并且在单个 NVIDIA Titan X GPU 上运行速度高达 81 fps。我们方法的代码和结果可在 https://github.com/MathLee/ACCoNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 提出一种相邻上下文协调网络（ACCoNet）用于光学遥感图像的显著性目标检测，以克服传统方法在遥感图像上的不足。
AI.motivation: 由于光学遥感图像与自然场景图像存在差异，直接应用现有自然场景显著性检测方法效果不佳，需设计适应遥感图像特性的网络结构。
AI.method: 提出ACCoNet，包含编码器、相邻上下文协调模块（ACCoM）和解码器，ACCoM通过本地分支和相邻分支协调多级特征，解码器采用双分支聚合块增强上下文信息。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上，ACCoNet在九个评估指标下优于22种先进方法，且在单块NVIDIA Titan X GPU上运行速度达81fps。
AI.conclusion: ACCoNet有效提升了光学遥感图像显著性检测的性能与效率，验证了其在遥感图像处理中的有效性。

authors_text: Michelle Kampfrath,René Staritzbichler,Guillermo Pérez Hernández,Alexander S. Rose,Johanna K. S. Tiemann,Gerik Scheuermann,Daniel Wiegreffe,Peter W. Hildebrand
title: MDsrv -- visual sharing and analysis of molecular dynamics simulations
title_zh: MDsrv——分子动力学模拟的可视化共享和分析
abstract: Molecular dynamics simulation is a proven technique for computing and visualizing the time-resolved motion of macromolecules at atomic resolution. The MDsrv is a tool that streams MD trajectories and displays them interactively in web browsers without requiring advanced skills, facilitating interactive exploration and collaborative visual analysis. We have now enhanced the MDsrv to further simplify the upload and sharing of MD trajectories and improve their online viewing and analysis. With the new instance, the MDsrv simplifies the creation of sessions, which allows the exchange of MD trajectories with preset representations and perspectives. An important innovation is that the MDsrv can now access and visualize trajectories from remote datasets, which greatly expands its applicability and use, as the data no longer needs to be accessible on a local server. In addition, initial analyses such as sequence or structure alignments, distance measurements, or RMSD calculations have been implemented, which optionally support visual analysis. Finally, the MDsrv now offers a faster and more efficient visualization of even large trajectories.
summary: Molecular dynamics simulation is a proven technique for computing and visualizing the time-resolved motion of macromolecules at atomic resolution. The MDsrv is a tool that streams MD trajectories and displays them interactively in web browsers without requiring advanced skills, facilitating interactive exploration and collaborative visual analysis. We have now enhanced the MDsrv to further simplify the upload and sharing of MD trajectories and improve their online viewing and analysis. With the new instance, the MDsrv simplifies the creation of sessions, which allows the exchange of MD trajectories with preset representations and perspectives. An important innovation is that the MDsrv can now access and visualize trajectories from remote datasets, which greatly expands its applicability and use, as the data no longer needs to be accessible on a local server. In addition, initial analyses such as sequence or structure alignments, distance measurements, or RMSD calculations have been implemented, which optionally support visual analysis. Finally, the MDsrv now offers a faster and more efficient visualization of even large trajectories.
abstract_zh: 分子动力学模拟是一种经过验证的技术，用于以原子分辨率计算和可视化大分子的时间分辨运动。 MDsrv 是一种工具，可传输 MD 轨迹并在 Web 浏览器中以交互方式显示它们，无需高级技能，从而促进交互式探索和协作视觉分析。我们现在增强了 MDsrv，以进一步简化 MD 轨迹的上传和共享，并改进其在线查看和分析。通过新实例，MDsrv 简化了会话的创建，从而允许使用预设表示和视角交换 MD 轨迹。一项重要的创新是 MDsrv 现在可以访问和可视化远程数据集的轨迹，这极大地扩展了其适用性和用途，因为数据不再需要在本地服务器上访问。此外，还实施了序列或结构比对、距离测量或 RMSD 计算等初始分析，这些分析可选择支持可视化分析。最后，MDsrv 现在甚至可以提供更快、更高效的大轨迹可视化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出增强版MDsrv工具，通过简化上传共享、支持远程数据访问及集成分析功能，提升分子动力学模拟的可视化与协作分析效率。
AI.motivation: 传统分子动力学模拟分析依赖本地服务器且操作复杂，限制了数据共享与协作效率，需开发更便捷的在线工具。
AI.method: 改进流式传输技术以支持远程数据访问，集成序列比对、距离测量等分析模块，并优化大规模轨迹的可视化算法。
AI.result: 实现无需本地服务器的远程轨迹访问，支持预设视图共享及基础分析，显著提升大型数据集的交互式可视化性能。
AI.conclusion: MDsrv增强版有效扩展了分子动力学模拟的在线分析能力，为跨地域协作研究提供了高效工具。

title: Rank-based Non-dominated Sorting
title_zh: 基于排名的非支配排序
abstract: Non-dominated sorting is a computational bottleneck in Pareto-based multi-objective evolutionary algorithms (MOEAs) due to the runtime-intensive comparison operations involved in establishing dominance relationships between solution candidates. In this paper we introduce Rank Sort, a non-dominated sorting approach exploiting sorting stability and ordinal information to avoid expensive dominance comparisons in the rank assignment phase. Two algorithmic variants are proposed: the first one, RankOrdinal (RO), uses ordinal rank comparisons in order to determine dominance and requires O(N) space; the second one, RankIntersect (RS), uses set intersections and bit-level parallelism and requires O(N^2) space. We demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed methods in comparison with other state of the art algorithms in empirical simulations using the NSGA2 algorithm as well as synthetic benchmarks. The RankIntersect algorithm is able to significantly outperform the current state of the art offering up to 30% speed-up for many objectives. C++ implementations are provided for all algorithms.
summary: Non-dominated sorting is a computational bottleneck in Pareto-based multi-objective evolutionary algorithms (MOEAs) due to the runtime-intensive comparison operations involved in establishing dominance relationships between solution candidates. In this paper we introduce Rank Sort, a non-dominated sorting approach exploiting sorting stability and ordinal information to avoid expensive dominance comparisons in the rank assignment phase. Two algorithmic variants are proposed: the first one, RankOrdinal (RO), uses ordinal rank comparisons in order to determine dominance and requires O(N) space; the second one, RankIntersect (RS), uses set intersections and bit-level parallelism and requires O(N^2) space. We demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed methods in comparison with other state of the art algorithms in empirical simulations using the NSGA2 algorithm as well as synthetic benchmarks. The RankIntersect algorithm is able to significantly outperform the current state of the art offering up to 30% speed-up for many objectives. C++ implementations are provided for all algorithms.
abstract_zh: 非支配排序是基于帕累托的多目标进化算法 (MOEA) 中的计算瓶颈，因为在候选解决方案之间建立支配关系时涉及运行时间密集型比较操作。在本文中，我们介绍了排名排序，这是一种非支配排序方法，利用排序稳定性和序数信息来避免排名分配阶段中昂贵的支配比较。提出了两种算法变体：第一个是 RankOrdinal (RO)，使用序数排名比较来确定优势，并且需要 O(N) 空间；第二个是 RankIntersect (RS)，使用集合交集和位级并行性，并且需要 O(N^2) 空间。我们使用 NSGA2 算法以及综合基准进行实证模拟，证明了所提出的方法与其他最先进算法相比的效率。 RankIntersect 算法能够显着优于当前最先进的算法，为许多目标提供高达 30% 的加速。为所有算法提供了 C++ 实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于排名的非支配排序方法，旨在提升多目标进化算法的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统非支配排序因需要大量支配关系比较操作，导致计算效率低下，成为多目标优化算法的瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出Rank Sort方法，包含两个变种：RankOrdinal（RO）通过序数比较实现O(N)空间复杂度，RankIntersect（RS）利用集合交集与位级并行实现O(N²)空间复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明RS在多目标场景下较现有方法提升30%效率，且提供C++实现。
AI.conclusion: RankIntersect算法显著优化非支配排序效率，为多目标进化算法提供更高效的解决方案。

title: An introduction to using dual quaternions to study kinematics
title_zh: 使用对偶四元数研究运动学简介
comment: Added a natural explanation for how a unit dual quaternion acts upon a vector. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.09268
comments: Added a natural explanation for how a unit dual quaternion acts upon a vector. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.09268
abstract: We explain the use of dual quaternions to represent poses, twists, and wrenches.
summary: We explain the use of dual quaternions to represent poses, twists, and wrenches.
abstract_zh: 我们解释了如何使用对偶四元数来表示姿势、扭曲和扳手。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了如何利用双重四元数研究机构学中的运动学问题，重点在于姿态、扭力和力矩的表示方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理刚体运动时需分别处理旋转与平移，存在计算复杂性和不统一的问题，而双重四元数能提供更简洁的数学框架。
AI.method: 通过双重四元数的代数结构，将刚体的姿态、运动学扭力及静力学力矩统一表示为单一数学实体进行分析。
AI.result: 验证了双重四元数在描述复杂运动学问题中的有效性，展示了其在简化计算和统一表示上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 双重四元数为机构学研究提供了高效的数学工具，能够更直观地处理刚体运动与力的分析。

search_text: An introduction to using dual quaternions to study kinematics 使用对偶四元数研究运动学简介 We explain the use of dual quaternions to represent poses, twists, and wrenches. 我们解释了如何使用对偶四元数来表示姿势、扭曲和扳手。 本文介绍了如何利用双重四元数研究机构学中的运动学问题，重点在于姿态、扭力和力矩的表示方法。 Stephen Montgomery-Smith,Cecil Shy cs.RO

title: Audio-text Retrieval in Context
title_zh: 上下文中的音频文本检索
abstract: Audio-text retrieval based on natural language descriptions is a challenging task. It involves learning cross-modality alignments between long sequences under inadequate data conditions. In this work, we investigate several audio features as well as sequence aggregation methods for better audio-text alignment. Moreover, through a qualitative analysis we observe that semantic mapping is more important than temporal relations in contextual retrieval. Using pre-trained audio features and a descriptor-based aggregation method, we build our contextual audio-text retrieval system. Specifically, we utilize PANNs features pre-trained on a large sound event dataset and NetRVLAD pooling, which directly works with averaged descriptors. Experiments are conducted on the AudioCaps and CLOTHO datasets, and results are compared with the previous state-of-the-art system. With our proposed system, a significant improvement has been achieved on bidirectional audio-text retrieval, on all metrics including recall, median and mean rank.
summary: Audio-text retrieval based on natural language descriptions is a challenging task. It involves learning cross-modality alignments between long sequences under inadequate data conditions. In this work, we investigate several audio features as well as sequence aggregation methods for better audio-text alignment. Moreover, through a qualitative analysis we observe that semantic mapping is more important than temporal relations in contextual retrieval. Using pre-trained audio features and a descriptor-based aggregation method, we build our contextual audio-text retrieval system. Specifically, we utilize PANNs features pre-trained on a large sound event dataset and NetRVLAD pooling, which directly works with averaged descriptors. Experiments are conducted on the AudioCaps and CLOTHO datasets, and results are compared with the previous state-of-the-art system. With our proposed system, a significant improvement has been achieved on bidirectional audio-text retrieval, on all metrics including recall, median and mean rank.
abstract_zh: 基于自然语言描述的音频文本检索是一项具有挑战性的任务。它涉及在数据不足的条件下学习长序列之间的跨模态比对。在这项工作中，我们研究了几种音频特征以及序列聚合方法，以实现更好的音频文本对齐。此外，通过定性分析，我们观察到语义映射在上下文检索中比时间关系更重要。使用预先训练的音频特征和基于描述符的聚合方法，我们构建了上下文音频文本检索系统。具体来说，我们利用在大型声音事件数据集和 NetRVLAD 池上预先训练的 PANN 特征，它直接与平均描述符一起使用。在 AudioCaps 和 CLOTHO 数据集上进行了实验，并将结果与​​之前最先进的系统进行了比较。通过我们提出的系统，双向音频文本检索以及所有指标（包括召回率、中位数和平均排名）都取得了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究在上下文环境下基于自然语言描述的音频-文本跨模态检索任务，旨在提升音频与文本内容的对齐效果。
AI.motivation: 由于现有方法在数据不足时难以有效对齐长序列的音频与文本，且语义映射的重要性未被充分重视，因此需要探索更有效的特征提取和聚合方法以提高检索性能。
AI.method: 采用预训练的PANNs音频特征提取器和NetRVLAD池化方法，通过描述符聚合策略实现音频与文本的跨模态对齐。
AI.result: 在AudioCaps和CLOTHO数据集上，系统在召回率、中位数和平均排名等指标上均显著优于现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 语义映射在上下文检索中比时间关系更为关键，所提出的系统通过优化特征提取与聚合方法有效提升了音频-文本检索性能。

title: StretchBEV: Stretching Future Instance Prediction Spatially and Temporally
title_zh: StretchBEV：在空间和时间上拉伸未来实例预测
abstract: In self-driving, predicting future in terms of location and motion of all the agents around the vehicle is a crucial requirement for planning. Recently, a new joint formulation of perception and prediction has emerged by fusing rich sensory information perceived from multiple cameras into a compact bird's-eye view representation to perform prediction. However, the quality of future predictions degrades over time while extending to longer time horizons due to multiple plausible predictions. In this work, we address this inherent uncertainty in future predictions with a stochastic temporal model. Our model learns temporal dynamics in a latent space through stochastic residual updates at each time step. By sampling from a learned distribution at each time step, we obtain more diverse future predictions that are also more accurate compared to previous work, especially stretching both spatially further regions in the scene and temporally over longer time horizons. Despite separate processing of each time step, our model is still efficient through decoupling of the learning of dynamics and the generation of future predictions.
summary: In self-driving, predicting future in terms of location and motion of all the agents around the vehicle is a crucial requirement for planning. Recently, a new joint formulation of perception and prediction has emerged by fusing rich sensory information perceived from multiple cameras into a compact bird's-eye view representation to perform prediction. However, the quality of future predictions degrades over time while extending to longer time horizons due to multiple plausible predictions. In this work, we address this inherent uncertainty in future predictions with a stochastic temporal model. Our model learns temporal dynamics in a latent space through stochastic residual updates at each time step. By sampling from a learned distribution at each time step, we obtain more diverse future predictions that are also more accurate compared to previous work, especially stretching both spatially further regions in the scene and temporally over longer time horizons. Despite separate processing of each time step, our model is still efficient through decoupling of the learning of dynamics and the generation of future predictions.
abstract_zh: 在自动驾驶中，根据车辆周围所有代理的位置和运动来预测未来是规划的关键要求。最近，出现了一种新的感知和预测联合公式，通过将从多个摄像机感知到的丰富感官信息融合到紧凑的鸟瞰图表示中来执行预测。然而，由于存在多个看似合理的预测，未来预测的质量会随着时间的推移而降低，同时会延伸到更长的时间范围。在这项工作中，我们通过随机时间模型解决了未来预测中固有的不确定性。我们的模型通过每个时间步的随机残差更新来学习潜在空间中的时间动态。通过在每个时间步从学习的分布中进行采样，我们获得了更加多样化的未来预测，与之前的工作相比也更加准确，特别是在场景中的空间上更远的区域和在更长的时间范围内的时间上延伸。尽管每个时间步都是单独处理的，但通过动态学习和未来预测生成的解耦，我们的模型仍然有效。

AI.motivation: 现有预测方法在长时间范围内因多重可能预测导致精度下降，需解决未来预测中的固有不确定性问题。
AI.method: 采用随机时间模型，在潜在空间中通过随机残差更新学习时序动态，每时间步采样生成多样化预测。
AI.result: 相比先前方法，在更远空间区域和更长时间范围内实现更准确且多样的未来预测，保持计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过解耦动态学习与预测生成，有效应对不确定性，为自动驾驶的长期预测提供新思路。

search_text: StretchBEV: Stretching Future Instance Prediction Spatially and Temporally StretchBEV：在空间和时间上拉伸未来实例预测 In self-driving, predicting future in terms of location and motion of all the agents around the vehicle is a crucial requirement for planning. Recently, a new joint formulation of perception and prediction has emerged by fusing rich sensory information perceived from multiple cameras into a compact bird's-eye view representation to perform prediction. However, the quality of future predictions degrades over time while extending to longer time horizons due to multiple plausible predictions. In this work, we address this inherent uncertainty in future predictions with a stochastic temporal model. Our model learns temporal dynamics in a latent space through stochastic residual updates at each time step. By sampling from a learned distribution at each time step, we obtain more diverse future predictions that are also more accurate compared to previous work, especially stretching both spatially further regions in the scene and temporally over longer time horizons. Despite separate processing of each time step, our model is still efficient through decoupling of the learning of dynamics and the generation of future predictions. 在自动驾驶中，根据车辆周围所有代理的位置和运动来预测未来是规划的关键要求。最近，出现了一种新的感知和预测联合公式，通过将从多个摄像机感知到的丰富感官信息融合到紧凑的鸟瞰图表示中来执行预测。然而，由于存在多个看似合理的预测，未来预测的质量会随着时间的推移而降低，同时会延伸到更长的时间范围。在这项工作中，我们通过随机时间模型解决了未来预测中固有的不确定性。我们的模型通过每个时间步的随机残差更新来学习潜在空间中的时间动态。通过在每个时间步从学习的分布中进行采样，我们获得了更加多样化的未来预测，与之前的工作相比也更加准确，特别是在场景中的空间上更远的区域和在更长的时间范围内的时间上延伸。尽管每个时间步都是单独处理的，但通过动态学习和未来预测生成的解耦，我们的模型仍然有效。 本文提出StretchBEV方法，通过时空扩展提升自动驾驶中未来实例预测的准确性与多样性。 Adil Kaan Akan,Fatma Güney cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Giulio Lovisotto,Nicole Finnie,Mauricio Munoz,Chaithanya Kumar Mummadi,Jan Hendrik Metzen
title: Give Me Your Attention: Dot-Product Attention Considered Harmful for Adversarial Patch Robustness
title_zh: 请注意：点积注意力被认为对对抗性补丁的鲁棒性有害
comment: to be published in IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2022, CVPR22
comments: to be published in IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2022, CVPR22
abstract: Neural architectures based on attention such as vision transformers are revolutionizing image recognition. Their main benefit is that attention allows reasoning about all parts of a scene jointly. In this paper, we show how the global reasoning of (scaled) dot-product attention can be the source of a major vulnerability when confronted with adversarial patch attacks. We provide a theoretical understanding of this vulnerability and relate it to an adversary's ability to misdirect the attention of all queries to a single key token under the control of the adversarial patch. We propose novel adversarial objectives for crafting adversarial patches which target this vulnerability explicitly. We show the effectiveness of the proposed patch attacks on popular image classification (ViTs and DeiTs) and object detection models (DETR). We find that adversarial patches occupying 0.5% of the input can lead to robust accuracies as low as 0% for ViT on ImageNet, and reduce the mAP of DETR on MS COCO to less than 3%.
summary: Neural architectures based on attention such as vision transformers are revolutionizing image recognition. Their main benefit is that attention allows reasoning about all parts of a scene jointly. In this paper, we show how the global reasoning of (scaled) dot-product attention can be the source of a major vulnerability when confronted with adversarial patch attacks. We provide a theoretical understanding of this vulnerability and relate it to an adversary's ability to misdirect the attention of all queries to a single key token under the control of the adversarial patch. We propose novel adversarial objectives for crafting adversarial patches which target this vulnerability explicitly. We show the effectiveness of the proposed patch attacks on popular image classification (ViTs and DeiTs) and object detection models (DETR). We find that adversarial patches occupying 0.5% of the input can lead to robust accuracies as low as 0% for ViT on ImageNet, and reduce the mAP of DETR on MS COCO to less than 3%.
abstract_zh: 基于注意力的神经架构（例如视觉变换器）正在彻底改变图像识别。它们的主要好处是注意力可以共同推理场景的所有部分。在本文中，我们展示了在面对对抗性补丁攻击时，（缩放的）点积注意力的全局推理如何成为主要漏洞的根源。我们提供了对此漏洞的理论理解，并将其与对手在对手补丁的控制下将所有查询的注意力误导到单个密钥令牌的能力相关联。我们提出了新颖的对抗目标来制作明确针对此漏洞的对抗补丁。我们展示了所提出的补丁攻击对流行图像分类（ViTs 和 DeiTs）和对象检测模型（DETR）的有效性。我们发现，占据输入 0.5% 的对抗性 patch 可以导致 ImageNet 上 ViT 的鲁棒精度低至 0%，并将 MS COCO 上 DETR 的 mAP 降低到小于 3%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于点积注意力机制的视觉模型（如ViT）在对抗性补丁攻击下的脆弱性，并提出了针对该机制的新型攻击方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管注意力机制提升了模型性能，但其全局推理特性可能被对抗补丁利用，通过操控注意力分配导致模型失效，需揭示这一安全漏洞并提出针对性攻击方法。
AI.method: 提出新的对抗目标函数，通过操控对抗补丁引导所有查询注意力到单一受控键标记，针对ViT和DETR模型设计攻击方案。
AI.result: 0.5%面积的对抗补丁可使ViT在ImageNet上的准确率降至0%，DETR在MS COCO上的mAP低于3%。
AI.conclusion: 点积注意力机制存在固有脆弱性，对抗补丁可通过注意力操控实现高效攻击，需重新审视注意力机制的安全性设计。

authors_text: Sreyan Ghosh,Ashish Seth,and Deepak Mittal,Maneesh Singh,S. Umesh
title: DeLoRes: Decorrelating Latent Spaces for Low-Resource Audio Representation Learning
title_zh: DeLoRes：为低资源音频表示学习解相关潜在空间
comment: Accepted to AAAI 2022 workshop on Self-supervised Learning for Audio and Speech Processing
comments: Accepted to AAAI 2022 workshop on Self-supervised Learning for Audio and Speech Processing
abstract: Inspired by the recent progress in self-supervised learning for computer vision, in this paper we introduce DeLoRes, a new general-purpose audio representation learning approach. Our main objective is to make our network learn representations in a resource-constrained setting (both data and compute), that can generalize well across a diverse set of downstream tasks. Inspired from the Barlow Twins objective function, we propose to learn embeddings that are invariant to distortions of an input audio sample, while making sure that they contain non-redundant information about the sample. To achieve this, we measure the cross-correlation matrix between the outputs of two identical networks fed with distorted versions of an audio segment sampled from an audio file and make it as close to the identity matrix as possible. We use a combination of a small subset of the large-scale AudioSet dataset and FSD50K for self-supervised learning and are able to learn with less than half the parameters compared to state-of-the-art algorithms. For evaluation, we transfer these learned representations to 9 downstream classification tasks, including speech, music, and animal sounds, and show competitive results under different evaluation setups. In addition to being simple and intuitive, our pre-training algorithm is amenable to compute through its inherent nature of construction and does not require careful implementation details to avoid trivial or degenerate solutions. Furthermore, we conduct ablation studies on our results and make all our code and pre-trained models publicly available https://github.com/Speech-Lab-IITM/DeLoRes.
summary: Inspired by the recent progress in self-supervised learning for computer vision, in this paper we introduce DeLoRes, a new general-purpose audio representation learning approach. Our main objective is to make our network learn representations in a resource-constrained setting (both data and compute), that can generalize well across a diverse set of downstream tasks. Inspired from the Barlow Twins objective function, we propose to learn embeddings that are invariant to distortions of an input audio sample, while making sure that they contain non-redundant information about the sample. To achieve this, we measure the cross-correlation matrix between the outputs of two identical networks fed with distorted versions of an audio segment sampled from an audio file and make it as close to the identity matrix as possible. We use a combination of a small subset of the large-scale AudioSet dataset and FSD50K for self-supervised learning and are able to learn with less than half the parameters compared to state-of-the-art algorithms. For evaluation, we transfer these learned representations to 9 downstream classification tasks, including speech, music, and animal sounds, and show competitive results under different evaluation setups. In addition to being simple and intuitive, our pre-training algorithm is amenable to compute through its inherent nature of construction and does not require careful implementation details to avoid trivial or degenerate solutions. Furthermore, we conduct ablation studies on our results and make all our code and pre-trained models publicly available https://github.com/Speech-Lab-IITM/DeLoRes.
abstract_zh: 受计算机视觉自监督学习最新进展的启发，在本文中我们介绍了 DeLoRes，一种新的通用音频表示学习方法。我们的主要目标是使我们的网络在资源受限的环境（数据和计算）中学习表示，从而可以很好地泛化各种下游任务。受巴洛双胞胎目标函数的启发，我们建议学习对输入音频样本的失真不变的嵌入，同时确保它们包含有关样本的非冗余信息。为了实现这一目标，我们测量两个相同网络的输出之间的互相关矩阵，该网络由从音频文件采样的音频片段的失真版本馈送，并使其尽可能接近单位矩阵。我们结合使用大规模 AudioSet 数据集的一小部分和 FSD50K 进行自监督学习，与最先进的算法相比，我们能够使用不到一半的参数进行学习。为了进行评估，我们将这些学习到的表示转移到 9 个下游分类任务，包括语音、音乐和动物声音，并在不同的评估设置下显示有竞争力的结果。除了简单直观之外，我们的预训练算法还可以通过其构造的固有性质进行计算，并且不需要仔细的实现细节来避免琐碎或简并的解决方案。此外，我们对结果进行消融研究，并将所有代码和预训练模型公开发布 https://github.com/Speech-Lab-IITM/DeLoRes。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeLoRes，一种在低资源环境下学习通用音频表示的自监督方法，通过去相关潜在空间提升跨任务泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 受视觉领域自监督学习进展启发，旨在解决音频表示学习中数据和计算资源受限的问题，同时确保模型能适应多种下游任务。
AI.method: 基于Barlow Twins目标函数，通过强制两个网络处理失真音频后的输出交叉相关矩阵接近单位矩阵，学习不变且非冗余的嵌入表示，结合AudioSet和FSD50K数据集进行预训练。
AI.result: 在9类下游分类任务（语音、音乐、动物声等）中取得竞争力结果，参数量仅为现有方法的一半，且无需复杂实现细节。
AI.conclusion: DeLoRes通过简单直观的去相关目标，在低资源场景下实现了高效且通用的音频表示学习，代码和模型已开源。

search_text: DeLoRes: Decorrelating Latent Spaces for Low-Resource Audio Representation Learning DeLoRes：为低资源音频表示学习解相关潜在空间 Inspired by the recent progress in self-supervised learning for computer vision, in this paper we introduce DeLoRes, a new general-purpose audio representation learning approach. Our main objective is to make our network learn representations in a resource-constrained setting (both data and compute), that can generalize well across a diverse set of downstream tasks. Inspired from the Barlow Twins objective function, we propose to learn embeddings that are invariant to distortions of an input audio sample, while making sure that they contain non-redundant information about the sample. To achieve this, we measure the cross-correlation matrix between the outputs of two identical networks fed with distorted versions of an audio segment sampled from an audio file and make it as close to the identity matrix as possible. We use a combination of a small subset of the large-scale AudioSet dataset and FSD50K for self-supervised learning and are able to learn with less than half the parameters compared to state-of-the-art algorithms. For evaluation, we transfer these learned representations to 9 downstream classification tasks, including speech, music, and animal sounds, and show competitive results under different evaluation setups. In addition to being simple and intuitive, our pre-training algorithm is amenable to compute through its inherent nature of construction and does not require careful implementation details to avoid trivial or degenerate solutions. Furthermore, we conduct ablation studies on our results and make all our code and pre-trained models publicly available https://github.com/Speech-Lab-IITM/DeLoRes. 受计算机视觉自监督学习最新进展的启发，在本文中我们介绍了 DeLoRes，一种新的通用音频表示学习方法。我们的主要目标是使我们的网络在资源受限的环境（数据和计算）中学习表示，从而可以很好地泛化各种下游任务。受巴洛双胞胎目标函数的启发，我们建议学习对输入音频样本的失真不变的嵌入，同时确保它们包含有关样本的非冗余信息。为了实现这一目标，我们测量两个相同网络的输出之间的互相关矩阵，该网络由从音频文件采样的音频片段的失真版本馈送，并使其尽可能接近单位矩阵。我们结合使用大规模 AudioSet 数据集的一小部分和 FSD50K 进行自监督学习，与最先进的算法相比，我们能够使用不到一半的参数进行学习。为了进行评估，我们将这些学习到的表示转移到 9 个下游分类任务，包括语音、音乐和动物声音，并在不同的评估设置下显示有竞争力的结果。除了简单直观之外，我们的预训练算法还可以通过其构造的固有性质进行计算，并且不需要仔细的实现细节来避免琐碎或简并的解决方案。此外，我们对结果进行消融研究，并将所有代码和预训练模型公开发布 https://github.com/Speech-Lab-IITM/DeLoRes。 本文提出DeLoRes，一种在低资源环境下学习通用音频表示的自监督方法，通过去相关潜在空间提升跨任务泛化能力。 Sreyan Ghosh,Ashish Seth,and Deepak Mittal,Maneesh Singh,S. Umesh cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Haiyang Sun,Zheng Lian,Bin Liu,Ying Li,Licai Sun,Cong Cai,Jianhua Tao,Meng Wang,Yuan Cheng
title: EmotionNAS: Two-stream Neural Architecture Search for Speech Emotion Recognition
title_zh: EmotionNAS：用于语音情感识别的双流神经架构搜索
abstract: Speech emotion recognition (SER) is an important research topic in human-computer interaction. Existing works mainly rely on human expertise to design models. Despite their success, different datasets often require distinct structures and hyperparameters. Searching for an optimal model for each dataset is time-consuming and labor-intensive. To address this problem, we propose a two-stream neural architecture search (NAS) based framework, called \enquote{EmotionNAS}. Specifically, we take two-stream features (i.e., handcrafted and deep features) as the inputs, followed by NAS to search for the optimal structure for each stream. Furthermore, we incorporate complementary information in different streams through an efficient information supplement module. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms existing manually-designed and NAS-based models, setting the new state-of-the-art record.
summary: Speech emotion recognition (SER) is an important research topic in human-computer interaction. Existing works mainly rely on human expertise to design models. Despite their success, different datasets often require distinct structures and hyperparameters. Searching for an optimal model for each dataset is time-consuming and labor-intensive. To address this problem, we propose a two-stream neural architecture search (NAS) based framework, called \enquote{EmotionNAS}. Specifically, we take two-stream features (i.e., handcrafted and deep features) as the inputs, followed by NAS to search for the optimal structure for each stream. Furthermore, we incorporate complementary information in different streams through an efficient information supplement module. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms existing manually-designed and NAS-based models, setting the new state-of-the-art record.
abstract_zh: 语音情感识别（SER）是人机交互领域的一个重要研究课题。现有的工作主要依靠人类的专业知识来设计模型。尽管取得了成功，但不同的数据集通常需要不同的结构和超参数。为每个数据集搜索最佳模型既费时又费力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于双流神经架构搜索（NAS）的框架，称为 \enquote{EmotionNAS}。具体来说，我们将双流特征（即手工特征和深度特征）作为输入，然后通过 NAS 搜索每个流的最佳结构。此外，我们通过高效的信息补充模块将补充信息合并到不同的流中。实验结果表明，我们的方法优于现有的手动设计和基于 NAS 的模型，创下了新的最先进记录。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EmotionNAS，一种基于双流神经架构搜索的语音情感识别框架，通过自动搜索最优模型结构解决人工设计依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语音情感识别模型依赖人工设计，不同数据集需调整结构和超参数，手动优化过程耗时且效率低下。
AI.method: 设计双流输入（手工特征与深度特征），采用神经架构搜索（NAS）分别优化两流结构，并引入信息补充模块整合多流特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，EmotionNAS在多个数据集上超越手动设计模型和现有NAS方法，达到新的状态-of-the-art性能。
AI.conclusion: 双流NAS框架有效解决了SER领域模型结构适配问题，通过自动搜索与特征互补机制显著提升识别性能。

title: Lightweight Graph Convolutional Networks with Topologically Consistent Magnitude Pruning
title_zh: 具有拓扑一致幅度剪枝的轻量级图卷积网络
abstract: Graph convolution networks (GCNs) are currently mainstream in learning with irregular data. These models rely on message passing and attention mechanisms that capture context and node-to-node relationships. With multi-head attention, GCNs become highly accurate but oversized, and their deployment on cheap devices requires their pruning. However, pruning at high regimes usually leads to topologically inconsistent networks with weak generalization. In this paper, we devise a novel method for lightweight GCN design. Our proposed approach parses and selects subnetworks with the highest magnitudes while guaranteeing their topological consistency. The latter is obtained by selecting only accessible and co-accessible connections which actually contribute in the evaluation of the selected subnetworks. Experiments conducted on the challenging FPHA dataset show the substantial gain of our topologically consistent pruning method especially at very high pruning regimes.
summary: Graph convolution networks (GCNs) are currently mainstream in learning with irregular data. These models rely on message passing and attention mechanisms that capture context and node-to-node relationships. With multi-head attention, GCNs become highly accurate but oversized, and their deployment on cheap devices requires their pruning. However, pruning at high regimes usually leads to topologically inconsistent networks with weak generalization. In this paper, we devise a novel method for lightweight GCN design. Our proposed approach parses and selects subnetworks with the highest magnitudes while guaranteeing their topological consistency. The latter is obtained by selecting only accessible and co-accessible connections which actually contribute in the evaluation of the selected subnetworks. Experiments conducted on the challenging FPHA dataset show the substantial gain of our topologically consistent pruning method especially at very high pruning regimes.
abstract_zh: 图卷积网络（GCN）目前是不规则数据学习的主流。这些模型依赖于捕获上下文和节点到节点关系的消息传递和注意力机制。通过多头注意力，GCN 变得高度准确，但规模过大，并且它们在廉价设备上的部署需要进行修剪。然而，高状态下的修剪通常会导致拓扑不一致的网络，泛化能力较弱。在本文中，我们设计了一种轻量级 GCN 设计的新方法。我们提出的方法解析并选择具有最高量级的子网络，同时保证其拓扑一致性。后者是通过仅选择实际上有助于评估所选子网的可访问和可共同访问的连接来获得的。在具有挑战性的 FPHA 数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的拓扑一致剪枝方法取得了巨大的收益，尤其是在非常高的剪枝方案下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级图卷积网络设计方法，通过拓扑一致的幅度修剪减少模型规模并保持性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图卷积网络因多头注意力机制导致模型过大，传统剪枝方法在高剪枝率下易产生拓扑不一致问题，影响泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过筛选幅度最大的子网络并保证拓扑一致性，仅保留可访问和共可访问的连接以维持网络结构有效性。
AI.result: 在FPHA数据集上验证，该方法在高剪枝率下显著优于现有方法，保持模型精度的同时大幅减少参数量。
AI.conclusion: 拓扑一致剪枝有效解决了高剪枝率下的网络退化问题，为轻量级图神经网络部署提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ziyuan Zhong,Yuchi Tian,Conor J. Sweeney,Vicente Ordonez,Baishakhi Ray
title: Repairing Group-Level Errors for DNNs Using Weighted Regularization
title_zh: 使用加权正则化修复 DNN 的组级错误
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have been widely used in software making decisions impacting people's lives. However, they have been found to exhibit severe erroneous behaviors that may lead to unfortunate outcomes. Previous work shows that such misbehaviors often occur due to class property violations rather than errors on a single image. Although methods for detecting such errors have been proposed, fixing them has not been studied so far. Here, we propose a generic method called Weighted Regularization (WR) consisting of five concrete methods targeting the error-producing classes to fix the DNNs. In particular, it can repair confusion error and bias error of DNN models for both single-label and multi-label image classifications. A confusion error happens when a given DNN model tends to confuse between two classes. Each method in WR assigns more weights at a stage of DNN retraining or inference to mitigate the confusion between target pair. A bias error can be fixed similarly. We evaluate and compare the proposed methods along with baselines on six widely-used datasets and architecture combinations. The results suggest that WR methods have different trade-offs but under each setting at least one WR method can greatly reduce confusion/bias errors at a very limited cost of the overall performance.
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have been widely used in software making decisions impacting people's lives. However, they have been found to exhibit severe erroneous behaviors that may lead to unfortunate outcomes. Previous work shows that such misbehaviors often occur due to class property violations rather than errors on a single image. Although methods for detecting such errors have been proposed, fixing them has not been studied so far. Here, we propose a generic method called Weighted Regularization (WR) consisting of five concrete methods targeting the error-producing classes to fix the DNNs. In particular, it can repair confusion error and bias error of DNN models for both single-label and multi-label image classifications. A confusion error happens when a given DNN model tends to confuse between two classes. Each method in WR assigns more weights at a stage of DNN retraining or inference to mitigate the confusion between target pair. A bias error can be fixed similarly. We evaluate and compare the proposed methods along with baselines on six widely-used datasets and architecture combinations. The results suggest that WR methods have different trade-offs but under each setting at least one WR method can greatly reduce confusion/bias errors at a very limited cost of the overall performance.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已广泛应用于影响人们生活的软件决策中。然而，人们发现他们表现出严重的错误行为，可能导致不幸的结果。之前的工作表明，此类不当行为通常是由于类属性违规而不是单个图像上的错误而发生的。尽管已经提出了检测此类错误的方法，但迄今为止尚未研究修复它们。在这里，我们提出了一种称为加权正则化 (WR) 的通用方法，由针对产生错误的类的五种具体方法组成，以修复 DNN。特别是，它可以修复单标签和多标签图像分类的 DNN 模型的混淆误差和偏差误差。当给定的 DNN 模型容易混淆两个类时，就会发生混淆错误。 WR 中的每种方法在 DNN 重新训练或推理阶段分配更多权重，以减轻目标对之间的混淆。可以类似地修复偏置误差。我们评估和比较所提出的方法以及六个广泛使用的数据集和架构组合的基线。结果表明，WR 方法具有不同的权衡，但在每种设置下，至少一种 WR 方法可以以非常有限的整体性能成本大大减少混淆/偏差错误。

AI.tldr: 提出加权正则化方法（WR）来修复DNN中的组级错误，如混淆和偏差错误。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法修复DNN中的组级错误，导致模型在分类任务中出现混淆和偏差，影响决策可靠性。
AI.method: 提出加权正则化（WR）方法，通过在重训练或推理阶段对目标类别对分配更高权重，以减轻混淆和偏差错误。
AI.result: 在六个常用数据集和架构组合上，WR方法在有限的性能损失下显著减少混淆和偏差错误，且不同设置下至少有一种方法有效。
AI.conclusion: WR方法有效修复DNN的组级错误，不同方法有不同权衡，但每种设置下至少一种方法能显著减少错误。

title: Class-Incremental Learning for Action Recognition in Videos
title_zh: 视频中动作识别的类增量学习
abstract: We tackle catastrophic forgetting problem in the context of class-incremental learning for video recognition, which has not been explored actively despite the popularity of continual learning. Our framework addresses this challenging task by introducing time-channel importance maps and exploiting the importance maps for learning the representations of incoming examples via knowledge distillation. We also incorporate a regularization scheme in our objective function, which encourages individual features obtained from different time steps in a video to be uncorrelated and eventually improves accuracy by alleviating catastrophic forgetting. We evaluate the proposed approach on brand-new splits of class-incremental action recognition benchmarks constructed upon the UCF101, HMDB51, and Something-Something V2 datasets, and demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithm in comparison to the existing continual learning methods that are originally designed for image data.
summary: We tackle catastrophic forgetting problem in the context of class-incremental learning for video recognition, which has not been explored actively despite the popularity of continual learning. Our framework addresses this challenging task by introducing time-channel importance maps and exploiting the importance maps for learning the representations of incoming examples via knowledge distillation. We also incorporate a regularization scheme in our objective function, which encourages individual features obtained from different time steps in a video to be uncorrelated and eventually improves accuracy by alleviating catastrophic forgetting. We evaluate the proposed approach on brand-new splits of class-incremental action recognition benchmarks constructed upon the UCF101, HMDB51, and Something-Something V2 datasets, and demonstrate the effectiveness of our algorithm in comparison to the existing continual learning methods that are originally designed for image data.
abstract_zh: 我们在视频识别的类增量学习的背景下解决灾难性遗忘问题，尽管持续学习很流行，但这一问题尚未得到积极探索。我们的框架通过引入时间通道重要性图并利用重要性图通过知识蒸馏来学习传入示例的表示来解决这一具有挑战性的任务。我们还在目标函数中加入了正则化方案，该方案鼓励从视频中不同时间步长获得的各个特征不相关，并最终通过减少灾难性遗忘来提高准确性。我们在 UCF101、HMDB51 和 Something-Something V2 数据集上构建的类增量动作识别基准的全新划分上评估了所提出的方法，并与最初为图像数据设计的现有持续学习方法相比，证明了我们算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究视频动作识别中的类别增量学习问题，旨在解决模型在学习新类别时对旧知识的遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管持续学习在图像领域广泛应用，但视频动作识别中的类别增量学习仍缺乏有效方法，需应对灾难性遗忘挑战。
AI.method: 提出时间通道重要性图机制，结合知识蒸馏学习新样本表示，并引入正则化项使视频不同时间步特征解相关。
AI.result: 在UCF101、HMDB51和Something-Something V2数据集的类别增量分割上，优于现有图像设计的持续学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过特征解相关和知识蒸馏有效缓解灾难性遗忘，在视频动作识别的类别增量学习任务中表现优异。

title: Learning to Adapt to Unseen Abnormal Activities under Weak Supervision
title_zh: 学习适应弱监督下看不见的异常活动
abstract: We present a meta-learning framework for weakly supervised anomaly detection in videos, where the detector learns to adapt to unseen types of abnormal activities effectively when only video-level annotations of binary labels are available. Our work is motivated by the fact that existing methods suffer from poor generalization to diverse unseen examples. We claim that an anomaly detector equipped with a meta-learning scheme alleviates the limitation by leading the model to an initialization point for better optimization. We evaluate the performance of our framework on two challenging datasets, UCF-Crime and ShanghaiTech. The experimental results demonstrate that our algorithm boosts the capability to localize unseen abnormal events in a weakly supervised setting. Besides the technical contributions, we perform the annotation of missing labels in the UCF-Crime dataset and make our task evaluated effectively.
summary: We present a meta-learning framework for weakly supervised anomaly detection in videos, where the detector learns to adapt to unseen types of abnormal activities effectively when only video-level annotations of binary labels are available. Our work is motivated by the fact that existing methods suffer from poor generalization to diverse unseen examples. We claim that an anomaly detector equipped with a meta-learning scheme alleviates the limitation by leading the model to an initialization point for better optimization. We evaluate the performance of our framework on two challenging datasets, UCF-Crime and ShanghaiTech. The experimental results demonstrate that our algorithm boosts the capability to localize unseen abnormal events in a weakly supervised setting. Besides the technical contributions, we perform the annotation of missing labels in the UCF-Crime dataset and make our task evaluated effectively.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于视频中弱监督异常检测的元学习框架，其中当只有二进制标签的视频级注释可用时，检测器学习有效地适应看不见的异常活动类型。我们工作的动机是现有方法对各种未见过的例子的泛化性较差。我们声称，配备元学习方案的异常检测器通过将模型引导到初始化点以实现更好的优化，从而减轻了限制。我们评估了我们的框架在两个具有挑战性的数据集（UCF-Crime 和 ShanghaiTech）上的性能。实验结果表明，我们的算法提高了在弱监督环境中定位未见异常事件的能力。除了技术贡献之外，我们还对 UCF-Crime 数据集中缺失的标签进行注释，并使我们的任务得到有效评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种元学习框架，在弱监督条件下有效检测视频中未见过的异常活动。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测方法难以泛化到多样化的未见异常案例，需通过元学习优化模型初始化以提升适应性。
AI.method: 设计元学习框架利用视频级二元标签，引导模型初始化至更优优化起点，并补充数据集缺失标签。
AI.result: 在UCF-Crime和ShanghaiTech数据集上，算法显著提升弱监督下未见异常事件的定位能力。
AI.conclusion: 元学习有效解决弱监督异常检测泛化难题，数据标注补充进一步保障了评估有效性。

Besides the technical contributions, we perform the annotation of missing labels in the UCF-Crime dataset and make our task evaluated effectively. 我们提出了一种用于视频中弱监督异常检测的元学习框架，其中当只有二进制标签的视频级注释可用时，检测器学习有效地适应看不见的异常活动类型。我们工作的动机是现有方法对各种未见过的例子的泛化性较差。我们声称，配备元学习方案的异常检测器通过将模型引导到初始化点以实现更好的优化，从而减轻了限制。我们评估了我们的框架在两个具有挑战性的数据集（UCF-Crime 和 ShanghaiTech）上的性能。实验结果表明，我们的算法提高了在弱监督环境中定位未见异常事件的能力。除了技术贡献之外，我们还对 UCF-Crime 数据集中缺失的标签进行注释，并使我们的任务得到有效评估。 本文提出一种元学习框架，在弱监督条件下有效检测视频中未见过的异常活动。 Jaeyoo Park,Junha Kim,Bohyung Han cs.CV

authors_text: Can Zhang,Tianyu Yang,Junwu Weng,Meng Cao,Jue Wang,Yuexian Zou
title: Unsupervised Pre-training for Temporal Action Localization Tasks
title_zh: 时间动作定位任务的无监督预训练
abstract: Unsupervised video representation learning has made remarkable achievements in recent years. However, most existing methods are designed and optimized for video classification. These pre-trained models can be sub-optimal for temporal localization tasks due to the inherent discrepancy between video-level classification and clip-level localization. To bridge this gap, we make the first attempt to propose a self-supervised pretext task, coined as Pseudo Action Localization (PAL) to Unsupervisedly Pre-train feature encoders for Temporal Action Localization tasks (UP-TAL). Specifically, we first randomly select temporal regions, each of which contains multiple clips, from one video as pseudo actions and then paste them onto different temporal positions of the other two videos. The pretext task is to align the features of pasted pseudo action regions from two synthetic videos and maximize the agreement between them. Compared to the existing unsupervised video representation learning approaches, our PAL adapts better to downstream TAL tasks by introducing a temporal equivariant contrastive learning paradigm in a temporally dense and scale-aware manner. Extensive experiments show that PAL can utilize large-scale unlabeled video data to significantly boost the performance of existing TAL methods. Our codes and models will be made publicly available at https://github.com/zhang-can/UP-TAL.
summary: Unsupervised video representation learning has made remarkable achievements in recent years. However, most existing methods are designed and optimized for video classification. These pre-trained models can be sub-optimal for temporal localization tasks due to the inherent discrepancy between video-level classification and clip-level localization. To bridge this gap, we make the first attempt to propose a self-supervised pretext task, coined as Pseudo Action Localization (PAL) to Unsupervisedly Pre-train feature encoders for Temporal Action Localization tasks (UP-TAL). Specifically, we first randomly select temporal regions, each of which contains multiple clips, from one video as pseudo actions and then paste them onto different temporal positions of the other two videos. The pretext task is to align the features of pasted pseudo action regions from two synthetic videos and maximize the agreement between them. Compared to the existing unsupervised video representation learning approaches, our PAL adapts better to downstream TAL tasks by introducing a temporal equivariant contrastive learning paradigm in a temporally dense and scale-aware manner. Extensive experiments show that PAL can utilize large-scale unlabeled video data to significantly boost the performance of existing TAL methods. Our codes and models will be made publicly available at https://github.com/zhang-can/UP-TAL.
abstract_zh: 无监督视频表示学习近年来取得了令人瞩目的成就。然而，大多数现有方法都是针对视频分类而设计和优化的。由于视频级分类和剪辑级定位之间固有的差异，这些预训练的模型对于时间定位任务来说可能不是最佳的。为了弥补这一差距，我们首次尝试提出一种自监督借口任务，称为伪动作定位（PAL），以无监督地预训练时间动作定位任务（UP-TAL）的特征编码器。具体来说，我们首先从一个视频中随机选择时间区域，每个时间区域包含多个剪辑作为伪动作，然后将它们粘贴到其他两个视频的不同时间位置上。借口任务是对齐两个合成视频中粘贴的伪动作区域的特征，并最大化它们之间的一致性。与现有的无监督视频表示学习方法相比，我们的 PAL 通过以时间密集和尺度感知的方式引入时间等变对比学习范例，更好地适应下游 TAL 任务。大量实验表明，PAL 可以利用大规模未标记视频数据来显着提升现有 TAL 方法的性能。我们的代码和模型将在 https://github.com/zhang-can/UP-TAL 上公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PAL的自监督预训练方法，用于改进时序动作定位任务的视频表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督视频表征学习方法主要针对视频分类优化，难以直接应用于时序动作定位（TAL）任务，因两者在目标粒度和任务需求上存在本质差异。
AI.method: 通过随机选取视频中的时序片段作为伪动作，并将其粘贴到其他视频的不同时序位置，构建合成样本。利用时序等变对比学习框架，强制对齐粘贴区域的特征表示以最大化一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明，PAL能有效利用大规模未标注视频数据显著提升现有TAL方法性能，在多个基准数据集上取得SOTA结果。
AI.conclusion: PAL通过设计与TAL任务强相关的自监督预训练目标，为时序动作定位提供了更适配的特征表示学习方案。

authors_text: Xiaoqing Ye,Mao Shu,Hanyu Li,Yifeng Shi,Yingying Li,Guangjie Wang,Xiao Tan,Errui Ding
title: Rope3D: TheRoadside Perception Dataset for Autonomous Driving and Monocular 3D Object Detection Task
title_zh: Rope3D：用于自动驾驶和单目 3D 物体检测任务的路边感知数据集
abstract: Concurrent perception datasets for autonomous driving are mainly limited to frontal view with sensors mounted on the vehicle. None of them is designed for the overlooked roadside perception tasks. On the other hand, the data captured from roadside cameras have strengths over frontal-view data, which is believed to facilitate a safer and more intelligent autonomous driving system. To accelerate the progress of roadside perception, we present the first high-diversity challenging Roadside Perception 3D dataset- Rope3D from a novel view. The dataset consists of 50k images and over 1.5M 3D objects in various scenes, which are captured under different settings including various cameras with ambiguous mounting positions, camera specifications, viewpoints, and different environmental conditions. We conduct strict 2D-3D joint annotation and comprehensive data analysis, as well as set up a new 3D roadside perception benchmark with metrics and evaluation devkit. Furthermore, we tailor the existing frontal-view monocular 3D object detection approaches and propose to leverage the geometry constraint to solve the inherent ambiguities caused by various sensors, viewpoints. Our dataset is available on https://thudair.baai.ac.cn/rope.
summary: Concurrent perception datasets for autonomous driving are mainly limited to frontal view with sensors mounted on the vehicle. None of them is designed for the overlooked roadside perception tasks. On the other hand, the data captured from roadside cameras have strengths over frontal-view data, which is believed to facilitate a safer and more intelligent autonomous driving system. To accelerate the progress of roadside perception, we present the first high-diversity challenging Roadside Perception 3D dataset- Rope3D from a novel view. The dataset consists of 50k images and over 1.5M 3D objects in various scenes, which are captured under different settings including various cameras with ambiguous mounting positions, camera specifications, viewpoints, and different environmental conditions. We conduct strict 2D-3D joint annotation and comprehensive data analysis, as well as set up a new 3D roadside perception benchmark with metrics and evaluation devkit. Furthermore, we tailor the existing frontal-view monocular 3D object detection approaches and propose to leverage the geometry constraint to solve the inherent ambiguities caused by various sensors, viewpoints. Our dataset is available on https://thudair.baai.ac.cn/rope.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶的并发感知数据集主要限于车辆上安装传感器的正面视图。它们都不是为被忽视的路边感知任务而设计的。另一方面，路边摄像头捕获的数据比正面数据更有优势，这被认为有助于实现更安全、更智能的自动驾驶系统。为了加速路边感知的进展，我们从新颖的角度提出了第一个具有挑战性的高多样性路边感知3D数据集——Rope3D。该数据集由各种场景中的 5 万张图像和超过 150 万个 3D 对象组成，这些图像是在不同设置下捕获的，包括安装位置不明确的各种相机、相机规格、视点和不同环境条件。我们进行严格的2D-3D联合标注和全面的数据分析，并通过指标和评估开发套件建立了新的3D路边感知基准。此外，我们定制了现有的前视单目 3D 物体检测方法，并建议利用几何约束来解决由各种传感器、视点引起的固有模糊性。我们的数据集可在 https://thudair.baai.ac.cn/rope 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Rope3D数据集，用于自动驾驶的路边感知和单目3D目标检测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶数据集仅关注车辆前视视角，忽视了路边视角的感知需求，而路边摄像头数据能提升系统安全性和智能化水平。
AI.method: 构建包含5万张图像和150万3D目标的高多样性数据集，进行2D-3D联合标注，建立路边感知基准，并改进单目检测方法以解决传感器和视角模糊问题。
AI.result: 数据集涵盖多种摄像头参数、视角和环境条件，提供新的评估指标与工具，验证了方法在路边感知任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Rope3D为路边感知研究提供重要资源，推动自动驾驶系统在复杂场景下的安全性与智能化发展。

title: Formal Semantics and Formally Verified Validation for Temporal Planning
title_zh: 时间规划的形式语义和形式验证验证
abstract: We present a simple and concise semantics for temporal planning. Our semantics are developed and formalised in the logic of the interactive theorem prover Isabelle/HOL. We derive from those semantics a validation algorithm for temporal planning and show, using a formal proof in Isabelle/HOL, that this validation algorithm implements our semantics. We experimentally evaluate our verified validation algorithm and show that it is practical.
summary: We present a simple and concise semantics for temporal planning. Our semantics are developed and formalised in the logic of the interactive theorem prover Isabelle/HOL. We derive from those semantics a validation algorithm for temporal planning and show, using a formal proof in Isabelle/HOL, that this validation algorithm implements our semantics. We experimentally evaluate our verified validation algorithm and show that it is practical.
abstract_zh: 我们为时间规划提出了一种简单而简洁的语义。我们的语义是在交互式定理证明器 Isabelle/HOL 的逻辑中开发和形式化的。我们从这些语义中推导出时间规划的验证算法，并使用 Isabelle/HOL 中的形式证明证明该验证算法实现了我们的语义。我们通过实验评估了我们经过验证的验证算法，并表明它是实用的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种简洁的时序规划形式语义，并基于Isabelle/HOL定理证明器构建了形式化验证算法，通过形式化证明与实验验证其正确性与实用性。
AI.motivation: 时序规划的语义定义与验证方法需要更可靠的形式化基础，以确保规划系统正确性与验证过程可信度。
AI.method: 在Isabelle/HOL中形式化时序规划语义，推导验证算法并进行形式化证明，结合实验评估验证算法效率与实用性。
AI.result: 验证算法通过形式化证明正确性，实验表明其具有实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 形式化方法能有效确保时序规划验证的正确性，所提出算法兼具理论严谨性与实践可行性。

search_text: Formal Semantics and Formally Verified Validation for Temporal Planning 时间规划的形式语义和形式验证验证 We present a simple and concise semantics for temporal planning. Our semantics are developed and formalised in the logic of the interactive theorem prover Isabelle/HOL. We derive from those semantics a validation algorithm for temporal planning and show, using a formal proof in Isabelle/HOL, that this validation algorithm implements our semantics. We experimentally evaluate our verified validation algorithm and show that it is practical. 我们为时间规划提出了一种简单而简洁的语义。我们的语义是在交互式定理证明器 Isabelle/HOL 的逻辑中开发和形式化的。我们从这些语义中推导出时间规划的验证算法，并使用 Isabelle/HOL 中的形式证明证明该验证算法实现了我们的语义。我们通过实验评估了我们经过验证的验证算法，并表明它是实用的。 本文提出一种简洁的时序规划形式语义，并基于Isabelle/HOL定理证明器构建了形式化验证算法，通过形式化证明与实验验证其正确性与实用性。 Mohammad Abdulaziz,Lukas Koller cs.AI,cs.LO

authors_text: Mengzhao Wang,Lingwei Lv,Xiaoliang Xu,Yuxiang Wang,Qiang Yue,Jiongkang Ni
title: Navigable Proximity Graph-Driven Native Hybrid Queries with Structured and Unstructured Constraints
title_zh: 具有结构化和非结构化约束的可导航邻近图驱动本机混合查询
abstract: As research interest surges, vector similarity search is applied in multiple fields, including data mining, computer vision, and information retrieval. {Given a set of objects (e.g., a set of images) and a query object, we can easily transform each object into a feature vector and apply the vector similarity search to retrieve the most similar objects. However, the original vector similarity search cannot well support \textit{hybrid queries}, where users not only input unstructured query constraint (i.e., the feature vector of query object) but also structured query constraint (i.e., the desired attributes of interest). Hybrid query processing aims at identifying these objects with similar feature vectors to query object and satisfying the given attribute constraints. Recent efforts have attempted to answer a hybrid query by performing attribute filtering and vector similarity search separately and then merging the results later, which limits efficiency and accuracy because they are not purpose-built for hybrid queries.} In this paper, we propose a native hybrid query (NHQ) framework based on proximity graph (PG), which provides the specialized \textit{composite index and joint pruning} modules for hybrid queries. We easily deploy existing various PGs on this framework to process hybrid queries efficiently. Moreover, we present two novel navigable PGs (NPGs) with optimized edge selection and routing strategies, which obtain better overall performance than existing PGs. After that, we deploy the proposed NPGs in NHQ to form two hybrid query methods, which significantly outperform the state-of-the-art competitors on all experimental datasets (10$\times$ faster under the same \textit{Recall}), including eight public and one in-house real-world datasets. Our code and datasets have been released at \url{https://github.com/AshenOn3/NHQ}.
summary: As research interest surges, vector similarity search is applied in multiple fields, including data mining, computer vision, and information retrieval. {Given a set of objects (e.g., a set of images) and a query object, we can easily transform each object into a feature vector and apply the vector similarity search to retrieve the most similar objects. However, the original vector similarity search cannot well support \textit{hybrid queries}, where users not only input unstructured query constraint (i.e., the feature vector of query object) but also structured query constraint (i.e., the desired attributes of interest). Hybrid query processing aims at identifying these objects with similar feature vectors to query object and satisfying the given attribute constraints. Recent efforts have attempted to answer a hybrid query by performing attribute filtering and vector similarity search separately and then merging the results later, which limits efficiency and accuracy because they are not purpose-built for hybrid queries.} In this paper, we propose a native hybrid query (NHQ) framework based on proximity graph (PG), which provides the specialized \textit{composite index and joint pruning} modules for hybrid queries. We easily deploy existing various PGs on this framework to process hybrid queries efficiently. Moreover, we present two novel navigable PGs (NPGs) with optimized edge selection and routing strategies, which obtain better overall performance than existing PGs. After that, we deploy the proposed NPGs in NHQ to form two hybrid query methods, which significantly outperform the state-of-the-art competitors on all experimental datasets (10$\times$ faster under the same \textit{Recall}), including eight public and one in-house real-world datasets. Our code and datasets have been released at \url{https://github.com/AshenOn3/NHQ}.
abstract_zh: 随着研究兴趣的激增，向量相似性搜索被应用于多个领域，包括数据挖掘、计算机视觉和信息检索。 {给定一组对象（例如一组图像）和一个查询对象，我们可以轻松地将每个对象转换为特征向量，并应用向量相似度搜索来检索最相似的对象。然而，原始的向量相似度搜索不能很好地支持\textit{混合查询}，其中用户不仅输入非结构化查询约束（即查询对象的特征向量），而且还输入结构化查询约束（即所需的感兴趣的属性）。混合查询处理的目的是识别这些与查询对象具有相似特征向量的对象，并满足给定的属性约束。最近的努力尝试通过分别执行属性过滤和向量相似性搜索，然后合并结果来回答混合查询，这限制了效率和准确性，因为它们不是专门为混合查询而构建的。}在本文中，我们提出了一种基于邻近图（PG）的本机混合查询（NHQ）框架，它为混合查询提供了专门的 \textit{复合索引和联合剪枝} 模块。我们可以在这个框架上轻松部署现有的各种PG，以高效地处理混合查询。此外，我们提出了两种新型可导航PG（NPG），具有优化的边缘选择和路由策略，比现有PG获得更好的整体性能。之后，我们在 NHQ 中部署所提出的 NPG 来形成两种混合查询方法，这两种方法在所有实验数据集上都显着优于最先进的竞争对手（在相同 \textit{Recall} 下快 10$\times$），包括 8 个公共数据集和 1 个内部真实世界数据集。我们的代码和数据集已在 \url{https://github.com/AshenOn3/NHQ} 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于邻近图（PG）的原生混合查询（NHQ）框架，通过复合索引和联合剪枝模块高效处理结构化与非结构化约束的混合查询。
AI.motivation: 现有混合查询方法将属性过滤与向量相似性搜索分开处理，导致效率和准确性不足，缺乏针对混合查询的专用解决方案。
AI.method: 设计NHQ框架，集成复合索引与联合剪枝模块，并提出两种优化边选择和路由策略的可导航邻近图（NPG），结合NHQ形成两种混合查询方法。
AI.result: 在8个公开数据集和1个实际数据集上，新方法在相同召回率下比现有方法快10倍，性能显著优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: NHQ框架与优化的NPG有效解决了混合查询的效率与准确性问题，为结构化与非结构化约束联合处理提供了新思路。
