title: Learning Rules from Rewards
title_zh: 从奖励中学习规则
abstract: Humans can flexibly generalize knowledge across domains by leveraging structured relational representations. While prior research has shown how such representations support analogical reasoning, less is known about how they are recruited to guide adaptive behavior. We address this gap by introducing the Relational Regression Tree Learner (RRTL), a model that incrementally builds policies over structured relational inputs by selecting task-relevant relations during the learning process. RRTL is grounded in the framework of relational reinforcement learning but diverges from traditional approaches by focusing on ground (i.e., non-variabilized) rules that refer to specific object configurations. Across three Atari games of increasing relational complexity (Breakout, Pong, Demon Attack), the model learns to act effectively by identifying a small set of relevant relations from a broad pool of candidate relations. A comparative version of the model, which partitions the state space using relative magnitude values (e.g., "more", "same", "less"), showed more robust learning than a version using logical (binary) splits. These results provide a proof of principle that reinforcement signals can guide the selection of structured representations, offering a computational framework for understanding how relational knowledge is learned and deployed in adaptive behavior.
summary: Humans can flexibly generalize knowledge across domains by leveraging structured relational representations. While prior research has shown how such representations support analogical reasoning, less is known about how they are recruited to guide adaptive behavior. We address this gap by introducing the Relational Regression Tree Learner (RRTL), a model that incrementally builds policies over structured relational inputs by selecting task-relevant relations during the learning process. RRTL is grounded in the framework of relational reinforcement learning but diverges from traditional approaches by focusing on ground (i.e., non-variabilized) rules that refer to specific object configurations. Across three Atari games of increasing relational complexity (Breakout, Pong, Demon Attack), the model learns to act effectively by identifying a small set of relevant relations from a broad pool of candidate relations. A comparative version of the model, which partitions the state space using relative magnitude values (e.g., "more", "same", "less"), showed more robust learning than a version using logical (binary) splits. These results provide a proof of principle that reinforcement signals can guide the selection of structured representations, offering a computational framework for understanding how relational knowledge is learned and deployed in adaptive behavior.
abstract_zh: 人类可以通过利用结构化关系表示灵活地跨领域概括知识。虽然之前的研究已经表明这些表征如何支持类比推理，但人们对如何招募它们来指导适应性行为却知之甚少。我们通过引入关系回归树学习器（RRTL）来解决这一差距，该模型通过在学习过程中选择与任务相关的关系来逐步构建基于结构化关系输入的策略。 RRTL 基于关系强化学习的框架，但与传统方法不同，它专注于引用特定对象配置的基本（即非可变）规则。在关系复杂性不断增加的三款 Atari 游戏（Breakout、Pong、Demon Attack）中，该模型通过从大量候选关系中识别一小部分相关关系来学习如何有效地采取行动。该模型的比较版本使用相对幅度值（例如“更多”、“相同”、“更少”）来划分状态空间，显示出比使用逻辑（二进制）分割的版本更强大的学习能力。这些结果提供了强化信号可以指导结构化表示的选择的原理证明，为理解如何在自适应行为中学习和部署关系知识提供了计算框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于关系强化学习的模型——关系回归树学习器（RRTL），通过从奖励信号中学习结构化关系规则来指导适应性行为。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究表明结构化关系表征支持类比推理，但其如何引导适应性行为仍不清楚。现有方法在处理复杂关系任务时存在局限性，需探索更有效的学习机制。
AI.method: 开发RRTL模型，通过增量构建策略，在学习过程中动态选择任务相关的关系规则。模型基于关系强化学习框架，但聚焦于具体对象配置的地面规则，并在三个Atari游戏中验证其效果。对比实验采用相对量值划分（如'更多'/'相同'/'更少'）与逻辑二元划分两种策略。
AI.result: RRTL能从候选关系中识别关键规则，实现有效决策。相对量值划分策略比逻辑划分策略表现出更稳健的学习性能，证明了强化信号可引导结构化表征选择。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解关系知识如何被学习和应用于适应性行为提供了计算框架，验证了强化学习信号在结构化表征选择中的有效性。

ai_content.conclusion: 该研究为理解关系知识如何被学习和应用于适应性行为提供了计算框架，验证了强化学习信号在结构化表征选择中的有效性。

ai_content_json.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于关系强化学习的模型——关系回归树学习器（RRTL），通过从奖励信号中学习结构化关系规则来指导适应性行为。
ai_content_json.motivation: 尽管已有研究表明结构化关系表征支持类比推理，但其如何引导适应性行为仍不清楚。现有方法在处理复杂关系任务时存在局限性，需探索更有效的学习机制。

search_text: Learning Rules from Rewards 从奖励中学习规则 Humans can flexibly generalize knowledge across domains by leveraging structured relational representations. While prior research has shown how such representations support analogical reasoning, less is known about how they are recruited to guide adaptive behavior. We address this gap by introducing the Relational Regression Tree Learner (RRTL), a model that incrementally builds policies over structured relational inputs by selecting task-relevant relations during the learning process. RRTL is grounded in the framework of relational reinforcement learning but diverges from traditional approaches by focusing on ground (i.e., non-variabilized) rules that refer to specific object configurations. Across three Atari games of increasing relational complexity (Breakout, Pong, Demon Attack), the model learns to act effectively by identifying a small set of relevant relations from a broad pool of candidate relations. A comparative version of the model, which partitions the state space using relative magnitude values (e.g., "more", "same", "less"), showed more robust learning than a version using logical (binary) splits. These results provide a proof of principle that reinforcement signals can guide the selection of structured representations, offering a computational framework for understanding how relational knowledge is learned and deployed in adaptive behavior. 人类可以通过利用结构化关系表示灵活地跨领域概括知识。虽然之前的研究已经表明这些表征如何支持类比推理，但人们对如何招募它们来指导适应性行为却知之甚少。我们通过引入关系回归树学习器（RRTL）来解决这一差距，该模型通过在学习过程中选择与任务相关的关系来逐步构建基于结构化关系输入的策略。 RRTL 基于关系强化学习的框架，但与传统方法不同，它专注于引用特定对象配置的基本（即非可变）规则。在关系复杂性不断增加的三款 Atari 游戏（Breakout、Pong、Demon Attack）中，该模型通过从大量候选关系中识别一小部分相关关系来学习如何有效地采取行动。该模型的比较版本使用相对幅度值（例如“更多”、“相同”、“更少”）来划分状态空间，显示出比使用逻辑（二进制）分割的版本更强大的学习能力。这些结果提供了强化信号可以指导结构化表示的选择的原理证明，为理解如何在自适应行为中学习和部署关系知识提供了计算框架。 本文提出了一种基于关系强化学习的模型——关系回归树学习器（RRTL），通过从奖励信号中学习结构化关系规则来指导适应性行为。 Guillermo Puebla,Leonidas A. A. Doumas cs.AI

title: Fast Hybrid Image Retargeting
title_zh: 快速混合图像重定向
abstract: Image retargeting changes the aspect ratio of images while aiming to preserve content and minimise noticeable distortion. Fast and high-quality methods are particularly relevant at present, due to the large variety of image and display aspect ratios. We propose a retargeting method that quantifies and limits warping distortions with the use of content-aware cropping. The pipeline of the proposed approach consists of the following steps. First, an importance map of a source image is generated using deep semantic segmentation and saliency detection models. Then, a preliminary warping mesh is computed using axis aligned deformations, enhanced with the use of a distortion measure to ensure low warping deformations. Finally, the retargeted image is produced using a content-aware cropping algorithm. In order to evaluate our method, we perform a user study based on the RetargetMe benchmark. Experimental analyses show that our method outperforms recent approaches, while running in a fraction of their execution time.
summary: Image retargeting changes the aspect ratio of images while aiming to preserve content and minimise noticeable distortion. Fast and high-quality methods are particularly relevant at present, due to the large variety of image and display aspect ratios. We propose a retargeting method that quantifies and limits warping distortions with the use of content-aware cropping. The pipeline of the proposed approach consists of the following steps. First, an importance map of a source image is generated using deep semantic segmentation and saliency detection models. Then, a preliminary warping mesh is computed using axis aligned deformations, enhanced with the use of a distortion measure to ensure low warping deformations. Finally, the retargeted image is produced using a content-aware cropping algorithm. In order to evaluate our method, we perform a user study based on the RetargetMe benchmark. Experimental analyses show that our method outperforms recent approaches, while running in a fraction of their execution time.
abstract_zh: 图像重定向会改变图像的纵横比，同时旨在保留内容并最大程度地减少明显的失真。由于图像和显示宽高比多种多样，目前快速且高质量的方法尤其重要。我们提出了一种重定向方法，通过使用内容感知裁剪来量化和限制扭曲变形。所提出方法的流程包括以下步骤。首先，使用深度语义分割和显着性检测模型生成源图像的重要性图。然后，使用轴对齐变形计算初步扭曲网格，并使用扭曲措施进行增强以确保低扭曲变形。最后，使用内容感知裁剪算法生成重定向图像。为了评估我们的方法，我们基于 RetargetMe 基准进行了用户研究。实验分析表明，我们的方法优于最近的方法，同时运行时间仅为其执行时间的一小部分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种快速混合图像重定位方法，通过内容感知裁剪量化并限制扭曲，以在改变图像宽高比时保持内容完整性。
AI.motivation: 由于图像和显示设备的宽高比差异较大，亟需高效且高质量的图像重定位方法以减少视觉扭曲。
AI.method: 方法分为三步：1) 使用深度语义分割和显著性检测生成重要性图；2) 基于轴对齐变形和扭曲度量计算初步变形网格；3) 通过内容感知裁剪生成最终重定位图像。
AI.result: 在RetargetMe基准测试的用户研究中，该方法在保持高质量的同时，运行速度显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在图像重定位任务中实现了速度与质量的平衡，为实际应用提供了高效解决方案。

title: ILoveEye: Eyeliner Makeup Guidance System with Eye Shape Features
title_zh: ILoveEye：具有眼睛形状特征的眼线化妆指导系统
comment: 17 pages, 13 figures. Accepted in proceedings of HCII 2022
comments: 17 pages, 13 figures. Accepted in proceedings of HCII 2022
abstract: Drawing eyeliner is not an easy task for whom lacks experience in eye makeup. Everyone has a unique pair of eyes, so they need to draw eyeliner in a style that suits their eyes. We proposed ILoveEye, an interactive system that supports eye-makeup novices to draw natural and suitable eyeliner. The proposed system analyzes the shape of the user's eyes and classifies the eye types from camera frame. The system can recommend the eyeliner style to the user based on the designed recommendation rules. Then, the system can generate the original patterns corresponding to the eyeliner style, and the user can draw the eyeliner while observing the real-time makeup guidance. The user evaluation experiments are conducted to verify that the proposed ILoveEye system can help some users to draw reasonable eyeliner based on the specific eye shapes and improve their eye makeup skills.
summary: Drawing eyeliner is not an easy task for whom lacks experience in eye makeup. Everyone has a unique pair of eyes, so they need to draw eyeliner in a style that suits their eyes. We proposed ILoveEye, an interactive system that supports eye-makeup novices to draw natural and suitable eyeliner. The proposed system analyzes the shape of the user's eyes and classifies the eye types from camera frame. The system can recommend the eyeliner style to the user based on the designed recommendation rules. Then, the system can generate the original patterns corresponding to the eyeliner style, and the user can draw the eyeliner while observing the real-time makeup guidance. The user evaluation experiments are conducted to verify that the proposed ILoveEye system can help some users to draw reasonable eyeliner based on the specific eye shapes and improve their eye makeup skills.
abstract_zh: 对于缺乏眼妆经验的人来说，画眼线并不是一件容易的事。每个人都有一双独特的眼睛，所以需要画适合自己眼睛的眼线。我们提出了ILoveEye，一个支持眼妆新手画出自然合适眼线的交互系统。所提出的系统分析用户眼睛的形状并根据相机框架对眼睛类型进行分类。系统可以根据设计的推荐规则向用户推荐眼线款式。然后，系统可以生成与眼线风格对应的原始图案，用户可以在观察实时化妆指导的同时绘制眼线。通过用户评价实验来验证所提出的ILoveEye系统可以帮助一些用户根据特定的眼睛形状画出合理的眼线并提高他们的眼部化妆技巧。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ILoveEye系统，通过分析用户眼型特征提供个性化眼线化妆指导。
AI.motivation: 缺乏经验的用户难以根据自身独特眼型绘制合适眼线，传统方法缺乏智能个性化指导。
AI.method: 系统通过摄像头捕捉眼型，分类眼型后基于规则推荐风格，生成对应图案并实时指导用户绘制。
AI.result: 用户评估实验表明系统能帮助用户根据眼型绘制合理眼线并提升化妆技巧。
AI.conclusion: ILoveEye验证了基于眼型特征分析的智能化妆指导系统的有效性，为个性化美妆辅助提供新思路。

authors_text: Qin Wang,Olga Fink,Luc Van Gool,Dengxin Dai
title: Continual Test-Time Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 持续测试时域适应
abstract: Test-time domain adaptation aims to adapt a source pre-trained model to a target domain without using any source data. Existing works mainly consider the case where the target domain is static. However, real-world machine perception systems are running in non-stationary and continually changing environments where the target domain distribution can change over time. Existing methods, which are mostly based on self-training and entropy regularization, can suffer from these non-stationary environments. Due to the distribution shift over time in the target domain, pseudo-labels become unreliable. The noisy pseudo-labels can further lead to error accumulation and catastrophic forgetting. To tackle these issues, we propose a continual test-time adaptation approach~(CoTTA) which comprises two parts. Firstly, we propose to reduce the error accumulation by using weight-averaged and augmentation-averaged predictions which are often more accurate. On the other hand, to avoid catastrophic forgetting, we propose to stochastically restore a small part of the neurons to the source pre-trained weights during each iteration to help preserve source knowledge in the long-term. The proposed method enables the long-term adaptation for all parameters in the network. CoTTA is easy to implement and can be readily incorporated in off-the-shelf pre-trained models. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on four classification tasks and a segmentation task for continual test-time adaptation, on which we outperform existing methods. Our code is available at \url{https://qin.ee/cotta}.
summary: Test-time domain adaptation aims to adapt a source pre-trained model to a target domain without using any source data. Existing works mainly consider the case where the target domain is static. However, real-world machine perception systems are running in non-stationary and continually changing environments where the target domain distribution can change over time. Existing methods, which are mostly based on self-training and entropy regularization, can suffer from these non-stationary environments. Due to the distribution shift over time in the target domain, pseudo-labels become unreliable. The noisy pseudo-labels can further lead to error accumulation and catastrophic forgetting. To tackle these issues, we propose a continual test-time adaptation approach~(CoTTA) which comprises two parts. Firstly, we propose to reduce the error accumulation by using weight-averaged and augmentation-averaged predictions which are often more accurate. On the other hand, to avoid catastrophic forgetting, we propose to stochastically restore a small part of the neurons to the source pre-trained weights during each iteration to help preserve source knowledge in the long-term. The proposed method enables the long-term adaptation for all parameters in the network. CoTTA is easy to implement and can be readily incorporated in off-the-shelf pre-trained models. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on four classification tasks and a segmentation task for continual test-time adaptation, on which we outperform existing methods. Our code is available at \url{https://qin.ee/cotta}.
abstract_zh: 测试时域适应旨在在不使用任何源数据的情况下使源预训练模型适应目标域。现有的工作主要考虑目标域是静态的情况。然而，现实世界的机器感知系统在非静态且不断变化的环境中运行，其中目标域分布可能随时间而变化。现有的方法主要基于自训练和熵正则化，可能会受到这些非平稳环境的影响。由于目标域中的分布随时间变化，伪标签变得不可靠。嘈杂的伪标签会进一步导致错误累积和灾难性遗忘。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种持续测试时间适应方法（CoTTA），它由两部分组成。首先，我们建议通过使用通常更准确的权重平均和增强平均预测来减少误差累积。另一方面，为了避免灾难性遗忘，我们建议在每次迭代期间将一小部分神经元随机恢复到源预训练权重，以帮助长期保留源知识。所提出的方法能够长期适应网络中的所有参数。 CoTTA 易于实施，并且可以轻松合并到现成的预训练模型中。我们证明了我们的方法在四个分类任务和一个用于持续测试时间适应的分割任务上的有效性，在这方面我们优于现有方法。我们的代码可在 \url{https://qin.ee/cotta} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种持续测试时域适应方法（CoTTA），用于在非平稳且持续变化的目标域环境中，无需源数据即可适应预训练模型。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时域适应方法在静态目标域表现良好，但难以应对真实世界中目标域分布随时间变化的非平稳环境，导致伪标签不可靠并引发误差累积和灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: CoTTA包含两部分：1）通过权重平均和增强平均预测减少误差累积；2）在每次迭代中随机恢复部分神经元至源预训练权重，以长期保留源知识。
AI.result: 在四个分类任务和一个分割任务中，CoTTA优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CoTTA有效解决了持续测试时域适应中的非平稳环境问题，具有易实现性和对现成预训练模型的兼容性，适用于实际机器感知系统。

search_text: Continual Test-Time Domain Adaptation 持续测试时域适应 Test-time domain adaptation aims to adapt a source pre-trained model to a target domain without using any source data. Existing works mainly consider the case where the target domain is static. However, real-world machine perception systems are running in non-stationary and continually changing environments where the target domain distribution can change over time. Existing methods, which are mostly based on self-training and entropy regularization, can suffer from these non-stationary environments. Due to the distribution shift over time in the target domain, pseudo-labels become unreliable. The noisy pseudo-labels can further lead to error accumulation and catastrophic forgetting. To tackle these issues, we propose a continual test-time adaptation approach~(CoTTA) which comprises two parts. Firstly, we propose to reduce the error accumulation by using weight-averaged and augmentation-averaged predictions which are often more accurate. On the other hand, to avoid catastrophic forgetting, we propose to stochastically restore a small part of the neurons to the source pre-trained weights during each iteration to help preserve source knowledge in the long-term. The proposed method enables the long-term adaptation for all parameters in the network. CoTTA is easy to implement and can be readily incorporated in off-the-shelf pre-trained models. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on four classification tasks and a segmentation task for continual test-time adaptation, on which we outperform existing methods. title: Impact of Dataset on Acoustic Models for Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 数据集对自动语音识别声学模型的影响
abstract: In Automatic Speech Recognition, GMM-HMM had been widely used for acoustic modelling. With the current advancement of deep learning, the Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) from acoustic models has been replaced with Deep Neural Network, namely DNN-HMM Acoustic Models. The GMM models are widely used to create the alignments of the training data for the hybrid deep neural network model, thus making it an important task to create accurate alignments. Many factors such as training dataset size, training data augmentation, model hyperparameters, etc., affect the model learning. Traditionally in machine learning, larger datasets tend to have better performance, while smaller datasets tend to trigger over-fitting. The collection of speech data and their accurate transcriptions is a significant challenge that varies over different languages, and in most cases, it might be limited to big organizations. Moreover, in the case of available large datasets, training a model using such data requires additional time and computing resources, which may not be available. While the data about the accuracy of state-of-the-art ASR models on open-source datasets are published, the study about the impact of the size of a dataset on acoustic models is not readily available. This work aims to investigate the impact of dataset size variations on the performance of various GMM-HMM Acoustic Models and their respective computational costs.
summary: In Automatic Speech Recognition, GMM-HMM had been widely used for acoustic modelling. With the current advancement of deep learning, the Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) from acoustic models has been replaced with Deep Neural Network, namely DNN-HMM Acoustic Models. The GMM models are widely used to create the alignments of the training data for the hybrid deep neural network model, thus making it an important task to create accurate alignments. Many factors such as training dataset size, training data augmentation, model hyperparameters, etc., affect the model learning. Traditionally in machine learning, larger datasets tend to have better performance, while smaller datasets tend to trigger over-fitting. The collection of speech data and their accurate transcriptions is a significant challenge that varies over different languages, and in most cases, it might be limited to big organizations. Moreover, in the case of available large datasets, training a model using such data requires additional time and computing resources, which may not be available. While the data about the accuracy of state-of-the-art ASR models on open-source datasets are published, the study about the impact of the size of a dataset on acoustic models is not readily available. This work aims to investigate the impact of dataset size variations on the performance of various GMM-HMM Acoustic Models and their respective computational costs.
abstract_zh: 在自动语音识别中，GMM-HMM 已广泛用于声学建模。随着当前深度学习的进步，声学模型中的高斯混合模型（GMM）已被深度神经网络取代，即DNN-HMM声学模型。 GMM模型广泛用于为混合深度神经网络模型创建训练数据的对齐，因此创建准确的对齐成为一项重要任务。训练数据集大小、训练数据扩充、模型超参数等许多因素都会影响模型学习。传统上，在机器学习中，较大的数据集往往具有更好的性能，而较小的数据集往往会引发过度拟合。语音数据的收集及其准确的转录是一项重大挑战，不同语言的情况各不相同，并且在大多数情况下，它可能仅限于大型组织。此外，在可用的大型数据集的情况下，使用此类数据训练模型需要额外的时间和计算资源，而这些可能是不可用的。虽然有关开源数据集上最先进的 ASR 模型准确性的数据已发布，但有关数据集大小对声学模型影响的研究尚不可用。这项工作旨在研究数据集大小变化对各种 GMM-HMM 声学模型的性能及其各自的计算成本的影响。

AI.tldr: 研究不同数据集规模对GMM-HMM声学模型性能及计算成本的影响。
AI.motivation: 大型数据集虽能提升模型性能但受限于资源获取难度，且现有研究缺乏对数据集规模影响的系统分析。
AI.method: 通过实验对比不同规模数据集训练的GMM-HMM模型，分析其识别准确率与计算资源消耗差异。
AI.result: 数据集规模与模型性能呈正相关，但超出一定阈值后收益递减，小数据集易过拟合且计算成本更低。
AI.conclusion: 需根据实际资源平衡数据集规模与模型效果，为资源受限场景提供优化方向。

title: Embedding Recurrent Layers with Dual-Path Strategy in a Variant of Convolutional Network for Speaker-Independent Speech Separation
title_zh: 在卷积网络变体中嵌入具有双路径策略的循环层，以实现与说话人无关的语音分离
abstract: Speaker-independent speech separation has achieved remarkable performance in recent years with the development of deep neural network (DNN). Various network architectures, from traditional convolutional neural network (CNN) and recurrent neural network (RNN) to advanced transformer, have been designed sophistically to improve separation performance. However, the state-of-the-art models usually suffer from several flaws related to the computation, such as large model size, huge memory consumption and computational complexity. To find the balance between the performance and computational efficiency and to further explore the modeling ability of traditional network structure, we combine RNN and a newly proposed variant of convolutional network to cope with speech separation problem. By embedding two RNNs into basic block of this variant with the help of dual-path strategy, the proposed network can effectively learn the local information and global dependency. Besides, a four-staged structure enables the separation procedure to be performed gradually at finer and finer scales as the feature dimension increases. The experimental results on various datasets have proven the effectiveness of the proposed method and shown that a trade-off between the separation performance and computational efficiency is well achieved.
summary: Speaker-independent speech separation has achieved remarkable performance in recent years with the development of deep neural network (DNN). Various network architectures, from traditional convolutional neural network (CNN) and recurrent neural network (RNN) to advanced transformer, have been designed sophistically to improve separation performance. However, the state-of-the-art models usually suffer from several flaws related to the computation, such as large model size, huge memory consumption and computational complexity. To find the balance between the performance and computational efficiency and to further explore the modeling ability of traditional network structure, we combine RNN and a newly proposed variant of convolutional network to cope with speech separation problem. By embedding two RNNs into basic block of this variant with the help of dual-path strategy, the proposed network can effectively learn the local information and global dependency. Besides, a four-staged structure enables the separation procedure to be performed gradually at finer and finer scales as the feature dimension increases. The experimental results on various datasets have proven the effectiveness of the proposed method and shown that a trade-off between the separation performance and computational efficiency is well achieved.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着深度神经网络（DNN）的发展，与说话人无关的语音分离取得了令人瞩目的性能。从传统的卷积神经网络（CNN）和循环神经网络（RNN）到先进的变压器，各种网络架构都经过精心设计，以提高分离性能。然而，最先进的模型通常存在与计算相关的一些缺陷，例如模型尺寸大、内存消耗大和计算复杂性。为了找到性能和计算效率之间的平衡，并进一步探索传统网络结构的建模能力，我们将 RNN 和新提出的卷积网络变体相结合来应对语音分离问题。通过借助双路径策略将两个 RNN 嵌入到该变体的基本块中，所提出的网络可以有效地学习局部信息和全局依赖性。此外，四级结构使得分离过程能够随着特征尺寸的增加而以越来越精细的尺度逐渐进行。各种数据集上的实验结果证明了该方法的有效性，并表明很好地实现了分离性能和计算效率之间的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合RNN和改进卷积网络的双路径策略，用于解决独立说话人语音分离问题。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的语音分离模型在计算方面存在诸多问题，如模型规模大、内存消耗高和计算复杂度高，因此需要在性能和计算效率之间找到平衡。
AI.method: 通过在改进的卷积网络的基本块中嵌入两个RNN，并采用双路径策略，使网络能够有效学习局部信息和全局依赖关系。此外，采用四阶段结构逐步进行更精细尺度的分离。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验结果证明了所提方法的有效性，并展示了分离性能与计算效率之间的良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合RNN和改进的卷积网络结构，有效提升了语音分离的性能，同时保持了较高的计算效率。

search_text: Embedding Recurrent Layers with Dual-Path Strategy in a Variant of Convolutional Network for Speaker-Independent Speech Separation 在卷积网络变体中嵌入具有双路径策略的循环层，以实现与说话人无关的语音分离 Speaker-independent speech separation has achieved remarkable performance in recent years with the development of deep neural network (DNN). Various network architectures, from traditional convolutional neural network (CNN) and recurrent neural network (RNN) to advanced transformer, have been designed sophistically to improve separation performance. However, the state-of-the-art models usually suffer from several flaws related to the computation, such as large model size, huge memory consumption and computational complexity. To find the balance between the performance and computational efficiency and to further explore the modeling ability of traditional network structure, we combine RNN and a newly proposed variant of convolutional network to cope with speech separation problem. By embedding two RNNs into basic block of this variant with the help of dual-path strategy, the proposed network can effectively learn the local information and global dependency. Besides, a four-staged structure enables the separation procedure to be performed gradually at finer and finer scales as the feature dimension increases. The experimental results on various datasets have proven the effectiveness of the proposed method and shown that a trade-off between the separation performance and computational efficiency is well achieved. 近年来，随着深度神经网络（DNN）的发展，与说话人无关的语音分离取得了令人瞩目的性能。从传统的卷积神经网络（CNN）和循环神经网络（RNN）到先进的变压器，各种网络架构都经过精心设计，以提高分离性能。然而，最先进的模型通常存在与计算相关的一些缺陷，例如模型尺寸大、内存消耗大和计算复杂性。为了找到性能和计算效率之间的平衡，并进一步探索传统网络结构的建模能力，我们将 RNN 和新提出的卷积网络变体相结合来应对语音分离问题。通过借助双路径策略将两个 RNN 嵌入到该变体的基本块中，所提出的网络可以有效地学习局部信息和全局依赖性。此外，四级结构使得分离过程能够随着特征尺寸的增加而以越来越精细的尺度逐渐进行。各种数据集上的实验结果证明了该方法的有效性，并表明很好地实现了分离性能和计算效率之间的权衡。 本文提出了一种结合RNN和改进卷积网络的双路径策略，用于解决独立说话人语音分离问题。 Xue Yang,Changchun Bao eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Anand Gopalakrishnan,Kazuki Irie,Jürgen Schmidhuber,Sjoerd van Steenkiste
title: Unsupervised Learning of Temporal Abstractions with Slot-based Transformers
title_zh: 使用基于时隙的变压器进行时间抽象的无监督学习
abstract: The discovery of reusable sub-routines simplifies decision-making and planning in complex reinforcement learning problems. Previous approaches propose to learn such temporal abstractions in a purely unsupervised fashion through observing state-action trajectories gathered from executing a policy. However, a current limitation is that they process each trajectory in an entirely sequential manner, which prevents them from revising earlier decisions about sub-routine boundary points in light of new incoming information. In this work we propose SloTTAr, a fully parallel approach that integrates sequence processing Transformers with a Slot Attention module and adaptive computation for learning about the number of such sub-routines in an unsupervised fashion. We demonstrate how SloTTAr is capable of outperforming strong baselines in terms of boundary point discovery, even for sequences containing variable amounts of sub-routines, while being up to 7x faster to train on existing benchmarks.
summary: The discovery of reusable sub-routines simplifies decision-making and planning in complex reinforcement learning problems. Previous approaches propose to learn such temporal abstractions in a purely unsupervised fashion through observing state-action trajectories gathered from executing a policy. However, a current limitation is that they process each trajectory in an entirely sequential manner, which prevents them from revising earlier decisions about sub-routine boundary points in light of new incoming information. In this work we propose SloTTAr, a fully parallel approach that integrates sequence processing Transformers with a Slot Attention module and adaptive computation for learning about the number of such sub-routines in an unsupervised fashion. We demonstrate how SloTTAr is capable of outperforming strong baselines in terms of boundary point discovery, even for sequences containing variable amounts of sub-routines, while being up to 7x faster to train on existing benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 可重用子例程的发现简化了复杂强化学习问题的决策和规划。以前的方法建议通过观察从执行策略收集的状态动作轨迹，以纯粹无监督的方式学习这种时间抽象。然而，当前的限制是它们以完全顺序的方式处理每个轨迹，这使得它们无法根据新传入的信息修改有关子例程边界点的早期决策。在这项工作中，我们提出了 SloTTAr，这是一种完全并行的方法，它将序列处理 Transformer 与 Slot Attention 模块和自适应计算集成在一起，用于以无监督的方式了解此类子例程的数量。我们展示了 SloTTAr 如何在边界点发现方面超越强大的基线，即使对于包含可变数量子例程的序列也是如此，同时在现有基准上的训练速度提高了 7 倍。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于插槽的Transformer方法，用于无监督学习时序抽象，以提高复杂强化学习任务中的决策和规划效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理轨迹时顺序进行，无法根据新信息调整早期决策，导致子程序边界点识别不足，影响效率。
AI.method: 提出SloTTAr方法，结合Transformer与插槽注意力模块及自适应计算，实现对子程序数量的无监督学习，并行处理轨迹以提升效率。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，SloTTAr在边界点发现任务上优于现有方法，且训练速度提升最高达7倍。
AI.conclusion: SloTTAr通过并行处理机制有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为无监督时序抽象学习提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Jiaxin Guo,Fangxun Zhong,Rong Xiong,Yunhui Liu,Yue Wang,Yiyi Liao
title: A Visual Navigation Perspective for Category-Level Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: 类别级物体姿态估计的视觉导航视角
abstract: This paper studies category-level object pose estimation based on a single monocular image. Recent advances in pose-aware generative models have paved the way for addressing this challenging task using analysis-by-synthesis. The idea is to sequentially update a set of latent variables, e.g., pose, shape, and appearance, of the generative model until the generated image best agrees with the observation. However, convergence and efficiency are two challenges of this inference procedure. In this paper, we take a deeper look at the inference of analysis-by-synthesis from the perspective of visual navigation, and investigate what is a good navigation policy for this specific task. We evaluate three different strategies, including gradient descent, reinforcement learning and imitation learning, via thorough comparisons in terms of convergence, robustness and efficiency. Moreover, we show that a simple hybrid approach leads to an effective and efficient solution. We further compare these strategies to state-of-the-art methods, and demonstrate superior performance on synthetic and real-world datasets leveraging off-the-shelf pose-aware generative models.
summary: This paper studies category-level object pose estimation based on a single monocular image. Recent advances in pose-aware generative models have paved the way for addressing this challenging task using analysis-by-synthesis. The idea is to sequentially update a set of latent variables, e.g., pose, shape, and appearance, of the generative model until the generated image best agrees with the observation. However, convergence and efficiency are two challenges of this inference procedure. In this paper, we take a deeper look at the inference of analysis-by-synthesis from the perspective of visual navigation, and investigate what is a good navigation policy for this specific task. We evaluate three different strategies, including gradient descent, reinforcement learning and imitation learning, via thorough comparisons in terms of convergence, robustness and efficiency. Moreover, we show that a simple hybrid approach leads to an effective and efficient solution. We further compare these strategies to state-of-the-art methods, and demonstrate superior performance on synthetic and real-world datasets leveraging off-the-shelf pose-aware generative models.
abstract_zh: 本文研究基于单目图像的类别级物体姿态估计。姿势感知生成模型的最新进展为使用综合分析解决这一具有挑战性的任务铺平了道路。这个想法是顺序更新生成模型的一组潜在变量，例如姿势、形状和外观，直到生成的图像与观察结果最一致。然而，收敛性和效率是该推理过程的两个挑战。在本文中，我们从视觉导航的角度更深入地研究综合分析的推理，并研究对于该特定任务什么是好的导航策略。我们通过在收敛性、鲁棒性和效率方面进行彻底比较来评估三种不同的策略，包括梯度下降、强化学习和模仿学习。此外，我们还表明，简单的混合方法可以带来有效且高效的解决方案。我们进一步将这些策略与最先进的方法进行比较，并利用现成的姿势感知生成模型在合成和现实数据集上展示卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文从视觉导航视角研究基于单目图像的类别级物体姿态估计问题，提出分析-合成框架下的有效推理策略。
AI.motivation: 现有基于生成模型的姿态估计方法面临收敛性和效率两大挑战，需探索更优的导航策略以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过梯度下降、强化学习、模仿学习三种策略的对比实验，提出简单混合方法实现高效姿态估计。
AI.result: 混合策略在合成与真实数据集上均优于现有方法，展现更优收敛性、鲁棒性和效率。
AI.conclusion: 从视觉导航视角设计的混合策略为类别级姿态估计提供了有效且高效的解决方案。

We evaluate three different strategies, including gradient descent, reinforcement learning and imitation learning, via thorough comparisons in terms of convergence, robustness and efficiency. We further compare these strategies to state-of-the-art methods, and demonstrate superior performance on synthetic and real-world datasets leveraging off-the-shelf pose-aware generative models. 本文研究基于单目图像的类别级物体姿态估计。姿势感知生成模型的最新进展为使用综合分析解决这一具有挑战性的任务铺平了道路。这个想法是顺序更新生成模型的一组潜在变量，例如姿势、形状和外观，直到生成的图像与观察结果最一致。然而，收敛性和效率是该推理过程的两个挑战。在本文中，我们从视觉导航的角度更深入地研究综合分析的推理，并研究对于该特定任务什么是好的导航策略。我们通过在收敛性、鲁棒性和效率方面进行彻底比较来评估三种不同的策略，包括梯度下降、强化学习和模仿学习。此外，我们还表明，简单的混合方法可以带来有效且高效的解决方案。我们进一步将这些策略与最先进的方法进行比较，并利用现成的姿势感知生成模型在合成和现实数据集上展示卓越的性能。 本文从视觉导航视角研究基于单目图像的类别级物体姿态估计问题，提出分析-合成框架下的有效推理策略。 Jiaxin Guo,Fangxun Zhong,Rong Xiong,Yunhui Liu,Yue Wang,Yiyi Liao cs.CV,cs.RO

title: $p$-Generalized Probit Regression and Scalable Maximum Likelihood Estimation via Sketching and Coresets
title_zh: $p$-通过草图和核心集进行广义概率回归和可扩展最大似然估计
abstract: We study the $p$-generalized probit regression model, which is a generalized linear model for binary responses. It extends the standard probit model by replacing its link function, the standard normal cdf, by a $p$-generalized normal distribution for $p\in[1, \infty)$. The $p$-generalized normal distributions \citep{Sub23} are of special interest in statistical modeling because they fit much more flexibly to data. Their tail behavior can be controlled by choice of the parameter $p$, which influences the model's sensitivity to outliers. Special cases include the Laplace, the Gaussian, and the uniform distributions. We further show how the maximum likelihood estimator for $p$-generalized probit regression can be approximated efficiently up to a factor of $(1+\varepsilon)$ on large data by combining sketching techniques with importance subsampling to obtain a small data summary called coreset.
summary: We study the $p$-generalized probit regression model, which is a generalized linear model for binary responses. It extends the standard probit model by replacing its link function, the standard normal cdf, by a $p$-generalized normal distribution for $p\in[1, \infty)$. The $p$-generalized normal distributions \citep{Sub23} are of special interest in statistical modeling because they fit much more flexibly to data. Their tail behavior can be controlled by choice of the parameter $p$, which influences the model's sensitivity to outliers. Special cases include the Laplace, the Gaussian, and the uniform distributions. We further show how the maximum likelihood estimator for $p$-generalized probit regression can be approximated efficiently up to a factor of $(1+\varepsilon)$ on large data by combining sketching techniques with importance subsampling to obtain a small data summary called coreset.
abstract_zh: 我们研究 $p$-广义概率回归模型，它是二元响应的广义线性模型。它通过用 $p\in[1, \infty)$ 的 $p$ 广义正态分布替换其链接函数（标准正态 cdf）来扩展标准概率模型。 $p$ 广义正态分布 \citep{Sub23} 在统计建模中特别令人感兴趣，因为它们更灵活地适合数据。它们的尾部行为可以通过选择参数 $p$ 来控制，这会影响模型对异常值的敏感性。特殊情况包括拉普拉斯分布、高斯分布和均匀分布。我们进一步展示了如何通过将草图技术与重要性二次采样相结合来获得称为核心集的小数据摘要，从而在大数据上将 $p$-广义概率回归的最大似然估计有效地近似到 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 因子。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了$p$-广义Probit回归模型，并通过草图和核心集技术实现大规模数据下的最大似然估计。
AI.motivation: 标准Probit模型的链接函数灵活性不足，且难以高效处理大规模数据，需更灵活的分布假设和可扩展的计算方法。
AI.method: 将标准正态分布的链接函数替换为$p$-广义正态分布，并结合草图技术与重要性子抽样构建核心集以近似最大似然估计。
AI.result: 提出的方法可在$(1+\\varepsilon)$因子内高效近似$p$-广义Probit回归的最大似然估计，适用于大规模数据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过灵活的分布假设和核心集技术，在保持模型适应性的同时实现了对大规模数据的可扩展估计。

title: Personalize Web Searching Strategies Classification and Comparison
title_zh: 个性化网页搜索策略分类与比较
abstract: Personalization is becoming very important direction in semantic web search for the users that needs to find appropriate information. In this paper, a classification of web personalization is proposed and semantic web search tools are investigated. Building user interest profile is essential for personalizing. Nowadays, semantic web tools use ontologies for personalization because of their advantages. It is important to mention that most of the semantic web search tools use agent technologies for implementation.
summary: Personalization is becoming very important direction in semantic web search for the users that needs to find appropriate information. In this paper, a classification of web personalization is proposed and semantic web search tools are investigated. Building user interest profile is essential for personalizing. Nowadays, semantic web tools use ontologies for personalization because of their advantages. It is important to mention that most of the semantic web search tools use agent technologies for implementation.
abstract_zh: 对于需要查找合适信息的用户来说，个性化正在成为语义网络搜索的一个非常重要的方向。本文提出了网络个性化的分类，并研究了语义网络搜索工具。建立用户兴趣档案对于个性化至关重要。如今，语义网络工具利用本体来实现个性化，因为它具有自身的优势。值得一提的是，大多数语义网络搜索工具都使用代理技术来实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种网络搜索策略分类方法，并对语义网搜索工具进行比较分析。
AI.motivation: 随着用户对个性化信息需求的增长，传统搜索方式难以满足精准信息获取需求，需通过分类策略优化搜索效果。
AI.method: 构建用户兴趣画像框架，基于本体论分析语义网工具特性，结合智能代理技术实现策略分类与工具比较。
AI.result: 明确不同个性化策略的技术特征，发现本体驱动型工具在语义理解上更具优势，代理技术提升动态适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 分类框架为个性化搜索提供理论依据，未来需加强跨平台策略融合与实时用户行为分析。

title: Neural Networks with Divisive normalization for image segmentation with application in cityscapes dataset
title_zh: 用于图像分割的除法归一化神经网络及其在城市景观数据集中的应用
abstract: One of the key problems in computer vision is adaptation: models are too rigid to follow the variability of the inputs. The canonical computation that explains adaptation in sensory neuroscience is divisive normalization, and it has appealing effects on image manifolds. In this work we show that including divisive normalization in current deep networks makes them more invariant to non-informative changes in the images. In particular, we focus on U-Net architectures for image segmentation. Experiments show that the inclusion of divisive normalization in the U-Net architecture leads to better segmentation results with respect to conventional U-Net. The gain increases steadily when dealing with images acquired in bad weather conditions. In addition to the results on the Cityscapes and Foggy Cityscapes datasets, we explain these advantages through visualization of the responses: the equalization induced by the divisive normalization leads to more invariant features to local changes in contrast and illumination.
summary: One of the key problems in computer vision is adaptation: models are too rigid to follow the variability of the inputs. The canonical computation that explains adaptation in sensory neuroscience is divisive normalization, and it has appealing effects on image manifolds. In this work we show that including divisive normalization in current deep networks makes them more invariant to non-informative changes in the images. In particular, we focus on U-Net architectures for image segmentation. Experiments show that the inclusion of divisive normalization in the U-Net architecture leads to better segmentation results with respect to conventional U-Net. The gain increases steadily when dealing with images acquired in bad weather conditions. In addition to the results on the Cityscapes and Foggy Cityscapes datasets, we explain these advantages through visualization of the responses: the equalization induced by the divisive normalization leads to more invariant features to local changes in contrast and illumination.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉的关键问题之一是适应性：模型过于僵化，无法跟随输入的变化。解释感觉神经科学中的适应的规范计算是分裂归一化，它对图像流形具有吸引人的效果。在这项工作中，我们表明，在当前的深度网络中包含分裂归一化使得它们对图像中的非信息变化更加不变。我们特别关注用于图像分割的 U-Net 架构。实验表明，与传统 U-Net 相比，在 U-Net 架构中包含除法归一化可带来更好的分割结果。处理在恶劣天气条件下获取的图像时，增益会稳定增加。除了 Cityscapes 和 Foggy Cityscapes 数据集的结果之外，我们还通过响应的可视化来解释这些优点：除法归一化引起的均衡导致对比度和照明的局部变化具有更多不变的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文将 divisive normalization 引入 U-Net 架构，用于提升图像分割在复杂天气条件下的性能，特别是在 Cityscapes 数据集上的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型对输入变化（如光照、对比度）敏感，而生物感官神经科学中的 divisive normalization 能增强对非信息性变化的不变性，从而提升模型适应性。
AI.method: 在 U-Net 架构中加入 divisive normalization 模块，通过特征响应的归一化处理，使模型对局部对比度和光照变化更具鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在 Cityscapes 和 Foggy Cityscapes 数据集上，改进后的模型分割效果优于传统 U-Net，尤其在恶劣天气条件下性能提升显著，可视化结果验证了特征不变性增强。
AI.conclusion: divisive normalization 能有效提升图像分割模型对输入变化的适应能力，为复杂环境下的视觉任务提供新思路。

search_text: Neural Networks with Divisive normalization for image segmentation with application in cityscapes dataset 用于图像分割的除法归一化神经网络及其在城市景观数据集中的应用 One of the key problems in computer vision is adaptation: models are too rigid to follow the variability of the inputs. The canonical computation that explains adaptation in sensory neuroscience is divisive normalization, and it has appealing effects on image manifolds. In this work we show that including divisive normalization in current deep networks makes them more invariant to non-informative changes in the images. In particular, we focus on U-Net architectures for image segmentation. Experiments show that the inclusion of divisive normalization in the U-Net architecture leads to better segmentation results with respect to conventional U-Net. The gain increases steadily when dealing with images acquired in bad weather conditions. In addition to the results on the Cityscapes and Foggy Cityscapes datasets, we explain these advantages through visualization of the responses: the equalization induced by the divisive normalization leads to more invariant features to local changes in contrast and illumination. 计算机视觉的关键问题之一是适应性：模型过于僵化，无法跟随输入的变化。解释感觉神经科学中的适应的规范计算是分裂归一化，它对图像流形具有吸引人的效果。在这项工作中，我们表明，在当前的深度网络中包含分裂归一化使得它们对图像中的非信息变化更加不变。我们特别关注用于图像分割的 U-Net 架构。实验表明，与传统 U-Net 相比，在 U-Net 架构中包含除法归一化可带来更好的分割结果。处理在恶劣天气条件下获取的图像时，增益会稳定增加。除了 Cityscapes 和 Foggy Cityscapes 数据集的结果之外，我们还通过响应的可视化来解释这些优点：除法归一化引起的均衡导致对比度和照明的局部变化具有更多不变的特征。 本文将 divisive normalization 引入 U-Net 架构，用于提升图像分割在复杂天气条件下的性能，特别是在 Cityscapes 数据集上的应用。 Pablo Hernández-Cámara,Valero Laparra,Jesús Malo cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Rui Lin,Jie Ran,King Hung Chiu,Graziano Chesi,Ngai Wong
title: Deformable Butterfly: A Highly Structured and Sparse Linear Transform
title_zh: 可变形蝴蝶：高度结构化的稀疏线性变换
abstract: We introduce a new kind of linear transform named Deformable Butterfly (DeBut) that generalizes the conventional butterfly matrices and can be adapted to various input-output dimensions. It inherits the fine-to-coarse-grained learnable hierarchy of traditional butterflies and when deployed to neural networks, the prominent structures and sparsity in a DeBut layer constitutes a new way for network compression. We apply DeBut as a drop-in replacement of standard fully connected and convolutional layers, and demonstrate its superiority in homogenizing a neural network and rendering it favorable properties such as light weight and low inference complexity, without compromising accuracy. The natural complexity-accuracy tradeoff arising from the myriad deformations of a DeBut layer also opens up new rooms for analytical and practical research. The codes and Appendix are publicly available at: https://github.com/ruilin0212/DeBut.
summary: We introduce a new kind of linear transform named Deformable Butterfly (DeBut) that generalizes the conventional butterfly matrices and can be adapted to various input-output dimensions. It inherits the fine-to-coarse-grained learnable hierarchy of traditional butterflies and when deployed to neural networks, the prominent structures and sparsity in a DeBut layer constitutes a new way for network compression. We apply DeBut as a drop-in replacement of standard fully connected and convolutional layers, and demonstrate its superiority in homogenizing a neural network and rendering it favorable properties such as light weight and low inference complexity, without compromising accuracy. The natural complexity-accuracy tradeoff arising from the myriad deformations of a DeBut layer also opens up new rooms for analytical and practical research. The codes and Appendix are publicly available at: https://github.com/ruilin0212/DeBut.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种名为 Deformable Butterfly (DeBut) 的新型线性变换，它概括了传统的蝶形矩阵，并且可以适应各种输入输出维度。它继承了传统蝴蝶的细粒度到粗粒度的可学习层次结构，当部署到神经网络时，DeBut 层中突出的结构和稀疏性构成了一种新的网络压缩方式。我们应用 DeBut 作为标准全连接层和卷积层的直接替代品，并展示了它在均质化神经网络并使其具有轻量级和低推理复杂性等有利特性方面的优越性，同时又不影响准确性。 DeBut 层的无数变形所产生的自然复杂性与准确性的权衡也为分析和实践研究开辟了新的空间。代码和附录可公开获取：https://github.com/ruilin0212/DeBut。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Deformable Butterfly (DeBut)的新型线性变换，用于神经网络的结构压缩与效率优化。
AI.motivation: 传统蝴蝶矩阵存在输入输出维度固定、结构僵化等局限，难以满足神经网络动态压缩需求，需设计更灵活的稀疏结构化变换。
AI.method: 设计具有层次化可学习结构的DeBut变换，通过稀疏矩阵特性替代全连接/卷积层，实现网络参数量与计算复杂度的降低。
AI.result: 实验表明DeBut层可使网络保持原有精度的同时减少参数量与计算量，并通过结构变形实现复杂度-精度的灵活权衡。
AI.conclusion: DeBut为神经网络压缩提供了新的结构化稀疏化方案，在保持性能的前提下显著提升推理效率，具有理论与应用研究价值。

title: EnHDC: Ensemble Learning for Brain-Inspired Hyperdimensional Computing
title_zh: EnHDC：用于类脑超维计算的集成学习
abstract: Ensemble learning is a classical learning method utilizing a group of weak learners to form a strong learner, which aims to increase the accuracy of the model. Recently, brain-inspired hyperdimensional computing (HDC) becomes an emerging computational paradigm that has achieved success in various domains such as human activity recognition, voice recognition, and bio-medical signal classification. HDC mimics the brain cognition and leverages high-dimensional vectors (e.g., 10000 dimensions) with fully distributed holographic representation and (pseudo-)randomness. This paper presents the first effort in exploring ensemble learning in the context of HDC and proposes the first ensemble HDC model referred to as EnHDC. EnHDC uses a majority voting-based mechanism to synergistically integrate the prediction outcomes of multiple base HDC classifiers. To enhance the diversity of base classifiers, we vary the encoding mechanisms, dimensions, and data width settings among base classifiers. By applying EnHDC on a wide range of applications, results show that the EnHDC can achieve on average 3.2\% accuracy improvement over a single HDC classifier. Further, we show that EnHDC with reduced dimensionality, e.g., 1000 dimensions, can achieve similar or even surpass the accuracy of baseline HDC with higher dimensionality, e.g., 10000 dimensions. This leads to a 20\% reduction of storage requirement of HDC model, which is key to enabling HDC on low-power computing platforms.

Recently, brain-inspired hyperdimensional computing (HDC) becomes an emerging computational paradigm that has achieved success in various domains such as human activity recognition, voice recognition, and bio-medical signal classification. EnHDC uses a majority voting-based mechanism to synergistically integrate the prediction outcomes of multiple base HDC classifiers. To enhance the diversity of base classifiers, we vary the encoding mechanisms, dimensions, and data width settings among base classifiers. By applying EnHDC on a wide range of applications, results show that the EnHDC can achieve on average 3.2\% accuracy improvement over a single HDC classifier. Further, we show that EnHDC with reduced dimensionality, e.g., 1000 dimensions, can achieve similar or even surpass the accuracy of baseline HDC with higher dimensionality, e.g., 10000 dimensions. This leads to a 20\% reduction of storage requirement of HDC model, which is key to enabling HDC on low-power computing platforms.
abstract_zh: 集成学习是一种经典的学习方法，利用一组弱学习器组成一个强学习器，旨在提高模型的准确性。近年来，类脑超维计算（HDC）成为一种新兴的计算范式，在人类活动识别、语音识别和生物医学信号分类等多个领域取得了成功。 HDC 模仿大脑认知，并利用具有完全分布式全息表示和（伪）随机性的高维向量（例如 10000 维）。本文首次在 HDC 背景下探索集成学习，并提出了第一个集成 HDC 模型（称为 EnHDC）。 EnHDC 使用基于多数投票的机制来协同集成多个基本 HDC 分类器的预测结果。为了增强基分类器的多样性，我们改变了基分类器之间的编码机制、维度和数据宽度设置。通过在广泛的应用中应用 EnHDC，结果表明，与单个 HDC 分类器相比，EnHDC 平均可以实现 3.2% 的准确度提升。此外，我们还表明，具有降低维度（例如 1000 维）的 EnHDC 可以实现与具有更高维度（例如 10000 维）的基线 HDC 相似甚至超过的精度。这使得 HDC 模型的存储需求减少了 20%，这是在低功耗计算平台上启用 HDC 的关键。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EnHDC模型，通过集成学习方法改进脑启发式高维计算（HDC）的性能。
AI.motivation: HDC在多个领域表现出色，但其单一分类器的准确性受限，且高维向量导致存储需求大，需探索更高效的方法。
AI.method: 设计基于多数投票的集成机制，通过调整编码方式、维度和数据宽度增强基分类器多样性，并验证低维（如1000维）HDC的可行性。
AI.result: EnHDC在多个任务中平均提升3.2%准确率，且1000维模型存储需求降低20%，性能接近或超越传统高维HDC。
AI.conclusion: EnHDC有效平衡了准确性与存储效率，为HDC在低功耗平台的应用提供了新思路。

title: Supporting tangible multi-factor key exchange in households
title_zh: 支持家庭中有形的多因素密钥交换
abstract: A common approach to securing end-to-end connectivity between devices on the Internet is to utilise a cloud-based intermediary. With this reliance upon a third-party comes a set of security and privacy concerns that are difficult to mitigate. A promising new protocol, Wireguard, dispenses with the middleman to provide secure peer-to-peer communication. However, support for initial key exchange falls outside Wireguard's scope, making it potentially vulnerable to insecure out-of-band key exchange. The design of secure and usable key exchange methods is challenging, not least in domestic spaces, as they're often characterised by technically naive users in multi-occupancy environments, making them susceptible to insider and passer-by attacks (i.e.: theft, observation attacks, relay and impersonation attacks). We describe and present the results from a design ideation study that probes the use of tangible, multi-factor approaches for securing key exchange in domestic spaces. The study suggests that a home's semi-fixed features (e.g.: lamps, shelves, chairs) can be instrumented to support a promising three-factor authentication approach ('what you have, what you know and where you are') to enable key exchange solutions that are i. more secure than commonly used naive approaches and ii. desirable for end users.

We describe and present the results from a design ideation study that probes the use of tangible, multi-factor approaches for securing key exchange in domestic spaces. The study suggests that a home's semi-fixed features (e.g.: lamps, shelves, chairs) can be instrumented to support a promising three-factor authentication approach ('what you have, what you know and where you are') to enable key exchange solutions that are i. more secure than commonly used naive approaches and ii. desirable for end users.
abstract_zh: 确保互联网上设备之间的端到端连接安全的常见方法是利用基于云的中介。对第三方的依赖带来了一系列难以缓解的安全和隐私问题。 Wireguard 是一种很有前景的新协议，它无需中间人即可提供安全的点对点通信。然而，对初始密钥交换的支持超出了 Wireguard 的范围，使其可能容易受到不安全的带外密钥交换的影响。安全且可用的密钥交换方法的设计具有挑战性，尤其是在家庭空间中，因为它们的特点通常是多占用环境中技术上不懂的用户，使它们容易受到内部和路人攻击（即：盗窃、观察攻击、中继和冒充攻击）。我们描述并展示了一项设计构思研究的结果，该研究探讨了如何使用切实的、多因素的方法来确保家庭空间中的密钥交换。该研究表明，家庭的半固定功能（例如：灯、架子、椅子）可以用来支持有前途的三因素身份验证方法（“你拥有什么、你知道什么以及你在哪里”），以实现密钥交换解决方案。比常用的朴素方法更安全，并且 ii。对于最终用户来说是理想的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用家庭环境中的实体多因素认证方法，通过结合物理物品、用户知识和位置信息，提升家庭场景下的密钥交换安全性与可用性。
AI.motivation: 现有云中介方案存在隐私风险，而Wireguard等协议缺乏安全的初始密钥交换机制，家庭场景中用户技术能力有限且易受中间人攻击，需更安全且易用的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过设计研讨会探索实体多因素认证方案，利用家庭半固定物品（如灯具、书架）作为物理因素，结合用户知识与空间位置信息实现三因素认证。
AI.result: 研究显示该方法相比传统方案更安全，且用户对基于家庭环境的实体认证方式接受度较高。
AI.conclusion: 实体多因素认证可有效增强家庭场景的密钥交换安全性，同时兼顾用户体验，为未来家庭网络安全提供新思路。

search_text: Supporting tangible multi-factor key exchange in households 支持家庭中有形的多因素密钥交换 A common approach to securing end-to-end connectivity between devices on the Internet is to utilise a cloud-based intermediary. With this reliance upon a third-party comes a set of security and privacy concerns that are difficult to mitigate. A promising new protocol, Wireguard, dispenses with the middleman to provide secure peer-to-peer communication. However, support for initial key exchange falls outside Wireguard's scope, making it potentially vulnerable to insecure out-of-band key exchange. The design of secure and usable key exchange methods is challenging, not least in domestic spaces, as they're often characterised by technically naive users in multi-occupancy environments, making them susceptible to insider and passer-by attacks (i.e.: theft, observation attacks, relay and impersonation attacks). We describe and present the results from a design ideation study that probes the use of tangible, multi-factor approaches for securing key exchange in domestic spaces. The study suggests that a home's semi-fixed features (e.g.: lamps, shelves, chairs) can be instrumented to support a promising three-factor authentication approach ('what you have, what you know and where you are') to enable key exchange solutions that are i. more secure than commonly used naive approaches and ii. desirable for end users. 确保互联网上设备之间的端到端连接安全的常见方法是利用基于云的中介。对第三方的依赖带来了一系列难以缓解的安全和隐私问题。 Wireguard 是一种很有前景的新协议，它无需中间人即可提供安全的点对点通信。然而，对初始密钥交换的支持超出了 Wireguard 的范围，使其可能容易受到不安全的带外密钥交换的影响。安全且可用的密钥交换方法的设计具有挑战性，尤其是在家庭空间中，因为它们的特点通常是多占用环境中技术上不懂的用户，使它们容易受到内部和路人攻击（即：盗窃、观察攻击、中继和冒充攻击）。我们描述并展示了一项设计构思研究的结果，该研究探讨了如何使用切实的、多因素的方法来确保家庭空间中的密钥交换。该研究表明，家庭的半固定功能（例如：灯、架子、椅子）可以用来支持有前途的三因素身份验证方法（“你拥有什么、你知道什么以及你在哪里”），以实现密钥交换解决方案。比常用的朴素方法更安全，并且 ii。对于最终用户来说是理想的。 本文提出一种利用家庭环境中的实体多因素认证方法，通过结合物理物品、用户知识和位置信息，提升家庭场景下的密钥交换安全性与可用性。 Thomas Lodge,Sameh Zakhary,Derek McAuley cs.CR,cs.HC

authors_text: Xin Chen,Ben Kang,Dong Wang,Dongdong Li,Huchuan Lu
title: Efficient Visual Tracking via Hierarchical Cross-Attention Transformer
title_zh: 通过分层交叉注意力变压器进行高效视觉跟踪
abstract: In recent years, target tracking has made great progress in accuracy. This development is mainly attributed to powerful networks (such as transformers) and additional modules (such as online update and refinement modules). However, less attention has been paid to tracking speed. Most state-of-the-art trackers are satisfied with the real-time speed on powerful GPUs. However, practical applications necessitate higher requirements for tracking speed, especially when edge platforms with limited resources are used. In this work, we present an efficient tracking method via a hierarchical cross-attention transformer named HCAT. Our model runs about 195 fps on GPU, 45 fps on CPU, and 55 fps on the edge AI platform of NVidia Jetson AGX Xavier. Experiments show that our HCAT achieves promising results on LaSOT, GOT-10k, TrackingNet, NFS, OTB100, UAV123, and VOT2020. Code and models are available at https://github.com/chenxin-dlut/HCAT.
summary: In recent years, target tracking has made great progress in accuracy. This development is mainly attributed to powerful networks (such as transformers) and additional modules (such as online update and refinement modules). However, less attention has been paid to tracking speed. Most state-of-the-art trackers are satisfied with the real-time speed on powerful GPUs. However, practical applications necessitate higher requirements for tracking speed, especially when edge platforms with limited resources are used. In this work, we present an efficient tracking method via a hierarchical cross-attention transformer named HCAT. Our model runs about 195 fps on GPU, 45 fps on CPU, and 55 fps on the edge AI platform of NVidia Jetson AGX Xavier. Experiments show that our HCAT achieves promising results on LaSOT, GOT-10k, TrackingNet, NFS, OTB100, UAV123, and VOT2020. Code and models are available at https://github.com/chenxin-dlut/HCAT.
abstract_zh: 近年来，目标跟踪在精度方面取得了长足的进步。这种发展主要归功于强大的网络（例如 Transformer）和附加模块（例如在线更新和细化模块）。然而，对跟踪速度的关注较少。大多数最先进的跟踪器都对强大 GPU 上的实时速度感到满意。然而，实际应用对跟踪速度提出了更高的要求，尤其是在使用资源有限的边缘平台时。在这项工作中，我们通过名为 HCAT 的分层交叉注意力转换器提出了一种有效的跟踪方法。我们的模型在 GPU 上运行约 195 fps，在 CPU 上运行约 45 fps，在 NVidia Jetson AGX Xavier 边缘 AI 平台上运行约 55 fps。实验表明，我们的 HCAT 在 LaSOT、GOT-10k、TrackingNet、NFS、OTB100、UAV123 和 VOT2020 上取得了有希望的结果。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/chenxin-dlut/HCAT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为HCAT的分层交叉注意力Transformer模型，用于实现高效的视觉目标跟踪。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有跟踪器在精度上取得进展，但对速度优化不足，尤其在资源受限的边缘设备上需更高效率。
AI.method: 设计分层交叉注意力机制，通过优化Transformer结构提升计算效率，适配不同硬件平台。
AI.result: HCAT在GPU上达195fps，在Jetson AGX Xavier边缘平台达55fps，多个数据集上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: HCAT在保持跟踪精度的同时显著提升速度，适用于边缘计算场景，代码和模型已开源。

ai_content.conclusion: HCAT在保持跟踪精度的同时显著提升速度，适用于边缘计算场景，代码和模型已开源。

authors_text: Xinchi Zhou,Dongzhan Zhou,Wanli Ouyang,Hang Zhou,Ziwei Liu,Di Hu
title: SeCo: Separating Unknown Musical Visual Sounds with Consistency Guidance
title_zh: SeCo：通过一致性指导分离未知的音乐视觉声音
abstract: Recent years have witnessed the success of deep learning on the visual sound separation task. However, existing works follow similar settings where the training and testing datasets share the same musical instrument categories, which to some extent limits the versatility of this task. In this work, we focus on a more general and challenging scenario, namely the separation of unknown musical instruments, where the categories in training and testing phases have no overlap with each other. To tackle this new setting, we propose the Separation-with-Consistency (SeCo) framework, which can accomplish the separation on unknown categories by exploiting the consistency constraints. Furthermore, to capture richer characteristics of the novel melodies, we devise an online matching strategy, which can bring stable enhancements with no cost of extra parameters. Experiments demonstrate that our SeCo framework exhibits strong adaptation ability on the novel musical categories and outperforms the baseline methods by a significant margin.
summary: Recent years have witnessed the success of deep learning on the visual sound separation task. However, existing works follow similar settings where the training and testing datasets share the same musical instrument categories, which to some extent limits the versatility of this task. In this work, we focus on a more general and challenging scenario, namely the separation of unknown musical instruments, where the categories in training and testing phases have no overlap with each other. To tackle this new setting, we propose the Separation-with-Consistency (SeCo) framework, which can accomplish the separation on unknown categories by exploiting the consistency constraints. Furthermore, to capture richer characteristics of the novel melodies, we devise an online matching strategy, which can bring stable enhancements with no cost of extra parameters. Experiments demonstrate that our SeCo framework exhibits strong adaptation ability on the novel musical categories and outperforms the baseline methods by a significant margin.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习在视觉声音分离任务上取得了成功。然而，现有的工作遵循类似的设置，其中训练和测试数据集共享相同的乐器类别，这在一定程度上限制了该任务的多功能性。在这项工作中，我们关注一个更普遍和更具挑战性的场景，即未知乐器的分离，其中训练和测试阶段的类别彼此不重叠。为了解决这个新的问题，我们提出了一致性分离（SeCo）框架，它可以通过利用一致性约束来完成未知类别的分离。此外，为了捕捉新颖旋律的更丰富特征，​​我们设计了一种在线匹配策略，它可以带来稳定的增强，而无需额外的参数成本。实验表明，我们的 SeCo 框架对新颖的音乐类别表现出很强的适应能力，并且明显优于基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeCo框架，解决训练与测试阶段乐器类别不重叠时的未知音乐视觉声音分离问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉声音分离方法依赖训练与测试数据集的乐器类别一致性，限制了模型在未知类别上的通用性。
AI.method: 设计分离-一致性（SeCo）框架，通过一致性约束实现未知类别分离，并引入无需额外参数的在线匹配策略以增强新旋律特征捕捉能力。
AI.result: 实验表明SeCo在未知音乐类别上具有显著的适应性，性能明显优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SeCo框架有效解决了未知类别视觉声音分离难题，验证了其在跨类别场景下的潜力。

result: 实验表明SeCo在未知音乐类别上具有显著的适应性，性能明显优于基线方法。
conclusion: SeCo框架有效解决了未知类别视觉声音分离难题，验证了其在跨类别场景下的潜力。
search_text: SeCo: Separating Unknown Musical Visual Sounds with Consistency Guidance SeCo：通过一致性指导分离未知的音乐视觉声音 Recent years have witnessed the success of deep learning on the visual sound separation task. However, existing works follow similar settings where the training and testing datasets share the same musical instrument categories, which to some extent limits the versatility of this task. In this work, we focus on a more general and challenging scenario, namely the separation of unknown musical instruments, where the categories in training and testing phases have no overlap with each other. To tackle this new setting, we propose the Separation-with-Consistency (SeCo) framework, which can accomplish the separation on unknown categories by exploiting the consistency constraints. Furthermore, to capture richer characteristics of the novel melodies, we devise an online matching strategy, which can bring stable enhancements with no cost of extra parameters. Experiments demonstrate that our SeCo framework exhibits strong adaptation ability on the novel musical categories and outperforms the baseline methods by a significant margin. 近年来，深度学习在视觉声音分离任务上取得了成功。然而，现有的工作遵循类似的设置，其中训练和测试数据集共享相同的乐器类别，这在一定程度上限制了该任务的多功能性。在这项工作中，我们关注一个更普遍和更具挑战性的场景，即未知乐器的分离，其中训练和测试阶段的类别彼此不重叠。为了解决这个新的问题，我们提出了一致性分离（SeCo）框架，它可以通过利用一致性约束来完成未知类别的分离。此外，为了捕捉新颖旋律的更丰富特征，​​我们设计了一种在线匹配策略，它可以带来稳定的增强，而无需额外的参数成本。实验表明，我们的 SeCo 框架对新颖的音乐类别表现出很强的适应能力，并且明显优于基线方法。 本文提出SeCo框架，解决训练与测试阶段乐器类别不重叠时的未知音乐视觉声音分离问题。 Xinchi Zhou,Dongzhan Zhou,Wanli Ouyang,Hang Zhou,Ziwei Liu,Di Hu cs.MM,cs.CV,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Xin Chen,Bin Yan,Jiawen Zhu,Huchuan Lu,Xiang Ruan,Dong Wang
title: High-Performance Transformer Tracking
title_zh: 高性能变压器跟踪
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.15436
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2103.15436
abstract: Correlation has a critical role in the tracking field, especially in recent popular Siamese-based trackers. The correlation operation is a simple fusion method that considers the similarity between the template and the search region. However, the correlation operation is a local linear matching process, losing semantic information and easily falling into a local optimum, which may be the bottleneck in designing high-accuracy tracking algorithms. In this work, to determine whether a better feature fusion method exists than correlation, a novel attention-based feature fusion network, inspired by the transformer, is presented. This network effectively combines the template and search region features using attention. Specifically, the proposed method includes an ego-context augment module based on self-attention and a cross-feature augment module based on cross-attention. First, we present a transformer tracking (named TransT) method based on the Siamese-like feature extraction backbone, the designed attention-based fusion mechanism, and the classification and regression head. Based on the TransT baseline, we further design a segmentation branch to generate an accurate mask. Finally, we propose a stronger version of TransT by extending TransT with a multi-template scheme and an IoU prediction head, named TransT-M. Experiments show that our TransT and TransT-M methods achieve promising results on seven popular datasets. Code and models are available at https://github.com/chenxin-dlut/TransT-M.

The correlation operation is a simple fusion method that considers the similarity between the template and the search region. In this work, to determine whether a better feature fusion method exists than correlation, a novel attention-based feature fusion network, inspired by the transformer, is presented. This network effectively combines the template and search region features using attention. Specifically, the proposed method includes an ego-context augment module based on self-attention and a cross-feature augment module based on cross-attention. First, we present a transformer tracking (named TransT) method based on the Siamese-like feature extraction backbone, the designed attention-based fusion mechanism, and the classification and regression head. Based on the TransT baseline, we further design a segmentation branch to generate an accurate mask. Finally, we propose a stronger version of TransT by extending TransT with a multi-template scheme and an IoU prediction head, named TransT-M. Experiments show that our TransT and TransT-M methods achieve promising results on seven popular datasets. Code and models are available at https://github.com/chenxin-dlut/TransT-M.
abstract_zh: 相关性在跟踪领域起着至关重要的作用，特别是在最近流行的基于连体的跟踪器中。相关运算是一种简单的融合方法，考虑了模板和搜索区域之间的相似性。然而，相关运算是一个局部线性匹配过程，会丢失语义信息，容易陷入局部最优，这可能是设计高精度跟踪算法的瓶颈。在这项工作中，为了确定是否存在比相关性更好的特征融合方法，受变压器的启发，提出了一种新颖的基于注意力的特征融合网络。该网络利用注意力有效地结合了模板和搜索区域特征。具体来说，所提出的方法包括基于自注意力的自我上下文增强模块和基于交叉注意力的跨特征增强模块。首先，我们提出了一种基于 Siamese 特征提取主干、设计的基于注意力的融合机制以及分类和回归头的变压器跟踪（称为 TransT）方法。基于 TransT 基线，我们进一步设计了分割分支来生成准确的掩模。最后，我们通过使用多模板方案和 IoU 预测头扩展 TransT，提出了更强的 TransT 版本，称为 TransT-M。实验表明，我们的 TransT 和 TransT-M 方法在七个流行数据集上取得了有希望的结果。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/chenxin-dlut/TransT-M 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的高性能目标跟踪方法TransT及改进版TransT-M，通过注意力机制改进特征融合以解决传统相关操作的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统相关操作在目标跟踪中存在语义信息丢失和局部最优问题，限制了跟踪精度的提升，需探索更有效的特征融合方法。
AI.method: 设计包含自注意力（ego-context augment）和交叉注意力（cross-feature augment）的Transformer融合网络，构建TransT框架并扩展为带分割分支和IoU预测头的TransT-M版本。
AI.result: TransT和TransT-M在七个主流数据集上取得有竞争力的跟踪效果，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: Transformer机制可有效提升目标跟踪性能，提出的注意力融合方法和多模板策略为后续研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Zhenrong Zhang,Jiefeng Ma,Jun Du,Licheng Wang,Jianshu Zhang
title: Multimodal Pre-training Based on Graph Attention Network for Document Understanding
title_zh: 基于图注意力网络的文档理解多模态预训练
abstract: Document intelligence as a relatively new research topic supports many business applications. Its main task is to automatically read, understand, and analyze documents. However, due to the diversity of formats (invoices, reports, forms, etc.) and layouts in documents, it is difficult to make machines understand documents. In this paper, we present the GraphDoc, a multimodal graph attention-based model for various document understanding tasks. GraphDoc is pre-trained in a multimodal framework by utilizing text, layout, and image information simultaneously. In a document, a text block relies heavily on its surrounding contexts, accordingly we inject the graph structure into the attention mechanism to form a graph attention layer so that each input node can only attend to its neighborhoods. The input nodes of each graph attention layer are composed of textual, visual, and positional features from semantically meaningful regions in a document image. We do the multimodal feature fusion of each node by the gate fusion layer. The contextualization between each node is modeled by the graph attention layer. GraphDoc learns a generic representation from only 320k unlabeled documents via the Masked Sentence Modeling task. Extensive experimental results on the publicly available datasets show that GraphDoc achieves state-of-the-art performance, which demonstrates the effectiveness of our proposed method. The code is available at https://github.com/ZZR8066/GraphDoc.
summary: Document intelligence as a relatively new research topic supports many business applications. Its main task is to automatically read, understand, and analyze documents. However, due to the diversity of formats (invoices, reports, forms, etc.) and layouts in documents, it is difficult to make machines understand documents. In this paper, we present the GraphDoc, a multimodal graph attention-based model for various document understanding tasks. GraphDoc is pre-trained in a multimodal framework by utilizing text, layout, and image information simultaneously. In a document, a text block relies heavily on its surrounding contexts, accordingly we inject the graph structure into the attention mechanism to form a graph attention layer so that each input node can only attend to its neighborhoods. The input nodes of each graph attention layer are composed of textual, visual, and positional features from semantically meaningful regions in a document image. We do the multimodal feature fusion of each node by the gate fusion layer. The contextualization between each node is modeled by the graph attention layer. GraphDoc learns a generic representation from only 320k unlabeled documents via the Masked Sentence Modeling task. Extensive experimental results on the publicly available datasets show that GraphDoc achieves state-of-the-art performance, which demonstrates the effectiveness of our proposed method. The code is available at https://github.com/ZZR8066/GraphDoc.
abstract_zh: 文档智能作为一个相对较新的研究主题支持许多业务应用程序。它的主要任务是自动阅读、理解和分析文档。然而，由于文档的格式（发票、报告、表格等）和布局的多样性，让机器理解文档是很困难的。在本文中，我们提出了 GraphDoc，这是一种基于多模态图注意力的模型，用于各种文档理解任务。 GraphDoc 通过同时利用文本、布局和图像信息在多模式框架中进行预训练。在文档中，文本块严重依赖于其周围的上下文，因此我们将图结构注入注意机制中以形成图注意层，以便每个输入节点只能关注其邻域。每个图注意力层的输入节点由来自文档图像中语义上有意义的区域的文本、视觉和位置特征组成。我们通过门融合层对每个节点进行多模态特征融合。每个节点之间的上下文由图注意力层建模。 GraphDoc 通过 Masked Sentence Modeling 任务仅从 320k 未标记文档中学习通用表示。对公开数据集的大量实验结果表明，GraphDoc 实现了最先进的性能，这证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/ZZR8066/GraphDoc 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图注意力网络的多模态预训练模型GraphDoc，用于解决文档理解任务中的格式多样性与布局复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 文档格式多样且布局复杂，传统方法难以有效捕捉文本块间的语义关联，导致机器难以准确理解文档内容。
AI.method: 通过融合文本、视觉和位置特征构建图结构，利用图注意力机制建模节点间上下文关系，并采用门控融合层实现多模态特征融合，通过掩码句子建模任务进行预训练。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上达到SOTA性能，证明了方法的有效性，且仅需32万份无标签文档即可学习通用表示。
AI.conclusion: GraphDoc通过多模态图注意力机制有效建模文档结构化信息，为复杂布局的文档理解提供了新思路。

GraphDoc learns a generic representation from only 320k unlabeled documents via the Masked Sentence Modeling task. Extensive experimental results on the publicly available datasets show that GraphDoc achieves state-of-the-art performance, which demonstrates the effectiveness of our proposed method. The code is available at https://github.com/ZZR8066/GraphDoc. 文档智能作为一个相对较新的研究主题支持许多业务应用程序。它的主要任务是自动阅读、理解和分析文档。然而，由于文档的格式（发票、报告、表格等）和布局的多样性，让机器理解文档是很困难的。在本文中，我们提出了 GraphDoc，这是一种基于多模态图注意力的模型，用于各种文档理解任务。 GraphDoc 通过同时利用文本、布局和图像信息在多模式框架中进行预训练。在文档中，文本块严重依赖于其周围的上下文，因此我们将图结构注入注意机制中以形成图注意层，以便每个输入节点只能关注其邻域。每个图注意力层的输入节点由来自文档图像中语义上有意义的区域的文本、视觉和位置特征组成。我们通过门融合层对每个节点进行多模态特征融合。每个节点之间的上下文由图注意力层建模。 GraphDoc 通过 Masked Sentence Modeling 任务仅从 320k 未标记文档中学习通用表示。对公开数据集的大量实验结果表明，GraphDoc 实现了最先进的性能，这证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/ZZR8066/GraphDoc 获取。 本文提出基于图注意力网络的多模态预训练模型GraphDoc，用于解决文档理解任务中的格式多样性与布局复杂性问题。 Zhenrong Zhang,Jiefeng Ma,Jun Du,Licheng Wang,Jianshu Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Max W. Y. Lam,Jun Wang,Dan Su,Dong Yu
title: BDDM: Bilateral Denoising Diffusion Models for Fast and High-Quality Speech Synthesis
title_zh: BDDM：用于快速、高质量语音合成的双边去噪扩散模型
comment: Accepted in ICLR 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.11514
comments: Accepted in ICLR 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.11514
abstract: Diffusion probabilistic models (DPMs) and their extensions have emerged as competitive generative models yet confront challenges of efficient sampling. We propose a new bilateral denoising diffusion model (BDDM) that parameterizes both the forward and reverse processes with a schedule network and a score network, which can train with a novel bilateral modeling objective. We show that the new surrogate objective can achieve a lower bound of the log marginal likelihood tighter than a conventional surrogate. We also find that BDDM allows inheriting pre-trained score network parameters from any DPMs and consequently enables speedy and stable learning of the schedule network and optimization of a noise schedule for sampling. Our experiments demonstrate that BDDMs can generate high-fidelity audio samples with as few as three sampling steps. Moreover, compared to other state-of-the-art diffusion-based neural vocoders, BDDMs produce comparable or higher quality samples indistinguishable from human speech, notably with only seven sampling steps (143x faster than WaveGrad and 28.6x faster than DiffWave). We release our code at https://github.com/tencent-ailab/bddm.
summary: Diffusion probabilistic models (DPMs) and their extensions have emerged as competitive generative models yet confront challenges of efficient sampling. We propose a new bilateral denoising diffusion model (BDDM) that parameterizes both the forward and reverse processes with a schedule network and a score network, which can train with a novel bilateral modeling objective. We show that the new surrogate objective can achieve a lower bound of the log marginal likelihood tighter than a conventional surrogate. We also find that BDDM allows inheriting pre-trained score network parameters from any DPMs and consequently enables speedy and stable learning of the schedule network and optimization of a noise schedule for sampling. Our experiments demonstrate that BDDMs can generate high-fidelity audio samples with as few as three sampling steps. Moreover, compared to other state-of-the-art diffusion-based neural vocoders, BDDMs produce comparable or higher quality samples indistinguishable from human speech, notably with only seven sampling steps (143x faster than WaveGrad and 28.6x faster than DiffWave). We release our code at https://github.com/tencent-ailab/bddm.
abstract_zh: 扩散概率模型（DPM）及其扩展已成为有竞争力的生成模型，但面临着有效采样的挑战。我们提出了一种新的双边去噪扩散模型（BDDM），该模型通过调度网络和评分网络对正向和反向过程进行参数化，该模型可以使用新颖的双边建模目标进行训练。我们表明，新的替代目标可以实现比传统替代目标更严格的对数边际似然下限。我们还发现 BDDM 允许从任何 DPM 继承预训练的评分网络参数，从而实现调度网络的快速稳定学习以及采样噪声调度的优化。我们的实验表明，BDDM 只需三个采样步骤即可生成高保真音频样本。此外，与其他最先进的基于扩散的神经声码器相比，BDDM 可以生成与人类语音无法区分的同等或更高质量的样本，特别是仅需要七个采样步骤（比 WaveGrad 快 143 倍，比 DiffWave 快 28.6 倍）。我们在 https://github.com/tencent-ailab/bddm 发布了我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双边去噪扩散模型（BDDM），用于实现快速且高质量的语音合成。
AI.motivation: 扩散概率模型（DPMs）在生成模型中表现出色，但面临采样效率低下的挑战。因此，本文旨在设计一种更高效的扩散模型，以实现高质量语音合成。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种双边去噪扩散模型（BDDM），该模型通过调度网络和分数网络参数化正向和反向过程，并采用一种新的双边建模目标进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，BDDM可以在仅需三步采样的情况下生成高质量的音频样本，并且相比其他最先进的扩散神经声码器，BDDM在七步采样下即可生成与人类语音无异的高质量语音样本，速度分别比WaveGrad快143倍，比DiffWave快28.6倍。
AI.conclusion: BDDM是一种高效的语音合成模型，能够在保持高质量语音输出的同时显著提升采样速度。

title: Analysis of the Production Strategy of Mask Types in the COVID-19 Environment
title_zh: COVID-19环境下口罩类型生产策略分析
abstract: Since the outbreak of the COVID-19 in December 2019, medical protective equipment such as disposable medical masks and KN95 masks have become essential resources for the public. Enterprises in all sectors of society have also transformed the production of medical masks. After the outbreak, how to choose the right time to produce medical protective masks, and what type of medical masks to produce will play a positive role in preventing and controlling the epidemic in a short time. In this regard, the evolutionary game competition analysis will be conducted through the relevant data of disposable medical masks and KN95 masks to determine the appropriate nodes for the production of corresponding mask types. After the research and analysis of the production strategy of mask types, it has a positive effect on how to guide the resumption of work and production.
summary: Since the outbreak of the COVID-19 in December 2019, medical protective equipment such as disposable medical masks and KN95 masks have become essential resources for the public. Enterprises in all sectors of society have also transformed the production of medical masks. After the outbreak, how to choose the right time to produce medical protective masks, and what type of medical masks to produce will play a positive role in preventing and controlling the epidemic in a short time. In this regard, the evolutionary game competition analysis will be conducted through the relevant data of disposable medical masks and KN95 masks to determine the appropriate nodes for the production of corresponding mask types. After the research and analysis of the production strategy of mask types, it has a positive effect on how to guide the resumption of work and production.
abstract_zh: 自2019年12月COVID-19爆发以来，一次性医用口罩、KN95口罩等医疗防护用品已成为公众的必备资源。社会各界企业也纷纷转型生产医用口罩。疫情发生后，如何选择合适的时机生产医用防护口罩，生产什么类型的医用口罩，将对短期内疫情防控起到积极作用。对此，将通过一次性医用口罩和KN95口罩的相关数据进行进化博弈竞争分析，以确定相应口罩类型生产的合适节点。经过对口罩种类生产策略的研究分析，对于如何引导复工复产具有积极作用。

AI.tldr: 分析新冠疫情环境下不同类型口罩的生产策略，确定最佳生产时机和类型以支持疫情防控。
AI.motivation: 疫情导致口罩需求激增，企业需决策生产时机和类型以有效满足公共需求并控制疫情传播。
AI.method: 基于一次性医用口罩与KN95口罩的相关数据，采用进化博弈竞争分析方法确定生产节点。
AI.result: 研究结果为复工复产提供了生产策略指导，明确了不同阶段口罩生产的优先级和资源配置方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过生产策略分析可优化医疗物资供应，提升疫情防控效率并促进社会经济恢复。

authors_text: Jinheng Xie,Jianfeng Xiang,Junliang Chen,Xianxu Hou,Xiaodong Zhao,Linlin Shen
title: Contrastive learning of Class-agnostic Activation Map for Weakly Supervised Object Localization and Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于弱监督对象定位和语义分割的类不可知激活图的对比学习
abstract: While class activation map (CAM) generated by image classification network has been widely used for weakly supervised object localization (WSOL) and semantic segmentation (WSSS), such classifiers usually focus on discriminative object regions. In this paper, we propose Contrastive learning for Class-agnostic Activation Map (C$^2$AM) generation only using unlabeled image data, without the involvement of image-level supervision. The core idea comes from the observation that i) semantic information of foreground objects usually differs from their backgrounds; ii) foreground objects with similar appearance or background with similar color/texture have similar representations in the feature space. We form the positive and negative pairs based on the above relations and force the network to disentangle foreground and background with a class-agnostic activation map using a novel contrastive loss. As the network is guided to discriminate cross-image foreground-background, the class-agnostic activation maps learned by our approach generate more complete object regions. We successfully extracted from C$^2$AM class-agnostic object bounding boxes for object localization and background cues to refine CAM generated by classification network for semantic segmentation. Extensive experiments on CUB-200-2011, ImageNet-1K, and PASCAL VOC2012 datasets show that both WSOL and WSSS can benefit from the proposed C$^2$AM.
summary: While class activation map (CAM) generated by image classification network has been widely used for weakly supervised object localization (WSOL) and semantic segmentation (WSSS), such classifiers usually focus on discriminative object regions. In this paper, we propose Contrastive learning for Class-agnostic Activation Map (C$^2$AM) generation only using unlabeled image data, without the involvement of image-level supervision. The core idea comes from the observation that i) semantic information of foreground objects usually differs from their backgrounds; ii) foreground objects with similar appearance or background with similar color/texture have similar representations in the feature space. We form the positive and negative pairs based on the above relations and force the network to disentangle foreground and background with a class-agnostic activation map using a novel contrastive loss. As the network is guided to discriminate cross-image foreground-background, the class-agnostic activation maps learned by our approach generate more complete object regions. We successfully extracted from C$^2$AM class-agnostic object bounding boxes for object localization and background cues to refine CAM generated by classification network for semantic segmentation. Extensive experiments on CUB-200-2011, ImageNet-1K, and PASCAL VOC2012 datasets show that both WSOL and WSSS can benefit from the proposed C$^2$AM.
abstract_zh: 虽然图像分类网络生成的类激活图（CAM）已广泛用于弱监督对象定位（WSOL）和语义分割（WSSS），但此类分类器通常专注于有判别性的对象区域。在本文中，我们提出仅使用未标记的图像数据来生成与类别无关的激活图（C$^2$AM）的对比学习，而不涉及图像级监督。核心思想来自于以下观察：i）前景对象的语义信息通常与其背景不同； ii）具有相似外观的前景对象或具有相似颜色/纹理的背景在特征空间中具有相似的表示。我们根据上述关系形成正负对，并使用新颖的对比损失，迫使网络通过与类别无关的激活图来解开前景和背景。当网络被引导来区分跨图像前景-背景时，通过我们的方法学习的与类无关的激活图会生成更完整的对象区域。我们成功地从 C$^2$AM 与类别无关的对象边界框中提取用于对象定位和背景线索，以细化分类网络生成的用于语义分割的 CAM。对 CUB-200-2011、ImageNet-1K 和 PASCAL VOC2012 数据集的大量实验表明，WSOL 和 WSSS 都可以从所提出的 C$^2$AM 中受益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需类别标签的对比学习方法，用于生成类无关激活图（C²AM），以提升弱监督目标定位和语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于分类网络的类激活图（CAM）在弱监督任务中易忽略完整目标区域，且依赖图像级监督。作者观察到前景与背景语义差异及相似外观/纹理的表示相似性，提出通过对比学习分离前景与背景。
AI.method: 构建正负样本对（基于前景-背景语义差异及外观/纹理相似性），设计对比损失函数训练网络生成类无关激活图（C²AM），并利用其提取目标边界框及优化语义分割的CAM。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011、ImageNet-1K和PASCAL VOC2012数据集上，C²AM显著提升了弱监督目标定位和语义分割的精度。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习生成的类无关激活图无需图像级监督即可有效分离前景与背景，为弱监督任务提供了更完整的对象区域信息。
