search_text: Contrastive learning of Class-agnostic Activation Map for Weakly Supervised Object Localization and Semantic Segmentation 用于弱监督对象定位和语义分割的类不可知激活图的对比学习 While class activation map (CAM) generated by image classification network has been widely used for weakly supervised object localization (WSOL) and semantic segmentation (WSSS), such classifiers usually focus on discriminative object regions. In this paper, we propose Contrastive learning for Class-agnostic Activation Map (C$^2$AM) generation only using unlabeled image data, without the involvement of image-level supervision. The core idea comes from the observation that i) semantic information of foreground objects usually differs from their backgrounds; ii) foreground objects with similar appearance or background with similar color/texture have similar representations in the feature space. We form the positive and negative pairs based on the above relations and force the network to disentangle foreground and background with a class-agnostic activation map using a novel contrastive loss. As the network is guided to discriminate cross-image foreground-background, the class-agnostic activation maps learned by our approach generate more complete object regions. We successfully extracted from C$^2$AM class-agnostic object bounding boxes for object localization and background cues to refine CAM generated by classification network for semantic segmentation. Extensive experiments on CUB-200-2011, ImageNet-1K, and PASCAL VOC2012 datasets show that both WSOL and WSSS can benefit from the proposed C$^2$AM. 虽然图像分类网络生成的类激活图（CAM）已广泛用于弱监督对象定位（WSOL）和语义分割（WSSS），但此类分类器通常专注于有判别性的对象区域。在本文中，我们提出仅使用未标记的图像数据来生成与类别无关的激活图（C$^2$AM）的对比学习，而不涉及图像级监督。核心思想来自于以下观察：i）前景对象的语义信息通常与其背景不同； ii）具有相似外观的前景对象或具有相似颜色/纹理的背景在特征空间中具有相似的表示。我们根据上述关系形成正负对，并使用新颖的对比损失，迫使网络通过与类别无关的激活图来解开前景和背景。当网络被引导来区分跨图像前景-背景时，通过我们的方法学习的与类无关的激活图会生成更完整的对象区域。我们成功地从 C$^2$AM 与类别无关的对象边界框中提取用于对象定位和背景线索，以细化分类网络生成的用于语义分割的 CAM。对 CUB-200-2011、ImageNet-1K 和 PASCAL VOC2012 数据集的大量实验表明，WSOL 和 WSSS 都可以从所提出的 C$^2$AM 中受益。 本文提出一种无需类别标签的对比学习方法，用于生成类无关激活图（C²AM），以提升弱监督目标定位和语义分割性能。 Jinheng Xie,Jianfeng Xiang,Junliang Chen,Xianxu Hou,Xiaodong Zhao,Linlin Shen cs.CV

title: EmoCaps: Emotion Capsule based Model for Conversational Emotion Recognition
title_zh: EmoCaps：基于情绪胶囊的会话情绪识别模型
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, accepted by Finding of ACL 2022
comments: 9 pages, 5 figures, accepted by Finding of ACL 2022
abstract: Emotion recognition in conversation (ERC) aims to analyze the speaker's state and identify their emotion in the conversation. Recent works in ERC focus on context modeling but ignore the representation of contextual emotional tendency. In order to extract multi-modal information and the emotional tendency of the utterance effectively, we propose a new structure named Emoformer to extract multi-modal emotion vectors from different modalities and fuse them with sentence vector to be an emotion capsule. Furthermore, we design an end-to-end ERC model called EmoCaps, which extracts emotion vectors through the Emoformer structure and obtain the emotion classification results from a context analysis model. Through the experiments with two benchmark datasets, our model shows better performance than the existing state-of-the-art models.
summary: Emotion recognition in conversation (ERC) aims to analyze the speaker's state and identify their emotion in the conversation. Recent works in ERC focus on context modeling but ignore the representation of contextual emotional tendency. In order to extract multi-modal information and the emotional tendency of the utterance effectively, we propose a new structure named Emoformer to extract multi-modal emotion vectors from different modalities and fuse them with sentence vector to be an emotion capsule. Furthermore, we design an end-to-end ERC model called EmoCaps, which extracts emotion vectors through the Emoformer structure and obtain the emotion classification results from a context analysis model. Through the experiments with two benchmark datasets, our model shows better performance than the existing state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 对话中的情绪识别（ERC）旨在分析说话者的状态并识别他们在对话中的情绪。 ERC最近的工作侧重于情境建模，但忽略了情境情感倾向的表示。为了有效地提取多模态信息和话语的情感倾向，我们提出了一种名为Emoformer的新结构，从不同模态中提取多模态情感向量，并将其与句子向量融合成为情感胶囊。此外，我们设计了一个名为 EmoCaps 的端到端 ERC 模型，它通过 Emoformer 结构提取情感向量，并从上下文分析模型中获得情感分类结果。通过两个基准数据集的实验，我们的模型显示出比现有最先进模型更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于情感胶囊的EmoCaps模型，用于对话情感识别任务，通过融合多模态信息和情感倾向提升识别效果。
AI.motivation: 现有对话情感识别方法侧重上下文建模，但忽视了对上下文情感倾向的表示，导致情感信息提取不充分。
AI.method: 设计Emoformer结构提取多模态情感向量，将其与句子向量融合生成情感胶囊，并通过端到端模型EmoCaps进行上下文分析和情感分类。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上，EmoCaps模型性能优于现有最先进方法，验证了多模态情感融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效建模多模态信息与情感倾向，EmoCaps模型在对话情感识别任务中实现了更优的分类效果。

title: Cooperative Path-following Control of Remotely Operated Underwater Robots for Human Visual Inspection Task
title_zh: 用于人类视觉检查任务的远程操作水下机器人的协作路径跟踪控制
abstract: Remotely operated vehicles (ROVs) have drawn much attention to underwater tasks, such as the inspection and maintenance of infrastructure. The workload of ROV operators tends to be high, even for the skilled ones. Therefore, assistance methods for the operators are desired. This study focuses on a task in which a human operator controls an underwater robot to follow a certain path while visually inspecting objects in the vicinity of the path. In such a task, it is desirable to realize the speed of trajectory control manually because the visual inspection is performed by a human operator. However, to allocate resources to visual inspection, it is desirable to minimize the workload on the path-following by assisting with the automatic control. Therefore, the objective of this study was to develop a cooperative path-following control method that achieves the above-mentioned task by expanding a robust path-following control law of nonholonomic wheeled vehicles. To simplify this problem, we considered a path-following and visual objects recognition task in a two-dimensional plane. We conducted an experiment with participants (n=16) who completed the task using the proposed method and manual control. The results showed that both the path-following errors and the workload of the participants were significantly smaller with the proposed method than with manual control. In addition, subjective responses demonstrated that operator attention tended to be allocated to objects recognition rather than robot operation tasks with the proposed method. These results indicate the effectiveness of the proposed cooperative path-following control method.
summary: Remotely operated vehicles (ROVs) have drawn much attention to underwater tasks, such as the inspection and maintenance of infrastructure. The workload of ROV operators tends to be high, even for the skilled ones. Therefore, assistance methods for the operators are desired. This study focuses on a task in which a human operator controls an underwater robot to follow a certain path while visually inspecting objects in the vicinity of the path. In such a task, it is desirable to realize the speed of trajectory control manually because the visual inspection is performed by a human operator. However, to allocate resources to visual inspection, it is desirable to minimize the workload on the path-following by assisting with the automatic control. Therefore, the objective of this study was to develop a cooperative path-following control method that achieves the above-mentioned task by expanding a robust path-following control law of nonholonomic wheeled vehicles. To simplify this problem, we considered a path-following and visual objects recognition task in a two-dimensional plane. We conducted an experiment with participants (n=16) who completed the task using the proposed method and manual control. The results showed that both the path-following errors and the workload of the participants were significantly smaller with the proposed method than with manual control. In addition, subjective responses demonstrated that operator attention tended to be allocated to objects recognition rather than robot operation tasks with the proposed method. These results indicate the effectiveness of the proposed cooperative path-following control method.
abstract_zh: 遥控潜水器 (ROV) 引起了人们对水下任务的广泛关注，例如基础设施的检查和维护。 ROV 操作员的工作量往往很高，即使对于技术熟练的操作员来说也是如此。因此，需要对操作者的辅助方法。本研究的重点是人类操作员控制水下机器人遵循特定路径，同时目视检查路径附近的物体的任务。在这样的任务中，由于目视检查是由操作员执行的，所以希望手动实现轨迹控制的速度。然而，为了将资源分配给目视检查，需要通过辅助自动控制来最小化路径跟踪的工作量。因此，本研究的目的是开发一种协作路径跟踪控制方法，通过扩展非完整轮式车辆的鲁棒路径跟踪控制律来实现上述任务。为了简化这个问题，我们考虑了二维平面中的路径跟踪和视觉对象识别任务。我们对使用所提出的方法和手动控制完成任务的参与者（n = 16）进行了实验。结果表明，与手动控制相比，所提出的方法的路径跟踪误差和参与者的工作量均明显较小。此外，主观反应表明，使用所提出的方法，操作员的注意力倾向于分配给物体识别，而不是机器人操作任务。这些结果表明了所提出的协作路径跟踪控制方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种协作路径跟踪控制方法，用于协助操作员在水下机器人进行视觉检查任务时的路径跟踪。
AI.motivation: 远程操作水下机器人（ROVs）执行水下任务时，操作员的工作量较大，需要一种方法来减轻操作员在路径跟踪上的负担，以提高视觉检查效率。
AI.method: 通过扩展非完整轮式车辆的鲁棒路径跟踪控制律，开发了一种协作路径跟踪控制方法，并在二维平面中进行了路径跟踪和视觉识别任务的实验。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，与手动控制相比，所提出的方法显著减少了路径跟踪误差和操作员的工作量，并且操作员的注意力更倾向于分配给目标识别任务。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的协作路径跟踪控制方法在减轻操作员负担和提高视觉检查任务效率方面是有效的。

method: 通过扩展非完整轮式车辆的鲁棒路径跟踪控制律，开发了一种协作路径跟踪控制方法，并在二维平面中进行了路径跟踪和视觉识别任务的实验。
result: 实验结果表明，与手动控制相比，所提出的方法显著减少了路径跟踪误差和操作员的工作量，并且操作员的注意力更倾向于分配给目标识别任务。
conclusion: 所提出的协作路径跟踪控制方法在减轻操作员负担和提高视觉检查任务效率方面是有效的。
search_text: Cooperative Path-following Control of Remotely Operated Underwater Robots for Human Visual Inspection Task 用于人类视觉检查任务的远程操作水下机器人的协作路径跟踪控制 Remotely operated vehicles (ROVs) have drawn much attention to underwater tasks, such as the inspection and maintenance of infrastructure. The workload of ROV operators tends to be high, even for the skilled ones. Therefore, assistance methods for the operators are desired. This study focuses on a task in which a human operator controls an underwater robot to follow a certain path while visually inspecting objects in the vicinity of the path. In such a task, it is desirable to realize the speed of trajectory control manually because the visual inspection is performed by a human operator. However, to allocate resources to visual inspection, it is desirable to minimize the workload on the path-following by assisting with the automatic control. Therefore, the objective of this study was to develop a cooperative path-following control method that achieves the above-mentioned task by expanding a robust path-following control law of nonholonomic wheeled vehicles. To simplify this problem, we considered a path-following and visual objects recognition task in a two-dimensional plane. We conducted an experiment with participants (n=16) who completed the task using the proposed method and manual control. The results showed that both the path-following errors and the workload of the participants were significantly smaller with the proposed method than with manual control. In addition, subjective responses demonstrated that operator attention tended to be allocated to objects recognition rather than robot operation tasks with the proposed method. These results indicate the effectiveness of the proposed cooperative path-following control method. 遥控潜水器 (ROV) 引起了人们对水下任务的广泛关注，例如基础设施的检查和维护。 ROV 操作员的工作量往往很高，即使对于技术熟练的操作员来说也是如此。因此，需要对操作者的辅助方法。本研究的重点是人类操作员控制水下机器人遵循特定路径，同时目视检查路径附近的物体的任务。在这样的任务中，由于目视检查是由操作员执行的，所以希望手动实现轨迹控制的速度。然而，为了将资源分配给目视检查，需要通过辅助自动控制来最小化路径跟踪的工作量。因此，本研究的目的是开发一种协作路径跟踪控制方法，通过扩展非完整轮式车辆的鲁棒路径跟踪控制律来实现上述任务。为了简化这个问题，我们考虑了二维平面中的路径跟踪和视觉对象识别任务。我们对使用所提出的方法和手动控制完成任务的参与者（n = 16）进行了实验。结果表明，与手动控制相比，所提出的方法的路径跟踪误差和参与者的工作量均明显较小。此外，主观反应表明，使用所提出的方法，操作员的注意力倾向于分配给物体识别，而不是机器人操作任务。这些结果表明了所提出的协作路径跟踪控制方法的有效性。 本文提出了一种协作路径跟踪控制方法，用于协助操作员在水下机器人进行视觉检查任务时的路径跟踪。 Eito Sato,Hailong Liu,Norimitsu Sakagami,Takahiro Wada cs.RO

authors_text: Yunjie Ge,Qian Wang,Jingfeng Zhang,Juntao Zhou,Yunzhu Zhang,Chao Shen
title: WaveFuzz: A Clean-Label Poisoning Attack to Protect Your Voice
title_zh: WaveFuzz：一种干净标签的中毒攻击，保护您的声音
abstract: People are not always receptive to their voice data being collected and misused. Training the audio intelligence systems needs these data to build useful features, but the cost for getting permissions or purchasing data is very high, which inevitably encourages hackers to collect these voice data without people's awareness. To discourage the hackers from proactively collecting people's voice data, we are the first to propose a clean-label poisoning attack, called WaveFuzz, which can prevent intelligence audio models from building useful features from protected (poisoned) voice data but still preserve the semantic information to the humans. Specifically, WaveFuzz perturbs the voice data to cause Mel Frequency Cepstral Coefficients (MFCC) (typical representations of audio signals) to generate the poisoned frequency features. These poisoned features are then fed to audio prediction models, which degrades the performance of audio intelligence systems. Empirically, we show the efficacy of WaveFuzz by attacking two representative types of intelligent audio systems, i.e., speaker recognition system (SR) and speech command recognition system (SCR). For example, the accuracies of models are declined by $19.78\%$ when only $10\%$ of the poisoned voice data is to fine-tune models, and the accuracies of models declined by $6.07\%$ when only $10\%$ of the training voice data is poisoned. Consequently, WaveFuzz is an effective technique that enables people to fight back to protect their own voice data, which sheds new light on ameliorating privacy issues.
summary: People are not always receptive to their voice data being collected and misused. Training the audio intelligence systems needs these data to build useful features, but the cost for getting permissions or purchasing data is very high, which inevitably encourages hackers to collect these voice data without people's awareness. To discourage the hackers from proactively collecting people's voice data, we are the first to propose a clean-label poisoning attack, called WaveFuzz, which can prevent intelligence audio models from building useful features from protected (poisoned) voice data but still preserve the semantic information to the humans. Specifically, WaveFuzz perturbs the voice data to cause Mel Frequency Cepstral Coefficients (MFCC) (typical representations of audio signals) to generate the poisoned frequency features. These poisoned features are then fed to audio prediction models, which degrades the performance of audio intelligence systems. Empirically, we show the efficacy of WaveFuzz by attacking two representative types of intelligent audio systems, i.e., speaker recognition system (SR) and speech command recognition system (SCR). For example, the accuracies of models are declined by $19.78\%$ when only $10\%$ of the poisoned voice data is to fine-tune models, and the accuracies of models declined by $6.07\%$ when only $10\%$ of the training voice data is poisoned. Consequently, WaveFuzz is an effective technique that enables people to fight back to protect their own voice data, which sheds new light on ameliorating privacy issues.
abstract_zh: 人们并不总是愿意接受他们的语音数据被收集和滥用。训练音频智能系统需要这些数据来构建有用的功能，但获得许可或购买数据的成本非常高，这不可避免地鼓励黑客在人们不知情的情况下收集这些语音数据。为了阻止黑客主动收集人们的语音数据，我们第一个提出了一种名为 WaveFuzz 的干净标签中毒攻击，它可以阻止智能音频模型从受保护（中毒）的语音数据中构建有用的特征，但仍然为人类保留语义信息。具体来说，WaveFuzz 扰乱语音数据，导致梅尔频率倒谱系数 (MFCC)（音频信号的典型表示）生成中毒频率特征。然后，这些有毒的特征会被输入音频预测模型，从而降低音频智能系统的性能。根据经验，我们通过攻击两种代表性的智能音频系统，即说话人识别系统（SR）和语音命令识别系统（SCR）来展示 WaveFuzz 的功效。例如，当只有$10\%$的中毒语音数据用于微调模型时，模型的准确率下降了$19.78\%$；当只有$10\%$的训练语音数据被中毒时，模型的准确率下降了$6.07\%$。因此，WaveFuzz 是一种有效的技术，使人们能够反击以保护自己的语音数据，这为改善隐私问题提供了新的思路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为WaveFuzz的干净标签投毒攻击方法，通过破坏语音数据的MFCC特征来保护用户语音隐私，同时保留人类可感知的语义信息。
AI.motivation: 语音数据收集成本高昂且存在被黑客非法获取的风险，现有方法难以有效阻止恶意收集行为，需开发新型防御技术保护用户隐私。
AI.method: 通过扰动语音信号生成中毒频率特征，使MFCC特征失效从而降低音频模型性能，同时保持人类可识别的语义信息。
AI.result: 在说话人识别和语音指令识别系统中，仅10%中毒数据即可使模型准确率分别下降19.78%和6.07%。
AI.conclusion: WaveFuzz为用户对抗语音数据滥用提供了有效技术手段，为隐私保护问题提供了新思路。

title: Compare learning: bi-attention network for few-shot learning
title_zh: 比较学习：用于小样本学习的双注意力网络
abstract: Learning with few labeled data is a key challenge for visual recognition, as deep neural networks tend to overfit using a few samples only. One of the Few-shot learning methods called metric learning addresses this challenge by first learning a deep distance metric to determine whether a pair of images belong to the same category, then applying the trained metric to instances from other test set with limited labels. This method makes the most of the few samples and limits the overfitting effectively. However, extant metric networks usually employ Linear classifiers or Convolutional neural networks (CNN) that are not precise enough to globally capture the subtle differences between vectors. In this paper, we propose a novel approach named Bi-attention network to compare the instances, which can measure the similarity between embeddings of instances precisely, globally and efficiently. We verify the effectiveness of our model on two benchmarks. Experiments show that our approach achieved improved accuracy and convergence speed over baseline models.
summary: Learning with few labeled data is a key challenge for visual recognition, as deep neural networks tend to overfit using a few samples only. One of the Few-shot learning methods called metric learning addresses this challenge by first learning a deep distance metric to determine whether a pair of images belong to the same category, then applying the trained metric to instances from other test set with limited labels. This method makes the most of the few samples and limits the overfitting effectively. However, extant metric networks usually employ Linear classifiers or Convolutional neural networks (CNN) that are not precise enough to globally capture the subtle differences between vectors. In this paper, we propose a novel approach named Bi-attention network to compare the instances, which can measure the similarity between embeddings of instances precisely, globally and efficiently. We verify the effectiveness of our model on two benchmarks. Experiments show that our approach achieved improved accuracy and convergence speed over baseline models.
abstract_zh: 使用少量标记数据进行学习是视觉识别的一个关键挑战，因为深度神经网络往往仅使用少量样本就会过度拟合。称为度量学习的少样本学习方法之一通过首先学习深度距离度量来确定一对图像是否属于同一类别，然后将训练后的度量应用于来自具有有限标签的其他测试集的实例来解决这一挑战。该方法充分利用了少数样本，有效限制了过拟合。然而，现有的度量网络通常采用线性分类器或卷积神经网络（CNN），它们不够精确，无法全局捕获向量之间的细微差异。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为双注意力网络的新方法来比较实例，它可以精确、全局、有效地测量实例嵌入之间的相似性。我们在两个基准上验证了模型的有效性。实验表明，我们的方法比基线模型提高了准确性和收敛速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Bi-attention网络的新方法，用于解决小样本学习中的实例比较问题，以提高分类准确性和收敛速度。
AI.motivation: 现有度量学习方法（如线性分类器或CNN）难以精确捕捉向量间的细微差异，导致小样本场景下模型表现不足。
AI.method: 设计Bi-attention网络，通过双注意力机制全局且高效地度量实例嵌入间的相似性，提升特征表示的判别能力。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在准确率和收敛速度上均优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: Bi-attention网络有效解决了传统方法在小样本学习中的精度和效率问题，为度量学习提供了新思路。

Experiments show that our approach achieved improved accuracy and convergence speed over baseline models. 使用少量标记数据进行学习是视觉识别的一个关键挑战，因为深度神经网络往往仅使用少量样本就会过度拟合。称为度量学习的少样本学习方法之一通过首先学习深度距离度量来确定一对图像是否属于同一类别，然后将训练后的度量应用于来自具有有限标签的其他测试集的实例来解决这一挑战。该方法充分利用了少数样本，有效限制了过拟合。然而，现有的度量网络通常采用线性分类器或卷积神经网络（CNN），它们不够精确，无法全局捕获向量之间的细微差异。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为双注意力网络的新方法来比较实例，它可以精确、全局、有效地测量实例嵌入之间的相似性。我们在两个基准上验证了模型的有效性。实验表明，我们的方法比基线模型提高了准确性和收敛速度。 本文提出了一种名为Bi-attention网络的新方法，用于解决小样本学习中的实例比较问题，以提高分类准确性和收敛速度。 Li Ke,Meng Pan,Weigao Wen,Dong Li cs.CV

authors_text: Jingxi Li,Yi-Chun Hung,Onur Kulce,Deniz Mengu,Aydogan Ozcan
title: Polarization Multiplexed Diffractive Computing: All-Optical Implementation of a Group of Linear Transformations Through a Polarization-Encoded Diffractive Network
title_zh: 偏振复用衍射计算：通过偏振编码衍射网络全光实现一组线性变换
abstract: Research on optical computing has recently attracted significant attention due to the transformative advances in machine learning. Among different approaches, diffractive optical networks composed of spatially-engineered transmissive surfaces have been demonstrated for all-optical statistical inference and performing arbitrary linear transformations using passive, free-space optical layers. Here, we introduce a polarization multiplexed diffractive processor to all-optically perform multiple, arbitrarily-selected linear transformations through a single diffractive network trained using deep learning. In this framework, an array of pre-selected linear polarizers is positioned between trainable transmissive diffractive materials that are isotropic, and different target linear transformations (complex-valued) are uniquely assigned to different combinations of input/output polarization states. The transmission layers of this polarization multiplexed diffractive network are trained and optimized via deep learning and error-backpropagation by using thousands of examples of the input/output fields corresponding to each one of the complex-valued linear transformations assigned to different input/output polarization combinations. Our results and analysis reveal that a single diffractive network can successfully approximate and all-optically implement a group of arbitrarily-selected target transformations with a negligible error when the number of trainable diffractive features/neurons (N) approaches N_p x N_i x N_o, where N_i and N_o represent the number of pixels at the input and output fields-of-view, respectively, and N_p refers to the number of unique linear transformations assigned to different input/output polarization combinations. This polarization-multiplexed all-optical diffractive processor can find various applications in optical computing and polarization-based machine vision tasks.
summary: Research on optical computing has recently attracted significant attention due to the transformative advances in machine learning. Among different approaches, diffractive optical networks composed of spatially-engineered transmissive surfaces have been demonstrated for all-optical statistical inference and performing arbitrary linear transformations using passive, free-space optical layers. Here, we introduce a polarization multiplexed diffractive processor to all-optically perform multiple, arbitrarily-selected linear transformations through a single diffractive network trained using deep learning. In this framework, an array of pre-selected linear polarizers is positioned between trainable transmissive diffractive materials that are isotropic, and different target linear transformations (complex-valued) are uniquely assigned to different combinations of input/output polarization states. The transmission layers of this polarization multiplexed diffractive network are trained and optimized via deep learning and error-backpropagation by using thousands of examples of the input/output fields corresponding to each one of the complex-valued linear transformations assigned to different input/output polarization combinations. Our results and analysis reveal that a single diffractive network can successfully approximate and all-optically implement a group of arbitrarily-selected target transformations with a negligible error when the number of trainable diffractive features/neurons (N) approaches N_p x N_i x N_o, where N_i and N_o represent the number of pixels at the input and output fields-of-view, respectively, and N_p refers to the number of unique linear transformations assigned to different input/output polarization combinations. This polarization-multiplexed all-optical diffractive processor can find various applications in optical computing and polarization-based machine vision tasks.
abstract_zh: 由于机器学习的变革性进步，光学计算的研究最近引起了极大的关注。在不同的方法中，由空间工程透射表面组成的衍射光学网络已被证明可用于全光学统计推断并使用无源自由空间光学层执行任意线性变换。在这里，我们引入了一种偏振复用衍射处理器，通过使用深度学习训练的单个衍射网络以全光学方式执行多个任意选择的线性变换。在此框架中，预先选择的线性偏振器阵列位于各向同性的可训练透射衍射材料之间，并且不同的目标线性变换（复值）被唯一地分配给输入/输出偏振状态的不同组合。该偏振复用衍射网络的传输层通过深度学习和误差反向传播进行训练和优化，方法是使用与分配给不同输入/输出偏振组合的每一个复值线性变换相对应的数千个输入/输出场示例。我们的结果和分析表明，当可训练衍射特征/神经元的数量 (N) 接近 N_p x N_i x N_o 时，单个衍射网络可以成功近似并全光学地实现一组任意选择的目标变换，且误差可忽略不计，其中 N_i 和 N_o 分别表示输入和输出视场的像素数，N_p 指分配给不同输入/输出偏振的唯一线性变换的数量组合。这种偏振复用全光衍射处理器可以在光学计算和基于偏振的机器视觉任务中找到各种应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于偏振复用的衍射计算处理器，通过单个训练好的衍射网络实现多种任意选择的线性变换。
AI.motivation: 光学计算在机器学习领域具有潜力，但现有方法难以通过单一网络实现多组线性变换，需提升光学处理器的多功能性与效率。
AI.method: 利用预选线性偏振片与可训练的各向同性衍射材料组合，通过深度学习与误差反向传播算法优化衍射层，将不同线性变换分配至特定输入/输出偏振态组合。
AI.result: 实验表明，当可训练衍射特征数接近N_p×N_i×N_o时，单个衍射网络可近似实现多组目标变换，误差可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 该偏振复用光学处理器为光学计算和基于偏振的机器视觉任务提供了高效解决方案，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: Enhancing Transferability of Adversarial Examples with Spatial Momentum
title_zh: 利用空间动量增强对抗性示例的可迁移性
comment: Accepted as Oral by 5-th Chinese Conference on Pattern Recognition and Computer Vision, PRCV 2022
comments: Accepted as Oral by 5-th Chinese Conference on Pattern Recognition and Computer Vision, PRCV 2022
abstract: Many adversarial attack methods achieve satisfactory attack success rates under the white-box setting, but they usually show poor transferability when attacking other DNN models. Momentum-based attack is one effective method to improve transferability. It integrates the momentum term into the iterative process, which can stabilize the update directions by adding the gradients' temporal correlation for each pixel. We argue that only this temporal momentum is not enough, the gradients from the spatial domain within an image, i.e. gradients from the context pixels centered on the target pixel are also important to the stabilization. For that, we propose a novel method named Spatial Momentum Iterative FGSM attack (SMI-FGSM), which introduces the mechanism of momentum accumulation from temporal domain to spatial domain by considering the context information from different regions within the image. SMI-FGSM is then integrated with temporal momentum to simultaneously stabilize the gradients' update direction from both the temporal and spatial domains. Extensive experiments show that our method indeed further enhances adversarial transferability. It achieves the best transferability success rate for multiple mainstream undefended and defended models, which outperforms the state-of-the-art attack methods by a large margin of 10\% on average.
summary: Many adversarial attack methods achieve satisfactory attack success rates under the white-box setting, but they usually show poor transferability when attacking other DNN models. Momentum-based attack is one effective method to improve transferability. It integrates the momentum term into the iterative process, which can stabilize the update directions by adding the gradients' temporal correlation for each pixel. We argue that only this temporal momentum is not enough, the gradients from the spatial domain within an image, i.e. gradients from the context pixels centered on the target pixel are also important to the stabilization. For that, we propose a novel method named Spatial Momentum Iterative FGSM attack (SMI-FGSM), which introduces the mechanism of momentum accumulation from temporal domain to spatial domain by considering the context information from different regions within the image. SMI-FGSM is then integrated with temporal momentum to simultaneously stabilize the gradients' update direction from both the temporal and spatial domains. Extensive experiments show that our method indeed further enhances adversarial transferability. It achieves the best transferability success rate for multiple mainstream undefended and defended models, which outperforms the state-of-the-art attack methods by a large margin of 10\% on average.
abstract_zh: 许多对抗性攻击方法在白盒设置下取得了令人满意的攻击成功率，但在攻击其他 DNN 模型时通常表现出较差的可移植性。基于动量的攻击是提高可转移性的一种有效方法。它将动量项集成到迭代过程中，可以通过添加每个像素的梯度时间相关性来稳定更新方向。我们认为，仅仅这种时间动量是不够的，图像内空间域的梯度，即以目标像素为中心的上下文像素的梯度对于稳定也很重要。为此，我们提出了一种名为空间动量迭代 FGSM 攻击（SMI-FGSM）的新方法，该方法通过考虑图像内不同区域的上下文信息，引入从时域到空间域的动量积累机制。然后，SMI-FGSM 与时间动量集成，以同时稳定时域和空间域的梯度更新方向。大量实验表明，我们的方法确实进一步增强了对抗性可转移性。它在多种主流不设防和设防模型中实现了最佳的可迁移成功率，平均优于最先进的攻击方法10%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SMI-FGSM的新方法，旨在提高对抗样本在不同深度神经网络模型之间的可迁移性。
AI.motivation: 现有的对抗攻击方法在白盒环境下表现良好，但在迁移攻击其他DNN模型时效果较差。虽然基于动量的攻击方法能提高迁移性，但仅依靠时间域的动量不足以稳定梯度更新方向。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种将时间域动量机制扩展到空间域的方法，通过考虑图像中不同区域的上下文信息，引入空间动量机制，并将其与时间动量结合，以稳定梯度更新方向。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著提高了对抗样本的迁移性，在多个主流未防御和防御模型上均取得了优于现有最先进方法10%以上的成功率。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的空间动量机制有效提升了对抗样本的迁移性，为未来对抗攻击方法的研究提供了新的思路。

It achieves the best transferability success rate for multiple mainstream undefended and defended models, which outperforms the state-of-the-art attack methods by a large margin of 10\% on average. 许多对抗性攻击方法在白盒设置下取得了令人满意的攻击成功率，但在攻击其他 DNN 模型时通常表现出较差的可移植性。基于动量的攻击是提高可转移性的一种有效方法。它将动量项集成到迭代过程中，可以通过添加每个像素的梯度时间相关性来稳定更新方向。我们认为，仅仅这种时间动量是不够的，图像内空间域的梯度，即以目标像素为中心的上下文像素的梯度对于稳定也很重要。为此，我们提出了一种名为空间动量迭代 FGSM 攻击（SMI-FGSM）的新方法，该方法通过考虑图像内不同区域的上下文信息，引入从时域到空间域的动量积累机制。然后，SMI-FGSM 与时间动量集成，以同时稳定时域和空间域的梯度更新方向。大量实验表明，我们的方法确实进一步增强了对抗性可转移性。它在多种主流不设防和设防模型中实现了最佳的可迁移成功率，平均优于最先进的攻击方法10%。 本文提出了一种名为SMI-FGSM的新方法，旨在提高对抗样本在不同深度神经网络模型之间的可迁移性。 Guoqiu Wang,Huanqian Yan,Xingxing Wei cs.CV

title: Facial Expression Recognition with Swin Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Swin Transformer 进行面部表情识别
abstract: The task of recognizing human facial expressions plays a vital role in various human-related systems, including health care and medical fields. With the recent success of deep learning and the accessibility of a large amount of annotated data, facial expression recognition research has been mature enough to be utilized in real-world scenarios with audio-visual datasets. In this paper, we introduce Swin transformer-based facial expression approach for an in-the-wild audio-visual dataset of the Aff-Wild2 Expression dataset. Specifically, we employ a three-stream network (i.e., Visual stream, Temporal stream, and Audio stream) for the audio-visual videos to fuse the multi-modal information into facial expression recognition. Experimental results on the Aff-Wild2 dataset show the effectiveness of our proposed multi-modal approaches.
summary: The task of recognizing human facial expressions plays a vital role in various human-related systems, including health care and medical fields. With the recent success of deep learning and the accessibility of a large amount of annotated data, facial expression recognition research has been mature enough to be utilized in real-world scenarios with audio-visual datasets. In this paper, we introduce Swin transformer-based facial expression approach for an in-the-wild audio-visual dataset of the Aff-Wild2 Expression dataset. Specifically, we employ a three-stream network (i.e., Visual stream, Temporal stream, and Audio stream) for the audio-visual videos to fuse the multi-modal information into facial expression recognition. Experimental results on the Aff-Wild2 dataset show the effectiveness of our proposed multi-modal approaches.
abstract_zh: 识别人类面部表情的任务在各种人类相关系统中发挥着至关重要的作用，包括医疗保健和医疗领域。随着深度学习最近的成功和大量注释数据的可访问性，面部表情识别研究已经足够成熟，可以在具有视听数据集的现实场景中使用。在本文中，我们介绍了基于 Swin 转换器的面部表情方法，用于 Aff-Wild2 表达数据集的野外视听数据集。具体来说，我们对视听视频采用三流网络（即视觉流、时间流和音频流），将多模态信息融合到面部表情识别中。 Aff-Wild2 数据集上的实验结果表明了我们提出的多模态方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Swin Transformer的多模态面部表情识别方法，用于处理Aff-Wild2数据集中的音频-视觉数据。
AI.motivation: 面部表情识别在医疗健康等领域具有重要意义，而现有方法在真实场景下的音频-视觉多模态信息融合能力不足，需进一步提升识别效果。
AI.method: 设计包含视觉流、时序流和音频流的三流网络，利用Swin Transformer提取多模态特征并进行信息融合。
AI.result: 在Aff-Wild2数据集上的实验验证了所提多模态方法的有效性，显著提升了面部表情识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的多模态融合方法为真实场景下的面部表情识别提供了新的技术路径，具有实际应用价值。

title: Non-Probability Sampling Network for Stochastic Human Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: 用于随机人体轨迹预测的非概率采样网络
abstract: Capturing multimodal natures is essential for stochastic pedestrian trajectory prediction, to infer a finite set of future trajectories. The inferred trajectories are based on observation paths and the latent vectors of potential decisions of pedestrians in the inference step. However, stochastic approaches provide varying results for the same data and parameter settings, due to the random sampling of the latent vector. In this paper, we analyze the problem by reconstructing and comparing probabilistic distributions from prediction samples and socially-acceptable paths, respectively. Through this analysis, we observe that the inferences of all stochastic models are biased toward the random sampling, and fail to generate a set of realistic paths from finite samples. The problem cannot be resolved unless an infinite number of samples is available, which is infeasible in practice. We introduce that the Quasi-Monte Carlo (QMC) method, ensuring uniform coverage on the sampling space, as an alternative to the conventional random sampling. With the same finite number of samples, the QMC improves all the multimodal prediction results. We take an additional step ahead by incorporating a learnable sampling network into the existing networks for trajectory prediction. For this purpose, we propose the Non-Probability Sampling Network (NPSN), a very small network (~5K parameters) that generates purposive sample sequences using the past paths of pedestrians and their social interactions. Extensive experiments confirm that NPSN can significantly improve both the prediction accuracy (up to 60%) and reliability of the public pedestrian trajectory prediction benchmark. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/inhwanbae/NPSN .
summary: Capturing multimodal natures is essential for stochastic pedestrian trajectory prediction, to infer a finite set of future trajectories. The inferred trajectories are based on observation paths and the latent vectors of potential decisions of pedestrians in the inference step. However, stochastic approaches provide varying results for the same data and parameter settings, due to the random sampling of the latent vector. In this paper, we analyze the problem by reconstructing and comparing probabilistic distributions from prediction samples and socially-acceptable paths, respectively. Through this analysis, we observe that the inferences of all stochastic models are biased toward the random sampling, and fail to generate a set of realistic paths from finite samples. The problem cannot be resolved unless an infinite number of samples is available, which is infeasible in practice. We introduce that the Quasi-Monte Carlo (QMC) method, ensuring uniform coverage on the sampling space, as an alternative to the conventional random sampling. With the same finite number of samples, the QMC improves all the multimodal prediction results. We take an additional step ahead by incorporating a learnable sampling network into the existing networks for trajectory prediction. For this purpose, we propose the Non-Probability Sampling Network (NPSN), a very small network (~5K parameters) that generates purposive sample sequences using the past paths of pedestrians and their social interactions. Extensive experiments confirm that NPSN can significantly improve both the prediction accuracy (up to 60%) and reliability of the public pedestrian trajectory prediction benchmark. Code is publicly available at https://github.com/inhwanbae/NPSN .
abstract_zh: 捕获多模态性质对于随机行人轨迹预测至关重要，以推断一组有限的未来轨迹。推断的轨迹基于观察路径和推断步骤中行人潜在决策的潜在向量。然而，由于潜在向量的随机采样，随机方法对于相同的数据和参数设置提供不同的结果。在本文中，我们通过分别重建和比较来自预测样本和社会可接受路径的概率分布来分析该问题。通过这种分析，我们观察到所有随机模型的推论都偏向于随机采样，并且无法从有限样本中生成一组现实路径。除非有无限数量的样本可用，否则该问题无法解决，这在实践中是不可行的。我们引入准蒙特卡罗（QMC）方法，确保采样空间的均匀覆盖，作为传统随机采样的替代方法。在相同有限数量的样本下，QMC 改进了所有多模态预测结果。我们又向前迈出了一步，将可学习的采样网络合并到现有的轨迹预测网络中。为此，我们提出了非概率采样网络（NPSN），这是一个非常小的网络（~5K 参数），它使用行人过去的路径及其社交互动生成有目的的样本序列。大量实验证实，NPSN 可以显着提高公共行人轨迹预测基准的预测精度（高达 60%）和可靠性。代码可在 https://github.com/inhwanbae/NPSN 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种非概率采样网络（NPSN），用于改进随机采样在行人轨迹预测中的不足，通过确定性采样方法提升预测的准确性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统随机采样方法在行人轨迹预测中因采样偏差导致结果不稳定，且无法从有限样本中生成真实路径，需解决采样空间覆盖不足的问题。
AI.method: 引入准蒙特卡洛（QMC）方法替代随机采样，并设计轻量级NPSN网络，利用行人历史路径及社交交互生成目的性样本序列。
AI.result: 实验表明NPSN在公共基准数据集上将预测准确率提升最高60%，显著增强多模态轨迹预测的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: NPSN通过确定性采样有效解决了随机采样偏差问题，验证了非概率采样方法在提升轨迹预测性能中的潜力。

authors_text: Zheng Lin,Zhao Zhang,Kang-Rui Zhang,Bo Ren,Ming-Ming Cheng
title: Interactive Style Transfer: All is Your Palette
title_zh: 交互式风格迁移：一切都是你的调色板
abstract: Neural style transfer (NST) can create impressive artworks by transferring reference style to content image. Current image-to-image NST methods are short of fine-grained controls, which are often demanded by artistic editing. To mitigate this limitation, we propose a drawing-like interactive style transfer (IST) method, by which users can interactively create a harmonious-style image. Our IST method can serve as a brush, dip style from anywhere, and then paint to any region of the target content image. To determine the action scope, we formulate a fluid simulation algorithm, which takes styles as pigments around the position of brush interaction, and diffusion in style or content images according to the similarity maps. Our IST method expands the creative dimension of NST. By dipping and painting, even employing one style image can produce thousands of eye-catching works. The demo video is available in supplementary files or in http://mmcheng.net/ist.
summary: Neural style transfer (NST) can create impressive artworks by transferring reference style to content image. Current image-to-image NST methods are short of fine-grained controls, which are often demanded by artistic editing. To mitigate this limitation, we propose a drawing-like interactive style transfer (IST) method, by which users can interactively create a harmonious-style image. Our IST method can serve as a brush, dip style from anywhere, and then paint to any region of the target content image. To determine the action scope, we formulate a fluid simulation algorithm, which takes styles as pigments around the position of brush interaction, and diffusion in style or content images according to the similarity maps. Our IST method expands the creative dimension of NST. By dipping and painting, even employing one style image can produce thousands of eye-catching works. The demo video is available in supplementary files or in http://mmcheng.net/ist.
abstract_zh: 神经风格迁移（NST）可以通过将参考风格迁移到内容图像来创造令人印象深刻的艺术作品。当前的图像到图像 NST 方法缺乏艺术编辑通常需要的细粒度控制。为了缓解这一限制，我们提出了一种类似绘图的交互式风格迁移（IST）方法，用户可以通过该方法交互式地创建和谐风格的图像。我们的 IST 方法可以用作画笔，从任何地方浸入样式，然后绘制到目标内容图像的任何区域。为了确定动作范围，我们制定了一种流体模拟算法，该算法将笔刷交互位置周围的样式作为颜料，并根据相似度图在样式或内容图像中扩散。我们的 IST 方法扩展了 NST 的创意维度。通过浸渍和绘画，即使使用一种风格图像，也可以创作出数千件引人注目的作品。演示视频可在补充文件或 http://mmheng.net/ist 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种交互式风格迁移方法（IST），允许用户通过类似绘画的操作实现细粒度的风格控制。
AI.motivation: 现有神经风格迁移方法缺乏对艺术编辑所需的细粒度控制能力，难以满足用户灵活创作需求。
AI.method: 通过流体模拟算法将风格作为颜料，根据相似性图在内容图像中扩散，用户可交互式地选择区域进行风格绘制。
AI.result: 该方法扩展了NST的创作维度，单个风格图像可生成数千件作品，并提供演示视频展示效果。
AI.conclusion: IST方法通过交互式绘画操作有效解决了传统NST的细粒度控制难题，提升了创作灵活性。

search_text: Interactive Style Transfer: All is Your Palette 交互式风格迁移：一切都是你的调色板 Neural style transfer (NST) can create impressive artworks by transferring reference style to content image. Current image-to-image NST methods are short of fine-grained controls, which are often demanded by artistic editing. To mitigate this limitation, we propose a drawing-like interactive style transfer (IST) method, by which users can interactively create a harmonious-style image. Our IST method can serve as a brush, dip style from anywhere, and then paint to any region of the target content image. To determine the action scope, we formulate a fluid simulation algorithm, which takes styles as pigments around the position of brush interaction, and diffusion in style or content images according to the similarity maps. Our IST method expands the creative dimension of NST. By dipping and painting, even employing one style image can produce thousands of eye-catching works. The demo video is available in supplementary files or in http://mmcheng.net/ist. 神经风格迁移（NST）可以通过将参考风格迁移到内容图像来创造令人印象深刻的艺术作品。当前的图像到图像 NST 方法缺乏艺术编辑通常需要的细粒度控制。为了缓解这一限制，我们提出了一种类似绘图的交互式风格迁移（IST）方法，用户可以通过该方法交互式地创建和谐风格的图像。我们的 IST 方法可以用作画笔，从任何地方浸入样式，然后绘制到目标内容图像的任何区域。为了确定动作范围，我们制定了一种流体模拟算法，该算法将笔刷交互位置周围的样式作为颜料，并根据相似度图在样式或内容图像中扩散。我们的 IST 方法扩展了 NST 的创意维度。通过浸渍和绘画，即使使用一种风格图像，也可以创作出数千件引人注目的作品。演示视频可在补充文件或 http://mmheng.net/ist 中找到。 本文提出一种交互式风格迁移方法（IST），允许用户通过类似绘画的操作实现细粒度的风格控制。 Zheng Lin,Zhao Zhang,Kang-Rui Zhang,Bo Ren,Ming-Ming Cheng cs.CV

title: RD-Optimized Trit-Plane Coding of Deep Compressed Image Latent Tensors
title_zh: 深度压缩图像潜张量的 RD 优化 Trit 平面编码
abstract: DPICT is the first learning-based image codec supporting fine granular scalability. In this paper, we describe how to implement two key components of DPICT efficiently: trit-plane slicing and rate-distortion-optimized (RD-optimized) coding. In DPICT, we transform an image into a latent tensor, represent the tensor in ternary digits (trits), and encode the trits in the decreasing order of significance. For entropy encoding, it is necessary to compute the probability of each trit, which demands high time complexity in both the encoder and the decoder. To reduce the complexity, we develop a parallel computing scheme for the probabilities, which is described in detail with pseudo-codes. Moreover, we compare the trit-plane slicing in DPICT with the alternative bit-plane slicing. Experimental results show that the time complexity is reduced significantly by the parallel computing and that the trit-plane slicing provides better RD performances than the bit-plane slicing.
summary: DPICT is the first learning-based image codec supporting fine granular scalability. In this paper, we describe how to implement two key components of DPICT efficiently: trit-plane slicing and rate-distortion-optimized (RD-optimized) coding. In DPICT, we transform an image into a latent tensor, represent the tensor in ternary digits (trits), and encode the trits in the decreasing order of significance. For entropy encoding, it is necessary to compute the probability of each trit, which demands high time complexity in both the encoder and the decoder. To reduce the complexity, we develop a parallel computing scheme for the probabilities, which is described in detail with pseudo-codes. Moreover, we compare the trit-plane slicing in DPICT with the alternative bit-plane slicing. Experimental results show that the time complexity is reduced significantly by the parallel computing and that the trit-plane slicing provides better RD performances than the bit-plane slicing.
abstract_zh: DPICT 是第一个支持细粒度可扩展性的基于学习的图像编解码器。在本文中，我们描述了如何有效地实现 DPICT 的两个关键组件：trit 平面切片和率失真优化（RD 优化）编码。在 DPICT 中，我们将图像转换为潜在张量，用三元数字（trits）表示张量，并按重要性降序对 trits 进行编码。对于熵编码，需要计算每个trit的概率，这对编码器和解码器都要求很高的时间复杂度。为了降低复杂性，我们开发了概率的并行计算方案，并用伪代码详细描述。此外，我们将 DPICT 中的 trit 平面切片与替代位平面切片进行比较。实验结果表明，并行计算显着降低了时间复杂度，并且trit平面切片比位平面切片提供了更好的RD性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的深度压缩图像潜在张量的三进制平面编码方法，重点优化了率失真（RD）编码和三进制平面切片技术。
AI.motivation: 传统图像编解码中，三进制概率计算复杂度高，且二进制平面切片在率失真性能上存在局限，需寻找更高效的方法。
AI.method: 将图像转换为潜在张量并用三进制表示，通过并行计算方案降低概率计算复杂度，并对比三进制平面切片与二进制平面切片的性能差异。
AI.result: 并行计算显著降低时间复杂度，三进制平面切片在率失真性能上优于二进制方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的并行计算与三进制平面切片方案有效提升了DPICT编解码效率与压缩性能。

title: CAD: Co-Adapting Discriminative Features for Improved Few-Shot Classification
title_zh: CAD：共同适应判别特征以改进少样本分类
abstract: Few-shot classification is a challenging problem that aims to learn a model that can adapt to unseen classes given a few labeled samples. Recent approaches pre-train a feature extractor, and then fine-tune for episodic meta-learning. Other methods leverage spatial features to learn pixel-level correspondence while jointly training a classifier. However, results using such approaches show marginal improvements. In this paper, inspired by the transformer style self-attention mechanism, we propose a strategy to cross-attend and re-weight discriminative features for few-shot classification. Given a base representation of support and query images after global pooling, we introduce a single shared module that projects features and cross-attends in two aspects: (i) query to support, and (ii) support to query. The module computes attention scores between features to produce an attention pooled representation of features in the same class that is later added to the original representation followed by a projection head. This effectively re-weights features in both aspects (i & ii) to produce features that better facilitate improved metric-based meta-learning. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks show our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 3%~5%.
summary: Few-shot classification is a challenging problem that aims to learn a model that can adapt to unseen classes given a few labeled samples. Recent approaches pre-train a feature extractor, and then fine-tune for episodic meta-learning. Other methods leverage spatial features to learn pixel-level correspondence while jointly training a classifier. However, results using such approaches show marginal improvements. In this paper, inspired by the transformer style self-attention mechanism, we propose a strategy to cross-attend and re-weight discriminative features for few-shot classification. Given a base representation of support and query images after global pooling, we introduce a single shared module that projects features and cross-attends in two aspects: (i) query to support, and (ii) support to query. The module computes attention scores between features to produce an attention pooled representation of features in the same class that is later added to the original representation followed by a projection head. This effectively re-weights features in both aspects (i & ii) to produce features that better facilitate improved metric-based meta-learning. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks show our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 3%~5%.
abstract_zh: 少样本分类是一个具有挑战性的问题，旨在学习一个模型，该模型可以在给定一些标记样本的情况下适应看不见的类别。最近的方法预训练特征提取器，然后针对情景元学习进行微调。其他方法利用空间特征来学习像素级对应，同时联合训练分类器。然而，使用这种方法的结果显示出微小的改进。在本文中，受 Transformer 式自注意力机制的启发，我们提出了一种交叉参与和重新加权判别特征的策略，以进行少样本分类。给定全局池化后支持和查询图像的基本表示，我们引入了一个共享模块，该模块在两个方面投影特征和交叉参与：（i）查询到支持，（ii）支持到查询。该模块计算特征之间的注意力分数，以生成同一类中特征的注意力池表示，随后将其添加到原始表示中，然后添加到投影头中。这有效地重新加权了两个方面（i 和 ii）的特征，以产生更好地促进改进的基于度量的元学习的特征。对公共基准的大量实验表明，我们的方法比最先进的方法高出 3%~5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CAD的方法，通过交叉适应判别特征来提升少样本分类的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本分类方法在预训练特征提取器和空间特征利用上效果有限，改进幅度较小，需探索更有效的特征适应策略。
AI.method: 受Transformer自注意力机制启发，设计共享模块对支持集和查询集特征进行双向交叉注意力计算，生成类内注意力池化表示并融合原始特征，最终通过投影头输出分类结果。
AI.result: 在公开基准数据集上，该方法较现有最先进方法提升3%~5%。
AI.conclusion: 通过双向交叉注意力机制实现特征的协同适应，有效提升了少样本分类的判别能力。

The module computes attention scores between features to produce an attention pooled representation of features in the same class that is later added to the original representation followed by a projection head. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks show our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods by 3%~5%. 少样本分类是一个具有挑战性的问题，旨在学习一个模型，该模型可以在给定一些标记样本的情况下适应看不见的类别。最近的方法预训练特征提取器，然后针对情景元学习进行微调。其他方法利用空间特征来学习像素级对应，同时联合训练分类器。然而，使用这种方法的结果显示出微小的改进。在本文中，受 Transformer 式自注意力机制的启发，我们提出了一种交叉参与和重新加权判别特征的策略，以进行少样本分类。给定全局池化后支持和查询图像的基本表示，我们引入了一个共享模块，该模块在两个方面投影特征和交叉参与：（i）查询到支持，（ii）支持到查询。该模块计算特征之间的注意力分数，以生成同一类中特征的注意力池表示，随后将其添加到原始表示中，然后添加到投影头中。这有效地重新加权了两个方面（i 和 ii）的特征，以产生更好地促进改进的基于度量的元学习的特征。对公共基准的大量实验表明，我们的方法比最先进的方法高出 3%~5%。 本文提出一种名为CAD的方法，通过交叉适应判别特征来提升少样本分类的性能。 Philip Chikontwe,Soopil Kim,Sang Hyun Park cs.CV

title: From MIM-Based GAN to Anomaly Detection:Event Probability Influence on Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 从基于 MIM 的 GAN 到异常检测：事件概率对生成对抗网络的影响
abstract: In order to introduce deep learning technologies into anomaly detection, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are considered as important roles in the algorithm design and realistic applications. In terms of GANs, event probability reflected in the objective function, has an impact on the event generation which plays a crucial part in GAN-based anomaly detection. The information metric, e.g. Kullback-Leibler divergence in the original GAN, makes the objective function have different sensitivity on different event probability, which provides an opportunity to refine GAN-based anomaly detection by influencing data generation. In this paper, we introduce the exponential information metric into the GAN, referred to as MIM-based GAN, whose superior characteristics on data generation are discussed in theory. Furthermore, we propose an anomaly detection method with MIM-based GAN, as well as explain its principle for the unsupervised learning case from the viewpoint of probability event generation. Since this method is promising to detect anomalies in Internet of Things (IoT), such as environmental, medical and biochemical outliers, we make use of several datasets from the online ODDS repository to evaluate its performance and compare it with other methods.
summary: In order to introduce deep learning technologies into anomaly detection, Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are considered as important roles in the algorithm design and realistic applications. In terms of GANs, event probability reflected in the objective function, has an impact on the event generation which plays a crucial part in GAN-based anomaly detection. The information metric, e.g. Kullback-Leibler divergence in the original GAN, makes the objective function have different sensitivity on different event probability, which provides an opportunity to refine GAN-based anomaly detection by influencing data generation. In this paper, we introduce the exponential information metric into the GAN, referred to as MIM-based GAN, whose superior characteristics on data generation are discussed in theory. Furthermore, we propose an anomaly detection method with MIM-based GAN, as well as explain its principle for the unsupervised learning case from the viewpoint of probability event generation. Since this method is promising to detect anomalies in Internet of Things (IoT), such as environmental, medical and biochemical outliers, we make use of several datasets from the online ODDS repository to evaluate its performance and compare it with other methods.
abstract_zh: 为了将深度学习技术引入异常检测，生成对抗网络（GAN）被认为在算法设计和实际应用中发挥着重要作用。就 GAN 而言，目标函数中反映的事件概率会对事件生成产生影响，而事件生成在基于 GAN 的异常检测中起着至关重要的作用。信息度量，例如原始 GAN 中的 Kullback-Leibler 散度使得目标函数对不同事件概率具有不同的敏感性，这为通过影响数据生成来完善基于 GAN 的异常检测提供了机会。本文将指数信息度量引入GAN，称为基于MIM的GAN，从理论上讨论了其在数据生成方面的优越特性。此外，我们提出了一种基于 MIM 的 GAN 的异常检测方法，并从概率事件生成的角度解释了无监督学习案例的原理。由于该方法有望检测物联网 (IoT) 中的异常情况，例如环境、医疗和生化异常值，因此我们利用在线 ODDS 存储库中的多个数据集来评估其性能并将其与其他方法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于指数信息度量（MIM）的生成对抗网络（GAN），用于改进异常检测方法，并探讨事件概率对GAN生成过程的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN在异常检测中因目标函数对事件概率敏感而存在局限，需通过改进信息度量方式提升数据生成能力与检测性能。
AI.method: 引入指数信息度量替代KL散度构建MIM-GAN，从概率事件生成角度解释其无监督学习机制，并在IoT相关数据集上验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，MIM-GAN在环境、医疗和生物化学异常检测任务中优于现有方法，验证了其在IoT场景下的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: MIM-GAN通过优化事件概率影响机制，为基于GAN的异常检测提供了新思路，尤其适用于IoT领域多类型异常识别需求。

authors_text: Shaheer Khan,Azib Farooq,Israr Khan,Muhammad Gulraiz Khan,Abdul Razzaq
title: Interpretation of Chest x-rays affected by bullets using deep transfer learning
title_zh: 使用深度迁移学习解读受子弹影响的胸部 X 光片
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures, 1 table, Paper is intended to publish in journal and first author reserves all copyrights of reproduction
comments: 10 pages, 8 figures, 1 table, Paper is intended to publish in journal and first author reserves all copyrights of reproduction
abstract: The potential of deep learning, especially in medical imaging, initiated astonishing results and improved the methodologies after every passing day. Deep learning in radiology provides the opportunity to classify, detect and segment different diseases automatically. In the proposed study, we worked on a non-trivial aspect of medical imaging where we classified and localized the X-Rays affected by bullets. We tested Images on different classification and localization models to get considerable accuracy. The replicated data set used in the study was replicated on different images of chest X-Rays. The proposed model worked not only on chest radiographs but other body organs X-rays like leg, abdomen, head, even the training dataset based on chest radiographs. Custom models have been used for classification and localization purposes after tuning parameters. Finally, the results of our findings manifested using different frameworks. This might assist the research enlightening towards this field. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study on the detection and classification of radiographs affected by bullets using deep learning.
summary: The potential of deep learning, especially in medical imaging, initiated astonishing results and improved the methodologies after every passing day. Deep learning in radiology provides the opportunity to classify, detect and segment different diseases automatically. In the proposed study, we worked on a non-trivial aspect of medical imaging where we classified and localized the X-Rays affected by bullets. We tested Images on different classification and localization models to get considerable accuracy. The replicated data set used in the study was replicated on different images of chest X-Rays. The proposed model worked not only on chest radiographs but other body organs X-rays like leg, abdomen, head, even the training dataset based on chest radiographs. Custom models have been used for classification and localization purposes after tuning parameters. Finally, the results of our findings manifested using different frameworks. This might assist the research enlightening towards this field. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study on the detection and classification of radiographs affected by bullets using deep learning.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的潜力，尤其是在医学成像领域，带来了惊人的结果，并日渐改进了方法论。放射学中的深度学习提供了自动分类、检测和分割不同疾病的机会。在拟议的研究中，我们研究了医学成像的一个重要方面，我们对受子弹影响的 X 射线进行了分类和定位。我们在不同的分类和定位模型上测试了图像，以获得相当高的准确性。研究中使用的复制数据集被复制到不同的胸部 X 光图像上。所提出的模型不仅适用于胸部X光片，还适用于其他身体器官X光片，如腿部、腹部、头部，甚至基于胸部X光片的训练数据集。调整参数后，自定义模型已用于分类和定位目的。最后，我们的研究结果使用不同的框架来体现。这可能有助于对该领域的研究有所启发。据我们所知，这是第一项利用深度学习对受子弹影响的射线照片进行检测和分类的研究。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出使用深度迁移学习对受子弹影响的胸部X光片进行分类和定位。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学影像领域取得显著进展，但针对子弹伤X光片的检测和分类研究尚未见报道。
AI.method: 基于胸部X光片的复制数据集，通过参数调优构建定制化分类与定位模型，并验证其在其他身体部位X光片上的泛化能力。
AI.result: 模型在胸部及四肢、腹部、头部等X光片上均取得较高分类与定位准确率，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究首次将深度学习应用于子弹伤X光片的检测与分类，为相关领域研究提供了新方向。

title: Semi-supervised and Deep learning Frameworks for Video Classification and Key-frame Identification
title_zh: 用于视频分类和关键帧识别的半监督和深度学习框架
abstract: Automating video-based data and machine learning pipelines poses several challenges including metadata generation for efficient storage and retrieval and isolation of key-frames for scene understanding tasks. In this work, we present two semi-supervised approaches that automate this process of manual frame sifting in video streams by automatically classifying scenes for content and filtering frames for fine-tuning scene understanding tasks. The first rule-based method starts from a pre-trained object detector and it assigns scene type, uncertainty and lighting categories to each frame based on probability distributions of foreground objects. Next, frames with the highest uncertainty and structural dissimilarity are isolated as key-frames. The second method relies on the simCLR model for frame encoding followed by label-spreading from 20% of frame samples to label the remaining frames for scene and lighting categories. Also, clustering the video frames in the encoded feature space further isolates key-frames at cluster boundaries. The proposed methods achieve 64-93% accuracy for automated scene categorization for outdoor image videos from public domain datasets of JAAD and KITTI. Also, less than 10% of all input frames can be filtered as key-frames that can then be sent for annotation and fine tuning of machine vision algorithms. Thus, the proposed framework can be scaled to additional video data streams for automated training of perception-driven systems with minimal training images.
summary: Automating video-based data and machine learning pipelines poses several challenges including metadata generation for efficient storage and retrieval and isolation of key-frames for scene understanding tasks. In this work, we present two semi-supervised approaches that automate this process of manual frame sifting in video streams by automatically classifying scenes for content and filtering frames for fine-tuning scene understanding tasks. The first rule-based method starts from a pre-trained object detector and it assigns scene type, uncertainty and lighting categories to each frame based on probability distributions of foreground objects. Next, frames with the highest uncertainty and structural dissimilarity are isolated as key-frames. The second method relies on the simCLR model for frame encoding followed by label-spreading from 20% of frame samples to label the remaining frames for scene and lighting categories. Also, clustering the video frames in the encoded feature space further isolates key-frames at cluster boundaries. The proposed methods achieve 64-93% accuracy for automated scene categorization for outdoor image videos from public domain datasets of JAAD and KITTI. Also, less than 10% of all input frames can be filtered as key-frames that can then be sent for annotation and fine tuning of machine vision algorithms. Thus, the proposed framework can be scaled to additional video data streams for automated training of perception-driven systems with minimal training images.
abstract_zh: 自动化基于视频的数据和机器学习管道带来了一些挑战，包括用于高效存储和检索的元数据生成以及用于场景理解任务的关键帧的隔离。在这项工作中，我们提出了两种半监督方法，通过自动对内容场景进行分类并过滤帧以微调场景理解任务，从而自动执行视频流中的手动帧筛选过程。第一种基于规则的方法从预先训练的对象检测器开始，根据前景对象的概率分布为每个帧分配场景类型、不确定性和照明类别。接下来，具有最高不确定性和结构差异的帧被隔离为关键帧。第二种方法依赖 simCLR 模型进行帧编码，然后从 20% 的帧样本进行标签扩展，以标记场景和照明类别的剩余帧。此外，对编码特征空间中的视频帧进行聚类进一步隔离了聚类边界处的关键帧。所提出的方法对来自 JAAD 和 KITTI 公共领域数据集的户外图像视频进行自动场景分类，准确率达到 64-93%。此外，不到 10% 的输入帧可以被过滤为关键帧，然后可以发送这些关键帧以进行机器视觉算法的注释和微调。因此，所提出的框架可以扩展到额外的视频数据流，以使用最少的训练图像自动训练感知驱动系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种半监督深度学习框架，用于视频分类和关键帧识别，以自动化处理视频数据流中的场景分类和关键帧筛选。
AI.motivation: 视频数据处理面临元数据生成和关键帧隔离的挑战，传统方法依赖人工筛选效率低，需自动化解决方案以减少人工干预。
AI.method: 第一种方法基于预训练目标检测器，通过前景物体概率分布分配场景类型和光照类别，筛选高不确定性和结构差异的帧作为关键帧；第二种方法采用simCLR模型编码帧特征，结合20%样本标签传播和特征空间聚类边界识别关键帧。
AI.result: 在JAAD和KITTI数据集上实现64-93%的场景分类准确率，仅需过滤不足10%的输入帧作为关键帧用于后续标注和模型微调。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可扩展至更多视频数据流，以最小训练图像量实现感知驱动系统的自动化训练。

search_text: Semi-supervised and Deep learning Frameworks for Video Classification and Key-frame Identification 用于视频分类和关键帧识别的半监督和深度学习框架 Automating video-based data and machine learning pipelines poses several challenges including metadata generation for efficient storage and retrieval and isolation of key-frames for scene understanding tasks. In this work, we present two semi-supervised approaches that automate this process of manual frame sifting in video streams by automatically classifying scenes for content and filtering frames for fine-tuning scene understanding tasks. The first rule-based method starts from a pre-trained object detector and it assigns scene type, uncertainty and lighting categories to each frame based on probability distributions of foreground objects. Next, frames with the highest uncertainty and structural dissimilarity are isolated as key-frames. The second method relies on the simCLR model for frame encoding followed by label-spreading from 20% of frame samples to label the remaining frames for scene and lighting categories. Also, clustering the video frames in the encoded feature space further isolates key-frames at cluster boundaries. The proposed methods achieve 64-93% accuracy for automated scene categorization for outdoor image videos from public domain datasets of JAAD and KITTI. Also, less than 10% of all input frames can be filtered as key-frames that can then be sent for annotation and fine tuning of machine vision algorithms. Thus, the proposed framework can be scaled to additional video data streams for automated training of perception-driven systems with minimal training images. 自动化基于视频的数据和机器学习管道带来了一些挑战，包括用于高效存储和检索的元数据生成以及用于场景理解任务的关键帧的隔离。在这项工作中，我们提出了两种半监督方法，通过自动对内容场景进行分类并过滤帧以微调场景理解任务，从而自动执行视频流中的手动帧筛选过程。第一种基于规则的方法从预先训练的对象检测器开始，根据前景对象的概率分布为每个帧分配场景类型、不确定性和照明类别。接下来，具有最高不确定性和结构差异的帧被隔离为关键帧。第二种方法依赖 simCLR 模型进行帧编码，然后从 20% 的帧样本进行标签扩展，以标记场景和照明类别的剩余帧。此外，对编码特征空间中的视频帧进行聚类进一步隔离了聚类边界处的关键帧。所提出的方法对来自 JAAD 和 KITTI 公共领域数据集的户外图像视频进行自动场景分类，准确率达到 64-93%。此外，不到 10% 的输入帧可以被过滤为关键帧，然后可以发送这些关键帧以进行机器视觉算法的注释和微调。因此，所提出的框架可以扩展到额外的视频数据流，以使用最少的训练图像自动训练感知驱动系统。 本文提出两种半监督深度学习框架，用于视频分类和关键帧识别，以自动化处理视频数据流中的场景分类和关键帧筛选。 Sohini Roychowdhury cs.CV,cs.AI

title: PANDORA: Polarization-Aided Neural Decomposition Of Radiance
title_zh: PANDORA：偏振辅助辐射神经分解
abstract: Reconstructing an object's geometry and appearance from multiple images, also known as inverse rendering, is a fundamental problem in computer graphics and vision. Inverse rendering is inherently ill-posed because the captured image is an intricate function of unknown lighting conditions, material properties and scene geometry. Recent progress in representing scene properties as coordinate-based neural networks have facilitated neural inverse rendering resulting in impressive geometry reconstruction and novel-view synthesis. Our key insight is that polarization is a useful cue for neural inverse rendering as polarization strongly depends on surface normals and is distinct for diffuse and specular reflectance. With the advent of commodity, on-chip, polarization sensors, capturing polarization has become practical. Thus, we propose PANDORA, a polarimetric inverse rendering approach based on implicit neural representations. From multi-view polarization images of an object, PANDORA jointly extracts the object's 3D geometry, separates the outgoing radiance into diffuse and specular and estimates the illumination incident on the object. We show that PANDORA outperforms state-of-the-art radiance decomposition techniques. PANDORA outputs clean surface reconstructions free from texture artefacts, models strong specularities accurately and estimates illumination under practical unstructured scenarios.
summary: Reconstructing an object's geometry and appearance from multiple images, also known as inverse rendering, is a fundamental problem in computer graphics and vision. Inverse rendering is inherently ill-posed because the captured image is an intricate function of unknown lighting conditions, material properties and scene geometry. Recent progress in representing scene properties as coordinate-based neural networks have facilitated neural inverse rendering resulting in impressive geometry reconstruction and novel-view synthesis. Our key insight is that polarization is a useful cue for neural inverse rendering as polarization strongly depends on surface normals and is distinct for diffuse and specular reflectance. With the advent of commodity, on-chip, polarization sensors, capturing polarization has become practical. Thus, we propose PANDORA, a polarimetric inverse rendering approach based on implicit neural representations. From multi-view polarization images of an object, PANDORA jointly extracts the object's 3D geometry, separates the outgoing radiance into diffuse and specular and estimates the illumination incident on the object. We show that PANDORA outperforms state-of-the-art radiance decomposition techniques. PANDORA outputs clean surface reconstructions free from texture artefacts, models strong specularities accurately and estimates illumination under practical unstructured scenarios.
abstract_zh: 从多个图像重建对象的几何形状和外观（也称为逆渲染）是计算机图形和视觉中的一个基本问题。逆向渲染本质上是不适定的，因为捕获的图像是未知光照条件、材料属性和场景几何形状的复杂函数。在将场景属性表示为基于坐标的神经网络方面的最新进展促进了神经逆渲染，从而产生了令人印象深刻的几何重建和新颖的视图合成。我们的主要见解是，偏振对于神经逆渲染来说是一个有用的线索，因为偏振强烈依赖于表面法线，并且对于漫反射和镜面反射是不同的。随着商用片上偏振传感器的出现，捕获偏振已变得实用。因此，我们提出了 PANDORA，一种基于隐式神经表示的极化逆渲染方法。从物体的多视图偏振图像中，PANDORA 联合提取物体的 3D 几何形状，将出射辐射分为漫反射和镜面反射，并估计入射到物体上的照明。我们证明 PANDORA 的性能优于最先进的辐射分解技术。 PANDORA 输出干净的表面重建，没有纹理伪影，准确地模拟强镜面反射，并估计实际非结构化场景下的照明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PANDORA方法，利用偏振信息进行神经逆向渲染，实现物体几何重建与辐射分解。
AI.motivation: 传统逆向渲染因光照、材质和几何的耦合关系导致病态问题，而偏振信息能有效区分表面法线及漫反射与镜面反射特性，为分解提供新线索。
AI.method: 基于隐式神经表示，通过多视角偏振图像联合估计物体几何、分离漫反射与镜面辐射，并重建环境光照。
AI.result: PANDORA在辐射分解精度、几何重建质量及复杂光照估计上优于现有技术，能处理强镜面反射与非结构化场景。
AI.conclusion: 偏振信息为神经逆向渲染提供了有效物理约束，PANDORA验证了多模态数据融合在辐射分解与几何重建中的潜力。

Our key insight is that polarization is a useful cue for neural inverse rendering as polarization strongly depends on surface normals and is distinct for diffuse and specular reflectance. Thus, we propose PANDORA, a polarimetric inverse rendering approach based on implicit neural representations. From multi-view polarization images of an object, PANDORA jointly extracts the object's 3D geometry, separates the outgoing radiance into diffuse and specular and estimates the illumination incident on the object. We show that PANDORA outperforms state-of-the-art radiance decomposition techniques. PANDORA outputs clean surface reconstructions free from texture artefacts, models strong specularities accurately and estimates illumination under practical unstructured scenarios. 从多个图像重建对象的几何形状和外观（也称为逆渲染）是计算机图形和视觉中的一个基本问题。逆向渲染本质上是不适定的，因为捕获的图像是未知光照条件、材料属性和场景几何形状的复杂函数。在将场景属性表示为基于坐标的神经网络方面的最新进展促进了神经逆渲染，从而产生了令人印象深刻的几何重建和新颖的视图合成。我们的主要见解是，偏振对于神经逆渲染来说是一个有用的线索，因为偏振强烈依赖于表面法线，并且对于漫反射和镜面反射是不同的。随着商用片上偏振传感器的出现，捕获偏振已变得实用。因此，我们提出了 PANDORA，一种基于隐式神经表示的极化逆渲染方法。从物体的多视图偏振图像中，PANDORA 联合提取物体的 3D 几何形状，将出射辐射分为漫反射和镜面反射，并估计入射到物体上的照明。我们证明 PANDORA 的性能优于最先进的辐射分解技术。 PANDORA 输出干净的表面重建，没有纹理伪影，准确地模拟强镜面反射，并估计实际非结构化场景下的照明。 本文提出PANDORA方法，利用偏振信息进行神经逆向渲染，实现物体几何重建与辐射分解。 Akshat Dave,Yongyi Zhao,Ashok Veeraraghavan cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Yifei Wang,Qi Zhang,Yisen Wang,Jiansheng Yang,Zhouchen Lin
title: Chaos is a Ladder: A New Theoretical Understanding of Contrastive Learning via Augmentation Overlap
title_zh: 混沌是阶梯：通过增强重叠对对比学习的新理论理解
abstract: Recently, contrastive learning has risen to be a promising approach for large-scale self-supervised learning. However, theoretical understanding of how it works is still unclear. In this paper, we propose a new guarantee on the downstream performance without resorting to the conditional independence assumption that is widely adopted in previous work but hardly holds in practice. Our new theory hinges on the insight that the support of different intra-class samples will become more overlapped under aggressive data augmentations, thus simply aligning the positive samples (augmented views of the same sample) could make contrastive learning cluster intra-class samples together. Based on this augmentation overlap perspective, theoretically, we obtain asymptotically closed bounds for downstream performance under weaker assumptions, and empirically, we propose an unsupervised model selection metric ARC that aligns well with downstream accuracy. Our theory suggests an alternative understanding of contrastive learning: the role of aligning positive samples is more like a surrogate task than an ultimate goal, and the overlapped augmented views (i.e., the chaos) create a ladder for contrastive learning to gradually learn class-separated representations. The code for computing ARC is available at https://github.com/zhangq327/ARC.
summary: Recently, contrastive learning has risen to be a promising approach for large-scale self-supervised learning. However, theoretical understanding of how it works is still unclear. In this paper, we propose a new guarantee on the downstream performance without resorting to the conditional independence assumption that is widely adopted in previous work but hardly holds in practice. Our new theory hinges on the insight that the support of different intra-class samples will become more overlapped under aggressive data augmentations, thus simply aligning the positive samples (augmented views of the same sample) could make contrastive learning cluster intra-class samples together. Based on this augmentation overlap perspective, theoretically, we obtain asymptotically closed bounds for downstream performance under weaker assumptions, and empirically, we propose an unsupervised model selection metric ARC that aligns well with downstream accuracy. Our theory suggests an alternative understanding of contrastive learning: the role of aligning positive samples is more like a surrogate task than an ultimate goal, and the overlapped augmented views (i.e., the chaos) create a ladder for contrastive learning to gradually learn class-separated representations. The code for computing ARC is available at https://github.com/zhangq327/ARC.
abstract_zh: 最近，对比学习已成为大规模自监督学习的一种有前途的方法。然而，对其工作原理的理论理解仍不清楚。在本文中，我们提出了一种对下游性能的新保证，而无需诉诸先前工作中广泛采用但在实践中几乎不成立的条件独立假设。我们的新理论基于这样的见解：在积极的数据增强下，不同类内样本的支持将变得更加重叠，因此简单地对齐正样本（同一样本的增强视图）就可以使对比学习将类内样本聚类在一起。基于这种增强重叠的观点，理论上，我们在较弱的假设下获得了下游性能的渐近闭界，并且从经验上讲，我们提出了一种与下游精度很好地吻合的无监督模型选择度量 ARC。我们的理论提出了对对比学习的另一种理解：对齐正样本的作用更像是替代任务而不是最终目标，并且重叠的增强视图（即混乱）为对比学习创建了一个阶梯，以逐渐学习类别分离的表示。计算ARC的代码可以在https://github.com/zhangq327/ARC上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的对比学习理论，通过数据增强重叠现象解释其下游任务性能，并引入无监督模型选择指标ARC。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习理论依赖的条件独立性假设在实践中难以成立，需建立更符合实际的理论框架以指导模型设计。
AI.method: 基于数据增强会使同类样本支持集重叠的洞察，通过对齐增强视图的正样本，建立弱假设下的下游性能渐进界，并提出ARC指标衡量模型表现。
AI.result: 理论推导获得更宽松假设下的性能界，ARC指标与下游准确率高度相关，实验验证了增强重叠对类间分离表示学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习的核心应是利用增强混乱（chaos）构建类间分离表示，对齐正样本仅作为中间代理任务而非最终目标。

search_text: Chaos is a Ladder: A New Theoretical Understanding of Contrastive Learning via Augmentation Overlap 混沌是阶梯：通过增强重叠对对比学习的新理论理解 Recently, contrastive learning has risen to be a promising approach for large-scale self-supervised learning. However, theoretical understanding of how it works is still unclear. In this paper, we propose a new guarantee on the downstream performance without resorting to the conditional independence assumption that is widely adopted in previous work but hardly holds in practice. Our new theory hinges on the insight that the support of different intra-class samples will become more overlapped under aggressive data augmentations, thus simply aligning the positive samples (augmented views of the same sample) could make contrastive learning cluster intra-class samples together. Based on this augmentation overlap perspective, theoretically, we obtain asymptotically closed bounds for downstream performance under weaker assumptions, and empirically, we propose an unsupervised model selection metric ARC that aligns well with downstream accuracy. Our theory suggests an alternative understanding of contrastive learning: the role of aligning positive samples is more like a surrogate task than an ultimate goal, and the overlapped augmented views (i.e., the chaos) create a ladder for contrastive learning to gradually learn class-separated representations. The code for computing ARC is available at https://github.com/zhangq327/ARC. 最近，对比学习已成为大规模自监督学习的一种有前途的方法。然而，对其工作原理的理论理解仍不清楚。在本文中，我们提出了一种对下游性能的新保证，而无需诉诸先前工作中广泛采用但在实践中几乎不成立的条件独立假设。我们的新理论基于这样的见解：在积极的数据增强下，不同类内样本的支持将变得更加重叠，因此简单地对齐正样本（同一样本的增强视图）就可以使对比学习将类内样本聚类在一起。基于这种增强重叠的观点，理论上，我们在较弱的假设下获得了下游性能的渐近闭界，并且从经验上讲，我们提出了一种与下游精度很好地吻合的无监督模型选择度量 ARC。我们的理论提出了对对比学习的另一种理解：对齐正样本的作用更像是替代任务而不是最终目标，并且重叠的增强视图（即混乱）为对比学习创建了一个阶梯，以逐渐学习类别分离的表示。计算ARC的代码可以在https://github.com/zhangq327/ARC上找到。 本文提出了一种新的对比学习理论，通过数据增强重叠现象解释其下游任务性能，并引入无监督模型选择指标ARC。 Yifei Wang,Qi Zhang,Yisen Wang,Jiansheng Yang,Zhouchen Lin cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.ML

title: A Unified Contrastive Energy-based Model for Understanding the Generative Ability of Adversarial Training
title_zh: 用于理解对抗训练生成能力的统一对比能量模型
abstract: Adversarial Training (AT) is known as an effective approach to enhance the robustness of deep neural networks. Recently researchers notice that robust models with AT have good generative ability and can synthesize realistic images, while the reason behind it is yet under-explored. In this paper, we demystify this phenomenon by developing a unified probabilistic framework, called Contrastive Energy-based Models (CEM). On the one hand, we provide the first probabilistic characterization of AT through a unified understanding of robustness and generative ability. On the other hand, our unified framework can be extended to the unsupervised scenario, which interprets unsupervised contrastive learning as an important sampling of CEM. Based on these, we propose a principled method to develop adversarial learning and sampling methods. Experiments show that the sampling methods derived from our framework improve the sample quality in both supervised and unsupervised learning. Notably, our unsupervised adversarial sampling method achieves an Inception score of 9.61 on CIFAR-10, which is superior to previous energy-based models and comparable to state-of-the-art generative models.
summary: Adversarial Training (AT) is known as an effective approach to enhance the robustness of deep neural networks. Recently researchers notice that robust models with AT have good generative ability and can synthesize realistic images, while the reason behind it is yet under-explored. In this paper, we demystify this phenomenon by developing a unified probabilistic framework, called Contrastive Energy-based Models (CEM). On the one hand, we provide the first probabilistic characterization of AT through a unified understanding of robustness and generative ability. On the other hand, our unified framework can be extended to the unsupervised scenario, which interprets unsupervised contrastive learning as an important sampling of CEM. Based on these, we propose a principled method to develop adversarial learning and sampling methods. Experiments show that the sampling methods derived from our framework improve the sample quality in both supervised and unsupervised learning. Notably, our unsupervised adversarial sampling method achieves an Inception score of 9.61 on CIFAR-10, which is superior to previous energy-based models and comparable to state-of-the-art generative models.
abstract_zh: 对抗训练（AT）被认为是增强深度神经网络鲁棒性的有效方法。最近研究人员注意到，具有 AT 的鲁棒模型具有良好的生成能力，可以合成逼真的图像，但其背后的原因尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们通过开发一个统一的概率框架（称为基于能量的对比模型（CEM））来揭开这一现象的神秘面纱。一方面，我们通过对鲁棒性和生成能力的统一理解，提供了 AT 的第一个概率表征。另一方面，我们的统一框架可以扩展到无监督场景，将无监督对比学习解释为 CEM 的重要样本。基于这些，我们提出了一种开发对抗性学习和采样方法的原则方法。实验表明，从我们的框架派生的采样方法提高了监督和无监督学习中的样本质量。值得注意的是，我们的无监督对抗采样方法在 CIFAR-10 上获得了 9.61 的 Inception 分数，优于之前基于能量的模型，并且与最先进的生成模型相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的对比能量模型（CEM）框架，用于解释对抗训练的生成能力，并开发了相应的学习与采样方法。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练模型表现出优秀的生成能力，但其背后机制尚未被充分解释，需统一理解鲁棒性与生成能力，并拓展至无监督场景。
AI.method: 构建对比能量模型（CEM）概率框架，将对抗训练与生成能力统一解释，并将其扩展到无监督对比学习，提出原理性采样方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于CEM的采样方法在监督与无监督学习中均提升样本质量，无监督方法在CIFAR-10上达到9.61的Inception分数，优于现有能量模型。
AI.conclusion: CEM框架有效揭示了对抗训练的生成机制，提供了改进的采样方法，为未来生成模型研究提供了理论支持与技术方向。

authors_text: Jiacong Hu,Jing Gao,Jingwen Ye,Yang Gao,Xingen Wang,Zunlei Feng,Mingli Song
title: Model LEGO: Creating Models Like Disassembling and Assembling Building Blocks
title_zh: 模型乐高：像拆卸和组装积木一样创建模型
abstract: With the rapid development of deep learning, the increasing complexity and scale of parameters make training a new model increasingly resource-intensive. In this paper, we start from the classic convolutional neural network (CNN) and explore a paradigm that does not require training to obtain new models. Similar to the birth of CNN inspired by receptive fields in the biological visual system, we draw inspiration from the information subsystem pathways in the biological visual system and propose Model Disassembling and Assembling (MDA). During model disassembling, we introduce the concept of relative contribution and propose a component locating technique to extract task-aware components from trained CNN classifiers. For model assembling, we present the alignment padding strategy and parameter scaling strategy to construct a new model tailored for a specific task, utilizing the disassembled task-aware components. The entire process is akin to playing with LEGO bricks, enabling arbitrary assembly of new models, and providing a novel perspective for model creation and reuse. Extensive experiments showcase that task-aware components disassembled from CNN classifiers or new models assembled using these components closely match or even surpass the performance of the baseline, demonstrating its promising results for model reuse. Furthermore, MDA exhibits diverse potential applications, with comprehensive experiments exploring model decision route analysis, model compression, knowledge distillation, and more. The code is available at https://github.com/jiaconghu/Model-LEGO.
summary: With the rapid development of deep learning, the increasing complexity and scale of parameters make training a new model increasingly resource-intensive. In this paper, we start from the classic convolutional neural network (CNN) and explore a paradigm that does not require training to obtain new models. Similar to the birth of CNN inspired by receptive fields in the biological visual system, we draw inspiration from the information subsystem pathways in the biological visual system and propose Model Disassembling and Assembling (MDA). During model disassembling, we introduce the concept of relative contribution and propose a component locating technique to extract task-aware components from trained CNN classifiers. For model assembling, we present the alignment padding strategy and parameter scaling strategy to construct a new model tailored for a specific task, utilizing the disassembled task-aware components. The entire process is akin to playing with LEGO bricks, enabling arbitrary assembly of new models, and providing a novel perspective for model creation and reuse. Extensive experiments showcase that task-aware components disassembled from CNN classifiers or new models assembled using these components closely match or even surpass the performance of the baseline, demonstrating its promising results for model reuse. Furthermore, MDA exhibits diverse potential applications, with comprehensive experiments exploring model decision route analysis, model compression, knowledge distillation, and more. The code is available at https://github.com/jiaconghu/Model-LEGO.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习的快速发展，参数的复杂性和规模不断增加，使得训练新模型越来越消耗资源。在本文中，我们从经典的卷积神经网络（CNN）开始，探索一种不需要训练即可获得新模型的范式。与 CNN 的诞生受到生物视觉系统中感受野的启发类似，我们从生物视觉系统中的信息子系统路径中汲取灵感，提出了模型分解与组装（MDA）。在模型分解过程中，我们引入了相对贡献的概念，并提出了一种组件定位技术，用于从经过训练的 CNN 分类器中提取任务感知组件。对于模型组装，我们提出了对齐填充策略和参数缩放策略，以利用拆解的任务感知组件构建针对特定任务定制的新模型。整个过程类似于玩乐高积木，可以任意组装新模型，并为模型创建和重用提供新颖的视角。大量的实验表明，从 CNN 分类器中拆卸下来的任务感知组件或使用这些组件组装的新模型与基线的性能非常匹配甚至超越，这证明了其在模型重用方面的良好结果。此外，MDA 展示了多种潜在应用，通过综合实验探索模型决策路径分析、模型压缩、知识蒸馏等。代码可在 https://github.com/jiaconghu/Model-LEGO 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练即可创建新模型的方法，通过解构和重组已有卷积神经网络（CNN）的组件，类似于乐高积木的拼装过程。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型的复杂性和训练成本日益增加，传统训练新模型的方式资源消耗大。受生物视觉系统信息子系统路径启发，旨在实现模型组件的高效复用与重构。
AI.method: 提出模型解构与拼装（MDA）框架：解构阶段通过相对贡献度和组件定位技术提取任务感知组件；拼装阶段采用对齐填充策略和参数缩放策略构建新模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，从CNN分类器解构的组件或拼装的新模型性能接近或超越基线模型，并在模型压缩、知识蒸馏等任务中展现潜力。
AI.conclusion: MDA为模型创建与复用提供了新视角，通过组件级操作降低训练成本，代码已开源，具有广泛的应用前景。

ai_content.result: 实验表明，从CNN分类器解构的组件或拼装的新模型性能接近或超越基线模型，并在模型压缩、知识蒸馏等任务中展现潜力。
ai_content.conclusion: MDA为模型创建与复用提供了新视角，通过组件级操作降低训练成本，代码已开源，具有广泛的应用前景。
