search_text: Model LEGO: Creating Models Like Disassembling and Assembling Building Blocks 模型乐高：像拆卸和组装积木一样创建模型 With the rapid development of deep learning, the increasing complexity and scale of parameters make training a new model increasingly resource-intensive. In this paper, we start from the classic convolutional neural network (CNN) and explore a paradigm that does not require training to obtain new models. Similar to the birth of CNN inspired by receptive fields in the biological visual system, we draw inspiration from the information subsystem pathways in the biological visual system and propose Model Disassembling and Assembling (MDA). During model disassembling, we introduce the concept of relative contribution and propose a component locating technique to extract task-aware components from trained CNN classifiers. For model assembling, we present the alignment padding strategy and parameter scaling strategy to construct a new model tailored for a specific task, utilizing the disassembled task-aware components. The entire process is akin to playing with LEGO bricks, enabling arbitrary assembly of new models, and providing a novel perspective for model creation and reuse. Extensive experiments showcase that task-aware components disassembled from CNN classifiers or new models assembled using these components closely match or even surpass the performance of the baseline, demonstrating its promising results for model reuse. Furthermore, MDA exhibits diverse potential applications, with comprehensive experiments exploring model decision route analysis, model compression, knowledge distillation, and more. The code is available at https://github.com/jiaconghu/Model-LEGO. 随着深度学习的快速发展，参数的复杂性和规模不断增加，使得训练新模型越来越消耗资源。在本文中，我们从经典的卷积神经网络（CNN）开始，探索一种不需要训练即可获得新模型的范式。与 CNN 的诞生受到生物视觉系统中感受野的启发类似，我们从生物视觉系统中的信息子系统路径中汲取灵感，提出了模型分解与组装（MDA）。在模型分解过程中，我们引入了相对贡献的概念，并提出了一种组件定位技术，用于从经过训练的 CNN 分类器中提取任务感知组件。对于模型组装，我们提出了对齐填充策略和参数缩放策略，以利用拆解的任务感知组件构建针对特定任务定制的新模型。整个过程类似于玩乐高积木，可以任意组装新模型，并为模型创建和重用提供新颖的视角。大量的实验表明，从 CNN 分类器中拆卸下来的任务感知组件或使用这些组件组装的新模型与基线的性能非常匹配甚至超越，这证明了其在模型重用方面的良好结果。此外，MDA 展示了多种潜在应用，通过综合实验探索模型决策路径分析、模型压缩、知识蒸馏等。代码可在 https://github.com/jiaconghu/Model-LEGO 获取。 本文提出一种无需训练即可创建新模型的方法，通过解构和重组已有卷积神经网络（CNN）的组件，类似于乐高积木的拼装过程。 Jiacong Hu,Jing Gao,Jingwen Ye,Yang Gao,Xingen Wang,Zunlei Feng,Mingli Song cs.CV

title: PCA-Based Knowledge Distillation Towards Lightweight and Content-Style Balanced Photorealistic Style Transfer Models
title_zh: 基于 PCA 的知识蒸馏，实现轻量级和内容风格平衡的真实感风格迁移模型
abstract: Photorealistic style transfer entails transferring the style of a reference image to another image so the result seems like a plausible photo. Our work is inspired by the observation that existing models are slow due to their large sizes. We introduce PCA-based knowledge distillation to distill lightweight models and show it is motivated by theory. To our knowledge, this is the first knowledge distillation method for photorealistic style transfer. Our experiments demonstrate its versatility for use with different backbone architectures, VGG and MobileNet, across six image resolutions. Compared to existing models, our top-performing model runs at speeds 5-20x faster using at most 1\% of the parameters. Additionally, our distilled models achieve a better balance between stylization strength and content preservation than existing models. To support reproducing our method and models, we share the code at \textit{https://github.com/chiutaiyin/PCA-Knowledge-Distillation}.
summary: Photorealistic style transfer entails transferring the style of a reference image to another image so the result seems like a plausible photo. Our work is inspired by the observation that existing models are slow due to their large sizes. We introduce PCA-based knowledge distillation to distill lightweight models and show it is motivated by theory. To our knowledge, this is the first knowledge distillation method for photorealistic style transfer. Our experiments demonstrate its versatility for use with different backbone architectures, VGG and MobileNet, across six image resolutions. Compared to existing models, our top-performing model runs at speeds 5-20x faster using at most 1\% of the parameters. Additionally, our distilled models achieve a better balance between stylization strength and content preservation than existing models. To support reproducing our method and models, we share the code at \textit{https://github.com/chiutaiyin/PCA-Knowledge-Distillation}.
abstract_zh: 真实感风格迁移需要将参考图像的风格迁移到另一幅图像，因此结果看起来像是一张可信的照片。我们的工作灵感来自于现有模型由于尺寸过大而速度缓慢的观察结果。我们引入基于 PCA 的知识蒸馏来蒸馏轻量级模型，并表明它是由理论驱动的。据我们所知，这是第一个用于照片级真实风格迁移的知识蒸馏方法。我们的实验证明了其在六种图像分辨率下与不同主干架构、VGG 和 MobileNet 一起使用的多功能性。与现有模型相比，我们的顶级模型使用最多 1\% 的参数，运行速度快 5-20 倍。此外，我们的蒸馏模型比现有模型在风格化强度和内容保存之间实现了更好的平衡。为了支持重现我们的方法和模型，我们在 \textit{https://github.com/chiutaiyin/PCA-Knowledge-Distillation} 共享代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于PCA的知识蒸馏方法，用于构建轻量且内容-风格平衡的高质量图像风格迁移模型。
AI.motivation: 现有高质量风格迁移模型因参数量大导致推理速度慢，且难以平衡风格化强度与内容保留。
AI.method: 通过PCA特征对齐进行知识蒸馏，适配VGG/MobileNet等不同主干网络，在六种分辨率下验证有效性。
AI.result: 最优模型参数量仅为原模型1%，速度提升5-20倍，在风格迁移效果与内容保真度上取得更优平衡。
AI.conclusion: 首次将知识蒸馏应用于高质量风格迁移领域，实现轻量化与性能的双重突破，代码已开源。

title: A Comparative Evaluation of Machine Learning Algorithms for the Prediction of R/C Buildings' Seismic Damage
title_zh: 钢筋混凝土建筑地震损伤预测机器学习算法的比较评价
abstract: Seismic assessment of buildings and determination of their structural damage is at the forefront of modern scientific research. Since now, several researchers have proposed a number of procedures, in an attempt to estimate the damage response of the buildings subjected to strong ground motions, without conducting time-consuming analyses. These procedures, e.g. construction of fragility curves, usually utilize methods based on the application of statistical theory. In the last decades, the increase of the computers' power has led to the development of modern soft computing methods based on the adoption of Machine Learning algorithms. The present paper attempts an extensive comparative evaluation of the capability of various Machine Learning methods to adequately predict the seismic response of R/C buildings. The training dataset is created by means of Nonlinear Time History Analyses of 90 3D R/C buildings with three different masonry infills' distributions, which are subjected to 65 earthquakes. The seismic damage is expressed in terms of the Maximum Interstory Drift Ratio. A large-scale comparison study is utilized by the most efficient Machine Learning algorithms. The experimentation shows that the LightGBM approach produces training stability, high overall performance and a remarkable coefficient of determination to estimate the ability to predict the buildings' damage response. Due to the extremely urgent issue, civil protection mechanisms need to incorporate in their technological systems scientific methodologies and appropriate technical or modeling tools such as the proposed one, which can offer valuable assistance in making optimal decisions.
summary: Seismic assessment of buildings and determination of their structural damage is at the forefront of modern scientific research. Since now, several researchers have proposed a number of procedures, in an attempt to estimate the damage response of the buildings subjected to strong ground motions, without conducting time-consuming analyses. The training dataset is created by means of Nonlinear Time History Analyses of 90 3D R/C buildings with three different masonry infills' distributions, which are subjected to 65 earthquakes. The seismic damage is expressed in terms of the Maximum Interstory Drift Ratio. A large-scale comparison study is utilized by the most efficient Machine Learning algorithms. The experimentation shows that the LightGBM approach produces training stability, high overall performance and a remarkable coefficient of determination to estimate the ability to predict the buildings' damage response. Due to the extremely urgent issue, civil protection mechanisms need to incorporate in their technological systems scientific methodologies and appropriate technical or modeling tools such as the proposed one, which can offer valuable assistance in making optimal decisions.
abstract_zh: 建筑物的地震评估及其结构损坏的确定处于现代科学研究的前沿。从现在开始，一些研究人员提出了一些程序，试图在不进行耗时分析的情况下估计建筑物在强烈地面运动下的损坏反应。这些程序，例如脆弱性曲线的构建通常采用基于统计理论应用的方法。在过去的几十年中，计算机能力的增强导致了基于机器学习算法的现代软计算方法的发展。本文尝试对各种机器学习方法的能力进行广泛的比较评估，以充分预测 R/C 建筑物的地震响应。训练数据集是通过对 90 座具有三种不同砖石填充分布的 3D R/C 建筑进行非线性时程分析而创建的，这些建筑经历了 65 次地震。地震损坏以最大层间位移比表示。最有效的机器学习算法利用大规模比较研究。实验表明，LightGBM 方法具有训练稳定性、较高的整体性能和显着的确定系数，可估计预测建筑物损坏响应的能力。由于这一问题极其紧迫，民事保护机制需要将科学方法论和适当的技术或建模工具（例如拟议的工具）纳入其技术系统，这可以为做出最佳决策提供宝贵的帮助。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了多种机器学习算法在预测钢筋混凝土建筑地震损伤中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统地震损伤评估方法耗时且复杂，需开发高效可靠的预测工具以支持紧急情况下的决策。
AI.method: 基于90栋3D钢筋混凝土建筑在65次地震下的非线性时程分析数据，构建包含三种砌体填充分布的训练集，并采用多种机器学习算法进行大规模对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，LightGBM算法在训练稳定性、整体性能及决定系数方面表现最优，能有效预测建筑损伤响应。
AI.conclusion: LightGBM方法可为应急管理系统提供科学决策支持，建议将其纳入技术系统以提升地震灾害应对能力。

The seismic damage is expressed in terms of the Maximum Interstory Drift Ratio. A large-scale comparison study is utilized by the most efficient Machine Learning algorithms. The experimentation shows that the LightGBM approach produces training stability, high overall performance and a remarkable coefficient of determination to estimate the ability to predict the buildings' damage response. Due to the extremely urgent issue, civil protection mechanisms need to incorporate in their technological systems scientific methodologies and appropriate technical or modeling tools such as the proposed one, which can offer valuable assistance in making optimal decisions. 建筑物的地震评估及其结构损坏的确定处于现代科学研究的前沿。从现在开始，一些研究人员提出了一些程序，试图在不进行耗时分析的情况下估计建筑物在强烈地面运动下的损坏反应。这些程序，例如脆弱性曲线的构建通常采用基于统计理论应用的方法。在过去的几十年中，计算机能力的增强导致了基于机器学习算法的现代软计算方法的发展。本文尝试对各种机器学习方法的能力进行广泛的比较评估，以充分预测 R/C 建筑物的地震响应。训练数据集是通过对 90 座具有三种不同砖石填充分布的 3D R/C 建筑进行非线性时程分析而创建的，这些建筑经历了 65 次地震。地震损坏以最大层间位移比表示。最有效的机器学习算法利用大规模比较研究。实验表明，LightGBM 方法具有训练稳定性、较高的整体性能和显着的确定系数，可估计预测建筑物损坏响应的能力。由于这一问题极其紧迫，民事保护机制需要将科学方法论和适当的技术或建模工具（例如拟议的工具）纳入其技术系统，这可以为做出最佳决策提供宝贵的帮助。 本文比较了多种机器学习算法在预测钢筋混凝土建筑地震损伤中的性能。 Konstantinos Demertzis,Konstantinos Kostinakis,Konstantinos Morfidis,Lazaros Iliadis cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Juncheng B Li,Shuhui Qu,Po-Yao Huang,Florian Metze
title: AudioTagging Done Right: 2nd comparison of deep learning methods for environmental sound classification
title_zh: 音频标记做得正确：环境声音分类深度学习方法的第二次比较
abstract: After its sweeping success in vision and language tasks, pure attention-based neural architectures (e.g. DeiT) are emerging to the top of audio tagging (AT) leaderboards, which seemingly obsoletes traditional convolutional neural networks (CNNs), feed-forward networks or recurrent networks. However, taking a closer look, there is great variability in published research, for instance, performances of models initialized with pretrained weights differ drastically from without pretraining, training time for a model varies from hours to weeks, and often, essences are hidden in seemingly trivial details. This urgently calls for a comprehensive study since our 1st comparison is half-decade old. In this work, we perform extensive experiments on AudioSet which is the largest weakly-labeled sound event dataset available, we also did an analysis based on the data quality and efficiency. We compare a few state-of-the-art baselines on the AT task, and study the performance and efficiency of 2 major categories of neural architectures: CNN variants and attention-based variants. We also closely examine their optimization procedures. Our opensourced experimental results provide insights to trade-off between performance, efficiency, optimization process, for both practitioners and researchers. Implementation: https://github.com/lijuncheng16/AudioTaggingDoneRight
summary: After its sweeping success in vision and language tasks, pure attention-based neural architectures (e.g. DeiT) are emerging to the top of audio tagging (AT) leaderboards, which seemingly obsoletes traditional convolutional neural networks (CNNs), feed-forward networks or recurrent networks. However, taking a closer look, there is great variability in published research, for instance, performances of models initialized with pretrained weights differ drastically from without pretraining, training time for a model varies from hours to weeks, and often, essences are hidden in seemingly trivial details. This urgently calls for a comprehensive study since our 1st comparison is half-decade old. In this work, we perform extensive experiments on AudioSet which is the largest weakly-labeled sound event dataset available, we also did an analysis based on the data quality and efficiency. We compare a few state-of-the-art baselines on the AT task, and study the performance and efficiency of 2 major categories of neural architectures: CNN variants and attention-based variants. We also closely examine their optimization procedures. Our opensourced experimental results provide insights to trade-off between performance, efficiency, optimization process, for both practitioners and researchers. Implementation: https://github.com/lijuncheng16/AudioTaggingDoneRight
abstract_zh: 在视觉和语言任务中取得巨大成功后，纯基于注意力的神经架构（例如 DeiT）正在崛起，成为音频标签（AT）排行榜的榜首，它似乎已经过时了传统的卷积神经网络（CNN）、前馈网络或循环网络。然而，仔细观察，已发表的研究存在很大差异，例如，使用预训练权重初始化的模型的性能与没有预训练的模型的性能有很大差异，模型的训练时间从几小时到几周不等，而且本质往往隐藏在看似微不足道的细节中。由于我们的第一次比较已有五年的历史，因此迫切需要进行全面的研究。在这项工作中，我们在 AudioSet（最大的弱标记声音事件数据集）上进行了广泛的实验，我们还根据数据质量和效率进行了分析。我们比较了 AT 任务的一些最先进的基线，并研究了 2 个主要类别的神经架构的性能和效率：CNN 变体和基于注意力的变体。我们还仔细检查他们的优化程序。我们的开源实验结果为从业者和研究人员提供了性能、效率、优化过程之间权衡的见解。实现：https://github.com/lijunheng16/AudioTaggingDoneRight

AI.tldr: 本文对音频标签任务中的深度学习方法进行全面比较，重点分析卷积神经网络（CNN）和基于注意力机制的模型在性能、效率及优化过程中的差异。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于注意力的模型在音频标签任务中表现突出，但现有研究存在显著差异，例如预训练权重对性能的影响、训练时间差异及细节处理问题，亟需系统性研究以提供实践指导。
AI.method: 在最大弱标注数据集AudioSet上进行大规模实验，对比CNN变体和注意力机制变体的性能与效率，分析数据质量与优化过程，并开源实验结果。
AI.result: 发现基于注意力的模型在部分场景下优于CNN，但CNN在效率和稳定性上仍有优势，且预训练对性能提升至关重要，优化细节（如学习率调度）显著影响结果。
AI.conclusion: 音频标签任务需权衡模型性能、效率与优化策略，CNN和注意力模型各有适用场景，未来研究应关注更高效的架构设计与训练方法。

title: Component-wise Analysis of Automatically Designed Multiobjective Algorithms on Constrained Problems
title_zh: 自动设计的约束问题多目标算法的逐成分分析
abstract: The performance of multiobjective algorithms varies across problems, making it hard to develop new algorithms or apply existing ones to new problems. To simplify the development and application of new multiobjective algorithms, there has been an increasing interest in their automatic design from component parts. These automatically designed metaheuristics can outperform their human-developed counterparts. However, it is still uncertain what are the most influential components leading to their performance improvement. This study introduces a new methodology to investigate the effects of the final configuration of an automatically designed algorithm. We apply this methodology to a well-performing Multiobjective Evolutionary Algorithm Based on Decomposition (MOEA/D) designed by the irace package on nine constrained problems. We then contrast the impact of the algorithm components in terms of their Search Trajectory Networks (STNs), the diversity of the population, and the hypervolume. Our results indicate that the most influential components were the restart and update strategies, with higher increments in performance and more distinct metric values. Also, their relative influence depends on the problem difficulty: not using the restart strategy was more influential in problems where MOEA/D performs better; while the update strategy was more influential in problems where MOEA/D performs the worst.
summary: The performance of multiobjective algorithms varies across problems, making it hard to develop new algorithms or apply existing ones to new problems. To simplify the development and application of new multiobjective algorithms, there has been an increasing interest in their automatic design from component parts. These automatically designed metaheuristics can outperform their human-developed counterparts. However, it is still uncertain what are the most influential components leading to their performance improvement. This study introduces a new methodology to investigate the effects of the final configuration of an automatically designed algorithm. We apply this methodology to a well-performing Multiobjective Evolutionary Algorithm Based on Decomposition (MOEA/D) designed by the irace package on nine constrained problems. We then contrast the impact of the algorithm components in terms of their Search Trajectory Networks (STNs), the diversity of the population, and the hypervolume. Our results indicate that the most influential components were the restart and update strategies, with higher increments in performance and more distinct metric values. Also, their relative influence depends on the problem difficulty: not using the restart strategy was more influential in problems where MOEA/D performs better; while the update strategy was more influential in problems where MOEA/D performs the worst.
abstract_zh: 多目标算法的性能因问题而异，因此很难开发新算法或将现有算法应用于新问题。为了简化新的多目标算法的开发和应用，人们对其零部件的自动设计越来越感兴趣。这些自动设计的元启发法可以胜过人类开发的同类方法。然而，目前还不确定哪些组件对性能提升影响最大。本研究引入了一种新方法来研究自动设计算法的最终配置的影响。我们将此方法应用于由 irace 包针对九个约束问题设计的性能良好的基于​​分解的多目标进化算法（MOEA/D）。然后，我们对比算法组件在搜索轨迹网络 (STN)、群体多样性和超体积方面的影响。我们的结果表明，最有影响力的组件是重新启动和更新策略，具有更高的性能增量和更明显的指标值。此外，它们的相对影响取决于问题的难度：对于 MOEA/D 表现较好的问题，不使用重启策略的影响更大；而更新策略对于 MOEA/D 表现最差的问题影响更大。

AI.tldr: 分析自动设计的多目标算法在约束问题中的关键组件影响
AI.motivation: 解决多目标算法性能差异问题，确定自动设计中的关键组件以提升效果
AI.method: 通过搜索轨迹网络、种群多样性和超体积指标分析算法组件影响
AI.result: 重启和更新策略最有效，其影响随问题难度而变化
AI.conclusion: 关键组件如重启和更新策略对算法性能提升有显著影响，且效果依赖于问题难度

title: Vision Transformer Compression with Structured Pruning and Low Rank Approximation
title_zh: 具有结构化剪枝和低阶近似的 Vision Transformer 压缩
abstract: Transformer architecture has gained popularity due to its ability to scale with large dataset. Consequently, there is a need to reduce the model size and latency, especially for on-device deployment. We focus on vision transformer proposed for image recognition task (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021), and explore the application of different compression techniques such as low rank approximation and pruning for this purpose. Specifically, we investigate a structured pruning method proposed recently in Zhu et al. (2021) and find that mostly feedforward blocks are pruned with this approach, that too, with severe degradation in accuracy. We propose a hybrid compression approach to mitigate this where we compress the attention blocks using low rank approximation and use the previously mentioned pruning with a lower rate for feedforward blocks in each transformer layer. Our technique results in 50% compression with 14% relative increase in classification error whereas we obtain 44% compression with 20% relative increase in error when only pruning is applied. We propose further enhancements to bridge the accuracy gap but leave it as a future work.
summary: Transformer architecture has gained popularity due to its ability to scale with large dataset. Consequently, there is a need to reduce the model size and latency, especially for on-device deployment. We focus on vision transformer proposed for image recognition task (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021), and explore the application of different compression techniques such as low rank approximation and pruning for this purpose. Specifically, we investigate a structured pruning method proposed recently in Zhu et al. (2021) and find that mostly feedforward blocks are pruned with this approach, that too, with severe degradation in accuracy. We propose a hybrid compression approach to mitigate this where we compress the attention blocks using low rank approximation and use the previously mentioned pruning with a lower rate for feedforward blocks in each transformer layer. Our technique results in 50% compression with 14% relative increase in classification error whereas we obtain 44% compression with 20% relative increase in error when only pruning is applied. We propose further enhancements to bridge the accuracy gap but leave it as a future work.
abstract_zh: Transformer 架构因其能够扩展大型数据集而受到欢迎。因此，需要减少模型大小和延迟，特别是对于设备上部署。我们专注于为图像识别任务提出的视觉变换器（Dosovitskiy et al., 2021），并为此目的探索不同压缩技术的应用，例如低秩近似和剪枝。具体来说，我们研究了 Zhu 等人最近提出的结构化剪枝方法。 （2021）并发现大多数前馈块都是用这种方法修剪的，但精度也严重下降。我们提出了一种混合压缩方法来缓解这种情况，其中我们使用低秩近似来压缩注意力块，并使用前面提到的对每个变压器层中的前馈块进行较低速率的修剪。我们的技术导致 50% 的压缩，分类误差相对增加 14%，而当仅应用修剪时，我们获得 44% 压缩，误差相对增加 20%。我们建议进一步增强以缩小准确性差距，但将其留作未来的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合压缩方法，结合结构化剪枝与低秩近似技术，以压缩视觉Transformer模型。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型在设备端部署时面临模型体积大、计算延迟高的问题，而现有结构化剪枝方法在压缩前馈块时会导致严重精度损失。
AI.method: 采用低秩近似压缩注意力模块，同时以较低剪枝率处理前馈块，形成混合压缩方案。
AI.result: 混合方法实现50%压缩率时精度仅下降14%，优于单独剪枝的44%压缩率下20%的精度损失。
AI.conclusion: 混合压缩方法在压缩效率与精度保持间取得更好平衡，但仍有优化空间需后续研究。

search_text: Vision Transformer Compression with Structured Pruning and Low Rank Approximation 具有结构化剪枝和低阶近似的 Vision Transformer 压缩 Transformer architecture has gained popularity due to its ability to scale with large dataset. Consequently, there is a need to reduce the model size and latency, especially for on-device deployment. We focus on vision transformer proposed for image recognition task (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021), and explore the application of different compression techniques such as low rank approximation and pruning for this purpose. Specifically, we investigate a structured pruning method proposed recently in Zhu et al. (2021) and find that mostly feedforward blocks are pruned with this approach, that too, with severe degradation in accuracy. We propose a hybrid compression approach to mitigate this where we compress the attention blocks using low rank approximation and use the previously mentioned pruning with a lower rate for feedforward blocks in each transformer layer. Our technique results in 50% compression with 14% relative increase in classification error whereas we obtain 44% compression with 20% relative increase in error when only pruning is applied. We propose further enhancements to bridge the accuracy gap but leave it as a future work. Transformer 架构因其能够扩展大型数据集而受到欢迎。因此，需要减少模型大小和延迟，特别是对于设备上部署。我们专注于为图像识别任务提出的视觉变换器（Dosovitskiy et al., 2021），并为此目的探索不同压缩技术的应用，例如低秩近似和剪枝。具体来说，我们研究了 Zhu 等人最近提出的结构化剪枝方法。 （2021）并发现大多数前馈块都是用这种方法修剪的，但精度也严重下降。我们提出了一种混合压缩方法来缓解这种情况，其中我们使用低秩近似来压缩注意力块，并使用前面提到的对每个变压器层中的前馈块进行较低速率的修剪。我们的技术导致 50% 的压缩，分类误差相对增加 14%，而当仅应用修剪时，我们获得 44% 压缩，误差相对增加 20%。我们建议进一步增强以缩小准确性差距，但将其留作未来的工作。 本文提出一种混合压缩方法，结合结构化剪枝与低秩近似技术，以压缩视觉Transformer模型。 Ankur Kumar cs.CV

title: MDAN: Multi-level Dependent Attention Network for Visual Emotion Analysis
title_zh: MDAN：用于视觉情感分析的多级依赖注意力网络
abstract: Visual Emotion Analysis (VEA) is attracting increasing attention. One of the biggest challenges of VEA is to bridge the affective gap between visual clues in a picture and the emotion expressed by the picture. As the granularity of emotions increases, the affective gap increases as well. Existing deep approaches try to bridge the gap by directly learning discrimination among emotions globally in one shot without considering the hierarchical relationship among emotions at different affective levels and the affective level of emotions to be classified. In this paper, we present the Multi-level Dependent Attention Network (MDAN) with two branches, to leverage the emotion hierarchy and the correlation between different affective levels and semantic levels. The bottom-up branch directly learns emotions at the highest affective level and strictly follows the emotion hierarchy while predicting emotions at lower affective levels. In contrast, the top-down branch attempt to disentangle the affective gap by one-to-one mapping between semantic levels and affective levels, namely, Affective Semantic Mapping. At each semantic level, a local classifier learns discrimination among emotions at the corresponding affective level. Finally, We integrate global learning and local learning into a unified deep framework and optimize the network simultaneously. Moreover, to properly extract and leverage channel dependencies and spatial attention while disentangling the affective gap, we carefully designed two attention modules: the Multi-head Cross Channel Attention module and the Level-dependent Class Activation Map module. Finally, the proposed deep framework obtains new state-of-the-art performance on six VEA benchmarks, where it outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods by a large margin, e.g., +3.85% on the WEBEmo dataset at 25 classes classification accuracy.
summary: Visual Emotion Analysis (VEA) is attracting increasing attention. One of the biggest challenges of VEA is to bridge the affective gap between visual clues in a picture and the emotion expressed by the picture. As the granularity of emotions increases, the affective gap increases as well. Existing deep approaches try to bridge the gap by directly learning discrimination among emotions globally in one shot without considering the hierarchical relationship among emotions at different affective levels and the affective level of emotions to be classified. In this paper, we present the Multi-level Dependent Attention Network (MDAN) with two branches, to leverage the emotion hierarchy and the correlation between different affective levels and semantic levels. The bottom-up branch directly learns emotions at the highest affective level and strictly follows the emotion hierarchy while predicting emotions at lower affective levels. In contrast, the top-down branch attempt to disentangle the affective gap by one-to-one mapping between semantic levels and affective levels, namely, Affective Semantic Mapping. At each semantic level, a local classifier learns discrimination among emotions at the corresponding affective level. Finally, We integrate global learning and local learning into a unified deep framework and optimize the network simultaneously. Moreover, to properly extract and leverage channel dependencies and spatial attention while disentangling the affective gap, we carefully designed two attention modules: the Multi-head Cross Channel Attention module and the Level-dependent Class Activation Map module. Finally, the proposed deep framework obtains new state-of-the-art performance on six VEA benchmarks, where it outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods by a large margin, e.g., +3.85% on the WEBEmo dataset at 25 classes classification accuracy.
abstract_zh: 视觉情感分析（VEA）正引起越来越多的关注。 VEA 最大的挑战之一是弥合图片中的视觉线索与图片所表达的情感之间的情感差距。随着情绪粒度的增加，情感差距也会增加。现有的深度方法试图通过一次性直接学习全局情绪之间的区分来弥补这一差距，而不考虑不同情感级别的情感之间的层次关系以及要分类的情感的情感级别。在本文中，我们提出了具有两个分支的多级依赖注意力网络（MDAN），以利用情感层次结构以及不同情感级别和语义级别之间的相关性。自下而上的分支直接学习最高情感级别的情感，并严格遵循情感层次结构，同时预测较低情感级别的情感。相比之下，自上而下的分支试图通过语义层次和情感层次之间的一对一映射（即情感语义映射）来理清情感鸿沟。在每个语义级别，本地分类器学习相应情感级别的情绪之间的区别。最后，我们将全局学习和局部学习整合到一个统一的深度框架中，同时优化网络。此外，为了正确提取和利用通道依赖性和空间注意力，同时理清情感差距，我们精心设计了两个注意力模块：多头跨通道注意力模块和依赖于级别的类激活图模块。最后，所提出的深度框架在 6 个 VEA 基准上获得了新的最先进的性能，大大优于现有的最先进的方法，例如，在 WEBEmo 数据集上的 25 类分类精度提高了 3.85%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多级依赖注意力网络（MDAN），通过结合情感层次结构和语义关联，解决视觉情感分析中因情感粒度增加导致的感知差距问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在情感分类时未充分考虑不同情感层级间的层次关系及语义层级与情感层级的关联，导致难以有效弥合视觉线索与情感表达间的感知差距。
AI.method: 设计包含自底向上分支（遵循情感层次预测低级情感）和自顶向下分支（通过语义-情感映射解耦感知差距）的双分支网络，并引入多头跨通道注意力模块与层级依赖类激活图模块，整合全局与局部学习。
AI.result: 在六个视觉情感分析基准数据集上取得新SOTA性能，例如在WEBEmo数据集25类分类任务中准确率提升3.85%。
AI.conclusion: MDAN通过建模情感层次依赖关系与语义关联，有效弥合了视觉情感分析中的感知差距，显著优于现有方法。

authors_text: Connor Z. Lin,David B. Lindell,Eric R. Chan,Gordon Wetzstein
title: 3D GAN Inversion for Controllable Portrait Image Animation
title_zh: 用于可控人像图像动画的 3D GAN 反转
abstract: Millions of images of human faces are captured every single day; but these photographs portray the likeness of an individual with a fixed pose, expression, and appearance. Portrait image animation enables the post-capture adjustment of these attributes from a single image while maintaining a photorealistic reconstruction of the subject's likeness or identity. Still, current methods for portrait image animation are typically based on 2D warping operations or manipulations of a 2D generative adversarial network (GAN) and lack explicit mechanisms to enforce multi-view consistency. Thus these methods may significantly alter the identity of the subject, especially when the viewpoint relative to the camera is changed. In this work, we leverage newly developed 3D GANs, which allow explicit control over the pose of the image subject with multi-view consistency. We propose a supervision strategy to flexibly manipulate expressions with 3D morphable models, and we show that the proposed method also supports editing appearance attributes, such as age or hairstyle, by interpolating within the latent space of the GAN. The proposed technique for portrait image animation outperforms previous methods in terms of image quality, identity preservation, and pose transfer while also supporting attribute editing.
summary: Millions of images of human faces are captured every single day; but these photographs portray the likeness of an individual with a fixed pose, expression, and appearance. Portrait image animation enables the post-capture adjustment of these attributes from a single image while maintaining a photorealistic reconstruction of the subject's likeness or identity. Still, current methods for portrait image animation are typically based on 2D warping operations or manipulations of a 2D generative adversarial network (GAN) and lack explicit mechanisms to enforce multi-view consistency. Thus these methods may significantly alter the identity of the subject, especially when the viewpoint relative to the camera is changed. In this work, we leverage newly developed 3D GANs, which allow explicit control over the pose of the image subject with multi-view consistency. We propose a supervision strategy to flexibly manipulate expressions with 3D morphable models, and we show that the proposed method also supports editing appearance attributes, such as age or hairstyle, by interpolating within the latent space of the GAN. The proposed technique for portrait image animation outperforms previous methods in terms of image quality, identity preservation, and pose transfer while also supporting attribute editing.
abstract_zh: 每天都会捕获数百万张人脸图像；但这些照片描绘的是一个具有固定姿势、表情和外表的人的肖像。肖像图像动画可以在捕获后调整单个图像的这些属性，同时保持对象的肖像或身份的真实感重建。尽管如此，当前的肖像图像动画方法通常基于 2D 变形操作或 2D 生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的操作，并且缺乏强制多视图一致性的明确机制。因此，这些方法可能会显着改变对象的身份，尤其是当相对于相机的视点发生变化时。在这项工作中，我们利用新开发的 3D GAN，它允许以多视图一致性的方式显式控制图像主体的姿势。我们提出了一种监督策略，通过 3D 可变形模型灵活地操纵表达式，并且我们表明，所提出的方法还支持通过在 GAN 的潜在空间内进行插值来编辑外观属性，例如年龄或发型。所提出的肖像图像动画技术在图像质量、身份保存和姿势转移方面优于以前的方法，同时还支持属性编辑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D GAN的可控肖像图像动画方法，以实现对图像中人物姿态、表情和外观属性的编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有的肖像图像动画方法通常基于2D操作，无法保证多视角一致性，且可能显著改变人物身份，因此需要一种更有效的方法。
AI.method: 本文利用新开发的3D GAN，并提出一种监督策略，通过3D可变形模型灵活控制表情，同时支持在GAN潜在空间中插值以编辑外观属性。
AI.result: 该方法在图像质量、身份保持和姿态转换方面优于现有方法，同时支持属性编辑。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的3D GAN肖像图像动画方法在多视角一致性、身份保持和属性编辑方面表现出色，为未来的研究提供了新方向。

search_text: 3D GAN Inversion for Controllable Portrait Image Animation 用于可控人像图像动画的 3D GAN 反转 Millions of images of human faces are captured every single day; but these photographs portray the likeness of an individual with a fixed pose, expression, and appearance. Portrait image animation enables the post-capture adjustment of these attributes from a single image while maintaining a photorealistic reconstruction of the subject's likeness or identity. Still, current methods for portrait image animation are typically based on 2D warping operations or manipulations of a 2D generative adversarial network (GAN) and lack explicit mechanisms to enforce multi-view consistency. Thus these methods may significantly alter the identity of the subject, especially when the viewpoint relative to the camera is changed. In this work, we leverage newly developed 3D GANs, which allow explicit control over the pose of the image subject with multi-view consistency. We propose a supervision strategy to flexibly manipulate expressions with 3D morphable models, and we show that the proposed method also supports editing appearance attributes, such as age or hairstyle, by interpolating within the latent space of the GAN. The proposed technique for portrait image animation outperforms previous methods in terms of image quality, identity preservation, and pose transfer while also supporting attribute editing. 每天都会捕获数百万张人脸图像；但这些照片描绘的是一个具有固定姿势、表情和外表的人的肖像。肖像图像动画可以在捕获后调整单个图像的这些属性，同时保持对象的肖像或身份的真实感重建。尽管如此，当前的肖像图像动画方法通常基于 2D 变形操作或 2D 生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的操作，并且缺乏强制多视图一致性的明确机制。因此，这些方法可能会显着改变对象的身份，尤其是当相对于相机的视点发生变化时。在这项工作中，我们利用新开发的 3D GAN，它允许以多视图一致性的方式显式控制图像主体的姿势。我们提出了一种监督策略，通过 3D 可变形模型灵活地操纵表达式，并且我们表明，所提出的方法还支持通过在 GAN 的潜在空间内进行插值来编辑外观属性，例如年龄或发型。所提出的肖像图像动画技术在图像质量、身份保存和姿势转移方面优于以前的方法，同时还支持属性编辑。 本文提出了一种基于3D GAN的可控肖像图像动画方法，以实现对图像中人物姿态、表情和外观属性的编辑。 Connor Z. Lin,David B. Lindell,Eric R. Chan,Gordon Wetzstein cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG
